Name: Luxottica
Description:
#ToSeeTheBeautyOfLife is the vision that inspires Luxottica’s sustainable business approach and is an integral part of the Group’s strategy. It stems from a notion of universal beauty that comes to life at the intersection of personal well-being, respect for the environment, ethics and the transparency of relations. 

Learn more on www.luxottica.com/en/toseethebeautyoflife. 

Luxottica is a leader in the design, manufacture and distribution of fashion, luxury, sports and performance eyewear. Its portfolio includes proprietary brands such as Ray-Ban, Oakley, Vogue Eyewear, Persol, Oliver Peoples, Alain Mikli and Arnette, as well as over 20 licensed brands, including some of the most well-known and prestigious names in the global fashion and luxury industries. The Group’s global wholesale distribution network covers more than 150 countries and is complemented by an extensive retail network of approximately 9,200 stores, with LensCrafters and Pearle Vision in North America, OPSM and LensCrafters in Asia-Pacific, GMO and Óticas Carol in Latin America, Salmoiraghi & Viganò in Italy and Sunglass Hut worldwide. In 2019, with approximately 80,000 employees, Luxottica posted net sales of over Euro 9 billion. Additional information on the Group is available at www.luxottica.com.

Name: Saint Laurent
Description:
Founded in 1961, Yves Saint Laurent was the first couture house to introduce the concept of luxury prêt-à-porter in a 1966 collection called ‘Rive Gauche’, synonymous with youth and freedom. This shift represented a first critical step in the modernization of fashion and revolutionized the socio-cultural landscape.
In 1999, the luxury goods division of the Kering Group acquired Yves Saint Laurent and, under the creative direction of Anthony Vaccarello since April 2016, continues to position the house at the summit of the luxury universe. Today, Saint Laurent collections include women’s and men’s ready-to-wear, shoes, handbags, small leather goods, jewelry, scarves, ties and eyewear.

For further information, please visit our website: www.ysl.com

Name: Valentino
Description: Maison Valentino was founded in 1960 in Rome by Valentino Garavani and Giancarlo Giammetti. An enduring symbol of crafting excellence, creativity and uniqueness, Valentino continues to inspire individuality by redefining the values of mastery and emotional beauty that are deeply intertwined with its roots as the most established Italian Maison de Couture. The Company is led by Chief Executive Officer Riccardo Bellini with Creative Director Alessandro Michele. The collections include Haute Couture, Valentino women’s and men’s ready-to-wear, Valentino Garavani Accessories, Valentino Eyewear, and Valentino Beauty by L'Oréal.

Name: Bottega Veneta
Description: Established in Vicenza, Italy, in 1966, Bottega Veneta preserves an authentic connection to its founding principles of Labor et Ingenium, expressing craft and creativity.

Name: The Luxury Closet
Description:
Like most iconic beginnings, The Luxury Closet has had a profound start. It all began with an Hermès Birkin handbag, and the rest, as we say, is history. Founded in 2012 in the bustling city of Dubai as a three-member team by our founder and CEO, Kunal Kapoor, The Luxury Closet is built on the firm foundation of circularity, authenticity, and excellent customer service. With thousands of unique designer products, global consignors, and buyers, we are one of the most trusted marketplaces for authentic luxury today. 

A significant milestone in our journey was when two of the Kattan sisters, Huda and Mona, came aboard as investors in 2020. Known as the ‘queen of beauty,’ Huda Kattan is the founder of her eponymous cosmetic line Huda Beauty, and Mona Kattan is the Co-Founder and Global President of Huda Beauty and Kayali. Together, the Kattan sisters bring their creative intake and exceptional business expertise to the TLC family. 

The Luxury Closet is paving its way to disrupt the world of luxury retail. Bain &Co estimates that there is $500 Billion worth of re-sellable luxury items in consumer's closets, and nonetheless, each year consumers buy nearly $300B more of them.

We are also backed by investors like Middle East Venture Partners, Wamda Capital, Two Four 54 - Abu Dhabi, and Dubai Silicon Oasis Authority who are helping us create an amazing company.

Please visit www.theluxurycloset.com or download our app to find out more!

New or pre-loved, luxury is guaranteed! We truly hope your experience with The Luxury Closet is a happy one.

Name: Victoria Beckham
Description:
Founded in 2008 with a collection of dresses celebrated for their cut and fit, Victoria Beckham’s eponymous label forms the basis of the modern woman’s wardrobe; versatile and wearable yet rooted in modernity with a sophisticated ease. Developed at the Victoria Beckham atelier in London, today the brand offering includes ready-to-wear, footwear, expertly crafted eyewear, and timeless leather goods.
 
The transition from designer muse to Creative Director of her own brand was a natural one, fuelled by a longtime obsession with design and art, an authentic and meticulous attention to detail, and a distinctly luxurious sensibility that ignites the imagination. 

With influences from the worlds of art and film, the Victoria Beckham brand is defined by a considered blend of classic British luxury with a subtle contemporary flair, resulting in immaculately cut tailoring, dresses, denim, and separates, with signature touches in the form of off-kilter prints, modern cuts and colour palettes.
 
The Victoria Beckham woman is core to the brand’s foundation and visual identity, which is polished, elevated, relevant, and always informed by the current moment. 
 
The Spring Summer 2023 collection marks a new chapter in the brand’s history, driven by a strategic root-and-branch overhaul and a highly acclaimed debut at Paris Fashion Week. An embracing of femininity, an assertion of values, and a celebration of craft, the collection underscores the classic heritage of the brand, with a modern and luxurious look and feel.
 
With offices in London and New York and a flagship store in Mayfair, the brand has won critical acclaim alongside multiple industry awards including Best Designer Brand and Brand of the Year at the BFC’s Fashion Awards. 

In addition to victoriabeckham.com, Victoria Beckham is carried in 230 stores in 50 countries worldwide, with dedicated personalised spaces in key department stores.

Name: Etro
Description:
ETRO is New Tradition, the sum of artisan know-how and creative experimentation.
The entrepreneurial venture began in 1968, when Gimmo Etro, the brand’s visionary founder, launched a production of highly prestigious fabrics using noble and natural fibres, which he embellished with original designs and innovative colour ways.
In 1981 the furnishing textiles line made its debut. The Paisley motif used to enrich the first collection was set to become ETRO’s mark of identity.
The product range added another string to its bow in 1984 with leather goods and the bag collection in Paisley jacquard fabric.
The launch of the home accessories and complements collection, in 1986, and the creation of the perfumes division, in the late 1980s, consolidated the brand’s lifestyle concept.
The 1990s saw the unveiling of the first men’s and women’s prêt-à-porter collections, their inventive and recherché style earning the label instant recognition.
The materials, the workings and a special talent with prints are what make ETRO unique and unrepeatable.

Name: Panerai
Description:
Founded in Florence in 1860 as a workshop, shop and subsequently school of watch-making, for many decades Panerai supplied the Italian Navy and its specialist diving corps in particular with precision instruments. The designs developed by Panerai in that time, including the Luminor and Radiomir, were covered by the Military Secrets Act for many years and were launched on the international market only after the brand was acquired by the Richemont Group in 1997.

Today Panerai develops and crafts its movements and watches at its Neuchâtel manufacture. The latter are a seamless melding of Italian design flair and history with Swiss horological expertise. Panerai watches are sold across the world through an exclusive network of distributors and Panerai boutiques.

Name: Trafalgar Luxury Group
Description:
We are Trafalgar Luxury Group, tapping into a legacy of more than 50 years of experience in the gulf region to provide our customers with an unforgettable luxurious and personalized journey, working towards becoming the preferred proprietor of luxury in the Middle East.
 
@trafalgarluxurygroup | @itsluxuryofficial

Name: Watches of Switzerland Group PLC
Description:
We're a FTSE-250 retail company employing nearly 3,000 people across the UK, Europe and the United States. We're the UK's leading luxury watch specialist in the UK with a significant presence in the US and a complementary jewellery offering. At the last count we have over 190 showrooms across the UK, US and Europe, including 77 dedicated mono-brand boutiques in partnership with brands such as Rolex, OMEGA, TAG Heuer and Breitling plus seven-e-commerce websites!

Our success is based on strong, long-standing partnerships with the most prestigious luxury watch brands, supported by impactful marketing and powered by leading-edge technology to provide our clients with a modern, distinctive luxury experience. This is underpinned by our people, who are highly trained and motivated to deliver exceptional client experience whilst building inclusive teams.

Watches of Switzerland Group has moved our headquarters to a new, state-of-the-art office in Carlton Park, Leicester. The new 75,000 square foot office is located just outside of Leicester city centre and is home to over 500 employees. Surrounded by 32 acres of woodlands with facilities such as a mini market, team lounges, a multi-faith room and a parent room.
Our clients love us for our exceptional client experience, expertise, and approachability. Our clients are at the heart of everything that we do – we love to wow our clients and make every interaction with us special and memorable.

Name: LVMH Watches & Jewelry
Description:
The Watches & Jewelry division of LVMH brings together 6 leading Houses in high-quality watchmaking, jewelry and high jewelry with complementary positions. 

The Division is present in 34 countries with Brands Headquarters in 3 different countries, respectively Switzerland, Italy and France, what makes the Watches & Jewelry division a highly international pool with 8,000 employees from 65 nationalities.

This is the most significant Watches & Jewelry division belonging to a luxury Group, LVMH being the world leader in this industry with more than 70 prestigious Houses in all five major sectors.

Established in 1999, the Watches & Jewelry sector is the most recent Group's activity and counts among the top dynamic brands on the market:
• For watchmaking, TAG Heuer’s international stature, Hublot’s strong dynamic of innovation and Zenith’s age-old “savoir-faire”;
• For jewelry and high jewelry, Bulgari’s colorful and generous influence, Chaumet’s graceful and elegant style and Fred’s informal glamorous collections.

The shared mission of the 6 Houses is to employ their bold creativity and perfectly master their proper “savoir-faire” to constantly surprise their customers and offer them the objects they desire. A quest for excellence, creativity and innovation guide the Houses in this area every day. 

If you wish to be part of this exciting and challenging work environment, we invite you to follow our LVMH Watches & Jewelry division page for regular updates and insights into our business.

Name: L'azurde
Description:
Always seeking perfection and precision, L’azurde has excelled at the art of jewelry design, transforming every inspiration into a unique masterpiece, and with one beautiful design after another, it has evolved to become the largest gold and jewelry designer, manufacturer, and distributor in the Middle East and one of the largest jewelry manufacturer worldwide.

With a vision of continuous progress in crafting jewelry, L’azurde is a signature name at the highest level, both regionally and globally. To reinforce its leading role among major international brands, L’azurde strives to regularly promote its name across the region. With the help of selected jewelry experts and state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities, L’azurde offers its products in the Middle East & North Africa and exports them to many other countries across the world.

L’azurde sustains its mission to constantly redefine and advance in the jewelry industry. This is achieved by bringing together a wealth of know-how, a heritage of creativity, an impeccable sense of originality and, most importantly, a true understanding of every woman’s need for distinctiveness.

Producing more than 3,000 different jewelry models every year, L’azurde is proud to be one of the few manufacturers operating in 21-karat and 18-karat gold and diamond jewelry. Its award-winning designers and model-makers are at the heart of what L’azurde does. Because L’azurde believes jewelry is more than just a status symbol, it designs original classical and contemporary jewelry for every moment in a women’s life, creating a signature style that offers elegance and uniqueness for every occasion..

Over the last decade, L’azurde has received industry recognition at the highest level. Among many other awards, it received the “Gold Virtuosi International Award” for design excellence in gold jewelry awarded in Italy and the “International Quality in Gold Jewelry Award” by the Trade Leaders’ Club in France.

Name: TISSOT
Description:
Since 1853, Tissot has been at the heart of Swiss watchmaking. Our dedication to craftsmanship and quality is matched only by our passion for performance and precision. 

Over the years, our pioneering products such as the legendary Tissot T-Touch have made headlines as well as history. The ground-breaking Tissot T-Touch Connect Solar uses sustainable solar energy and connected technology that guarantees privacy. It confirms our long-held reputation as innovators by tradition. 

Our passion for sport is unrivalled and our timing systems are tried, tested and trusted by a range of professional sports and athletes. In basketball the NBA and FIBA, in cycling the Tour de France and La Vuelta and in motorsports MotoGP are just some of the names that rely on Tissot as their Official Timekeeper. 

We provide innovative and traditional watches for our customers who appreciate our commitment to quality, authenticity and excellence.

Name: Mouawad
Description:
MOUAWAD – A jewelry house specialized in “crafting the extraordinary”.
For more than a century, Mouawad has carved a name of renown in the world of jewelry and timepieces based on its artistic excellence, outstanding expertise, trusted relationships and deep passion for crafting the extraordinary.
Over the decades, royalty, high society, celebrities and esteemed clients have continued to be beguiled by Mouawad’s unique offering, thus earning the company its elite status and powering its growth across continents. Now in its fourth generation, this family business is today led by Co-Guardians Fred, Alain, and Pascal Mouawad, three brothers who each perpetuate a heritage of excellence and bring a lifetime of passion to their respective roles. With Fred Mouawad heading the Diamond Division, Alain, the Watch Division, and Pascal, the Retail Division, each Co-Guardian actively embodies the Mouawad commitment to crafting the extraordinary.
Global recognition for exceptional masterpieces
The company’s commitment to ‘crafting the extraordinary’ has been rewarded with an unprecedented five Guinness World Records, the most recent of which being for the Mouawad Flower of Eternity Jewellery Coffer — the most valuable jewelry box in the world (US $3.5M). In 2013 the Mouawad L’Incomparable Diamond Necklace was named as the most valuable necklace in the world (US $55M), featuring the world’s largest internally flawless diamond, the Incomparable Diamond (407.48 carat). In 2011 Guinness awarded Mouawad for creating the most valuable handbag in the world ― the Mouawad 1001 Nights Diamond Purse (US $3.8M). In 2003 the Very Sexy Fantasy Bra received a Guinness for being the most expensive bra ever made (US $11M), and in 1990 a Guinness World Record was awarded for the Mouawad Splendor ― the most expensive single pear-shaped diamond in the world at the time (US $12.76M).

Name: Watches and Wonders
Description: Watches and Wonders Geneva is a watchmaking summit bringing together the key players of the industry. During four days for professionals and three public days open to everyone, the event sets the trends of the year, transforming Geneva into the global epicenter of fine watchmaking.

Name: Movado Group, Inc
Description:
Movado Group, a global leader in the watch industry, champions precision, innovation, and artistry. With a celebrated portfolio including Movado, EBEL, Concord, Olivia Burton, MVMT, Coach Watches, HUGO BOSS Watches, Lacoste Watches, Tommy Hilfiger Watches, and Calvin Klein Watches, we craft not only timepieces but also a variety of jewelry and fashion accessories.

Our vibrant culture offers expansive career opportunities within an environment where sustainable growth is intertwined with a passion for the arts. Employees across the globe contribute to and grow with a company that values hands-on experience and professional development.

Strategically positioned with offices and manufacturing facilities worldwide, and over 70 retail locations, Movado Group embraces the future with a commitment to excellence. We believe every second is an opportunity to advance, innovate, and weave creativity into the fabric of our already rich legacy.

Name: PHILIPP PLEIN
Description: PHILIPP PLEIN.  A reality.  A way of being.  A strong identity.  Luxury beyond all convention for a brand, created in Munich in 1998 and guided by the entrepreneurial spirit of founder/designer Philipp Plein, which is in continual growth due to a capacity to astonish, surprise and command attention.  With a global dimension and an international  level of success.  Today the headquarters are in Lugano and the Swiss Maison  counts more than 200 employees worldwide;  three showrooms,  in Milan, New York and Hong Kong respectively and a significant presence in the principal world markets.  PHILIPP PLEIN, with men’s, women’s and children’s clothing collections,  jewelry , accessories and the Home collection, meets the demands of a sophisticated and ultra-contemporary consumer.  From New York to Tokyo.  From Paris to Dubai.  From Moscow to Berlin.

Name: Hari Krishna Exports Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
At Hari Krishna Exports, we are a global leader in the natural diamond industry, powered by a purpose that goes beyond our stones. Since our founding in 1992, we have been built on three core values: Family, Faith, and Philanthropy.

We believe that our people, from our skilled artisans in Surat to our global partners, are the true heart of our business. We are a family of over 9,000 members, united by a shared faith in the enduring value of natural diamonds and a steadfast commitment to giving back through our philanthropic arm, Dholakia Foundation.

This philosophy is reflected in every facet of our operations. We lead the industry in ethical sourcing and sustainable practices, proudly operating our facilities on 100% renewable solar energy. Our commitment to innovation is matched by our dedication to empowering communities, creating opportunities, and making a lasting positive impact.

Our diamonds go beyond just a symbol of everlasting love; they are a reflection of our dedication to our people, our planet, and the positive change we can create together. We believe that true success is measured not only by the sparkle of our diamonds but also by the strength of our values.

Name: DAMIANI Group
Description:
Damiani Group was founded in 1924 in Valenza, homeland of the best Italian jewelry tradition, thanks to Enrico Grassi, who began designing and creating jewels with diamonds: small masterpieces destined for the noble families of the time, for which he soon became the trusted jeweler.

Damiani Group is leader of the Italian jewelry market sector and is acknowledged worldwide as a synonym of top-end Italian style tradition, with prestigious brands: Damiani, Salvini, Bliss, Calderoni, Rocca e Venini.

Name: Swiss Watch Group
Description:
Swiss Watch Group is a leading distributor of timepieces, jewellery, writing instruments, leather goods and eyewear to the Middle East & Africa. Established in 1996, the UAE-based company represents a rich portfolio of renowned luxury and fashion brands.

Swiss Watch Group is an integral link in the International Luxury Group (ILG) – a conglomerate that is the worldwide licensee for brands like – SAINT HONORE, AIGNER, POLICE, CERRUTI 1881 to name a few.

Starting humble, Swiss Watch Group has transcended to a strong and focused business hub that constantly innovates to create a positive identity for each of its brands.

Name: Delvaux
Description:
Founded in Brussels in 1829, Delvaux is the oldest fine leather goods house in the world, crafting and designing without interruption in its workshops since then. 
Delvaux is the inventor of the modern handbag, having filed the first-ever leather handbag patent in the world, in 1908.

Name: Singularu
Description: SINGULARU Trendy Jewels

Name: Frederique Constant
Description: Frederique Constant specializes in luxury watches. We operate in a segment that is best described by 'Accessible Luxury'. Passion for what we do is one of the key drivers of our success. In past years, the company grew 25-35% annually.

Name: Natural Diamond Council
Description:
The Natural Diamond Council is the authority and resource on natural diamonds for consumers and the industry. Originally formed as the Diamond Producers Association, our mission is to advance the integrity of the modern diamond jewelry industry and to inspire, educate and support consumers. We do this by: 
• Communicating the inherent value and benefits of natural diamonds and the companies supplying them. 
• Reinforcing the positive impact of the natural diamond industry by sharing insights, communicating best practices and promoting ethical, social and environmental standards. 
• Ensuring clear and accurate information about diamonds and the diamond industry. 
• Partnering with industry stakeholders for the purpose of driving transparency and trust. 

Together, our five members (De Beers, Petra Diamonds, Rio Tinto, Okavango Diamond Company, The GEM Group) represent approximately 75% of the world’s rough diamond production. With operations in six continents and more than a dozen countries including Canada, South Africa, Botswana, and Australia, Natural Diamond Council members contribute to a sustainable future and impact the lives of millions of people. 
 
Our new consumer brand and digital publishing platform, Only Natural Diamonds, will inspire and inform consumers globally about the values and heritage of natural diamonds, as well as promote the significant innovation happening throughout the world of diamond jewelry.   
 
The future of diamonds has arrived. We hope you’ll join us. Naturaldiamonds.com

Name: Altagamma
Description:
Created in 1992, Altagamma Foundation gathers Italy's High-End Cultural and Creative Companies, recognized globally as authentic ambassadors of Italian style. 
With more than 100 Members in the fields of fashion, design, jewellery, food, hospitality, automotive and yachting, Altagamma's mission is to boost growth for its partners, thus making an effective contribution to the Italian economy.

Name: De Rigo
Description:
We are a multinational family business with a fascinating story - one worth telling and sharing.

Founded in 1978 by the De Rigo family as a small artisan company in the Belluno area, today we are among the world leaders in the design, production and distribution of high-end prescription frames and sunglasses.

Our Group is currently active in over 100 countries thanks to our extensive wholesale and retail network, with 24 subsidiaries, 100 independent distributors and 4 retail divisions: General Optica (Spain), Mais Optica (Portugal), Opmar Optik (Turkey) and affiliate Boots Opticians (UK).

We are present in most of the markets worldwide with our own brands Lozza, Police, Yalea and Sting and licenses Aramis, Blumarine, Chopard, DIFF, Escada, Fila, Furla, GAP, John Varvatos, Jones New York, Just Cavalli, Lanvin Collection, Lucky Brand, Mulberry, Nina Ricci, Philipp Plein, Plein Sport, Porsche Design, Roberto Cavalli, Rodenstock, Tous, Tumi, Twinset, Victor Hugo, Zadig&Voltaire.

We are guided by our values, which have accompanied us for almost 50 years now and which will continue to steer us thoroughly into the future.

We believe in people and our territory, we believe in sharing and in offering eyewear that represent us.
Our eyewear collections are much more than products: they communicate stories, experiences and talk of uncompromised quality.

Name: Malabar Gold & Diamonds
Description: Malabar Group, with its headquarters in Calicut, Kerala, India and having 15 business verticals spread across 13 countries, is the fastest-growing business conglomerate in the world with an annual turnover of USD 7.5 Billion and a size of over 25,000 management team members worldwide. ESG (Environmental, Social & Governance) has been the primary commitment of the group since its inception, with the key focus areas being Health, Housing, Hunger Free World, Education, Environment and Women empowerment. Integrating the principles of responsibility and sustainability into its core business, Malabar Group periodically strengthens its ESG goals to remain a socially conscious and responsible organization and contributes 5% of its profit to such initiatives in the same country of operation.

Name: ANTONIOLI GROUP
Description:
Antonioli is a world-renowned retailer and one of the italian leaders in high-fashion & luxury goods, primarily known for being a pioneer in introducing new trends and brands to the Italian and, later on, worldwide market.

ANTONIOLI RETAIL 
In 1987, Claudio Antonioli launched his first retail project in Milan in Piazza Lima, which soon became a reference point for a select and knowledgeable clientele. 
Today there are a total of 7 Flagship stores in Milan, Ibiza and Lugano as well as Antonioli.eu

Antonioli also acts as incubator, focused on amplifying the visions of global artists and creators. Among its brands it counts the Belgian brand Ann Demeulemeester and the latest clubwear brand 44 LABEL GROUP, as well as Sogni Milano Restaurant and Volt Club Milano. 

ANN DEMEULEMEESTER
Known for its elegant tailoring and dark yet glamorous aesthetic, it has created a serene and darkly romantic world with an intriguing mix of edgy rebellion and sophistication. 

44 LABEL GROUP
Launched in June 2021, 44 Label Group is an authentic reflection of Max Kobosil’s vision.
Considered one of techno’s biggest artists, he interprets the spirit and the aspirations of the techno rave community that has gathered around him, whilst also reinterpreting them through his unique take on fashion.   

SOGNI
Opened in September 2023, Sogni has become the place to be in Milan, aiming to offer a new way for a selective cosmopolitan clientele to enjoy the Milanese lifestyle.
Seamlessly combining excellence, tradition, and simplicity which is characterized by its unique atmosphere, where fine cuisine and immersive music merge to offer an exclusive experience that delights the senses. 

VOLT
Based in Milan, Volt is one of the world’s most important clubs on the avant-garde electronic scene.
Volt Club puts Milan on the map of the most Influential places for electronic music, hosting the biggest names in the sector.

Name: Oris
Description: Oris is an independent Swiss watch company based in Hölstein, where we’ve been making beautiful, timeless, high-functioning mechanical watches for more than 120 years. And that’s a joy for us, a joy we want to share with you, today’s world citizens.

Name: Casablanca Paris
Description:
Casablanca comes to life in a palette that simultaneously evokes the clay tennis courts and the sunbaked terracotta of North Africa; accented with fresh tennis whites and pops of pastel. Sportswear inspired silhouettes are refined but relaxed, and presented in crisp cotton and plush terrycloth. 

Casablanca’s aesthetic is a fusion between lux and leisurewear, a perfect equilibrium of comfort and elegance. Casablanca re-interprets timeless environments of a luxurious heritage hotel suite or a crisp glass of champagne at a private country club terrace sunset. Adding a vivacity of colour keeps the brand youthful and easily inserted into a plethora of daily living. Casablanca is a modern reimagining of the timeless apres-sport aesthetic. Applying Neapolitan tailoring techniques to tennis-inspired statement pieces. 

Casablanca offers pieces for wearing when the days exertions are done, but the night has not yet begun. Those magical hours, marked by their sense of ease and heady anticipation, can be the most decadent part of the day. It’s a combination that belies the rich dual heritage of Casablanca’s French-Moroccan founder, Charaf Tajer.

Name: Trudon
Description:
Established in 1643, on the threshold of the reign of Louis XIV, Cire Trudon is the oldest working wax maker in the world. During the 17th century, the factory became the Royal Wax Factory, official supplier to the French Court and Napoleon I. The factory has spanned the centuries, modernising and adapting throughout its history. In 1889, it was awarded a gold medal at the Universal Exhibition in Paris and has won other awards for the intelligence of its expertise, today as innovative as ever.

For several decades, Cire Trudon has been developing scented candles in partnership with renowned perfumers and, as part of its partnership with the RMN, the French national museum council also offers reproductions in coloured waxes.

In 2017, responding to the world of candles and lightened by the word "wax", the House of Trudon extended its expertise and acquired a collection of eight skin fragrances for men and women.

Name: GIADA
Description:
GIADA is a luxury brand born in Milan Italy, with a focus on women's ready-to-wear, leather goods, accessories and more. Its mission is to make both fashion and lifestyle into forms of art. Minimalist, modern and elegant – GIADA conveys a sophisticated simplicity through fine materials and superb craftsmanship. 

Gabriele Colangelo has been the creative director since 2015.

Name: KILIAN PARIS
Description:
“I want to put perfumery back on its pedestal by going back to the truth about perfume; back to the way perfume was made in the late 19th and the early 20th century, but adding a contemporary twist at the same time.”

In 2007, Kilian launched his own namesake brand with the ambition of reflecting not only his distinct personality, but also to achieve a perfect alliance between elegance and uncompromising luxury. His “eco-luxe” philosophy that each bottle can be refilled and kept for a lifetime catapulted the brand to the top of the fragrance market and into a niche of its very own. At KILIAN PARIS, we believe that real luxury should not be disposable. 

As the Kilian brand evolves and matures, the one aspect which remains consistent is that each and every product created embodies ultimate sophistication and timeless luxury.

KILIAN PARIS
Founded in 2007
48 rue Cambon
75001 Paris
www.kilian-paris.com
www.instagram.com/kilianparis

Name: ROMMANEL
Description:
A ROMMANEL é uma empresa brasileira voltada a valorizar as pessoas e transformar sonhos em realidade. Traduz tudo isso fabricando mais de 3.000 modelos de joias folheadas a Ouro 18k e Rhodium e joias em Aço.
A moda é um fator importante para a empresa, pois a ROMMANEL vende beleza, autoestima e estilo. Para isso, possui profissionais que sempre pesquisam as principais tendências e as traduzem em novos modelos de joias.
Por respeitar o consumidor, as joias folheadas ROMMANEL são hipoalergênicas a níquel e buscam a excelência em design, acabamento e durabilidade, resultando em um produto que se tornou referência em mais de 40 países.
Para isso, conta com um moderno parque industrial com equipamentos capazes de realizar esses sonhos sem agredir o meio ambiente. Assim, respeitando o planeta e a qualidade de vida com ética e respeito a todos, a ROMMANEL olha para o futuro na certeza que essa borboleta alcançará voos cada vez mais altos.

Name: Smythson of Bond Street
Description:
Established in 1887 on London’s New Bond Street, Smythson has since become synonymous with beautiful, functional and timeless pieces. From bags and accessories to leather-bound notebooks, diaries, stationery and home accessories; every Smythson piece embodies meticulous craft and an unmistakable sense of British sophistication. 

The proud holder of two Royal Warrants, Smythson has garnered a rather remarkable clientele both past and present, from European Royalty and the Indian Maharajas to the likes of Grace Kelly, Katharine Hepburn, Claudette Colbert and Vivien Leigh. Influential figures, leading extraordinary lives, have long recognised the unique quality of their creations.

Name: Limelight Lab Grown Diamonds
Description:
Limelight Lab Grown Diamonds Ltd

India’s leading sustainable diamond luxury brand offering lab grown diamond studded jewellery. Backed by the world’s largest lab grown diamond production unit that boasts of a production of over 1.2 million carats each year, we come with the strength of a wide range of jewellery for our customers. 

Recently awarded the ET (Economic Times) Business Icon Award 2020 for Technology Leaders in Sustainable Diamond Creation, Limelight strongly advocates sustainable and conscious living that can maintain the diamond legacy yet preserve the planet for a future. As the leading sustainable brand in India, Limelight has been in the forefront of showcasing lab grown CVD diamond studded jewellery from India to the world.

Limelight has not only been successful in attracting the consumers and the trade but also most recently received great support from several of the Royal Families in India that have been inheritors to some of the most precious diamond jewellery in the past.

Name: Bell & Ross
Description:
It all started with a passion for watchmaking and inspiration drawn from the world of aviation. A team of watch designers and aeronautical control panel specialists joined forces with one objective: creating timepieces ideally suited for professional use. Embracing the rich heritage of Swiss watchmaking, this team sought to satisfy the exacting demands of individuals operating in the most extreme circumstances.

To ensure that a watch perfectly meets the expectations of its users, Bell & Ross brings together experts with complementary know-how to achieve a single objective: to create a utilitarian watch. Bell & Ross watches meet four basic principles: legibility, functionality, precision, and reliability.

Bell & Ross timepieces can be found on the wrists of professionals working under extreme situations, such as astronauts, fighter pilots, deep sea divers, bomb disposal experts, high-performance athletes, renowned actors, rock stars, and urban explorers looking for new adventures.
 
In Switzerland, in our manufacture in La Chaux-de-Fonds, that our Master watchmakers develop, assemble and make the final adjustments to Bell & Ross watches. All their art is revealed in the precision of the measurements, the rigour of the checks carried out on the watches and the attention given to each work stage, no matter what be the watch's mechanical intricacy.

Name: Glashütte Original
Description: Glashütte Original upholds the values of authentic manufactory production and can look back on an uninterrupted history that began in 1845. Located in the Saxon town of Glashütte, the manufactory brings traditional craftsmanship and innovative technologies together under one roof. The tradition-rich brand produces up to 95 % of all movement components as well as the filigree dials in-house and represents the highest levels of German watchmaking art. Further information can be found at www.glashuette-original.com.

Name: PNG Jewellers
Description:
PNG Jewellers began its journey 186 years ago and it continues to be on the path of excellence. The very proud legacy of PNG Jewellers began with a small shop in Sangli where the family used to sell gold. Carrying forward the vision of Gadgil family's doyen Purshottam Narayan Gadgil, Dajikaka Gadgil steered the business to Pune and expanded its horizon of success. With his hard work and persistent efforts, he steered the business to great heights that it has reached now. This rich legacy of fine craftsmanship and finer values earned over 186 years is the group's greatest treasure. The business morals and ethics have been passed on from generations in the family, and even today the group stands tall and proud based on the three pillars- Trust, Purity and Commitment. Trust of customers, industry fellow members and co-workers cannot be bought or thrust upon, it is something that is earned over the years with relentless hard work. PNG Jewellers has always prioritized trust over everything, as lasting success can only be gained through genuine goods, good service and promptitude. We have always believed in the power of the trust that people put in PNG Jewellers, and understand our responsibility to uphold it. 

"Consistency and honesty are the best methods to ensure a long-going and successful business" - Dajikaka Gadgil.

"Customer has to be convinced of the purity of the gold he is buying" - Dajikaka Gadgil. 

Purity has been the epitome belief of the company. Since inception PNG Jewellers firmly believes in offering its valued customers all its products in its complete form, be it gold, diamond or silver. Purushottam Narayan Gadgil, Dajikaka has strongly followed the ideals of purity and has infused this strong value in the business. Purity is of paramount importance in the business of gold. Our transactions must therefore be fully transparent.

Name: SEIKO WATCH EUROPE
Description:
L’histoire de SEIKO commence en 1881 quand un jeune entrepreneur de 22 ans, Kintaro Hattori ouvre son atelier de réparation d’horloges à Tokyo. Il était déterminé à devenir le pionnier de l’industrie horlogère et mettait un point d’honneur à ce que « SEIKO ait toujours un pas d’avance sur les autres ». 11 années plus tard, en 1892, il fonde la manufacture « Seikosha » et fabrique sa première horloge et en 1895, sa première montre. SEIKO n’a jamais cédé sa place de leader dans l’innovation technologique, le vrai secret de son succès. 

Découvrez toutes nos collections de montres SEIKO ainsi que des réveils et horloges dans nos cinq boutiques officielles et sur notre E-shop www.seikoboutique.fr !

Name: Passion Horlogère
Description: Passion Horlogère : Le magazine des passionnés de montres ! Toute l'actualité des montres et du secteur horloger. Revues, interview, informations : ne manquez plus aucune actualité horlogère !

Name: Genesis Luxury
Description:
Genesis Luxury Fashion was established in the year 2008 for the marketing and distribution of International Luxury labels within India-by-India’s leading fashion conglomerate, Genesis Colors.

Genesis Luxury markets & distributes the following iconic labels in India:

Bottega Veneta | Emporio Armani | Giorgio Armani | Armani Jeans | Armani Exchange | HUGO BOSS | Paul Smith | G – Star RAW | Coach | Furla | Jimmy Choo | Michael Kors | Tumi 

Genesis has also entered into a joint ventures with Burberry of UK, the classic menswear Italian Luxury label CANALI & the German tableware brand Villeroy & Boch. 

The essence of Genesis Luxury lies in the philosophy that luxury brands are an experience above all. As India’s largest international luxury conglomerate Genesis Luxury has redefined fashion retailing with innovative strategies that transcends borders. The expertise lies not merely in catering to a homogenous elite segment but in bringing an assortment of top of the line brands to tap the emerging market in India.

Name: Sonia Rykiel
Description: Since 1968, Sonia Rykiel has called for the liberation of women, through their sensuality, intelligence and irreverence. Of singular silhouette and chic, idiosyncratic spirit: the Parisienne of Saint-Germain-des-Prés. The fashion she created was for everyday wearing, over the very skin itself. A never compromised, always sophisticated style. Where knits marry the movements of the body without the slightest restraint, where black becomes a bright color, stripes and prints worn with faces straight..

Name: dinh van
Description: We sculpt iconoclast jewels to be worn everyday by everyone since 1965.

Name: Repetto Paris
Description:
The Maison Repetto, a unique « artisan » in the world of luxury.

Repetto's line of products is inspired by the world of ballet's values along with exceptional and exclusive artisan know-how, a tradition carried on in its workshops based in Dordogne for 65 years.

The story of the Maison Repetto began in 1947 with Rose Repetto, the mother of Roland Petit, Opera de Paris choreographer and ballet dancer. He asked her to create ballet shoes in her workshop located near the Opera de Paris.

The Maison Repetto was born and the brand became the reference for ballet dancers. Ballet is its heritage from the past, its imagery reference and its inspiration for its values.

In 1956, Brigitte Bardot ordered the first ballerinas from Rose. They were made in the same way as the ballet shoes, using the "cousu-retourné" technique – Stitch and return method.

Constantly innovating, Repetto’s values and know-how is declined in all its creations: shoes, leather goods, dance products, ready-to-wear and perfume. 

The whole world fell in love with them and then began the legend of Repetto.

Repetto, a unique promise of grace and lightness...

Name: Pâtisserie Christophe Michalak
Description:
Le chef pâtissier Christophe Michalak vous présente son univers gourmand, ludique et visionnaire !

Christophe Michalak est l'un des chefs pâtissiers français les plus reconnus de sa profession. Champion du monde de pâtisserie en 2005, il dirigea la pâtisserie du palace le Plaza Athénée durant 15 années.

En 2013, il crée sa propre école de pâtisserie la « Michalak Masterclass » ainsi que sa première boutique au cœur de Paris qui deviendra en mars 2017 le « Café Michalak ». 
Il a depuis ouvert depuis 6 nouvelles adresses parisiennes ainsi que 5 pâtisseries au Japon. 

Passionné depuis toujours par l’univers de la boulangerie, le chef propose également depuis 2022 une offre de pains, de viennoiseries et de goûters ainsi qu’une offre salée à l’heure du déjeuner.

Name: Polo Luxury
Description:
Polo Limited is  Nigeria's foremost luxury goods company retailing high-end brands watch and jewellery brands.

Established in 1987, Polo Limited is driven by the mission to serve and with a passion for excellent customer service, it has continued to redefine and refine retailing of luxury products in Nigeria.

Our product offering includes brands like  Rolex, Cartier, Piaget, Chopard, Breguet, Franck Muller, Arnold and Son, Bovet, Roger Dubuis, Frederique Constant, Longines, Balmain and Montblanc timepieces, writing instruments, and leather goods.

Our Rolex-installed after-sales center with our Swiss-trained watch-makers offer impeccable after-sales service.

Name: Baccarose Perfumes & Beauty Product Pvt Ltd.
Description: Baccarose Perfumes & Beauty Products Pvt Ltd is the market leader in the retail and distribution of international luxury beauty brands in India

Name: Neve Jewels Group
Description:
Established in 2003, the Neve Jewels Group comprises three leading diamond jewellery brands; Diamonds Factory, Austen & Blake and Sacet. 

Diamondsfactory.co.uk
Austenblake.com
Sacet.com

Diamonds Factory is one of the fastest growing jewellery companies in Europe. In ten years, Diamonds Factory has become one of the leading diamond jewellery brands selling online in the UK & Europe with boutiques in London, Paris, Berlin and Sydney. Diamonds Factory has two sister brands in Austen & Blake and Sacet.  

Austen & Blake specialises in beautiful, handcrafted jewellery. Here, diamonds are ethically sourced in line with leading global institutions and purchased from recognised diamond trading centres. Austen & Blake's ethos is not to sell jewellery but to create it.

Sacet was founded in 2017 and was started with a mission to create beautiful, affordable and ethical jewellery and specialise in creating jewellery that focuses on three things: People, Planet & Profit. 

Sacet specialises in conflict-free diamond jewellery and by using cutting edge technology, their diamonds are grown in a laboratory and are visually and chemically identical to natural mined diamonds. They use a combination of recycled metals, lab-grown diamonds, semi-precious gemstones as well as producing eco-friendly packaging.

Name: Ruslan Baginskiy
Description:
Ruslan Baginskiy brand was founded in 2015 in Lviv and now is based in Kyiv, Ukraine. Inspired by art, Ukrainian national costumes, archival family photos and vintage fashion shootings, Ruslan boldly experiments with traditional shapes and creates hats in the zeitgeist. The aesthetic basis of the brand is reliant on their 'author's details', added to every Ruslan Baginskiy hat: hand embroidery, chains, pins and the RB monogram.

Brand's family is growing every day, among RB Girls are Madonna, Beyonce, Rihanna, Bella and Gigi Hadid and Pamela Anderson. The brand has been featured in The New York Times, Vogue, Harper's Bazaar, W Magazine, V Magazine, ELLE, Marie Claire, Glamor, Garage Magazine and many other international magazines.

The Ruslan Baginskiy Hats are represented all over the world, but the designer always emphasizes his Ukrainian origin. The debut couture collection presentation at Hôtel de Crillon was dedicated to native nature, local craftsmanship and traditional wedding decor in Western Ukraine. The company supports local production, therefore each hat of the brand is Made in Ukraine, for us it is one of the main principles of sustainability.

Name: Sidney Garber
Description:
Sidney Garber loved beauty, grace and elegance. The son of a watchmaker, he launched his own jewelry store in 1946 when he was still in his 20s. His daughter Brooke stood behind the counter as a little girl. By the time Brooke was a teenager, Sidney Garber was an elegant boutique on Michigan Avenue in Chicago.

Sidney Garber was known for his extraordinary eye. He brought great rigor and attention to detail as he worked with unique artisans abroad to create the jewelry he sold exclusively. He instilled in Brooke that same love of design, detail, and fine execution as she traveled with him to the great ateliers in Milan and Paris. Sidney remained deeply involved in the business until well into his late 80s.

In 2008 Brooke inherited Sidney Garber Fine Jewelry and today continues his tradition. Times have changed since that first store opened in 1946, today Brooke gives all her profits to not-for-profit organizations dedicated to children’s mental health and wellness, to education, and to the arts.

Name: Motilo.com
Description: Welcome to the world’s most interactive, intelligent and exciting solution to your styling needs. We like to think of ourselves as the friend that’s always online, the second opinion you always need, pretty much your ‘go out’ girl for any fashion dilemma. Motilo, ask a questions and style an answer.

Name: Label Aasmi
Description:
Label Aasmi is a demi-fine and fashion jewellery label. Creating experimental and aesthetically appealing pieces with a vision to elevate every look.
Each piece of LA is designed and handcrafted meticulously at our studio in Jaipur, keeping sustainability and ethical practices in mind. Label Aasmi is your perfect escape from the ordinary. Style our pieces your way, stack them, mismatch them, but by the end of it be your true self, be AASMI.

Label Aasmi also deals with brands looking after their entire designing, sampling, production and export.

Name: RINGS & I - Personalised Diamond Rings
Description:
RINGS & I - Where your story becomes the ring.

She loved the beach. He loved the mountains. They came in, searching for rings that felt like both. Most places showed them templates. At RINGS & I, they found what they had imagined — rings that reflected their story, drawn from a thoughtful collection of over 5,000 designs.

Another time, an 8th-grade boy came in with pocket money he had saved for months — determined to gift his mother her first diamond ring. Designs within his budget didn’t feel special. The ones that did were out of reach. Until he found us — and a ring that felt worthy of his love, and within his wallet.

These aren’t rare stories. They’re why we exist.

We’re a diamond ring studio for people who refuse to compromise — not on design, not on emotion, not on budget.
We don’t start from a catalog. We start from you.

Our process is human-first and deeply personal. Whether it’s a proposal, an anniversary, or self-love — every ring is made to feel like it could belong to no one else.

Even our name reflects this. RINGS & I = Rings (variety) & I (India, Individual, Intelligence, Information). A space where nothing stands between you and what your heart truly wants.

⸻

A Note from the Founder

We didn’t set out to build a brand. We set out to solve — for the customer, for the craftsman, for the system. To create a win-win model that feels as fulfilling as love itself. Because when you’re in love, you don’t settle. And your ring shouldn’t either. 

— Rohit Hudke
Founder, RINGS & I

Name: Maison Celinni
Description:
La maison Celinni, issue d'une longue lignée de diamantaires est une marque pionnière dans la démocratisation du diamant. Proposant une large gamme de bijoux, de la pierre seule au produit fini, la maison garantit une qualité extrême à un prix bas. 

Savoir-faire, rigueur et tradition sont les principales valeurs qui règnent au sein des ateliers parisiens de la maison Celinni. Diamantaires et experts joailliers sont tous issus des meilleures écoles de gemmologie et restent à l’écoute des clients pour les accompagner dans leurs projets de vie et les guider dans le choix et dans la réalisation sur-mesure de leurs bijoux.

Name: ToyWatch
Description:
ToyWatch, leading company in the fashion watch industry, was set up in 2005 thanks to the creativity of Mara Poletti and Marco Mavilla, period watches lovers and collectors. The success came unexpected already with the first creations, presented first in the United States, and took the two founders by surprise; they then decided to turn their passion into a  real business. 

In 2006 the entrepreneur Gianluca Vacchi, impressed by the first models on the market, decided to become part of the company, buying a 50% share (25% belongs to  Mara Poletti and the remaining 25% to Marco Mavilla). 

Today ToyWatch is present in all the continents (America, Asia, Europe, Africa and  Oceania) with over 900 stores and over ten points of sale including  flagship stores (Milan,  Via Montenapoleone 25, Rome,  Via del Babuino 143, Porto Cervo, Piazzetta degli Archi, 4, London, Regent Street) and franchised stores. ToyWatch collections are also available in the major fashion, jewellery and department  stores worldwide. 

ToyWatch has always distinguished itself as an innovative accessory, with two spirits: a collection of polycarbonate watches, designed and created with the precise intention of being original, differentiating themselves with class. Luxury comes to life thanks to the juxtaposition of poor and precious materials; simple design with the utmost care for details.

It is thanks to this “sophisticated” simplicity that ToyWatch soon became a synonym for  glamour, a new and playfully mischievous luxury, to be shown off, as international  movie and show stars know very well, like  Oprah Winfrey, Alicia Keys, Naomi Campbell, Madonna, Michael Jordan and Sylvester Stallone.

Name: Thea Jewelry
Description:
At Thea Jewelry, we celebrate the words that symbolize your story every day with custom jewellery that makes sense. Ethical rings, bracelets and luxury necklaces.  

Because life is unique. And it's full of encounters that matter and magical moments. Laughter. Of tears. Of crushes. Marriages. Of births.  

A name, a memory, a letter, a date, a word, an expression that speaks to you... or to others, of humour, mood or love? Thea jewellery embodies you. It carries your desires, your wishes, your identity. And it is handmade to last. 

Exactly as Émilie Duchêne wanted in November 2011, when she created her line of personalised jewellery to celebrate a turning point in her life: the birth of her first daughter, Thea.  

What if you also transformed the great moments of your life into jewellery?   Gold or silver, diamonds or coloured stones... Let your imagination run wild and create your own jewel!  

>>> www.thea-jewelry.com
 #TheaJewelry #CelebrateLifeMore

Name: MINT XXI
Description:
Mint XXI is a manufacturer of silver collectible coins with a strong artistic value issued in extremely limited mintages based in Western Europe.

Our mission is to be a symbol of esthetic perfection in the field of coinage art. Therefore, we produce every coin without exception beautiful to make the collecting process even more enjoyable.

Mint XXI is: 
·      impressive designs of coins, which can become the highlight of anybody’s collection
·      the presence in any corner of the world - dealers present our coins in different countries
·      high standards of coin production, which guarantees excellent quality of the final product
·      unique collecting experience through the wide variety of coin series  
·      high level of craftsmanship, which provides coins with complex detailing 
·      silver art worth being chosen by real esthetes 

The artistic component attracts coin lovers worldwide. In the production, we combine alike jewellery detalization, eye-catching colouring, and modern cutting-edge technologies to become a landmark for every connoisseur.

Name: Rachminov Diamonds 1891
Description: Rachminov Diamonds 1891 is a third generation company specializing in the manufacturing and marketing of special natural fancy color diamonds. Among the leaders in this exclusive niche, the company markets a wide range of colors, sizes, cuts and clarities in single stones, matching pairs and layouts.

Name: Wilhelmina Garcia
Description:
WILHELMINA GARCIA (WG) is a jewellery brand inspired by Wonderland. 

Launched in 2012 by the influence and need of having a special space to create and be inspired by magic, leaving aside the hectic day-life of reality to a world full of fantasy and dreams. The designer, Rocio Canals, is the multifaceted creative that goes behind the name of Wilhelmina Garcia a pseudonym and magical persona that she created to design and reinvented herself again through the jewellery where she tells stories.

The jewellery, has its own journey, some of the collections were inspired by her trips and day life fun. Everything comes from anecdotal memories, designed at her studio placed in the heart of Barcelona.

Wilhelmina Garcia is more than a piece of jewellery, is a carrier of special meaning of forms, materials and stones who gives new vibrant ways that speak directly to our heart and fantasies to be playful and become what we want to be. All the collections are special and unique but at the same time they are real and human where you could use your imagination and own fantasies to recreate your dream world.

Name: Yondor Diamonds
Description:
Yondor Diamonds Ltd. is one of the market leading manufacturers and suppliers of Natural Fine diamonds for over 40 years.  Yondor offers top-quality diamonds in a variety of shapes, colors, and clarities, in sizes ranging from 1 carat to 60 carats and up, GIA certified.
The company is well known for its wide range of large diamonds, a remarkable selection of 10ct carat up diamonds in round and fancy shapes, colored diamonds and specific customized manufacturing of 1.00 - 5.99cts.


Look for Yondor Diamonds LIVE DIAMOND STOCK APPLICATION 
on Google Play & Apple Store

We provide  professional service to a wide range of diamond dealers, wholesalers, manufacturers of high-end diamond jewelry, Collectors, auction houses, and jewelry retailers. 

We provide service to a wide range of diamond dealers, wholesalers, manufacturers of high-end diamond jewelry, collectors, auction houses, and jewelry retailers.

Name: Carl Suchy & Söhne
Description:
In 1822, the watchmaker Carl Suchy founded his company in Vienna. In 1844, he was the first and for a long time the only watchmaker to receive the title of Imperial and Royal Supplier. Purveyor to the Court. The Suchy family's movements always met the highest standards of elegance and technical perfection. With the help of his four sons, Carl Suchy & Söhne advanced to become the most important and increasingly internationally active watch manufacturer in the Danube Monarchy. The imperial court, the aristocracy, artists, industrialists and celebrities of the turn of the century were among his regular customers. 

In 2016, Carl Suchy & Söhne was brought back to life - the mechanical wristwatch "Waltz No1" is dedicated in design to the Viennese turn-of-the-century architect Adolf Loos and his love of simple elegance. The "Waltz No1" is produced in Switzerland and powered by the high-quality Swiss automatic caliber "VMF 5401" with micro rotor. The first limited edition of 22 pieces is already sold out and the second edition of 50 pieces is currently in planning.

Name: LA MAISON Creative Direction
Description:
360° Visual Communication Agency & Luxury retail Performance 
La Maison Creative Direction offers tailor-made creations in the areas of retail design, graphic arts and scenography by relying on confirmed, dedicated talents and partners.

Name: Cadranor SA
Description:
La force de notre entreprise découle d’un savoir-faire de plus de 45 ans sans cesse en évolution, des outils modernes et performants ainsi que du personnel qualifié.

Nous réalisons des cadrans haut de gamme et développons constamment de nouveaux procédés.

Depuis 2013, nous sommes également équipés d’un système informatique performant nous permettant de gérer le flux de production et les stocks.

Name: Time Trader
Description:
Since Time Trader was first founded in 2016, we aimed to become a trusted retailer for our customers to source, buy and sell luxury pre-owned watches. We offer a private one-to-one service from our luxury boutique showroom, located within an exceptional, Grade I listed building.

Specialising in brands such as Rolex, Audemars Piguet, Patek Philippe, Richard Mille and Cartier - we source, buy, sell and service luxury watches.

Strong relationships are central to our service, and we offer a unique buying experience for luxury watches with unbeaten service and value.

There is no finer place to find your dream luxury timepiece.

Office: 01642 268323
WhatsApp: wa.me/447765535757
Instagram: @time_trader_ltd
www.time-trader.co.uk

Name: Medley Jewellery
Description:
Worn for Nobody. 

Australian founded, Medley is a jewellery brand with purpose. We offer pieces that are modern, ethical, affordable, and crafted for longevity. Our pieces aren't worn to please others or to fit the latest fashion. We are for the people who value style with true substance and creates looks that are truly their own. That's what we mean by 'worn for nobody'.

Anyone who embodies these values is already amazing. Our mission is to create a brand worthy of them.

Name: Nako Watch Co.
Description: Nako Timepieces is a luxury watch designer brand with historical significance. Born and designed in Gaborone, Botswana Nako Timepieces are merging innovation and luxury watchmaking that is proudly rooted in Botswana, and by extension Africa. Brand Nako bears Botswana’s heritage on a wrist and is founded on the belief that state-of-the-art watchmaking innovation can be synonymous with the cultural and historical significance of Botswana, where time bridges the old and new.

Name: Claire's
Description: Welcome to Claire’s BARTLESVILLE! We are located at 2350 SE WASHINGTON BLVD where we offer the best trends and the hottest styles at everyday deals! You’re going to love our huge range of fashion, hair, beauty & tech accessories to give your personal style a little upgrade. You and your kids will also love our awesome range of toys & collectibles! That’s right, we’re a toy store too! We offer tons of brand-name toys like Ty, Pusheen, and more for hours of fun for your kids.

Name: ROTAP
Description: ROTΛP, for decades, has been the driving actor fashioning the luxurious consumption sector in Turkey. The watches, writing instruments, luxury leather collectibles and accessories and gems are within its product range. ROTΛP is the sole concessionaire of Omega, Montblanc, Blancpain, Montegrappa, Davidoff, Maranello, Pequignet and Jaquet Droz brands. Headquartered in Nişantaşı, one of the most elegant districts of Turkey, ROTΛP has established widespread retail network comprised of jewelers, watch dealers and point of sales in shopping malls. Beside the distribution network, it has its own Montblanc Boutiqe and Omega  Boutiqe in Nişantaşı. Also it owns Rotap Boutiqe in Ankara where it promotes the sales of its whole brand range. Plus, the After Sales Team providing the authorized modification and maintenance services, important as much as the broad distribution network, is available within organization of ROTΛP. ROTΛP team is comprised of professionals advanced with specialized, academic and Professional trainings. Both the administrative and technical staff elaborate their skills with vocational trainings related to the periodical luxurious consumption trends and customs. The corporate values intrinsic to ROTΛP pace ahead like the modern life itself evolves continuously.when these values molding into traditions within years, incorporate with the fine workmanship and foundation, they are protected like gems harboring the eternity within.

Name: Gandara Gems Co., Ltd
Description: Gandhara Gemstones is selling Natural Gemstones, Minerals, Faceted, Crystals and Specimens sourced from Pakistan and Afghanistan. Every type and quality of stones available at very reasonable and good prices. Mostly working in Tourmalines, Rubies, Emeralds, Aquamarines, Peridot, Garnet, Lapis and Sapphires. Working with Collectors, Gems Lovers, Gem Cutters, Wire Wrappers, Jewelry Designers, Museums and Resellers.

Name: FeelWell Garments & Accessories Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Based on expertise and exclusivity, our love for the traditional arts and crafts is embedded in our soul. We take pride in caring, care for the craftsman just as much as the craft. Our inspiration comes from the clients we work with and our motivation is the Artisan who has dedicated his life to preserving these age-old embroidery techniques. 
Today the brands we have built a strong relationship with worldwide include Deepa Gurnani, Kobi Halperin, Lizzi’e Fortunato, Urban, Susan Alexandra, to name a few.

Name: Grand Central Watch
Description: Our extraordinary history at the top of our field, has provided our team with vast experience with all aspects of luxury watch care, maintenance, and collecting. Grand Central Watch is simply the ultimate destination for any passionate horologist.

Name: Gruppo Errepi
Description:
Raselli Franco s.p.a. was born in 1969 and grew up to become today an international group in the prototyping and production of jewelry. 
The latest technology and innovation are applied on an internal product development process and a totally internal production cycle ensuring high quality results and fast response time to the customers.

Direct international presence in 7 countries ensures proximity to customers for every need.

Name: Diamtrendz
Description:
Diamtrendz was founded in 2016 and within short span it has become one of India's leading gold and real diamond jewellery manufacturer. 

Diamtrendz is built on 3 principles:
1) Trust and Transparency
All our jewellery comes with BIS hallmark and the diamond authentication certificate by European Gemological Laboratory (EGL) which ensures that the gold purity and the diamond quality you get is what you asked for.
2) Quality and Competitiveness
Diamtrendz has become synonym for the Quality and the Competitiveness from the day it was founded. We have our own diamond polishing and jewellery manufacturing unit which helps in ensuring the competitive price and zero compromise in the jewellery quality and finishing.
3) Customer Satisfaction
Customer satisfaction is top priority at Diamtrendz. What we promise is what we deliver. Our live chat support is available 24x7 to help you with any questions and providing quick resolution for any issue.

Name: Federico Bellini Jewelry
Description:
Federico Bellini mette a frutto tutta la sapienza creativa, tramandata di padre in figlio, per realizzare un nuovo concetto di alta gioielleria dedicata all’uomo.
Non più creazioni legate all’estetica effimera dell’accessorio ma simboli eterni e preziosi dei più alti valori maschili.

Name: BAYLANDI
Description:
The global pandemic that is currently raging across the world has left us all reassessing our priorities and our way of life. In March 2020, our founder Caroline Bayle found herself in lockdown in her home in Paris. Conscious of the need to protect herself and others but concerned by the environmental impact of disposable masks, she used the downtime to design a fashion accessory that could also serve as a face covering. She wanted a product that would not only be useful but also beautiful to see and pleasurable to wear. Ever resourceful, she recruited the assistance of her mother, a retired seamstress. Together, they set about developing the first prototype. And with that was born the House of Baylandi. 
Conceived with maximum versatility in mind, it is a fashion accessory designed to be easily transformed into a face covering, a neck scarf, a head scarf or a belt. The House of Baylandi face covering is crafted with the utmost care by a small team of “petites mains”, an elite group of highly trained seamstresses, pattern cutters and other textile specialists recruited from the world of haute couture. It takes no less than fifteen separate steps and precisely coordinated teamwork to achieve one finished product. We use only the finest fabrics produced in accordance with strict environmental regulations. We craft our products in such a way that unnecessary waste is reduced to a minimum. All our fabrics are traceable and recyclable. We stand by every stitch, drape and fold of our product. 
Every member of the House of Baylandi, including its many partners, is committed to our values of excellence, rigor and integrity. This journey would not be possible without their passion, dedication and generosity. We draw strength from each other. We are deeply grateful for their involvement and for the opportunity to share this experience with them and with you.

Name: Waltham Watch Company SA
Description: Waltham is the first American watch brand and the inventor of the American System of Watch Manufacturing which revolutionised the global watch industry. Our timepieces have earned a significant place in watchmaking history. Since 174 years they are recognized all over the world for their manufacturing excellence, style and precision.

Name: Diamond Cutters Limited
Description:
Diamond Cutters Limited (DCL), part of NIRU Group, is a leading diamond cutting and polishing manufacturer in Sri Lanka, established in 1987.

We specialize in precision-cut diamonds for demanding global applications—serving luxury jewelry and Swiss watch industry requirements, with strengths in baguettes, tapered baguettes, princess cuts, rounds, and fine-make production.

Vision: “To make diamond reach its highest potential.”

Name: Oliver Smith Jeweler
Description:
Oliver Smith Jeweler is a second-generation, family-owned luxury jeweler with boutiques in Scottsdale, Arizona, and Aspen, Colorado. Since 1981, we have been crafting timeless fine jewelry and offering an expertly curated selection of new and pre-owned Swiss timepieces.

Our in-house collections—such as Prism, Cairn, and Diamond Classics—reflect our commitment to design, quality, and generational craftsmanship. As an authorized retailer for esteemed brands including Panerai, Parmigiani Fleurier, Glashütte Original, and Blancpain, we cater to discerning collectors and enthusiasts.

With a focus on personalized service, ethical sourcing, and enduring design, Oliver Smith Jeweler continues to be a trusted destination for luxury jewelry and watches.

Name: Shrenuj and Co Ltd
Description: Gems & Jewellery

Name: NOVA Products GmbH
Description:
NOVA Products GmbH is a start-up based in Munich and the creator of the first and only Audio Earrings on the market. With the mission of making technology invisible and yet highly functional and stylish, we merge technology and jewelry to help individuals to connect and stay receptive at the same time. 

Our product - NOVA H1 Audio Earrings - are a pair of wireless earphones hidden in a pearl and mounted on a silver- or gold-plated clip. Just like ordinary earphones, you can use the NOVA H1 Audio Earrings to listen to music, podcasts, audio books and make phone calls. The revolutionary approach is their how. The patented out-of-ear technology called Directional Sound allows the sound to flow from the pearl on your earlobe straight into your ear, similar to beam formation, so only you can hear it while staying discreet and maintaining your privacy.

Elegant, smart and ready in an instant, the NOVA H1 Audio Earrings are your perfect finishing touch for any occasion throughout the day. Just accessorize and go.

Driven by four values: connectivity, disruptive innovation, design and high quality, we hope to create the products that can make a positive social impact by enhancing and beautifying the life of the consumer. We at NOVA are multinational team and welcome all genders, nationalities and backgrounds, among both our team members and our customers.

Name: Prestons
Description:
Our story is as relevant today as it has been over the decades, our four unique and distinctive showrooms all embody our values, essence and our unparalleled passion perfectly. A forward thinking business with a rich heritage that, since 1869, has only ever been owned by two families.

Our four showrooms in Guildford, Leeds, Wilmslow and Norwich showcase the world's finest watch houses in Patek Philippe, Rolex and Tudor alongside an exquisite selection of fine diamond, coloured gemstone and bespoke jewellery.

Above all Prestons offers a friendly and personal welcome, making the experience of choosing that special piece of jewellery or wristwatch memorable and enjoyable. Over the years' generations of families have become customers of Prestons and many have become friends. Today, our teams look forward to welcoming both new and existing clients to our showrooms in Surrey, Cheshire, Yorkshire and Norfolk.

Name: Nivada Grenchen
Description:
NIVADA GRENCHEN IS BACK ON TRACK
We are preparing a new Swiss Made collection to be launched this year
THE LEGENDARY NIVADA CHRONOMASTER AND ANTARCTIC
Will make their return in 2020.

Name: Yanbal USA
Description:
Yanbal is a global beauty company inspired by, and created for, women. Sold on the internet and through our Independent Style Advisors, Yanbal empowers women through beauty and its business opportunity everyday. 

Yanbal's US operation sells nationwide and is headquartered in Miami, FL.

Name: EFFICIO GROUP
Description:
For 30 years, EFFICIO GROUP has been the trusted partner and expert in secondary market distribution for Luxury and Premium brands, in Watches, Jewelry, Fashion and Beauty.

We support global Groups, independent brands and department stores in giving a second life to their excess inventory (previous collections, phase-out, slow movers...) through a secure and qualitative distribution, in respect of the brand image.

SECONDARY MARKET DISTRIBUTION, MANAGED WITH LUXURY STANDARDS
Based on your brand’s restrictions (geography, channels, pricing), we distribute overstock through a secure and selective on/off line resale network as luxury outlets, off-price, pre-owned, private sales and auction houses.

Each operation is discreet, controlled and fully aligned with your primary market and brand equity.

CASH OR COMMUNICATION: 2 WAYS TO CREATE VALUE FROM YOUR OVERTSOCK
EFFICIO GROUP can purchase your stock in:
 Cash
 Media & Communication Plans (barter)

The barter solution offers up to +50% higher value than cash, enabling brands to finance their media plans, IA, Retail, HR & Digital projects… all founded through previous collections instead – not cash.

EFFFICIO GROUP INTEGRATED MEDIA, COMMUNICATION, DIGITAL AND RETAIL AGENCY
Our in-house agency help luxury brands to develop worldwide brand awareness, visibility, drive to store/e-store, clients experience. 

Our 360° approach allow us to deliver : 
•	Media: digital, paid social, OOH, print, influencers
•	AI Solutions
•	Retail: pop up store, recruitment, training, displays
•	Digital: E-commerce, UX/CX, CRM
•	Brand content: photo/videoshooting, 3D,AI

More than ever, secondary market management is a strategic priority for luxury and premium brands, combining business performance, sustainability and long-term brand equity.

Our experts provided a tailored, confidential and fully controlled approach to ensure value creation in the short and long term.

 Contact us to explore new growth opportunities with EFFICIO GROUP.

Name: GULAYLAR
Description:
‘’GÜLAYLAR GROUP’’ Hakkında 

Türkiye’nin 500 Büyük Sanayi Kuruluşu listesinde 108’inci sırada yer alan Gülaylar Group’un bünyesinde bulunan farklı sektörlerdeki 36 Şirkette 1.600 Kişi çalışmaktadır. Gülaylar Group, Türkiye ve Dünya çapındaki yapılanması ile Türkiye’nin en köklü kurumları arasında yer almaktadır.

Arkasında 100 yıla yaklaşan tecrübe ve sermaye birikimi ile sağlam temeller üzerinde kurulmuş kurumsal bir geçmişe sahip olan Gülaylar Group; ana sektörü kuyumculuk olarak tanınsa da son 40 seneyi aşkın süredir; Turizm, Lojistik, AVM, Ofis vb. Gayrimenkul Geliştirme ve İnşaat sektörlerindeki uluslararası çaptaki yatırımları ile öne çıkmakta.

Grubun Yatırımları arasında;

City’s Nişantaşı AVM, 
Meydan İstanbul AVM, 
Kozyatağı City’s İstanbul AVM 
IGT Shopping Mall, New York
Uluslararası Lojistik Merkezi, Gebze (Avrupa’nın en önemli Lojistik Centerlarından)
Elegance Hotels International, Marmaris (500 Yatak, 5 Yıldız) 
Just Work Ofis Kampüs – Yatayda 10.000 m2, 1.500 kişilik yeni jenerasyon paylaşımlı ofis

(Co-Working), vb. Uluslararası yatırımlar yer almakta. 

Gülaylar Group, ana sektörü olan kuyumculuk ve mücevherat sektöründe de tasarımdan toptan satışa, ithalattan, ihracata, Online Satışa tam entegre bir yapıda faaliyet göstermekte.

Gülaylar Group’un temelleri 1926 yılında İhsan Gülay tarafından atılmıştır. 1950’lerin başında Türkiye genelinde perakende, toptan altın, pırlanta şirketleri ile yapılanmış, 1980’lerin başında ise ihracatta dünya pazarlarına açılarak, 55 ülkeye ihracat yapar duruma gelmiştir. “Gülaylar Kuyumculuk Grubu”, köklü kurumsal tarihi, güçlü sermaye birikimi, tecrübesi ve uluslararası yapılanması ile dünyanın birçok ülkesinde de tanınan global bir markadır.

Dünyada hızla gerçekleşen büyük teknoloji değişimine paralel şekilde; yarının dünyasına entegre bir teknoloji şirketi haline dönüşmüştür. Hedefleri ve köklü değerleriyle “GÜLAYLAR”, Online Satış siteleri ile hem yurtiçinde hem de yurtdışında geleceğin dünyasına açılmaktadır.

Name: Deakin & Francis Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1786 Deakin & Francis designs and manufactures fine jewellery, luxury cufflinks and accessories from its workshop in Birmingham’s Jewellery Quarter. 

Having just celebrated their 235th anniversary, the team of jewellers, goldsmiths and silversmiths at Deakin & Francis have created over 2,000 cufflink designs for business people, celebrities and members of royalty worldwide. Stockists include Harrods and other well-known international department stores.

Name: DESIGNER WORLD
Description:
A history of more than 85 years in the watch industry with more than 7 decades of business transitions, where the 4 generations are actively handling the legacy of creating timeless masterpieces. Watch this space for classy and luxurious brands & their worldclass collection.

We have Seen more than 7 DECADES of business transitions , facing immense competition with DOMESTIC and INTERNATIONAL BRANDS, large business houses BUT have sailed with our TRUE and HONEST approach to our LOYAL CUSTOMERS and ASSOCIATES. Our wish to give our consumers the BEST product at the right price and provide all services attached to it to our best Capabilities.

We thank all our Loyal customers for making us reach where we are today and always welcome all your suggestion for helping us Improvise for future.

Name: Galis Jewelry
Description:
DESIGN PHILOSOPHY:

Design is like aftershave, a little goes a long way; too much is obnoxious. Needless to say, our design goes a long way.

OUR MISSION:

Our mission is to provide a simple, elegant and affordable celebration; a gentle yet constant reminder of a special connection to someone you love.

SERVICE:

Great jewelry would mean nothing without great service. As an online business, we not only sell beautiful designs but credibility and service. We are constantly improving on our quest to creating a seamless journey – from your screen all the way to his or her hand.

Name: IceTrends
Description:
Merging a twenty-year legacy in the industry with a mindset of innovation, Ice Rings is the most progressive luxury jeweler in the marketplace today. We are rooted in the belief that fine modern luxury should be obtainable for everyone, no matter the budget.

Shop for the perfect piece from thousands of styles carefully curated collections, or let us bring your custom design to life. We offer a number of exclusive deals, throughout each month, for our loyal customers. Choose from our groundbreaking flexible payment plans that are user-friendly and easy on your pocketbook. Within minutes you can have the luxury you've always wanted.

Whether for you or a loved one, Ice Rings allows you to shop for anything that catches the eye and captures the heart.

Name: Jewellery Market
Description: Jewellery Wonder is playing a vital role to grow the business for North Indian Markets. While the world over is passing through uncertain conditions, the Indian market continues to show resilience and promise of growth. Jewellery Wonder today has developed into a brand and is one of the key factors catalyzing the growth of the Indian gem and jewellery industry. It is an ideal destination for networking and sourcing the widest variety of products. The show’s success is borne by the fact that JW today is the largest trade show of North India .
