The aim of the show is achieving its target year by year. Jewellers of north are wel aware of the Jewellery Market news paper and Now, Jewellery Wonder exhibition also.

Name: UNE NUIT NOMADE
Description:
We created 'Une Nuit Nomade' to elegantly awaken your desire to roam from continent to continent, in search of fascinating and breathtaking destinations. 'Une Nuit Nomade' is also an invitation to a motionless journey where each inch of your skin becomes a new frontier, meant to reveal a new fragrance, a new emotion. 

‘Une Nuit Nomade’ transcribes with elegance and purity our vision of a world where nature, luxury and well-being are inseparable, and arouse an awakening to endless olfactory nomadism.

Our quest for a fragrant world is limitless.

Name: TERZIHAN
Description: TERZIHAN is a fine jewellery brand based in Lisbon, Portugal.

Name: Jane Atelier
Description: Jane is a truly British brand, the label formerly known as Goat Fashion began life as a cashmere range for the fashion cognoscenti, and has since developed into a full ready-to-wear collection. Signature luxury knits have been complemented by equally recognisable separates, dresses and outerwear.

Name: SOLID gems               SRI LANKA
Description: Trust you are well and having a good time away from the uncomfortable moment

Name: RETYCHE
Description:
Who is RETYCHE?
RETYCHE is the ideal destination for pre-owned luxury bags and accessories in Canada. We strive to make luxury attainable by sourcing the most curated designer accessories and clothing while making them accessible to our clients and community.

Name: DV Créations Luxe
Description: Founded by Katia Lobato, the brand Les Demoiselles à Versailles was originally named after her two daughters: Diane and Victoria. The initials DV also echo the city of Versailles, which the designer is particularly fond of for its history and beauty. Les Demoiselles à Versailles is a brand specialising in the rental of high-end properties. This unique concept allows you to rent a premium property while benefiting from the private concierge and its luxury services. Wishing to share her love and passion for the history of this city, by highlighting the family heritage, Katia Lobato is now launching DV Créations Luxe, a division dedicated to jewellery, watchmaking and fashion in homage to Versailles. She is particularly attached to French know-how and the art of living.

Name: Baraka Gems
Description:
We offer a variety of fine jewelry pieces and services, but we specialize in:

Custom Engagement and Wedding
Repurposing
Vintage & Estate

We also offer fine jewelry repairs and we purchase precious metals/gems and diamonds.

The focus of Baraka Gemstones and Jewelry is to use profits from sales to assist in the care and support of vulnerable children worldwide.

For more information about our products and purpose, you can find us at www.barakagems.com.

Name: Aurum
Description:
In 1984 Aurum was a small artisan workshop, guided by Gianni Parisini’s ambition, which in a few years was able to transform itself into an industrial reality of reference for the sector.

Today the conduction has passed to the two sons, Emiliano and Daniele, which is the story of their children, fascinated by the process that leads to the creation of authentic high quality jewels.

Aurum is not just the production of watches, but its production capacity has allowed the creation of a vast collection of samples in different sectors.

From luxury watchmaking to jewelery and automotive components, the values that have always distinguished the company remain unchanged.

Name: braloba
Description: Braloba is one of the leading manufacturer of watch straps and wearables with fully owned factories in China, Thailand and Myanmar. With the support of its Sales, QC and Design offices in Switzerland, Hong Kong, London and Italy, Braloba aims to manufacture the best possible product in the most innovative, sustainable, and ethical way, Braloba supplies premium brands around the globe from fashion to luxury and health to smart technology.

Name: Westime
Description:
For more than two decades, Westime has distinguished itself as the ultimate retail destination specializing in extraordinary watches and jewelry. Its four boutiques in Southern California—Beverly Hills, West Hollywood, La Jolla, and Malibu--display the collections of more than 50 watch brands that represent the best of traditional watchmaking as well as the new guard in haute horlogerie. Westime is frequently cited as one of a dozen multi-brand retailers in the world that influences trends in the watchmaking industry. Westime also operates the Richard Mille Boutique Beverly Hills and the Hublot Boutique Beverly Hills. The company is led by Founder John Simonian, and President Greg Simonian.

Name: Antica Farmacista
Description: A story as unique as their unparalleled luxury fragrances... meet Antica Farmacista owners, Susanne Pruitt and Shelley Callaghan. Founded in 2003, these Seattle-based best friends have continued to lead the way in luxury home fragrance, targeting high-end retailers and hotel markets, both domestically and internationally. As the first company to bring the home ambiance diffuser to the states over 10 years ago, Antica Farmacista's brand now includes over 20 fragrances, extending into bath and body products, candles, personal perfume, bubble bath and bath salts. Through their unique fragrance blends and sophisticated design aesthetic, Antica continues to not only grow, but define the luxury market with its innovative outlook and "no risk, no reward" mentality.

Name: Englisch
Description: DARIO’S (www.darios.de) was founded in 2005 by the then 16-year old entrepreneur Dario Müller. Initially, the business began with the import and export of Swiss watches. The first DARIO’S mail order catalogue was published in 2008. This was the very first German catalogue where you could order a supercar for 1.8 million euros, a yacht for 45 million euros and you could even book a journey to space! The company expanded into the international market in 2012, when it offered a football signed by no less than the US President Barack Obama himself. The ball was put up for auction in the name of the the Sautii Kuu foundation of Dr. Auma Obama. In 2009, DARIO’S became the first online retailer in the world to be given an official license to sell Cartier, Chopard and Bulgari. The company is also an authorized dealer for other prestigious brands like Versace, Baccarat, Roberto Coin, Fendi and Montblanc. DARIO’S is the German pioneer when it comes to the marketing of luxury brands in e-commerce. The company works together with selected foundations, most notably the Jane Goodall Institute and the Sauti Kuu Foundation.

Name: Follow My Dress
Description: A Follow My Dress é uma nova forma de consumo em aluguel de vestidos de festa. Com o acervo de peças dos melhores designers nacionais disponíveis para locação. Além de uma consultoria personalizada na hora de escolher a peça perfeita.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: RALF TECH
Description:
The 5th of July 2005, RALF TECH has broken the diving world record with an immersion lasting 10 hours at minus 330 metres. On that day, the diver was wearing the very first RALF TECH Watch, the WR1. The record remains inviolate in such conditions and, to this day, no other watch has been as deep on the arm of an unassisted diver.
In 2008, RALF TECH completely devoted its efforts to creating timepieces with a strong DNA and an ambitious plan: design, develop and manufacture watches with character, at the same time accurate, reliable and sturdy
RALF TECH is run by a small group of passionate devotees of fine watchmaking. Our mission is to create technically accomplished watches without marketing's diktats and also without belonging to a school of thought or a story already written.
The elite operators of the Marine Nationale, the members of GIGN Special Forces, VENDÉE GLOBE skippers, they all support and participate in the development of our watches and their constant improvement. This is RALF TECH expertise at work.
RALF TECH is not intended as a brand for the mass market. You will not find our timepieces in every department store, jewellers' shop chains, airports ... However, you will discover them in true horology connoisseurs shops and watch specialists, you will find them in the shops at the avant-garde of fashion and in those shops for whom being different is a Lifestyle. Authenticity, innovation, experience and independence ... Our values are our strength.

Name: Hing Wa Lee Jewelers
Description: Hing Wa Lee Jewelers is an authorized Rolex Dealer and carries the most respected names in the industry including Blancpain, Cartier, Breguet, Breitling, Girard Perregaux, Mont Blanc, Roger Dubuis, Ulysse Nardin, Chopard

Name: MT Jewelry
Description:
MT Jewelry is a progressive company that originated from a small jewelry store established in 1958 and developed as a professional factory in 1998 in Bandung, Indonesia.

 

Throughout the years, its longstanding commitment to provide the customers with the highest quality products has led MT Jewelry to invest in the state of the art facility, equipment, and technologies to produce its own gold jewelry collections.

Name: Brinker's Jewelers
Description:
Brinker’s Jewelers is a third-generation family owned business that has been part of the Evansville community and Tri-State area for 52 years.

We also have a boutique concierge experience at The Silverleaf Club in Scottsdale, Arizona.

We carry a variety of the top designer engagement rings from such well-known artists as: Christopher Designs, Gabriel & Co., and DeBeers Forevermark.

The jewelry brands we carry such as David Yurman, Gabriel & Co., John Hardy, and Roberto Coin compliment the latest fashions. 

Timepieces from G-Shock, Monta, Nomos Glashütte, Oris, Rolex, Tag Heuer, and Tudor, writing instruments and pocket accessories are also part of our core brands. 

Offering a variety of services including, but not limited to: jewelry and watch repair, custom design jewelry, specialty engraving and appraisal services make us your destination for all your jewelry needs. 

The little green box from Brinker’s Jewelers—Celebrating all of life’s special moments!

Name: Sveston
Description: Sveston has decades of experience in watch-making andlogistics to bring luxurious timepieces at your reach.

Name: Archides Uhren GmbH
Description: We are Austrias first specialty shop for mechanical clocks. Further we specialize in Timepieces from small clock and watchmakers ateliers. Items you can't buy in every city. Please challenge us we also enjoy orders for new developments and designs. Looking forward to requests.

Name: DELPHINE GENIN
Description: #Couture #French #BusinessWomen #Psychology #Technology

Name: CINABRE
Description:
CINABRE is a Parisian luxury house, renowned for its signature ready-to-wear, timeless accessories, and refined Art de Vivre collections. Founded in 2011, the brand has grown into a complete universe, offering a full silhouette and lifestyle infused with savoir faire and elegance. 

Its flagship is located at 14 Cité Bergère, in Paris’s 9th arrondissement. Featured in the Louis Vuitton City Guide, the four-story address brings together a boutique, the brand design studio, and two exclusive hotel suites. Conceived by founder Alexandre Chapellier, this hybrid space goes beyond traditional retail, offering guests a uniquely immersive experience of the brand’s universe.

At the heart of CINABRE lies a devotion to craftsmanship. The brand owns its atelier in the Loire Valley and collaborates with exceptional artisans, blending heritage techniques with contemporary creativity. CINABRE creations are available at prestigious retailers including Le Bon Marché, Neiman Marcus, Isetan, and select luxury concept stores around the world.

Name: ליליום תכשיטים
Description:
אני ליליום,
ואני פותחת דוכני פופ אפ בחברות ומשרדים!
מביאה איתי מגוון תכשיטי כסף וציפוי זהב באיכות גבוהה ועיצובים מיוחדים - עם אופציות החלפה ותעודת אחריות לשנה.

עד היום עבדתי עם מעל לחמישים משרדים בכל הארץ - 
בהן חברת טבע, רפאל, אלביט, סאפ, דואר ישראל, בנק לאומי, פלקס, Ey, ועוד ועוד…

בנוסף לדוכני הפופ אפ אני מציעה שיתופי פעולה מיוחדים לקראת החגים (ראש השנה ופסח),
כמו כן גיפטקארדים ומתנות במחירים משתלמים לעובדים.

רוצים לשמוע עוד?
בואו נדבר

Name: Cece Jewellery
Description: Art Historian turned jeweller, Cece Fein Hughes has spent her life studying the evolution of beautiful artwork throughout history.  It was during her studies at the British Academy of Jewellery that Cece fell in love with the ancient art of enamelling; a technique that her work rediscovers for all its endless possibilities. Taking inspiration from the journey of enamel - imagining the Celtic warrior’s hand-painted battle armour, the Byzantine princesses' gold and enamel head pieces and Renaissance diamond encrusted jewellery - Cece pays homage to these ancient stories while interweaving her own style and love for fairy tales and old school tattoos by creating miniature canvases of artwork through her jewellery.

Name: Jewelry Atelier
Description:
Jewelry Atelier is an online jewelry brand targeting the US market. It has been formed by jewelry professionals with experience exceeding 40 years in the industry. 

With tremendous knowledge in both retail and manufacturing of jewelry, we are always seeking to provide the best quality products at reasonable prices. At Jewelry Atelier, our aim is to build long lasting relationships with our customers with a great focus on integrity and high quality.

Name: Editalia Spa
Description:
. Editalia, da oltre sessant’anni è testimone e protagonista delle vicende legate al mondo della cultura e dell’arte del nostro Paese. Storica casa editrice romana, nata nel 1952, dal 1991 è entrata a far parte del Gruppo Istituto Poligrafico e Zecca dello Stato.

La storia dell’azienda e quella italiana si sono intrecciate per un lungo e significativo periodo dando vita a un catalogo di editoria e arte dove trovano posto collane di volumi di pregio, cataloghi d’arte, produzioni di multipli d’arte, coniazioni di monete e medaglie, opere riconducibili tutte al tema dell’italianità inteso come cultura del territorio, valorizzazione del genio di alcuni fra gli artisti più rappresentativi del nostro tempo e valorizzazione delle capacità artigianali, tecniche e artistiche di grandi istituzioni quali la Scuola dell’Arte della Medaglia e la Zecca dello Stato.

Editalia accettando la sfida del mercato si è posta come punto d’incontro tra il “saper fare” e i potenziali acquirenti. L’azienda ha assunto il ruolo di capofila nel progettare opere che valorizzano il patrimonio dei saperi artigianali e nel mettere questo patrimonio a disposizione di collezionisti privati e imprese.

Name: COEUR DE LION Schmuckdesign GmbH
Description: COEUR DE LION is a leading manufacturer of modern designer jewellery – handmade in Germany. The company was founded in 1987 and has grown consistently ever since. Today, 150 staff are employed at the Stuttgart studios, 145 of which are women.

Name: Juwelier Rüschenbeck KG
Description:
Der Name Rüschenbeck steht für Juwelier Fachgeschäfte, vor allem aber für eine Familie: 1904 eröffnete Wilhelm Rüschenbeck das Juweliergeschäft „Zur Goldecke” in Dortmund, welches 1929 von seinem Sohn, ebenfalls Namens Wilhelm, übernommen wird. 1960 stieg die dritte Generation (Wilhelm *1938 und Gerhard *1941) ins Geschäftsleben ein. 1995 starb Firmengründer Wilhelm. Seitdem leiten Bruder Gerhard und Sohn Wilhelm Rüschenbeck das Erfolgsunternehmen. 

Heute, über 115 Jahre später, führen Gerhard und Wilhelm Rüschenbeck ihr Familienunternehmen in 3. und 4. Generation stabil in der Riege der europäischen Top-Juweliere. Mit großer Energie verfolgen Gerhard und Wilhelm Rüschenbeck die inzwischen europäische Wachstumsstrategie. Mit einer konsequenten und außergewöhnlich servicestarken Kundenorientierung setzen sie die erfolgreiche Familientradition fort. „Wählen Sie erst den Juwelier und dann den Schmuck“ heißt es in dem Leitspruch der beiden Unternehmerpersönlichkeiten.

„Wünsche haben in unserem Unternehmen immer oberste Priorität. Wenn unsere Kunden sich in ihrem Zuhause oder an ihrem Urlaubsort am wohlsten fühlen, um Schmuck- und Uhren auszuwählen, sind wir mit großer Selbstverständlichkeit dort.“ erläutern Gerhard und Wilhelm Rüschenbeck die Beweglichkeit und Servicehaltung ihres Unternehmens. Auch in puncto Service bewegt sich das Unternehmen in der Spitzenklasse. Schon das exklusive Ambiente der Juwelier-Fachgeschäfte macht einen Besuch zu einem Erlebnis. So glanzvoll wie möglich, so diskret wie nötig.

Von unseren Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter erwarten wir mit Herz, Verstand und Engagement, uns auf unserem Weg zu begleiten und dabei immer nach dem Optimum zu streben. Unser Credo “Wählen Sie erst den Juwelier, dann den Schmuck/die Uhr“ begleitet uns tagtäglich. Unsere Kunden bestätigen uns in unserem Handeln.

Name: Irene Neuwirth
Description: Irene Neuwirth Jewelry is devoted to creating original fine jewelry with imagination and heart. Our world is one of free-spirited beauty, where natural wonders come alive in kaleidoscopic color. An independent company free from the constraints of traditional jewelry houses, we are redefining luxury for ourselves. Celebrating uniqueness and vibrant vision, each handmade piece is held to our exceptionally high standards of creativity, quality, and craftsmanship. Our ideals lead the way as we continue on the path of becoming a forever brand.

Name: ליליום תכשיטים
Description:
אני ליליום,
ואני פותחת דוכני פופ אפ בחברות ומשרדים!
מביאה איתי מגוון תכשיטי כסף וציפוי זהב באיכות גבוהה ועיצובים מיוחדים - עם אופציות החלפה ותעודת אחריות לשנה.

עד היום עבדתי עם מעל לחמישים משרדים בכל הארץ - 
בהן חברת טבע, רפאל, אלביט, סאפ, דואר ישראל, בנק לאומי, פלקס, Ey, ועוד ועוד…

בנוסף לדוכני הפופ אפ אני מציעה שיתופי פעולה מיוחדים לקראת החגים (ראש השנה ופסח),
כמו כן גיפטקארדים ומתנות במחירים משתלמים לעובדים.

רוצים לשמוע עוד?
בואו נדבר

Name: Maria Francesca Pepe LTD
Description:
Maria Francesca Pepe (aka MFP) is a Jewellery brand founded in 2007 by Italian Designer and Central Saint Martins MA graduated Maria Francesca Pepe. 

Accolades include:
Lulu Kennedy’s FASHION EAST support,  BFC’s NEW GEN support,a  BRITISH FASHION AWARD nomination in 2009,  Italian VOGUE TALENTS award.

Ambassadors include Rihanna, Chiara Ferragni, Lady Gaga, Maisie Williams, Emma Watson, FKA Twigs, Rita Ora, Lorde, amongst many others.

The MFP jewels are trendsetting, enjoyable and suggestive.
Maria personally curates the concept of the brand. Some of the popular names amongst the brand's campaigns testimonials are: model Alice Dellal, social influencers Elizabeth Jane Bishop and Camille Jensen, and actress Stacey Martin.  

MFP developed an international top distribution amongst prestigious boutiques, concept and department stores, such as Luisa Via Roma, 10 Corso Como, Colette, Harvey Nichols; becoming a favourite amongst trends-led Millennials and fashion admirers.
 
“Pepe’s namesake line is known for high-concept, graphic designs that traditionally find a loyal following within the fashion and celebrity set.” Kayleigh Mencia – Editor EDITORIALIST.COM
 
“Maria’s designs are both edgy and commercial, which was our initial draw to the brand. Her collection is always original, fashion forward and great quality.” Kathryn Tan – Assistant Buyer for International Accessories and Jewellery HARVEY NICHOLS UK
 
“A favourite with Cara, Rihanna and Rita, Maria Francesca Pepe’s unique jewellery designs are top of our wish list. We want it all!” GLAMOUR UK
 
Co-branded Collaborations include:
Marcelo Burlon - COUNTY OF MILAN, SpongeBob by Nickelodeon, Caitlin Price (Fashion East), Roksanda Ilincic, TopShop, Victoria's Secret, Urban Outfitters, Joshua Sanders, Wolford, Amanda Wakeley

Consulting jobs include:
DIESEL by Nicola Formichetti, EU Design, MORELLATO Gioielli.

Name: Kailis Jewellery
Description:
Evolving over four decades, Kailis has become the trusted source for the world’s finest Australian South Sea pearls and fine jewellery.

At Kailis, we are passionate about what we create and strive to excel. With truly innovative and creative designs, we stand behind our products and believe in sharing our enthusiasm for our jewellery with everyone.

We aim to create and celebrate joy in all that we do. A cherished memory, a special occasion, marked in a very personal way. It is the way our jewellery makes you feel, that inner pleasure, which brings the greatest rewards.

As a truly inclusive luxury brand, we take great pride in creating pieces which are authentic, versatile and worn by each individual in their own way.

Name: BEA BONGIASCA JEWELLERY
Description:
Bea Bongiasca, born in Milan in 1990, is an Italian jewellery designer.
Bea Bongiasca’s inspiration stems from her deep passion for pop culture, contemporary art and design, conflated with her love for everything colourful. Hers is a spirited and non- traditional take on jewellery which does not compromise on quality but remains accessible to people of her own age.
The classic gold of her jewellery is often joyfully submerged with bright enamel colours that are not commonplace in fine jewellery. The unexpected evolution lends her jewellery kinetic movement and a bold look.
Bea’s focus is on jewellery as an art form, a concept that is pivotal to her design process. Each piece – at once playful and intricate – functions as a miniature fantasy world for the wearers to immerse themselves in and evade reality, even if just for a minute!
Bea Bongiasca can be found in stores such as Bergdorf Goodman, Matches Fashion, Dover Street Market London/NY, Net-a-Porter, Selfridges, Twist, Moda Operandi and Broken English, to name but a few.
On the 24th of October 2019 Bea Bongiasca opened her first flagship store in Brera, the heart of the art and design district in Milan, Italy.
Among the fans of Bea Bongiasca are numerous celebrities such as Dua Lipa, Kim Kardashian, Miley Cyrus, Bella Hadid, Chiara Ferragni, Leandra Medine, Eva Chen, Julia Roberts and Tessa Thompson.
Every Bea Bongiasca collection is handmade in Italy using 9kt and 18kt gold, silver, semi and precious stones and diamonds.

Name: MOSSO Chile
Description: Jewelry and watchmaking, official representative in Chile for over 12 brands of high-end brands like Rolex, Omega, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, Jaeger-LeCoultre, among others.

Name: Giada Ilardo Jewelry
Description: Luxury Piercing and Fine Jewelry

Name: Martineau
Description:
L'expertise acquise depuis plus d'un siècle a permis à Martineau de s’investir pleinement dans tous les métiers d'art de la bijouterie

A sa création, la société Martineau n’exerçait que deux activités, "la bijouterie religieuse" et les souvenirs métalliques  mais elle a su se diversifier et évoluer afin de maîtriser l’ensemble des techniques alliant son savoir-faire traditionnel et les nouvelles technologiques numériques. 

Fort de son savoir-faire, le Label EPV (Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant) lui a été décerné par le Ministère de l’Économie en 2010 puis reconduit en 2015. Il distingue les entreprises artisanales détenant un patrimoine issu de l'expérience manufacturière française.

Martineau  est une entreprise française reconnue pour la qualité de ses produits et de ses prestations dans le domaine de la bijouterie religieuse (médailles religieuses, chapelets, statues religieuses,...), des insignes militaires (porte-barrette et médailles, ...), du luxe ( muselets de champagnes premium, étiquettes de marques, pièces métalliques ou en bois pour la maroquinerie,...), du souvenir personnalisé (porte-clés, magnets, accessoires personnalisés, ...) et des badges personnalisés (destinés aux entreprises, institutions,...).

La société Martineau est engagée afin de fournir des produits et des prestations de qualité : 100% fabrication française mais également dans le respect de l’environnement. C’est ainsi que nos déchets industriels sont recyclés par nos fournisseurs pour les métaux et via des filières agréées afin d'être conforme aux normes et réglementations.

Nos sites e-commerce : 
-  kits porte-barrettes : http://decorations-martineau.com/

Name: Festina Chile Limitada
Description:
FESTINA GROUP
UN GRAN GRUPO DETRÁS DE UNA GRAN MARCA
Detrás de una gran marca siempre hay un gran grupo y detrás de Festina está el Grupo Festina. Un grupo que engloba cinco marcas de relojes: Festina, Lotus, Jaguar, Candino y Calypso, y dos marcas de joyería: Lotus Style y Lotus Silver.

CADA MINUTO, UNA EMOCIÓN.

Nuestra filosofía es dar tiempo al tiempo. Llenarlo de pausas que permitan disfrutar con cada nueva colección de sentimientos como el amor, la pasión, la libertad o la atracción. Valores universales que marcan las horas de una marca reconocida internacionalmente.

Mas de un siglo de experiencia controlando lo ultimo en tecnología nos permite liberar la emoción y convertirla en tendencia.

Sinónimo de elegancia y funcionalidad, Festina trasmite también en sus diseños un carácter y espíritu marcadamente deportivo. Razón y pasión, cabeza y corazón.

Cuestión de Estilo.

Name: Touch Of Oud
Description:
The Art of Oriental Perfumery, Refined.
Touch of Oud is a premium oriental fragrance brand, proudly rooted in the heart of the UAE. With a presence in 15 locations across the country — including our flagship store in Dubai Mall 
We specialize in luxurious scents that blend Eastern tradition with modern sophistication.
Our curated perfume collections feature meticulously crafted compositions of oud, floral essences, exotic spices, and rich woods. Designed for refined taste and lasting impression, each scent tells a story — personal, powerful, and unforgettable.
From bold leathers and warm ambers to delicate rose and vibrant citrus blends, Touch of Oud delivers a multisensory experience that honors heritage while embracing elegance.
As part of the Maylaa International portfolio (alongside Karji and Atelier Perfumery), Touch of Oud is also available on luxury platforms like Ounass KSA, offering premium service and fast delivery across the region.
Our Signature: Exceptional craftsmanship. Enduring elegance. Deeply rooted identity.
Our Market: The discerning customer seeking refined oriental fragrances.
 Available across the UAE & online across the GCC.

Name: Dianoche Pte Ltd
Description:
Dianoche PTE Ltd. is a diamond manufacturer registered in Singapore, as well as a diamond jewellery retailer. Our company is comprised of veterans in the world of diamonds and high-end jewellery.

As a wholesale company we have gained a vast experience working with various markets around the world.

After over a decade in the industry, we started selling diamonds and diamond jewelry to private clients, offering competitive prices without compromising on the quality of the goods. Our experience with individual customers has made us become well versed in both customer service and customer satisfaction.

Name: BKGJewelry online store
Description: BKGJewelry online jewellery store is the best choice for those searching a chance to buy the fine staying at home for Gold, Silver, Diamond, Gemstone, Earrings, Pendant, Pin, and Rings.High quality Handmade and Bead & Jewelry Making. Jewelry gifts for all occasions! All these You will find at our online jewelry store.

Name: Julius Klein Diamonds
Description: Founded in 1948, Julius Klein Diamonds is a leading diamantaire throughout the diamond industry. The group specializes in 2+ carat diamonds of the highest quality and brings its impressive inventory to independent retailers. The company is known for sourcing exceptional diamonds that are hard to find and maintaining its unique line of diamond jewelry. Julius Klein Group is currently serving the world through its third generation of exceptional diamantaires.

Name: ANJEWELS
Description:
Anjewels was born in Lisbon, in 2009, its founder has been passionately dedicated to this activity for over 20 years. 
OUR PRUPOSE is to create emotions. We can consider an Anjewels jewelry á design object with a concept or simply a fashion accessory. But it could also be a poem, a new song or even a simple flower. What we want to create without a doubt, is a very special way of sharing and providing a moment of happiness.
OUR MISSION is to create jewelry with character, with a strong and genuine identity. We want to go beyond the aesthetic perspective, developing concepts with engaging messages that subtly inspire the unique and innovative design of each Anjewels piece. Above all, we want to maintain the desire to dream and materialize our essence and values of our existence in every detail of a new piece. We don’t just want to be present in minds of those who follow us, but to create roots on the heart of those who wear Anjewels jewelry.
OUR VALUES
The Anjewels logo represents the brand’s essential values: Love (amor), Friendship (amizade), adventure and the rebellious teenager (adolescente) that exist in each of us, the wings represent the true freedom, the desire to fly higher.
The name Anjewels connects angels with jewelry, not only in a esoteric sense, but because they represent unconditional love, comfort, positive energy and happiness. Despite not having a gender identity, angels are a perfect image of eternal youth.
OUR VISION 
One day we will touch all bodies where a free, young and passionate spirit dewels.

Name: Jewel of Africa
Description:
Each Jewel of Africa possesses a hidden history of millennia of rock formation, shifting elements and pent-up intensity, surfaced ethically. They distill the continent’s grandiosity, effortless beauty and sublime ancestry into a token. A rare, timeless and unique keepsake that can beautify any façade.

Africa is more than an ancient conquest of beauty. Africa is your story to tell.
Jewel of Africa. Tales Untold.

Name: Montblanc Boutique
Description:
Comme notre nom s’inspire d’un des sommets les plus élevés du monde, notre récit se devait d’être remarquable et à la hauteur.

Nos origines remontent à plus d’un siècle et ont pris forme dans trois pays importants 

Dès le début, nous avions une passion sans bornes pour les instruments d’écriture et le savoir-faire. Notre désir de concevoir des accessoires intemporels a entraîné la création de notre premier stylo-plume emblématique. Sa pointe marque le début de notre histoire de 112 ans, qui a démarré humblement, mais n’a jamais été ordinaire. 

Fabriquer des articles à la main est l’un de nos plus grands plaisirs. Nous croyons fermement que chaque pièce doit avoir sa signification. Ce ne sont pas seulement les petites touches finales qui définissent nos collections; ce sont aussi nos gens – toutes ces personnes qui confèrent à Montblanc son individualité. Toutes nos décisions, initiatives et inspirations sont axées sur nos produits. Chacun et chacune d’entre nous peut laisser sa trace.

—————————————————————————————————————

When you are named after one of the highest summits in the world, it is safe to assume there is a rich and remarkable history there.

Our story unfolds over a century, across three prominent countries.

From the start, our love for writing instruments and craftsmanship ran deep. Ignited by a desire to create timeless designs, our first iconic fountain pen was born. Its nib is the tip of our 112 year-long story; and although things started from humble beginnings, they were never ordinary.

Crafting our products by hand is one of our greatest pleasures, and we firmly believe in giving every piece a meaning. And it’s not just the fine little touches that stamp our creations as our own. It is every single employee - everyone helps give Montblanc its edge. Every decision, every project and every inspiration contributes towards making our products. And therefore we truly believe that everyone can leave a mark.

Name: Polygon Jewelers Network

Polygon is the industry’s most complete online community & trading network for gem & jewelry professionals.

Powered by a leading-edge secure trading platform, Polygon provides a sophisticated online environment for members to buy and sell jewelry and gemstones, including diamonds, colored stones, precious metals, pearls, watches, estate pieces and more.

Polygon's dynamic community forums actively engage members to share information to make business more proficient and profitable. With trading activity generating millions of dollars in transactions every day, Polygon is the industry's most efficient sourcing and information tool for jewelry retailers and the most cost-effective marketing tool for suppliers.

Since 1984, Polygon has helped gem & jewelry professionals significantly impact the year over year growth of their businesses. Find out how you can join the industry's most active online community & trading network today! For information on membership call 1-800-221-4435 or info@polygon.net .

Name: ASHI
Description:
ASHI is one of the premier diamond jewelry manufacturers servicing over 1,000 of the finest Independent Retail Jewelers in North America for over 40 years. A fully integrated jewelry company, with manufacturing facilities in the United States, China, and India, ASHI provides unbeatable value to its Retail Partners

Our extensive range of exquisitely crafted Fine Jewelry features our signature I Do Collection, which includes engagement rings and bridal sets. Our offerings extend to a diverse selection of stunning diamond and precious gemstone pendants, necklaces, rings, earrings, and bracelets, catering to all tastes and preferences. We take pride in introducing the latest and hottest jewelry trends every year, ensuring there's something for everyone, from I Do Bridal to Lovebright Collection, Diamond Essentials, Riviera & Tennis Designs, East West Styles, Toi et Moi Designs, Fancy Mixed Shape Styles, Pave Ensembles, Petite Collection, Personalized Jewelry, Curb & Cuban Styles, Scatter Diamonds, Baguette Styles, and much more. 

At ASHI, every jewelry piece undergoes rigorous internal screening for quality and perfection. Each piece of jewelry is meticulously handcrafted with the end customer in mind, utilizing only the finest diamonds, color stones, and precious metals. We offer the highest quality products in the market, priced to deliver exceptional value. Leveraging our fully integrated global manufacturing, design, sourcing, and distribution network allows us to operate efficiently and cost-effectively, passing those savings down to our valued Retail Partners.

We offer an extensive In-house Inventory to pick the right styles for a 5-day Preview and Close the Sale, with a proven 45% sell-through rate. Backed by the latest bridal and fashion jewelry trends in the industry, our integrated and extensive Print to Digital Marketing Programs incorporate E-commerce and Merchandising Strategies to establish your store as the Premier Jewelry Destination in your Market.

Name: Minase Watches International
Description:
MINASE, the boutique watch manufacturer of Japan.

Minase is part of Kyowa & Co, a tool maker established in 1963. Minase timepieces have been sold exclusively in Japan since 2005. This is Japan’s smallest watch manufacture. Creating fewer than 500 units per year, Minase products are rare, authentic and unique thanks to the outstanding artisan work of its watchmakers and technicians.

Minase products embody the philosophy and true meaning of «Monozukuri». 

The brand was first launched in 2018 outside of Japan, represented in Geneva and in Berne, Switzerland.

Name: Elie Top
Description: Introduced to the market by Loulou de la Falaise at Yves Saint-Laurent and Alber Elbaz, with whom he has been collaborating for over 10 years, Elie Top distinguishes himself by his strong taste for both sharp and baroque lines at the same time, the innovative material processing methods as well as outstanding volumes, at the border of a very creative inheritage and the high jewelry, new fusion of costume jewelry for which he is one of the recognized ambassador and precious jewels : a « Joaillerie de Haute Fantaisie ».

Name: Rommanel Rio Kogut
Description:
Somos  a RioKogut representantes oficiais da Rommanel no Rio de Janeiro.
O Grupo Kogut é formado por 15 lojas (atacado e varejo) no Rio e Grande Rio.

 ROMMANEL é uma empresa brasileira voltada a valorizar as pessoas e transformar sonhos em realidade. Traduz tudo isso fabricando mais de 3.000 modelos de joias folheadas a Ouro 18k e Rhodium e joias em Aço.
A moda é um fator importante para a empresa, pois a ROMMANEL vende beleza, autoestima e estilo. Para isso, possui profissionais que sempre pesquisam as principais tendências e as traduzem em novos modelos de joias.
Por respeitar o consumidor, as joias folheadas ROMMANEL são hipoalergênicas a níquel e buscam a excelência em design, acabamento e durabilidade, resultando em um produto que se tornou referência em mais de 40 países.
Para isso, conta com um moderno parque industrial com equipamentos capazes de realizar esses sonhos sem agredir o meio ambiente. Assim, respeitando o planeta e a qualidade de vida com ética e respeito a todos, a ROMMANEL olha para o futuro na certeza que essa borboleta alcançará voos cada vez mais altos.
Location: RIO DE JANEIRO, RIO DE JANEIRO

Description:
Boaz nace inspirado en la mujer Chilena: Fuerte, independiente y muy femenina. 

Desde ese momento, cada una de nuestras joyas es diseñada con un único objetivo, destacar el estilo y femineidad de cada mujer.

Name: Varnika Arora
Description: Varnika Arora founded her eponymous label in 2016 with the intent of creating unique jewellery using a variety of semi-precious gemstones. Every collection stems from the idea that one should ‘dress to tell a story’ and this ideology is reflected in the pieces she creates.

Name: Luxury Chamber of Commerce
Description: The purpose of Luxury Chamber is to unite purveyors with appreciative clients of luxury goods & services as well as polite society with charity benefactors. In addition to being a bridge sponsor for members and the local community we also provide educational opportunities in the arenas of luxury real estate, art, exotic & vintage cars, yachting, fashion brands and design.   Whilst business people enjoy the networking aspect of our events, we are distinct from the local chamber of commerce and other business networking groups in that our events tend to take on a theme centered around art and culture and oftentimes tie into local charities and institutions.  Each month we host with a different charity including: health, veterans, poverty, animals, local universities and arts such as ballet and theatre.

Name: E.B. Meyrowitz
Description: E.B. Meyrowitz is the world’s foremost purveyor of luxury optical goods and bespoke eyewear since 1875. We pride ourselves on our ability to fashion exceptionally made bespoke eyeglasses, and our commitment to craftsmanship, design and service is second to none.

Name: AQC Association pour l'assurance qualité des fabricants de bracelets cuir
Description:
OUR VISION is to ensure a leather bracelet with the highest level of safety & act for a responsible global supply chain.
 
OUR MISSION is to provide a center of competencies to facilitate traceability & chemical compliance for leather bracelets.

Name: HOROPEDIA Foundation
Description:
HOROPEDIA is the first universal and multilingual encyclopedia dedicated exclusively to the world of watchmaking. It is open to everyone, from big companies and watchmakers to the general public, it is a neutral, and independent digital platform. Its aim is to share all the knowledge and highlight the know-how, and technical and artistic skills accumulated by the industry over the centuries. 

HOROPEDIA is a true watchmaking culture. Our goals are:
- Gather the entire watchmaking community to contribute to its content on a voluntary and unsolicited basis
- Offer students in continuing education the opportunity to pursue their studies in the watchmaking field 
- Support projects and activities related to the preservation of the watchmaking culture in the world.

HOROPEDIA is created by a non-profit Swiss foundation, the HOROPEDIA Foundation. Its Executive Board is composed of Philippe Dufour (President), Dr. Helmut Crott, André Colard, and Marc André Deschoux as Executive Director.

INSTAGRAM: @horo.pedia
FACEBOOK: @horopedia

Name: DB SALES
Description: We provide world-class diamonds and diamond products created by some of the most respected diamond artists in the world. We bring to you an incredible mix of science and art to create your most prized possessions exactly as you dreamt them to be.

Name: Solitaire Diamond Institute (SDI)
Description:
Solitaire Diamond Institute(SDI)-An ISO 9001:2008 Certified Institute prides itself in being a one-of-a-kind Institute that caters solely to the art of providing quality education, developing skills innovatively and creating career opportunities in the thriving Gems and Jewellery Industry.

Started in 2009, SDI has achieved quite a lot of credentials so far . In 2012, SDI was awarded the Shiksha Bharthi Puraskar. Today by 2016, we have trained more than 1500 candidates. More than 200 jewellers have benefitted by our training program and services.

Due to its versatile nature of education and adaptive nature towards the ever rapidly growing Jewellery Industry, SDI has its students always ahead of time.

Located in the commercial hub of Bengaluru, SDI has a highly sophisticated and technologically friendly environment, set up for its students. Being centrally located, the Institute is easily approachable from all parts of the Metro.

Extending its wings , SDI also started its first franchisee in the city of Nizams "HYDERABAD" in 2016.Soon we plan to have PAN INDIA presence.

Solitaire Diamond Institute also provides lab services with its gem testing Laboratory SDI Gems and Jewellery Lab, which is dedicated to the certification of Gemstones, Diamonds and studded jewellery

Name: Kamoka Pearls
Description: Kamoka Pearls crafts one-of-a-kind jewelry pieces using Tahitian pearls from our own sustainable farm in French Polynesia. Our innovative, passionately green production methods result in unrivaled pearl color, luster and pearl quality.

Name: AC by AC
Description:
PREMIÈRE MARQUE DE JOAILLERIE AFRICAINE CONTEMPORAINE

AC by AC est une célébration. Cette terre africaine qui l’a vu naître, Didier Constant a voulu lui rendre hommage, en créant la première marque de joaillerie africaine contemporaine. Les collections de bijoux qu’il dessine, explorent et transmettent un héritage culturel africain à la puissance magnétique.

Chacune des lignes réveille et révèle des éléments organiques, artistiques, historiques ou symboliques qui façonnent et traversent ce continent. La magie de la joaillerie les transforme en bijoux iconiques. 

L’épure des formes, le travail du diamant et des pierres précieuses, l’omniprésence de l’Or, en témoignage fidèle du Royaume de l’Or Akan: cette combinaison subtile a donné naissance à des pièces uniques et singulières, signatures d’une maison enracinée en Côte d’Ivoire.

Name: Shubham Jewels
Description: "Handmade real diamond fine jewellery, crafted with passion and brilliance."

Name: KARSHEV - The Private Jeweller
Description: Three generations of diamantaires, one mission to uncover the most exquisite stones in the world and transform them into extraordinary pieces to be treasured for a lifetime and beyond. As a family-run, private jeweler Karshev are delighted to offer their clients turned friends an entirely bespoke service, ensuring the family-led experience they know and trust is tailored, discreet and more importantly, unforgettable.

Name: Horlogekluis
Description: We are selling luxury watches

Name: Bay of Bling
Description: Bay of Bling is the best place to find unique, high-quality jewelry at an affordable price. Our team of creative individuals believes in the power of simplicity and minimalism! We offer a wide variety of eccentric jewelry pieces that are sure to stand out!

Name: Diamond & Platinum Sdn Bhd
Description:
Established in 1999, Diamond & Platinum is renowned for creating beautiful fine jewellery to celebrate life's precious moments. A reputation for uncompromising quality, each diamond is handpicked and each jewellery is meticulously crafted by a team of qualified gemologists and craftspeople with a penchant for perfection.

Always striving for a constant rise, the company has a strong design team that continuously creates new collections that resonate with customers. On top of its in-house brand, Estrella Diamond, the company is also an exclusive licensee of Forevermark Diamond in Malaysia since 2011. Forevermark is one of the world's most esteemed jewellery brands.

Today, Diamond & Platinum operates 13 boutiques in Malaysia and Brunei. Selected collections are also available online via Diamond & Platinum's Eshop.

Name: Ecole Boudard
Description: L'Ecole Boudard a été  créée par Monsieur Robert Boudard (2 fois Meilleur Ouvrier de France dans les métiers de la sellerie et de la maroquinerie) au début des années 1980. Elle est désormais installée dans les locaux du CFA du Pays de Montbéliard à Bethoncourt.

Name: BerogyJewelry
Description: Berogy does is the created brand, finds inspiration and is embodied in life thanks to the beauty of nature, which sometimes brings us to good ideas and recharges with positive energy. Handwork with clay, gemstones and creative approach is the soul, warmth and thoughts of Berogy!

Name: Werenbach AG
Description:
„WHEN YOU SEE THE EARTH FROM SPACE, IT CHANGES THE WAY YOU THINK.“

Werenbach watches are made from the material of real-life space rockets, recovered post-launch in Kazakhstan and subjected to an elaborate treatment process in preparation for watch production. All the material used to make the watches has been to the edge of space and back.

Any astronaut who views the Earth from space can recognise the beauty of our planet and the insignificance of themselves on a universal scale. They recognise the absence of borders, on Earth as in space.

This experience can change the way we think. It is “spaceborn”, because it originates from space, and it is our ideology. It lives in the bodies of the watches and the minds of those who wear them.

Find out more: https://www.werenbach.ch/concept/#ideology

Name: STG Création S.A.
Description:
Créée en 2011, STG Création S.A. est une entreprise spécialisée en sertissage et usinage.
L'entreprise est basée à Satigny, au coeur de l'industrie horlogère suisse, dans une infrastructure moderne et sécurisée spécialement conçue pour l'horlogerie et la joaillerie.
Spécialisés dans le sertissage traditionnel de haute précision pour les montres et bijoux hauts de gamme, notre équipe travaille sans cesse à la quête de la perfection visuelle. 

Nous associons un savoir-faire artisanal et des technologies de pointe,
au service d’une clientèle prestigieuse, tout en conservant une stricte confidentialité.

C'est dans cette otique que nous oeuvrons chaque jour afin de satisfaire les exigences de nos clients.

Que ce soit pour des pièces uniques, la fabrication de prototypes, ou encore la réalisation de petites séries, STG SA s'engage à toujours vous satisfaire en respectant ses 3 mots d'ordres :

Réactivité - Tradition - Précision

Name: Nineteen48
Description:
At Nineteen48, we offer fully-traceable, ethically-sourced gemstones, which come either from our own mines in Sri Lanka or those of our exclusive network of approved partners. That means, when you buy your gems from us, you have the peace of mind that your jewellery will be made with a stone that is guaranteed "conflict free" and conforms to the principles of full disclosure and fair trade.

You can obtain high-quality, Sri Lankan sapphire and ruby, as well as a wide range of other gemstones including alexandrite, aquamarine, garnet, spinel, tourmaline, citrine, amethyst, peridot, moonstone and topaz.

Whether you are a private or retail customer, either in the UK and overseas, we can supply you with everything from individual gemstones for small-scale designer/makers to large quantities of gems for wholesale or retail. Working with carefully selected suppliers in Sri Lanka and the UK, we provide you with a professional and competitively-priced service. 

However, we are not simply another gemstone dealer. Nineteen48 is a commercial venture with a social focus. As one of our customers, you help us make a real difference to the lives of others, because we commit to supporting charitable projects in Sri Lanka, focusing particularly on projects related to children and education. We believe that by investing in the younger generation, we make a real difference to the future of Sri Lanka. 

Our business benefits charitable and social projects through direct donations from our company's profits and also contributes to overall economic growth in Sri Lanka through our trading activities with local businesses and communities. We make a real difference to the people with whom we work, whilst at the same time bringing the exquisite beauty of Sri Lankan gemstones to an international audience.

So if you are looking for beautiful gemstones from a company with a conscience then we would love to hear from you...

Name: BREVA GENEVE SA
Description:
Breva Genève is a high-end Swiss watch brand founded in 2010 by its president and empowering entrepreneur Vincent Dupontreué. Brimming with innovation, Breva strives at pushing horological boundaries by creating scientific instruments that monitor the wearer’s environment.
After 3 years of research and development, at Baselworld 2013 Breva launched its first groundbreaking timepiece - the Génie 01, the world’s first mechanical wristwatch with time, barometer for forecasting the weather, altimeter and power reserve indications.
At Baselworld 2014, the brand launched its second creation - the Génie 02 – a fully functional, high performance mechanical altimeter.
The stunning Breva Génie 03 new complication will be unveiled in 2015.
Breva Genève brings a new and disruptive vision of high-end watchmaking with its complications. Attached to the concept of “monitoring your environment” and driven by the spirit of innovation, Breva is the link between watchmaking tradition and modernity – developing an innovative movement with a timeless design.

Name: SEBIME
Description:
Sebime, es la asociación española de fabricantes de bisutería, accesorios de moda y componentes, cuya sede está establecida en Mahón (Menorca, Islas Baleares).
Es una organización al servicio de los fabricantes de bisutería españoles cuyo principal objetivo es la defensa de sus intereses y la representación ante las diferentes administraciones, instituciones, organizaciones internacionales, y ante las asociaciones homólogas del resto de Europa.
Antecedentes
Sebime fue fundado en 1972 como Asociación sin ánimo de lucro y reconocido por el gobierno español como el único representante del sector.
La primera Semana Menorquina de Bisutería fue en 1972 (feria local).
La primera feria Nacional de Bisutería en España fue inaugurada en Menorca en el año 1976.
La primera feria Internacional fue inaugurada en Menorca en 1986.
La feria EuroBijoux & Accessories nació en mayo 1994.
Objetivos de la Asociación:
Investigación de mercados y Misiones de Estudios con el apoyo del ICEX (España Exportación e Inversiones – Ministerio de Industria, Comercio y Turismo).
Representación del sector en el extranjero en la participación de ferias y otras actividades.
Exposiciones y participaciones agrupadas en Ferias en España.
Apoyo Europeo y coordinación.
Talleres técnicos y de tendencias.
Estructura de la Asociación
El presidente y los miembros del Comité Ejecutivo o Comisión Gestora son elegidos por los fabricantes.
La Asamblea General de socios es el principal órgano de gobierno y se convoca por lo menos una vez al año.
Planes de Promoción
Desarrollo y ejecución junto con el ICEX del Plan Sectorial para la Bisutería Española, por el que las empresas de nuestro sector reciben el apoyo de esta entidad.
#bisuteria #fornituras #componentes #madeinspain #fashionjewelry #costumejewelry #findings

Name: Bonomi Diamanti
Description:
Siamo un'azienda importatrice diretta di diamanti dalle più importanti borse del mondo.
Il nostro team di professionisti è in grado di creare gioielli dal design esclusivo, per offrire alla nostra clientela prodotti innovativi e in linea con le tendenze del momento.
Ogni gioiello realizzato si attiene ad uno standard qualitativo elevato, raggiunto grazie alla metodologia produttiva dell'azienda che si affida esclusivamente ad artigiani di comprovata abilità, garantendo in primis la vera certificazione Made in Italy.

Ci assicuriamo di rilasciare ai nostri clienti la garanzia Conflict Free Diamonds, una solenne dichiarazione che assicura che i diamanti da noi commercializzati non siano correlati a conflitti o sfruttamento delle popolazioni coinvolte nella loro estrazione.
Sensibili agli allarmi lanciati da diversi enti internazionali che si occupano della qualità della vita di queste popolazioni e di ostacolare gli esportatori che finanziano guerre civili, seguiamo le direttive dettate dal Kimberely Process e dalle Nazioni Unite, le quali si concretizzano in un sistema di “certificazione d'origine” dei diamanti grezzi riconosciuto a livello mondiale.

Name: Machado Joalheiro
Description:
Em 1880, quando o comerciante José Pinto da Cunha abriu uma ourivesaria na Rua do Loureiro, no Porto, ao lado ainda não havia a Estação de S. Bento e, no seu lugar, estava o Mosteiro de São Bento de Avé-Maria. Das várias designações que a ourivesaria deteve, a que é referida repetidamente e de forma solida pelos almanaques da época é “Ourivesaria Cunha & Sobrinho: Jóias e objectos d’arte em prata”, ocupando os números 46 a 52 da Rua do Loureiro. 

Membro fundador da Fondation de la Haute Horlogerie (FHH), associação que agrupa as melhores manufacturas relojoeiras e uma selecção muito exclusiva a nível mundial dos melhores estabelecimentos – joalharias e relojoarias, Machado Joalheiro continuou a sua política de expansão e inaugurou em 2008 a sua primeira loja em Lisboa, na Avenida da Liberdade, dando mais um passo na estratégia de modernização e crescimento que vem sendo realizada. É um projecto que se caracteriza pela combinação de luz e cores sóbrias, valorizando as jóias e criando um ambiente minimalista e de exclusividade.

O conjunto de princípios que orientam Machado Joalheiro são os princípios da verdade e da confiança, que foram transmitidos através do somatório dos ensinamentos e experiências acumulados ao longo de 135 anos e que valeram uma relação com todos os clientes de grande respeito e amizade, que perdura de geração em geração.

Name: Artesicura
Description:
C’è una cosa, sopra ogni altra, che distingue l’essere umano e lo fa spiccare nel mondo animale: l’essere umano è l’unico che ricerca, produce e conserva la bellezza con la sola finalità di poterne godere. La ricerca della bellezza fa parte di noi da non meno di 40 mila anni, e costituisce un aspetto così importante del nostro animo che abbiamo sentito l’esigenza di attribuirgli un nome: Arte.

Così il collezionista d’arte è ben più che un semplice accumulatore, va ben oltre le più venali speculazioni finanziarie e trascende le mode e le tendenze. Quel che un collezionista d’arte fa, la sua reale missione, è celebrare la propria e l’altrui umanità, conservare ed esaltare una porzione tanto piccola quanto preziosa di quel diamante dalle infinite facce che noi chiamiamo spirito umano.

Conservare, salvaguardare e valorizzare l’arte, consigliare il collezionista e accompagnarlo in ogni fase del suo rapporto con l’opera d’arte è, invece, la missione di Artesicura. Artesicura è l’unico servizio integrale di tutela, salvaguardia, consulenza e valorizzazione di un’opera d’arte o di una collezione rivolto esclusivamente al mondo dei privati.

Name: Danhov
Description:
Located in Los Angeles, California, Danhov is an award-winning designer of unique and handcrafted engagement rings, wedding bands and fine jewelry. 

Founded in 1984 by Jack Hovsepian, Danhov is known in the luxury jewelry category for its innovative design philosophy. The designs of the custom-made engagement rings and wedding bands ensure that every Danhov customer wears a special ring that is an extension and personal statement of their discerning taste. 

Jack learned at an early age how to marry precision with art. Shadowing his father, an accomplished fashion designer, he spent his formative years exposed to trend-setting haute couture. This influence now drives his passion to design each ring with exacting measures and create the world's most exquisite collection of bridal rings. Whether inspired by classic baroque or modern minimalist lines and shapes, Danhov's avant garde designs are certain to impress. 

Each ring created by Danhov is either handmade or hand-assembled by the most skilled jewelers at its LA-based offices. This further exemplifies the precision and individuality for which Danhov is known. Unlike some jewelry companies, no molds or mass-production techniques are used at Danhov. This preserves the quality and unique intricacies of the ring that only handcrafted and hand-assembled pieces can show, and it makes it eco-friendly without the use of harsh chemicals and large machinery.

Name: Athena Jewelry Manufactory
Description:
Athena Jewelry Manufactory was established in 1997 at Panyu jewelry district of Guangzhou City of China. The factory had 20 workers at the beginning and once expanded to 200 workers in 2005. 
 
In 2013, the factory retains 80 full-time skilled workers, a professional designer team and 50 seasonal workers. The well-educated designer team includes five experienced JewelCAD professionals, eight talented model makers and three effective 3-D modeling printers from 3D system USA. By average, its weekly productivities are 2 kilograms of gold jewelry, 40 kilograms of silver jewelry and 50 kilograms of brass jewelry.

For the first decade, the factory focused on producing silver jewelry. Started from 2008, the factory adopted new technologies and accepted orders of brass jewelry and fine jewelry. For all existing models, they can be produced in gold, silver or brass. The factory also provides CUSTOM-DESIGN service. If you cannot find an ideal design over their 4,000 selections of ready-to-order models, you can contact their salespersons for custom-design.

The factory’s main product lines include rings, pendants, necklaces, earrings, bracelets, bangles, brooches, chains and findings. Among these products, Rings and Pendants are their strong points. They count up to 2,500 designs.

The factory is friendly with different materials. They work well with Diamond, Gemstone, Semi-precious stone, Cubic Zirconium, Swarovski Elements Crystal, Genuine Leather, Fabric and many new materials.

Hope we can be your reliable and favorite business partner! 

Should you have any question, please contact us at sales@thejewelrytown.com!


Thank you!

Sincerely, 
Athena Jewelry Manufactory
Athena International Co. Ltd. (Hong Kong)

Name: Paula Mendoza
Description:
PAULA MENDOZA es una marca de accesorios colombiana, reconocida internacionalmente al ser elegida por celebridades de alto perfil. Su propuesta fusiona una estética escultórica y ancestral con un diseño contemporáneo que celebra el poder de quien lleva cada pieza.

Con más de 20 años de trayectoria, el círculo —símbolo de integridad, feminidad y protección— guía su narrativa estética y filosófica. Presente en cada colección, representa el equilibrio entre arte, naturaleza y movimiento constante.

Inspirada en sus raíces latinoamericanas, el arte hecho a mano y la sofisticación con intención, PAULA MENDOZA crea piezas icónicas que trascienden tendencias, acompañando a mujeres auténticas y poderosas, conectadas con su historia.

Name: Parham Ramezani SRL
Description:
About us

We are a passionate, pioneering jewellery company, driven to create innovative, sophisticated designs that are simply without equal. Inspired by the passion and beauty of Italian design, we strive to craft ground-breaking jewellery pieces of dynamic originality and daring beauty... like the new Legacy Collection – the perfect personification of both the timeless and the contemporary.

Our primary audience: discerning, high net worth individuals in 11 key locations: Milan, London, Paris, Zurich, Geneva, Monaco, New York, Los Angeles, Singapore, Shanghai and Moscow. Our primary goal: to be the luxury jewellery brand of choice for the sophisticated, stylish, 21st century individual of refinement, wealth and class, who is seeking utter exclusivity and elegance.

A message from our founder

“We are a brand born in Milan, that seeks to spread our innovative design ethos to a truly global audience. Our company aesthetic stems from an unquenchable passion for curating jewellery, intertwined with the Italian tradition of design combined with luxury craftsmanship and innovation. We are dedicated to a new type of jewellery: sophisticated, urbane, unique... stylish, and exuding an understated class. The Legacy Collection represents the material manifestation of our originality and ambition.”

Parham Ramezani

Name: C.HAFNER & HILDERBRAND SA
Description:
Located in Geneva, Switzerland, C.HAFNER & HILDERBRAND SA is the world leader in precious metal powders and brazing pastes. 

For 50 years, our products have been meeting the most demanding requirements of the watch and jewellery sectors, as well as any other industry looking for quality and Swiss Made. 

We deliver our products all over the world without delay. By extension, we also supply gold, palladium, platinum and silver alloys in the form of semi-finished products or customised finished components. As a technology-driven company, our industrial solutions combine traditional precious metals processing methods with innovation through powder technology, additive manufacturing and hybrid manufacturing methods. 

Our commitment:  To support you in your projects with the precious metals solution tailored to your needs. Don't hesitate to contact us!

Name: Elisa Parpinelli jewelry
Description:
Elisa Parpinelli is a jewelry brand named after its creator and designer. With a
versatile identity, EP reflects the creativity of the woman who brought it to the world –
an idea that is finally transformed into reality.
The brand is based on the boldness of its owner, who after working for years in the

Each piece of jewelry is designed to dress women with shades of freedom, perceiving
humanity’s diversity as a fundamental element that cannot be ignored.

https://www.instagram.com/elisa.parpinelli/

Name: NATKINA Jewellery
Description:
NATKINA is not an ordinary jewellery brand. It is built on a story of the most powerful and unconditional love on the planet. The love of mother and daughter. And how important it is to dream and go to your goal because the most important dreams are destined to come true. This is the story of NATKINA.

Our young team brings the integrity of fine jewelry-making from world-famous startups and luxury brands and reimagines what life would be like if these brands were more accessible. We are classically styled, meaning that no matter what your style is - with NATKINA - you will never go out of fashion.
Would you like to feel confident wearing the most sophisticated diamonds but for a fraction of the price? Natkina gives you that possibility! A Swiss Jewellery Brand is proud of the highest quality of its diamond imitation jewellery, which even experts cannot tell apart. We believe that your jewellery is bought for a living, wearing it every day and often changing instead of being stuck in the bank because it is too expensive!

Classically styled, our pieces are an excellent investment and perfect for any occasion! You can now own that incredible massive diamond ring you always dreamt about!

Name: Century Watches
Description:
Founded in 1966, by Hans-Ulrich Klingenberg, who was already famous for his amazing inventions. After devising an exclusive system to create a vacuum inside a watch case, he developed what remains one of the distinctive marks of every CENTURY watch: the Megalith. This highly complex construction is used to fuse two discs of sapphire into one inseparable watch case. The combination of such innovations enabled CENTURY to write the first chapter of its illustrious history... 

Generation after generation, its master craftsmen sculpt and polish each of its facets entirely by hand. This extraordinarily meticulous work is rewarded with a dazzling display of light and colours that has become the most exclusive hallmark of every CENTURY timepiece. Nowadays Century Time Gems Ltd is located in Nidau and is head by the founder’s son, Philip W. A. Klingenberg. CENTURY’s motto is “Beyond Imagination”, which constantly urges the Manufacture to surpass itself while celebrating its ability to transform every second into a moment of pure wonder...

Name: ARIA JOALHEIROS
Description:
Aria é a fusão do luxo, da joalheria handmade e preciosidade nas lapidações de alta gama. Luxo absoluto, Aria.
Description
Aria Joalheiros começa sua história em 1997, movida pela constante inspiração no universo das gemas preciosas, metais nobres e técnicas de ourivesaria. Tradição herdada da cultura brasileira, da curiosidade do olhar e apuração do senso estético.

Num passo adiante, Aria entende a manufatura de joalheria como exclusividade e acesso. Exclusividade pelo trabalho criterioso e especializado – peças importantes merecem edições limitadas - e acesso, por conta da variedade de propostas criativas. Nosso time é constantemente atualizado e presente em eventos de joalheria internacionais.

Há anos, marcas suíças estabelecidas como Montblanc, Victorinox, Wenger, Longines, Rado e Tissot apostam em nossa filosofia. 

Nosso olhar, voltado à qualidade das gemas e lapidação, foi treinado pelo lendário Prof. Dr. Rui Ribeiro Franco, mestre gemólogo estabelecido, e membro da Sociedade Brasileira de Geologia e da Associação Brasileira de Gemologia e Mineralogia. 

E nosso senso estético é dedicado ao clássico porém contemporâneo, porque acreditamos que um bom desenho não tem limites. Acreditamos no timeless design. 

Bem-vindos ao nosso universo!

Name: SOKOLOV
Description:
SOKOLOV – это международный холдинг с собственным производственным комплексом, офисами оптовых продаж и сетью розничных магазинов в Швейцарии. 

Компания имеет более чем 20-летнюю историю. Основанная как небольшая семейная мастерская, она год от года становилась успешнее. Сегодня это крупнейший ювелирный завод, лидер отечественного рынка. Все достижения и успехи SOKOLOV неразрывно связаны с командой профессионалов, которые любят свою работу и стремятся к лучшему результату. Мы постоянно ищем новые возможности и расширяем границы.

Команда SOKOLOV объединяет более 3 500 человек в разных странах. Многие из них пришли в компанию, не имея опыта работы, но со временем стали настоящими профессионалами своего дела. Возможность реализовать себя, совершенствоваться и заниматься любимым делом — успех компании складывается из маленьких и больших побед каждого ее сотрудника.

Name: Vaer Watches
Description:
We started Vaer in 2016, with a simple goal: build the perfect everyday wristwatch. A watch that was affordable, built for the outdoors, with the unique appeal of USA assembly.

Since then, we’ve expanded our collection to offer a wide array of design, movement, and assembly options. At every step we’ve worked to redefine expectations of value and performance, consistently delivering watches at a fraction of the price of traditional luxury brands. While we’ve come a long way, we remain centered around the following product values:

- Extreme Water Resistance (for daily ocean use)
- 2x Interchangeable Straps (for ultimate functionality)
- Extensive American Sourcing (for added quality control)
- Refined and Timeless Aesthetics (for unquestioned good taste)
- A Responsible Business Model (for long-term sustainability)

Name: Termin'Hor SA
Description:
Spécialiste de la terminaison haut de gamme. 

Nos différents services internes vous proposent de gérer vos SAV ainsi que les petites/moyennes séries clefs en mains. de la pièce brut à la tête de montre.

 La terminaison, le rhodiage, le dé-rhodiage chimique et l'horlogerie nous permettent de maîtriser ces étapes cruciales trop souvent sous-estimée.

De la montre de stock défraîchie par les présentations à la montre neuve prête à repartir sur les marchés. De la montre du client passionné abîmée par le temps et l'usure à la montre neuve comme le premier jour. Tout est maîtrisé en interne!

Besoin d'aide pour vos prototypes? Nous sommes également là pour vous conseiller et accompagner lors de la conception afin de vous aider à obtenir les clefs pour augmenter encore la qualité finale de vos projets.

Notre passion? Nos métiers. Notre plaisir? La chance de pouvoir sublimer vos produits par notre savoir-faire. Notre but? Votre satisfaction.

Au plaisir de vous servir.

Name: Stone Paris
Description:
Stone Paris doit son existence à l’impulsion de Marie Poniatowski qui en 2004 choisit de créer une ligne de joaillerie destinée aux femmes, toutes générations confondues, qui en liberté, choisissent de s’émanciper et de s’affranchir des conventions. 

À travers son patrimoine culturel et artistique, Marie Poniatowski explique son goût pour les bijoux anciens. Stone Paris développe une typologie quasi-infinie de bijoux qui puise dans tous les styles historiques, ne gardant comme dénominateurs communs qu'une certaine note de sobriété et une élégance intemporelle. Son style de création est reconnaissable par la finesse de ses bijoux et l’alliance de l’or et du diamant, deux matériaux nobles qui contribuent à asseoir l’identité de la Maison. Fidèle à son esprit pionnier, Stone Paris a bousculé les codes traditionnels de la joaillerie pour relever le défi d’une joaillerie durable et affirmer ses valeurs liées à la transmission. La marque s’engage donc à promouvoir et à mettre en place des pratiques responsables, en faveur du développement durable. 

Stone Paris rayonne aujourd’hui à travers son site, ses deux boutiques parisiennes et sa présence dans plus de 50 points de vente en France et à l’international. Marque incontournable de la joaillerie française, nombreuses sont les icônes qui depuis plus de 15 ans portent les pièces de la Maison. Depuis le mois de septembre 2022, Stone Paris est également la 1ère marque de joaillerie à proposer sa plateforme dédiée aux bijoux de seconde main, Stone Vintage.

Name: Louped
Description:
Louped.com (formerly I Do Now I Don’t) is unlike any online site you’ve ever seen. It all starts with a simple premise - put buyers and sellers together where both end up with a great price for their jewelry and other collectables. The site offers an outlet for people ready to unload their leftover “assets” from a failed relationship or a diamond ring they have not worn in years. Items for sale anytime range from diamonds, engagement rings, vintage and antique engagement rings, wedding rings to wedding dresses and collectible watches. Buyers, in turn, get a great discount and the opportunity to own higher quality jewelry than they thought they could afford. Compared to a diamond retailer, our auction enables sellers to receive as much as 100% more than a jeweler would pay, while providing up to 50% in savings to buyers. 

Louped provides buyers and sellers with security, simplicity, and superior service. A GIA-trained and accredited gemologist inspects each diamond sold on the site to assure its authenticity. The buyer's money is released to the seller only when the diamond certification process by our expert is complete. In a world where so much is uncertain, our auction process allows everyone to buy and sell jewelry in 100% safe, secure, and trusting environment.

Name: Official Watches
Description: Official Watches is the UK's leading contemporary luxury watch dealer with an impressive selection of Swiss luxury watches for sale. Dino had already been in the jewellery business for over 10 years and Luca came from a retail designer fashion management background after more than 10 years in that industry. Add to this the fact that they were both passionate watch enthusiasts from a young age and collectively, they brought a rich variation of skills to the luxury watch market.

Visionaries of tomorrow, architecting a better world with molecules and meticulousness.
At K.Pankaj Lab Grown Diamonds, our mission is to create a cruelty-free, sustainable Jewellery industry.  
We manufacture lab-grown diamonds and supply them to jewellers, dealers, and exporters all across the globe and meet their demands on call. Kpankaj lab-grown Diamonds is based in BKC, Mumbai, and with an office in New York, USA, we have IGI certified lab-grown Diamonds.

Name: Bunter SA

Name: KYRA Diamonds FZCO
Description:
Located in the Gold & Diamond Park – Dubai UAE, ‘KYRA’ is a jewelry manufacturer and an online retailer for Fine Jewelry. Products offered include Piercings, Wedding Rings, Body jewelry, Studded Jewelry, Kids Jewelry, Gold Bullion and Certified Diamonds. ‘KYRA’ sports a spell binding array of beautiful creations, sourced from the best in the world & customized to your needs. 

The name ‘KYRA’ evolved almost naturally to fill the void between women & men from diverse backgrounds who desire for unique statement pieces. The range of jewelry that is showcased on the online portal www.kyra.ae, and at the Gold & Diamond Park Boutique is meticulously crafted by leading designers and veteran goldsmiths at our state-of-the-art, fully integrated manufacturing facility in Dubai. Using advanced precision CAD-CAM technology, each masterpiece is a marvel of modern innovation yet traditional, of functionality and craftsmanship, created exclusively for successful women and men all over the world.

Jewels from ‘KYRA’ are for the ones who seek to make a statement of elegance and brilliant opulence. Besides the years of experience and timeless creations, what has earned ‘KYRA’ a vast fan following among the more affluent crowds across the globe is their willingness and ability to empower the consumers through transparency, fair trade practice and great customer service. “Our aim is to be true to our values and true to our clients.” 


Contact: email@kyra.ae
Tel: +971 4 34 06 868
www.kyra.ae

Name: KTZ
Description:
Conceived in 2003, KTZ is a contemporary London-based fashion label under the creative direction of Marjan Pejoski and management of Sasko Bezovski. In 1996 the pair opened the shop Kokon to Zai in Soho as a hybrid music and fashion store, which became a platform for creative projects, showcased cutting edge designers and produced the label KTZ.

KTZ designs men’s and women’s ready-to-wear clothing with couture detailing known for its raw energy and contemporary urban edge, but also for embracing ethnographic references and multiculturalism.

The KTZ label creates a dynamic combination of contrasting elements: modernity and the ancestral, the secular and the religious, anarchy and severity, spectacle and depth. This makes a unique label identity that is recognized widely and is worn by pioneering personalities in other creative industries, in art and music.

KTZ operates two flagship stores in London and Paris, and receives international exposure.

Name: ELC

Name: Mahendra Brothers
Description: Established in 1960, Mahendra Brothers Exports Private Limited is integral to the diamond business. Our association with natural diamonds is inseparable. When you think Mahendra Brothers, you consciously think diamonds.

Description:
Expert joaillier, Pierre-Marie Bernard et son équipe vous accueillent dans le 9ème arrondissement de Paris. Artisans à votre écoute, nous sommes vos interlocuteurs pour un bijou sur mesure fabriqué dans notre atelier parisien. 

Nous prenons également en charge la réparation, la transformation et la restauration de bijoux de toutes époques. Nous vous conseillons pour l’entretien de votre patrimoine familial.

Notre volonté, un travail authentique, dans le respect du savoir-faire traditionnel de la joaillerie pour vous assurer une qualité pérenne.

Name: Uwe Koetter Jewellers
Description:
Uwe Koetter was established in 1968 and today, after more than four decades as an elite jeweller, Uwe Koetter continues to push the boundaries of excellence in innovation, design, quality and service.

Uwe Koetter boasts five on site designers who between them have achieved no less than 17 jewellery design awards.  Johan Louw, design director is acknowledged as the most awarded jewellery designer in South Africa.

Their exceptional craftsmanship is woven through their rich heritage, where Uwe Koetter's jewellery  is handmade by highly skilled craftsmen who work meticulously to create your unique design.  The designs portray a graceful elegance and ageless modernity and have been commissioned by numerous celebrities worldwide.

Pushing the boundaries of innovation Uwe Koetter offers Computer Aided Designs and 3D printing.  CAD will provide you with a photo-realistic representation of your design and 3D printing provides you with a prototype of your ring - in resin - for you to try on ensuring it will be the ring of your dreams.

Name: DULONG
Description:
Since 2005, the Danish jewelry company Dulong has created collections of fine jewelry using the finest materials such as 18 K gold, pearls and diamonds.

The company is the result of a unique partnership between Marianne Dulong, founder and jeweller, and Anja Camilla Alajdi, creative director and renowned stylist. Today, the company is amongst the most exclusive jewelry companies in Denmark with a focus on outstanding craftsmanship.

Anja Camilla Alajdi and Marianne Dulong share a passion for contemporary design. From the very beginning their vision has been to create jewelry for the modern, independent, fashion- and quality oriented woman. The balance between the classic, edgy and glamorous jewelry aspires to the confident woman who is not afraid to stand out from the crowd and does not compromise on quality or exclusivity.

Dulong Fine Jewelry is sold through flagship stores in Copenhagen and Lyngby and through selected retailers in Scandinavia
