Name: Randi Rahm Atelier
Description:
Intricate detail and exquisite quality are the trademarks of couture designer Randi Rahm, whose hand-beaded creations have graced the pages of major magazines and illuminated red carpets worldwide. 

A entrepreneur and artist in every sense of the word, Rahm translated her talents into designing exclusive looks that tap directly into a woman’s inner sensuality, connecting the relationship between a woman’s wardrobe and her inner self. “The woman I design for does not want to look like everyone else,” said Rahm, who has been in business for over 25 years.

When Rahm isn’t designing in her atelier she dedicates her time to charity. Among the many charities she supports, she holds a special place in her heart for organizations that support the arts and education and reach out to the less fortunate in her local community. 

Rahm opened her Fifth Avenue atelier in 1998. As word of her design talent grew, so did her business; today her ultra-chic collections draw rave reviews from fashion aficionados coast to coast. Some of her more well-known fans include Beyonce, Carrie Underwood, Edie Falco, Mariah Carey, Joan Rivers, Julianne Hough and Halle Berry. With a diverse client base ranging from Hollywood’s A-list actresses to socialites and corporate executives, Rahm is one of fashion’s hottest style-makers.

Name: NAJO Jewellery
Description:
ABOUT NAJO
Self-expression by design

Since 1986, NAJO’s harmonious jewellery designs have empowered individuals to express themselves creatively and beautifully while staying true to their personalities. Fusing unconventionality with a timeless appeal, our sophisticated and bold jewellery design aesthetic is unique. 

Born in Australia, Jo Tory is proud to be one of the country’s pioneering female founders. She has been our Creative Director since NAJO’s formation, steering the company to be one of Australia’s most successful fine jewellery brands today. Jo also sits on the Jewellers Association of Australia’s Board of Directors, where she actively promotes the highest standards and ethics within the Australian jewellery industry.

OUR DESIGNS
Creating harmony between jewellery and nature 

NAJO’s enduring aesthetic is forever defined by Mother Nature’s artistry. We’ve long admired her ephemeral beauty in the world around us. Perfectly imperfect pebbles, ethereal dewdrops, cascading water – our pure design ethos balances elegance and beauty with timelessness. The sense of proportion of our designs, the clean, uncluttered lines, and the harmony in how the elements play out speak to those who wish to express understated sophistication and style.

OUR STUDIO
Australian by nature. International by design.

NAJO’s studio is based in Redfern, an inner-city Sydney suburb brimming with creativity, cafes and cultural heritage. Our close-knit team is primarily female, and many of us have worked together for decades. 

All of us are travellers and explorers with a passion for design, an eye for beauty, and a love of slow jewellery that endures. Our diverse expertise crosses industries and continents, enabling us to bring unique perspectives to the creative table. We absolutely love what we do and why we do it: to create jewellery with beauty and soul that empowers women to express themselves creatively and beautifully while staying true to their personalities.

Name: Porzellanmanufaktur FÜRSTENBERG GmbH
Description:
Manufactured porcelain for lifestyles of today and tomorrow

Since 1747, the FÜRSTENBERG porcelain manufactory has produced porcelain that also always reflects the time in which it is created: the spirit, the attitude to life and the aesthetics, as well as the manual and technical possibilities. Whether tableware ranges, giftware or individual designer pieces – every item of porcelain from FÜRSTENBERG has all the qualities it needs to become a classic.
Accordingly, for 270 years Germany's second-oldest manufactory, in Fürstenberg in Lower Saxony, has been creating and producing ranges that have become icons of dining culture. Classics such as ALT FÜRSTENBERG from 1750, GRECQUE from 1840 or WAGENFELD from 1934 are ranges which, even today, still lend contemporary charm and exclusivity to seemingly everyday objects. This claim to authenticity and substance is also applied by FÜRSTENBERG to each new design – whether created in its own studio, like the double-walled TOUCHÉ cups range, or in cooperation with internationally renowned designers like Alfredo Häberli with his FLUEN form, an elegant, cosmopolitan porcelain or, together with the Vienna design studio EOOS, the OMNIA tableware, which with only four parts represents the answer to today's living worlds - the essence of modern table culture. OMNIA was awarded the Red Dot Award 2016 for its high design quality.

As well as being deeply rooted in European porcelain art and its creative collaboration with artists and designers, it is FÜRSTENBERG's craftsmanship that characterises its quality most of all. Perfection down to the last detail is only possible because, even today, the majority of porcelain manufacture is still based on handwork. That's why, at FÜRSTENBERG, the saying that “a cup passes through 100 hands” is as true today as it ever was. For these are people who, with curiosity, hunger for innovation and love of porcelain as a material, craft timeless works of art.

Name: International Institute of Diamond Grading and Research
Description:
The International Institute of Diamond Grading & Research has been established by The De Beers Group of Companies, the organisation most closely associated with both the mystique and science of the world's most sought-after stone. Its mission: to provide a premium service and ground breaking proprietary screening instruments to the industry.

Over the past 25 years the De Beers Group of Companies has been uniquely positioned to conduct research into both rough and polished diamonds. This research has led to the formation of the International Institute of Diamond Grading & Research, where we are bringing the art of diamond grading into the 21st Century through our use of proprietary diamond testing equipment developed by the De Beers Group of Companies over all those years of research. Using this equipment we are able to accurately, consistently and reliably grade diamonds to the exact same standard at all of our world class facilities situated all over the globe.

Our heritage of expertise, accuracy and probity is integral to everything we do.

The dedication and precision we devote to assessing diamonds is now available to our clients around the world.

Name: The Emerald Company
Description:
Introducing The Emerald , a Swiss-based emerald jewelry brand that is revolutionizing the industry with our unique approach to design, technology, and sustainability. We are dedicated to creating stunning jewelry pieces that not only enhance your style but also contribute to responsible mining practices.

Our brand was founded with the goal of becoming a leading emerald brand in the industry. We recognized that there was a gap in the market for a brand that combined modern design with new technology and sustainable mining practices. We set out to fill that gap and have since become a leader in the emerald market.

One of the ways we have distinguished ourselves is through our proprietary auction software. This technology allows us to connect buyers and sellers from all over the world in our one-of-a-kind emerald marketplace. This marketplace is a game-changer for the industry as it allows for a transparent and fair buying and selling process. It also allows for a more efficient way for buyers to find the perfect emeralds for their needs.

Our commitment to sustainability is also a key aspect of our brand. We believe that it is important to not only create beautiful jewelry but also to do so in an ethical and responsible way. This is why we only source our emeralds from mines that adhere to strict environmental and labor standards. We also invest in technology and processes that minimize the environmental impact of mining.

When it comes to design, we are always pushing the boundaries and seeking out new and innovative ways to showcase the beauty of emeralds. Our team of designers are constantly experimenting with different cuts, colors and setting to create truly unique pieces. We also offer a wide range of styles from classic to modern, so there is something for every taste.

We invite you to join us on our journey and discover the beauty of ethically-sourced emeralds. Follow our page for exclusive updates and new collections.

In 2024, UNDONE relocated its global headquarters to Tokyo, embracing Japan's rich design heritage. Today, our watches are designed in Japan, powered by Japanese movements, and shaped by a philosophy that blends craftsmanship with culture.

Beyond our in-house models, UNDONE is known for bold collaborations that reflect who we are - and who you are. From pop culture to traditional heritage, each UNDONE collection blends storytelling with design - sparking emotional connections and inspiring a growing global community of watch lovers. We believe a watch should reflect your character. That's why we keep introducing new collaborations - to offer more ways for you to express yourself. And if you want to see what's next in Japanese creativity, you'll find it here at UNDONE.

UNDONE - Designed in Japan. Crafted for perspective.

Description:
Julia and David Gardner opened David Gardner’s Jewelers in the fall of 1983. With the idea of being “the community’s jewelry store” in mind, the Gardner’s have since embraced the opportunity to be a part of their customer's lives, personally and as a part of this community.

Name: ICONEEK
Description:
Founded in 2014, ICONEEK is a company that is constantly innovating and above all attentive to the demand, its customers and the market. Pioneers, passionate, experts and professionals are the adjectives that best describe Vanessa and Fabien Chicha, the two founders of ICONEEK.
Specialized in the sale and expertise of vintage and modern watches, ICONEEK’s hybrid concept is halfway between dealers and auction houses, gathering the best of both worlds: the immediate availability of models via the online Boutique, as well as the watchmaking expertise.
Located in the heart of Geneva, the first upstairs luxury watch showroom offers discretion, availability and professionalism.
But above all, since 2021, in addition to the Boutique and the consulting activities, ICONEEK is a watch auction house and conducts two live auctions per year, as well as two other online-only auctions.
The ICONEEK team is committed to continually offering a diverse and varied selection that appeals to both amateurs and the most discerning watch collectors.
For almost 11 years, ICONEEK has built a solid reputation in the expertise and acquisition of exceptional timepieces, the accompaniment of the greatest collectors, the creation of tailor-made concepts, the advice, and its editorial activity. A tightly-knit, highly qualified and responsive team, capable of providing bespoke products with the highest standards and in complete confidentiality for the most demanding collectors, combined with a quality of expertise and advice recognized by Swiss watch brands, watch shows, museums, and institutions.

Our lab-grown diamonds are real diamonds that are carefully grown in the most high-tech laboratories in the world. We firmly believe that mined diamonds, or blood diamonds, are diamonds of the past. Proud Diamond represents a new era where all diamonds are made by people, for people.

Our jewelry pieces are crafted and designed in Montreal, catering to people who care about ethical and sustainable practices and want to make a conscious choice when purchasing diamonds.

Name: MacKinnon Watches
Description:
From the heart of the Highlands we bring to you MacKinnon Watches. Our heritage and clan surname inspired the design of these watches and allows us to bring to the world a timepiece enriched in hundreds of years of Scottish history.

The iconic landscape of Scotland has also drawn much inspiration for our designs and quite rightly so. Between the dramatic glens, lochs and unrivalled castles, this wee country is steeped in beauty and we at MacKinnon Watches hope to portray this to you with our collections. Although you will find many MacKinnon’s across Scotland, our family lives in the Highlands at the foot of Ben Nevis which we have paid homage to in our logo.

Name: Donna Dorée
Description:
𝐌𝐲 𝐠𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐞𝐧 𝐦𝐮𝐬𝐞. 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡 𝐪𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐣𝐞𝐰𝐞𝐥𝐫𝐲 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐚 𝐩𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐮𝐥 𝐚𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞.
Donna Dorée is er voor de vrouw die haar podium durft te pakken. Ieder artistiek design van Donna Dorée is een work of art, draagbare kunst in edelmetaal. Elegant, verleidelijk en ongeremd.

Name: EMATEK
Description:
EMATEK is a benchmark French luxury crystal maker. 

Haute-couture, leather goods, jewelry, table arts and home decoration: whatever your industry, trust EMATEK to help you designing and producing 100% bespoke solutions, hand blown in France for a genuine luxurious creation.

Name: D'orica gold jewellery
Description: Our jewellery unique nature stems from a differentiation strategy and from research. For over 30 years we have specialized in a particular type of product, created sartorially with needle and gold thread by our expert craftspeople. Always focused on innovation and research, we combine craftsmanship with the most advanced technologies and cutting-edge machinery, creating timeless jewels. The entire manufacturing process takes place within our workshop and is monitored carefully, to ensure an extremely high-quality product, enjoyed all over the world. This has enabled us to react to changing market needs and satisfy complex customization requests always with innovative and original solutions, some of which we have patented.

Name: HERON JOAILLERIE
Description:
Expertise, application et savoir-faire au service de votre projet de joaillerie.

Héron Joaillerie trouve la pierre qui vous correspond ; dessine avec et pour vous, votre futur bijou et vous accompagne dans sa fabrication pour une expérience de consommation rare et privilégiée. 

"Parce qu'un bijou est un témoin de vie et qu'il porte en lui une histoire particulière, il doit être une pièce unique". 

-Dessins et gouaches personnalisés, exécutés à la main.
-Toutes les étapes de fabrication sont réalisées en France à Paris.
-Disponible en Île-de-France et en régions.

Name: Twyla Treasures
Description: We are a luxury fashion jewellery brand, handcrafting 18 carat gold plated treasures.

Name: ADINKRA
Description: ADINKRA is an independent luxury brand dedicated to crafting fine accessories and attire that honour Africa’s cultural heritage. Inspired by the ethos of Ghana’s Adinkra symbols, the brand champions inclusivity and invites a global audience to discover the richness of Africa’s 54 nations. By fusing traditional artistry with contemporary design, ADINKRA creates timeless pieces that embody culture, identity, and modern luxury.

Name: METTETAL CREATION
Description: Développement et fabrication accessoires métalliques maroquinerie et PAP

Name: lia sophia Jewelry
Description: Founded more than 30 years ago, lia sophia offer women an opportunity to determine their own earnings, make their own hours and enjoy the flexibility that comes with a home-based business. lia sophia is a proud member of the Direct Selling Association and offers its customers quality fashion jewelry backed by a life-time replacement guarantee.

Name: Marsatta Chocolate
Description: A boutique store offer premium chocolates.

Name: Multicolour Gems Ltd
Description: Headquartered in Bangkok, with international offices in 12 locations across 5 countries,  Multicolour Gems is a major importer of rough stones from East Africa and Madagascar. Visit us at www.multicolour.com for over 130 gemstone varieties including alexandrite, sapphire, ruby, tanzanite, tsavorite, spinel and tourmaline. Updated daily and with over 15,000 unique gems online, the Multicolour.com  is the most comprehensive online collection of rare and collectible colored gemstones, natural pearls and certified diamonds.

Name: Shailja's Fine Jewelery
Description: Shailja's Diamond Jewellery is a luxury boutique that offers a wide range of diamond jewellery from rings to neck pieces. Our high-end pieces are a product of careful craftsmanship and creativity that always leaves a mark of splendour on the customer. Based in Surat - the diamond city itself, Shailja's was started in 2003 and continues to grow and excel in the following years.

Name: Revenga Chemisiers Genevois
Description:
La Maison Revenga est la dernière chemiserie artisanale et familiale sise au coeur de Genève. 

En ce lieu nous avons pour vocation de conseiller et vêtir chaque personne recherchant des chemises sur-mesure uniques, façonnée artisanalement et avec passion.

Nos réalisations sont exclusivement conçues dans notre atelier genevois et sont ainsi garanties Swiss Made.

Name: Jowissa
Description:
Since its establishment in 1951, the Jowissa brand has produced multifaceted Swiss watches of exceptional quality. As an independent family business currently in its third generation, the brand has remained true to its ideals, first defined in the tranquil surroundings of Bettlach, in the canton of Solothurn. Here, great craftsmanship and cutting-edge production come together to create refined timepieces that combine style and sophistication. As a high-quality “Swiss Made” watch brand, Jowissa offers outstanding value for money in addition to the refined sense of style. 

The watches in our collection are as unique as the people who wear them. The gleaming reflections, premium materials, intense colours and Swiss quality are features that are distinctive of the Jowissa design language and these stylish timepieces are desired the world over.

Name: Auctentic BV
Description:
Auctentic is a global company specializing in the brokering and evaluation of second-hand luxury diamonds, gemstones, and vintage watches.
Founded to provide a simple and reliable way for individuals to sell their jewelry online, Auctentic was developed by senior gemologists with over 20 years of experience in the diamond industry. We connect clients to a robust global network of over 2,000 professional buyers.
We have assisted thousands of customers in selling their pre-owned jewelry at the highest possible prices, all from the comfort of their homes.
Our mission is to help clients worldwide sell their jewelry through a transparent and professional process, while ensuring their privacy is respected. 

Transform your luxury jewelry into valuable opportunities. With Auctentic, the selling process is effortless, transparent, and rewarding. 

Ready to unlock the value of your fine jewelry? Connect with us to maximize your precious assets.

Name: Polswiss Art Auction House
Description: Polswiss Art Auction House is one of the largest leaders in the art market in Poland. Founded in 1990 has extensive experience in the transactions of the greatest works of art. For over 30 years advises private and institutional collectors in building collections, as well as in the field of art conservation or transport.

Name: Manfredi Jewels
Description:
Manfredi Jewels, located in the heart of Greenwich Connecticut, has stood since 1988 at the pinnacle of fine jewelry and timepiece retail. Within the contemporary and luxurious space is an unparalleled collection of exquisite jewels, over 30 brands of timepieces, and Manfredi exclusive jewelry creations. In 2015 Manfredi Jewels opened their second location in New Canaan, Connecticut.

Brands carried in Greenwich & New Canaan Locations:

Watches:
Rolex, Tudor, Bell & Ross, Blancpain, Breguet, Bulgari, Chopard , F.P.Journe, Fabergé, Franck Muller, Girard-Perregaux, Glashutte Original, Grand Seiko, Gucci, Hamilton, Harry Winston, Hermès, Jaquet Droz, Laurent Ferrier, Longines, Maitres Du Temps, Montblanc, Omega, Parmigiani, Ressence, Sarpaneva , Seiko, Speake Marin, Swiss Army, Ulysse Nardin, Urban Jurgensen, Urwerk, Vacheron Constantin, Voutilainen, Zenith 

Jewelry:
Alex Šepkus, A & Furst, Anna Maria Cammilli, Antonini, Anthony Lent, Brumani, Bulgari, Carrera Y Carrera, Casato, Chopard, Doves, Estate Jewelry, Etho Maria, Faberge, Facet Barcelona, Fope, Furrer Jacot ,Gucci, Gurhan, Gem Platinum, Gurhan, Gumuchian, Hearts On Fire, Lauren K, Marco Bicego, Mariani, Manfredi Jewelry, Mattioli, Messika, Mikimoto, Miseno, Monseo, Mastoloni, Monica Rich Kosan, Nader Kash, New Italian Art, Pasquale Bruni, Raymond Mazza, Roberto Coin, Syna, Shy Creation, Tacori

Accessories:
Berd Vaye, Chopard, David Oscarson, Montblanc, Underwood, Wolf, Scatola del Tempo, SwissKubik, Deakin & Francis

Name: The London Watch Show Official
Description:
Come and join us at the capital’s largest-ever watch show. 

Immerse yourself into a huge showcase of the worlds finest and rarest watches.

The exhibitors will have a huge range of stock from entry level up to high end.

What to expect on the day...

- Leading watch traders from UK and Europe

- The chance to buy watches at discounted prices

- The opportunity to buy - sell - trade

- Insurance evaluations on site

- Watchmakers & specialist advisors

- Watch refinishing on site

- Luxury concierge services

- Super car hire & sales

- Watch accessories & merchandise

- Watch art

- Wide array of other luxury goods

- World-class security

See you at The London Watch Show!



Visit www.thelondonwatchshow.com for updates

or email us: info@thelondonwatchshow.com

Name: Joias Condor
Description:
A Joias Condor conta com mais de 37 anos de história, tendo sido criada em 09 de setembro de 1985. Uma das maiores fabricantes de joias folheadas a ouro e prata 925 do Brasil, a empresa é firmada em pilares como qualidade, design próprio, produtos inovadores e sustentabilidade em todo o processo produtivo.

Os produtos carregam em sua essência a versatilidade, sendo desenvolvidos a partir de conceitos criados por designers únicos, que trazem em sua base a história e a beleza, seguindo as tendências dos principais mercados de joias do mundo.

Name: PORTMANTOS
Description:
A Lifestyle - Portmantos believes in representing the product within context of the need, mood and emotional nuances of the traveler. 

A Promise of Quality - Portmantos is committed to high standards of quality for products, service and lifetime relationships. 

An Enriched Shopping Experience - Portmantos provides users with hyper targeted information, curated product recommendations and engaging, relevant content.

Name: Brufords the Jewellers
Description: Established for 130 years, W. Bruford is based in Eastbourne, East Sussex, with its two distinctive premises. Established in 1886, we are one of Eastbourne oldest independent, family owned businesses.

Name: Eternamé
Description: Based in an elegant salon that Sarah Besnainou affectionately calls, the Boudoir on Rue Clement Marot off the Avenue Montaigne in Paris, Etername’s pieces are feminine and modern. Besnainou, a self-proclaimed aesthete, has long had a passion for fashion, art and design. In order to blend those worlds and inspirations into her pieces. Today, you will find Etername pieces that echo the curve and dimension of sculpture, or the diaphanous weight of silk gazar, in combining materials such as titanium, ebony and enamel with traditionally precious stones such as diamonds, emeralds, and her favorite, tanzanite. Etername is unique and personal, a reflection of the designer’s outlook on the world. International points of sale include Saks Fifth Avenue and Neiman Marcus in the U.S. and and Lane Crawford in Hong-Kong. Etername has been featured in many publications include French Vogue, L’Officiel, U.S. WWD and Elle China.

Name: Given
Description:
GIVEN – discover your world of jewellery! 

GIVEN is a jewellery brand that stands for beauty, love, creativity and sustainability by expressing this in its jewellery – through design and carefully considered details. 

We want everyone to have the opportunity to accentuate their personality with striking, high-quality, yet affordable jewellery, so we are open to anyone who sees value in it and wants to discover something new for themselves in the wide world of jewellery. 
We will help you create joy for yourself and others by finding the right symbol for that special moment in your life, because at GIVEN, people are our greatest asset.  Be daring and experiment! We are as diverse as our clients.

The range of services at GIVEN is wide and diverse – the widest selection of jewellery, interest-free jewellery, gold exchange, an option to purchase gift cards, as well as Goldwork jewellery services and engraving services.

Name: MONSIEUR PARIS
Description:
Monsieur Paris est une marque de joaillerie fine fondée par Nadia Azoug en 2010. 
Dès son lancement, Monsieur installe sa boutique rue Charlot, au coeur du Marais, quartier historique de la bijouterie. En 2018, la marque ouvre à quelques mètres (rue Perrée), un nouveau lieu pour accueillir son showroom et son atelier.

L’envie s’articule autour d’une fabrication artisanale au coeur de Paris. Une philosophie qui respecte le temps de la fabrication et les savoir-faire.
La volonté de faire découvrir ce métier, prendre le temps de rencontrer les clients, d’échanger avec eux et de leur confectionner des bijoux qui leur ressemblent. 
Monsieur, c’est aussi une envie d’aller à la rencontre des autres, d’être accessible à toutes les femmes et de démocratiser le luxe.

Name: CD Peacock
Description: Chicago’s Best Family Owned Jewelry Since 1837. Official Rolex Dealer. Swiss Watches, Fine Diamonds, Jewelry, and Gifts

Name: EDHEC Watch Club
Description:
EDHEC Alumni Watch Club a pour objectif de réunir des étudiants et Alumni de l’EDHEC autour du thème de l’horlogerie.

Que l’on soit passionné, intéressé ou simplement curieux, tout le monde est invité à y participer et participer aux événements qui se tiendront tout au long de l’existence de ce club : visite d’atelier, cocktails avec de grandes marques, conférences, interviews et bien plus encore qui peut animer ce projet. Parce que l’horlogerie ne se limite pas qu’au luxe, mais est un domaine bien plus vaste, j’espère que ce club saura enchanter des personnes de tous les horizons !

Name: Pravins Limited
Description: Pravins Limited is a leading independent jeweller based in the UK.  Established in 1969, we have an unrivalled reputation for beautiful high quality jewellery and exceptional customer service.  Our Head Office is based in London and we currently operate luxury boutiques in Bluewater (Kent), Reading and Cardiff.  We remain 100% family owned and run.

Name: Maison ARTANER PARIS
Description:
Impassioned Heritage
Maison Artaner Paris is the story of an impassioned family heritage, starting with a Master Jeweller and father, who, for over 20 years, lent his artistry to some of the most prestigious Parisian jewellers.
From the impulse of this audacious passion, a partnership between mother and daughter was born, a collaboration graced with a rich emotional and artistic bond.
After a successful career as a management strategy consultant, Mounia returned to her first loves: precious stones and freehand sketching. Eager to fully share her husband’s love for the art of French joallerie, she completed her training at the prestigious École du Louvre in Paris.
And her daughter Tamar, a graduate of the esteemed French business school L’ESSEC, was never far behind. Immersed since childhood in the poetry of precious stones, and inspired by the mastery of artists such as her father, Tamar knew that her destiny would one day be fulfilled in this passionate heritage.
Together, they have created a first collection, in soft colours of a subtle palette, from golden Lapis-lazuli blue to dazzling ruby.

Name: SHRIYAM EXPORT
Description:
WE ARE LEADING MANUFACTURERS AND EXPORTERS OF LABGROWN DIAMONDS. WE PROMISE TO DELIVER THE BEST QUALITY AND BEST ASSORTED DIAMONDS OF YOUR CHOICE AND COUSTOMIZATION. WE HAVE A WIDE VARIETY OF SIZES AND SHAPES, WE HAVE FROM 0.01CT TO 5.00CT DIAMONDS IN CVD AND HPHT CERTIFIED AND NON-CERTIFIED BOTH. WE HAVE ROUND AND FANCY SHAPES SUCH AS OVALS, PEARS, MARQUISE, EMREALDS, CUSHIONS AND PRINCESS
WE REALLY BELIEVE IN BUILDING A LONG TERM BUSINESS RELATIONSHIP BASED ON TRUST AND I HOPE WE CAN HAVE ONE.
FOR ANY REQUIREMENTS PLEASE FEEL FREE TO CONTACT ME ON +91-9723272239 OR MAIL US ON SHRIYAMEXPORT@OUTLOOK.COM

Name: Yvonne Léon
Description:
Fondée en 2013, Yvonne Léon est une maison de joaillerie parisienne. Une joaillerie libre, moderne, décomplexée et alternative.  
Des pièces fortes, inattendues qui captivent. La signature d’Yvonne Léon ? Les chevalières en forme de cœur, le bestiaire joyeux, les bagues et créoles torsadées. Des pièces inspirées d’un charme vintage.

Name: DEGELER
Description: We are a German family owned Company. We combine functionality with the best materials in timeless designed luggage and accessories. Crafted by hand with great attention to the smallest details. We are just beginning when others are stopping in order to provide our customers with the highest of quality.

Name: Alain Mikli International
Description: Alain Mikli International réunit des marques prestigieuses et de références dans le secteur de la lunetterie : alain mikli, starck eyes, vuarnet et mikli par mikli. Le groupe est leader sur le marché du luxe, de l’innovation et du savoir-faire « made in passion » depuis 1978.

Name: Batlah
Description: انطلقت بتلة عام 2020 لترسي معايير جديدة في عالم العطور الراقية، معتمدة على مستخلصات طبيعية خالصة. يجسد كل إبداع عطري تناغماً فريداً بين الخلاصات النفيسة من خشب العود الفاخر و أندر الزهور، ممزوجة بأيدي خبراء الصناعة العطرية، لنقدم تجربة عطرية استثنائية تليق بعشاق الفخامة والتميز.

Name: Gioielleria Grande
Description: Partner di marchi prestigiosi, quali Rolex, Cartier, Jaeger Le Coultre, Omega, Breitling, Tudor, Blancpain, Damiani, Pasquale Bruni, Gucci, Montblanc, la Gioielleria Grande è da sempre attenta alle produzioni con gli standard qualitativi più elevati, al fine di soddisfare il desiderio del cliente di acquistare oggetti di grande pregio, raffinata eleganza ed indiscusso valore.

Name: Misis Gioielli
Description:
Since 1986 MISIS creates made in Italy jewels with shimmering enamels and semi-precious stones. Inspired by Nature, our creations are evocative accessories, original and timeless jewels where passion, originality, attention to detail merge together to give every woman the accessory that best represents her. 
Since always, our mission is: 
–	Create precious sterling silver jewels with techniques that are usually used for fine jewellery 
–	Propose jewels with first quality plating and treatments which remain unchanged over time regardless humidity, sweat or pollution 
–	Efficiency, flexibility and an attentive care in the service with the only aim of the customer’s satisfaction 
–	Possibility to personalise the jewels introducing new elements or different material (gold or even brass in case of private Label). 

We also make our experience available to the customers for Private Labels: 
–	we can follow all the different stages of the product creation, from the concept to the final product; 
–	we can produce following the customer's designs or create a full collection for the brand
–	always with a great attention to the detail and the best flexibility for a tailor made product.

Name: Sergio Capone Gioielli
Description: La storia delle gioiellerie Capone risale agli anni '80. La cura dei particolari, la meticolosa preparazione e competenza del personale qualificato, la rigorosa selezione dei marchi proposti, la qualità del servizio di assistenza garantita da tecnici specializzati, ha permesso a questa azienda di soddisfare le esigenze di una clientela estremamente variegata attraverso l’apertura di punti vendita ben distribuiti sul territorio toscano.

Name: Samantha Siu New York
Description:
Intricately made reversible necklaces that were inspired by "A Love Affair." Each necklace in the collection tells a story of a time and place where "A Love Affair" takes place. 10% of the net profit from each necklace is donated to a non-profit that benefits education enhancement, medical outreach, and animal conservation.

 We are meant to be more than just jewelry.

Name: Meadowlark Jewellery
Description:
Established in 2006, Meadowlark is an independent jewellery brand based in New Zealand. We draw on the seen, heard, and deeply felt to create pieces that inspire you to express yourself freely, and to serve as a reminder of the most important chapters in your life story.

Our objective has always been to offer high quality, well made jewellery to mark milestones, with a strong focus on creativity, art, design and fashion.

Our office is open plan and most of our products are made in our own atelier in Auckland, New Zealand. We care deeply about what we do, we are focussed on delivering the best service and products to our wonderful customers. We are constantly offsetting our footprint, we compost, recycle and offer reusable solutions, we care about each other and the planet.

We have fun while working hard to achieve the highest quality output, our team is intelligent, passionate and focused on continuous improvement, we value those who can bring experience and a growth mindset to our team.

Name: Lux Coral
Description:
Lux Coral nasce nel 1986 dalla naturale evoluzione di un'antica azienda artigiana a gestione familiare.

Nel panorama della produzione nazionale di gioielleria, Lux Coral si afferma sempre di più per la costante qualità ed attualità delle sue creazioni.

L’esperienza artigianale, l’attenzione alla qualità e il Made in Italy sono solo alcuni dei punti di forza della nostra azienda.

Il nostro obiettivo principale è quello di essere vicini alla clientela cercando di assecondare ogni desiderio e capriccio con collezioni sempre nuove al passo con i tempi e le tendenze del momento.

Name: The Watch Atelier
Description:
The Watch Atelier offers an array of servicing options to restore and service your timepiece to its optimal performance. Within our state-of-the-art service centre, our dedicated and experienced team are passionate about their craft, working to ensure every watch receives the care and attention it requires.

From a battery replacement to repairing a damaged timepiece, it is our aim to ensure your watch has the longevity it deserves for generations to come. Our team of accredited, skilled professionals complete all our services using innovative and high-end machinery. We also provide a 24-month warranty on all servicing and repairs to show you how confident we are in our work.

Name: Zurichberg
Description:
At Zurichberg we revolutionize ownership of luxury watches. Starting at just 100 CHF, we offer an entry point into a market traditionally reserved for the top 0.1%.

Our platform transforms watches into tokenized assets, offering you the full range from fractional investments to full ownership; Once invested, you can buy out the entire watch anytime.

Instead of alone, you can also pool money with friends or like-minded investors, where you can jointly define the rights linked to your watches, including the right to wear them.

Engage in active trading on our specialized marketplace, and when a watch is sold, obtain your share of the profits. Sell less worn watches and co-own new treasures with friends or like-minded enthusiasts. Our platform makes it easy to connect and trade.

Name: BELLARRI International
Description: BELLARRI International...Award Winning Fine Jewelry by the Artist Bellarri

Name: KT - Keller Trading SA
Description: Keller Trading SA Haute Couture pour l’Horlogerie, a été créée en 1991 par Babette Keller Liechti. Cette entreprise familiale a développé des microfibres destinées à l’industrie horlogère, le secteur de la haute joaillerie et la bijouterie.

Name: Rebellion Timepieces SA
Description: Launched in 2008, Rebellion is a young, audacious and independent Swiss manufacturer of high-end watches, based in Lonay, on the shores of Lake Leman. Rebellion’s timepieces are crafted in extremely limited quantities, with precision-engineered cases and exclusive movements. All of Rebellion’s research, development and production take place in Switzerland, where the very highest standards are both expected and obtained.

Name: Swiss Watch
Description:
Swiss Watch is a multi-brand emporium of luxury watches established by luxury, fashion and lifestyle retail specialist Valiram Group. It is a riveting horology destination that caters for watch enthusiasts and collectors as much as it does for the first-time watch buyer.

With an array of the world’s most beloved luxury brands and watchmaking icons within its portfolio, Swiss Watch Gallery offers a compelling shopper experience through elegantly appointed shop-in-shop boutiques enriched by exceptional service. Swiss Watch Gallery started in Penang international airport in 2001 with 16 brands. Since then, its business has expanded, boasting eight Swiss Watch Gallery boutiques, 30 specialist watch and jewellery boutiques representing a sizeable portfolio of over 50 brands across Malaysia and Singapore including Rolex, Tudor, Panerai, IWC, Omega, Cartier, Montblanc, Chopard and Bulgari.

For more information, visit swisswatchgallery.com.my or your preferred Swiss Watch Gallery boutique.
