Name: Darry Ring
Description:
At Darry Ring, we believe that love is forever, and that marriage is the ultimate gesture of commitment, as one person promises to another for all eternity. That's why we believe firmly in our promise of The One & Only - meaning every customer can only ever purchase a single ring from us.

    All DR diamonds are exclusively provided for a few top jewelers which make sure rare diamonds are cut and polished into masterpieces. Darry Ring has a unique rule in the world: A man can only customize one ring in a lifetime for his true love. It is a commitment of“The one and only.”

Name: PANPAN Paris
Description: PANPAN Paris est l'icône mondiale de l’univers de la joaillerie grâce au développement de sa prestigieuse communauté internationale alliant créateurs et professionnels.

Name: SABRINI EXCLUSIVE DIAMONDS
Description:
SABRINI și-a început povestea acum mai bine de două decenii, o poveste inspirată de dorința de a aduce strălucirea și frumusețea bijuteriilor în viețile oamenilor. Dintr-un mic magazin de familie, SABRINI a crescut și s-a transformat într-un nume de referință pe piața bijuteriilor din Romania, cu 29 de magazine in toata țara, un magazine online, si o fabrica proprie, păstrand aceeași pasiune pentru eleganță și rafinament.
     La SABRINI fiecare bijuterie, de la inelele de logodnă strălucitoare cu diamante și pietre prețioase, la verighetele din aur rafinate și colecțiile de bijuterii încântătoare, este o promisiune a calității și a măiestriei. În fiecare bijuterie SABRINI se regăsește promisiunea calității și a atenției la detalii, reflectând pasiunea noastră pentru frumos și dorința de a aduce strălucire în viața fiecărui client. Vă invităm să descoperiți colecțiile noastre și să găsiți acea piesă specială care va însoți fiecare capitol al poveștii dumneavoastră.
     Credem in dăruirea unor experiențe memorabile pentru clienții noștri, încurajându-i să descopere și să exprime propriile povești prin bijuterii de excepție, care reflectă nu doar frumusețea exterioară, ci și pe cea interioară, într-un mod autentic și plin de semnificație.

Name: MIGALOO Private Submersible Superyachts
Description:
MIGALOO PSY offers fully customizable Private Submersible Superyachts.

Benefits: 
- Diving ability in combination with the exclusive high-end luxury experience of mega yachting 
- Worldwide uniqueness
- Unrivalled safety and privacy for owner and guests while submerged 
- Safe travelling in rough seas 
- Design, layout and features up to the owners wishes 

Features: 
State-of-the-art mega yacht ameneties such as pools, beach clubs, heli pads, sun decks, tender garages, elevator, luxury interior outfitting. 

Outfitting and design options: 
- Private submersible superyacht layout
- Charter layout
- Hotel/apartment layout
- Corporate/office layout
- Scientific layout and equipment

Name: Belle Maroquinerie
Description: Handcrafting premium leather goods of unparalleled quality, we are a distinguished manufacturer collaborating with prestigious international brands since 1975. Our workshop is based in the millennial city of Fez, Morocco, the heart of craftsmanship and know how, we produce all types of leather bags, wallets, belts, leather covered boxes and other accessories.

Name: Jewellery Outlook Ltd
Description: Jewellery Outlook is a global online jewellery trade magazine, aimed at jewellers, designers, manufacturers and marketers who wish to find out more about global jewellery and diamond business and style trends. It publishes jewellery industry news, interviews, analysis, blogs and showcases the work of up-and-coming jewellery designers from around the world, as well as the latest collections of emerging jewellery brands.

Name: Vicenterra
Description: The ambition of Vicenterra is to transcend the codes of watchmaking. By proposing creations that concentrate emotions and pure technicality, we provide the amateur or collector with some specific and readily recognizable designs.

Name: Aria Lattner
Description:
Simple yet trendy jewelry with a subdued bohemian influence. 

We emphasize raw semi-precious stones (kyanite, labradorite, chrysoprase...underrated!) and 24k gold-plated sterling silver, striking a balance between quality and value. Nail the trendy layered style without breaking the bank.

Check it out for yourself!

Name: Gold & Roses
Description:
Gold&Roses nace de la unión de dos mentes creativas, inquietas y con una gran experiencia en el maravilloso mundo de la joyería, Sonia Ruiz y Hannah Rodríguez. 

Separadas por dos continentes, se reencuentran en Madrid para dar vida a una marca de joyería Hecha en España.

Desde su lanzamiento en septiembre de 2014, Gold & Roses ha hecho realidad el sueño. Joyas con un diseño y calidad para capturar un pedazo de eternidad.

Una marca con el saber hacer del auténtico espíritu de la joyería, elaboración artesanal y diseño cuidado hasta el más mínimo detalle. La marca presenta colecciones conectadas con el arte, la moda y las últimas tendencias.

En oro de 18 kt y piedras naturales, son “Joyas para momentos inolvidables”.

Gold & Roses borns by the union of two creative minds, restless and with a great experience in the wonderful world of jewelry. Separated by two continents, they meet again in Madrid to bring to life a jewelry brand made in Spain.

Since its launch in September 2014, Gold&Roses has turned the dream into reality. Jewels with a design and quality to capture a piece of eternity. 

A brand with the know-how an authentic spirit of jewelry, handcrafted elaboration and careful design to the smallest detail, presents collections connected with art, fashion and the latest trends.
In 18 kt gold and natural gemstones, they are "jewels for unforgettable moments”.

Name: CALICANTO
Description:
Calicanto came from decades of experience in the field of Made in Italy leather goods which gave life to sophisticated bags that were processed and worked by skilled craftsmen.

Venice, where the Maison is based, is an endless source of inspiration, a muse on which to model its creations.

Our strenghts are:
- Materials and production 100% Made in Italy 
- Concept of accessible luxury, excellence in raw materials
- Production capacity of 1000 bags per day
- +30% yearly growth
- € 15 Million turnover

☛ What we are looking for:

- Distributors in Asia, Europe, USA
- Luxury multi-brand stores
- Showroom in Milan, Paris, London, New York, Moscow
- E-commerce platform partners


☛ Contacts:
By e-mail at: sales.office@calicantoluxurybrand.it

Name: NATURAL DIAM SRL
Description:
La nostra ragione sociale è Natural Diam Srl con sede in Via Mazzini 16, 20123 Milano. Siamo importatori ed esportatori di diamanti tagliati. Stiamo ampliando nostro mercato in Italia e in Europa. 
Abbiamo pietre certificate pietre certificate Gia e IGI con prezzi promozionale ottimo servizio. Le pietre sono soggetto a disponibilità al momento della conferma. Vi chiediamo di informarci se siete cercando qualsiasi altra merce dal 0.005ct a 10.00 ct in colore Bianco, Giallo o Marrone in qualsiasi purezza in Taglio Brillante o Fantasia.
Inoltre, Abbiamo fornitura diretta dal Ditta Sight Holder del gruppo De Beers. Assicuriamo di ottimi prezzi e ottimo servizio.

Name: BazareTala | بازار طلا
Description:
بازار طلا، تنها سامانه امن ارتباطی در حوزه طلا و جواهر بین بنکداران، طلا فروشان، طلا سازان و کیفی ها در ایران.سایت بازار طلا، با هدف هوشمند سازی خرید آنلاین طلا و فروش آنلاین طلا و جواهرات در سال 1400 آغاز به کار کرد. کاربران عادی در سایت بازار طلا می توانند به سادگی و از هر کجا، تمام محصولات طلا و جواهرفروشان که شامل النگو طلا، دستبند طلا، نیم ست طلا، سرویس طلا، انگشتر طلا، گردنبند طلا، زنجیر طلا، گوشواره طلا، پلاک طلا، پابند طلا، اکسسوری طلا می شود را مشاهده و بررسی کنند و خرید خود را به صورت آنلاین انجام دهند. همچنین می توانند با رعایت تمام جوانب ایمنی و شفافیت با فروشنده طلا و جواهر ارتباط برقرار کرده و به صورت حضوری خرید کنند..
خرید و فروش طلای آب شده
یکی از بهترین روش های سرمایه گذاری و حفظ ارزش پول با چشم انداز بلندمدت در ایران خرید طلای آب شده می باشد. سایت بازار طلا این امکان را برای تمامی اقشار جامعه فراهم کرده است که با کمترین مبلغ روزانه از 100 هزار تومان تا 100 میلیون تومان سرمایه نقدی خود را تبدیل به طلا کنند.

Name: GASSAN Schiphol
Description: GASSAN Schiphol offers a brilliant insight into the world of diamonds, jewellery and luxury watches. This family-run business has stood for craftsmanship, proven quality and reliability for over 75 years. If you are looking for a watch, fine jewellery and/or a brilliant diamond, you have come to the right place. After security, it is often possible to purchase our products at tax-free prices.

Name: Oscar Heyman
Description:
Since 1912, Oscar Heyman has been creating truly exquisite fine jewelry for truly exquisite women. Oscar Heyman jewelry showcases the striking elegance of colorful gemstones and the dramatic beauty of the women who wear them. Each piece is meticulously crafted by American artisans using European techniques passed down through three generations of this family business. The result is an enduring legacy of heirloom-quality design that truly transcends time.

Our History

Thanks to Oscar Heyman’s inimitable designs, many of the last century’s most brilliant luminaries—from dignitaries and royalty to international celebrities—have shined a little brighter. The company’s founding brothers trained in the rigorous workshops of Fabergé before leaving Eastern Europe for New York. In addition to their rarified skills, they brought with them an abiding passion for gemstones and an old world approach to gracious customer service.

Name: Gabery
Description:
En constante évolution depuis sa création en 2016, l'atelier Gabery a su construire de véritables relations de confiance avec certaines des plus grandes Maisons de la place Vendôme.
De collections de moyennes et petites séries à la pièce unique de Haute Joaillerie, nous combinons inventivité et technicité afin de répondre de la meilleure des façons aux exigences de qualité et aux contraintes des délais.

Name: Jewel Corner
Description:
Jewel Corner is a brand from the UAE and is headquartered in Dubai, since 1997. Jewel Corner is a mark of quality and continues to be the leading retailer of choice for gold and diamond jewelry that offers affordable, contemporary and stylish jewelry. 

With over 40 stores across  GCC, it has carved a niche in the value gifting segment.

Name: The Zeit Club
Description:
In a world where luxury watch customers are hit with year-long waiting lists with zero communication, the Zeit Club has always prioritised efficiency and professionalism in our customer service.

We believe this, along with the unrivalled pricing on our watches, is the reason for our rapid rise to success.

We consistently have a range of the finest brands in stock - such as Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet, and Richard Mille. However, with our knowledgeable team and vast connections, we are able to advise and source the perfect watch for you personally.

Name: La Collection
Description:
La Collection’s creative director Florence Cools, founder and visionary of the Antwerp born fashion house wanted to create a label that reached far beyond fast fashion and trends. It is a brand that leads and does not follow, but pioneers in timeless, impeccably executed pieces.

The brand’s ready-to-wear line interplays feminity with contemporary elegance. Silhouettes are sharp and structured, contrasted with flowing, draping lines. Understated luxury and classic tailoring are integral to La Collection’s core identity.

With Florence’s first hand expertise in fashion textile; artisan techniques and exceptional fabrics are at the forefront of the brand’s ethos. Pieces are exquisitely made in thick Italian wools and heavyweight silks.

The brands muted colour palettes come together to create versatile, trans-seasonal collections that effortlessly transition from day to evening wear.

Name: Chocrón Joyeros
Description:
Chocrón es considerada actualmente una de las firmas de joyería y relojería de alta gama de mayor prestigio. Un apellido perteneciente a una saga de grandes joyeros que durante cuatro generaciones se ha consolidado como clara referencia en el sector del Lujo.

Desde 1948 Chocrón es marca registrada. Durante todo este tiempo se ha labrado un gran reconocimiento gracias a su dilatada experiencia, profesionalidad y deseo inquebrantable de mejora continua. Es por ello que ha logrado ganarse la confianza de las grandes firmas internacionales de Alta Relojería y que están presentes en sus boutiques de Madrid, Marbella y Ceuta: Rolex, Audemars Piguet, Omega, Cartier, Hublot, Jaeger-LeCoultre, IWC, Panerai, TUDOR, TAG Heuer, Bulgari, Longines, Breitling, Vacheron Constantin, Breguet, Girard Perregaux, Blancpain, Baume & Mercier, Bovet, Chopard, Roger Dubuis, Montblanc, Hamilton, Chaumet, Zenith, Piaget…

Name: LALI Jewels
Description: Embracing the knowledge of their forefathers and with a keen eye to evolving with the future of fine jewelry, LALI Jewels creates timeless luxury at affordable prices while specializing in one-of-a-kind and limited edition creations.

Name: Golddust Gold Designs Limited
Description:
We manufacture high-quality jewellery using authentic materials to provide you with the best products at reasonable prices.

Located in Trinidad. 

All prices are quoted in TTD (Trinidad & Tobago Currency).

Like our page on Facebook: Golddust Gold Designs Limited 
Follow us on Instagram: @GolddustGoldDesigns
WhatsApp us at: 868-680-7879

Name: Wakefields Jewellers
Description:
Wakefields Jewellers is an independent, family-run business that’s been passed down through the generations since 1911. Dedicated to providing high-quality customer service, many of the families we have served over the years have become loyal customers and even more have become friends.

Combining our expert knowledge with our passion for fine jewellery and watches, Wakefields Jewellers boasts many of the world’s most renowned brands including Rolex, Tudor and FOPE, alongside an array of fine gemstone jewellery and striking bespoke designs.

Our on-site workshop is home to our master goldsmiths who have access to state of the technology. This advancement has allowed us to expand not only our repairs services, but increase our bespoke design offering at Wakefields too.

You can experience our showroom for yourself in store or shop with us online, our sales consultants will always strive to tailor our services to you, ensuring you find exactly what you’re looking for.

Name: Gyunel Couture
Description: Gyunel Couture is a London-based luxury brand known across the globe for creating the absolute finest in bespoke couture. Highly reputed for its exquisite craftsmanship and timeless design, Gyunel Couture has grown to be a top choice for the world’s most influential women, whilst modestly gaining much admiration and recognition from the international press. Founded in 2005 by the namesake Creative Director, who then embarked on a creative quest to retell the story of timeless fashion, it today caters to an exclusive couture clientele, offering an unparalleled by appointment-only service at the Maison's opulent Knightsbridge showroom. With an eye for refined craftsmanship, elegance and reverie, Gyunel has undoubtedly set a new standard in the realm of bespoke couture.

Name: Horlogerie Bardy & Co
Description: Société horlogère

Name: LINEA PIU
Description:
Founded in 1986 and having developed several exclusive partnerships, LINEA PIU boutique has established itself as the ultimate destination of elegance for over two decades.

LINEA PIU introduced Karl Lagerfeld and John Galliano collections to the Greek market and a few years later, entered a long-term, exclusive collaboration with the epitome of elegance, the House of CHANEL and the historic House of Dior. Since then, the couture houses hosted by LINEA PIU have included Azzedine Alaia, Azzaro, Cher Michel Klein, Herve Leger, Alexis Mabile, Anna Molinari, Thierry Mugler, Paco Rabanne, Sonia Rykiel and Sophia Kokosalaki.

In 2023, we proudly opened Greece's first two CHANEL Boutiques in Athens and Mykonos, further proving our commitment to excellence in luxury retail.

The boutique is committed to offering personalised customer service. Its professional staff advises customers on fit and fabric, as well as on choice of accessories. Additional services include, after sales service for all ready-to-wear and accessories, and minor alterations to ensure best fit.

Name: Maison Rebatchi
Description: Née de la passion de son fondateur pour l’univers de la parfumerie confidentielle et de ses rencontres avec certains des plus grands parfumeurs de son époque, Maison Rebatchi propose une collection de cartes blanches créatives autour de matières premières emblématiques.

Name: AGATHA Asia Pacific Ltd
Description:
Asian regional office of AGATHA Paris located in Hong Kong looking after :
- Hong Kong retail
- China operation
- Export operations in Asia-Pacific area

AGATHA has a network of more then 320 boutiques in 25 countries. Our offices are in France, Spain, Japan, Hong Kong and China.

Name: Avstev Group
Description:
The AVSTEV Group is Australasia's Largest Privately Owned Luxury Swiss Watch Distributor.

All brands in our portfolio boast exceptional quality and craftsmanship and exude excellence in both design and performance.

Where possible all service repairs are done on our premise by our highly trained watchmakers.

As an industry leader the AVSTEV Group continues to set the standard for industry innovation and service.

Name: Beverley Hills Group
Description:
Founded in 1987, and for over 30 years has become synonymous with high-quality jewellery at competitive prices.


We rely heavily on client recommendation to help our business grow and have successfully maintained a fast growing customer base.

We have gained an international reputation as diamond experts and have established one of the country’s leading wedding ring centres.

Our friendly and professional sales team look forward to helping you choose or design something beautiful and unique

Employment opportunities for diamond Sales and Management

Please send your CV and cover letter to info@beverleyhillsjewllers.com

Name: Anne-Marie Chagnon
Description:
Artiste multidisciplinaire dotée d’un imaginaire foisonnant et formée à la faculté des arts visuels de l'Université du Québec à Montréal (UQÀM), Anne-Marie Chagnon explore la matière par instinct. Elle invente, façonne et sculpte des pièces exclusives, aussi actuelles qu'intemporelles. Sa conviction : être soi-même, c’est remarquable. 
Les bijoux Anne-Marie Chagnon, uniques et inimitables, sont créés et fabriqués à l'atelier de Montréal et offerts sur cinq continents. En plaçant la quête d'authenticité au cœur de son œuvre, Anne-Marie Chagnon a créé une griffe distinctive, à la fois locale et de renommée internationale.
Travailler chez Anne-Marie Chagnon c’est intégrer une entreprise à taille humaine définie par sa culture artistique, décontractée, de création et de fabrication dans un même atelier ensoleillé au cœur d’un des quartiers les plus culturels du Québec. Joignez vous à une équipe professionnelle, ouverte et diversifiée de passionné-e-s qui œuvrent à bien servir notre clientèle et à démontrer que la mode durable, la responsabilité sociale et la fabrication locale peuvent rimer avec succès international.

Name: Episode Silver
Description:
Luxury silverware & bespoke décor, handcrafted in India since 1980. Backed by 125 years of heritage, EPISODE blends timeless design with artisanal mastery for discerning homes, brands & collectors worldwide.

EPISODE Silver – Luxury Silverware & Bespoke Home Décor Since 1980

EPISODE is one of India’s foremost luxury brands, designing, manufacturing, and retailing handcrafted “objet d’art” for premium home décor, tableware, and gifting. Every piece is created in-house in India by master artisans, blending 125+ years of heritage with contemporary design innovation.

We specialise in:
- Sterling Silver 925 (92.5% purity) & Tarnish-Resistant Silver Plated products
- Brass, copper, nickel, and mixed-metal creations
- Articles such as bar accessories, luxury tableware, baby gifts, pooja articles, and statement home décor pieces
- Bespoke designs for luxury brands, events, hospitality, and private clients

Our journey began in 1980 as an exporter of fine silverware, crafting for European elites, Indian royalty, and leading luxury houses. EPISODE Silver has become the preferred choice for those seeking craftsmanship, quality, and timeless design.

Our clientele includes Armani, Ralph Lauren, Rolls Royce, John Lewis, Lambert, Chivas Regal, Seagram’s India, Taj Hotels, ITC Hotels, NDTV, BBC GoodHomes, and asiaSpa India, among others. We have proudly created for Her Majesty The Queen of England and continue to serve luxury retailers, hospitality brands, and private collectors worldwide.

Why EPISODE stands out:
- Design-led craftsmanship – blending heritage styles like Art Deco & Art Nouveau with modern minimalism
- Handcrafted in India – every piece made by skilled artisans in our own workshops
- Global reputation – trusted by leading luxury brands & hospitality groups
- Sustainable luxury – heirloom-quality products designed to last for generations

Careers at EPISODE
We welcome designers, marketers, craftspeople, and luxury retail professionals.  hello@episodesilver.com

Name: CeeLife Shop
Description: We sell and buy all type of new and preowned branded watches and do repairing restoring of watches. All type of leather straps stainless steel chains and batteries are available.

Name: The Global Luxury Group
Description: With a vision to create first-of-their-kind platforms, The Global Luxury Group paves the way for luxury brands to leave a lasting impact on consumers in the ever changing landscape of Indian luxury. The Global Luxury Group is an effective storyteller, fostering engaging lifestyle experiences and seamless trade to establish an authentic relationship between people and culture.

Name: Avemi Luxury Distribution
Description:
The Avemi Luxury Distribution Group represents and distributes some of the finest and most exciting niche and seletive fragrance, beauty and lifestyle brand in France, Poland, the Czech Republic and Slovakia

The brand portfolio include: 
Boucheron, Etat Libre d'Orange, Hermes, Juliette Has A Gun,  Miller Harris, Philipp Plein, Rochas, Serge Lutens,  and other fine luxury brands.

The distribution reaches key selective perfumeries, concept stores, luxury hotels, fashion boutiques and corporate customers.

Name: Cobbler Union
Description:
Cobbler Union is a maker of small-batch luxury shoes for the true connoisseur, every detail a testament to the work and love that has gone into each handcrafted pair.

Inspired by the uncompromising values of bespoke shoemaking, we believe that a pair of classic, well-constructed, shoes has the power of transforming a man. 

Our goal is to become an affordable alternative to the $1,000+ luxury shoes available today. Simply, not many of us can afford to spend that type of money on a pair of Oxfords. 

By circumventing the traditional retail channel and engaging with customers directly through our website, Cobbler Union is able to provide the same meticulously handcrafted luxury footwear at a fraction of the price.

Please visit www.cobbler-union.com to learn more.

Name: Maison Laudate
Description: La Maison Laudate est une bijouterie/joaillerie française, accompagnant les familles dans les évènements importants de leur vie. La Maison associe créativité  & élégance pour développer des collections raffinées et délicates, adaptées à chaque occasion familiale. L’atelier Laudate situé à proximité de Lyon permet de bénéficier d’un savoir-faire français centenaire.

Name: Charles Simon
Description: Charles Simon combines engineering with craftsmanship to create exceptional luxury accessories. Our passion for products of outstanding quality and the desire to work with people who share our values prompted us to launch Charles Simon and drives us to continuously strive for perfection.

Name: Giverso Gioielli
Description: Giverso è un marchio che disegna e produce gioielli artigianali di alta gamma, esprimendo pienamente la propria visione creativa. Ogni creazione è frutto di un'attenta cura del processo produttivo manuale, dalla progettazione alla finitura. Giverso si impegna a garantire il massimo rispetto per le filiere di approvvigionamento etico delle materie prime, promuovendo la sostenibilità e l'autenticità in ogni gioiello realizzato.

Name: Burato
Description:
The Burato Collections are born from the desire of their designer Marta, from whom they get their name. Their aim is to give a voice to the soul inside us all, through jewels with an innovative and original design, crafted by the most highly skilled Italian goldsmiths. 

Burato's roots lie in a family history made of passion for jewels with simple but refined lines, with constant attention to the trends of the moment.

In 2015 Marta creates the Burato collections, affordable luxury in gold jewellery, with which everyone can express themselves in an authentic and inclusive way.
The idea is to create 18-karat gold pieces with simple lines, elegant enough to be worn every day and often a symbol of a bond or a special moment.

Name: Lulu Avenue
Description:
In March of 2016, Lulu Avenue was acquired by Yanbal International.  For the latest in fashion jewelry and a lucrative business opportunity, please visit www.yanbal.com/usa.

Lulu Avenue was a direct sales company that brought style, substance and empowerment to women across the country. In everything we do, we vow to be good to people and good for people. 

The business model combined direct sales with e-commerce to create a modern selling opportunity. Independent Style Advisors earned an income by selling our exclusive Lulu Avenue branded jewelry through boutique style trunk shows and online via their own custom website.

Name: Inguz Watches
Description:
Dessinées et conçues à Paris, précommandes ouvertes maintenant sur Kickstarter

Parce que votre montre est un prolongement de vous-même, l’écho de votre personnalité, le reflet de vos passions, le témoin au quotidien du temps qui passe, riche de vos expériences et de la vie que vous écrivez,
et pour que cette histoire passée et présente continue de se transmettre,

Nous créons des garde-temps au style intemporel, inspiré des codes classiques des montres de plongée,

Elégants, robustes et équipés de mouvements mécaniques qui ne souffriront jamais d’obsolescence technologique.

Parce que le temps est Votre histoire

Name: The Luxury Hut • London Showroom
Description:
The Luxury Hut has been trading since 2010, and we’re based in Hatton Garden. Our experience has seen us become the Pre-Owned Watch & Jewellery Specialist. We are the number one choice for buying and selling Luxury Goods.

Our expert team of buyers are constantly on the look out for great products at great prices, if you are looking to sell your item, whether it be a Watch, Jewellery or something else, get in touch for a competitive quote. We serve the public and trade and offer unbeatable prices backed by our comprehensive warranty and returns policy.

Name: Atrani Studio
Description: Atrani Studio is a French jewelry brand born between Paris and the Mediterranean. Our creations are sculptural and organic, inspired by bubbles and sea-worn rocks. Each piece embraces the beauty of imperfection and the strength of small things. Atrani designs jewelry beyond trends: timeless forms that carry emotion, memory, and meaning.

Name: MODE for Luxury
Description:
The ultimate luxury lifestyle blog and online boutique. 
#MODEstyle #MODEdrives #MODEstays #MODEeats #MODEforLuxury

Name: Peridot Fine Jewelry
Description: For the past nineteen years, Peridot has embodied the ultimate in confidently curated fine jewelry. With a new boutique in Larchmont, NY Peridot has defined creative spaces to showcase an original point of view – a synthesis of aspirational chic and everyday elegance. Introducing one-of-a-kind handmade style to the area, Peridot has become the favorite destination for both cutting-edge design and timeless keepsakes.

Name: Kelton
Description:
En 2016 Kelton amorce son grand retour sur le marché français. Le groupe AsConseil qui a repris la marque, entend renouer avec l’histoire glorieuse de celle-ci, et les nouvelles collections arborent un style alliant modernité et esprit chic, très légèrement vintage. Si la production des pièces d’horlogerie a changé de continent, l’assemblage des montres continue à être réalisé en France.

Comme tout être vivant, les marques évoluent, en 2021, Kelton se voit dotée d’un nouveau logo, d’un nouveau site, de nouvelles collections.

Nouvelles aventures, éco responsabilité, histoire et patrimoine, tout reste à écrire !

Avec vous !
 
________________________________________________________________________________

In 2016 Kelton begins its great return on the French market. The AsConseil group, which took over the brand, intends to revive its glorious history, and the new collections display a style combining modernity and chic spirit, very slightly vintage. If the production of the timepieces has changed continent, the assembly of the watches continues to be made in France.

Like all living things, brands evolve. In 2021, Kelton has a new logo, a new website and new collections.

New adventures, eco-responsibility, history and heritage, everything remains to be written!

With you!

Name: Balibay
Description:
Willkommen bei der Balibay-Familie. Wir sind ein Familienunternehmen und kreieren aus Edelsteinen einzigartige und detailverliebte Style-Accessoires. Dabei lassen wir uns von der Schönheit der Natur inspirieren. Der Treiber unserer Marke: Inspired by nature. 

Unsere Leidenschaft kannst du sehen: in jeder Halskette, jedem Armband und in jeder Hosenkette – weil wir jedes Accessoire mit einzigartigen und farbenfrohen Edelsteinen vollenden. Unser Schmuck steht für Lebensfreude, Kraft und Wertschätzung gegenüber unserer Umwelt.

Wir möchten kreativ und modern sein – und neue Accessoires designen, die den persönlichen Look von jedem verbessern. Die detailverliebten Accessoires sollen mehr als nur Schmuck sein.

Wir haben eine Vision: Balibay wird zur Lebenseinstellung. Dabei geht es nicht nur um Schmuck – sondern um die Art zu denken. Wir schätzen das Hier und Jetzt, die Natur und vielfältige Menschen, ganz egal mit welchem Hintergrund. Diesen Spirit lassen wir in den Style und unsere Produkte mit einfliessen. Für jede und jeden ist etwas dabei. Kurz gesagt: It’s a way of life.

Name: DALLOZ INDUSTRIE LAPIDAIRE
Description: DALLOZ INDUSTRIE LAPIDAIRE is a luxury goods & jewelry company based out of PLACE DALLOZ, SEPTMONCEL, France.

Name: BE8 Jewels
Description:
BE8 is an Italian jewelry brand that wishes to create a high-quality handcrafted product through the sharing and reverberance of creative and contemporary minds.
BE8's journey began in 2013 with the creation of a ring called “Primo Cuore” designed by Beppe Callegari. A jewel born from a personal experience that became a collection.

Every jewel is realized in silver 925, gold 9kt and 18kt, adorned with natural gemstones such as diamonds, emeralds, rubies and sapphires. BE8 is slow jewelry: the production of each jewel is 100% made in Italy, created with passion by artisan goldsmith laboratories. Any differences between the jewels encompass the beauty of each one. And our identity.
The BE8 team is a synergy of passionate people who love to inspire each other and share the same ideals. Combining visions, experiences and different backgrounds is BE8's tool to differentiate and grow.

Ready to join our world?

Name: Misahara Jewelry
Description:
Misahara is a fine jewelry house that pays tribute to the warm, shimmering waters of the Adriatic Sea, the golden sand of the Sahara Desert as well as other mesmerizing destinations in the world that its designer, Lepa Galeb-Roskopp is inspired by. All Misahara creations are handcrafted in New York by experienced ateliers who have worked with some of the world’s most prestigious jewelry houses. The collections evoke the feeling of exquisite luxury, offering a modern flare of fine jewelry marked by unique handcraftsmanship and the finest quality gemstones. Behind each and every piece lies a significant source of inspiration and a unique story inspired by the pristine elements of nature. 

Our mission is to create a company that honors our vision and places our pieces in the discerning hands of those that choose to live life to its fullest. The traditions and inspirations of the past and present are our guideposts for creating a company that stands the test of time and creates art that lasts an eternity. All this is reflected in our Unity symbol, which inscribed on our pieces. The Unity symbol reminds all of us at Misahara of the principles that guide us, and to our obligation to ourselves and to the world to be the best we can be... not just in our craft, but in life. Remembering the past, working on the present, building for the future – this is Unity, and that is who we are at Misahara.

Name: William Wood Watches
Description:
William Wood Watches is a British luxury watch company producing unique watches made from genuine upcycled firefighting materials, in dedication to our Founder’s late grandfather, William Wood, a decorated British Firefighter. 

We donate a percentage of all sales to international firefighting charities including The Fire Fighters Charity UK, Australian Bushfire Relief Fund, and Tunnel to Towers Foundation in New York. We are on track to donate over £50,000 to firefighting charities this year. 

We have 4 beautiful collections ranging from our Chivalrous Collection from our dress range (£395), Valiant Collection from our diving range (£695 - £1,150), Bronze Collection from our heritage range (£795) and Triumph Collection from our prestige range (£2,495). 

We were awarded by GQ, Esquire and Men’s Health as The Best Men’s Watches in Buy in 2020 & 2021. And featured in Forbes, The Financials, The Telegraph, BBC Radio and The Telegraph. 

Our vision is to convert a closed British Fire Station into our Head Office and Concept Store with a vintage Fire Engine parked out front that we will drive the length and breadth of the UK promoting William Wood Watches and the great work of the fire service.

Name: AAB Co., Ltd Stainless Steel Jewelry Experts
Description:
AAB Co. – Innovators in Stainless Steel and Body Jewelry
Founded in 1993, AAB Co. is one of the world’s pioneers and largest manufacturers of stainless steel and body jewelry. With headquarters and production facilities in Guangzhou, China, and branches in 5 countries, we proudly serve over 50 markets worldwide.

As a trusted partner to businesses of all sizes, we specialize in delivering high-quality, fashionable products that are both durable and cost-effective. Our innovative OEM/ODM solutions empower our customers to resell with confidence and success.

Mission:
To provide exceptional service and high-quality products that meet the evolving needs of our partners. We are committed to credibility, integrity, and customer satisfaction.

Vision:
To be the global leader in the jewelry industry by embracing change, fostering continuous improvement, and delivering unparalleled value to customers, employees, and stakeholders alike.

Why Choose AAB Co.?

Industry leader with a rich history of innovation and growth.
Advanced manufacturing capabilities tailored to your needs.
Dedicated to offering professional service, innovative designs, and effective marketing solutions.
Join us in shaping the future of jewelry – where innovation meets excellence.

Name: 41WATCH.com - MONTRES ICONIQUES SAS
Description:
41 WATCH.com is a digital platform for buying and selling luxury watches. We propose short to mid-term financing (up to 48 month) on every transaction, and 12 and 24 month buy-backs on every watch we sell. We also provide a range of services for the maintenance or overhaul of your luxury watch in our in-house watchmaking atelier.

We will ship your watch worldwide and also provide you with the opportunity to pick up your watch in person in our showroom located in the heart of Paris.

Name: Quinting Manufacture d'Horlogerie
Description: Quinting est une Manufacture basée à Genève en Suisse. Fondée par cinq ingénieurs, Quinting est la première manufacture de montre à créé le premier chronographe 100% mystérieux et transparent au monde.

Name: Maison Hamon
Description:
Maison Hamon, parurier à Paris depuis 1919

En plein cœur de Paris, l’Atelier Hamon s’est taillé avec le temps une réputation dans le monde de la Couture et du Prêt-à-Porter de luxe comme fabricant de ceintures et de bijoux fantaisie notamment. 

Du prototypages à la fabrication en série d'accessoires très haut de gamme, la Maison Hamon est actuellement le seul parurier haut de gamme de Paris à travailler le métal et le cuir, ainsi que la résine et le tissu. 

Aujourd’hui, Membre des Grands Ateliers de France et reconnu Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant, la Maison Hamon continue à œuvrer pour les grandes Maisons.

Name: Uno Piedras
Description: Emprendimiento peruano enfocado en la creación de joyas y espacios con piedras naturales. Tenemos alrededor de 5 años enfocándonos en crear una comunidad fuerte con el propósito de contar una historia y volverla realidad en nuestro trabajo con artesanos peruanos.

Name: PAULA HIAN
Description:
Paula Hian is an internationally-recognized fashion designer whose edgy yet distinctively sophisticated creations have been worn by stars such as Jennifer Aniston, Carrie Underwood and Gossip Girls' Taylor Momsen. Her elegant day and evening attire, always inspired by modern art and architecture, is made in France.

For more information visit  www.paulahian.com.

Name: Mitchells of Westport
Description:
Our parents/grandparents, Ed and Norma Mitchell founded the company in 1958 with three men’s suits, a coffee pot and a dream…

The heart of their extraordinary vision was to “hug” the customer… to enhance and add value to the retail experience by offering unsurpassed service, a uniquely warm environment, to give back to their communities and to build trusting relationships with customers and friends that would last throughout generations.

The first location of the original “Ed Mitchells” was an 800 square-foot. former plumbing supply store in Westport, CT. Norma famously brought in her coffee pot each day to make the customers feel at home. For over 50 years, we have strived to carry on that spirit and tradition. Today, we offer lattes, M&M’s, have a dedicated “Kiddie Corner” and much more… we try to do her proud!


Timeline from “50 Years of Hugs” Anniversary Book

Mitchells is still independent, family-owned and operated by a second and third generation of Mitchells, and has grown over the years to 25,000 square-feet. We also have expanded the dream into other communities. In 1995, we acquired Richards of Greenwich, a renowned 8,000 sq. ft. luxury men’s retailer, which we have expanded to include a women’s department, and is now 27,000 sq. ft and the winner of numerous retail space design awards. In 2005, we acquired Marshs of Huntington, a 15,000 sq. ft. men’s store, which we have renovated inside and out, adding women’s ready-to-wear, accessories and jewelry.

We look forward to serving our beloved communities for many generations to come!

Name: Thaden
Description: Thaden seeks to connect the inner heroine of multi-faceted women throughout the world. Like a well-kept secret, it appeals to someone who asks questions and challenges what is possible. It is not for the masses, but of heirloom quality, meant for those seeking the next level in luxe. It is a genuine original, its own legend in the making that speaks to the heart of women and celebrates them.

Name: Jewellery Industry Network
Description:
The Jewellery Industry Network was established in 2020 with the aim to enhance the jewellery industry through education, resources and support.

Understanding the industry, JIN was created to assist and connect all areas and types of businesses within the jewellery industry. With the desire to knit together the delicate fabric of the industry, JIN works with small and large businesses to 
strengthen them and unite them towards a strong, ethical and sustainable future.

JIN Brands Include:

Jewellery Industry Network -
An online platform for the Australasian Jewellery Industry. The Jewellery Industry 
Network will provide all members of the jewellery industry access to tools and 
materials that will help their businesses grow. The Jewellery Industry Network has a member only portal including an online suppliers directory.The Jewellery Industry Network also connects the general public to industry information that will assist them learn more about the Australasian Jewellery Industry.

Jewellery Industy Fair -
Providing the industry with a fresh, innovative event which unites and represents the industries best interest, is the Jewellery Industry Fair. A live event where the industry can meet and do business. 

The Jewellers Co. formerly the Young Jewellers Group. -
Is a dynamic, passionate and active facebook group comprising of thousands of jewellers and jewellery industry professionals. Its supportive ethos and interactive nature makes the group a necessary asset to the industry.

The Jewellery Industry Summit -
Provides Australian Jewellery Businesses with an industry leading event, showcasing the finest business services to enhance and improve their next year in market.

The Jewellers Podcast
Telling the stories of Australian jewellers and jewellery related businesses, the Jewellers Podcast is released to thousands of listeners every fortnight.

Name: Mani Export Private Limited
Description:
Mani Export Private Limited is a flagship of the Mani Group that imports, exports and manufactures polished diamonds. Headquartered in Mumbai, and having its presence in Surat, Belgium and many places with clients spread across the globe. Mani group was founded and established by Mr.Mathurdas Sojitra in Surat who migrated from Saurashtra in 1968. It has been 32 years and Mani Exports has built its own name and reputation by successful supplying Certified Diamonds and Loose Diamonds.

Mani Export is engaged in the business of import, export and manufacturing of diamonds. The company is also involved in the production of jewellery and real estate development in Surat.Mani’s Jewellery manufacturing wing runs under the name Mani Jewel. Real Estate development is carried under the name Yashashvi Infra and KLM Infra.

Our team works continuously under the mentorship of Mr.Mathurbhai Sojitra now, who is the inspiration for all our staff and is the driving force behind the groups success and enlargement. The business is firmly founded on values and traditions, and the roles of the company management are now being slowly transferred to the highly qualified young generation.

The two sons of Mr. Mathurbhai Sojitra, Anil Sojitra and Alpesh Sojitra, who now play an important role in the core fields of the company’s buying, manufacturing, distribution, marketing and global management.

Name: Arnav & Co
Description:
Jewellery represents the epitome of our aspirations and achievements. The desire for jewellery, like art, is born once we have satisfied our primary needs and seek inspiration for deeper expression. It is visceral, it is emotional and it is from the heart.

Official Website: www.arnav.in
Shop @ www.arnavstore.com

Name: The Tanzanite Experience
Description:
The Tanzanite Experience showcases the history of tanzanite through its unique museum concepts in Tanzania. It's aim is to create a greater awareness of how rare and precious Tanzanite is by revealing its history, mystery and rarity. 
The Tanzanite Experience offer the rare opportunity to purchase tanzanite directly from source. 
All tanzanite stones are certified by the Tanzanite Laboratory and are guaranteed to be ethically mined.

Name: RL LYON CONCEPT
Description: Nous sommes un Atelier de Sertissage et Bijouterie jeune et dynamique, en perpétuel recherche de nouveaux talents, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter.

Name: BOMBAY JEWELLERY MANUFACTURERS
Description:
Bombay Jewellery Manufacturers (BJM) is one of the leading manufacturers and exporters of fine diamond studded gold jewellery in India.

BJM exports to many diverse markets, from the United States of America to Australia, Middle East, United Kingdom, France, Italy, Germany, and other member countries of the European Union.

Name: Chic by Choice
Description:
Chic by Choice is the premium pan-European fashion rental site that allows women to access the most breathtaking designer dresses, straight from the catwalks, 85% off retail price.
We believe in a globally accessible style experience: to more than 15 European markets, including the major fashion centers of the UK, France, Italy and Germany, and offering a selection of more than 40 designers.

Chic by Choice is reinventing the luxury rental space. The website offers a variety of more than 2000 in-season designer dresses from more than 40 brands.

In 4 simple steps, customers can browse through our curated selection of designer dresses. 

More than a rental website, Chic by Choice offers an experience that most women have only daydreamed about.

Name: Meralda Jewels
Description: Meralda Jewels was founded with a vision to blend modernity with tradition, creating exquisite pieces that reflect personal style and cherished moments. Each ornament is crafted to fulfill the desire for unique, elegant pieces that celebrate life’s special occasions. Our diverse range of Jewelery caters to the diverse tastes of our discerning clientele, making every wearer feel special and proud. At Meralda, we believe in the power of Jewelery to bring joy, evoke emotions, and create lasting memories.

Name: FORTUNA
Description: FORTUNA is New York City's premiere jewelry auction house, specializing in fine antique, and estate jewelry.

Name: Okapi
Description:
Okapi is a luxury brand that designs and retails luxury handbags and leather goods of the highest quality. All of our products are solely manufactured in South Africa, out of raw materials that are 100% sourced from Southern Africa.

The ethos behind Okapi is to produce luxurious, artisinal accessories handmade entirely in Africa from locally sourced materials. At Okapi we strive for exceptional quality and an understated, timeless appeal whilst simultaneously creating sustainable job opportunities and skills growth on the continent.

For further insights into the brand and our products, please refer to our website: www.okapi.com

Name: Luxury Club - SDA Bocconi Asia Center
Description:
The Luxury Club, SDA Bocconi Asia Center, is an autonomous student-run club aimed at producing the next generation of luxury leaders in India, and Asia at large. Our goal is to educate our members about the luxury goods and services industry, as well as provide them with career planning and networking opportunities. Activities of the Club range from weekly learning & development sessions and case studies, to guest speakers, company presentations and live project/internship opportunities.

Mission:
• To enrich the knowledge of the SDA Bocconi Asia Center community with a 360 degree view of the luxury field
• To develop a network of contacts between students, alumni and industry professionals in an effort to promote growth
• To enhance SDA Bocconi Asia Center and the Club’s position on the Indian & Asian MBA map as a top business school for luxury and fashion

Members:
The Club is comprised of students from the senior and junior batches of the Post Graduate Program in Business at SDA Bocconi Asia Center.

Name: Hampden Watch
Description:
Hampden Watch Company is a fourth-generation, family-owned watchmaker with a legacy spanning over a century in the heart of Chicago. As North America’s oldest continually operating watch business, we carry forward a heritage of craftsmanship, innovation, and personal connection. 

Founded in 1922 as the Clinton Watch Company by Hyman Wein—one of five pioneering brothers in the North American watch industry—Hampden Watch has been a testament to fine watchmaking and technical ingenuity. Our journey has taken us from operating factories in Switzerland and the Virgin Islands to New York and Providence, but our roots and our soul have always been firmly planted in Chicago.

Over the years, we’ve expanded our expertise and innovation, earning patents that include our unique removable caseback—an industry first. This innovation enables each Hampden watch to become more than a timepiece: it’s a canvas for personalization, where customers can add handwritten notes, logos, or any detail that commemorates milestones and cherished memories.

Name: China Stone Co.,Ltd
Description:
China Stone is the diversified technology company and world-leading provider of precision cut natural gemstones in a strictly uniformed and digitally calibrated array of colors, proportions and sizes. We deliver a wide range of natural gemstones to fine jewelers, watchmakers and luxury trade professionals throughout the world.

China Stone Ltd has combined automated cutting technology with advance inventory-grading, stock-management, order-processing systems and high quality customer service. Our line of precision-calibrated gemstones, are machine cut. Every gemstone, is crafted to the most precise specifications for shape, size, color and quality.

Name: ALO diamonds
Description:
ALO diamonds, česká klenotnická společnost od roku 1995, vyrábí oslnivé  šperky s diamanty a barevnými drahokamy různých kolekcí a stylů v jednom z největších kreativních ateliérů ve střední Evropě. V kolekcích ALO diamonds najdete zásnubní, snubní prsteny, řetízky, náušnice a dětské náušnice, přívěsky, náhrdelníky, náramky, brože, manžetové knoflíčky a další šperky v různých cenových relacích.
Nákup luxusního šperku je jedním z nejkrásnějších, a také nejdůležitějších momentů vašeho života. Proto je důležité, abyste se při jeho výběru obrátili na skutečné profesionály a požadovali to nejlepší, pokud jde o materiály i zpracování. Šperky značky ALO diamonds vám nabízejí záruku špičkové kvality a trvalé hodnoty, která s časem ještě vzrůstá.
Váš luxusní šperk si zaslouží také luxusní ošetření. Proto vám nabízíme celoživotní servis u nás zakoupených šperků, jejich odbornou kontrolu a vyčištění. Samozřejmostí je také profesionální poradenství našich speciálně školených prodejců.

Since 1995, the reputable Czech jewellery company has been manufacturing jewels in one of the largest studios in Central Europe. In ALO diamonds collections one can find engagement and wedding rings, chains, earrings and children’s earrings, pendants, bracelets, brooches, cuff buttons, and other jewels at various price levels.
Purchasing a luxurious jewel is one of the most beautiful as well as most important moments in our lives. Due to this, it is important to contact real professionals, when choosing one, and to require the best materials and processing. Jewels of the ALO diamonds brand guarantee top quality and sustainable value increasing with the age.
Your luxurious jewel deserves luxurious treatment. That is why we offer lifelong servicing of jewels purchased at our place, their professional inspections and cleaning. Professional advisory at our specially trained professional sales managers is granted too.

Name: Galiano Boutique - galianostore.com
Description:
Galiano srl nasce nel 1925 come laboratorio di calzature fatte a mano. Azienda partenopea di rinomata importanza, Galiano è giunta alle terza generazione di imprenditori con Raffaele e Gregorio Galiano. Animati da grande intraprendenza, passione e lungimiranza, i due fratelli, hanno consolidato l'impresa di famiglia espandendosi al settore dell'abbigliamento sviluppando una realtà dinamica e all'avanguardia con otto punti vendita dislocati sul territorio Napoletano.

Il punto di forza che ha fatto di Galiano una pietra miliare del settore è l'attenzione per i propri clienti e l'etica per il lavoro esercitata all'interno delle reti professionali. Eleganza e qualità delle collezioni esposte rendono Galiano una dei punti di riferimento più apprezzati e riconosciuti sul territorio partenopeo.

I successi raggiunti grazie alle Boutique sono solo l'inizio di un lungo viaggio che passa per il web dove Galiano trasferisce il know-how sviluppato in decenni di esperienza off-line, creando una community on-line partecipe e allargata, una  innovativa iniziativa in fermento, figlia di uno spirito imprenditoriale che non tira mai il freno. Mood e attitude Galiano valicano  i confini Campani per giocare nuove partite in nuovi mercati con l'audacia e la determinazione che da sempre lo contraddistingue con l'audacia e la determinazione che da sempre lo contraddistingue.

Name: Jewelex India Pvt Ltd
Description: Like the multiple facets of a diamond, Jewelex goes beyond the value chain by providing superior products, customer care and services that are acknowledged within the global jewelry industry. We are among the world's leading vertically integrated diamond and jewelry companies known for integrity, innovation and trust.

Name: Alan Furman & Co.
Description:
A family-run business since 1985, Alan Furman & Co. is one of the largest discounters of fine watches and precious jewelry in the United States. Offering the finest watches, precious jewelry, diamonds, and gems.

We take pride in providing our customers with the best value for their money. Our fine watch division offers spectacular discounts on over 40 brands, including Rolex, Audemars Piguet, Patek Philippe, Cartier, Omega, Breitling, Tag Heuer, Richard Mille, Hublot, Bell & Ross, Ulysse Nardin, and more.

Name: DAUMET
Description:
Daumet develops gold coating technologies that enable luxury brands to create certified 18K-24K pieces with a 70 to 90% reduction in gold consumption.

 OUR TECHNOLOGY

Living Gold: Patented coating processes that enable certified 18K-24K gold finishes on:

- Jewelry
- Leather goods (premium segment and ultra-luxury customisation)
- Watches (cases, straps, components)
- Interior design (unique pieces, high-end design)

Our innovation: Intelligently substituting rare metals with more abundant alloys or solid gold with pure gold coatings without compromising quality, certification or aesthetics.

 FOR LUXURY BRANDS

We support demanding brands in their transition to more sustainable production:

→ Maintaining quality standards (certifications respected)
→ Reduction in raw material costs (70-90% less gold)
→ Material innovation (competitive differentiation)
→ Credible CSR commitment (measurable impact)

Our clients create complete collections in 18K-24K gold with the environmental footprint of traditional plating.

 ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACT

2030 goal: Avoid the extraction of 100 tonnes of gold per year

Each piece created with our technology saves up to 90% of precious metal compared to traditional methods.

→ Less mining (resource preservation)
→ Reduced carbon footprint (optimised production)
→ Circular economy (reprocessed gold)

 RECOGNITION & CERTIFICATIONS

- Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant (EPV) - French State Label
- Butterfly Mark certification from Positive Luxury
- Solar Impulse Efficient Solution - Validated sustainable innovation

 OUR APPROACH

Based in Paris, we work in close partnership with luxury brands, workshops of excellence and designers seeking uncompromising material innovation.

→ Discover Living Gold: https://daumet.com
→ Professional partnerships: contact@daumet.com

Name: Ecksand
Description: Ecksand is a brand rooted in values - built on a deep respect for our artisans, materials, and community. Founded in 2009, we've remained fully vertical, crafting every piece by hand in our Montreal atelier. This approach isn't just rare - it's now officially recognized by the Canadian National Mark, a distinction that verifies our jewelry is made entirely in Canada and meets the highest standards of ethical craftsmanship.

Name: Victoria Benelux
Description:
Notre mission "makes you shine"!

Depuis nos débuts, notre mission est de faire briller toutes les femmes, quelles qu'elles soient:
- En inspirant chaque femme à cultiver la confiance en soi à travers un job épanouissant,
- En permettant à chaque femme d'être son propre patron, de travailler à son rythme et selon ses propres conditions,
- En créant une véritable communauté dans laquelle les femmes se soutiennent mutuellement,
- En rendant chaque femme belle au quotidien à travers notre magnifique collection de bijoux.
/////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

Onze missie 'Victoria makes you shine'!
We willen het leven van vrouwen verbeteren en ze laten stralen!
- Door vrouwen hun eigen baas te laten zijn,
- Door vrouwen te inspireren, meer zelfvertrouwen te geven,
- Door een community te creëren waarin vrouwen elkaar steunen,
- Door hen schitterende juwelen aan te bieden.

Name: Mastro Luxe
Description: Asia's resale platform for authentic pre-owned designer goods.

Name: The SISS BLISS GmbH
Description:
Seit unserer Gründung 2020 entwickeln wir Unternehmen rund um das schönste Edelmetall der Welt: Gold. The SISS BLISS steht für hochwertigen, personalisierbaren Echtgoldschmuck, der in Deutschland mit Diamanten und Edelsteinen aus nachvollziehbaren Quellen gefertigt wird. BLISS BANG CAPITAL kauft vorhandenes Altgold an und recycelt es, mit dem Ziel daraus neuen Schmuck zu fertigen.

Wir zeichnen uns durch echte Nachhaltigkeit im Luxussegment, tiefes Markenverständnis gepaart mit schnellem Wachstum und visionärem Unternehmertum aus. Das Daily Business hat einen starken Schwerpunkt auf Social Media mit einer treuen Community, der #sissterhood. Unsere Gründerin Franzi von Hardenberg (@sissihardenberg) ist seit über 10 Jahren als Unternehmerin aktiv. Sie tritt als gefragte Speakerin und Mentorin auf und wurde 2022 als Unternehmerin des Jahres ausgezeichnet.

Wenn du Teil dieser aufregenden Geschichte sein möchtest, dann freuen wir uns auf Deine aussagekräftige Bewerbung inklusive Anschreiben und Gehaltsvorstellung. Hier findest du unsere offenen Positionen: https://thesissbliss.com/pages/karriere .

Name: Alighieri Jewellery
Description: Alighieri creates talismanic jewellery of imperfection, putting people and planet first. Each piece has a story and invites you to unlock your own. The brand was dreamt up by founder, Rosh Mahtani, when she was going through a dark time. Alighieri was inspired by Italian poet, Dante Alighieri, and his story of being lost in the dark wood, searching for strength and courage. We create timeless jewellery, hand-carved and cast in recycled gold, silver and bronze, locally in the Hatton Garden. Our Modern Heirlooms are created to last a lifetime and beyond, to be passed from one generation to the next. Alighieri's mission is to bring people together through the universal language of jewellery.

Name: FROJO 1854
Description:
Depuis 5 générations, la famille Frojo met son savoir-faire au service des plus grandes maisons d'horlogerie et de joaillerie. 

Solitaire unique, garde-temps précieux, les pièces d'exception sont au coeur de nos boutiques. 

Entre Marseille, Saint Tropez et Val d'Isère, l'équipe Frojo constituée d'artisans chevronnés et d'experts passionnés s'engage à transmettre auprès de notre clientèle la réputation d'excellence des maisons partenaires. 

Distributeur officiel Rolex, Tudor, Cartier, Omega, Arthus Bertrand, Baume&Mercier, Bell&Ross, Blancpain, Boucheron, Breitling, Buccellati, Bvlgari, CHANEL, Charlet, Chaumet, Chopard, Dior, Fabergé, Fred, Grand Seiko, Hermès, Hublot, IWC, Jaeger LeCoultre, Le Gramme, Longines, Mellerio, Messika, Nouvel Héritage, Ole Lynggaard , Panerai, Poiray, Pomellato, Repossi, Statement, Tag Heuer, Vhernier, Zenith. 

Retrouvez également nos boutiques Rolex, Messika, Breitling, Tag Heuer, Montblanc et Fred à Marseille.

Name: HDipak & Co.
Description:
H Dipak & Co .............................................................................

H Dipak is the world’s largest manufacturer and distributor of Princess Cuts diamonds. Dedicated to nurturing and growing the market for all the ‘unround’ fancy shapes, H Dipak is leveraging its expertise across manufacturing, design and retail to introduce a whole new aesthetic to the world of diamonds & jewelry.

It began with a team of 3, working out of a 300 square feet make-shift office in 1996. 15 years later, H Dipak employs over 3,500 employees and operates out of a 50,000 square feet corporate head office in Mumbai, and owns 5 independent manufacturing units spread across 2,50,000 square feet.

From a small business betting its future on a promising niche of Princess Cuts, to becoming the world’s largest manufacturer and distributor of the shape with over 2 million carats of Princess Cuts worth approximately US $ 1 billion sold in the last 5 years, we believe this is only the beginning – and that the best is yet to come.
...................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................................

Name: Jewellery & Watch and Fashion
Description:
Jewellery & Watch is perfectly timed to attract powerful decision-making buyers who come to find inspiration, innovation and to stock up for the forthcoming seasons.

As the only dedicated jewellery and watch event which is linked to a major gift fair, the show provides a unique cross-over buying opportunity from 15 other show sections including Gift and Fashion Jewellery & Accessories.

Such a dazzling display of the most influential jewellery & watch brands attract top quality buyers from a range of UK and international retailers, including department stores, multiples and independent jewellers. Jewellery & Watch is the sales opportunity of the year.

Name: Uniglo Diamonds
Description:
Driven by a passion for perfection, Uniglo Diamonds began its journey in the year 1988, as a family-owned business. Later, by 2000, our dedication turned this venture into one of the most trusted brands. Since its inception, Uniglo Diamonds has been in constant pursuit for perfection.

Situated in Antwerp, Belgium, Uniglo Diamonds strives hard to bring you the best natural diamonds. Over 80 percent of our clientele includes those who reach out to us by the ‘word of mouth’. We pride ourselves for earning customer loyalty and upholding it by sourcing the best diamonds available. Your trust makes us more determined to work harder and to exceed your expectations

Why us?
With the increasing demands, quality concerns and diverse preferences, there arises a need for a trustworthy brand. We are determined to live up to the expectations of our clients and do the best we can to meet their expectations. Situated in the city of diamonds, we definitely have a penchant for the best ones.

Our Values and Vision
To provide our customers with the finest diamonds, we constantly compete with ourselves. Everything we do within the house of Uniglo stands on the pillars of quality, trust, integrity, and transparency. We employ the best-in-class technology, machinery and craftsmanship in order to exceed over and beyond the expectations of our esteemed clients.

Our Operations
When it comes to diamonds, you name it, and we’ll do it for you. Whether it’s buying, selling, trading or something as intricate as evaluation and advisory services, we do all of it.

To provide our valuable clients with the most precious gem is our passion, something we gradually turned into a profession. So once you visit or interact with us, you won’t have to look any further, and that’s a promise.

Name: Eugénio Campos Jewels
Description: Sempre atenta à evolução do mercado, a Eugénio Campos soube manter-se na vanguarda do sector, integrando as transformações necessárias para se conservar como uma das mais importantes e distintas empresas do ramo. Para o êxito da sua actividade e para o sucesso das suas sofisticadas e elegantes jóias muito contribuiu a permanente aprendizagem de toda a equipa, em âmbitos tão díspares como a gestão, o marketing e a criatividade. O segredo do sucesso está na dinâmica e motivação da equipa, na qual todos trabalham com a mesma paixão, empenho e seriedade, à imagem de Eugénio Campos.

Name: Dana Augustine Inc.
Description:
Since 1981 Dana Augustine has designed, manufactured, and sold diamond rings of extraordinary quality and style. These beautiful rings are all designed and manufactured in our state of the art studio in Atlanta, Georgia.

These rings are available during our “Dana Augustine Diamond & Restyling Event.” We also have a large number of loose diamonds and colored gemstones available for your selection.

Each design is a miniature work of art, created in precious metal, set with beautiful diamonds, containing intricate details and sculpted lines, with substantial weight. All set and finished by the hands of experienced American jewelry craftsmen.

Diamonds and other gemstones that form a part of each Dana Augustine ring are of the best quality and color. These diamonds are all hand selected by our expert staff for incorporation into our rings. We have long standing relationships with diamond cutters and suppliers worldwide. Our in-house gemologist and diamond buyers are adept at selecting the highest quality diamonds and gemstones. They consistently secure the best pricing for you, our customers. Except for special promotional items, all of our diamonds over one-third carat have written certifications by recognized, independent jewelry grading laboratories such as the Gemological Institute of America and the International Gemological Institute. 

Dana Augustine’s constant goal is to provide you with jewelry of uncompromising quality at the best value with the assurance that you can rely upon the experience, reputation, and integrity of a company which has done exactly this for over thirty-one years.

Our jewelry is available to you through fine jewelry retailers nationwide. To meet with one of our design teams to see, try on, and select your very own Dana Augustine ring, please check with your local fine jeweler and schedule an appointment for our next Dana Augustine Diamond and Restyling Event.

Name: The Luxury One
Description:
Buy and Sell Authentic Preloved Luxury Products. We offer great prices on preowned products that will have your heart right from the first look.

The Luxury One aims at bringing luxurious pieces to your closets at prices that could make your eyes pop with excitement. With brands like Chanel, Louis Vuitton, Hermes, Gucci, Burberry, Rolex, Cartier, and more, we aim to be the one-stop pandora’s box of luxury preowned and new fashion.

Name: MID House Of Diamonds
Description:
Among the world’s 10 largest manufacturers and suppliers of polished diamonds, MID House of Diamonds is a multinational company with the capacity of fulfilling the comprehensive requirements of its clients in the retail and jewelry manufacturing sectors, 24 hours a days and seven days a week, from multiple geographic locations in North America, Europe and Asia. 
Headquartered in Israel and with sales offices in Antwerp, New York, Los Angeles, Hong Kong, Shanghai, London and Tokyo, MID operates an international network of factories, producing high-quality polished diamonds in all shapes and colors, in sizes from as low as 10 points to stones of plus-10 carats. With an ability to supply individual diamonds as well as to fill bulk orders, its international clientele ranges from mom-and-pop stores to many of the world’s most well-known jewelry chains and brands.
With roots in the diamond and jewelry business stretching back more than half a century, MID was established by two brothers, Benny and Yossi Meirov. And while the company has grown into a globe-encompassing corporation, with all the benefits and economies of scale that are enjoyed by a firm of its size, it remains at its core a family-run operation, where personal relationships are guaranteed, and reputation and integrity are forever core principles.
A perennial fixture on Israel’s official top diamond exporters list, taking the number one spot in both 2015 and 2016, in 2011 it was named the recipient of the country’s Outstanding Diamond Exporter Award. 

PRODUCTS & SERVICES
•	Polished diamonds in all shapes, colors and sizes, from 0.10 carats to +10.00 carats.
•	Parcels, single stones, matched pairs and layouts.
•	Certified stock, with grading reports from GIA, EGL, AGS, HRD and IGI.
•	Premium cuts to value cuts in all shapes.
•	Natural fancy colored diamonds, available both as loose stones and set in one-of-a-kind customized jewelry.
•	Clarity-enhanced and HPHT diamonds.

Name: Renu Oberoi
Description:
Renu Oberoi is a fine and high jewellery brand redefining timeless elegance with a modern soul. Founded in Mumbai, the brand is known for its sculptural silhouettes, bold use of gemstones, and versatile designs. 

Each creation begins with a vision—one that honors the soul of the gemstone and transforms it into a piece that feels powerful, personal, and enduring. Whether it’s a striking high jewellery statement or a versatile prêt piece, every design is thoughtfully crafted to transition seamlessly from everyday moments to special occasions.

The brand's design language celebrates individuality, with an emphasis on strong forms, movement, and modernity. From heritage-inspired motifs to contemporary icons, each piece carries a distinct point of view—meant to be worn, cherished, and remembered.

With boutiques in Mumbai and bespoke services by appointment, Renu Oberoi offers an intimate, highly curated experience. The brand is favored by discerning clients and global tastemakers alike, and continues to grow its international presence while staying rooted in emotion, artistry, and timeless design.

Crafted for the discerning. Made to mesmerize.

Name: Erum The Jewellery Studio
Description: Erum, founded upon a profound passion for jewellery and gems, recognizes the enduring legacy of these precious adornments. Throughout the ages, jewellery has served as an emblem of prestige, nobility, and inherent grace, enhancing the beauty of the soul it adorns. True to its linguistic roots, "Jannat" or "Heaven," Erum is unwavering in its commitment to preserving purity and quality. Our mission is to provide you with celestial jewellery, mirroring the ethereal essence of its namesake. Immerse yourself in the sophistication and timeless allure that define Erum's creations.

Name: Ettinger London
Description:
Founded by Gerry Ettinger in 1934, the company is still owned and run by the Ettinger family and is one of the last leather goods manufacturers in England.

Making luxury leather goods and travel accessories, Ettinger epitomises timeless British elegance and is renowned by connoisseurs the world over, especially in Japan. Its global reputation is founded on impeccable craftsmanship and its bold British style.

The company was granted a Royal Warrant to HRH The Prince of Wales in 1996, as manufacturers of leather goods.

Name: TREYA DIAMONDS
Description: Since 1980 we are in the field of diamond polishing and later on with jewellery manufacturing and wholesale across india. Treya Diamonds has been at the forefront in the diamond jewellery revolution in Kerala and has maintained the  position ever since. We are manufacturers, wholesalers  of quality studded diamond jewellery.Due to our trained in theoretical and practical in the field of diamond and gemstones jewellery we are capable to manufacture latest trends and styles in the fashion industry, keeping up international standards.in terms of designing, technology, pricing and services, Treya Diamonds always has a customer first priority.We also manufacture Navratna and Birth Stone jewellery; as per traditional and cultural values and fine craftsmanship with unique designs.The company follows strict quality measures in manufacturing flawless finished products.At Treya we use only first quality diamonds, clarity IF-VVS1, Colour D,E,F Cut Deluxe Premium.Years of experience in the wholesale jewellery market has made Treya Diamonds synonymous with quality and exquisiteness.Treya Diamonds is situated at Amala Nagar( 8km from Thrissur City).state-of-the-art-manufacturing facilityhere has experts in the field from designing the product to converting the designs into diamond jewellery with intricate beauty.

Name: Mazarin
Description:
Heritage and Modernity

The Maison was founded by Louise de Rothschild and Keagan Ramsamy, friends united by their passion for gemology and history, both of them working in the art market. Their bond soon evolved into the desire to create MAZARIN.

This young jewelry Maison draws its strength from the heritage of a prestigious name. In the 17th century, Cardinal Mazarin assembled an extraordinary collection of diamonds from the legendary Golconda mines.

MAZARIN stands within the great French jewelry tradition of Place Vendôme. Faithful to this long history, the Maison celebrates through its creations the timeless beauty of stones and of nature. Inspired by the wild, each MAZARIN jewel becomes a second skin, extending and revealing an instinctive beauty: beauty, worn naturally.

Name: Jura Watches
Description:
Established in 1979, Jura Watches is a leading luxury watch specialist. We are a family run independent luxury watch retailer with over 40 years experience. The UK’s leading online watch store, Jura Watches, showcases leading brands, alongside new and emerging watchmakers. Discover the largest selection of Swiss watches for men and ladies and experience the enduring appeal of the Jura Watches. Our experienced team of luxury watch experts who bring you the very latest releases from leading watchmakers.

Contact our experienced team of watch specialists who will introduce you to our most recent launches and collections, including new special and limited edition watches. We offer a personalised shopping experience, priding ourselves on our excellent customer service, with a dedicated concierge team for support and after sales services.

Name: Lux Worldwide / Luxios
Description:
LUXIOS is the world’s first private personal shopping service exclusively tailored to the needs of HNW individuals.  We help our members source, experience & purchase the world’s finest luxury products & services.

Personal shopping advisors on hand to assist members 24/7 - via live chat, telephone or email at anytime. Whether it’s help with business travel, arranging of a bespoke commission or an important last-minute gift, we're always on hand to help. 

Our personal shoppers provide priority access to products in limited supply, assistance with day-to-day product purchasing and access to sector experts.

An expertly-curated private online luxury product portfolio - Allowing members to browse and purchase the world’s most desirable products. Within this portfolio are thousands of truly exceptional brands covering over 100 specialist departments.

Luxury lifestyle, travel and bespoke services - Hand-picked specialist service providers offer vetted, low cost first- and business-class air travel, yacht or private jet charter, specialist holidays, property management, rental and investment, events and wedding planning and much more. 

Exclusive consultations directly with luxury brands - Members always receive superior levels of service and are assured that their appointment will be arranged and with a genuine expert. Luxios can assist with pre-market access, private views, exclusive consultations and invitations to unique brand experiences & events.

Since 2012 Lux Worldwide, has published over 20,000 pages of expert editorial content covering all aspects of luxury. Luxios also offers its members essential daily editorial coverage of the luxury lifestyle sector.
