Name: CRISTOFOL-ASF
Description:
Founded in 1830, Cristofol is one of the oldest creation & jewelry workshop in France. A private company, Cristofol feature all the know-how of the jewelry crafts in-house.

The pieces we manufacture have always been very diversified and our range of clients extends beyond the borders of France. The prestigious Maisons of Place Vendome, as well as those of New Bond Street, Fifth Avenue, Ginza and the UAE have trust us with their creations since the 1980s. Our teams are experts in manufacturing exceptional high jewelry sets that may require from 800 to 1500 hours of labor, and may also stagger deliveries for 200 pairs of cufflinks or fabricate fine jewelry collections as well as precious objets like mysterious clocks or evening handbags.

Our goal is to provide technical solutions for design and manufacturing of jewelry, watchmaking and luxury goods in respect with the ethics and governance that our sector must honor. Our workshop was also a pioneer when it started builing a strong team of CAD designers. Seven developers are now dedicated to the modeling of pieces to be manufactured in-house, but also the product development of very large-scale projects or outsourced advanced technologies.

Name: Suhani Pittie (Zorya Fashions Pvt. Ltd)
Description:
This is the official LinkedIn page of Suhani Pittie

Enlisted by the World Gold Council as the top 10 most inventive and ingenious jewellery designers in the world, Suhani Pittie is a graduate from the Gemological Institute of America. She established her own training institute at the young age of twenty and is a recipient of the prestigious  'Artisan Award 2015' by GJEPC and the ‘Singem Award for Excellence’ (gemology). Most recently, Suhani  received the Devi Award by The New Indian Express for Innovation & Dynamism. Recently enlisted by the prestigious Femina magazine in their “35 most powerful women in India, under 35″ list, Suhani was also written about in Fortune magazine as one of the five people to watch out for, in India. Been enlisted as one of the youngest Youth Icons of Andhra Pradesh by Passionate Foundation, Suhani has also been felicitated with the Young Women Achievers Award 2012 for her contribution to fashion by YFLO (Young FICCI Ladies Organization). Most recently, she has received the GJTCI Award of Excellence, presented by the Karnataka Governor

Vogue Italia named Suhani Pittie as one of the 5 designers to watch out for from India. Included in the coveted "Cool list of 30" by Grazia, she has been in many Best Dressed lists in the country, year after year. Most recently, Hi! Blitz enlisted Suhani as 1 of India's Top 50 Game Changers. Elle magazine credits the designer for changing India's perspective towards precious jewellery. Iconic auto brand Audi and south India’s leading magazine Ritz conferred upon Suhani the Audi Ritz Icon 2012 award.

 A finalist at the ‘Young Fashion Entrepreneur Award ’09′ held by the British Council, Suhani was handpicked to showcase her collections to an exclusive audience comprising of Prince Charles, Prince of Wales, Camilla Parker Bowles, Duchess of Cornwall, Prince Edward, Earl of Wessex and Maharaja Gaj Singh Ji at the Bal Samand Lake Palace, Jodhpur. Suhani's work was featured on the most prestigious fashion website in the world, Style.com.

A former columnist with Deccan Chronicle, The Telegraph and Indian Express, Suhani  was invited as a speaker at the prestigious World Crafts Council, 2011 event held in New Delhi”. Economic Times wrote about the designer as one of the most promising contemporary designers in the country. She's currently a contributor to India's most popular women's magazine, Femina.

 Suhani was the first Indian jewellery designer to be selected to showcase at the Miami Fashion Week. The Museum of Arts and Design, New York subsequently commissioned her work. She was also selected to work with veteran artist Thota Vaikuntum to convert his miniature paintings into jewellery.

Swarovski commissioned the designer to create exclusive designs for them, as a part of their 10th Anniversary celebrations in India, held at the Austrian Embassy. Travel and lifestyle channel, TLC, for their show, Oh My Gold, chose to feature her work and also chose her as a co-host with celebrity Lisa Ray for their Hyderabad episode.

A regular at the Fashion Weeks, Suhani’s work has always received accolades for their path breaking interpretation of contemporary jewellery. A favourite amongst most bollywood stars, her jewellery has appeared at Cannes Film Festival, year after year, on L'Oreal ambassador Sonam Kapoor.

Her flagship store in Hyderabad which has won awards for design houses not only her range of contemporary jewellery but also a large range of handcrafted lifestyle products. Having a gifts range for weddings to corporate occasions to specific festivals, the store has introduced a new language of contemporary gifting. Condenast Traveller and Lonely Planet have enlisted the store in "must visit" destinations in Hyderabad.

Name: Michael Spiers Jewellers
Description:
Michael Spiers is the South West’s leading independent jewellery and watch retailer. We have sold and crafted exclusive, luxury jewellery and watches for more than 60 years.

The story began in 1957, with a modest and much-loved shop in Looe, founded by the late Michael Spiers. Six decades of success followed and our business, still run by the Spiers family, now spans the South West, with stores in Plymouth, Truro, Exeter and Taunton. Although we no longer own the Looe store it is still a big part of our history and has helped shape who we are today - we are proud of our heritage and to be a part of the west country!
 
At Michael Spiers we see ourselves as one big family. As an independent, family-run business, we care about each and every one of our customers and take helping to create memories for everyone that walks through our doors very seriously. Our customers become our friends, and we take pride in being a small part of their special moment.
 
Since the day we first opened our doors, we have built up a formidable reputation for never compromising on our service, the quality of our products or our commitment to you, our customer. Each of our stores offer a calm and professional environment to help take the stress out of making that special purchase. Not only do we offer luxury products, but we pride ourselves on offering our customers a truly luxurious experience.
 
As a company, we have continued to grow and evolve. In 2012 Michael Spiers was appointed as an Official Authorised Retailer for Patek Philippe, an honour that we still bestow today. We are so proud to be associated with Patek, being similar in so many ways, with family being the core of both businesses. Michael Spiers is also proud to have been appointed an Official Authorised Retailer for Rolex. But it doesn’t stop there, we work with a whole host of amazing brands, including OMEGA, TUDOR, Breitling, Gucci, Fope and Georg Jensen, and we are excited to see what the future holds for Michael Spiers.

Made in England.

Description:
"Gemsperience Fine Jewellery" is my vision of timeless, personalized jewelry that perfectly reflects your individuality.

Name: World Diamond Group | Leader nel settore della gioielleria e nella distribuzione di diamanti
Description:
CHI SIAMO 

World Diamond Group S.p.A. è una società nata dall’esperienza ventennale di esperti operatori nel settore dei diamanti. Il nostro team è composto da esperti gemmologi provenienti da diverse aree del mondo, nonché da consulenti finanziari professionisti del settore. La sede di World Diamond Group è in Italia a Vicenza, coadiuvata da un ufficio a Tel Aviv e ad Anversa. 

LA PROFESSIONALITÀ 

World Diamond Group garantisce un servizio di qualità e di alta professionalità. La forza della nostra azienda è il prezzo! Grazie alle relazioni internazionali coltivate in questi anni World Diamond Group riesce ad offrire quotazioni vantaggiose. L’investimento inizia proprio acquistando diamanti a prezzi vantaggiosi. 

COLLABORAZIONI 

World Diamond Group lavora in stretta collaborazione con gli istituti gemmologici riconosciuti internazionalmente: GIA, IGI, e HRD. Tutti i diamanti proposti rispettano i principi etici del “Kimberley process”. 
LA MISSIONE 
Il valore aggiunto di World Diamond Group è quello di rispondere alle domande dei clienti con onestà e obiettività, affinché si possa costruire un rapporto duraturo anche dopo l’acquisto. 
I diamanti certificati acquistati dai clienti entreranno a far parte di una lista che sarà messa a disposizione del mercato internazionale. World Diamond Group chiederà al cliente il consenso per vendere il diamante in suo possesso, che dovrà trovarsi nel sigillo originale, accompagnato dal certificato.

Name: Bidz.com
Description:
Bidz.com is the largest business to consumer auction website specializing in jewelry, watches, and other brand name items.  

The company offers a large assortment of diamond, gemstone and branded jewelry, branded watches and designer accessories.  

Bidz.com sells closeout merchandise, allowing many of the auctions to start as low as $1.

Name: Juliette Hogan Ltd
Description:
Juliette established her eponymous brand in 2004 after completing her studies in fashion and textile design at Parsons School of Design in NYC. Opening her first store in Ponsonby, Auckland in 2007, Juliette has driven the brand to where it stands today as one of New Zealand’s most successful boutique designers with five NZ stores, a strong ecommerce presence, stockists throughout the country and growth into Australia underway.

Juliette Hogan creates garments for the modern woman which are luxurious in their simplicity. The Juliette Hogan brand is driven by strong values that are considered at every touch-point of our business - from the clothing we produce, to our interactions with suppliers, customers and our team. We aim to act with honesty and integrity at all times. We believe that the experience is as important as the product - this is evident in the exceptional customer service that we provide in store as well as our day to day interactions with those in our wider supply chain.

Based in Morningside, Auckland, Juliette Hogan employs over 40 team members across head office and retail stores. We engage with over 56 NZ based businesses across the supply chain to create our collections; from fabric sourcing to the cut, make and finish of garments. In the creative space we regularly work with 21 freelance creatives, across photography, styling, hair, make-up, video and production, to bring our content to life.

Name: Maison du Luxe
Description:
Maison du Luxe Consulting & Events is a “boutique consultancy company” providing services in the field of Events and business management. We focus on strategic services to help our customers reach their goals to their target audience or their personal interests.

Our consulting services aims is to help local and international clients that want to expand their business in Brazil and need professionals who can help them to plan how to expand in Brazil.

With the globalization, some of the international companies increasingly seek new business opportunities in countries like Brazil, we can help these companies to understand the Brazilian market.

Name: Aagaard/Kranz & Ziegler A/S
Description:
AAGAARD, Kranz & Ziegler designer, udvikler og markedsfører smykker i ædle metaller og nøje udvalgte ædelsten. Virksomheden er fra 1946 og blev i 2015 overtaget af ny investorkreds, der med nye visioner og fokus på innovation sikrer, at virksomheden forbliver ledende inden for sit segment og følger en fokuseret vækststrategi. Virksomhedens hovedsæde ligger i Svendborg. Primære markeder: Danmark, Norge, Sverige, Finland, Tyskland, USA, Canada.

AAGAARDs kollektioner er klassiske kvalitetssmykker, som er designet til at matche livets mange begivenheder og hele familiens forskellige mærkedage med kollektionerne: CONNECTIONS, FROM, RAUFF, By S samt velgørenhedskollektionen; FROM SOLDIER TO SOLDIER og ikke mindst LOVE kollektionerne der rummer hele kærlighedsspektret, såvel forlovelse som bryllup, 

Kranz & Zieglers smykkebrands STORY, COUTURE er vidt forskellige smykkebrands med hver deres brand og design strategi. STORY består af funktionelle armbånd, halskæder, ure og charms hvorfra man kan designe og sammensætte sit helt eget smykke. COUTURE er en eksklusiv klassisk og raffineret smykkekollektion, udviklet i høj kvalitet med respekt for det fineste håndværk. Derudover designes og udvikles der fashionorienterede smykkekollektioner, blandt andet via designsamarbejder der etableres igennem vores DESIGN LAB.

Name: SIKNO
Description: Después de casi 40 años fabricando en exclusiva para Cristian Lay, en 2019 nace SIKNO con el objetivo de recoger toda esa experiencia y tradición joyera, creando una visión innovadora y altamente tecnológica.

Our main goal is to make diamonds accessible to everyone. The company has its roots in Israel, back in 2002, when the first Ribas jewelry was founded in Tel Aviv.

Name: BRUNO BADER GMBH + CO. KG
Description:
Wir sind ein Familienunternehmen mit 90-jähriger Geschichte aus „der Goldstadt“ Pforzheim an der Pforte zum Schwarzwald und gehören zu den attraktivsten Arbeitgebern der Region. Unsere durchschnittliche Betriebszugehörigkeit liegt bei 19 Jahren – fast doppelt so hoch, wie im deutschen Durchschnitt. Das Arbeitsklima bei BADER ist familiär und die Firmeninhaber arbeiten aktiv mit, was schnelle Entscheidungen sowie individuelle Lösungen für die Mitarbeiter ermöglicht.

Mit einem ausgezeichneten Kundenservice und einem zielgruppengerechten Angebot behaupten wir uns solide gegen die wachsende Konkurrenz aus dem Internet. Über Kataloge sowie Online-Shops vertreiben wir rund 20.000 Artikel aus den Bereichen Mode, Wohnen, Schmuck und Haushalt. Unsere langjährigen Erfahrungen nutzen wir generationsübergreifend, um neue Herausforderungen zu meistern und die modernsten Standards des internationalen Versandhandels zu erfüllen. Das Unternehmen wächst und investiert in die Zukunft, deshalb freuen wir uns, wenn auch Sie bald unser tatkräftiges Team unterstützen.

https://www.bader.de/impressum

Name: GUILD+FACET
Description:
Founder Matthew Ego’s family tradition spans back to the 1900's where their skills were honed as blacksmiths. Adapting into working with finer metals, father Simon Ego took to the jewelers’ workbench in 1970 where he trained as master jeweler. 
Creatively curious at a young age, Matthew spent countless days in the shop as a child, while beautiful works of art were being created. It was evident that his future would follow the traditions of creating beautiful works of art, from raw metals. After honing his skills in on the bench and in design. He ventured out of the workshop to spend countless years behind a counter, determined to better understand the challenges retailers faced. Young minded and optimistic Matthew quickly realized that the Internet would change the way we shopped. In order to stay competitive in today online market and in store, product, service, and delivery needed to be seamless. With training since adolescence, and seventeen years of experience under his belt, he saw an opportunity for his mark in the jewelry Industry. 

In 2016, encouraged by skilled artisans, and counseled partners Matthew’s passion found him looking for more. His passion and drive lead him to creating GUILD+FACET. The brainchild of seventeen years of determination to re-invent how we deliver jewelry essentials. 



"Successful leaders view the journey more like the captain of a sailboat, relying on their skill and know-how, but knowing all along that the wind (help from other sources) is the force that will get them to their destination."

Name: MABINA Spa
Description:
Fondata a Milano nel 1999, Mabina S.p.A. è una realtà italiana specializzata nella creazione, produzione e distribuzione di gioielli attraverso i suoi marchi di proprietà: Kidult, Mabina e 2Jewels.

La nostra azienda nasce dall’esperienza di Songa Antonio S.p.A., storica impresa fondata nel 1935 e punto di riferimento nella distribuzione internazionale di preziosi. Mabina S.p.A rappresenta l’evoluzione naturale di questo percorso imprenditoriale familiare, con l’obiettivo di trasformare un solido know-how in collezioni distintive e contemporanee.

 Cosa ci distingue
Tradizione orafa, attenzione alle tendenze, qualità nel design e un servizio affidabile. I nostri gioielli, realizzati in argento, acciaio 316L e materiali preziosi, si rivolgono a un pubblico femminile e maschile, con uno stile moderno, accessibile e sempre in evoluzione.

 I nostri brand:
•	Kidult: emozione, stile e messaggi da indossare. Tre collezioni – Life, Style e By You – in acciaio dedicate a donna e uomo, per raccontare identità ed emozioni.
•	Mabina: eleganza e freschezza in argento 925, per donna, uomo e bambina.
•	2Jewels: accessori di carattere in acciaio per donna e uomo, ispirati alle tendenze internazionali.

 Presenza internazionale: Siamo attivi in Italia, Spagna, Portogallo, Andorra, Gibilterra e Germania, e guardiamo al futuro con un piano di espansione globale ambizioso.

 La nostra missione si fonda su quattro valori: moda, originalità, innovazione ed emozione. Perché un gioiello, per noi, non è solo un accessorio, ma un modo di esprimere la propria identità.

 Scopri di più su discoverkidult.com, mabina.it e  2jewels.it

Name: Pukka Berlin
Description:
We are an omnichannel consumer retail brand that unravels, owns, and simplifies the jewelry supply chain by going from mine to market and lab to life. 

Pukka is derived from the Hindi word Pakka, which is synonymous with being genuine, solid, positive and true. 

At Pukka, this is exactly what we stand for. The basis of our Pukka Promise is to give you more for less. Jewelry is either extremely unattainable for many due to the exorbitant pricing, or it’s reasonably affordable, but with a questionable quality.

Our handcrafted and personalizable products bridge the gap between fine and fashion jewelry,  while ensuring the highest levels of integrity across our supply chain. 

Our minimalistic designs are inspired by the diversity of our origins. A true fusion of 3 cities - Berlin, Nairobi and Bombay. Pukka is not just about looking good, it’s about feeling good too!

Sustainability and integrity are the fundamental principles of our supply chain. We control the entire value chain from “mine to market” and "lab to life", hence we are involved in the sourcing of all our diamonds and color stones, which enables us to ensure full compliance and fair compensation for all our raw materials. We then ensure this extends all the way through the production process, until the finished product. This ensures an equitable and honest supply chain. 

Get in contact to become part of our journey!

Name: Cast
Description:

Name: SIMA INTERNATIONAL
Description:
Established in 2007, Sima International has emerged as a prominent player in the leather goods manufacturing industry. Based in Kolkata, India, the company specializes in the production and export of high-quality leather handbags and accessories. With a strong focus on craftsmanship, innovation, and compliance, Sima International has earned a reputation for delivering exceptional products to customers across Europe and Asia.

Having an in-house tannery provides the company with a significant advantage. It allows us to maintain strict control over the quality of the leather, ensuring the use of premium raw materials and the application of advanced techniques. By having complete oversight of the production process, Sima International guarantees the delivery of top-notch leather products that meet the highest industry standards.

Compliance with regulations is a priority for Sima International. The company adheres to REACH (Registration, Evaluation, Authorization, and Restriction of Chemicals) compliance, which ensures that its products are safe, environmentally friendly, and free from harmful substances. By following REACH guidelines, Sima International demonstrates its commitment to responsible manufacturing practices and the well-being of both customers and the environment.

Sima International stays at the forefront of the industry by utilizing advanced machines and technology in its production processes. The company invests in state-of-the-art equipment, which enhances efficiency, precision, and overall productivity. By leveraging technology, Sima International maintains a competitive edge, enabling them to fulfill orders promptly and deliver superior quality products to their valued customers.

Name: Josephine Leroy
Description:
Als kleines Familienunternehmen Josephine Leroy, mit Hauptsitz in der Schweiz schlägt unser Herz für handgefertigten Schmuck liebevoll bestückt mit echten Edelsteinen aus der ganzen Welt. Unsere Designs sind filigran und einzigartig – Unser Ziel, dass ein jeder sein persönliches Lieblingsstück bei uns findet.

Uns liegt viel daran, dass unsere Liebe zum Detail zu erhalten und uns jeden Tag für Sie neu zu erfinden. Regelmässige besuche auf unserer Home Page www. Josephine-Leroy.com lohnen sich, den wir entwickeln unsere Produkte stetig weiter. Unsere Partner unterstützen uns dabei, unsere Produkte nachhaltig und fair zu produzieren.

Wir verwenden mit Ausnahme der Swarovski Kristallen ausschliesslich Natur belassene Edelsteine die in einem aufwendigen Verfahren auf die Grösse geschnitten und in einem mehr stufigen Selektionsverfahren von Hand sortiert werden. Nach der ersten mehrfachen Sortierung werden die Steine in eine brillantartige Form geschliffen und poliert, danach werden sie nach Grösse, Farbe und Reinheit erneut sortiert.

Um die Steine in einen Circle of Life einzubauen müssen 18 bzw. 9 Steine gefunden werden die optisch möglichst wenig voneinander abweichen. Dazu braucht es ein sehr gut geschultes Auge welches feinste Unterschiede feststellen kann. Wenn die Steine für einen Circle of Life zusammengestellt sind, werden sie vorsichtig von Hand in die Fassung gelegt und wie ein Brillant befestigt.

In der Regel können vom jeweiligen rohen Stein Maximum 1% für unsere edlen Objekte verwendet werden. Um möglichst hohe Qualität zu erreichen werden alle Arbeiten von Hand und von erfahrenen Spezialisten durchgeführt. Möglichst wenig Fremdeinschlüsse und eine prägnante Farbe sind die Eigenschaften die unserem Qualitätsstandart entsprechen.

Die deutsche Version gilt, die englische, französische und italienische und russische Version sind nur Übersetzungen und haben keine Rechtsrelevanz.

Name: Ersa Saat
Description:
1986 yılından bu yana saat sektöründe faaliyet gösteren Ersa Saat, dünyaca ünlü saat markalarının Türkiye temsilciliğini üstleniyor. Ersa Saat, distribütörlüğünü yaptığı Casio, Pierre Cardin, Bulova, Swiss Military Hanowa, Roamer, Timberland ve Reebok markalarını saat tutkunlarının beğenisine sunuyor. Ersa Saat, ithalatçısı olduğu tüm markaların, en son modellerini dünya ülkeleri ile eş zamanlı olarak Türkiye’ye getiriyor ve uluslararası pazarlama stratejilerini ülkemizde de uyguluyor.

Müşteri memnuniyeti ilkesiyle hareket eden Ersa Saat, yetkili bayileri aracılığı ile oluşturduğu yaygın satış ağı sayesinde Türk tüketicileri ile markaları buluşturuyor.

Ersa Saat’in sadece Casio saat satışını gerçekleştirdiği sekiz farklı noktada CASIO G-SHOCK mağazası da bulunuyor. Casio, farklı konseptlerde üretilen modelleriyle, her kitleye hitap edebilen, dünya çapında en çok kullanılan saat markası olması özelliğini taşıyor. 

İlk günden bu yana rekabet yapısı kuvvetli markaları bünyesine katan Ersa Saat, önümüzdeki dönemler de Dünyaca ünlü markaların temsilciliğini üstlenmeyi hedefliyor. Ersa Saat yaptığı çalışmalarla öncü rol üstlendiği saat sektörünün gelişimine de önemli ölçüde katkı sağlıyor.

Name: Momentum Dubai
Description:
Established 2011 in Dubai, Momentum is the UAE's first and only vintage watch boutique. Offering a platform for the local community of watch enthusiasts and collectors, at Momentum we have a unique assortment of vintage and contemporary timepieces and exclusive accessories from the world's leading manufacturers.

At Momentum we use our strong international network of dealers, collectors and watchmakers to help you find the perfect watch or accessory for your collection.

At Momentum we understand the investment in a watch is a deeply personal one, and strive to provide a uniquely curated collection, consisting of limited editions, one-offs, and iconic vintage timepieces, as well as quality accessories to accompany them.

Every watch tells a story; let Momentum help find yours.

Name: Efva Attling Stockholm AB
Description:
EFVA ATTLING has lived a multitude of incredible lives before returning to her original passion of jewelry making. Quite the star in her native Stockholm, Efva is recognized for her work as a model, her music, and her magazine industry stint.

Efva made her first piece of jewelry when she was eleven years old. At the age of sixteen she was a pupil of one of Sweden’s greatest silversmiths, Bengt Liljedahl. Eileen Ford spotted Efva at the age of seventeen and a twelve-year modeling career began. Having music in her family and in her heart Efva next started a band in 1981 called the X Models. The band had a hit ballad ”Two of us” in the 1980’s that Efva composed. In 1996 Efva returned to where she once started, working with silver, gold and precious stones. Efva Attling opened her own workshop in February 1999 in the southern part of central Stockholm. This was the first jewelry shop that she owned and designed. Today the company has seven Efva Attling Flagship Stores, more than a hundered retailers in Sweden and another hundred across the rest of the globe. 

Beyond her beautiful and thoughtful designs, Efva is dedicated to building awareness for issues that are close to her heart through her jewelry and has raised millions of dollars from pieces created over the years.

Name: Pacificorientsarl Gold & Diamonds
Description: pacificorientsarl Gold & Diamonds is one of the largest jewellery organisations in Cameroon. pacificorientsarl is a brand of Legacy, Quality, Trust & Value. The legacy of 80 years, spanning four generations, values rooted in the past and history, but it also balances amazingly with modern, forward-looking thoughts that continue to take the company forward. For both young minds and industry pros, who are passionate and want to excel in Gems & Jewellery segment, or have passion for any form of art, pacificorientsarl can be an ideal destination for a rewarding career. We believe that life is a journey and you keep learning throughout. However, along with on-job training, we train employees on the nuances of the retail and back office, as well as retail sector customer experience and behaviour. If you do not believe in taking challenges, then this company is not for you. A journey of 3 stores to 107+ stores in 80 years is not something that can be done without challenges and hard work. The vision is to make the customers happy and work with discipline, sincerity, and adaptability to changes. Almost 60% of our workforce is women. 80% of our customers are women. We respect women and want to help them in their journey and fulfill their dreams and aspirations. We have formulated committees against sexual harassment which are very prompt. Our maternity benefit policy helps women acclimatize to the dual responsibilities they take on after motherhood. However, success doesn’t come without sacrifice. So while we focus on work-life balance, our team doesn’t compromise on productivity and growth. We value the contribution of all the employees. We believe in 'Train the Trainer' model which enhances team-building spirit, leadership, and more. There are instances of our junior retail executives becoming store managers. pacificorientsarl welcomes applications for all departments, from candidates, looking forward to a challenging career with plenty of opportunities for self-developmen

Name: AV86
Description:
ABOUT VINTAGE IS ABOUT TIME
Only few stand the test of evolution, and yet the classic timepiece has done exactly that. 
With a vision to be relevant today, tomorrow and beyond, our focus is to make simple yet spectacular timepieces for the everyday gent. For us, Vintage is not just a reference of style - it is the journey to becoming it. The journey (life) will take you through eventful moments and memorable days to occasions that change your whole perspective. We hope that one day your watch will make you look back at it all. 

 "Keeping track of moments in time”

Name: Apose.officiel
Description: Apose conçoit et fabrique en France des montres haut de gamme qui se distinguent par l'audace de leur pureté : design exclusif, mouvement automatique servant une seule fonction, format unique pour les femmes et les hommes, élégance à la française, relation directe, distribution en ligne et prix sincères.

Name: Crieri
Description:
CRIERI nasce a Valenza, storico distretto italiano celebre in tutto il mondo per l’importanza della sua tradizione di artigianalità e creatività orafa. 

Fin dalla sua fondazione, l’azienda si specializza nella produzione del bracciale tennis, gioiello classico per eccellenza e simbolo di preziosità ed eleganza senza tempo. 
Dopo una decennale esperienza “dietro le quinte”, ottenuta creando i gioielli tennis per i più importanti brand nazionali, l’Azienda ha deciso di presentarsi direttamente al pubblico, arrivando oggi ad essere presente nelle migliori gioiellerie italiane ed estere.

Grazie alla sua specializzazione, unica nel settore, CRIERI esprime la classicità e l’abilità della produzione artigianale italiana arricchendola con il guizzo creativo dell’innovazione, per offrire gioielli dal fascino intramontabile ma la contempo unici e originali, rigorosamente Made in Italy. 
La produzione artigianale e rigorosamente made in Italy è il punto di forza del brand CRIERI. 
Una tradizione familiare di impresa nel mondo dell’alta gioielleria si accosta ad un approccio creativo e cosmopolita e vede la sua realizzazione finale tra le sapienti mani di orafi specializzati che, con esperienza e dedizione, creano ogni singolo gioiello CRIERI.

Name: Project O
Description: Enthusiast of watchmaker's, design and innovation. A newly designed innovative timepiece with technical features that make up a UNIQUE DNA.

Name: Merchants on Long
Description:
Founded in 2010 in Cape Town, Merchants on Long is one of the first concept stores dedicated to African design. Also known as the home of African fashion, our curation mixes vibrant emerging and established brands from the continent.
Everything we stock is made in Africa with a focus on brands vetted for their strong sustainable and ethical commitments.

Name: Yadav Diamonds & Jewelry
Description:
As jewelers and diamond wholesalers since 1983, you can trust Yadav to bring you fine quality, prompt service, and excellent prices. We carry a large selection of conflict-free diamonds. Enjoy enduring, ethical beauty from our family to yours.

Yadav has been family run since the beginning. We take pride in quality of the jewelry we provide, and are proud to place our family name upon it. Yadav Jewelry provides beautiful moment capturing engagement rings and excellent quality certified diamonds. We have grown to become a well established and trusted brand from simple diamond dealers.

When our website launched in the late 1990s, we wanted a name that clearly said what it was about. Now, doing business on the internet is the standard and it's time to take up our family name.

All of our jewelry is made in the USA. Our headquarter office and main store is located in San Francisco, California. We also have offices in Los Angeles, Hong Kong, and India. We proudly serve customers all around the globe and we ship worldwide.

Name: Singer Reimagined
Description:
Singer Reimagined SA was born from an encounter between Rob Dickinson, the founder of Singer Vehicle Design, and Marco Borraccino, a well-known watch designer. 

As we at Singer love the icons of automotive design, so too are we fascinated by the golden era of analogue mechanical watch design. It is driven by the passion for the sport classic watches of the 1960s and 1970s, by the love for the engineering complexity of the automatic chronograph and by the authentic connection between automotive and horological worlds. We create mighty timepieces that would reimagine high-watchmaking. 

Our watches are defined by that guiding principle: the need to improve, ignore convention, edge closer to perfection and ask “what if?” We believe that beauty comes from the uncompromising pursuit of functionality, obsessively searching for ways to optimize every elemental strand of design. 

Nothing would have been possible without this team of industry experts, who bring together an unparalleled depth and breadth of skill and experience. Just as Agenhor has played a pivotal role in the development of this revolutionary chronograph, so too has every manufacturing partner made an invaluable contribution.

Being part of the Singer Reimagined adventure is not about playing it safe, it is about authentic collaboration, united by a need to explore beyond the boundaries of traditional swiss mechanical watchmaking in search of a brush with perfection.

Name: Best Brilliance
Description:
We Connect People with Their Best Brilliance
At Best Brilliance, we are passionate about discovering the most beautiful diamonds and precious stones in the world, and matching customers across the globe with their perfectly customized piece of jewelry. Our exquisite pieces are all hand crafted with care and creativity. We believe that real beauty is about going deeper; seeking true quality and respecting the beauty of each and every person.  
Bringing forth professional expertise, an in-depth understanding of diamonds and gems, a creative approach to jewelry craftsmanship, and backed by sophisticated and seamless technology – we are able to create the perfect piece of jewelry for every customer, and safely deliver it right to their doorstep. 

The Best of All Worlds
Best Brilliance offers unparalleled online shopping experiences of the world’s most exquisite diamond and precious-stone jewelry. We work with top quality natural diamonds, lab grown diamonds, moissanite and other diverse precious stones. Understanding the growing demand for environmentally responsible and ethical stones, we offer a selection of alternative stones that are just as exquisite as natural diamonds – at affordable prices.  As experts in diamonds and gemstones, we are able to pinpoint a wide range of stones from various reliable sources, and set them in a uniquely customized design that is perfect for each customer’s taste and budget.

Name: BENY Luxury Watches & Jewellery
Description:
For more than a quarter of a century, the family jewelry company BENY has become a sought-after home of world-famous jewelry and watch brands, including jewelry from the BENY goldsmith's atelier and premium accessories. It was preceded by a dream and desire to build a small jewelry store in the south of Europe into a large jewelry and watchmaking company, which will offer its customers luxury watches and jewelry from the world's most prestigious brands in addition to its own jewelry production. Let's go through the important milestones of the Topalli family, where tradition and craftsmanship are passed down from generation to generation.Since time immemorial, goldsmithing has been one of the most respected crafts and has been passed down almost exclusively from father to son. Tunë Topalli, coming from an ancient jewelry family of filigree jewelry masters, (the oldest and most demanding goldsmith's technique), makes a crucial decision in 1976 and opens his first own jewelry store. Under the jewelry brand TOPALLI, in the most romantic picturesque town of the Istrian peninsula, in Rovinj, Croatia, with infinite patience and precision, he handcrafts and then sells filigree art objects and jewelry from thin silver and gold wire.TOPALLI jewelry abandons the filigree-type assortment, concentrates only on the production and sale of gold jewelry, and begins to deal with the trade in diamonds and precious stones.
Tunë Topalli goes to rest. The company TOPALLI changes its owner, the eldest son Zef Topalli takes over the management of the family business.A representative of the third generation of Topalli - Arben Topalli - becomes the director and owner of BENY.
Zef Topalli hands over the leadership reins of BENY to his eldest son.

The jewelry store is expanding its range to include watches from the Swiss brands Rado and Omega (due to the limitation of distribution of the brand to Omega boutiques only, the company no longer offers the Omega brand).Arben Topalli's younger broth

Name: Tanya Moss
Description:
Tanya Moss is one of Mexico's most coveted designers. Her work is featured in her own 14 exclusive boutiques, as well as in the most upscale hotel and department store venues.

Finely-wrought silver and gold jewelry as well as leather hand bags, belts, sunglasses and silk scarves form the foundation of Tanya Moss's collections. Central to her work is the butterfly motif, her signatures design element.

Name: Crystal Gallery
Description:
Crystal Gallery LLC is UAE's leading manufacturer, marketer and retailer of exquisite handcrafted crystal products since 1992.  We create awards, souvenirs and trophies for corporate, entertainment and sports events in the UAE. Every crystal product is made with perfection and skill inherited from centuries old techniques. We ensure that every Crystal Gallery product is not just aesthetically appealing but also fulfills the purpose it was created for. As you are aware anyone who is faced with the challenge of being responsible for purchasing corporate stationery, awards, trophies and gifts, knows that the right choice has to be made because it is based on goodwill as well as a reflection of the organization's choices and values. Such products should be well chosen so that they will be greatly appreciated and recommended, to other business associates in the years to come.

You are welcome to take a pick or better still; choose from all our product ranges which are corporate gifts like trophies and desktop products, replicas of famous traditional and modern buildings, objects of common interests, religious artifacts, jewellery, table ware, sports awards and trophies, 3-Dimensional images in cubes, gift ideas for family occasions or simply check the latest gift trends. Our eclectic designs link the best from the western and eastern parts of the world.

Being a pacesetter, we use state of the art technology such as Water-jet cutting machines, Vitro laser machines, etc, to create unique, exquisite designs that have invoked admiration from our customers and competitors alike. There is a plethora of products to choose from which we recommend, can be used to award your employees or felicitate your clients. For instance, for clients who are based abroad you can choose replicas of famous landmark buildings in the UAE or religious artifacts and souvenirs that reflect the deep rooted heritage of the Middle East.

There are over 15,000 designs to choose from. Our customers are delighted with the fact they can customize their designs or 'crystallize their ideas' be it for corporate or personal use. This means that you can have your company's logo, quote or a message etched onto the product. Different technologies such as 2D and 3D laser engraving, UV, film printing etc can make your chosen products look better and different. Our in-house production staff always goes out of their way to understand and address every customer's needs.

Name: Antares Custom Saddles/ Sellerie de France
Description:
"Riding is an art."
Antarès Custom Saddles (Sellerie de France, LTD) is the North American arm of Antarès Sellier France.
In its 10 years of business, Antarès Sellier has successfully risen to be among the best saddle makers in France. The workshop in Saintes, comprised of 35 craftsmen, specializing in bridlery, harness making, saddlery, and now approved safety helmets, produce 2000 saddles each year. Our sales representatives cover the majority of North America and Europe, as well as Korea and Japan, totaling 18 countries.  

Our success is not by chance, but because of the work of the whole Antarès team. The originality, vivacity and the creativity of the men and women who make up Antarès, have changed the standards of saddle making and evolved the profession to what it is today.

Name: THANGALS JWELLERY
Description:
Welcome to Thangals Jewellery, We are Bullion Gold Traders rapidly expanding our foothold all over the Middle Eastern Countries since 1990 and running successfully for the past 28 years.

Our start was led by the visionary genius Mr. Thangals Hamsa Haji who established a jewellery trading company in the historical paradise, the Malabar region of Kerala in South India, Kozhikode. Our start was in a small town named Koduvally, which was and still am a proud city of Gold in Kozhikode.

We shifted the HQ (headquarters) from Kozhikode to Dubai after Mr. Muneer Thangals, S/o Mr. Thangals Hamsa Haji inherited the group and started his own venture with the company. Our head-office is currently located in Deira, Dubai. We are successfully running our business in Dubai, Qatar, Oman and many more Middle Eastern Countries.

We are wholesalers and retailers in the gold business and have made some pretty loyal and trustworthy clients in the go. We believe in the motto “We mould your trust”, Since the beginning of our venture, our establishment has been built upon the trust of our clients. Not only in us, but also in the purity and beauty of the product we have been giving them.

Name: ST LUXURY
Description:
ST LUXURY est un nouvel acteur innovant sur le marché de la malleterie. Inspiré par la tradition et le savoir-faire français, il repousse les frontières de la création en joignant au travail de la malle classique une approche technologique jusque là jamais vue.

Dans l’ADN de ST LUXURY, on note l’omniprésence de la culture aéronautique. Un hommage aux pionniers de l’aéropostale, à l’Histoire de l’aviation, tout autant qu’un véritable culte voué à l’innovation la plus aboutie. Des pistes de décollage de Saint-Exupéry ou Mermoz à l’aérospatial de demain, il n’y a qu’un pas… 

Guidées par la raison d’être de l’entreprise, les équipes au service de la marque allient le talent des grands malletiers traditionnels et la volonté de repousser les limites d’un univers figé.

Ouvrir le dialogue entre le monde du luxe et la technologie est l’ambition première de ST LUXURY, qui convoque dans ses créations le génie électronique et l’héritage des grands artisans.

Fusionner le beau et l’étonnant, le sublime et le créatif, mais aussi la mémoire et l’avenir est la finalité de la marque. Elle offre des perspectives inédites à l’univers de la malle pour l’entraîner dans une nouvelle ère où tout devient possible.

Un nouvel horizon s’ouvre, un espace infini donné à l’audace, à l’imagination, à l’art et à la technologie. Le rêve d’une nouvelle tradition avant-gardiste devient enfin réalité…

Name: Canadian Jewellers Association
Description:
The CJA is the national trade association for the Canadian jewellery industry, comprised  of retailers, suppliers, and providers of goods and services.

Since 1918, we have provided a single source for information on this vibrant and diverse industry to consumers, government, media and businesses.

For our members, we supply cost-effective access to education, services and technology solutions to assist in promoting best business practices and profitable operations. Our member benefits are uniquely tailored to the jewellery community and its needs, addressing the specific requirements of transport, security, credit, marketing, education, certifications and other critical business areas.

For consumers, we supply information to enhance the jewellery shopping and purchasing experience. Our goal is for you to ultimately buy with confidence and celebrate your new piece for years to come.

Our online education can assist you in preparing for your important occasion and subsequent purchase. This first step will help you start the journey toward selecting the perfect piece of jewellery. Consult our online list of CJA members to find a local jeweller who offers professional, knowledgeable and friendly sales or appraisals.

Name: JAISHREE JEWELLERS PVT LTD
Description:
Established in 2005 by Mr. Avant Kumar Jain, Jai Shree Jewellers is a dream run by a powerful father-son duo team. With his years of experience and precise & detailed knowledge of the art of defining jewelry, Mr. Avant Kumar Jain gives their customers a huge reason to trust and love Jai Shree Jewellers. At the same time, his son, young and passionate Mr. Yash Jain adds freshness to the team with his impeccable taste and hard work put into every single design they produce. The store is located in the culturally rich and auspicious city of Jaipur. We bring you authentic and traditional jewelry from different corners of Rajasthan as well as India. Each and every piece of jewelry is created by traditional artisans and craftsmen with talent passed over to them by their ancestors to narrate a unique story of its own. 
Jai Shree Jewellers is a prominent name in the Jewelry market of Rajasthan. We are now determined to give you the same exceptional experience with online jewelry shopping as well. Select your perfect jewelry from our enormous range of stunning designs in Gold Jewelry, Silvery Jewelry, and Gem Stone. 
 
Our vision 
India is a land of authenticity and culture. Our precious craftsmen for generations have been in the trade of jewelry making. They are gifted with the skills by their culture and forefathers. Our vision is to bring their talent to the world and cater to them and the world with the joy of culture.
 
Our mission 
Our mission is to bring the craft of our immensely talented jewelry makers to the people who value its beauty and the craft. Our mission is to make the two meet and celebrate Indian jewelry as they have never before. Our mission is to promote the vocal for locals to take the richness of Indian cultural jewelry to every single household.

Name: MARCELLO PANE
Description:
𝑴𝒂𝒓𝒄𝒆𝒍𝒍𝒐 𝑷𝒂𝒏𝒆 𝒏𝒐𝒏 𝒆̀ 𝒔𝒐𝒍𝒐 𝒖𝒏 𝒎𝒂𝒓𝒄𝒉𝒊𝒐...
𝑴𝒂𝒓𝒄𝒆𝒍𝒍𝒐 𝑷𝒂𝒏𝒆 𝒆̀ 𝒖𝒏𝒂 𝒇𝒂𝒎𝒊𝒈𝒍𝒊𝒂.

Diamo vita ogni giorno ad una 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐚̀ 𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐧𝐞𝐥 𝐬𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐚 𝐠𝐢𝐨𝐢𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐚, fortificando le sue colonne portanti sui principi
che da sempre la identificano: 𝒑𝒂𝒔𝒔𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒆, 𝒕𝒓𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒛𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒆 𝒆 𝒊𝒏𝒏𝒐𝒗𝒂𝒛𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒆.
La storia comincia oltre un secolo fa, nella cornice unica del
Borgo Orefici, dove l’intuizione del bisnonno Vincenzo permise
di ergere le basi di 𝐮𝐧’𝐚𝐳𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐚 𝐜𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐠𝐠𝐢 𝐞̀  𝐥𝐞𝐠𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐚.
La caparbietà e la passione costante della famiglia consentì
sin da subito di affermarsi con enormi riconoscimenti
nel mondo dell’oreficeria; l’attenta ricerca di nuove forme e la creazione di modelli sempre attuali iniziarono a disegnare lo stile di un brand che, nel tempo, ne diverrà la principale mission: 𝒆𝒍𝒆𝒈𝒂𝒏𝒛𝒂 𝒔𝒆𝒏𝒛𝒂 𝒕𝒆𝒎𝒑𝒐.
Un’incessante ambizione di crescita muove l’universo della Marcello Pane portandola, grazie all’utilizzo di nuove tecnologie, a posizionarsi anche all’interno dell’offerta di argento.
Il risultato è un’azienda storica ma 𝐜𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐚 𝐚𝐥 𝐟𝐮𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐨 con collezioni contemporanee, ricercate e di finissima qualità.
In ogni creazione si assiste ad una vera celebrazione della maestria orafa dell’alta gioielleria, di cui l’azienda conserva il know how, divenendo oggi 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐨 𝐝𝐞𝐥 𝐌𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐢𝐧 𝐈𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐲 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐮𝐭𝐭𝐨 𝐢𝐥 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐨, grazie alla crescente espansione del brand sul mercato globale, sotto la guida lungimirante della quarta generazione di Pane.
La famiglia resta quindi il perno principale attorno al quale ruota un’azienda storica, fondata sulle basi della tradizione orafa napoletana e cresciuta nel tempo proiettata al futuro,
grazie allo 𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐨 𝐚𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐮𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐨 𝐜𝐡𝐞 𝐝𝐚 𝐬𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐫𝐞 𝐦𝐮𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐥𝐚
𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐨 𝐏𝐚𝐧𝐞.

Name: H. Briones Comercial S.A.
Description:
H. Briones Comercial S.A., es una empresa que nació en 1989 cuando lanzó una colección relojes de la marca Swatch, su primera línea de productos en la categoría de relojería Suiza. Durante los años siguientes se fueron incorporando a la distribución y comercialización las marcas de alta relevancia en el mundo y en el mercado como Omega, Montblanc, entre otras.  

Actualmente, HBC es representante de más de 18 marcas de relojes, joyas y accesorios  en Chile y la comercialización de los productos es realizada en tiendas de la empresa repartidas a nivel nacional desde Arica a Puerto Montt, también por medio de distribuidores autorizados y canales Online.
 
Cuenta además con un Servicio Post-Venta que está certificado como el único servicio autorizado en Chile por las marcas representadas. Éste cuenta con herramientas de control de última generación, únicas en Chile, que permiten garantizar la más alta calidad en servicio de revisión y reparación por técnicos debidamente capacitados.

Name: idyl
Description:
Idyl is re-inventing diamond jewelry. We are on a mission to offer a more sustainable and attainable alternative through lab-grown diamonds, traceable solid gold and ethical craftsmanship. 

In addition our modular concept offers an out of the box experience and was created for the mere joy of owning less while combining more. Women and men of today are truly diverse, they don't want to wear expensive jewelry for the next 10 years and want the ability to embrace their individuality and self-expression. We’re offering something new, where our consumers just need to purchase the base once and can easily personalise their jewelry from a menu 
of add-ons.

Diamonds are forever, now they're for everyone!

Name: MIND TRAVELER
Description: Where Colors Meet Clothes

Name: COCO LENI
Description:
Like any story, ours starts ‘once upon a time’.

It all began in Germany...Annaberg-Bucholz to be precise in former East Germany.

A workshop was established, in 1946 making handcrafted frames using durable materials and lenses. During this period, East German goods weren't considered fashionable, but they lasted longer.

Matthias Haase, an eyewear craftsman and optometrist worked in the same workshop since in 1981.

He was then a young man with the vision to make beautifully hand-crafted eyewear using the finest local materials in a post war country when things looked bleak.

Matthias was determined to bring some sunshine into those dark times and what started then is the soul of COCO LENI.

Today we are determined to bring a positive impact to our world. How we do this, is the difference which makes COCO LENI a friend of the world.

Then one day, when Arjun Sagar, was trawling the world of eyewear he met the legend, Matthias, who became his mentor.

It was an instant connection of values and the two decided the journey needed to move on – to Goa, where today, each pair of glasses is made by hand.

Description: Founded in 2017, Luxury Cruxx is a catalyst platform to serve you with luxury related latest happenings, trends, reports, analytics and forecasts from all over the world. Name: Material Good
Description:
Material Good is redefining the way people shop for watches and fine jewelry. A New York City-based luxury goods boutique and showroom, Material Good is designed to be a uniquely immersive and personalized shopping experience. We cultivate relationships and tailor our services to each client.

Material Good is an authorized retailer of Audemars Piguet and Richard Mille, along with a refined edit of the most sought after pre-owned and vintage timepieces. We also house a curated selection of fine jewelry by Anita Ko, Jemma Wynne, Shay, Spinelli Kilcollin, Suzanne Kalan and others, as well as our own customized Material Good line of diamond jewelry.

Name: STUDEX USA
Description:
STUDEX is recognized globally as the industry leader in ear piercing for over 40 years. We are the world’s largest provider of ear piercing systems, hypoallergenic earrings and piercing aftercare products; all of which are manufactured at our state-of-the-art ISO certified facility in Los Angeles, CA.  

We have safely pierced over one billion ears in over 100 countries.  Our piercing locations can be found in a variety of jewelry stores, mass retail chains, pharmacies and department stores across the globe. FDA approved and patented ear piercing instrument and piercing earrings that are made with the highest quality materials offer a reliable sterilized and gentle piercing experience.  Some of our partners include, Claire's, Banter by Piercing Pagoda, CVS Beauty, Target, Superdrug, Priceline, Clicks, Five Below, Lovisa, Rowan, and Priv, to name a few.

Name: SHONREI
Description:
Our whole focus as a jewellery and watch display manufacturer is to inspire people into stores through innovative displays.

We design, create and distribute beautiful display and packaging solutions for the Jewellery, Watch and Gift markets.

Shonrei specializes in providing modular jewellery display systems, jewellery & gift presentation packaging and customized display solutions to leading jewellery brands and retail outlets.

Our capabilities allow us to satisfy the needs of boutique jewelers through to multi-store outlets.

Contact us today for your display and presentation packaging requirements.

For more info please visit www.shonrei.co.nz

Name: Tavannes Watch Co.
Description: In 1891 a young, talented master watchmaker, Henri Frederic Sandoz, founded the Tavannes Watch Company in a small Swiss village, Tavannes, in the Jura mountains. He and his partners, who were rich fabric merchants, soon opened markets around the world, notably in Canada, Russia, United States and the Far East. It was during this time that watches were becoming popular. Industrialization and the expansion of the railroad system made a standardized time necessary. The United Kingdom, in 1884, set its time to Greenwich Mean Time, establishing the watch business as we know it today. Henri Frederic Sandoz was a real entrepreneur. His visits to American manufacturers inspired him, and he was the first to create machine tools exclusively for the Swiss watch industry. Tavannes became an important Swiss watch company because of Sandoz's engineering abilities. In half a century, Tavannes built five factories in Switzerland, and became the fourth largest watch manufacturer in the world. At that time they employed over 3,000 skilled watchmakers and produced over 4,000 watches a day. With over 300 patents obtained for mechanical and automatic timepieces, Tavannes was producing movements for most of the famous Swiss brands. Many of these innovations are still currently being used. Today Tavannes Watch Company is known for its quality, accuracy, and reliability in the world of fine Swiss timepieces.

Name: LONITE AG
Description:
LONITÉ’s story debuted in a small town near the Alps, at a 25-minute train ride from the economic capital of Zürich, in Zug, Central Switzerland. The company name - Lonité, originates from the word ‘Longévité’ in Swiss French, which translates to "to last in time". Diamonds after death is one aspect of this idea. 

The founders of LONITÉ are all leaders in the diverse fields of expertise required to turn hair or cremation ashes into diamonds. They have years of experience in the jewellery trade, the gemmology field, the funeral business, conducting scientific research and creating beautiful diamonds in the laboratory. Together they have the blend of skills required in making cremation diamonds out of ashes or hair. 

At first only very small amber and blue diamonds could be created. Today, advancements in lab-made diamond technology have changed all that. Now, cremation diamonds from ashes are available through LONITÉ in larger sizes and more beautiful colours. Your memorial diamond can reflect your departed loved one's personality and Life so you can carry them with you forever. LONITÉ can also on your request, custom-design a jewelry ring, a pendant or a pair of earrings around your unique cremation diamond.

Name: Linde Werdelin
Description:
LINDE WERDELIN creates timepieces inspired by the skiing and diving universes. As such, all Linde Werdelin watches and instruments are designed with these two sporting and adventurous worlds in mind, without compromising on either form or function.

There is one core tenet of Linde Werdelin, The Idea: to design and produce mechanical timepieces and optional digital instruments for skiing or diving, fusing with a lifestyle of urban sophistication for the modern man. The Idea is brought to life according to only the highest standard of Swiss watchmaking and craftsmanship.

All Linde Werdelin timepieces are designed in Denmark and individually handcrafted in Switzerland, by the best artisans as per Swiss tradition, in exclusive, limited and numbered editions of up to 100 pieces.

Linde Werdelin is an independent company owned and managed by its founders, Morten Linde and Jorn Werdelin; it is based in both Denmark and the United Kingdom.

Name: Auverture
Description: We believe that fine jewellery tells a story, not just about your style but who you are. Our platform showcases remarkable jewellery for remarkable people - creating the ultimate destination for artistic expression and influential creativity. We are passionate about Fine Jewellery and we aim to disrupt, re-define and elevate your jewellery box with vintage and contemporary Fine Jewellery.

Name: Max Chocolatier
Description:
Once upon a time, there was a young boy whose mouth often bore telltale chocolate smudges. Meet Max. On 27 September 2009, the boy’s father made a family dream come true.  That day saw the opening of «Max Chocolatier» in Lucerne, in the heart of Switzerland. Mixing a passion for chocolate with a pantry full of natural ingredients, a team of four chocolate-making magicians and a file of secret recipes, Max Chocolatier set about turning sweet treats into heart-melting experiences.

At Max Chocolatier, instead of a product portfolio you will find an enjoyable languagein all facets exciting and charming. The pleasure is in the chocolate along with the love of detail in the individual packaging and personally chosen message. Whether as a thank you for the loyalty of your customers, a sweet surprise for your colleagues or as little treats for a company event, Max chocolate creates joy and pleasure knowing the values and beliefs of giving gifts with confidence, authenticity and a personal touch.

Let us work the chocolate magic on your specific wishes to create a special treat that speaks the beautiful language of chocolate.

Name: Ballantyne
Description:
Rooted in its Scottish past, Ballantyne is one of the key fashion houses specializing in knitwear and heritage yarns.

The brand, officially born in 1921, becomes renowned worldwide for its iconic diamond intarsia and argyles endorsed by the British Royal Family.
As a token of acknowledgment and appreciation, Queen Elizabeth II conferred the Queen Award in 1967.

After 100 years of history, Ballantyne renovated its stylistic traits as a result of its Italian creative leadership while still paying homage to craftsmanship, yarns and heritage.

The mix of these two world together, offers a new dynamic reality channeling the past, present and future of the house.

Name: LeachGarner
Description:
LeachGarner proudly offers the industry's most comprehensive melt to market precious metal products and technical expertise. As a leader in precious metals processing, LeachGarner continually evolves to meet the challenges of evergreen markets and strives to exceed expectations for reliability, quality and innovation by an unwavering commitment of integrity.

LeachGarner specializes in the manufacturing and distribution of precious metals in the form of sheet, wire, fancy wire, tubing, fancy tubing, casting grain, findings and chain specific to your needs.

We are committed to bringing responsible and compliant manufacturing to all facilities regardless of geographical location while leveraging our global reach to serve our customers providing quick-to-market and market oriented products.

Name: UNCONVENTIONAL LUXURY MAGAZINE | ALLURE DU MONDE
Description:
ULM is a curated space where stories, people, and ideas come together to inspire, inform, and ignite new perspectives. Each issue explores a distinct narrative thread—through interviews, features, and visual journeys—celebrating culture, creativity, and contemporary lifestyle.

We believe in the power of storytelling to connect communities, elevate voices, and spark curiosity. Whether on paper or digital, our pages are designed to be both a mirror and a window: reflecting the present and offering a glimpse into what's next.

With a focus on quality content and timeless aesthetics, the magazine speaks to a global audience of curious minds, creative professionals, and cultural explorers.

Name: Maison Wilfrid Deydier
Description:

Inspiré d’architecture, de design et de l’histoire des arts, c’est avec émotion qu’il en exprime les scintillements au fil de ses collections.
Des parures qui par l’éclat d’une pierre ou la douceur d’une perle marquent les instants d’amour et les moments précieux d’une vie.

Créatrice de lignes iconiques et élégantes, la Maison Deydier réalise également des bijoux sur-mesure, offrant ainsi à une demande personnelle le luxe d’une œuvre éternelle.
« Intemporels et élégants, nos bijoux seront l’éclat de votre quotidien »

Name: Bria Jewelry
Description:
Bria Jewelry is a multinational corporation headquartered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, that speci- alizes in diamond mining, trading, retail, and industrial manufacturing, as well as jewelry design. We offer a meticulous and creative brand that is designed to refine and meet the standards of our customers. Bria Jewlery sells an experience, reinventing the art of jewelry making. Assuring that our organization maintains up to standards, we have obtained the Kimberly Certificate.


Our Story

The heart of every organization is the most significant, valuable, and genuine part of all we see.

BRIA Jewelry was designed to represent a wide range of collections that meet or exceed international expectations of glistening sophistication, elegance, and glamour. While being rooted from the same origin, each piece is distinct in its own right.

Sister, Farida and Aida, collaborated after five years to create BRIA Jewelry, which combines luxury and creativity, through designing timeless statement pieces that reflect a range of wearers› taste and preferences. Ranging from bold, trendy and dramatic, to classic, elegant, and sophisticated jewlery. Our skilled craftsmen have a wealth of experience in this field and are dedicated to telling meaningful stories through each piece.

Name: Fana
Description: An independent, family-owned brand since 1982, Fana is renowned for bridal and fine jewelry. Fana merges a commitment to craftsmanship and beauty and loves playing a part in some of the most significant, joyful moments in a person’s life. In parallel with our commitment to clients, we are also dedicated to environmental sustainability and social responsibility: using only ethically sourced material and gemstones, limiting our environmental footprint, and treating  our employees and partners with respect, dignity, and fairness.

Name: Grupa Zibi S.A.
Description:
Obecnie Grupa ZIBI to już 88 markowych salonów z zegarkami Time Trend mieszczących się w największych miastach w Polsce oraz 22 salony muzyczne Riff.
W każdym salonie spotkać można profesjonalnych doradców, którzy jeśli zajdzie taka potrzeba podpowiedzą, który wybór będzie najlepszy.

Nasza praca od początku związana jest z światowej sławy i najwyższej jakości markami
Dzisiaj w naszej ofercie są zaawansowane technologicznie i pięknie zaprojektowane zegarki Casio, Atlantic, Bulova, Guess Lacoste czy Nautica. Od początku związani jesteśmy z kalkulatorami marek Casio i Vector. Wspomagamy firmy oferując narzędzia optymalizujące pracę – terminale Gen2Wave, Opticon i Casio. Wspieramy artystów i młodych adeptów grania na muzycznych instrumentach. Oferujemy najwyższej klasy gitary akustyczne Alvaro czy Almansa, kultowe gitary elektryczne Hagstrom czy zupełnie wyjątkowe gitary Michael Kelly. Mamy także soczyście brzmiące perkusje Mapex, instrumenty klawiszowe od Casio i najwyższej klasy osprzęt od Kustom.

MISJA
Sprawiamy, że wartościowe marki i produkty są dostępne, aby pomagać Klientowi spełniać jego marzenia i podkreślać wizerunek.

WIZJA
Jesteśmy liderem w każdym segmencie lub niszy rynkowej, w której działamy. Dostarczamy wartościowe marki i produkty oraz wysokiej jakości usługi spełniające potrzeby klienta.
Nasze marki i produkty są najbardziej pożądane na rynku. Firmy Grupy Zibi są najbardziej rozpoznawalnymi firmami w swoich branżach i miejscami pierwszego wyboru dla Klientów i pracowników.

NASZE WARTOŚCI
1. Ciągle się doskonalimy
(stawiamy na  rozwój firmy i samorozwój pracownika)
2. Pracujemy zespołowo
3. Stawiamy na wiarygodność i dobrą komunikację
(z Klientem i w Grupie)
4. Tworzymy dobrą atmosferę pracy
5. Mówimy otwarcie o problemach i rozwiązujemy je.

Name: Crown Brindes Corporativos

Nosso compromisso com a qualidade é inabalável, ao ponto de nos tornarmos referência no Brasil.

Seja para uso pessoal ou profissional, a experiência de ganhar os produtos da Crown será sempre prazerosa.

Description:
Persée est habitée par la volonté de présenter un diamant pur, nu, sans serti, en toute authenticité, tout en élevant et révélant toujours davantage l’éclat et la brillance de la pierre. 

Libéré du serti, c’est une symphonie magistrale de lumière et de brillance que le diamant offrira à la femme qui le portera.

En 2017, Nawal Laoui fonde la marque Persée inspirée par son tour du monde, sa passion de l’art contemporain et sa soif de créer.

Au cœur de ses créations, on trouve le croisement de ses influences issues du Maroc, la terre de ses origines et de la mythologie grecque qui lui a inspiré le nom de la marque: Persée.

We work directly with artisans in South America (Wayuu indigenous community) and offer the best value to our customers while pursuing fair trade practices. We focus on casual and boho-chic style accessories bags and footwear; every product we offer has been carefully selected to give our customers the unique feel and look they deserve.

Thanks for visiting us, now let’s give some color to your own lifestyle!

Description:

JTR olarak uluslararası standartlar ve onlarca yıllık deneyim üzerine kurulduk. Biz geleneksel derecelendirme işlemlerini yenilikçi teknolojilerle harmanlayarak, pırlantalarınızdan emin olmanızı sağlıyoruz. Yenilikçi ve kapsamlı analizlerimiz, tam olarak ne için ödeme yaptığınızı bilmenizi sağlayacaktır.

JTR, global mücevher ve değerli taş sektörünün ihtiyaç duyduğu yetkinliklerde bireyler yetiştirmek amacıyla JTR Eğitim Departmanı kurduk. JTR Eğitim departmanı; bilgi, beceri ve yetkinliklerin geliştirilmesi için tasarlanmış eğitim programları, en güncel bilimsel araştırmaları ve uygulamalarını temel alır.

Name: Plan C Official
Description:
Plan C is Carolina Castiglioni’s point of view on fashion with a new women's brand. 
Rooted in an elegant, sophisticated aesthetic, Plan C targets those women who want to express their personal attitude through a modern wardrobe.

Positioned in the high-end segment of the market, the collection includes ready-to-wear, knitwear and accessories, all made in Italy.

Name: Powers Jewelry Designers
Description:
Powers Jewelry Designers was founded in 1976 in Milwaukee, Wisconsin by Dick Powers and has remained a family owned and operated business to this day. Our long-standing relationships within the jewelry and gemstone industries cut out the middleman and allow us to provide the best product at the best price time and time again. 

With a small, but highly skilled staff – you can expect exceptional results with a personal touch. We boast over 30 years of GIA certified Gemologist experience amongst our staff, and our two master Goldsmiths are on site every day. 

As your family Jewelers, we’re here for the big moments in your life, the routine repairs and everything in between.

Name: BRISTON WATCHES
Description:
Briston is an independent French watchmaking brand conceived by Brice Jaunet. The company celebrated its 10th anniversary in July 2023.

A Briston watch stands out for its fundamentally horological DNA and its sport-chic spirit—this distinctively British style that the English have mastered to perfection. A style that is both elegant, relaxed, and slightly unconventional, it quickly gained popularity in the United States starting in the 1950s. This sportswear aesthetic, also known as "preppy," captivated Ivy League students, beginning with the most famous of them all, the icon John F. Kennedy. It also contributed to the success of brands like Tommy Hilfiger, Ralph Lauren, Gant, and Brooks Brothers.

This sport-chic spirit is reflected in the shapes, colors, and materials of Briston’s first collection. The Clubmaster innovates with its "tortoiseshell" acetate case, a material traditionally used in eyewear. This noble and natural material gives Briston watches a distinctive look.

With a presence in over 850 points of sale worldwide, including nearly 120 in France—where it all began—BRISTON is now distributed in 50 countries.

Name: Wempe US
Description:
WEMPE, one of the world’s largest purveyors of luxury timepieces and fine jewelry, is a German-based, family-owned business with a history spanning over more than 145 years. It operates 29 showrooms worldwide, including locations in New York, Paris, and Madrid.

American Wempe Corporation, based in New York City, manages the company’s 5,500-square-foot Fifth Avenue flagship store, located on the ground floor of the Peninsula Hotel at 55th Street.

Name: JOÏA
Description:
JOÏA is driven by maintaining and developing a know-how recognized throughout the world for its quality.
For more than 15 years, JOÏA has established its reputation with national and international clients. Today, several brand names in jewellery use our skills and expertise. 
Rigour is the key motto of our studio.
Our name, evocative of a dynamic jewellery, reflects its first translation of the former French meaning "joy".
JOÏA's creations celebrate the charm of all women wearing them: daring lines, elegant and feminine curves, the finesse of details...
We offer a tailor-made and personalized piece for all kind of women, extrovert or discreet.

Name: Hopeline Placement
Description: Jewelry Hopeline is a leading placement agency, exclusive to the fine jewelry industry. At Jewelry Hopeline we specialize in recruiting solely for the jewelry industry, this being our area of expertise.

Name: Cameo Italiano
Description:
Michele Di Luca, since he was a child it was very fascinated by skill of engravers and craftworkers.
In the 1957 he founded the “Michele Di Luca”. A company skilled in engraving shell cameos. This company, along the years, became a steady business and in the 1977 Mr. Michele Di Luca receive a very important acknowledgment
 by Chamber of Commerce of Naples.
In the 1980, Mr. Michele Di Luca's sons: Gino, Anna, Pina and Marinella inherit the family business, with “Di Luca Brothers” company, after know also as “diluca 1929”.
Today the family tradition is represented by “Classics” and carried forth by Gino.
Classics is well know for importing and distributing  pearls and hand working of shell cameo and corals, following very ancient craft working techniques. It's engravers are very clever craftworkers. They are able to combine the hystorical technique with a modern vision of the jewel. The result is a very unique jewel. This is “Cameo Italiano”.

Name: CARLA AMORIM JOIAS
Description:
The designer, who has started to draw jewelry in 1993, has been one of the most important jewelers of the brazilian Market.
Carla Amorim was born in Brasilia, at 27 started to criate her own jewelry. She has become one of the main designers in the country, having na importante clients’ listing. Her creative work is based on nature, religion and architecture, bringing up Oscar Niemeyer’s genious lines of work. 
The brand has earrings, rings, bracelets, necklaces and pendants with an unique and delicate finishing, besides being worried with sustainability and social impact. The brand, with stores in Brasilia, Belo Horizonte, São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro and Recife, invests on all its suppliers certification, working with raw materials which are not part of the conflict zone, diamonds certified by the Kimberly Protocol.
Since 2002, Carla Amorim has been promoting annually the Alquimia action. In this ocasion, clientes can use their gold from used jewelry as part of the payment in the designer’s new pieces. The brand receives 18K gold, including jewels from Other brands, such as clasps and broken pieces. After analysing, the weight of the gold is calculated to generate the credit, the upcycling action reinforces the importance of sustainability and consumer awareness. 
In 2019, Carla Amorim developed a partnership with Drops of Amazon, the Amazonia Pendant. The piece is done with a drop of water from Alter do Chão’s Aquifer, reinforcing the importance of the aquifer’s preservation which is considered one of the biggest in the world. The sale of this pendant has its income aimed to the project and the construction of deep wells bringing life quality to the "ribeirinhos’" who are the Amazon Forest guardians. The Project raises funds with the sale of these products and part of the earnings are destined to take drinkable water to the "ribeirinhos" who live in the Amazon.
Carla Amorim reinforces herself as a pioneer on the use of the Minas’ gems with social responsability.

Name: ENAMEL Copenhagen
Description:
ENAMEL Copenhagen is a Danish jewelry brand founded in 2012 by designer Marie Rantzau. Marie ́s love for jewelry started when she traveled around the world and found unique jewelry materials of which she designed the first collections. Marie believes that colors create joy, and these are always an element of ENAMELS universe. ENAMEL Copenhagen jewelry are sold at selected department stores, lifestyle- and jewelry stores in 17 different countries, as well as on our own webshop and store at Gammel Kongevej at Frederiksberg.

ENAMEL Copenhagen creates joy through beautifully designed jewelry created with love for the craft. Our jewelry are harmoniously balanced in design and color. The intention is that the classic recognizability creates joy to the one who wears them. ENAMEL embraces the playful and simple expression to the more extravagant look. The expression can be individualized by mixed and matched with several pieces of jewelry. You decide what feels right for yourself and gives you joy. ENAMEL combines the colorful, playful, and the elegant which gives the jewelry a completely unique look. All the jewelry are made of 18 carat gold-plated sterling silver and produced by carefully selected suppliers. It is our wish that everyone should have the opportunity to wear our jewelry and experience these as a part of the joys of life, celebrations, and memories.
