Name: William Edwards Ltd
Description:
Established in 1993, William Edwards specialises in the design and manufacture of bespoke fine bone chinaware for both luxury hospitality and retail clients worldwide.  

With our in-house design team, printing facilities, and traditional hand decoration processes within our factory in Stoke-on-Trent, England, William Edwards offers bespoke chinaware at an unrivalled pace and quality.  

We create over 50 collections annually, for prestigious 5-star hospitality and restaurant clients such as Claridge’s, Burj Al Arab, The Connaught, The Café Royal, Caprice Group, and The Rosewood London. 

We're always innovating with shape and design, and regularly collaborate with clients such as Michelin-star chefs like Brett Graham and Tom Kerridge to design some of the world's most beautiful yet practical tableware collections.

Our full portfolio can be viewed at: www.williamedwards.co.uk 
  
In 2018, we also launched our new retail division, William Edwards Home, giving everyone the chance to buy our high-quality fine bone china house ranges for the first time. The Home range includes tableware, gift and commemorative items, which are available at www.williamedwardshome.co.uk.

Name: King Jewelers
Description:
Established in 1912, King Jewelers has proudly styled jewelry and timepiece aficionados from around the world. King Jewelers offers bridal consultations for brides and grooms with the expert advice of its in-house bridal stylists and diamond specialists. King Jewelers offers brides and grooms a first-class experience, conveniently offering wholesale diamonds, custom designs for engagement rings and wedding bands, luxury designer bridal jewelry, watches for him, bridal party gifts, and gift registration, as well as engravings, appraisals, and expert jewelry cleaning. 

With two store locations in Aventura, FL and Nashville, TN, King Jewelers has won numerous awards as the Southeast’s top jewelry store and diamond wholesaler. King Jewelers is the luxury destination in Miami and Nashville for fine jewelry, diamonds, and Swiss timepieces. King Jewelers is Miami and Nashville's diamonds and engagement rings wholesale store which specializes in bridal custom designs. 

King Jewelers is a member of the Jewelers of America, the American Watch Guild, and the American Society of Appraisers. King Jewelers has GIA Certified Gemologists and offers expert jewelry and watch repairs. For additional information, please visit www.kingjewelers.com.

Name: MARAIS
Description:
MARAIS, multi-brand boutique housing international luxury designers took residence in 2004 hidden inside the former Turkish Bath House in the iconic Royal Arcade. Inspired by Parisian apartment interior of uninterrupted French walls and parquet flooring, the boutique’s reputable approach in Australia to welcome renowned brands including Givenchy, Balenciaga, Rick Owens, Alexander McQueen, Palm Angels and Off White.

By 2014, MARAIS welcomed a two-floor womenswear boutique at the Parisian end of Bourke Street as a continuum to the brand’s empire. The boutique’s interior incorporated the ambience of a dark castle with an 3000 crystal chandelier centrepiece and draw bridge inspired hallway with knightly mannequins.

Although the mens and womens boutiques sound very different in atmosphere, MARAIS is focused on curating visionary seasonal collections aligned with their DNA. MARAIS’ multi brand concept has also given way to additional partnerships, exclusive events and pop-ups. This has allowed MARAIS to stand out as a brand, rarely seen in the Australian luxury space.

Name: GARAUDE
Description:
Garaude specializes in sourcing, cutting and selling natural colored gemstones. Our collection includes rubies, sapphires, emeralds and spinels. 

Bangkok is the heart of our production. We are sourcing directly from the mines, cutting in house, then distributing to our three offices in Paris, Bangkok and New York. 
Traceability & ethical sourcing are the center of our activity. We master the supply chain from mine to market and the control of our production to guarantee the quality and the absence of treatment of our stones. 

Our founder, François Garaude, fell in love with gemstones when he crossed the Atlantic between France & Brazil after building his own sailing boat. He set sail on a discovery of emeralds. 
Being fascinated by the discovery, he grew a strong connection with the trade & created Garaude in 1981. 

Discover our Natural gemstone collection on our website at: 
https://garaude.com/

Name: Cosmo Group PCL
Description:
Established in 1964 by Chairod Mahadumrongkul, Cosmo Group PLC, together with its affiliated companies, has over 60 years of expertise in the luxury goods sector. We specialize in the production of high-end packaging, display products, and precision watch components, including dials and buckles. In parallel, our Swiss division was launched in Bienne, Switzerland, to provide comprehensive sales and technical support for our European clientele.

From humble beginnings, Mr. Mahadumrongkul founded Cosmo from the ground up in 1964, at a time when we had limited access to advanced technologies, industry experts, and market opportunities. Despite these challenges, we have evolved into a trusted partner for some of the world’s most prestigious luxury watch brands, particularly those from Switzerland.

At Cosmo, our operations are guided by a strong ethical foundation, ensuring that every task is executed with care and precision. Our dedication to quality and integrity starts with a deep understanding of our clients' needs and extends through every stage of production.

Our core focus lies in three main areas: luxury packaging and display solutions, high-precision watch dials, and watch cases and accessories. The unparalleled quality of our products plays a pivotal role in our partnerships with leading global brands. By combining decades of experience with cutting-edge automation and the expertise of our highly skilled team, we continue to drive innovation and excellence across all facets of our operations.

Risultato di una spiccata vocazione insita nel nostro DNA, i progetti esclusivi della ITC si concretizzano in un’offerta di prodotti frutto di costante innovazione nel settore dei Diamanti, e dei Gioielli con Diamante, sempre in linea con le mutevoli esigenze del mercato.

L’orientamento alle principali e inderogabili regole del marketing fa sì che i nostri progetti nascano sempre dai segnali che emergono dal nostro mercato e pertanto il risultato è di un’offerta di prodotto sempre in linea con tali esigenze e pertanto di grande gradimento presso il pubblico.

Distribuiti da una propria rete di Agenti altamente qualificati sono in vendita presso le più importanti Gioiellerie sparse sull’intero territorio italiano. Le sue linee DLS – Diamond Laser System, TOPCLUB, NAMURI, PRIMAMATERIA, sono espressione ineccepibile del lusso e dello stile Made in Italy.

Con sede a Roma, ITC opera sul mercato italiano con una propria rete di 14 agenti, in grado di garantire la copertura dell'intero territorio nazionale, con l'obiettivo di creare in Italia un sistema di gioiellerie specializzate.

Name: MARTIN SARACHAGA
Description:
Un apellido con más de 80 años junto al arte

Inaugurada en 1938 por Juan Daniel Saráchaga que advirtió el enorme potencial que existía en las subastas de arte.

Sus comienzos se centraron en los remates oficiales hasta que en 1958 amplió su negocio a subastas de arte de colecciones privadas. Comenzó a organizar significativos o relevantes remates de obras importantes, que se convirtieron rápidamente en grandes eventos sociales que marcaban agenda en Buenos Aires.

Se concretó un acuerdo con el Hotel Alvear de Buenos Aires hasta el año 1972, período en el que se recuerdan subastas memorables como las de Leticia Vega de Vigil y el de José León Pagano.

A partir de ese momento los hermanos Martín y Juan Antonio Saráchaga se hicieron cargo de la casa junto a su padre. Integran a su actividad la sección de platería colonial y criolla, con notables remates de colecciones de Elisa Peña, Gustavo Barreto, Anasagasti, Gónzalez álzaga y Victoria Aguirre, entre otros.

El gran momento que marcó un antes y un después en la empresa fue la subasta de la colección Moretón, una de las ventas de pintura argentina más importante realizada en Argentina, en la cual se vendió en septiembre de 1973, el óleo " La canción del pueblo " de Emilio Pettoruti que actualmente se exhibe en el MALBA.

Martín Saráchaga, actual CEO & Director de la Casa, conduce junto a sus hermanas María, Manuela y Milagros, los nuevos desafíos de acercar el arte al público.
Location: Buenos Aires, City of Buenos Aires

Name: Aroz Jewelry
Description:
Façonnées par les bijoux de maman. Captivées par ce qui brille. Envoûtées par la tendance. Fascinées par le détail. Passionnées par la création. Zélées pour le beau.
Boîte à bijoux comme coffre à jouets, les matières, les formes et les couleurs ornent leur cou et s’enfilent entre leurs doigts d’enfants. Le jeu mène à l’instinct, leurs goûts s’affinent jusqu’à faire déborder leurs envies. 

Comme le fermoir l’est à la chaîne, la création a pris la place d’indispensable dans l’ambition d’AROZ. Aujourd’hui plus qu’hier les sœurs Sole amènent leur imagination à la brillance de leur passion. D’un voyage, d’un gri-gri ancien, d’un dessin ou d’un presque rien, tout est susceptible de faire germer le premier trait de la prochaine collection AROZ.

Laura et Paola confient les prémisses de leur inspiration à un atelier portugais familial à la production minutieuse et de qualité fait main. De cette collaboration nait leur première collection aux matières nobles que sont le vermeil et l’argent. 

Du coup de cœur pour l’une des créations AROZ à la réception de votre précieux colis, les sœurs Sole parent chaque achat de leur univers délicat, ponctué de petites pépites d’attention.

En toute quiétude, la clientèle d’AROZ prend rendez-vous dans le Showroom AROZ au cœur du Châtelain, un quartier où Bruxelles n’a jamais été aussi belle. Reçue par les sœurs Sole, chacun s’offre un moment privilégié où l’on prend le temps de découvrir les collections sous les vitrines soigneusement décorées, un café à la main. 

Chaque mois, le Showroom discret ouvre ses portes, pour découvrir les collections au cœur de l’atmosphère d’AROZ, suivez la page Facebook et leur Instagram pour connaître les prochains événements

Name: Amarjon Biojoias
strangelove
Description:
strangelove's beguiling oud-based fragrances provoke passion amongst all who experience them. deadofnight, meltmyheart, silencethesea, lostinflowers, fallintostars, and their latest, a firewithin form their collection of lush, pure perfume oils and eaux de parfum. 

Based in New York, strangelove is led by its founder, Elizabeth Gaynes, who works closely with creative director Helena Christensen and brand developer Simone Wicker to create their singular collection. All six scents make generous use of oud and the world's finest ingredients to explore different notions of love. 

deadofnight empowers its devotées to take risks and dive into their deepest desires; it balances oud with Damask rose, natural violet leaves, vanilla balsam, sandalwood, amber and musk; the result is an addictive potion with a lingering sensuality. 

meltmyheart, a sumptuous, oudy oriental, inspires romance and
indulgence, incorporating ingredients like orris butter, sandalwood, ylang-ylang, absinthe, and french sage. 

silencethesea captures the intimacy of the lover's gaze: soundless, eternal,
profound. The ambergris in Silence the Sea is the foundation for an arousing, animalic fragrance distilled from marine mysteries and subterranean depths. 

lostinflowers evokes the thrill of new love; it combines gardenia enfleurage, jasmine, champaca, and saffron with oud for a fragrance that is at once innocent and seductive. 

fallintostars captures a dreamlike, mystical experience of boundless wonder, as lovers transcend time and space. This dazzling fragrance combines jonquil nectar, Indian oud, rosewood, and amber, transporting wearers to another dimension.

afirewithin is a journey through the landscapes of our introspection. With the comforting embrace of vanilla, the swirling embers of incense, and the protective aura of cedarwood, the path back to ourselves is illuminated. At the heart, the power of oud reflects our own resilience in this transformative elixir.

Name: KWANPEN
Description:
KWANPEN was founded in 1938 in Singapore by Master Craftsman Mr. Kwan Pen Seng, who designed and crafted handbags mainly for British aristocrats in Singapore. He then imparted his business and his craftsmanship skills to his sons. 

In 1976, his eldest son, Mr Leonard Kwan decided to become a retailer and opened the first KWANPEN boutique in Singapore on Orchard Road, selling crocodile leather bags under the name Ginza.  Ginza became KWANPEN a few years later to carry on the legacy of its founder.

Now led by Leonard Kwan, the company’s current President, KWANPEN has grown into an international luxury brand specialising in crocodile leather handbags and accessories. 

All creations are, to this day, designed and skilfully made by our team of in-house designers and craftsmen in Singapore. The collections pay homage to the brand’s heritage of superior craftsmanship; creating timeless and luxurious handbags and accessories.

The brand’s presence has expanded from its Singaporean roots to span across Europe and the rest of Greater Asia with boutiques in London, Dubai, Riyadh, Doha, Istanbul, Hong Kong, Macao, Bangkok, Seoul, and Tokyo. 

KWANPEN Boutiques
Singapore | Japan | United Kingdom | United Arab Emirates | Saudi Arabia | Turkey | Qatar | Hong Kong | Macao | Thailand | South Korea

http://www.facebook.com/kwanpen1938
https://www.instagram.com/kwanpen1938/ 
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/KWANPEN

Name: Custom
Description:
Custom is a no-holds-barred custom jewelry shop located in the NoDA Arts District of Charlotte, NC. Started as the anti-jewelry store, shop owners Katie and Lee wanted to create a space where anyone could purchase fine jewelry, without the pomp and trappings of conventional fine jewelers.

The result is Custom -- a light-filled industrial space with concrete floors, avant garde art on the walls, and a bike repair shop in the back. At Custom most days, you'll find our tattooed Jewel-master, Lee, casting, carving, setting, and generally being a jewelry workhorse. You'll find his counter-part, Katie, working her behind-the-scenes design magic. You'll find me, Lindsay, chatting with customers and bloggin' in style. And you'll find our shop dog, Bruce, running around looking for his ball.

İlk Trabzon Hasırı Üretim Fabrikası ve mağazası olarak, Trabzon ve İstanbul illerinde satışımızı sürdürmekteyiz. E-ticaret sitemiz ile Türkiye'nin her noktasındaki Yaşayan Efsane tutkunlarını modern ve öncü tasarımlarımızla Trabzon Hasırı'na kavuşturuyoruz. Satış noktalarımızda perakende ve toptan satışın yanında ürünlerimizin imalat imkanını da sağlıyoruz. Toptan satış ağımız ile Türkiye’nin birçok ilindeki tedarikçi firmalarla Yaşayan Efsane'yi kavuşturuyoruz.  Kuyumculuk sektöründeki ilklerimizden: Atölye-Kafe konseptimiz ile kahvaltısını yapan ya da çayını yudumlayan misafirlerimize, provalı üretim ve kısa sürede ürün revizasyonu imkanı sağlarken, sektörde eşi benzeri olmayan bir alışveriş deneyimi de yaşatıyoruz.
Kuruluşumuzdan itibaren; inovatif çözümler, teknik buluşlar ve ilham veren tasarımlarımızla unutulmaya yüz tutmuş Trabzon Hasırını bugünün trendi haline getirdik. Elizi'yle bir marka haline gelen Trabzon Hasırı, sadece Trabzon yöresindeki düğünlerde tercih edilen bir takı olmaktan çıkmış, Yaşayan Efsane olarak yurdun her köşesindeki düğünlerde de en çok talep edilen mücevher haline gelmiştir. Ayrıca yapmış olduğumuz modern koleksiyonlarla Trabzon Hasırı, global çapta da yoğun ilgi görmüş; Değerli mücevherler arasında, günlük kullanıma elverişlilik bakımından en çok tercih edilen seçenek olmuştur.

Name: Titan Black

Since our inception we have created truly individual designs working on iconic models from the world's finest watch houses without compromising the essence of their heritage.

We have fused the demands of our clients with our love of innovation, which has resulted in the evolution of the exclusive Titan black collection.

Name: Ole Mathiesen A/S
Description:
Ole Mathiesens proud tradition of watchmaking, can be dated back to the year 1845, where the watchmakers Carl Matthæi and J.P. Christensen, founded a watch workshop in the heart of Copenhagen. Until the year of 1919 Alvild Dahl, Christensen and Matthæi produced pocket watches and chronometer watches. In the year of 1919 the famous watch workshop was assigned to the watch specialist Axel O. Mathiesen, that with a new modern take and success managed to redesign the watch workshop and initiate a cooperation with a watch brand from Switzerland. This was the beginning of the family company and of the historic Ole Mathiesen shop in the heart of Copenhagen. 
In 1962 Ole Mathiesen was assigned with the company from his father Axel O. Mathiesen, where he followed the traditional steps of his father as a watch specialist. With an innovative ingeniousness to the craftmanship of watches, among other from his time as a watchmaker in the reputed watch company Jaeger-LeCoultre from Switzerland, Ole Mathiesen created the foundation of a collection of the finest, timeless and classic watches, that still more than 40 year after, almost unchanged, creates great admiration all over the world. 
In the year of 2002 the third generation of the Mathiesen family – Christian Mathiesen was assigned with the company. Since that day he has extended and renewed the classic design from Ole Mathiesen. Furthermore, has Christian Mathiesen extended the historical shop, that still is placed in the heart of Copenhagen at Østergade nr. 8, with international watch brands as Patek Philippe, Jaeger-LeCoultre, A. Lange & Söhne and many more.

Name: FurCanada
Description:
FurCanada is committed to wildlife sustainability and is respectful of the  Indigenous First Nations, Inuit & Metis cultural and inherent right toward the use of fur.  
With that understanding, the company has become very creative 
 in designing, manufacturing, marketing, and education with regard to fur. Under the direction of the company's Master Furrier & Production Manager FurCanada produces, distributes, wholesale & retail finished fur blankets, throws, pillows, carpets, bed runners, and wall hangings for the  Home Decor department.  
Under the direction of the company's Master Taxidermist, FurCanada produces exceptional quality true to form life-like mounted specimens for clients representing museums, gov't agencies, the movie/documentary ( Hollywood North ) industry to private collectors, and food, source & ceremonial harvesters. Both divisions complement one another. at the same time creating a sustainable 100 % value-added Made in Canada product under the companies registered trademark label. 
The creation of fur products produced by both divisions led to the birth of the Fur Education Division. FurCanada has created, through our Research &
 Development 6-Day & 10-Day Seal/ Fur Workshops.  To apprenticeship program for present and future employees,. Leading to a two-year education terms fur design. With the ultimate goal of achieving a 4year bachelor's Degree in business administration majoring in Fur from an accredited university in British Columbia. The company has a 5-year education plan and wishes to implement it in 2023. 

 FurCanada is actively seeking a  financial investor partnership with an Indigenous First Nation organization in return for 51% of the company's shares.

Name: The Institute of Registered Valuers (IRV)
Description:
The Institute of Registered Valuers (IRV) is the UK’s leading register of jewellery, watch and silverware valuers who maintain exacting standards for the longest serving and most recognised valuation trade body, affiliated to the National Association of Jewellers.

A professional and passionate community of valuers since 1984, the IRV has been training, educating and raising the industry standard in the jewellery valuation profession for more than three decades. 

In addition to strict entry criteria, all IRV Members and Fellows must commit to guidelines for Good Practice which includes an ongoing Continual Professional Development commitment and Professional Assessment. Serving the general public, trade and insurance sector. Every IRV must demonstrate verified and proven credentials, qualifications and experience within the jewellery trade.

Name: OMNIASTORES
Description: Omnia Stores is an online Luxury Jewellery Store in Dubai, which offers high quality Sets, Rings, Earring, Necklaces, Bracelets at a reasonable price

Name: Royal Touch Llc
Description: Royal Touch Llc is a luxury goods & jewelry company in the diamond district of NYC

Name: Greene Label
Description:
Greene Label is an exclusive-invite only fine jeweler to high-net worth individuals and families. Greene Label represents high-net worth clients in procuring diamonds, creating bespoke one-of-a-kind jewelry pieces for clients on a worldwide basis. With commitments to producing a luxurious sustainable company, Greene Label works with natural diamonds, natural gemstones, and raw materials in their jewelry. 

The company is led and founded by Michael Greene. Mr. Greene is known as one of the top 5 rated diamond jewelers in the world. Greene Label serves clients worldwide from its headquarters in Manhattan, NY and showrooms in Beverly Hills, CA and Naples, FL.

Name: Allurepack
Description:
Allure Box & Display Co. is a New York-based company supplying presentation products for the fine jewelry industry. Inspired by the belief that every piece of jewelry deserves a dramatic display to showcase its beauty, we blend decades of experience with leading capabilities in trendsetting design to deliver a powerful first impression.

At Allure luxury knows no bounds. Our exciting, dazzling designs are backed by a commitment to sterling service and flexibility on behalf of our clients. We invite you to try our line of premium products, thus enabling your customers to ‘open breathlessness’ – while you ring in the profits.

Name: Bradley's Jewellers York
Description:
Kay Bradley is the owner of Bradley’s Jewellers on Low Petergate, York. Having trained at the International Gemmological Institute in Antwerp, she now specialises in ready-to-wear and bespoke jewellery creations set with natural diamonds, coloured gemstones and laboratory-grown diamonds, as well as unique collections that are designed in-house and inspired by the city of York. 

Kay is the first female retail jeweller in Great Britain to be named an Accredited Retailer of Certified Sustainability Rated Diamonds by SCS Global Services, meaning her business directly connects consumers with diamonds that have met the requirements of the SCS-007 Jewelry Sustainability Standard. 

In 2021, she established Eco Rocks York - a laboratory-grown diamond jewellery brand and e-commerce business that has grown significantly since its launch. In the same year, she was also nominated for two UK Jewellery Awards and was named Independent Fine Jewellery Retailer of the Year at the Professional Jeweller Awards. 

Kay regularly collaborates with British suppliers and manufacturers to make ‘Created in the UK’ an option for her loyal customers, who also appreciate her business’ commitment to the local community and charitable giving.

Name: Gioielleria Bruno Manca Calabrese
Description: Dalla fondazione dell'azienda ad oggi, la nostra mission è accompagnare il cliente con competenza e professionalità.

Name: Gillary Jewelry
Description: Gillary Jewelry has come a long way from its roots of traditional designs. When we first started out, our passion for novel products drove us to do tons of research which led to making connections both locally and globally with graphic designers, precious metals suppliers, high-quality stone vendors, 3D modeling experts, and production professionals. The Gillary team takes pride in these relationships we’ve established so that we can offer our customers the most magnificent jewelry. We are thrilled to now be able to serve customers all over the world and are thrilled that our passions were able to be turned into a growing business.

Name: GAVOX WATCHES
Description:
A Belgian Watch company

Specialized in Company Watches that creates a Long term satisfaction of the Employee and great sentiment of Recognition from the Company 

Higher, Farther, Deeper watches
Watches of excellence for unique people

Registered in 2011 by the grandson of one of the legendary Flying Tigers, GAVOX is a novel brand of high-performance timepieces designed and manufactured for professionals.

GAVOX : Easy to pronounce in every language, the novel name Gavox combines the Greek “galaxias” (our universe, the milky way), and the latin “vox” (voice).

The mission of Gavox, “voice of our universe”, is to produce timing instruments inspired by the exploration of the extremes (Higher, Farther and Deeper),

As a pilot and engineer, the founder wanted a name that reflect his passion for technology, astronomy and exploration.

The GAVOX collections take cues from avionics, and offer various functions such as: alarm, chronograph, military time, mission timers, multiple time zones and perpetual calendar.

Name: Uzman Jewellery
Description:
Uzman Jewellery was founded in 1975 in Istanbul’s Grand Bazaar and has been run by the same family for three generations. We supply responsibly produced jewels to more than 50 countries across 7 continents.

Our speciality lies in 9K, 10K, 14K, 18K, 21K, 22K Gold and Silver jewellery manufacturing with CZ, Diamond and Precious Stones. Our diverse product range includes earrings, pendants, rings, necklaces, bracelets set in a variety of timeless styles.

Customer satisfaction is at the heart of our business and we aim to please our partners with transparent communication, high quality craftsmanship, global requirements, on time delivery and competitive pricing.

Considered one of the most trusted jewellery manufacturers in the world, Uzman prides itself on its quality, ethically sourced and produced jewels and jewellery. We maintain a high standard of certification and strictly adhere to global requirements.

We believe in growing with our partners and building long term relationships that truly sparkle.

Name: Gautam Banerjee Jewellery
Description:
The Gautam Banerjee Jewellery label was co-founded by celebrity jewellery designer Gautam Banerjee and the chief designer Archana Behede 15 years ago.
 
The duo launched their own label out of sheer love and passion for jewellery to deliver high-quality fine jewellery. All the collections under the brand name of Gautam Banerjee define a particular style, facet, or era. The jewellery is exquisite in both construction and design. Customers know the jewellery for its absolute elegance. The unusual stone cuts, design innovations, and luxurious settings extend a dramatic exuberance to the jewellery line.
 
If you want to celebrate with timeless designer jewellery, Gautam Banerjee Jewellery store has an exquisite collection with innovative use of precious gems and minerals. With jewellery set in yellow, rose, and white gold, you can choose the design and gemstones that best suit your personality and requirement. All the jewellery at GBJ is backed by certification and guarantee. You can choose from a wide range of masterpieces – traditional, fusion, or modern; for everyday or special occasions, engagements, weddings, anniversaries, to a gift of love and bonds.
 
The key strengths of the Indian brand include unique designs, superior craftsmanship, and state-of-the-art in-house manufacturing. As a result, you get quality and customized designs and you can even re-fashion your existing jewellery for a contemporary twist.
 
Gautam Banerjee Jewellery is a must-have for anyone who wants to upgrade their designer jewellery wardrobe with masterpieces that offer a high dose of style, fashion, and the longevity to live past trends.

Name: Luxury Projects Atelier
Description: In 2008 after a significant experience working on superyacht projects at a reputable Shipyard, Laura Pomponi founded Luxury Projects (LP) Architecture and Design Studio. Luxury Projects guides clients from the initial concept design and first sketch to the selection of the final touch accessories and art works. Luxury Projects aims at finding the best innovative and technological solutions, the top quality materials to deliver a project, both in yachting and residential sectors, which represents uniqueness, elegance and luxury.

Name: Verma Jewellers
Description:
Welcome to Verma Jewellers, the most trusted jeweller of Himachal Pradesh. Established in the heart of Solan, our journey began with a vision to bring the finest jewelry craftsmanship to our community. 

Over the years, we have expanded and evolved, introducing hallmarking standardization in 2003 and continuously innovating to meet our customers' needs.

Today, Verma Jewellers offers an extensive collection of Gold, Diamond, and Silver Jewellery, meticulously crafted by artisans from renowned jewellery hubs across India, including Delhi, Kolkata, Mumbai, Surat, and Ahmedabad. 

Our exclusive Diamond Jewellery, specially handcrafted by experts, is distinguished by its unparalleled quality and unique designs, making it the most loved brand among consumers in Himachal Pradesh.

With a dedicated team of 150 talented individuals, primarily from Himachal Pradesh, we take pride in nurturing raw talent from rural areas and grooming them into skilled professionals.

For further collaborations, email us at info@vermajewellers.com.

Name: Maison de Garniac
Description:
Expertise, Exigence, Excellence

Maison de Garniac est une société spécialisée dans le négoce et la production de truffes et d'autres produits d'exception. 
Avec l'Université de la truffe soyez en immersion dans le monde mystérieux des truffes via des initiations, ateliers thématiques et culinaires.
Venez découvrir la truffe, de la fourche à la fourchette au sein de notre Maison.

Maison de Garniac strives to offer and deliver truffles and other truly exceptional products.  
With the creation of "Université de la truffe" come and discover the secret world of truffles with truffles initiation, thematic and culinary workshops.
A unique experience to discover truffles from the farm to the fork.

Als je ook nog aangeeft welke interesses jouw lief heeft (zoals bijvoorbeeld Koken, Tafelen & Borrelen) dan krijg je alleen die cadeaus te zien. Name: Aakarshan Jewels
Description:
The Aakarshan Story :

Diamonds and jewelry industry requires you to inspire trust in your customers and we do that pretty well. No wonder in a short span of 11 years,  Aakarshan Gems & Jewels has begun to gain global recognition and won a series of awards.
Aakarshan, a renowned national brand an an emerging global brand today stands for the following attributes:-
a)	Purity-You will get products made from natural diamonds, original gems and pure precious metals. Whether it’s our word of mouth or customer testimonials, they validate our claims and our story.
b)	Pride- Our customers wear our products with pride and the Aakarshan logo is testimony to the fact.
c)	Panache- Our products give our customers a sense of panache, and make a statement about you. They add even more elegance to our elegant customers and a feel of elan and style.
d)	Personalized- Our products are personalised and handcrafted. They reflect your uniqueness to the world.
e)	Patriotism- We are proud of being Indian and no wonder the Indian touch reflects in each of our pieces and design. We believe in “Think Global, Reflect Local”
f)	Pull- Aakarshan means attraction and it creates a pull in your personality, by attracting good fortune, positive vibes, positive people and prosperity
g)	Prettiness- Our products make you look beautiful and pretty, polished and adorned. They add even more charm to your charisma.
Excited to know more? 
Let us tell you our back story. Started in 2012, by a techie turned entrepreneur Shweta Pathak, “Aakarshan Gems & Jewels” is gaining global recognition in a short span of 11 years. 
At Aakarshan we thrive for perfection every day and one of its kind pieces, We do not shy away in giving fair making charges to encourage our artisans to go an extra mile. Each piece at Aakarshan has a story to tell as each piece is uniquely crafted to give the ultimate panache of luxury.

Name: Belperron
Description: In the pantheon of master jewelers from the twentieth century, Suzanne Belperron (1900-1983) stands apart as the only woman.  After beginning her career with Boivin in 1919, she pioneered a new aesthetic in jewelry:  sensual, tactile and arrestingly modern. With influential clients such as Elsa Schiaparelli, the Duchess of Windsor and Diana Vreeland, Belperron is widely recognized as one of the most influential designers of the 20th century.  Asked why she never signed her jewelry, she replied “My style is my signature.”  In 2015, Belperron LLC opened its first flagship salon in over forty years in New York, featuring vintage Belperron jewels and new pieces created from her archive of over 9,200 designs.

Name: Boutellier Montres Pty Ltd
Description: 3rd generation watchmaking family with an international pedigree in fine watches since 1934. Owner and operator of the Rolex Boutique at 70 Collins Street in Melbourne Australia.

Name: Gold Guys
Description:
Gold Guys professionally and discretely buys unwanted diamonds, gold, silver, platinum, and other precious metals. 
A national company founded by Joe Beasy and Shane Maguire in 2008 based in Minneapolis, Minnesota. Gold Guys is a fast-paced, privately held company that believes in integrity and excellent client service.

With friendly, expert staff in each of its 13 beautiful locations, as well as a secure nationwide mail-in service, Gold Guys is the premier option for getting the most out of your unwanted gold, silver, platinum, coins, and diamonds.

Name: Candles Naturally
Description:
An eco-friendly company formed in 2007 providing stunning natural candles, diffusers and accessories to retail and consumers. We carry a huge range of sox wax, beeswax and recycled vegetable oil candles in a variety of styles including bamboo, coconut, recovered glass and bone china.

Candles Naturally products make ideal gifts, decor accessories and are ideal for use in spas with a selection of warming soy wax massage candles. Customers can register for an account by visiting the Candles Naturally website.

Name: Pedemonte Group
Description: Artigianalità, Tecnologia, Servizio.

Name: Fourtané Jewelers
Description:
"At Fourtané everything with a past has a future."  
- John Bonifas, Owner

Fourtané Estate Jewelers is one of the leading estate jewelry and vintage watch retail stores in the country with one of the largest and finest collections in the nation. Our inventory collection consists of authentic fine antique and estate watches and jewelry from the 1800's to present day. Beauty, fine craftsmanship, uniqueness and value are the cornerstones of our philosophy. 

As a strategic partner to both Rolex and Cartier, Fourtané Jewelers boasts one of the largest and rarest collections of new and vintage Rolex and Cartier watches available today. As a premium Rolex and Cartier distributor, our inventory includes exclusive timepieces only available through top partners.

At Fourtané, each customer is helped on a one-to-one basis with an intent of making every experience of buying and selling estate jewelry and watches comfortable, exciting and enjoyable.

Name: Fabrizio Viti
Description:
Fabrizio Viti was born and raised in the small Tuscan city of Carrara, known fondly for its abundance of marble. A strong female presence in his family, coupled with a love of fashion dolls and 1970s TV shows, informed young Fabrizio’s aesthetic world, which, later specialising in sculpture at Carrara’s art school, blossomed into a burgeoning talent for shoe design.

Over the next two decades, Fabrizio’s professional career saw the women’s and men’s shoes he designed steer both the luxury fashion industry and popular culture as he rose to become leading shoe designer at Gucci, then Prada, and in 2004, Louis Vuitton, where he continues to explore his passion as the House’s Shoe Style Director.

In 2016 Fabrizio Viti launched his brand which leads to a world so personal and intimate. 

Fabrizio Viti's creations reveal a love affair with both the art of shoe design and the wonderful women destined to wear them. Across the planet, these are women aged 15 to 85, connoisseurs and the curious alike, whose own identities bring further life to the world that Fabrizio conjures up with his heart and hand.

Name: JEWCY.ICE PARIS
Description:
Passionné et spécialiste  des bijoux, JEWCY.ICE PARIS vient changer votre regard vis-à-vis des bijoux à base de diamant de synthèse. 

Nos Bijoux s'ajustent à tous types de styles vestimentaires. Ils sont d'une qualité exceptionnelle et  irréprochable. 

JewCy.Ice PARIS vous accompagne dans vos choix de bijoux et ça peu importe vos goûts. 

Sublimez votre élégance avec une petite touche de brillance

Name: Vai Ra
Description: Vai Ra makes bespoke dailywear diamond jewellery

Name: DaveriVicenza srl
Description: Dv Italy nasce nel 1999 ma le sue radici traggono forza dall’esperienza di oltre 30 anni nel settore orafo. Il proprietario Massimo Sassoli, inizia infatti a lavorare nella moda nella metà degli anni 70. Nel 1983 inizia il suo percorso nel settore orafo, poi a fine anni 90 la decisione di creare un proprio marchio e dare vita a collezioni che possano esprimere la creatività, l’estro e lo stile.

Name: WILGERMAIN FRAGRANCES
Description:
Wilgermain is a luxury fragrance house founded by industry expert Francisco Gratacós. 

Designed to appeal to both the most demanding fragrance afficionado and the individual buying a niche fragrance for the first time, Wilgermain offers a carefully curated collection of exceptional scents conceived to explore a broad range of fragrant themes. 

Taking inspiration from the modernity and avant garde atmosphere of New York’s Williamsburg and the classic refinement and savoir faire of the Parisian left bank, Wilgermain ensures that originality and wearability are harmoniously balanced.

In order to help him realise his dream, Francisco enlisted the help of a great friend, world-renowned master perfumer Rodrigo Flores-Roux. With more than 30 years of professional experience, Rodrigo is a multi-award winning perfumer whose internationally recognised, best-selling creations are known for their unmistakeable personalities.

The first six fragrances in the collection focus on timelessness with a contemporary and global appeal. Genuine, unique and unexpected yet easy to understand, all the fragrances are masterfully blended with high tech precision and even higher olfactive aesthetics to deliver a perfectly calibrated scented message using the purest, most exquisite raw materials.

Name: wegroup
Description:
wegroup is a leading retail group based in Tbilisi, Georgia, uniting several of the country’s most loved jewelry and beauty brands — REDBERRY, MANDARINA and FALKE.
Founded in 2008, Wegroup has grown into a multi-brand organization with 17 stores nationwide and a passionate team of over 80 professionals dedicated to design, innovation, and exceptional customer experience.

Our portfolio covers a wide range of styles and audiences:
	•	REDBERRY – Exquisite gold and silver jewelry for every occasion.
	•	MANDARINA – Playful, fashion-forward accessories and affordable jewelry for the modern generation.
	•	FALKE premium quality textile.

We believe in creativity, inclusivity, and sustainable growth.
Wegroup’s mission is to deliver high-quality, accessible products and memorable retail experiences while expanding across the Caucasus and Eastern European markets.

We’re more than a retail group we’re a team that turns ideas into thriving brands.

Name: ArtOuro & Gemas
Description: A ArtOuro é uma marca brasileira com o propósito de lapidar o estado bruto das pedras preciosas a partir de matérias-primas rastreáveis com o mesmo carinho e respeito que a natureza usou para criá-las.

Name: Metalzilo
Description:
Fundada em 1950 pelo empreendedor Sr. Victório Reinaldo Dini, a Metalzilo é pioneira na fabricação de armações para óculos e óculos de sol masculinos, femininos e infantis. Há mais de 60 anos atendendo o mercado através de marcas próprias e também terceirizando a fabricação para grandes marcas nos segmentos de varejo e moda. 

Óticas
A Metalzilo possui uma grande variedade de produtos para óticas, com excelente preço e prazo de entrega, e ainda a garantia e o atendimento diferenciado que somente um fabricante nacional pode oferecer.

Grifes, Marcas próprias e Moda
A Metalzilo presta assessoria no desenvolvimento e fabricação de produtos para marcas que desejam oferecer aos seus clientes produtos diferenciados e de alta qualidade, levando sua marca própria a novos patamares de mercado. Investimos continuamente em modernas tecnologias de fabricação, atendendo há mais de 10 anos grifes e marcas próprias em diversos segmentos.  As tecnologias utilizadas trazem flexibilidade e aceleram a criação, desenvolvimento e produção de protótipos personalizados e exclusivos em acetado ou metal. Aprovados os modelos, a fabricação pode ser iniciada imediatamente no Brasil, agilizando a entrega e colocando sua marca um passo à frente no mercado. A Metalzilo fabrica seus produtos no Brasil e oferece atendimento diferenciado, agilidade e reposição garantida a seus clientes.

Revendedor Autônomo
Conquiste uma renda extra revendendo os óculos de sol Metalzilo na sua região. São diversos modelos, cores e tamanhos fabricados com alta qualidade e preços competitivos. Entre em contato para saber como se tornar um revendedor autônomo Metalzilo.

Metalzilo - 011 4093-5000
www.metalzilo.com.br

Name: Lohri AG
Description: Lohri's exquisite jewels are all designed and crafted by experienced goldsmiths in the company's own workshop in Zug's old town and can be discovered at the Oldest House of Goldsmiths in the World.

Name: DEORO S.A.C.
Description:
Deoro is a jewelry company with 30 years of activity dedicated to manufacturing and commercializing custom jewels made in Gold, Silver and other metals.

The corporate projection is to position itself among the best sellers and manufacturers of jewels on the national and international market; in order to attain this objective; the organization is fundamentally immersed in the continuous quality improvement of the products and services we offer to our customers.

Name: Loveweld
Description:
At Love Weld's permanent jewelry studios we offer a one of a kind fine jewelry accessory that is seamless and beautiful. Love Weld is proud to be a pioneer of permanent jewelry, and we are the first brand to specialize in the concept. Our welded jewelry studio offers bracelets, necklaces, anklets, rings, and more--all available in 14k gold. We invite you to book an appointment and experience it for yourself!
If you are hosting a party or a private event, our Events Team can collaborate with you to elevate your event experience. We have experience with all types of events, from corporate gifting and charity fundraisers to a fun filled bachelorette party! Visit our events page for more information and to book your next event with us.

Name: HAYARI PARIS
Description:
HAYARI PARIS is a Parisian luxury brand founded by Nabil Hayari in 2009, renowned for its timeless elegance and bespoke creations. We specialize in made-to-measure Haute Couture and Wedding gowns, niche perfumes, luxury handbags, fine jewelry, and exclusive fashion accessories.

At HAYARI PARIS, we are committed to bringing Parisian refinement into your everyday life, offering clients exceptional craftsmanship and personalized luxury experiences. Each creation is a testament to our founder’s vision of merging artistry with sophistication, making every piece truly unique.

Boutique at : 1 Cour du Commerce Saint André, 75006 Paris
Showroom at : 3 Avenue Matignon, 75008 Paris. 
We proudly serve a global clientele, with over 200 points of sale worldwide.

Discover HAYARI PARIS :
www.hayariparis.com

Name: Gemstones and Jewellery Community Platform
Description:
The Gemstones and Jewellery Community Platform brings individuals and companies together, to collectively improve industry standards of corporate accountability, by taking action towards shared commitments on human rights, fair labour practices, environmental protection, and governance.

The learning Platform offers members free access to resources and tools to enable all entities, from small-scale mining operators down to retailers, to learn more about, and implement, responsible business practices, in a continuous improvement approach.

Name: Remonta AG
Description: Seit 60 Jahren sind wir ein erfolgreiches Produktions- und Distributionsunternehmen der Mondaine Gruppe. Weltbekannte Qualitätsuhren, wie Mondaine, M+WATCH, Luminox und Pierre Cardin zeichnen unsere Kompetenz in der Uhrenmontage aus.

Name: LiJa Jewelry | Goudsmid | handgemaakte sieraden
Description: Handgemaakte sieraden van goud, zilver en andere materialen. Goudsmeden is een écht ambacht, oftewel werken met je handen en uiteraard gereedschappen die hierbij helpen. Description:
Joyería Miguel Relojería es una empresa con más de 40 años de experiencia en el sector. Buscando la mejor relación calidad precio, nos hemos centrado en marcas de joyería que destacan por su diseño italiano. ....Lo siento...estamos en construcción...:)

Name: Klokker México
Description:
Somos un sitio apasionado por los relojes. Somos un cúmulo de contenido y servicios enfocados en la pasión relojera. Buscamos revolucionar la industria con modelos de negocio que se adapten a las nuevas formas de consumo, entreteniendo con lenguaje sencillo y claro, alejado del rebuscamiento técnico y centrado en la experiencia del universo relojero. 

Deseamos ser ese vínculo entre aficionados a la relojería e información relevante, atractiva y actualizada.

Finalmente, KLOKKER desde hace 20 años, cuida, mantiene y devuelve la vida a los tesoros disfrazados de relojes o joyas Contamos con 48 Centros de Servicio alrededor de la República Mexicana, en conjunto con una de las tiendas departamentales más relevantes e importantes en LATAM, que es Liverpool.

En Klokker sabemos que tu reloj es un recordatorio de quién eres y a dónde vas. En él se conectan un cúmulo de memorias, recuerdos y sentimientos; es tu historia.

En Klokker sabemos que este reloj es TU historia.

Name: Von Doren
Description: Von Doren is a Norwegian watch brand that creates high-quality timepieces. Each Von Doren wristwatch is inspired by its Norwegian heritage and brought to life by the finest Swiss movements.

Name: Rodrigues Semijoias
Description:
A Rodrigues Semijoias é uma empresa Atacadista em peças de Prata 925 e Semijoias banhadas a ouro 18k. A empresa é situada em Franca, interior de São Paulo.

The Fourth Showroom Opened In Bawabat Al Sharq Mall In 2011. Each Of Salem AlShueibi Jewellery Showrooms Have The Best, And Rarest And Beautiful International Designs. We Have Made Our Jewellery For The Elite Who Insist On Excellence, So It Is Not Surprising That Our Competitors Have Called Salem AlShueibi Jewellery “Jewellery For Royalty”.

Name: Studex UK
Description:
With five decades of industry knowledge, Studex is recognised as the world’s largest manufacturer of ear piercing earrings and hygienic piercing systems, as well as offering a range of aftercare products and retail earrings to compliment the service.  A great footfall driver, piercing can offer the perfect add-on to bring customers to your business.

Globally, Studex is committed to safe ear piercing, adhering to rigorous health and safety standards for both products and employees.  Piercing systems are produced to FDA Medical Grade device standard with all earrings meeting EU legislation.  Essential is that all piercing jewellery is pre-sterilised and encapsulated, with no contact from the piercer.

Studex UK are incredibly proud of the product range and service that we can offer customers of all sizes, from independent boutiques to national retailers.  We provide a fully supported, first class service to a wide range of industry sectors, including pharmacies, jewellers, salons, studios and clinics.  We are at the forefront of presenting our systems and best practices to health authorities to ensure that our brand is recognised as safe and hygienic.

With a dedicated Customer Service team, we are here to guide you from enquiry to successful launch.  Our Head Office team are fully trained and able to assist with everything from product choice and local council contact to how to market your service.  With large onsite warehouse facilities, we can deliver orders within 48 hours, next day where possible.

We are also incredibly proud to have a highly experienced team of Regional Trainers – many of whom have been piercing for over 25 years.  We can therefore offer onsite training for all new customers.  Our assured training programme focuses on best practice to ensure the safety of both the piercer and consumer with the addition of selling techniques and how to promote your new service.

Working with Studex you can be assured of support every step of the way!

Name: CHARLET BIJOUX
Description:
Charlet, c’est une histoire de famille, c’est un savoir-faire séculaire, c’est un attachement aux racines... Ce nom puisé au cœur des archives de la famille Frojo, fait référence à la bijouterie marseillaise où l’arrière-arrière-grand- père débuta sa carrière en 1854 à son arrivée d’Italie. Dépoussiérée, remise au goût du jour par le descendant de la dynastie, Edouard Frojo, la marque Charlet revoit le jour en 2013. 

Charlet sent bon le Sud, une marque aux accents méditerranéens... Du soleil que l’on retrouve dans l’or travaillé avec finesse et avec soin dans nos ateliers. Un savoir-faire et une connaissance parfaite des bijoux reçus en héritage, qui assurent qualité et excellence dans la fabrication. Aujourd’hui, l’esprit des bijoux Charlet, c’est Valérie Frojo qui l’incarne. Qui mieux qu’elle ne pouvait porter l’aura de cette marque, née de la fibre entrepreneuriale de son mari et puisée au cœur de l’histoire familiale. 

Valérie dessine des bijoux qui lui ressemblent, aussi bien discrets que délicats, puis rock et piquants. Des pièces dans l’air du temps, où la polyvalence est reine avec les pendentifs interchangeables ou encore les boucles d’oreilles détaillées à l’unité. Autant de choix permettant de jouer avec les bijoux Charlet pour coller à sa propre personnalité.

品牌愿景 
将ENZO建立成彩宝的领导品牌。运用其多彩、独特和高端时尚的风格，让拥有珍贵彩宝成为所有女性的梦想

品牌使命 
为消费者不断创新珍贵彩宝，既为她们承载宝贵记忆，也陪伴她们时尚愉悦的每一天。让经典和遥不可及的彩色珠宝进入现代女性生活，绽放她们的独特魅力。

Ali has always been inspired by wearing words and jewelry with meaning. With her signature ear styling, she helps women to creatively curate their own unique looks. Never the minimalist, Ali is all about layering, mixing and wearing diamonds with sweats. As Ali says, “no rules, anything goes”.

Name: Opus India
Description:
At Opus, our mission is to produce definitive publications featuring the finest writers, stunning images displayed on an epic scale and presented in a beautifully-designed, luxury format.

Whether it is honouring football giants Manchester United FC, celebrating the work of fashion icon Vivienne Westwood or reviewing the fascinating history of The Saatchi Gallery, Opus promises to deliver the story of a subject in the most unique and cinematic way. The official cooperation of the governing body, company, club or individual associated with each Opus allows us to take you closer to the biggest names in sport, fashion, music and the arts than ever before.

Words are contributed by the finest writers and interviewers in their fields, accompanied by hundreds of rare and previously unpublished archive images, specially-commissioned photos and beautiful illustrations. Typically, an Opus also contains a number of showpiece gatefolds, which open up to a massive 200cm x 50cm, allowing images to be displayed on an unprecedented scale.

The use of special colour processes, the highest grade paper stocks,and our painstaking attention to detail in reproduction of pictures combine to ensure an unparalleled visual feast. Individually hand-bound and designed to stand the test of time, available in strictly limited edition print runs worldwide and personally signed by legends, every Opus is a collectors’ item offering investment potential and pleasure for generations to come.

Name: Fàbera Jewelry
Description:
The jewelry industry hasn't changed in a century: opaque supply chains, exploitative pricing, zero personalization and a generation that refuses to accept it anymore.

We founded Fàbera to prove that luxury and ethics can co-exist.

Every piece we create tells a complete story; from the responsible mine where the gold was extracted, to the origin of the lab-grown, to the hands of our craftsmen in Florence who bring it to life. Our customers don't just buy jewelry. They co-create it with us through video consultations, watching their piece take shape in our workshop, understanding exactly what they're paying for and why.

This is transparency as it should be: not a marketing claim, but a lived experience.

We've built this with a two-person team, proving that the most powerful brands aren't built on budgets: they're built on trust. 

But we're just getting started.
Our vision is to become the global standard for conscious luxury—proving that beautiful jewelry can be fully traceable, that Italian craftsmanship can scale without losing its soul, and that the next generation of luxury is built on relationships, not retail stores.

We're bringing this vision outside Italy, building partnerships with those who believe the future of luxury is transparent, ethical, and human.

The jewelry industry is ready for change.
Join us in building it.

Name: Morphy Auctions
Description:
Morphy Auctions in Lancaster County, Pennsylvania has become one of the great success stories of the antiques auctions trade. Founded by Dan Morphy in 1997. Morphy’s has realized tremendous growth and set numerous world antique auction records in many categories, while attracting a global following of buyers that grows exponentially with each successive sale.

We are one of the largest under-roof auction houses in the country, spanning over 45,000 sq. ft.  The building is customized to meet the growing and changing needs of the antiques industry. Our goal is to provide the best overall buying and selling experience for our customers.

Name: ZAMAAN
Description:
Welcome to Zamaan,
Your number one source for all traditional Timeless Timepieces. We’re dedicated to providing you the best of watches, with a focus on dependability. customer service, and quality.

What do we stand for?
Ambition, passion, tradition. These are the principles that Zamaan is built upon. Dedicated to capturing the flow of time, we strive to deliver not timepieces, but pieces of time. A watch that does more than tell the time, it tells a story. The story of a grandfather. The story of a kid. The story of a generation. Watches that arent made to be thrown away, but passed down to the people that will carry forth a legacy.

Zamaan watches are made for the people that want to leave something behind that, with time, will only increase in value. Maybe not fiscally, but perhaps emotionally. Picture this; your father or uncle or brother hands you an old watch for your 17th birthday. At first glance you’re disappointed, but then comes the story. Turns out this watch belonged to your grandfather and his father before him, worn during the second World War, the watch has witnessed things we can only read about. It has witnessed happiness; The first moonlanding, the fall of the Berlin wall, or maybe even the marriage of your parents. It has witnessed horrible things; 9/11, War, terror.

And now comes your story. Empty pages that are to be filled with your accomplishments. The watch carries your willpower, pain, and passion. It does nothing but watch. It stands with you during your hardest times, and smiles at you in your best. And maybe when your son reaches his 17th birthday, you can hand him that same watch and it will be his turn. A watch without time, a watch with a story, Zamaan

Name: BONAVENTURA
Description:
BONAVENTURA
 - INFINITE GOOD LUCK AND HAPPINESS - 

Embark joyfully on life's journey with BONAVENTURA, where tradition, passion, and elegance converge. Our story finds its roots in Italian craftsmanship, blending timeless techniques with mindful design. Essential shapes, premium materials, and exquisite colors are meticulously combined with an unwavering attention to detail.

Description:
We bring to the world ltalian creativity and technology through "Made in ltaly" design and production of chains and jewellery. These items are precious, stylistic expressions of beautifully made jewellery. 

SILO is a large company specialized in goldsmith technology, design and production of chains and jewellery in both precious and non-precious materials. 
Research capability, innovation, industrialization and tailor-made production make up our strong points. 

SILO GOLD -  is at the heart of the company and characterizes both its history and its specialization: gold necklaces, bracelets, earrings and bangles are the wonderful marriage between tradition and technology.

SILO TECH - combines ICM's years of experience with research and continuous innovation to create machines and technology for the entire production processes.  ICM, the historic company manufacturing technology for the production of chains, is the driving force of our technological division today.

SILO DESIGN - is our creative division with a real Style Lab. This is the place where our designers, tech specialists and expert craftsmen develop new ideas and prototypes and developing chains, jewellery and accessories that are unique.

SILO FASHION - our fashion industry division is identified by our brand “MADE4FASHION” This division is specialised in the production of chains and accessories in non-precious metals such as steel, aluminium, brass and bronze. These are just some of the materials used to give form and substance to the ideas of fashion designers.

SILO LIFE - SILO follows an ethical production, respecting its workers safety and pursuing zero environmental impact in accordance with Italian ad European regulations. 
SILO has a responsible approach to all operational processes, confirmed by the adoption of certified management systems. The standards followed are those of the highest international certifications for quality, environment, health and safety.

Name: M&B Private Jewelers
Description:
M&B Group has been operating in the global diamond industry for over 30 years, encompassing everything from mining, to sourcing, diamond cutting and polishing, and of course jewelry making. In 2017, we founded M&B Private Jewelers to provide a retail boutique experience with shops in Singapore and Hong Kong, and a plan to expand within the APAC region. In 2021, having noticed the growing demand for lab grown diamonds, we formed our partnership with Diamond Foundry and founded Lab Grown Diamonds Centre in Hong Kong.

The M&B DNA

We know everyone says they put their customer first, with the highest emphasis on quality, service, variety and competitive pricing; but with us, you’re truly at the center. No matter if you’re after fashion jewelry, intricate custom designs, $5 million diamonds or a lab grown engagement ring - we have one all-around approach which we practice throughout our businesses.

Our mission is to find and manufacture natural and lab grown diamonds that will hold their value and always be high in demand - giving you a smarter deal. We simplify each purchase, while imposing strict quality control, ensuring top notch diamonds and a perfect match to your needs and budget.

Your Journey with us

When you browse our website you won’t be lost in a sea of choices, carat weights, color grades and all other letters and numbers that would overwhelm almost anyone. Instead of confusing you, we will give you focused information that will actually help you make an expert choice. Within each category (shape or budget), you will find a variety of options, all of highest quality and parameters, so you can narrow it down to what suits you. 

As the selection on our website is only a fraction of our inventory, if you can’t find what you’re looking for here, your wish is our command! We’d be more than happy to source or manufacture anything you want - all our designs are done in-house and each piece of jewelry

Name: Zoland Jewelers
Description:
Zoland Jewelers specializes in diamonds and jewelry, retail and wholesale. Founded by Leon Zoland in 1929, we are a third-generation family-owned and -operated business. Located in the heart of NYC’s historic 47th Street Diamond District, our clients come to us from around the world. Today, the Zoland team honors its legacy, providing only the highest quality, value, and service.
 
Our clients rely on us for our expertise coupled with our creativity, knowing we will find – or design – the right piece to fit their taste and budget. At Zoland, we create jewelry to cherish – beautiful pieces that express love and capture unique life experiences.

Name: Gaviria
Description:
Gaviria is an advanced contemporary jewellery brand inspired by contemporary arts and culture. Our values are driven by multicultural lifestyle, fearless and open-minded spirit.

Founded in 2015 by designer Paula Gaviria, who previously studied at CSM and worked at WGSN, Karl Lagerfeld and Inditex and was later joined by Miriam Estévez who brought in her knowledge of luxury after studying at the Richemont School and collaborating with brands including Chloé, Cartier and Piaget.

Simple yet exuberant, Gaviria designs are the result of the designer’s roots and heritage, Colombia and Spain.

Their distinctive vision of jewellery has taken the designers to develop a brand in which innovation through colours and materials is one of the main values.

Gaviria's pieces have a reminiscence of the essentialism, looking for a logic through design, but always searching for unusual materials in the jewellery world, such as cellulose acetate, recycled plastic, powder coating or chromed colours.

All the pieces are designed and hand-crafted in Barcelona by expert artisans mixed with the use of industrial technologies.

Name: Mayfair Diamonds Limited
Description:
Mayfair Diamonds Limited is a specialist luxury brokerage, offering a fast, discreet and highly secure way to buy diamonds and precious stones at wholesale prices.

Our consultants have over 50 years of combined experience in working closely with customers to find the perfect stones and jewellery pieces. Much of this experience has been gained with the world's most respected brands, including De Beers, Graff and Tiffany & Co.

Based in the heart of London's Mayfair, but with the ability to trade internationally, we are able to source the finest certificated precious stones for our clients and provide a comprehensive luxury service whilst offering a significant saving on retail pricing.

Mayfair Diamonds is uniquely placed to offer the following services:

- Unmounted, fully-certificated colourless and coloured diamonds and precious stones. All of our stones are supplied direct from source.
- Bespoke jewellery design, including engagement rings, bracelets, necklaces and earrings. All of our work is undertaken by top international manufacturing jewellers based in Hatton Garden.
- Trade-in and part-exchange of your existing jewellery, diamonds and watches.
- Brokerage of sale for any diamonds, jewellery and watches.
- Jewellery valuation for insurance, probate, family division and market value.
- Brand new gentlemen's and ladies' watches offered at substantial discounts. We  specialise in sourcing limited edition and rare prestige watches including Patek Philippe, Audemars Piquet, Brequet, Hublot, Richard Mille, IWC and many others.

All of our services are offered with confidential, private and secure viewings in the heart of Mayfair also Internationally, including the Geneva Free Port, Dubai Free Port and Hong Kong.

Name: Andreoli
Description:
Andreoli is an American purveyor of haute joaillerie with proud Italian heritage. The Andreoli journey commenced in Italy in 1945, when the Hadjibay family established itself as a leader in the precious gem industry. By the 1970s, the company evolved, designing and handcrafting vibrant and bold fine jewelry pieces at its factory headquarters in Valenza, Italy, where its jewelry is still made today.

Andreoli’s team of devoted artisans is known globally for blending brilliant diamonds, rubies, emeralds, and sapphires with unusual and eclectic stones like pearls, coral, and turquoise. The house uses precious metals like platinum and titanium to create light and airy designs, while incorporating materials like mother of pearl with fine colored gems for a timeless yet unique statement.

With lead jeweler Caroline Hadjibay at the helm, in concert with patriarch Jack Hadjibay, the brand now calls New York City home, operating from its Rockefeller Center headquarters – a stone’s throw from the industry-renowned Diamond District. Looking to the future, Andreoli is constantly innovating while keeping elegant luxury, exuberant Italian design, and an ageless American identity at the forefront of its mission.

Andreoli fine jewelry is available at its New York atelier and in select stores nationwide, including Neiman Marcus.

Instagram: @andreolifinejewelry
Facebook: @AndreoliJewelry 

Corporate Contact: Caroline Hadjibay
Email: Caroline@andreoliusa.com

With this model, we can make a huge impact in the world, while running a sustainable and competitive business.

Our Three Promises

01. You Change Another Life Forever
Every ring helps build a water project for a community in a developing country, and is directly responsible for giving one person from that community access to clean water. Learn More About Our Social Impact.

02.  You Get a High Quality Ring

03.  Top Notch Service
A once-in-a-lifetime purchase deserves one-of-a-kind customer service. We look forward to helping you find your dream ring.

 Sarkissian Studio is a high-quality jewelry design creation company specializing in product rendering, animation, and 3D development for creative solutions. Located in Delaware, the company is led by a team of 30 designers and content creation specialists aiming to offer a new look on the jewelry look with the use of innovative design tools. 
 
The company was founded in 2017 and is led since this time by Gevorg Sargsyan, an international digital content creation expert with over 10 years of experience in the field. Sarkissian Studio helps jewelry and luxury goods producers, manufacturers, and sellers in the US, the UK, France, Sweden, and Israel. Sarkissian Studio is a proud partner of jewelry giants like Brilliant Earth, Empire Casting House, Silvia Bernaul, and Angelic Diamonds.
 
 
 The team of design enthusiasts and 3D content creators will make sure that all your advanced ideas are illustrated on paper in detail, designed using modern animation and 3D tools, and represent our wide creativity in your product design by using programs like Gemvision Matrix, RhinoGold, ZBrush, and Maxwell Render:
 
- Design Sketching
- Model Creation
- Jewelry 3D Visualization
- Renders Development
- Social Media Rendering
- 360-Degree Animation

 You can find the design service that Sarkissian Studio offers at www.sarkissian.pro

A family-owned business that values their employees and embodies their cultural motto: Work Hard, Have Fun, and Take Care of Each Other.

In addition to being a destination for the perfect engagement ring, Reis-Nichols designs and manufactures one-of-a-kind jewelry and has professional watchmakers in their certified watch repair facilities.  Reis-Nichols is also an authorized retailer to many internationally known luxury brands such as Rolex, Patek Philippe, David Yurman, Roberto Coin, Mikimoto, JB Star, Cartier, Breitling and Tag Heuer, to name but a few.

With two locations in the greater Indianapolis region, they are the area’s premier jeweler with a focus on providing personalized service.  Their free-standing flagship store exceeds 11,000 square feet, and is located on the north side in the luxury retail shopping district of Indianapolis. Our dedicated team of fine jewellery specialist are passionate about producing fine color diamond and precious gemstone jewellery including a beautiful selection of engagement rings , wedding rings , eternity rings .
We offer a fully professional jewellery design service with an experienced team of jewellery designers , master goldsmiths and fancy color diamonds specialists ( G I A certified pink blue green yellow orange black white diamonds )

Name: Sophie Bille Brahe ApS
Description:
Sophie Bille Brahe is a Copenhagen-based fine jewellery designer. Graduated from London’s Royal College of Arts, fine jewellery designer Sophie Bille Brahe’s eponymousbrand is sold in some of the worlds’ most esteemed luxury and fine jewellery spaces and stores. 

Sophie Bille Brahe offers pieces that reflect her thrill for storytelling, always striving to twist modern luxury.

Discover the collection at www.sophiebillebrahe.com

Name: TOMO
Description:
Founded in 2020, TOMO is more than a brand; it is a transformative force with a mission to empower the individual spirit. Our journey began with a clear purpose: to inspire people to recognize and embrace their unique potential, often obscured by doubts and limiting beliefs. Serving as a beacon of empowerment and authenticity, TOMO transcends conventional limits, challenging norms, and urging individuals to break free from self-doubt and self-imposed limitations. We exist to illuminate the path to self-discovery and personal fulfillment, driven by a profound belief in the power of authenticity and the capacity for personal and societal change. 

Sustainable Harmony

Sustainability is the cornerstone of TOMO's strategic pillars. Each product we craft resonates with an eco-conscious ethos, stepping towards a greener world and leading the way to a sustainable future.

Genuine Self-Expression

Authenticity thrives when we express ourselves genuinely. At TOMO, we foster individual self-expression, creating products that amplify personal identity. By celebrating uniqueness, we unlock boundless empowerment and confidence, opening the door to a world of authenticity and empowerment.

Nourishing Communities, Fostering Hope

The Giving Back pillar embodies our commitment to social responsibility. Our promise to provide clean water to underserved communities creates ripples of change that touch lives and transform societies.

Name: MJJ Brilliant Inc.
Description: From design to sell-through, and at every point along the way, MJJ Brilliant fully supports our customers and partners. We pride ourselves on our commitment to understanding our accounts and their customers, and use data from point-of-sale to help plan our collections and ensure that they’re designed and priced right. We work diligently with our accounts to make sure that all their assortment needs are met, from volume drivers and cover pieces to that special item that adds sparkle to the store’s fashion assortment. And we back our merchandise with the service and support that lets the retailer know that MJJ is there every step of the way.

Name: Brown & Newirth Ltd
Description: Brown & Newirth have been creating the finest wedding and partnership rings since 1967. Today, we continue that work handcrafting jewellery with enduring beauty and exceptional craftsmanship that last a lifetime.

Name: Reis Kuyumculuk
Description:
1982 yılının Mayıs ayında, sade bir bahar sabahında doğmuştur Reis. Dönemin Hümeyra pasajı olarak ünlenen, Hak pasajının ahşap, mütevazi ceviz ağacından bir köşesinde filizi ateşlenmiştir…
2010 yılında; ailenin genç, yenilikçi, üretici bireyleri ile minimal bir çizgi ile hayata yeniden başlamış, ‘altın’ gibi gösterişli bir kelimeyi, mütevazi bir hale getirmeyi hedeflemiştir.

‘Kuyumcu’ kelimesini ağırlığından, pırlantanın dayanılmaz hafifliğine doğru açmıştır yelkenleri. Klasiğin kıymetini, geleneğinden geleceğine gün ve gün sadeleştirerek ilerlemektedir. Ülkemizde bir Reis imzası haline gelen minimal tasarımlar, bugün Hak Pasajı, Nişantaşı, Alaçatı, Bağdat Caddesi ve online mağazaları ile dünyanın her ülkesine, her şehrine, her ele, bileğe ulaşmaktadır.
Uluslararası tasarımcıları, iş ortaklıkları, Reis ailesinin enerjisi ile 1982’deki filizi ile aynı heves ve heyecan ile tasarımlarını sürdürmektedir.

Ticarette maddiyat, oyunun kaçınılmaz kuralıdır. Fakat asıl motivasyonunuzu hayalleriniz belirler. Her şeyiniz varken bir fazlasını değil, hiçbir şeyiniz yokken tüm dünyayı hayal edin.
Sizin içinde olduğunuz her yer bizim dünyamızdır. Bu hikayenin kahramanı olan sizlerle birlikte nice sade güzelliklere…

Name: AZZARO COUTURE
Description:
Fondée en 1967 par le couturier Loris Azzaro, la Maison s’est fait connaître en habillant de ses robes et fourreaux les plus belles femmes du monde telles que Sophia Loren, Jane Birkin, Marisa Berenson ou encore Natalie Portman.
Visionnaire à l’esprit libre et anticonformiste, Loris Azzaro insuffla son hédonisme sans concession au service d’une couture festive et audacieuse. Le style que le créateur a développé est une histoire de silhouette, de ligne, de construction architecturale qui se reconnaît dans la fluidité d’un drapé, la vibration d’un lamé et des éclats de broderie.
La Maison traverse les décennies et les modes sans rien perdre de son pouvoir de séduction, survivant ainsi à la disparition de son fondateur en 2003. Elle a célébré son 50e anniversaire avec une rétrospective événementielle au Musée des Arts Décoratifs en 2018 et continue d’attirer nombre de célébrités françaises et internationales comme Scarlett Johansson, Cara Delevingne, Carla Bruni, Juliette Binoche ou encore Gwen Stefani.
Les Ateliers toujours sis au 65 rue du Faubourg Saint-Honoré au côté du Salon Couture, pérennisent son patrimoine Couture et savoir-faire atypique.

Name: Charlotte Chesnais
Description:
Charlotte Chesnais is a creative director, whose elegant, sculptural creations for her namesake jewelry brand transformed taste in accessories and repositioned vermeil as a luxury and sustainable material. 

The brand retains its intimacy despite its international reach. Charlotte Chesnais is avant-garde in that way too, a designer of our time, with her own universal language.

Name: Kronotime
Description: Representar distintas franquicias de Joyería, Relojería y Accesorios, como Invicta LATAM, Casio, Tommy Hilfiger Watch, Movado, Swarovski, Sterling, entre otros, ofreciendo a nuestros clientes a nivel nacional una diversidad de productos importados de alta especificación sinónimo de calidad, moda y servicio. Nuestra ventaja competitiva es la excelencia y satisfacción en el servicio, fundamentada en la calidad de las personas que la conforman, el respaldo y el trabajo continuo en mejorar los procesos, garantizando el compromiso en satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Name: JIMMYJANE
Description:
JimmyJane was founded on the inclusive principle that everyone deserves to experience shame-free, sex-positive pleasure to empower their overall well-being. We believe that intimate wellness should be unapologetically fun and adventurous. Our luxe, best-in-tech toys and accessories have been praised by editors like Cosmopolitan, GQ, InStyle, and Vogue. 

JimmyJane was founded in 2003 and acquired by Diamond in 2014.

Name: HuntStreet
Description: Based in Jakarta, Indonesia, HuntStreet.com is your one-stop online destination for affordable authentic pre-loved and brand new luxuries. Guided by our 5S (Simple, Sincere, Safe, Service, and Save $$$), we make the process easy and transparent for the buyers and sellers, and while offering the highest level of customer service and the best value, we guarantee that every product featured on our website is 100% authentic or money-back guarantee.

Description: At the end of the graphics work day, the stones call to me. Evenings are spent creating one-of-a-kind designs that never fail to become the focal point of an outfit...whether that outfit is jeans and a sweater, a suit or an evening dress. These creations are unique pieces of wearable art.
