Description:
Niquesa Fine Jewellery creates exceptional collections and provides a bespoke creation service in its exclusive Belgravia atelier by appointment only. 

Niquesa Fine Jewellery | Belgravia atelier | 19 West Eaton Place | London

Name: Accutime Watch Corp.
Description:
Accutime Watch Corp. founded in 1967 and headquartered in New York City, is considered one of the fastest growing companies in today’s fashion watch market.  Accutime designs, manufactures, and markets on-trend, private label, branded fashion watches for Men, Ladies, Junior’s, and Kids.

Accutime products are sold nationally and internationally at leading department and specialty stores, catalogs and national chains.  Our offerings consist of select licensed brands, private labels, and celebrity designers.

Name: Pragnell
Description: Pragnell is a sixth generation, British family run jeweller with a rich and royal heritage, spanning over 170 years. As one the UK’s last full-service jewellers, all Pragnell fine jewellery is handcrafted in British workshops by our highly trained craftspeople, using gemstones of exceptional beauty and quality. Pragnell’s showrooms are located in Mayfair, Leicester and Stratford-Upon-Avon

Name: M.S. Rau
Description:
M.S. Rau has been a French Quarter landmark for over 100 years, earning the trust of discerning antiques collectors worldwide. Our 30,000 square foot gallery literally overflows with remarkable collections of fine art, exquisite jewelry and exceptional 18th-and 19th-century antiques, and our highly trained sales staff, research associates and support personnel are second to none. Our primary mission is to provide our customers with an unparalleled antiques shopping experience, a mission that we adhere to both in our gallery, on our website, through our printed catalog and at the many shows at which we exhibit around the world.

Our selection is extensive and spans almost all categories of fine antiques, art and jewelry. So, whether you are looking for a rare diamond, a Paul Revere sterling bowl or a painting by Renoir, you are likely to find it here, at M.S. Rau. If you don't find what you are looking for, please let us know. Over the past century, we have built an incredible network of contacts around the world and we are confident that we can assist you in finding just the right pieces for your collection. Visit our website. We are here to assist you in any way, and we hope you enjoy M.S. Rau. (866) 285-5605

Name: Hagley West
Description:
At 47 years old CEO and Hagley West founder, Tim Hayden abandoned his steady income to pursue his passion of creating a global watch brand solely from his kitchen. Tim risked it all after selling his home to create his business, but just three years later he surpassed his greatest expectations.

This ethos recognises that life is a continuous process of learning, evolving, and overcoming challenges, and encourages individuals to find joy in the present moment rather than constantly striving for future achievements. Ultimately, it reminds us that success lies not only in achieving our goals but also in finding fulfilment along the way.

"No two journeys are the same, whether they be emotional, physical, mental or spiritual; but every journey is marked by time." 

Tim Hayden is a former captain of the cricket team West Hagley CC. It became fitting that Tim would first turn to the cricketing community to help promote the brand and the HW Journey. The HW journey has a mission, to take on the overpriced and out dated watch industry.

In 2023, Hagley West became the fastest growing watch company in the world selling products to 107 countries.

#LoveYourJourney

Name: Naveed's Gems & Jewellers LLC
Description: We deal with the best quality natural Gemstones

Name: Selema Gold سليمة جولد
Description: Since1968, when Youssef Selema founded Selema Gold, our mission through generations has been offering modern, luxurious products that embody the story of Selema’s heritage from grandfather to grandson. With over 50 years of experience and excellence.

Name: ORLOV
Description:
FOR NOW AND FOR EVER ORLOV.

THERE IS A NATIVE OPULENCE AND A BOLD CONFIDENCE THAT CHARACTERISES ALL ORLOV JEWELRY DESIGNS - PARTIALLY LINKED TO THE SPECTACULAR GEMSTONES AND DIAMONDS THEY INCORPORATE. THESE ARE DRAMATIC JEWELS THAT EMBODY A GRANDEUR THAT NEEDS TO BE SEEN, HELD AND WORN, TO BE BELIEVED. 

ORLOV IS A COMPANY WITH THE SPIRIT OF MONTE CARLO, FOUNDED IN 2011 BY ANGELA AND CHRISTIAN ORLOV.

PASSION AND ATTENTION TO DETAIL CONNECTS THE ENTIRE PROCESS, FROM SOURCING TO THE IN-HOUSE DESIGN AND FINALY TO OUR ATELIER IN VALENZA, ITALY. 

COMMITMENT TO TRANSPARENCY AND THE USE OF ONLY NATURAL DIAMONDS AND PRECIOUS GEMSTONES ARE MOST IMPORTANT TO US.

ORLOV IS THE ALCHEMY BETWEEN ANGELA'S PRECIOUS POETRY AND CHRISTIAN ORLOV'S KNOWLEDGE OF STONES, A LABOUR OF LOVE THAT THRIVES ON QUALITY, CRAFTSMANSHIP AND EXACTING STANDARDS.

ORLOV MONTE CARLO SARL

Name: Park Lane Jewelry
Description:
Park Lane Jewelry, Founded in Chicago in 1955, defines 'The American Dream'. As the world's leading direct sales jewelry party plan company, Park Lane proudly offers exceptional quality jewelry that is backed by an unconditional guarantee. 

Park Lane is a debt-free company enriching lives and empowering women by offering career opportunities as Fashion Directors. With Park Lane, our Directors are paid weekly and can earn unlimited incentives such as: Travel Trips, Cash Bonuses, Car Bonus Programs, diamonds, jewelry, designer outfits, etc. 

The matching value Bonus Item for customers, the Five Star hostess reward program, and the opportunity to have a home-based business as a Park Lane representative are just a few of the extraordinary incentives that make Park Lane an industry leader. As it has since 1955, it all begins with the jewelry!

Description:

As America’s favorite jeweler for more than 65 years, Ross-Simons has provided exceptional service and delivered fabulous jewelry to more than four million customers. Luxury Brand Holdings was formed in 2011 to encompass the expansion of the company’s brand offerings as the Sidney Thomas chain of upscale jewelry stores was introduced. Description:
MRP est entreprise familiale, créée en 1953, spécialisée dans la fabrication de boites de montres complètes haut de gamme (de la fabrication d’outillage jusqu’au montage final de la boite). Elle compte environ 150 employés.

MRP travaille pour différentes marques horlogères.

Name: ROX - Diamonds & Thrills
Description:
Award winning luxury retailer ROX is one of the UK’s most exciting and inspiring jewellers, with exceptional customer service and daring designs at the heart of the company. 

From its flagship stores in Glasgow’s famous Argyll Arcade and Edinburgh's iconic Assembly Rooms on George Street, and its boutiques at the leading shopping destinations of Braehead, Aberdeen's Union Square, Newcastle's Monument Mall and Leeds Trinity ROX brings you breathtaking diamonds, luxury watches and contemporary cutting edge designer jewellery straight from the catwalk. ROX has an uncompromising commitment to closely following the latest trends. Acting as a barometer for new designs and trends, ROX introduces exciting jewellery and watches every week.

Choosing a luxury watch or jewellery is where your love for that treasured item should be ignited. ROX takes as much pride in that experience as you will have in wearing it. And like your chosen treasure, we promise to make the experience last.

Our loyal customers are given the red carpet treatment from the moment they set foot in a ROX store - from stunning contemporary design to the inviting leather lounge chairs and the unrivalled level of personalised customer service, ROX aims to make you feel like an A-list celeb. ROX stores are designed to make you feel equally comfortable with asking for advice, or being left alone to consider your purchase privately over a complimentary glass of champagne or chilled beer.

Name: Guillermo Vazquez Joyería
Description:
Guillermo Vázquez se especializa en la confección de joyas de oro con gemas preciosas y semipreciosas. Sus joyas gozan de un diseño y acabado de primera, con el 100% de garantía respecto al material utilizado en su producción, joyas que cumplen con los requisitos de calidad que impone el Ecuador y el mundo.

La empresa incursiona en la rama relojera y hoy en día es comercializadora importante de joyas y relojes de calidad que impresionan por sus diseños y elegancia. Joyería Guillermo Vazquez es distribuidor de marcas de relojes Suizos, entre las marcas que se distribuyen se destacan Ulysse Nardin, Longines, Rado, Tissot y Calvin Klein. Guillermo Vazquez distribuye también importantes marcas de joyería italiana como NANIS y Bronzallure.

Contamos con 12 puntos de venta en 7 ciudades de Ecuador.

Name: CRESUS
Description: Précurseur dans la vente et l'achat de montres et bijoux de luxe d'occasion, Cresus œuvre pour vous proposer une gamme d'exception depuis 28 ans. Avec un atelier horloger agréé, nos produits sont authentifiés, révisés, certifiés et garanties 2 ans. Présent dans toute la France, à travers 5 boutiques (Paris, Lyon, Bordeaux, Aix-en-Provence, Lille) et notre site e-commerce (www.cresus.fr), nous vous proposons, avec une équipe de 45 passionnés et experts, un modèle cross-canal qui intègre au mieux les exigences de nos clients aussi bien en termes de choix, avec des nouveautés chaque jour, d'expertise et de services VIP. Les amateurs d'horlogerie et de joaillerie d'occasion trouveront les plus grandes manufactures horlogères (Rolex, Omega, Patek Philippe, Jaeger-LeCoultre, Breitling, IWC...), ainsi que des pièces issues de grandes Maisons de joaillerie (Cartier, Boucheron, Chaumet, Pomellato, Messika...). Dans le but d'aller plus loin dans notre expertise, nous proposons également une offre complémentaire ; une sélection de marques horlogères vendues neuves : Hegid, Ralf Tech, Trilobe et Konstantin Chaykin. Celles-ci sont disponibles dans nos différentes boutiques et sur notre site internet. Vivez l'expérience Cresus !

Name: Paul Wild GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Welcome at Paul Wild

Since man first walked the earth, coloured gemstones, the miracles of nature, have fascinated people for their spiritual properties, mysterious aura, and rare existence. Today, jewellery created with coloured gemstones is once again cutting-edge. For those serious about investing, it is vital to have a trusted supplier. Given that we take the vast majority of our stones from source to sale, we can guarantee that the information we provide about their origin, quality and value is true. This unique attribute distinguishes us from many other gemstone businesses and is invaluable to our clients.

Founded in 1927 by Paul Wild in Kirschweiler. We have carved out a significant niche in the international gemstone business. Today, our company operates its own mines in all the important mining regions of the world. In 2012, we have further established our presence in Asia. In bringing the gemstones all the way from the mines to the jewellers, our reputation has been recognised internationally.

We inspire world-leading jewellery design companies to create desirable items that are extraordinary. For our clients’ convenience, we are happy to share with them both our knowledge and understanding as to what exactly they are purchasing.

Name: Hodinky PRIM
Description:
VÝROBA ČESKÝCH HODINEK PRIM Z NOVÉHO MĚSTA NAD METUJÍ

Jsme jediným domácím výrobcem mechanických náramkových hodinek PRIM. Kompletní produkci hodinek včetně strojků můžete v rámci České republiky vidět pouze u nás, v Novém Městě nad Metují. Mechanické hodinky z naší nejvyšší modelové řady se strojkem vlastní konstrukce se skládají z přibližně 140 dílů a více než 90 % z nich produkujeme přímo v naší manufaktuře. Náročnou metodou třískového obrábění, která zaručuje výjimečnou kvalitu, vyrábíme pouzdra pro všechny naše hodinky, včetně řady PRIM Automatic a PRIM s mechanickými a quartzovými švýcarskými strojky.
Location: Nové Město nad Metují, Česká republika

Name: MAGAL GROUP
Description:
We're an e-commerce jewelry group, creating and operating brands that disrupt the traditional world of jewelry. 

At Magal, we do more than just make high quality pieces of jewelry. While providing a product people love and will cherish for years to come, we are focused on ensuring that these designs are created responsibly and with longevity in mind.

Through sourcing ethically sourced and high quality VS2-SI1 diamonds, recycled 14k gold and cultivating partnerships with responsible social organizations such as One Tree Planted, we are making changes for the betterment of this planet one step at a time!

Name: Quintessence Tailor - Bespoke Suits Tailor Nairobi
Description: Experience unparalleled craftsmanship with Nairobi’s premier Bespoke Suits Tailor. We specialize in creating high-end, custom-made suits tailored to perfection for discerning gentlemen. Visit us in the heart of Nairobi and elevate your wardrobe with timeless elegance and superior quality.

Name: Invicta Watch Group
Description:
The watch brand Invicta (from Latin for “invincible”), originally founded in 1837 in Chiasso, Switzerland, today is one of the fastest-growing watch companies in the world. 

Led by innovation and nurtured with the consistency of quality and brand personality, the forward thinking energy of The Invicta Watch Group continues its brazen journey. The long held belief that supremely crafted timepieces can be offered for modest sums is the founding principle of Invicta and that ideology still resides at the core of all Invicta creations. In setting a premise of exceptional standards, Invicta maintains their objective by successfully satisfying consumers and collectors alike at any price point.

Name: ChloBo Jewellery
Description:
Founded in 2005 by Chloe Moss, after a trip to Bali, ChloBo's unique creations have adorned the arms of some of Britain’s most stylish women and been splashed across the pages of the most popular magazines. ChloBo has leapt from the jewellery boutiques of Britain to the wardrobes of some of the UK’s most influential celebrities, from chart topping sensations to much loved actresses.

Chloe Moss, founder and designer of the ever growing jewellery label, was originally inspired to create the collections after her travels to the Indonesian Island of Bali. 

Chloe says: “The collections are a reflection from my travels, but also insight into my life. My jewellery is personal and each piece can be worn in so many ways to reflect that individual and the occasion.

“Jewellery to me is more than an accessory; it’s a form of personal expression to experiment with.”

For further information on ChloBo jewellery please visit: 
www.ChloBo.co.uk. 
To follow on FaceBook -  www.facebook.com/ChloBoJewellery  
Twitter - www.twitter.com/ChloBoJewellery.

Name: Diamars Fine Jewels LLP
Description: A fine jewellery brand based out of Mumbai.

Description: A jewelry brand of exceptional quality, handcrafted from the finest and most sustainable materials, offered at honest pricing.

Certified and non certified diamonds, gemstones, polki jewelry, kundan jewelry are also available.

The jewellery are also certified.

If you want to make diamond jewellery , we would love to discuss more in detail.

Name: MAXFIELD
Description:
Maxfield Enterprises, Inc. is a privately held luxury goods company that is internationally renown for its avant garde aesthetic and hand-picked edits of luxury apparel, rare and vintage art, collectible furniture, and curios.

Founded by Tommy Perse in 1969, Maxfield launched brands such as Giorgio Armani, Yohji Yamamoto, Rick Owens, and Comme des Garçons earning acclaim and a cult following from discerning local shoppers. Maxfield regularly holds pop-ups of local, upcoming designers as well as established global brands.

Maxfield's flagship is located in West Hollywood with a secondary location in Malibu.

Name: Zimson Watches
Description:
Zimson - A legacy of watch retailers since 1948 
Housing over 50 international and national brands
Over 40 watch stores spread across South India  in the cities of Chennai , Coimbatore and Bangalore
A trusted brand name for wrist watches .

Name: THE HOUSE OF LUXURY
Description:
The House of Luxury is an innovative luxury platform that offers PR & Communications, Events, Marketing and Distribution services across areas such as: Watches, Jewellery, Design, Art and Lifestyle.
The House of Luxury also acts as an international PR and Brand Development Agency with many success stories in positioning brands within the luxury sector globally at the highest level and securing campaigns and editorials in publications such as Vogue, Vanity Fair, Tatler, Centurion, Financial Times How to Spend it, Square Mile, GQ, Esquire.

Name: Smart Arts - Thailand Fine Jewelry Manufacturer for Brands & Retailers
Description:
Smart Arts is dedicated to provide fine high end jewellery for discerning clientele. 

We imagine, design and create fine pieces of hand-joined flexible jewellery incorporating genuine, high quality gems that are perfectly matched for color and brilliance.

We perfectly blend traditional jewellery craftsmanship with the latest technology to produce exclusive jewellery that transcend time.

At our facilities in Bangkok, we design, model and produce pieces of the finest jewellery imaginable. Gems are polished, perfectly matched for color and brilliance and are then flawlessly set.

Meticulous international standards of quality control are applied at every stage of the process before any piece meets with our high standards of quality control.

We invest uncompromisingly in the heartbeat of the company, the people 
who drive our company’s success. Some of our talented artisans have been with us since our doors opened in 1999, many others for over a decade. All have been trained to our exacting standards, and are true experts in their craft.

We are committed to continually improving our processes and we provide on-going knowledge and skills training to always ensure excellence and precision in our jewellery.

Smart Arts Jewellery takes on both OEM, and ODM initiatives.

Name: BERING Time ApS
Description:
BERING combines Danish design with the Beauty of the Arctic, which was a huge inspiration and became the foundation and constant inspiration for the brand ever since. The Arctic means a lot to founder and owner Michael Witt Johansen from Denmark, as his father travelled to Greenland and the Faroer Islands as a salesman for more than 25 years. Michael Witt Johansen’s own trips to Greenland and his friend and co-founder René Kaerskov’s parachute jump over the North Pole inspired them to establish a brand with a unique design concept.

Watches and jewellery that stay beautiful as time passes by – this is what BERING stands for. We design products that are timelessly elegant and we use long-lasting and durable materials such as high-tech-ceramic, medical-grade stainless steel (316L) and scratch resistant sapphire crystal. Our jewellery and our watches match perfectly and form harmonious sets in different colour worlds.

BERING also places great value on charity and sustainability projects. We are committed to make an active effort to help preserve the environment and support the conservation organisation “Polar Bears International” with our charity campaign “Time to Care”. Sustainability has also been part of our concept from the very beginning. In addition to durable materials, we set new standards with our packaging from recycled glass and our “Ocean Pebble” collection with straps made of 100% recycled ocean plastic.

Name: ASIAMARINE
Description:
With over 30 years’ experience in the yachting industry, ASIAMARINE is headquartered in Hong Kong, with offices in Thailand, Singapore, and representatives in the Philippines and Vietnam. 

ASIAMARINE sells new and pre-owned yachts and manages them for their owners. We are the pioneer in the Luxury Yachts Rental in Hong Kong since 2013, ASIAMARINE operates a fine fleet of modern luxury yachts available for rental. 

Our core business covers:

Sales: New and brokerage yachts
Luxury yacht charter: Hong Kong, Thailand, Indonesia, Caribbean and the Mediterranean Sea etc.
Yacht management: Providing exceptional management service in Asia – Pacific region
Location: 8 Shum Wan Road, Hong Kong Island

Name: Steven Stone
Description:
A family name that stands for quality. A family-run success story, the business was founded in 1937. In the 80-plus years that have followed, Steven Stone has built its reputation on high quality, personalised service and competitive prices. It is also one of the few brands with in-house workshops, where skilled craftspeople bring every piece to life using the finest materials.
A visit to Steven Stone’s Manchester based showroom – home to some of the most stunning diamond jewellery collections in Britain – is an unforgettable experience. This website offers you the perfect alternative for selecting and purchasing your dream jewellery, without moving from the comfort of your home.

And if you can’t find the exact piece of your dreams? No problem. We’d be delighted to apply our design expertise and painstaking attention to detail to make your vision a reality.

Name: GemsNY
Description:
GemsNY is your trusted source for untreated, certified natural color gemstones and custom fine jewelry. With over 50,000 loose stones in stock including sapphires, rubies, emeralds, alexandrites, tsavorites, and fine diamonds, we specialize in handcrafted rings, earrings, pendants, and bracelets tailored to your style.
 
All gemstones are 100 percent conflict free and certified by leading gemological labs such as GIA, AGL, IGI, and Gübelin. We also offer lab grown color gemstones and diamonds for those seeking sustainable luxury.
 
Every piece is made to order in the USA with a best price guarantee, lifetime warranty, and a commitment to exceptional quality.

Name: Brosway
Description:
Brosway Italia is the #1 fashionable jewelry brand in Italy, selling products ranging from necklaces and bracelets to rings and earrings across the world. Heritage, passion and Italian style are at the core of what drives Brosway Italia’s mission: all jewels are entirely designed in Italy and distributed in over 30 countries, where they have become a symbol of Italian excellence worldwide. All Brosway Italia jewels are hypoallergenic and their design follows the latest trends, in an ongoing quest to create fashion jewelry pieces to match different personalities, bringing affordable high-quality jewels to the final consumer.
Italians really do it best!

Name: LM Cadrans SA
Description:
Installée à Gland, à deux pas de Genève, LM Cadrans SA est dotée d’un savoir-faire unique et d'une expérience de longue date pour tous les travaux manuels les plus délicats sur les cadrans de montre de haute qualité. 

L’entreprise dispose d’une infrastructure moderne et d’un parc machines de dernière génération permettant l’évolution et l’optimisation de cadrans toujours plus complexes. 
Sa solide expertise, alliée à la passion de l’excellence, vous accompagnera dans tous vos projets de manière créative et innovante. 

Domaines d’activité : bureau technique, usinage,  galvanoplastie, vernissage, polissage, montage, décoration, décalque et assemblage .

Name: Scott Kay
Description:
Founded in 1984, Scott Kay has been acclaimed as the foremost authority in bridal and fashion Jewelry.  By creating a distinctive and artistically designed collection, he established Scott Kay as a coveted brand for bridal rings. Along with this new design inspiration, Scott unveiled platinum as the metal of choice for his bridal collection in the late 1980’s, further igniting the bridal market.  Being credited for the platinum resurgence in America, Scott received several awards for his artisanal designs and quality craftsmanship, as well as received the Platinum Innovation award from the Platinum Guild International two years in a row.  Scott Kay’s success was due in part to an intense passion and focus in every endeavor.
 
Today, Scott Kay’s legacy is carried out by a small team of best-in-class artisans who bring the same passion to their work that Scott did. To pay tribute to the standards Scott set forth, “Never Compromise” is invoked at every stage of the design process.  As a result, each and every engagement ring and wedding band is an impeccable example of the finest quality and craftsmanship.

Name: Tirisi
Description:
Welcome to Tirisi.

Tirisi is a luxury brand founded in 2010 that blend timeless craftsmanship with modern design through two distinct yet complementary lines: Tirisi Jewelry and Tirisi Moda. The two iconic brands are rooted in the heritage of Italian craftsmanship and inspired by architecture, culture, and beauty from Natascha’s diverse travel destinations.

Our Tirisi Jewelry collections feature handcrafted 18 kt gold pieces, designed for a fashionable woman who appreciates exquisite detail and individualistic charm. In contrast, Tirisi Moda offers more accessible, fashion-forward collections combining sterling silver, 18 kt gold, vibrant semi-precious stones, and traditional handcrafted Italian leather, inviting women to curate their own unique style.

At Tirisi, creativity is at the core and knows no bounds. We embrace a rich palette of luxurious materials, from finest diamonds and 18 kt gold, to kaleidoscopic colored stones, encouraging individual expression through versatile and sophisticated designs. Our mission is to empower the modern woman to explore and celebrate personal style with jewelry that’s both elegant and fashion-forward.

Natascha's passion for quality, innovation, and style, continues to shape luxury, delivering Tirisi collections that are as special as the women who wear them.

As Natascha says, 'The world is my catwalk...'

With love,
Tirisi

Name: Louis Erard SA
Description:
Louis Erard empowers those who dare to defy the status quo to own true craftsmanship.

Louis Erard disrupts the status quo, making artisanal craftsmanship accessible. Its artistic crafts timepieces defy tradition with a contemporary edge, shaped by boundary-breaking artisans. Since 1929, independence has fueled their fire, inspired by the untamed spirit of the Swiss jura and building upon the iconic regulators and mechanical watches. Under Manuel Emch's leadership, Louis Erard prioritizes innovation over conformity and lasting excellence over rapid growth, forging a new path in watchmaking. Collaborating with visionaries such as Alain Silberstein, Olivier Mosset, and Sylvie Fleury, the brand transcends artistic boundaries, seizing and playing with new codes to design timepieces disrupting the very essence of time itself.

Name: Tirisi
Description:
Welcome to Tirisi.

Tirisi is a luxury brand founded in 2010 that blend timeless craftsmanship with modern design through two distinct yet complementary lines: Tirisi Jewelry and Tirisi Moda. The two iconic brands are rooted in the heritage of Italian craftsmanship and inspired by architecture, culture, and beauty from Natascha’s diverse travel destinations.
