Name: Elvis & Kresse
Description:
Since 2005 Elvis & Kresse have been rescuing raw materials, transforming them into luxury lifestyle accessories and donating 50% of profits back to charities. In 2005 we had a chance encounter with the London Fire Brigade. When we learned that London's damaged decommissioned hoses were headed to landfill we mounted a rescue. We set up Elvis & Kresse to save it. 
For over a decade none of London’s fire-hose has gone to landfill and over 200 tons of material has been reclaimed. 

In 2017 the Burberry Foundation partnered with Elvis & Kresse to tackle the even greater global problem of leather waste. This Five-year partnership will see at least 120 tonnes of leather off-cuts from Burberry transformed into new luxury items, designed and sold by Elvis & Kresse.

Name: Adelle Jewellery
Description:
Founded in 2013, Adelle Jewellery is a pioneer of world-class diamond jewellery in Indonesia. The brand is driven by a mission to create diamond jewellery that hold emotional value and timeless beauty. At Adelle, we believe jewellery is more than a gift, but a meaningful expression, a way to connect with loved ones, and a symbol that complete your most precious moments.

From elegant classics to custom creations, the brand's jewellery designs reflect both modern trends and timeless pieces. Adelle Jewellery combined expert craftsmanship and cutting-edge technology to produce exquisite jewellery made from high-quality gold and diamonds.

The brand takes pride in delivering a personalized, heartfelt, and warm service experience, welcoming every customer as part of the family. Through dedicated one-on-one consultations, the brand ensure to understand your needs, making each visit comfortable, meaningful, and memorable.

With 13 retail locations across Indonesia, Adelle Jewellery are proud to bring its signature service and exceptional craftsmanship closer to customers nationwide.

Name: Sellier
Description: We are Europe's fastest growing platform for authentic preloved luxury fashion. Chanel, Hermes, Louis Vuitton and everything in between. We've got you.

Name: Brosway Italia
Description:
Brosway Italia is the #1 fashionable jewelry brand in Italy, selling products ranging from necklaces and bracelets to rings and earrings across the world. Heritage, passion and Italian style are at the core of what drives Brosway Italia’s mission: all jewels are entirely designed in Italy and distributed in over 30 countries, where they have become a symbol of Italian excellence worldwide. All Brosway Italia jewels are hypoallergenic and their design follows the latest trends, in an ongoing quest to create fashion jewelry pieces to match different personalities, bringing affordable high-quality jewels to the final consumer.
Italians really do it best!

Name: Jewelry Princess Manufactory Co., Ltd.
Description:
We are a wholesaler and manufacturer of sterling silver 925 jewelry and accessories located in Bangkok, Thailand. For decades, we deliver our customers with reliable products and services at competitive price. Whether you own a small retail/wholesale shop or big chain stores, we would be delight to listen to what you need.

With new collections coming out quarterly, we constantly keep ourselves update with the fashion trends around the world. Therefore, we’re certain you can find the styles you or your customers are looking for. If it’s something really unique, our in-house designers and friendly sales staff can surely help you turn that idea into reality.

Thank your for your interest in our company. Please take your time to browse through our website. We also have a blog that shows some of our new product concepts and designs. If you need more information, please feel free to contact us.

Name: Jewellery Valuers Association
Description:
The Jewellery Valuers Association is the only independent body in the UK and Ireland exclusively for valuers of jewellery, gemstones, watches, and silver.

Its membership includes some of the most qualified and experienced professionals in the jewellery and allied industries.

Jewellery valuations are unique amongst the fine and decorative arts, requiring not only an appreciation for the aesthetics and quality of manufacture but also an in-depth scientific knowledge of its material components.  Watch valuations also present their own challenges in terms of identification of genuineness, taking into account non-manufacturer’s modifications, in addition to being able to identify genuine/fake boxes/papers; silver also requires specialist knowledge of current trends.

Using a member of The Jewellery Valuers Association will bring you professional integrity and a wealth of experience not available from any other organisation.

Name: Omologato
Description:
Welcome to Official Omologato | Authentic Motorsport Watches | Designed in England. Raced Worldwide. Offices in Windsor, England & Indianapolis USA 

#Omologato

Name: MIANSAI
Description:
Since beginning with a single well-crafted bracelet in 2008, Miansai has grown into a timeless, multi-category accessory lifestyle brand with a unique and recognizable aesthetic.

In the world of Miansai, curiosity and creativity are intrinsically intertwined in one always-evolving, artful journey. Miansai thrives on exploration, discovery, and the beauty of elevated design. “The world around us is our source of constant inspiration. Beauty exists in the smallest of details. Passionate, hands-on design and production turns found, raw input into refined and timeless statement pieces.”

All Miansai designs are meticulously crafted from the highest quality materials. Sourcing fine Italian leathers, pure precious metals, and custom-made maritime grade ropes for their pieces— and obsess over every detail.

Miansai is sold around the world in 40 US states and 36 countries including at the brand’s flagship store in New York’s Soho neighborhood and online at www.Miansai.com

Name: Birdhichand Ghanshyamdas Jewellers
Description:
Holding a legacy of over a century, Birdhichand Ghanshyamdas Jaipur is a leading Indian luxury jewellery brand that celebrates the astonishing diversity of Indian art, traditions and regal cultural heritage. Birdhichand brings to the forefront, a celebration and reincarnation of the lost art of India in their jewelry designs and ideology. Counted amongst Jaipur’s oldest jewellery houses, the zealous brand is known for their exquisite bridal pieces and marvelous design theories in the luxury jewellery market. 

Birdhichand balances Indian art forms with a modern approach by marrying traditional designs with innovative techniques. The house creations are hand-crafted and re-interpret centuries-old tradition of art through original designs, contemporary adaptations and edgy creativity using precious and rare gemstones like diamonds, sapphires, rubies and emeralds, etc.  

Traversing through history and wave of nostalgia, every collection breathes originality and uses finest material thus lending the traditional designs a contemporary touch. Signature collections like Hunar, Adrishya, Aranya, Aks, Amér, Adaa and Delhi Durbar walk through magnificent design themes using modernised versions of yesteryear techniques. The brand continues to draw its inspiration from different aspects of regular surroundings while infusing a fresh lease of life in every articulately designed piece.

A journey that started with their first store at Johri Bazaar, Jaipur and then extended to their second store at a prime location of Jaipur, i.e, Mirza Ismail Road, Birdhichand has moved to become a nationalised jeweler by inaugurating their third store at an elite location in the capital city – New Delhi. 

Always taking the road less travelled, Birdhichand Ghanshyamdas have stood as a paragon of innovation and panache in the segment of luxury jewellery brands.

Name: Luxuria Group
Description:
The Luxuria Group, based in the Middle East, specializes in the distribution of luxury brands with a special emphasis on the beauty and perfumes sectors.

Founded on the pillars of understanding and communication, the Company’s awareness of market nuances and consumer preferences enables it to effectively communicate the message of each brand the way it’s creators intended.  And, with brand building at its core, the Group's flexible approach ensures each brand thrives within the local and regional environment.

Name: Mackintosh
Description: For almost 200 years mackintosh has been one of the world’s most influential coat makers. The DNA of the brand surrounds its craftsmanship, unequaled expertise in the manipulation of rubberized fabric, and the constant evolution of its designs. The brand has become synonymous with its outerwear products, but also with the introduction of new collections, including the Mackintosh Mainline, and collaborations with some of the world’s leading fashion houses.

Name: IL BORGO CASHMERE SRL
Description:
L’azienda "Il Borgo" è frutto del lavoro appassionato della stessa famiglia dal 1949.

Un’azienda che ha attraversato con successo un secolo, sempre al passo con i tempi: una realtà dinamica e moderna, ma con forti radici nel passato e nel territorio, il Mugello terra di forte tradizione artigiana.

Creatività, ricerca e sperimentazione, ma anche tecniche artigianali antiche sono alla base delle collezioni "Il Borgo": capi ed oggetti in cashmere belli da vedere, da indossare e da toccare. Capi che non sono classici, ma che Franco Fredducci, con la sua genialità creativa, rende sempre alla moda. Ricami, applicazioni e raffinate rifiniture realizzate a mano da maestre artigiane rendono, infine, unici e preziosi i capi e gli oggetti in cashmere de "Il Borgo".


Da tempo l’azienda mette a disposizione delle più importanti case di moda italiane e straniere le proprie competenze artigianali e la conoscenza nella lavorazione del cashmere. La propria padronanza del trattamento di questo prezioso filato: il cashmere. I riconoscimenti alla qualità ed eccellenza dei capi in cashmere "Il Borgo" non sono mai mancati, ultimo la partecipazione a partire dal 2011, come unica azienda di maglieria, all’innovativo evento internazionale “Maisons d’Exception” all’interno della Première Vision a Parigi. Manifestazione a cui partecipano solo aziende di riconosciuto know how artigianale a livello mondiale che sono in grado di offrire soluzioni produttive e competenze all’alta moda.

L’azienda, dove stanno piano piano entrando le nuove generazioni, è una delle poche realtà italiane di lavorazione artigianale di cashmere che ha scelto di mantenere la produzione sul territorio di origine.

Name: LGDeal
Description:
LGDeal is a B2B diamonds marketplace that connects millions of buyers and sellers within the lab-grown diamonds market. We provide the technology infrastructure, industry knowledge and processes to help our members save time, trade conveniently and improve business efficiency.

We do what we do to simplify the lives of our members and build the future infrastructure for the global diamond industry. 

LGDeals is built on three principles - protecting our members’ confidence, making it easy for our members to find what they want and commitment to customer-support excellence.

Name: P L U C Z E N I K
Description:
Pluczenik is a major international diamond and jewellery company, specialised in large diamonds and branding, and providing innovative value-adding solutions to its partners.

Website: http://www.pluczenik.com

Online wholesale diamond inventory: http://www.pluczenik.biz

Name: TIMECENTER S.A
Description: Time Center SA is a leading company, dedicated to supplying the finest watches to the Greek market. Family-oriented and with more than 50 years of continuous presence, the company exclusively represents and distributes the best brands in the watch industry, such as Roamer, Timberland, Nixon, Nautica, Police, D1 Milano, Quantum, Lee Cooper, and Jacques Du Manoir, while designing and developing its own brands: JCOU and LE DOM. Join us on our journey through time, as we have been committed for over a century to adding value to every minute.

Name: Dolphin Leathers - Handbags Kolkata , India
Description:
Dolphin Leathers are manufacturers and exporters of finished leather products - handbags, men bags, wallets for men and women ,  purses etc.

We are leading suppliers of washed leather bags to Scandinavian countries . 

We are also producers of Industrial Safety products like Leather Driving Gloves, Canadian Gloves, Welding Gloves, etc

Why choose us?

Our unique vertical Business Model makes us the most competitive supplier as we do not have to share profits at different stages.

Compliant to REACH norms and regulations.

20,000 Bags every month.
40,000 sq feet of factory space.

We keep an inventory of different types Leather and are well prepared  for any contingency.

We have long term buyers from Europe and are known for our craftsmanship and timely delivery..

Name: CSX
Description: We purchase rough gems from Sri Lanka and also import rough stones from Africa and Pakistan. We precision cut the gemstones for the requirements of our customers.

Name: Mani Jewel
Description: MANI JEWEL is a symbol of unique and exclusive jewellery collection, specialized in authentic, traditional as well as exclusive fashion jewellery

Name: Gempro
Description:
Gempro specializes in natural gemstone products. We manage a fully integrated business model, from gemstone sourcing, designing, manufacturing, exporting and retailing of a large variety of products – all crafted from colored gemstones. We are committed to bring Gemstones within reach of a much wider consumer-base, globally.

Gempro has been creating innovative & trending products for global markets B2B / B2C – from jewelry, artifacts, gift articles and wellness products. While our manufacturing units are based in India and China, we source minerals from many other countries. Our experience and competence enables us to offer unique products, quality at affordable prices, just-in-time delivery and industry best service.

Vision: 

"To become the most desirable lifestyle brand while spreading the brilliance and positivity of gemstones."

 

Mission:
To create quality gemstone products with industry best designs at surprising rates supported by customer crazy service.
Build a strong team with the spirit of oneness and growth, contributing towards creating a more equitable society.

Name: ECM Espresso Coffee Machines Manufacture
Description:
For over 25 years, ECM have shared a spirit of excellence and passion for handcraft and coffee all over the world.

The founder, Wolfgang Hauck, played a privotal, craftmanship role in introducing Italian espresso culture to Germany. Now, his son, Michael Hauck, is adding a new dimension to ECM as CEO. Bringing fresh perspectives to ECM’s manufacturing and development processes.

As a team, we are dedicated to delivering innovative espresso machines that combine traditional craftmanship with cutting-edge technology. At ECM, we believe in creating coffee experiences that exceed expectations and elevate the art of espresso brewing.

Today, ECM is spread through local distributors over 55 countries worldwide.

We strive to ensure that our products and the way they are made have positive impact on the world of espresso and our way of living.

Being part of ECM means being part of a journey, filled with excitement and challenge, desire and daring. There is no better way to reveal your potential. Explore, develope, innovate and create - every journey is unique. Today, ECM invites you to discover your own.

At ECM, we live espresso.

Name: Elmo & Montegrappa S.p.A.
Description:
Pens might be used less these days, but wherever they are used, they are worth more. 

Montegrappa pens are conversation pieces – used in meetings, signing ceremonies, as luxury gifts, or simply to inspire creativity and pride in the written word. 

Based in Northern Italy for more than a century, we are the makers of the world’s most magical writing instruments. 

Our creations combine the finesse of a jeweller with a watchmaker’s precision. Extravagant designs, mechanical complications and remarkable collaborations make up our most individualistic pieces: with around a dozen highly drafted limited-edition series released every year. These are extraordinary pens made for exceptional writing, sold through the world’s most discerning boutiques.

As tools of individual expression, pens are among the most personal accessories of all. This is the reason why we maintain the pen world’s most capable and versatile workshop. In 2018 we launched the world’s first online pen customization platform. Alongside our bespoke Atelier department, Montegrappa Configurator gives individualists and unconventional thinkers the power to design the pen of their dreams. Allow Italian handcraft and exuberance to do the rest.

Name: Maison Dorée
Description:
Fondée en 2019 Maison Dorée est une marque de bijoux fantaisies créé par l’influenceuse Chloé Bleinc

Au cœur de la vision de Maison Dorée se trouve la volonté d’encourager chaque femme à exprimer son individualité, une allure unique, à se sentir confiante et à se réinventer pour aller à la quête de LEUR réussite. 

La femme Maison Dorée est indépendante, audacieuse, passionnée, épanouie et accomplie.  

Inspiré du « bijou à vivre », des collections accessibles au design moderne et aux détails scintillants, à assembler à l’infini où l'art de les accumuler devient une véritable expression de créativité.

Name: Jade Trau
Description: A reflection of Jade’s lifestyle and personality, The Jade Trau Collection is for women who personify understated style and value practicality. With a deep understanding of the way jewelry should be worn, Jade focuses on creating pieces that wear beautifully and comfortably. Putting her unique spin on meticulously crafted diamond jewelry, she is inspired by both vintage and contemporary designs. The jewelry speaks for itself. Jade’s signature ear cuffs and chic signet rings have become fast favorites for in-the-know women and style influencers in New York and beyond.

Name: EAC Innovation & Métal
Description:
Au croisement entre savoir-faire et innovation, EAC fournit aux designers et fabricants, des solutions créatives et diversifiées en matière d’accessoires métalliques, bijoux et articles de luxe. Grâce à notre outil industriel verticalement intégré, performant et international, nos clients peuvent personnaliser et signer leurs produits finis. EAC est un spécialiste du traitement de surface et de la galvanisation. Nous pouvons métalliser tous types d'objets, allant du bijou à l'accessoire de luxe. 

Tout commence par une idée, une inspiration. Notre bureau d'étude conçoit et développe à vos côtés vos projets personnalisés les plus ambitieux. 
Les dessins techniques réalisés sur logiciel CAO / DAO sont ensuite imprimés en 3D. La fabrication additive est au cœur de notre process de prototypage. Nous disposons de 4 imprimantes 3D, ce qui nous permet de produire des prototypes d'une grande qualité, avec rapidité et en réduisant les coûts.
Les prototypes, une fois validés, sont produit en série en zamak, puis subissent plusieurs étapes de polissage. En fonction du cahier des charges, il peut s'agir de tribofinition ou de polissage manuel. 
Les pièces sont ensuite métallisées par procédé de galvanisation. Le traitement de surface s'effectue soit au tonneau, soit à l'attache. Nous proposons un large choix de finitions en métal précieux (Or, Argent, Cuivre etc) pour tous vos produits. 
Enfin, notre savoir-faire nous permet de proposer des finitions de qualité, telles que l'émaillage, le sertissage de pierres semi précieuses, la soudure délicate, la couture et les assemblages divers pour donner la touche finale à vos ornements métalliques.

Name: Garth's Auctioneers & Appraisers
Description:
Garth's Auctions Inc. has been a national force in the world of antiques & fine art since founded by Garth Oberlander in 1954. Garth's is a premier auction house selling furniture, fine art, decorative accessories, with over two dozen auctions a year and more certified appraisers than any other firm in the Midwest. 

With every lot of every auction, Garth's demonstrates its experience in selling materials ranging from antique to contemporary furniture, fine art, folk art, jewelry, collectibles, firearms, dolls, toys, pottery, American Indian items, Oriental rugs, glass, & more. Our marketing is cutting-edge and top-quality; our descriptions thorough and precise; photographs and catalogs stunning. As such, Garth’s is poised to successfully promote any collection whether you are parting with one item or a lifetime's collection. 

A dynamic company that has kept pace with an evolving industry, Garth's remains a trusted resource for discerning sellers and buyers. With a reputation for integrity and customer service unmatched in the marketplace, Garth's pool of clientele has grown one relationship at a time. We work closely with attorneys, executors, trust officers, museums, and other educational institutions in order to meet their appraisal and selling needs. Many clients ask us to assist their estate-planning efforts, insuring a smooth, "one-stop" process, backed by Garth’s integrity, for their heirs. At Garth’s, the answer is always "yes". What is your question?

Name: H.Bloom
Description:
Founded in New York City in 2010, H.Bloom has become the nation’s best known resource for customized and luxury botanical consultation, design and fulfillment. 

Using our homegrown software systems, a team of expert account managers, and a curated network of elite florists, we are able to provide a meaningful solution to simplify, streamline, and optimize your flower and plant ordering processes for all (or some) of your locations nationwide. Services include but are not limited to cross-market large scale botanical contracts, holiday and event installation, customized gifting campaigns, and interactive floral service such as DIY floral bars. 

Our beautiful designs are also available for the everyday shopper! We offer nationwide gift delivery from our e-commerce shop with unique seasonal products and curated designs, some are even available for same day delivery. 

H.Bloom was launched in April 2010 and acquired by Tenth Avenue Commerce in 2016.

Name: DELISLE
Description:
The Maison Delisle, under the direction of Jean Delisle, representative of the 5th generation of the family, proudly continues the Delisle tradition of ‘haute couture’ lighting. The firm also develops contemporary creations with designers like Nicolas Aubagnac, Jean-Michel Wilmotte and illustrious Maisons, such as Lalique.

Delisle designs high-quality lights, as well as furniture and decorative objects. Thanks to its collection of historical archives referencing over 4,000 models and 12,000 drawings, dating back over 120 years, the group has continued to perpetuate French savoir-faire by reinventing tradition and expertise since 1895.

Each object, meticulously designed and crafted in its studios in Montreuil, is the fruit of an ensemble of skills specific to each artisan.

A member of the Comité Colbert* since 1985, the Maison Delisle holds the EPV Living Heritage Label since 2006.
A selection of Delisle creations can be seen in their Parisian showroom situated in the Marais at number 4, Rue du Parc Royal, Paris (third arrondissement).

*A French association established in 1954 and responsible for the promotion of French creation and savoir-faire.

Name: FERRET HORLOGERIE & JOAILLERIE DE LUXE
Description:
Depuis plus d'un demi-siècle, la Maison Ferret perpétue la culture de l'excellence, offrant ainsi à la haute joaillerie internationale et aux grands maîtres horlogers suisses la prestigieuse vitrine qu'ils méritent, dans le plus pur respect de la tradition.

Nos boutiques de Nice, Cannes et Monaco vous invitent à passer un moment hors du temps, dans un écrin feutré dédié au raffinement. Habillées de marbre "vert Guatemela", leurs devantures vous promettent un accueil privilégié, à la hauteur des marques prestigieuses qui ont fait de nous leur ambassadeur sur la Côte d'Azur, comme Rolex, Panerai, Chaumet ou encore Buccellati.

Rejoignez le cercle exclusif de nos clients du monde entier, qui ont fait notre renommée et nous renouvellent leur confiance depuis plus de 50 ans.

Name: LBS Retail, Luxury, and Consumer Club
Description: Retail, Luxury and Consumer Club at London Business School aims to provide its members with industry knowledge, contacts and opportunities within the retail and luxury sectors.

Name: Manufacture Joaillière Suisse
Description: Manufacture Joaillière Suisse allie excellence artisanale et innovation industrielle pour créer des pièces de joaillerie de haute précision, en intégrant la totalité du cycle de production, de la fonderie à la finition.

Name: LaBella Gioielli
Description:
With its genuine understanding of the global jewelry trends, Labella brand was born in Italy, the heart of the jewelry’s world to cater for the colorful lifestyle of the young generations.

With passion for perfection and precision, Labella excelled in the art of transforming every inspiration into a unique design and a masterpiece. 

Labella was evolved to become one of the largest gold and jewelry manufacturers in the world, with a vision of continuous development in jewelry crafting.

Labella is a signature name at the highest level to reinforce its role among leading international brands.

As a part of its global brand strategy, and in order to achieve a guaranteed quality of its products, Labella signed a license agreement with Swarovski Gem Stone.

Name: Luxury Lifestyle Inc
Description:
Luxury Lifestyle is the online resource for luxury with a comprehensive directory that connects the affluent consumer to the finer things in life around the world.

LuxuryLifestyle was developed to cater to the needs of the luxury market.  Focusing on new and emerging concepts and technologies, Luxurylifestyle.com delivers the worlds best products and services to discerning customers.

The portal includes thousands of listings of high-end resources available to the public, ranging from real estate to vehicles and from vacations and travel to fashion; LuxuryLifestyle.com has become one of the most frequently utilized luxury resources on the internet. Features include Company Listings, Marketplace Ads, Articles, and an Event Calendar. Users have the ability to perform searches, instantly request information from companies and view products and services.

Name: Logan Hollowell Jewelry
Description: Inspired by the cosmos, nature, and spiritual symbolism, our jewelry is handcrafted in Los Angeles. Every piece is created with deep intention, love, and magic so that it can be felt by its wearer, and layered to tell their story.

Name: DESTREE
Description:
DESTREE LEATHER GOODS & ACCESSORIES
PLEASINGLY GRAPHIC
Paris

Name: Riddle's Jewelry
Description:
Riddle's Jewelry is comprised of 60+ jewelry stores across the Midwest. 

For over 59 years, our family's love for their customers has carried on through the generations and spilled over to all in the company.

From concept to actual design, some of the beautiful diamond jewelry seen in our stores actually comes from our own manufacturing center - a unique opportunity for us to maintain high quality standards and guarantee the lowest prices for you, our customer.

Name: Luxury Communications Council
Description:
Luxury Communications Council (LCC) unifying force, a support system, and a champion of the visionary marketing and communications leaders who steer global luxury.

These members are united by a shared focus on delivering world-class marketing and communications strategies for the finest luxury brands. LCC members enjoy a robust calendar of events and thought leadership, including a series of Fireside events and the annual LCC Leaders Forum.

Name: Lackto
Description:
Lackto - Amor de Leite, Milk Mama e Mama Fit
 Amor de Leite - Kit para produção de Joia de Leite Materno
 Suplementos - Milk Mama e Mama Fit

Name: Church's
Description:
Church’s history can be traced back to 1617, when Anthony Church, a master shoemaker was handcrafting shoes in Northampton, England, a town renowned for producing fine footwear since medieval times. His descendants followed in his footsteps, establishing Church’s & Co in 1873. 
 
Church’s still manufactures in Northampton, while its 62 directly-owned and operated retail stores now span the globe, with locations in London, Paris, Edinburgh, Milan, Berlin, Hong Kong, Singapore, Tokyo, Seoul, Shanghai and Beijing.
 
Church’s continues to present men’s and women’s collections that are unparalleled for craftsmanship and luxury. These handmade shoes are loyal to the artisanal traditions of English shoemaking. Timeless in aesthetic and exceptional in quality, they are amongst the most long-lasting and desirable in the world. Church’s has been owned by the Prada Group since 1999

Name: H.K.Designs
Description:
H.K. Designs is a vertically integrated company and holds a key figure at all stages of the diamond pipeline. The group has its source of rough diamonds from DTC, Rio Tinto and Arctic Canadian, Key memberships include the Gem and Jewelry Export Promotion Council, the World Trade Centers Association and the Responsible Jewelry Council.


Headquartered in Mumbai, the company serves a wide range of discerning clients across the globe. Impeccable quality and expertly crafted designs has to lead the company to symbolize a way of life and a benchmark for style in the industry.


Operating with the highest professional standards along with top ethical standards and values have won the firm recognition and numerous awards. H.K. Designs is grateful to be a global leader in the realm of Diamond and Gemstone Jewelry. The tremendous reach and creativity of the group enable the company to offer a broad range of stunning designs.

 

In an exceedingly competitive market and in just 15 years, H.K. Designs has become to be known for pioneering innovations and creating cutting edge designs. H.K. Designs growth has been achieved with a combination of visionary leadership and building a reputation for the highest standards of quality that has garnered both respect and appreciation from the industry.

Name: Tilfi
Description:
Tilfi is envisioned as a true expression of Indian craftsmanship and luxury, built on ingenuity of techniques, superiority of materials and the understated refinement of heritage crafts. 

Born in Banaras, Tilfi brings the beauty and cultural wisdom of age-old craftsmanship of Banaras to the world. With our range of handwoven textiles and made-by-hand products, rooted in the region’s artisanal traditions, Tilfi preserves heritage and fosters a strong sense of cultural identity and pride.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tilfi_banaras
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tilfi

Name: Living In Interiors
Description:
“We pride ourselves on our ability to offer a service that is bespoke, experienced and thorough; excellence and attention to details define who we are.”

Living In Interiors was established in 1992 by Ashraf & Alia El Tanani and is renowned for its unparalleled commitment for delivering the finest quality Interiors & Exteriors through its four major divisions: Design, Construction, Development, and Commercial Retail. 

Living In is an independent company with no sub-contractors, and one that utilizes their facilities to execute all of their core works, in-house. From A-Z, all aspects of the projects are handled by a team with over 30 years of experience, from the HQ in New Cairo to the woodworking factory of ARCO in Abu Rawash. Their goal is one: to craft the legacy of the affluent by combining ultimate service with timeless design. 

Living In Interiors HQ
Head Office: Plot 202-Sector 2 Fifth Settlement, New Cairo, Zip Code: 12477, Cairo, Egypt
Tel: (+202)27262020

Living In Showroom - Abu Rawash, Cairo
Km 28 Cairo Alex Desert Road - Industrial Zone - Giza, Egypt
Tel: (+202) 35390884

Name: Movado Group Europe and LATAM
Description: One of the world's premier watchmakers, Movado Group, Inc. designs, sources, and distributes MOVADO, MVMT, OLIVIA BURTON, EBEL, CONCORD, COACH, TOMMY HILFIGER, HUGO BOSS, LACOSTE, and CALVIN KLEIN watches worldwide, and operates Movado company stores in the United States.

Name: Royal Copenhagen
Description: Founded in 1775 under the patronage of the Royal Danish Court, Royal Copenhagen is one of the oldest companies in the world. For more than two centuries, Royal Copenhagen’s dedicated craftsmanship, timeless aesthetics, and high standards of porcelain production has remained. With untiring enthusiasm, Royal Copenhagen continuously revitalises itself and its historic aesthetic, time and time again.

Name: Dharmanandan Diamonds Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Dharmanandan Diamonds, widely known as DDPL is a prominent natural diamond manufacturing company. A De Beers Sightholder, DDPL with 50+ years of excellence ensures enriched customer experience with its products and innovative solutions. Our strategic market network worldwide enables us to serve customers through our offices in all the major hubs Hong Kong, China, USA, India and Europe.

DDPL craft over half a million carats of polished diamonds annually, ranging from 0.18 carat to 50 carats in D-M color and IF-I3 clarity, in a BSI certified eco-friendly factory is spread across 500,000 square feet along with more than 6500 skilled artisans working under one roof with all modern technology including latest machinery, R&D centre, training section etc. in Surat, India and also a Manufacturing Facility in the Gaborone, Botswana. The company has its pride in ensuring delighted customers through the wide array of products and exclusive services which includes Diamond Time-Lapse – A Provenance Journey, Virtual Showcase – Inventory Less Retail Module, Fancy Layouts for Jewelers, Wide Range of Special Cuts, H&A and Tailor-Made Diamonds and Bagging & Fluting for Smaller Diamonds.

At DDPL, we have always adhered to offer high-end products at the same time, understands its commitment towards the community, education, health care, environment and social awareness. Supporting UN Sustainable Development Goals to achieve carbon neutrality. We’re proud to state that since 2008, DDPL group has been generating more renewable energy than our total consumption with the help of 8 Windmills of 7.4 MW total capacity and a solar rooftop in the factory– a significant progress that puts us on a strong path going forward.

Name: Spence Diamonds
Description: Founded in Vancouver B.C., Spence Diamonds has been in the diamond business for 40 years, and we’ve given hundreds of thousands of couples the confidence to find the diamond ring that represents their unique partnership. We break down the stereotypes associated with the traditional diamond buying experience and have set out to revolutionize the retail diamond industry, by elevating choice and transparency, education and customization through a unique offering of both Artisan Created and earth-minded diamonds for a ring that is unique to you.

Name: Hogan
Description:
Hogan was set up in 1986 and is part of italian luxury group Tod’s Spa.
Hogan’s unique and innovative vision of casual luxury for every occasion perfectly translates into a contemporary lifestyle, where quality and style are always cherished.

Distinguished accessories and ready to wear made for city life, featuring pure and innovative design, concealing elements of functionality with laid-back elegance.

Crafted with materials of extraordinary quality, a Hogan style is bound to become a timeless piece that will continue to appeal well into the future.

WWW.HOGAN.COM

Name: International Colored Gemstone Association
Description: The International Colored Gemstone Association (ICA), a non-profit 501(c)6, is the only worldwide body specifically created to benefit the global colored gemstone industry. ICA was founded in 1984 and is now comprised of over 700 gemstone dealers, cutters, miners and retailers from 47 countries who are devoted to advancing and promoting the knowledge and appreciation of colored gemstones.

Name: Boodles
Description:
Boodles is a British fine jeweller, founded in 1798, owned and run by the 5th and 6th generations of the Wainwright family.

The company's flagship store is on Bond Street, and there are shops in Sloane Street, Harrods, The Royal  Exchange, The Savoy Hotel, Liverpool, Chester and Manchester.

Boodles currently has one international shop in Dublin, Ireland.

For career opportunities, please visit www.boodles.com

Name: Imaginex Group
Description:
Founded in 1992, Imaginex Group is China’s first fashion, beauty and lifestyle brand management and distribution company with unrivalled coverage of market and channels. Building luxury, designer and premium contemporary fashion and lifestyle businesses with an entrepreneurial approach and the passion of a brand owner, Imaginex Group currently operates 259 points of sale across more than 34 cities in China and South East Asia. 

Imaginex Group forms part of The Lane Crawford Joyce Group, Asia’s premier fashion retail, brand management and distribution group, which also includes iconic, luxury department store Lane Crawford; cutting edge fashion boutique Joyce; and fashion footwear, bags and accessories specialist Pedder Group.

Imaginex Group represents international brands, including Salvatore Ferragamo, Paul Smith, Club Monaco, Tory Burch, Isabel Marant, ba&sh, ISAIA, Marc Jacobs, Canada Goose, kate spade new york, Brooks Brothers. The portfolio also includes beauty brands such as Aveda, Jo Malone London, Natura Bissé, Apivita and Augustinus Bader.

The Lane Crawford Joyce Group operates luxury department stores and boutiques, free-standing branded stores, e-commerce and omni-channel operations. With close to 170 years of trading experience in the region, each of The Group’s companies is acknowledged as a pioneer in its space, being first to market with designer and luxury brands, and building brands’ businesses through dynamic partnerships and collaborations.
Location: One Island South, 2 Heung Yip Road,

Name: Cecilie Bahnsen
Description:
Cecilie Bahnsen, founded in 2015, is a luxury-clothing label based in Copenhagen with a stockiest list counting 70 of the finest doors worldwide. Drawing on a rich culture of design, the collections combine couture craftsmanship with sculptural silhouettes, reinterpreted for a contemporary audience. Each garment is manufactured in Europe and handmade with traditional techniques, intricate detailing and uniquely designed fabrics to present a timeless expression of modern femininity.  Cecilie Bahnsen is showing on schedule at Copenhagen Fashion Week and is selling 4 collections a year during the Paris market. 

“For me, there is power and strength in romance and femininity. I make clothes for women to feel comfortable and strong and independent in. I started out in London and Paris and the romance and the detail is the inspiration I bring from those cities. But always with the Scandinavian minimalism and ease that is me. It needs to feel effortless.”
– Cecilie Bahnsen, Founder and Designer

Name: Christian Bassett Ltd
Description:
Since 2000,  Christian Bassett has been recruiting for leading global brands across luxury, lifestyle, and premium sectors. We are a trusted partner in recruiting top talent for positions ranging from Corporate Functions, Retail Management to Executive leadership roles, across Europe, Asia Pacific, and globally. In sourcing and supply chain, we enhance our proficiency in the lifestyle and premium markets, ensuring a smooth recruitment experience for both our clients and candidates.

Client portfolio includes: Louis Vuitton, Miu Miu, Prada, Saint Laurent,  Dolce & Gabbana, Loro Piana, Tory Burch, Schiaparelli, Lane Crawford, Graff Diamonds, Audemars Piguet, Chopard, Cindy Chao, Lindt etc.

Name: L'AGENCE
Description:
Founded in 2008, L’AGENCE is a lifestyle brand that melds the easy-chic feel of Southern California with a Parisian sensibility. What began with ready to wear and denim has grown exponentially to include categories such as footwear, swimwear, belts, and most recently, hats. Built to anticipate every need of a life on the go, the L’AGENCE wardrobe chameleons with its customer from airport to gala, beachside to boardroom. 

L’AGENCE is carried globally in approximately 450 specialty stores. Major retailers include Bergdorf Goodman, Neiman Marcus, Saks Fifth Avenue, Bloomingdales, Harrods, Printemps, and Holt Renfrew. The brand’s headquarters are based in LA with additional showrooms located in NYC, Paris, and Seoul.

Name: KISNA
Description:
KISNA is the flagship diamond and gold jewellery brand from the Hari Krishna Group that offers trusted diamond expertise in design and innovation. It aims to fulfill the aspiration of every Indian women to own a diamond jewellery.
  
Launched in 2005, KISNA offers an unmatched range of unique designs that borrow from the understanding of the global trends while retaining the quintessential contemporary Indian sensibility. With a network of over 1500 Shop In Shop outlets and 60+ Exclusive Brand Outlets in 29 states across India, KISNA is one of India’s largest distributed real diamond jewellery brand. 

KISNA’s core is anchored on  its expertise of offering high quality and innovative jewellery at fantastic prices for every woman. Each diamond jewellery piece is a toast to the spirit and spark, dreams and passions within. Our endless range is designed to excite, delight, and surprise every woman.

Name: Alcantara S.p.A.
Description:
Alcantara is the Made in Italy leading Company that globally produces and markets the unparalleled material under the registered trademark Alcantara.

Thanks to its unique characteristics, Alcantara is now the lifestyle partner of leading luxury brands operating across the world in various industry sectors such as: design, art, fashion, consumer electronics and the automotive world.
These partners choose Alcantara to go beyond the traditional limits of creations and to explore its extreme customization.

Sustainability is another important value for Alcantara: in 2009, the Company obtained the much-coveted Carbon Neutrality certification from one of the strictest and most rigorous international certification institution (TÜV SÜD). Carbon Neutrality certification is based on offsetting of greenhouse gas emissions through Certified and Verified Offsetting Projects. Since then, Alcantara has fostered a deep and constant commitment to sustainability publishing every year since 2009 Sustainability Report publicly available online on Alcantara’s sustainability website (https://sustainabilityreport.alcantara.com/) where the Company gives an overview of what it does and what its future plans are.

Name: Glamour Sales 魅力惠 -Alibaba Group 阿里巴巴
Description:
As the leading Luxury & Fashion Flash Sales website in Asia, Mei.com (Glamour Sales) entered into the China market in April 2010. We remain committed to authentic products with attractive discounts to our smart shoppers.
To date, Mei.com has established official partnerships with over 2,400 international luxury, fashion, beauty and lifestyle brands.
Daily flash sales begins each morning at 9am.  All products of Mei.com are highly curated by our fashion and beauty experts. We strive to deliver a first class luxury shopping experience to you.
Alibaba Group Holding Limited (NYSE:BABA) announced has invested in Mei.com last year, China’s leading flash sales platform for luxury and fashion products. This cooperation will enhance Mei.com’s supply chain services of the sales of limited time discounted quality products from well-known international luxury and fashion brands to consumers in China.

OUR VISION
Being China premier high taste and quality lifestyle online shopping platform.

OUR MISSION 
Inspire and satisfy China's consumers to pursue higher taste and quality lifestyle.

Name: Vashi
Description:
Our mission is to become the number one bespoke fine jewellery brand in the world. To get there, we’re disrupting the industry.

We invite our customers into the very heart of the jewellery making process to create personal pieces that reflect personal stories – because we believe that something you made means more than something you bought.

With access to every step of the making process, exceptional design and an ethical supply chain, our customers can experience our vision every time they visit a Vashi store. We’re making better jewellery in a better way, using recycled precious metal and responsibly sourced diamonds – and our unique production model brings our manufacturing closer to our customers, which means that, together, we're reducing our carbon footprint.

Follow us for a glimpse into life at Vashi.

Name: Mario Hernández
Description:
Mario Hernández fundado en 1978, es la representación del sueño del lujo latinoamericano, una promesa cumplida del saber hacer marroquinero y la atención al detalle. Representa un arte de vivir distintivo que combina el legado y la vanguardia.
Hoy es una marca protagonista de la moda, con presencia en diferentes países del mundo a través de tiendas propias y distribuidores exclusivos.

Name: CLE
Description:
At CLÉ, luxury is more than a product—it's a lifestyle. Home to the world's most coveted brands, each piece is selected for its unmatched craftsmanship and timeless elegance.

Established in 2013, CLÉ was born from a deep passion for fine jewelry and exclusive watches, aiming to transform the luxury shopping experience. Our vision was to create an intimate experience with a gallery that feels  like a living room, where personalized services and intimate connections make every visit special.

Welcome to CLÉ, where each piece is crafted to perfection and every visit is a personalized journey into extraordinary luxury.

Name: Marco Bicego
Description:
A Marco Bicego creation is a pure expression of everyday luxury made to the highest possible standards. 

Essential and ingenious creativity brought to life by the skilled hands of a master craftsman the ingenuity and creativity of the man and designer, Marco Bicego: nature and travel inspired the original designs in his "coil creations" and "engraving" techniques , recognizable elements in all of his collections. 

Dynamic, curious and always looking for new sensations, Marco Bicego goes beyond the limits of traditional jewelers in his never-ending search for new expression

Name: Gabriel & Co.
Description:
Gabriel & Co. is a New York City-based jewelry design house founded in 1989 by brothers Jack and Dominick. Family owned and operated, the company has since evolved into one of the most prolific fine jewelry brands. It is sold via a unique omni-channel approach on their own e-commerce website as well as 550 retailers nationwide, and was voted #1 preferred jewelry brand six years in a row.

The story of Gabriel & Co. is one of passion and integrity, crafting unique and distinctive pieces that enhance and celebrate beauty and personal achievements. An award-winning brand and industry leader, Gabriel & Co. combines bold, visionary thinking and cutting-edge technology with extensive knowledge of fine jewelry for the most perfect customer experience.

Visit www.gabrielny.com to browse our bridal and fashion collections and to find a nearby retail store.

Name: Rahul Mishra
Description: Rahul Mishra is known for his contribution to Indian handlooms and craftwork. Showcases in the official calendar of Paris Fashion Week, Mishra’s work empowers the Indian craft community through his sustainable designs. The brand philosophy integrates the rich heritage of Indian craft with the ever evolving pace of global fashion.

Name: James Purdey & Sons - Richemont Group
Description:
Steeped in history and craftsmanship for over two centuries, holders of three Royal Warrant, James Purdey & Sons has been perfecting the art of the ‘Best’ London gun since 1814, making the finest-quality shotguns, rifles and shooting equipment.
Such artistry transcends to Purdey’s range of clothing and accessories, complementing the lifestyle of any passionate enthusiast.

Name: Rowan
Description:
Rowan is an ear piercing and jewelry brand for everyone. We believe in “Piercing for All”.  We have reimagined the ear piercing experience and revolutionized the traditional mall-based model. 

All our piercings are performed exclusively by licensed Nurses and all our products are hypoallergenic. Our top priority is to offer a fun, celebratory, and safe piercing experience for all our customers. When we say piercing for all, we mean it. Everybody is invited to this ear party!

Name: Silpada Designs
Description:
In May 2016, Silpada Designs announced that it was closing its business by the end of the year. We are so very thankful to all that attributed to our success over the past 19 years.

Family-owned and headquartered in Kansas City, Silpada was a direct sales jewelry and accessories company with a rich heritage of high-quality, handcrafted designs. But we were more than just a jewelry and accessories company. We were a company built by women for women. We were adventure-seekers and risk-takers, and were all about pushing style boundaries. We were fashion entrepreneurship, offering a life-changing business opportunity to anyone who dares to dream big, and, most importantly, we empowered women across North America to design lives they love.

Name: New Egypt Gold
Description:
New Egypt Gold is the market leader in the production of unique, 18k and 21k gold jewelry creations. Dubbed as the biggest designer, manufacturer and wholesale distributor of high-end gold jewelry, the brand is synonymous with high quality, sophistication and uniqueness.

Building on the tireless efforts of its founders over the past generations, New Egypt Gold has established itself as a well renowned brand in its area of expertise and has proven its leading positioning, thanks to its unrivalled experience and outstanding talent. The Company has worked over the past twenty years on its expansion in the local markets and across the region, and is well-recognized nowadays for its sharp focus on revolutionizing the industry of precious stones and fine jewelry through the offering of the highest quality components and providing leading-edge solutions in the world of jewelry making.

New Egypt Gold has over 2000 employees and owns 40% of the market share. Throughout its 80 years of experience, the Group is the wholesale market leader for gold with its brands EG Gold and Eclat. 

New Egypt Gold aims to position Egypt as a leading country in the global jewelry industry. We work as one team to push the industry’s boundaries and improve its standards.

Name: Achal Jewels
Description:
Founded in Jaipur, Achal Jewels carries a rich legacy dating back to 1985, earlier known as Pyramid. We are renowned for our exquisite Polki and diamond jewelry.

We bridges the gap between timeless traditions and modern innovation. 
Polki diamonds are our passion. These rare gems, steeped in history and cultural significance in India, are the cornerstone of our creations.

At Achal Jewels, we cater to those who appreciate the confluence of tradition and innovation. We offer more than just jewelry; we offer a story, a connection to a treasured art form.

If you seek exceptional craftsmanship, cultural authenticity, and exquisite design, then your journey ends here. Welcome to the legacy, reimagined.

Name: CULTI MILANO SpA
Description:
Founded in 1990 by Alessandro Agrati, CULTI MILANO has developed an uncommon and sophisticated lifestyle project for customers who appreciate unique, excellent, yet simple objects.

Today the brand evokes a world of exquisite collections, offering a multisensorial experience, through fine fragrances, personal care products and home accessories designed for every area of the house. Each item created is exclusively Made in Italy by selected craftsmen who put meticulous attention to detail, while the materials, ingredients and natural elements chosen are of the highest quality. The cult of beauty and commitment to the customer’s needs are the pillars on which the design and philosophy of CULTI MILANO is built.

Name: Altınbaş Mücevherat
Description:
1975 yılında Gaziantep’te kurulan, başarılı ve sistemli çalışmalarıyla büyük bir büyüme gerçekleştiren ALTINBAŞ HOLDİNG, 

•	"Altınbaş Mücevherat", "Assos", "Pera Pırlanta" ve ''Onsa'' markalarıyla mücevherat sektöründe,
•	"Creditwest Bank", "Creditwest Factoring" ve "Creditwest Insurance" markalarıyla finans sektöründe,
•	"Alpet" ve "Alpet Madeni Yağlar" markalarıyla enerji sektöründe,
•	"İstanbul Kemerburgaz Üniversitesi" ile eğitim alanında,
•	"Galata Denizcilik" ve "Transal" markalarıyla lojistik sektöründe

önde gelen markalar yaratmıştır. 


ALTINBAŞ MÜCEVHERAT bu markalar arasında önemli bir yer tutmaktadır. Altınbaş markası bugün üretim, toptan ve perakende alanında 600’ye yakın doğrudan ve 5000’e yakın dolaylı istihdam sağlayarak faaliyetini sürdürmektedir.


TURQUALITY devlet teşvik sistemi desteği kapsamına girmiş bir marka olarak mücevherat sektöründe yeni tasarımlar yaratmaya ve yurtdışı mağazacılığa odaklanmaktadır.


SON DÖNEM ÖDÜL VE BİRİNCİLİKLERİMİZDEN BAZILARI:
•	Altın ve pırlanta kategorisinde en fazla bilinen marka (Nielsen Araştırma şirketi)
•	2013 yılı İhracat Yıldızları Ödül Töreninde, ''Altından mamul mücevherci ve kuyumcu eşyası” kategorisinde birincilik ödülü (İstanbul Maden ve Metaller İhracatçı Birlikleri (İMMİB))
•	Sektörde altın ve pırlantada en çok tanınan 1nci marka (Sibermetrik Research şirketi)

DÜZENLİ YAYINLARIMIZ:
Altınbaş Life: Yalnız altın ve pırlanta değil; tüm hayatın içinde yer alan bir dergi..

Name: Seiko Corporation of America
Description: Seiko, founded in 1881, is proud to be the only watch manufacturer with every watchmaking technology including Quartz, Kinetic, Mechanical, Spring Drive, Solar and GPS Solar.   Seiko’s innovative expertise in fusing intricate watchmaking skill with elegant design results in the creation of some of the world’s most stunning timepieces for both men and women.

Description:
Aaryan Creation's

we can also develop the samples as per buyers requirment our bracelets are 8.5 inches in length, approx weight is mention in item code in grams (last 2 or3 digits)

Name: Acrotec Group
Description:
Through its companies, the Acrotec Group brings together unique and complementary skills in the High-Precision technology markets. Be it with High-Tech components or with specialized services, the Acrotec Group is present in the watchmaking, Medtech, automotive, aerospace, aeronautics or electronics industries.

The Acrotec Group produces the following products:
-components of all levels of complexity for the mechanical watchmaking industry, tooling and  machines, as well as chronometric measuring devices for watches and jewellery;
-custom spindles and probes for the aerospace, aeronautics, automotive and medical markets;
-complex automotive components such as turbochargers, and many others…
The services offered by the group include galvanizing, polishing, varnishing, sanding, decorating, heat treatment, engineering, inspection.
--
Le Groupe Acrotec rassemble à travers ses sociétés des compétences uniques et complémentaires dans les domaines de la haute précision technologique. Que ce soient des composants High-Tech ou des services spécialisés, le Groupe Acrotec est présent dans l’horlogerie, la Medtech, l’automobile, l’aérospatial, l’aéronautique ou l’électronique.

Le Groupe Acrotec réalise les produits suivants :
-des composants de tout niveau de complexité pour l’horlogerie mécanique, de l’outillage à la machine-outil en passant par les appareils de mesure chronométriques pour les montres et la joaillerie;
-des broches personnalisées et des sondes pour les marchés de l’aérospatial, l’aéronautique ainsi que de l’automobile et le médical
-des composants automobiles complexes comme les turbocompresseurs, et bien d’autres…
Les services offerts par le groupe comprennent la galvanisation, le polissage, la pose de vernis, le sablage, la décoration, le traitement thermique, l’ingénierie, le contrôle ainsi que la personnalisation d’outils d’assemblage.

Les entreprises du groupe sont situées majoritairement en Suisse, en France voisine ( Haute-Savoie ) et aux Etats-Unis.

Name: CoSTUME NATIONAL
Description:
CoSTUME NATIONAL has a highly recognizable style, which is the result of Ennio Capasa’s ability to merge his Italian background of perfect tailoring to a sensitivity toward what is modern and chic. A timeless approach to style which finds its roots in an avant-garde aesthetic with a sensual-essential attitude.
The style of CoSTUME NATIONAL has been defined “edgy chic”, a blend of minimalism and Rock & Roll with a very iconic, slim and sensual silhouette. The always unique materials and cuts are the essence of the company’s continuous research to find a balance between craftsmanship and technology, tradition and innovation, past and future. CoSTUME NATIONAL is positioned in the high-end of the price range and is appreciated for its excellent “value for price” ratio. The client is modern, dynamic, often characterized by a creative background, well informed. The communication is selective and always aiming to define new codes and use of media. CoSTUME NATIONAL lifestyle is shaped by a modern and international calling. Icons like Mick Jagger, David Bowie, Willem Dafoe, Angelina Jolie, Katie Holmes, Michael Bublé, Tom Cruise, Gael Garcia Bernal, Heidi Klum and Keanu Reeves choose to wear CoSTUME NATIONAL.

Name: VRAI
Description:
VRAI crafts fine jewelry by thoughtfully entwining groundbreaking science and sophisticated design. We are pioneers in the industry; VRAI created diamonds originate in the world's only zero-emissions foundry located in America's Pacific Northwest, and are offered in an array of exquisitely cut shapes directly to consumers through a vertically integrated supply chain to ensure complete transparency.

VRAI has showrooms in North America, Europe, and China. 
For more information, visit VRAI.com.

Name: Mellerio
Description:
Les MELLERIO sont joailliers et orfèvres de génération en génération depuis 1613. Au cours de ces quatre siècles d'existence, leurs créations ont séduit les clients les plus prestigieux et les plus exigeants : familles royales et impériales de France, d’Europe, de Russie, d’Amérique Latine et d’Extrême Orient, célébrités, académiciens et hommes de lettres renommés.

Premier joaillier à s’installer rue de la Paix en 1815, MELLERIO dits MELLER contribue à faire de cette légendaire rue parisienne l’un des emblèmes du luxe français dans le monde. Les artisans joailliers et orfèvres y travaillent la matière précieuse pour donner vie aux bijoux et objets réalisés sur mesure.

Profondeur de l’histoire, densité des références, richesse des savoir-faire… autant d’éléments que MELLERIO dits MELLER, Maison familiale et Joaillier des familles, convoque au cœur de  ses ateliers  de la rue de la Paix, berceau de ses créations.

Name: London Diamond Bourse
Description:
For the best part of 70 years we have operated the foremost UK diamond trading floor.

In the heart of Hatton Garden, hidden amongst the many different jewellery shops which make up London’s iconic jewellery district, in a building particularly designed for the diamond trade, lies the London Diamond Bourse (LDB). An organization steeped in history and the only diamond trading floor in the UK. An organisation with such an interesting past, and such an interesting future. You are encouraged to read our history and to understand the beginnings of what used to be a small club formed by Jewish settlers after the second World War in a little cafe. Today, the LDB has a more diverse membership and is recognised by the Foreign and Commonwealth Office as a Trade Association. We are a prominent member of the World Federation of Diamond Bourses (WFDB) and are one of only 30 active diamond trading floors in the world.

To count yourself as one of the members of our organisation is an honour not given all those that apply. Membership is offered based on an individual basis and you will be subject to various checks before you are admitted to our organisation. You will also need to commit to operate under ours and the WFDB rules.

Find our website at www.londondiamondbourse.com

Name: René Caovilla
Description:
Since 1934, a seamless blend of Venetian legacy and modern beauty. 
Excellence is the byword at Rene Caovilla, a story of uniqueness intertwined with creativity, virtuosity seduction, and art. From sketch to sparkling shoe, every step is still carried out by skilled master artisans in the Fiesso d’Artico headquarters, inside an awe-inspiring Palladian villa. 
Throughout its extensive history, Rene Caovilla has designed styles that have become authentic emblems of modern femininity: dream shoes to behold forever like the Cleo sandal designed in 1969. The silver star-dusted soles, also a house specialty, elevate the sense of glamour and dreaminess.

Name: BRUNA
Description:
We create high quality and responsibly made jewelry to make every look outstanding & conscious – This is BRUNA 

With BRUNA we have a mission - not a simple one, but ambitious and inspiring enough to make you an expert in your craft. We aim to not only make every look special but to contribute to a world where jewelry has a positive impact on our ecosystem. Feeling inspired? Become part of team BRUNA and join our mission, let’s walk this path together. We can’t wait to meet you!

But let's get back to the beginning …
Everything started with the chance discovery of rare Keshi pearls on the island of Tahiti. These treasures are considered a by-product in pearl farming’s search for perfection, which sparked a unique idea in our founder. Since then, we’ve strived to embrace nature’s beauty and diversity in our one-of-a-kind jewelry.

With our collections, we focus on style, premium quality and longevity. Every piece is designed by our founder Helena herself and handcrafted by experts using only the highest-quality materials. Genuine pearls and natural gemstones - all unique in shape & colour, 18k gold vermeil and 925 sterling silver.

We are serious about making a change. For us, style should never come at the expense of the people producing it or the planet we call our home. Not only are all our materials ethically sourced and mainly recycled, but we also support social causes and environmental efforts to protect Mother Nature.

The BRUNA customers are our heroines - the same applies to our team. We don’t want to just write about us, we want to hero anyone interested in joining us. Meaning we can emphasize the opportunity and impact someone can have within BRUNA. 

Fine jewelry made responsibly

Name: LOSANGE
Description:
LOSANGE est une société composée de deux manufactures situées à Besançon et à Toulon sur Allier qui réalisent des pièces de joaillerie en moyennes et grandes séries.

Les manufactures LOSANGE font parties du Groupe MCGP depuis 2012 et réunissent plus de 400 collaborateurs qui apportent leur expertise industrielle, leur innovation et leur savoir-faire joailliers en joaillerie, polissage, sertissage, usinage et fonderie.

Fondé en 2004, le Groupe a pour raison d’être de créer et transmettre le beau avec passion pour permettre à chacun de s'accomplir. 

Le Groupe a intégré l’ensemble des savoir-faire et des métiers de la filière de la joaillerie et accompagne les plus prestigieuses Maisons joaillières. 

Le Groupe MCGP regroupe LOSANGE ainsi que :
• CORINGER, Atelier parisien de haute joaillerie qui réalise des pièces d’exception, uniques ou en petites séries
• NOUVEL HERITAGE, Maison de joaillerie française,
• MCGP, la maison mère du groupe.

Le Groupe MCGP est fortement engagé dans une démarche RSE qui privilégie le bien-être des collaborateurs et le respect de l’environnement.

Notre atelier et nos manufactures sont certifiés par le Responsible Jewellery Council (RJC) et ont la certification Chain of Custody (CoC). Notre manufacture de Besançon, construite en 2019 est certifiée BREEAM- VERY GOOD, norme qui privilégie dans la construction d’un bâtiment, la prise en considération des aspects humains ainsi que la biodiversité, l’environnement et l’écomobilité. La certification est en cours pour notre nouvelle manufacture de Toulon sur Allier.

Depuis notre création, nous valorisons l’engagement, le respect et le dépassement de soi. Le capital humain est la clé de notre réussite et croissance grâce à des équipes de talents passionnés, compétents et performant. 

Rejoindre le Groupe MCGP, c’est avant tout vivre et partager nos valeurs pionnières qui nous rassemblent et constituent les leviers d’excellence du Groupe : la Confiance, l’Audace et la Coopération.

Name: GUERREIRO Joias
Description:
Na década de 70, Guerreiro entrou para o mundo das joias, encantando e conquistando a juventude dourada com o design de suas peças em prata.

Dono de um estilo único e de misturas inusitadas de matéria-prima, como rabo de elefante. Suas famosas pulseiras de alpaca com cobre, usadas para gravar o nome, conquistaram o público e marcaram uma época.

Name: Paspaley
Description:
Paspaley’s quest is to discover the most beautiful pearls in the world in one of the most pristine and remote locations on the planet – the Kimberley.

As pearling pioneers, we have dedicated over 80 years to the highest quality pearl. Today, the family business is the source of the rarest and most valuable pearls in the world.

Paspaley inspires women all over the world with not only our pearls, which have an exceptional colour and lustre, but also contemporary designs and innovative craftsmanship. The versatility of the designs allows women to personalise their look for any occasion.

We nurture our pearls on a remote network of farms stretching more than 2500km across the north-west coast of Australia. With a sophisticated fleet of purpose built ships, Paspaley is one of the few companies to still dive for wild pearl oysters. Our innovative techniques have been widely acknowledged as world’s best practice, positioning the Paspaley name at the forefront of the pearling industry.

Follow Paspaley’s adventure and discover our Signature Collections at Paspaley.com

Name: Maria Dolores
Description:
THE BRAND

 

Founded in 2008, Maria Dolores is a Brazilian jewelry brand that is instantly recognizable for the originality of its designs. The brand takes its name from its founder, the designer who as Creative Director releases several unique collections each year. 

 

Each extraordinary earring, bracelet, ring and necklace is a direct result of her deep connection to the arts. The designs are vibrant and full of meaning, using noble metals and natural Brazilian stones. It's a clever, sophisticated look that pleases women of all ages. Maria Dolores is also a constant presence in the Brazilian fashion scene: she has done several joint collections with fashion designers and also collabs with stylists, celebrities and the fashion press.

 

Maria Dolores is rapidly expanding and becoming more relevant in the international market. As of January 2019 there are 11 flagship stores and 4 showrooms (São Paulo, Curitiba, Aveiro-Portugal and Miami/USA). Maria Dolores also is sold worldwide through e-stores, and wholesale by more than 250 sales agents in five continents.

 

THE DESIGNER

 

Maria Dolores is a true art lover. She draws inspiration from architecture and fashion - her biggest passions. After graduating from Design School she joined the design team of one of the largest luxury jewelry brands in Brazil, honing her skills and creative processes. 

 

After a few years, the restless designer further refined her knowledge in Florence, Italy and decided to launch her own brand upon her return to Brazil. Ten years later Maria Dolores is one of the most renowned brands in the country. Her pieces are more than just accessories - in each creation Maria Dolores expresses her sensibility through gorgeous, extraordinary designs that clients are sure to fall in love with.

Name: ALROMAIZAN GOLD & JEWELLERY
Description: Al Romaizan is one of the leading gold and jewellery companies in the GCC. Headquartered in Riyadh, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Name: SEIKO WATCH CORPORATION
Description:
Origin dates back to 1881, K. Hattori a watch and clock repair shop founded by Mr. Kintaro Hattori in Ginza Tokyo.
The current company develop and market SEIKO and other branded watches worldwide.

Name: ROCCA
Description:
Rocca - The Best Luxury Experience 

Rocca is the only luxury jewelry and watch chain in Italy and one of the most important in the world. It has over 25 Boutiques in Italy’s most important shopping streets, as well as in Lugano, Tirana and at the airports of Fiumicino, Malpensa and Linate. Its hallmark traits include the distribution of world-class brands, the intrinsic value of the products offered, first-rate assistance, its state-of-the-art laboratories, the professionalism of its master watchmakers, and the unique shopping experience offered are all engrained in its DNA.  

Dedication and a strong service culture have always been the cornerstones of Rocca ever since it was founded, with outstanding customer care that translates into excellent pre-sale and after sales assistance. The store’s highly experienced staff attentively advise customers, offering a prompt and comprehensive service.

Name: Valentina Ferragni Studio
Description:
Established in 2020, Valentina Ferragni Studio is the new jewelry brand founded and directed by Valentina Ferragni, Designer and Owner. 

The brand moved its first steps as an e-commerce brand and now is also present in brick-and-mortar locations across Italy, planning to expand its horizons around the world. 

Valentina Ferragni’s creations are entirely made in Italy, as a result of a perfect combination of quality materials and a search for a style that combines current trends with a glamorous and iconic attitude. This ready-to-wear jewelry is conceived to be innovative and different while remaining chic and suitable for every occasion. 

With the iconic UALI shape becoming consistent in the European landscape, Valentina Ferragni is widening the product portfolio to create new icons and experiences for its clients. 

The brand’s inspirations are passion, aesthetic, vision and an unmistakable lifestyle. Valentina Ferragni Studio stands out for the values of inclusivity, diversity and women empowerment.

Name: S&S Group
Description:
1. Overview

S&S Group is a premier group of companies with a focus on (ultra) luxury, real estate development, arts, and fashion industries. As the exclusive importer, distributor, and representative of numerous prestigious luxury brands in Vietnam, we are pioneers in providing authentic, unique experiences and lifestyle choices for affluent customers in the luxury and premium segments.

Since our establishment in 2013, we have established ourselves as a major player in the luxury retail sector, developing our own network of distribution, sales, and retail outlets. We take pride in providing outstanding customer service and have successfully opened a number of prestigious, award-winning boutiques in the main business hubs in the country. Our efforts have led to exponential revenue growth year on year, making us a recognized leader in the luxury goods and merchandise market.

2. Vision

S&S Group is dedicated to improve our colleagues, partners and patrons’ lives. We are determined that everyone who has come to be with us, would be inspired and be part of a brighter future. We work for higher purpose which is to expand the possibility to live better. We will always strive for excellence in every decision made – including the services and experiences that we offer.
Our core vision is to consistently contribute to the advancement and development of our social and cultural environment.

Name: The South African Gold Coin Exchange
Description:
Established in 1972, The South African Gold Coin Exchange has been the market leader for almost 50 years in gold bullion and numismatics in South Africa. Our retail brand The Scoin Shop offers coins from the world’s most prestigious mints in a safe and comfortable setting. Open 7 days a week and 24/7 online.
We buy and sell Krugerrands. 
We accept credit cards and cryptocurrency.

Name: MaximiliaN London
Description:
MaximiliaN London is a prestigious Fine Jewellery House that was founded in London in 1999 and has expanded to become a global presence. Known throughout the industry as the “King of Emeralds,” MaximiliaN London built his DNA around world’s most exceptional gems – both emeralds and diamonds. The House remains committed to a tradition of rarity and quality combining it with the love for geometrical forms – we call it the 21st century jewelry. 
Foreseeing the future of art jewelry, our creations combine pure simplicity, clarity, geometry, contemporary art and aesthetics, natural color and purity of product. Life-time relationships with our clients are built through handcrafting and enhancing unique creations that become family treasures for years to come. It is our commitment to always offer fare prices for precious gemstones which allows for women to build and inherit “women’s capital” – a great investment that is passed down through generations.

Name: Fashion Avenue
Description:
FashionAvenue.it  is a B2B ecommerce of fashion, design and corporate gifts. The FashionAvenue.it is an evolution of a fashion showroom in Milan, presented on the market for divers years, which has cared an international wholesale and retail development for various famous fashion brands. We sell the best of the fashion to resellers in various countries. We sell the best corporate gifts and luxury gifts to business clients.

FashionAvenue.it è il portale B2B di moda, design e regali aziendali. FashionAvenue.it è l'evoluzione on line di uno showroom moda di Milano presente sul mercato da diversi anni, il quale ha curato lo sviluppo internazionale wholesale e retail di abbigliamento e accessori  moda di noti brand del Made in Italy su mercati internazionali. Vendiamo il meglio della moda a rivenditori in diversi paesi del mondo. Vendiamo i migliori articoli regali aziendali e prodotti brand di lusso per incentive a clienti business.

Name: Lisa Gozlan Jewelry
Description:
Lisa Gozlan started her namesake brand out of the desire to find jewelry pieces that she could style both on herself and her clients without compromising style or quality. Lisa and her husband Ryan, a 5th-generation Gozlan in the jewelry business, are continuing the family legacy with the launch of Lisa Gozlan Jewelry.


Lisa Gozlan – inspiring confidence and style through elevated, modern design.
www.lisagozlan.com | @lisagozlanjewerly

Name: Stephanie Gottlieb Fine Jewelry
Description: Stephanie Gottlieb Fine Jewelry is a luxury jewelry, direct to consumer brand, inspired by the lifestyle of jewelry designer, curator and stylist, Stephanie Gottlieb. Stephanie established her Fine Jewelry Collection and Bridal Concierge service in 2013 to fill the void in the Bridal category, and to make the diamond education and purchasing process a more accessible and seamless experience. Since then, with the pervasiveness of social media, we have grown into a digitally-minded company, offering a full range of accessories from entry price point fashion jewelry to bespoke bridal offerings. We distribute online and from our New York City showroom.

Name: Beaverbrooks
Description:
There’s nowhere quite like Beaverbrooks. It’s not just the quality of diamonds, jewellery and watches we sell. It’s the sense of privilege we feel to play a part in life’s most important moments. 

We started in 1919 as a family business and we’re still owned by that same family. Only now, we have 1000+ people across our 85 UK-wide stores and Head Office in Lytham St. Annes. Each passionately helping create unforgettable customer memories. That’s the hallmark of amazing people.
 
Working with brands like TAG Heuer, Tudor & Gucci, our people helped us achieve the #3 position in the prestigious 100 Best Companies to Work For list 2023, in addition to being announced as ‘Retail’s Best Company to Work For’! It’s also our 18th consecutive year of receiving three-star accreditation for ‘world class’ levels of workplace engagement. 

Our culture reflects the way we treat customers. Genuinely moved by our teammates’ ability to go the extra mile. Positive, even when faced with a challenge. We define that culture as ‘The Beaverbrooks Way’. It embodies passion, integrity, caring, trust and fairness. Values that have been true to us for a Century.

Beaverbrooks people aren’t just here to earn a living. We’re here to enrich lives. It starts with customers, reaches out into the wider community and extends to each other. That’s why we put so much time into choosing passionate, instinctive employees. People who know how much you have to put in to get out what you want. 

We also love to help local communities, giving 20 per cent of our post-tax profits to charity with donations of over £21m to over 1000 charities since 2000. Our colleagues are supported to give their time to charity, too, and we give them an annual amount to donate. We’re also proud to be the UK’s second biggest high street supporter and a diamond award winner of Payroll Giving – a scheme allowing our colleagues to support a charity of their choice with regular pay donations.

Name: Garrett Leight California Optical
Description:
Garrett Leight California Optical was created in 2010 and is fueled by a group of young, passionate purveyors of eyewear, dedicated to creating classic design by combining perfect craftmanship with timeless aesthetics.

We are committed to creating a brand unlike any other - one that values teamwork, customer service, eyewear design, and respect for the evolution of quality frames as well as prescription lenses.

"Beauty, youth, art, fashion, photography, music, architecture and design in general inspire us as individuals and reflect our brand."

GLCO is the abbreviation commonly used for Garrett Leight California Optical to remind ourselves and our customers where we come from and how we are constantly inspired by our surroundings.

Name: ItalianCreationGroup
Description:
Fondata nel 2013, ItalianCreationGroup nasce con lo scopo di promuovere le eccellenze italiane dell' Home Design e del Luxury Lifestyle. Il Gruppo, ad oggi, comprende 4 Brand: Driade, FontanaArte, Valcucine e Toscoquattro. 

Driade: Laboratorio Estetico. Dal 1968, il brand si basa sull’eccellenza del prodotto, grazie alla collaborazione con i più importanti designers. Dal 2019 vanta la direzione artistica di Fabio Novembre. 

FontanaArte Milano, 1932.  Fondata da Gio Ponti e Pietro Chiesa, è la regina della luce decorativa grazie a prodotti iconici che rappresentano lo stile Italiano. La direzione artistica di Francesco Librizzi ne interpreta e anticipa nuovi linguaggi estetici.

Valcucine. Affidabilità e Durabilità. Da 35 anni si distingue per cucine uniche nel loro genere, all’insegna dell’eccellenza nell’innovazione, nell’artigianalità e nella ricerca. 

Toscoquattro. Boutique di arredo, sinonimo di ricerca verso un nuovo concept di bagno. In acqua e scultura, il glamour entra in casa.
