Founded in 2013, ItalianCreationGroup is an holding whose goal is to promote Italian excellence in the Home Design and Luxury Lifestyle. The group is currently made up of four brands: Driade, FontanaArte, Valcucine and Toscoquattro. 

Driade. Aesthetic workshop. Since 1968,  the brand is based on excellence, thanks to collaborations with the most important designers. Since February 2019 the company benefits from the creative leadership of Fabio Novembre.

FontanaArte Milan, 1932. Established by Gio Ponti and Pietro Chiesa, it's known as the queen of decorative lighting thanks to its iconic products. Francesco Librizzi’s art direction interprets new aesthetic languages.

Valcucine. Reliability and durability. It has been standing out for designing and manufacturing high-end kitchens unique in their kind. An elite brand in terms of innovation, craftsmanship and research.

Toscoquattro. A boutique synonymous with a new bathroom concept. In water and sculpture, glamour moves indoors

Name: Lafont Paris
Description:
Maison familiale emblématique de la lunetterie parisienne, LAFONT incarne depuis 1923 l’élégance à la française. Ses collections, pensées pour toute la famille, allient savoir-faire artisanal, design raffiné et expression affirmée de la couleur. La Maison perpétue un savoir-faire Made in France unique et authentique, qu’elle exporte aujourd’hui dans plus de 40 pays.

Lafont is an iconic family-owned Parisian eyewear house renowned for French elegance since 1923. Designed for the whole family, each collection combines artisanal craftsmanship, refined design, and a bold use of color. The House proudly continues its tradition of authentic, handcrafted eyewear made in France, and now embraced in over 40 countries worldwide.

Name: Jewelry.com
Description:
Jewelry.com Is a Storyteller. Our Designer Boutiques don't just show product, but tell the story of the designer through their own iconic imagery. Our Collections tell stories that add aspirational value to the curated product. Our rich content tells fashion and celebrity stories that engage our visitors with our product.

Jewelry.com Is a Designer Incubator. Jewelry shoppers want to discover new and innovative jewelry designers, but the structure of today’s jewelry landscape makes it rare for a designer to break through. Jewelry.com offers a recognizable and trusted platform that allows these emerging voices to get national exposure. 

Jewelry.com Is a Collection Curator. Our Curated Collections add a thematic coherence to our jewelry, from color stories to diamond statements, cocktail rings to critters. Think of us as an art gallery that connects-the-dots, bringing unique pieces together into one impactful story.

Jewelry.com Is a Content Hub. Our editors tell fashion, celebrity and jewelry stories that not only educate, but inspire shoppers to dream big and color outside the fashion lines.

Jewelry.com Is a Deal Hunter. As a leader in the online jewelry world and a strategic partner of the largest jewelry manufacturer in the world - The Richline Group, a Division of Berkshire Hathaway - Jewelry.com is uniquely positioned to offer ‘best-of-web’ pricing on a wide variety of jewelry. 

Jewelry.com Is an Agnostic Brand. JEWELRY is more powerful than most dictionary brands because it is both singular and plural and doesn’t just describe an object (like ‘Diapers’ or ‘Cars’), but is a symbol that evokes emotion. As such, it is an ideal backbone for a multi-brand strategy with a wide variety of products, from unique designer creations to ‘best of web’ deals.

Name: Watch & Jewellery Initiative 2030
Description:
The Watch & Jewellery Initiative 2030, co-founded by Kering and Cartier delegated by Richemont, is an action platform that unites all players across the watch and jewellery value chain and enables them to lead progress and future-proof their businesses in an ever-changing regulatory landscape – towards 2030 and beyond. 

Together we empower the change for a better path forward: harnessing multi-stakeholder collaboration to achieve measurable impact in the areas of climate resilience, preserving resources, and fostering inclusiveness. Founded in 2022, WJI 2030 is a member of the UN Global Compact and signatory of the Women’s Empowerment Principles. In May 2023, WJI 2030 was recognised by the Swiss authorities as an Association of Public Utility. Today, our team is headquartered in Maison de La Paix in Geneva, Switzerland.

Name: VAIRAM
Description:
VAIRAM is a Singapore-based online fine diamond jewellery brand. Our main goal is to bring diamonds to all the people regardless of their financial status and to prove "Diamond is for everyone". We believe that diamonds can bring happiness and are bound with emotions.

As a fact, we are keen on offering affordable diamonds with no compromise on the quality of the diamonds and the creativity of each piece.

Name: NOT JUST A LABEL
Description:
NOT JUST A LABEL (NJAL) THE PLATFORM is the world's leading designer platform for showcasing and nurturing today's pioneers in contemporary fashion.

Set up in 2008 to infuse new life into the fashion industry, NJAL quickly became an indispensable
tool for the industry; combating hurdles emerging talents face, helping them gain exposure and financing their progression independently by providing an easily accessible network and retailing forum.

NJAL today represents over 35,000 designers from over 150 countries. It is an infinitely expanding destination devoted to facilitating growth in the fashion industry and has established itself as a distinctive creative hub fostering innovation.

...discovering and supporting pioneers in contemporary fashion

For further information about NOT JUST A LABEL please visit our website http://www.notjustalabel.com

Name: Zen Pırlanta
Description:
Zen Pırlanta;

- Türkiye’nin pırlanta uzmanı,
- 1890’lara uzanan köklü geçmişe sahip bir marka,
- Türkiye’nin en çok tercih edilen pırlanta markası,
- Avrupa ve Ortadoğu’nun en büyük mücevher üreticisi,
- Türkiye’nin en geniş pırlanta mağazaları zinciri,
- Türkiye’nin en geniş pırlantalı mücevher koleksiyonuna sahip marka,
- Pırlantalı mücevherde Türkiye’nin ihracat lideri,
- Pırlantalı mücevherde son 7 yıldır Türkiye’nin ihracatının yarısını tek başına yapmaktadır.
- Türkiye’de kendi pırlanta laboratuvarına sahip tek marka
- Türkiye’nin ilk Pırlanta Akademisi’ni kuran marka
-  Dokuz Eylül Üniversitesi işbirliğiyle bugüne dek 4000'i aşkın sektör çalışanına pırlanta eğitimi verdi.
- Sosyal sorumluluk sahibi marka,
- Çevre, kültür-sanat ve kadının toplumda güçlenmesi konularında destek vermekte ve projeler üretmektir.
- National Geographic Society’nin dünyadaki ilk ve tek lisanslı mücevher üreticisidir.
- De Beers’in pırlanta markası Forevermark’ın Türkiye’deki tek lisans ortağıdır.

Name: Mondaine Watch Ltd
Description:
Swiss watchmaker Mondaine Watch Ltd has grown into a leading Swiss watch company since it was founded by Erwin Bernheim in 1951. The Swiss family business is owned by the second-generation brothers André and Ronnie Bernheim and has been led by CEO Niels Møller since August 2019. The four brands MONDAINE, Luminox, M+WATCH, and Pierre Cardin are family-owned and manufactured and distributed worldwide by the Mondaine Group.

The independent, innovative, and marketing driven company embraces the world of lifestyle and design, and combines this knowledge with state-of-the-art manufacturing and just-in-time, award-winning logistics and distribution.

Mondaine is a reliable, long-term partner for distributors and retailers, focusing on what really matters, uniting distinguished and timeless Swiss design with innovation and functionality.

Mondaine is and remains an icon in pioneering the watch industry towards sustainability, as one of the world’s first comprehensively carbon-neutral watch brands and companies. Furthermore, Mondaine’s watches are produced with green energy, up to 80% of which is derived from its own photovoltaic solar power system.

Conceived in Switzerland, made for the world.

Name: Agatha Paris
Description: Agatha's vision for nearly 50 years is to make chic accessible. We are eager and delighted to imagine and create qualitative jewels with a Parisian twist. Agatha's design is inspired by trends and by women to offer them varied collections to express their singularity.

Name: Venus Jewel
Description:
To join our family, fill this form for us to know you better - https://forms.gle/mMD8d1hP3NHWJmr59

Founded by brothers Mr. Ramniklal P. Shah and Mr. Sevantilal P. Shah originally from North Gujarat, we carry simplicity, honesty, transparency and commitment at our core, and are known for completely redefining diamond processing by pioneering path breaking trends and business practices.

Our privileged position is maintained by the recognition and support we receive from the world’s leading diamond mining companies as we enjoy direct rough supply from the DTC, Rio Tinto, & BHP Billiton. We are also the proud partners and authorized suppliers of DTC’s Forevermark, RioTinto’s Mine of Origin & BHP Billiton’s Canadamark goods.

14 years of leadership in online selling have made us the most trusted and experienced web based polished diamond provider in the world. 

Our centrally air-conditioned state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Surat provides an ideal work environment for over 1500 skilled workforce. 

Our commitment to cutting edge technology and superb craftsmanship is recognized to be in a class of its own.

We have been pronounced as the first Indian diamond manufacturer & sight holder to have received the membership of the Responsible Jewelery Council.

Venus Jewel is renowned and has set benchmark for grading & pricing methods through industry revolutionizing In-House Venus Grading System (VGS), Venus grading Report (VGR). 

Our pricing is widely acknowledged to be a benchmark of accuracy and credibility based on rational criteria and real time connectivity from data and customers across the globe.

Name: Kimai
Description: Kimai is a fine jewelry brand creating delicate designs using only lab-grown diamonds & 18k recycled gold. We’re moving away from murky supply chains toward lower impact and true traceability.

Name: Atelier Choux Paris
Description:
Atelier Choux Paris is a French "Maison" focusing on families and home decor.
The brand is sold in 40 countries and mainly in the USA, Japan, Korea and China through a network of more than 800 high-end boutiques and marketplaces (Department stores, luxury hotels, chains, independent stores, etc.), as well as its own website www.atelierchoux.com.

Recognized for its unique illustrations, signed by the acclaimed Swedish artist Mattias Adolfsson, Atelier Choux Paris is constantly expanding its know-how through its network of French fabricators.

Name: LANA
Description:
LANA is a fine jewelry brand founded in 2002. For over 20 years, our modern and fashion forward jewelry has been carried at Neiman Marcus, Nordstrom, Bergdorf Goodman and Saks to name a few.  The 1st LANA store opened in Winnetka, IL in 2023 -with plans to open more stores! 
For more information, please visit: www.lanajewelry.com.

Name: PT Lotus Lingga Pratama
Description:
LLP is headquartered in Bandung, Indonesia with its production unit on site and branch offices in various areas in Indonesia. Numerous developments to this thriving, privately-owned business throughout the span of four decades have enabled the company to expand its capacity incrementally, and also to widen its market base immensely.

As of today, LLP is widely known nationwide as a prominent player in the gold jewelry industry. As a leading producer of gold jewelry, we have a prestigious reputation in maintaining the quality of our products and the accuracy of their gold content at the highest standard.

At LLP, we endlessly strive for innovation, quality, and efficiency to always compete on today’s challenging markets. And by always adapting to the latest developments in the market for gold jewelry, we are determined to be the market leader in global scene by expanding our market share and scope.

LLP is a globally-oriented company whose export markets include various countries in Asia, the Middle East, and the United States. We are a registered member of the World Gold Council and Asosiasi Pengusaha Emas dan Permata Indonesia (APEPI). At the moment LLP is adopting the Quality Management System of ISO 9001:2015 and SNI 8880 : 2020 for AR750 & Aurum-Lab product.

Kebijakan Laboratorium
Dalam menjalankan kegiatan laboratorium, kami berkomitmen dalam menerapkan sistem manajemen laboratorium sesuai dengan standar ISO/IEC 17025:2017 dan peraturan yang berlaku dengan memegang teguh pada prinsip ketidakberpihakan dalam melaksanakan kegiatan dan menjaga kerahasiaan informasi yang diperoleh dari kegiatan laboratorium

Kami berkomitmen untuk memberikan pelayanan jasa pengujian yang konsisten, bermutu, dan tepat waktu sesuai standard pengujian dan melakukan peningkatan sistem manajemen yang berkesinambungan

Name: Lanificio Luigi Colombo S.p.A.
Description:
Lanificio Luigi Colombo is the world’s largest producer of cashmere and noble fibres fabrics.
Transforming cashmere, kid cashmere, yangir, kid wool, guanaco, vicuña and camelhair in products expressing the family's passion for noble fibres.
Interpreting the spirit of our times through the culture of quality.

Three generations, between tradition and modernity, that spent their life searching for excellence. A way of being, an entrepreneurial aptitude having its highest expression in transforming the Noble Fibers in fabrics key players of luxury's history.

The whole production is carried out in the two Italian historic plants, Borgosesia and Ghemme: from the exacting selection of fibres to their transformation into yarns, then fabric and further manufacture into garments. 
The verticalization of the processes is the characteristic of the production chain to ensure the highest quality.  
Through this mission Lanificio Colombo has become a protagonist in the world panorama of noble fibres products. 
The company is proud to list among its clients the most prestigious names of the international fashion world.

The Luxury Collection is the extension of the Textile Division. The multitude of proposals that are part of the soft accessories collection, kid cashmere knitwear and luxury outerwear, are the direct expression of the company's philosophy. A philosophy that goes beyond fashion to become a lifestyle.

Follow Lanificio Colombo on:
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/colombocashmere
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/lanificio.colombo/

Name: Ambush
Description:
AMBUSH began as an experimental line of jewelry – innovative pop art inspired designs capturing a distinct Tokyo aesthetic. The iconic trademarked POW! motif in particular received media coverage around the world. With apparel created as a can-vas to complete the story, AMBUSH evolved into designing unisex collections. The brand made its Paris debut in 2015 with VERBAL & YOON being listed as two of Business of Fashion’s Top 500 people influencing the global fashion industry for 4 consecutive years from 2015. In 2017 AMBUSH was selected as one of the top 8 finalists for the LVMH PRIZE.
AMBUSH’s uniquely crafted parts form an idiosyncratic style that led to commissions and collaborations with an illustrious
list that includes Louis Vuitton (Kim Jones), sacai, UNDERCOVER, Off-White, SHU UEMURA, Nike, CONVERSE, Rimowa, and GENTLE MONSTER. In 2018 AMBUSH presented the brand's first runway presentation as part of Amazon Fashion Week Tokyo. Kim Jones named YOON as jewellery designer for Dior Men, and the first creations for the house debuting with the S/S 2019 collection in Paris.
AMBUSH opened its first flagship store on September 2nd 2016 in Tokyo, a space which encapsulates the brand’s ethos in a creative environment under one roof with the design studio.

Name: PT Bonofactum
Description: PT Bonofactum is part of the German jewelry group JULIE & GRACE, which designs, manufactures and sells fine jewelry online in Europe, Southeast-Asia, Australia and the US. We are one of the first companies that successfully introduced lean manufacturing and the fast fashion model in the jewelry industry.

Name: Nandish Jewellers
Description:
Nandish Jewellers is the 4 th generation leading jewellery brand and has achieved strong growth continuously year by year. Nandish Jewellers hold a top position in gold, silver jewellery trading business and within short span of time get a leadership position in this field at India level. We also deal in bullion trading at retail level. Nandish jewellers with its good experience has maintained relation with customers and created a strong reputation in the jewellery field. We pride ourselves on our business transparency, and we never compromise on the quality of our gold ornaments, as seen by our 916 hallmarking, which certifies the purity of 22 karat gold. Our owner Mr. Nandish Makwana with 2 decades of experience in this field has inspired Nandish Jewellers to achieve strong growth and reputation. Nandish jewellers is esteemed member of Gold and Silver and Jewellery Trade Council of India. Nandish now has leading 2 royal showroom in Gujarat,India. We have two centuries of experience in the gold and silver jewellery field. Nandish Jewellers always win our customers' hearts by meeting their wants and attempting to supply them with the precise item they desire. We have a future-forward vision, and we've earned the trust of our customers over the years, which has helped us to improve tremendously day by day.

Navneet Makwana is a skilled founder of Nandish Jewellers with over decades of experience. Customer relationship management is something he is really enthusiastic about. His significant understanding of the sector supports the company's future.

Nandish Makwana, brand owner of Nandish Jewellers has the expertise and is enthusiastic about jewellery collection and quality. His insight is assisting the organization's growth and achievement of new milestones.

1 200 Years of Experience in Gold and silver Industry
2 Loyalty and Trust.
3 Standard Quality of Gold and Silver.
4 Best Return of Clients Investment.

Name: Fields the Jeweller
Description:
Gratefully celebrating over thirty years in jewellery retailing, Fields is a wholly Irish owned company who has been a market leader since 1979. With a name synonymous with fine jewellery in beautiful designs, quality watches, giftware and above all unquestioning commitment to customer service, Fields have a reputation richly deserved.

Fields were awarded Best Wedding Jewellery 2017 by Irish Wedding Diary and we are proud of this award. We were among nine companies awarded Deloitte's Ireland's Best Managed Companies 2022. This accreditation recognizes businesses excelling in strategic planning, culture, innovation, governance, and financial performance.

Whether you prefer to shop in one of our 14 stores or with us online, you can be confident that the standard of product, packaging, professional service and attentive customer care you receive will be of the highest level.

As a brand known for its outstanding customer service and product quality, this achievement highlights our commitment to delivering the best experience for our customers.

Name: Attar United
Description:
Attar United | Leaders in Luxury Retail Across Saudi Arabia
 Founded in 2012 by brothers Omar and Mohammad Saddik Attar, Attar United has redefined luxury retail in Saudi Arabia. With a proud family legacy rooted in excellence, we specialize in introducing and representing some of the world’s most prestigious brands — including Chopard, Hublot, Graff, Gerald Charles, Saint Louis, and Azza Fahmy — to discerning clients across the Kingdom.
Our flagship boutiques in Riyadh, Jeddah, and Al-Khobar are not just retail spaces, but immersive luxury experiences where craftsmanship, heritage, and Arabian elegance meet. Through a carefully curated portfolio and impeccable service, Attar United has become a trusted name in luxury brand retail and customer experience.
We don’t just sell luxury — we embody it. We are curators of legacy and masters of refinement.

Name: Dean Davidson
Description:
Creating timeless jewelry with a global perspective, Dean Davidson is known for careful craftsmanship, hand-cut gemstones, and a signature brushed finish. Rooted in Canada and inspired by world travels, the brand’s story is as remarkable as the designs themselves.

Dean spent his early life on Canada’s vast farmland, surrounded by natural beauty and gifted the freedom to explore. Straying from the norm to follow his innate creativity and knack for entrepreneurship, Dean shifted from a career in agriculture to founding his own jewelry brand. This choice would lead him to travel the globe and adorn prominent figures in his designs.

Travel is at the very heart of the Dean Davidson brand -- Balinese basket weaving, the bamboo forest of Kyoto, and Brazil’s otherworldly sand dunes have all served as inspiration, resulting in pieces that encapsulate the wonder gained from Dean's experiences.

Dean Davidson jewelry is designed in our Toronto studio. Every piece is hand-sketched in-house and sampled to perfect each design, producing iconic, signature features.  

Dean partnered with a family-owned workshop of artisans early on in the brand’s foundation. Located in Jaipur, India, a global hub for jewelry manufacturing, the multigenerational workshop specializes in fine jewelry and has created jewelry for the royal family of Jaipur.  They cut every gemstone by hand according to Dean’s original designs, marrying time-honored tradition with forward-thinking aesthetics.

Name: Kopenhagen Fur
Description:
Welcome to Kopenhagen Fur

Fur is one of nature's most alluring gifts, treasured for its beauty and intrinsic ability to provide warmth. Evoking a myriad of emotions, with a luxurious appeal that transcends time. A focal point in fashion, fur is also one of the most tactile materials, surprising designers and consumers alike with its versatility.

At the centre of the international fur trade is Kopenhagen Fur. An exclusive, well-established luxury brand as well as the largest fur auction house in the world. Owned by Danish fur breeders, Kopenhagen Fur is the leading provider of fur, recognized for its exceptional quality. Decades of experience and the volume of fur skins attribute to Kopenhagen Fur's reputation as the only auction house in the world which can make the fine grading and labelling systems to ensure the ultimate in high quality.

As a leading provider of fur skins, Kopenhagen Fur strives to be the best in all aspects of its business. Balanced by a serious stance on Corporate Social Responsibility. Kopenhagen Fur supports a variety of social projects in the Third World, as well as numerous initiatives related to our associates, suppliers and customers. We are also strong advocates of animal welfare and go to great lengths to ensure the health and wellbeing of animals.

Name: F.P.Journe - Invenit et Fecit
Description:
Authenticity, Rareness and Talent are the values that symbolize the chronometric works of F.P.Journe.
 
At the crossroad between Arts and Haute Horology, the independent F.P.Journe Manufacture is a world in itself, embodying excellence, know-how and innovation, in the respect of the haute horology tradition from which François-Paul Journe is the proud guardian.
 
With a limited production of less than 900 mechanical timepieces per year, the sanctuary of the F.P.Journe Manufacture honours artisanal work. Signed with the label -Invenit et Fecit- (invented and made), each F.P.Journe exclusive movement guarantees an in-house calibre, entirely invented, constructed, and assembled in the Geneva workshops. To each watch its watchmaker that is the rule at F.P.Journe and that is why the production will always remain extremely limited. F.P.Journe produces most of its mechanical movements in 18K rose Gold, a first in the watch world and a unique feature of the brand. These exceptional watch creations have granted F.P.Journe the awarding of the most important international watch prizes throughout the world.
 
Because the exceptional F.P.Journe timepieces of watchmaking art deserve to be brought out to their true dimension, F.P.Journe opened a worldwide Boutiques network. There the visitor may discover the pieces of the Classique, lineSport and élégante by F.P.Journe collections in the brand’s exclusive universe, as well as special editions that are reserved solely for the Boutiques.

Name: Saint-Louis
Description:
Unrivalled, dense, clear, sonorous and luminous, born of a ball of fire and the breath of man, Saint-Louis crystal vibrates with the immense talent inherited from history and the extraordinary creative fantasy inspired by current trends.

Saint-Louis signs every day crystal creations – tableware, vases, chandeliers and lighting items – crafted by master glassblowers and cutters considered to be among the very best in France (“Meilleurs Ouvriers de France”). All possess irreplaceable knowledge and ancestral skills that have been enriched from generation to generation: crystal is mouth-blown, hand-cut, hand-engraved and hand-decorated using 24-carat gold or platinum. Using these skills, they made from Saint-Louis the master of colours and cuts. With a range of above 10 shades, either mass-coloured or cased, and a multiplicity of cuttings from the emblematic diamond one, to the bevels through pearl, olive, star and cord cuts, the brand offers a large variety of styles and exceptional creations.

Saint-Louis is truly a Manufacture of its time, a blend of tradition and innovation that never ceases to draw inspiration from contemporary artistic trends in order to renew and shape its identity. In the wave of creativity that swept through the early 20th century, between Art Nouveau and Art Deco, “external designers” brought their talents to bear at Saint-Louis, artists such as Paul Nicolas, Jean Sala, Jean Luce, Michel Colle and Maurice Dufrêne, to name but a few.

Today, Saint-Louis continues to call on the imagination and skills of designers who open the way to new uses for crystal – and so our tableware, decorative object, lighting and furniture collections are enriched by the creations of Eric Gizard, Hervé van der Straeten, Ionna Vautrin, José Lévy, Kiki van Eijk, Noé Duchaufour Lawrance, Paola Navone, making from Saint-Louis a truly global Art de Vivre brand.

Name: The House of Silver Emporium
Description:
With over 31 years of excellence, ‘The House of Silver Emporium’ is a name synonymous with trust, craftsmanship, timeless elegance & unparalleled quality in the world of silver, gold & diamond masterpieces. More than just a silver manufacturer, we are a curator of memories & milestones — engraving cherished moments, adorning homes with sophistication & crafting heirloom-worthy pieces.

Founded in 1981 by Shri Kantilal Mehta, it is India’s premier luxury brand in precious metals, with a cutting-edge manufacturing facility at Jaipur, Mumbai Headquarters, and stores in Chennai, Bangalore & Hyderabad. Silver Emporium strives to be the world's largest handcrafted silverware brand, transforming India's unorganized silver industry into a global benchmark.

The company has received numerous accolades, including:

● Best Silverware Manufacturer of the Year (multiple times).
● The only silverware brand featured in the Rolls Royce Coffee Table Book, commemorating 110 years of Rolls Royce.
● Creator of the world’s first silver bike (2013).
● Manufacturer of prestigious trophies for national and international sports tournaments.
● Honored by royal families, who invited the brand to showcase its exquisite silver collection.
● Established India’s largest and only fully integrated silver factory.
● National Jewellery Award – Best Accessory of the year in Gold (2021).

Its excellence is celebrated with top honors from IBJA, National Jewellery Awards, GJTCI & UBM as ‘India’s Most Preferred Silver Manufacturer.’

Silver Emporium brings to you an exclusive portfolio of luxury brands:
 Girváan – A story of Gold.
 Silver Emporium – Silver Artistry
 Diarah – Timeless Diamond jewellery.
 Bullion Emporio – Trading in Silver & Gold

The House of Silver Emporium revives traditional silver craftsmanship by discovering, training & supporting master artisans across India.

At its core, The House of Silver Emporium embodies quality, and authenticity blending tradition with innovation.

Name: Ariş Pırlanta
Description:
It is a success story of an artist family that has been passionately connected to jewelry for over a century, making the design and production with love.

From the very beginning ARIS has presented elegant, innovative and high-quality products of affordable price, with a wide range from classical to modern design.

The family enterprise still works with the same passion and enthusiasm.

ARIS, founded in 1906, having experience for more than 100 years, is one of the leading fine jewelry companies in Turkey, with its head office in Istanbul. 

They are a manufacturing and retailing company, specialized in diamond jewelry items like wedding rings, necklaces, earring, bracelets of gold or silver material. They present a wide range of products with elegant and innovative designs, from classical to modern, with over 200 registries and patents.

Their products, of a wide price range, are presenting a ‘‘high quality by an affordable price’’, according to their motto: ‘‘Every Woman has to be able to wear a Diamond Jewelry’’.

ARIS branded products are sold in over 100 POS (Point of Sales) of own & franchisee stores and multi-brand corners mainly in Turkey, Germany and Romania, along with the online stores www.arispirlanta.com in Turkey, www.arisdiamond.com in Germany and b2b.arisdiamond.com for B2B purchases.

Name: ALEYOLÉ jewelry
Description:
ALEYOLÉ nace en el 2014 en Barcelona con la motivación de diseñar joyas simples y femeninas para el día a día. Con líneas continuas y colecciones en constante cambio, siguiendo las tendencias y estableciendo las propias.  

El equipo de ALE Y OLÉ está formado por personas entusiastas, talentosas y alineadas al 100% con la misión y visión de la empresa. 

ALE Y OLÉ trabaja tanto en el diseño como en la calidad de sus joyas, para ofrecer a sus clientes un producto único y con personalidad. Defiende y cree firmemente que el lujo debe ser accesible, divertido y parte de la rutina diaria de cualquier mujer. 

Síguenos para encontrar tu oportunidad de formar parte de nuestro equipo.

Name: Frank Darling - We're Hiring!
Description:
Founded in 2017, Frank Darling is a New York fine jewelry brand founded by creative duo Kegan Fisher and Jeff Smith. Known for its distinct bridal designs and devoted following, Frank Darling now boasts seven showrooms in the US and over ten thousand “I Do’s”. With a team of twenty bespoke designers at the ready, their fully custom, one-of-a-kind designs are the brand's best-kept secret. For those not located near an FD showroom, the website offers an unrivaled online shopping experience, complete with a complimentary try-at-home program featuring the brand's most sought-after styles.

We pride ourselves on being the easiest place to design a custom ring anywhere. Our process is intimate, and our business is worldwide.

Known to provide a truly personalized experience, we offer both an 'in-home try on program' as well as our hands-on, educational, and transparent concierge service. Through these experiences, we have crafted thousands of custom rings for clients around the world to treasure for years to come.

Name: Distribeauté
Description:
Distribeauté S.A. was founded in may 2016, as an independent distributor of perfumes and cosmetics in Panama, Colombia and Costa Rica. Our mission is to bring luxury, beauty and well being to Latin America through innovation, dedication and creativity. We aim to provide best in class service to our brands and customers while ensuring long term value to our shareholders. Distribeauté S.A. is a Panamanian Company with a focus on purchasing and logistics. Distribeauté Colombia SAS is a 100% subsidiary of Distribeauté SA established in Bogotá with a focus on Marketing, Sell-in, and Sell-out support.

If you have any inquiries, you may contact us at the following emails:

- Human Resources: gestionhumana@distribeaute.com

- Marketing Costa Rica: mercadolocalcr@distribeaute.com

- Marketing Panama: mercadolocalpanama@distribeaute.com

- Marketing Colombia: mercadeo.colombia@distribeaute.com

- Sales Colombia: comercial.colombia@distribeaute.com

- Sales Panama: comercial.panama@distribeaute.com

- Sales Costa Rica: comercial.costarica@distribeaute.com

Name: Imseeh Jewelry
Description: Expert crafters of timeless fine jewelry designed to last beyond fashion. Imseeh, your trusted jewelers since 1957.

Name: Fellows Auctioneers
Description:
Established in 1876, Fellows is one of the UK's leading auction houses specialising in antiques, jewellery and watches. 

The team at Fellows has developed long term relationships with both buyers and vendors and we strive to continue this with all our customers. We understand that all of our customers are individuals and we endeavour to provide a personal service.

Name: BOGHOSSIAN
Description: Geneva-based, family-run high jewellery house Boghossian boasts a rich history spanning over 150 years. Helmed by fifth- and sixth-generation gem experts, the Maison draws artistic inspiration from its beginnings at the centre of the Silk Route, combining Eastern opulence with innovative Swiss craftsmanship. Boghossian pushes the boundaries of jewellery design to showcase diamonds and gemstones in an audacious new light: whether through the Art of Inlay, its signature Kissing technique or the patented Merveilles style. Through a combination of extraordinary gemstones and daring design, Boghossian has achieved world-record prices at auction and attracted an international clientele of high jewellery connoisseurs.

Name: PT Karya Utamaputra Mandiri
Description: PT KARYA UTAMAPUTRA MANDIRI (“YT UTAMA PUTRA”), a manufacturer of gold jewelry with operational experience in both domestic and export markets, was first founded in 1999 at Bandung, West Java, Indonesia. It was initially established as YT JEWELRY which was later officially renamed to YT UTAMA PUTRA on November 10th, 2001.

Name: Sinn Spezialuhren zu Frankfurt am Main
Description:
"Functionality is the highest priority. SINN timepieces feature a number of technical highlights that are included for practical reasons, and not because they are fashionable."

The name Sinn Spezialuhren stands for highly functional mechanical timepieces which are designed to impress not only pilots, divers, and the German federal police special force GSG 9 (Grenzschutzgruppe). SINN watches continuously prove their toughness, durability, high quality and precision in both everyday and extreme situations. These characteristics are due in no small part to the incorporation of special technologies including DIAPAL, Ar-Dehumidifying Technology, HYDRO and TEGIMENT. When Sinn Spezialuhren develops a new watch, its form is always dictated by the required function.

Name: Maria Black
Description:
Born in Copenhagen, we blend fine jewellery with luxury ear piercing — rooted in Scandinavian design. Our discipline is craft, precision and quality; our medium is recycled sterling silver and gold. We pair advanced digital design with traditional benchwork to move jewellery forward—underpinned by a fair supply chain, respectful partnerships and responsible sourcing.

In our ear-piercing studios, trained specialists map each ear, compose considered stacks and guide thoughtful aftercare—the experience is calm, exacting and beautifully documented. All piercing jewellery is designed and produced in accordance with APP (Association of Professional Piercers) standards.

Discover us online and in our stores across Copenhagen, Berlin, Oslo, London and Tokyo, alongside capsule projects and luxury ear-piercing studios.

Name: Beautifect
Description: The luxury award winning go-to brand for the best beauty tools. The ultimate way to do your makeup every day!

Name: FabYouAre Private Limited
Description:
FabYouAre is a fashion house creating impeccable designs that are a confluence of designs from various eras. Our designs reflect excellent craftsmanship and artistic expressions by our skilled artisans which is loved by our clients around the globe. Using materials and integrating impacts from all-over the world, FabYouAre offers a collection of adornments that honor mankind's roots — from the sparkliest, most eminent tops, to the haziest, roughest profundities. Here you'll find a symphony of handpicked modern, minimalistic jewellery, focussing on brilliance via geometricity, sophistication and longevity. 

Since its inception in 2017, Fabyouare has grown from a modest endeavor crafting just a few exquisite pieces into a flourishing enterprise that now breathes life into hundreds of stunning creations. As a brand, we take pride in not just crafting jewelry, but in cultivating lasting relationships with our cherished customers. At FabYouAre, professionalism is a guiding principle that infuses our operations with efficiency and grace. Our dedicated team ensures tight turnaround times for our valued clients. The ease of working with us becomes a harmonious melody, creating an experience that transcends mere transactions.Every piece we create is a testament to our unwavering dedication, and every satisfied customer is a cherished gem in our vibrant tapestry.

Name: Brasport Group
Description:
To say that Brasport has evolved since 1946 would be an understatement. Over seventy years, the holding company has increased in both size and scope, implementing the latest technologies, extending its geographic coverage and expanding the workforce. 

The Brasport Group now encompasses sales offices, production centres, over a thousand staff and five in-house brands: Brasport, Noomoon, A2i and DLC. In practical terms, this gives the Group the means to trade on an international scale from locations in Hong Kong, Shanghai, New York, Portugal, China, Thailand and, of course, La Chaux-de-Fonds, Switzerland, where it all began.


Brasport Group : www.brasport-group.com
Brasport : www.brasport.ch
noomoon : www.noomoon.ch
A2i : www.infoindus.ch
DLC : www.brasport-group.com

Name: Jean Singer & Cie SA
Description: Manufacture indépendante, Jean Singer & Cie SA fabrique des cadrans de haute qualité pour les plus grandes marques suisses de l’horlogerie.

Name: Al Anwaar Golden Jewellers
Description: Pure passion and brilliance is what inspires Al Anwaar's unique collections. Today, it is respected as a brand that caters to the needs of jewellery connoisseurs from around the world. The Al Anwaar name is synonymous with the most exquisite jewellery available in Dubai.

Name: THE LUXURY PREMIUM CLUB
Description:
SI TIENES UNA EMPRESA o MARCA, que quiere ofrecer una experiencia o producto PREMIUM, contactanos.

Somos una empresa, que crea experiencias únicas alrededor del mundo del lujo, conectando creadores, marcas, empresas y consumidores, a través de una plataforma tecnológica propia de ultima generación.

Una gama incomparable de productos increíbles, de las mejores marcas y boutiques. 

Proporcionamos inspiración, experiencias únicas y otros servicios para ayudar a nuestros clientes a navegar por la amplia gama de productos disponibles.

Nuestros consumidores pueden comprar a través de diferentes categorías: ropa de mujer, hombre, niños, vintage, relojes, joyas, productos gourmet, restaurantes exclusivos, inmobiliaria, coches, jets, yates, antigüedades, viajes, hoteles de lujo, experiencias, servicios, etc....

Ofrecemos una gama de productos y servicios para que los consumidores tengan una experiencia premium.

https://www.theluxurypremiumclub.es/
info@theluxurypremiumclub.es

Name: Redstone Haute Couture
Description:
RedStone Haute Couture is an internationally renowned pioneer in luxury management. Relying on rich experience in luxury market operation, mature brand management structure, and love and respect for art and culture, RedStone has discovered exquisite Italian brands and brought them to the international market successfully.

In November 2011, RedStone was approved by the National Development and Reform Commission and the Ministry of Commerce of the People's Republic of China, and invested in the Italian GIADA SPA. In September 2013, GIADA opened its five-story flagship store with an area of 800 square meters at Via Montenapoleone 15 in Milan, which represents the entry of Chinese capital into the western luxury industry system. At present, GIADA has over 60 boutiques in China, Italy and the United States.

RedStone implements a multi-brand development strategy on a global scale: in 2016, it controlled, operated and managed the century-old Italian haute couture brand CURIEL, and has opened 20 stores so far; in 2018, the Italian genius designer Gabriele Colangelo's eponymous brand officially joined RedStone family; and in 2021, Colombo, the top Italian cashmere supplier brand, was also brought into China. In the future, there will be more Italian brands to carry out in-depth cooperation with RedStone, together conveying the concept of elegant and confident lifestyle. 

As the forerunner of China's luxury goods industry, RedStone leads the development of China's luxury goods industry with its unique business model, promotes the upgrading of the domestic fashion industry, and sets an example for other companies to go global. Many companies have also begun to acquire international brands, which has enhanced the international influence and competitiveness of Chinese industries and Chinese civilization, brought more income to the country, and contributed to the great rejuvenation of the motherland.

Name: Lizay
Description:
Sektöre ilk olarak 1978 yılında aile şirketinde adım atan Mahmut Serbes, edindiği tecrübeyle 1994 yılında Adapazarı’nda ilk mağazasını kendi adıyla açtı.

1999 yılında Adapazarı depreminin ardından mağazası enkaz altında kalan Mahmut Serbes,  bir ay süren özverili çalışmalarının ardından ürünlerinin çoğunluğunu çıkarmayı başardı. Adapazarı’nın farklı bir bölgesinde yeniden faaliyete başlayarak Lizay mağazalar zincirinin temellerini attı.

2007 yılında enkazdan filizlenen umutlarla açılan Viaport alışveriş merkezindeki ilk Lizay mağazası, markalaşma  yolundaki ilk adım oldu.

2012 yılında Sakarya’da bulunan merkezini kuyumculuğun kalbi olan Nuruosmaniye’ye  taşıyan Mahmut Serbes, perakendenin yanında toptana da giriş yaparak  Lizay markasıyla istikrarlı bir şekilde yoluna devam etti.

Ürün kalitesi, çeşitliliği ve alışılmışın dışında yorumlanan mücevherleriyle Türk mücevher sektörüne yön vermeyi hedefleyen Lizay, değerli taşlar ve pırlantalı mücevherlerin yanı sıra altın ürünlerin de satışını yurt içi ve yurt dışındaki mağazalardan, seçkin satış noktalarından ve internet sitesi üzerinden gerçekleştiriyor.

Marka bilinirliliğine yapılan yatırımlarla franchise oluşturarak bayileşmeye devam eden Lizay, emin adımlarla ilerleyerek dostluk ve iş birliği kurduğu partnerleriyle sektöre  artı değer katıyor.

Uluslararası fuarların yanı sıra her yıl Ekim ve Mart aylarında gerçekleşen İstanbul Jewellery Fuarı’nda son model ürünlerini sunarak dünya markası olma vizyonuyla büyümeye devam ediyor.

 
MİSYON
Dünyadaki trend ve yenilikleri izleyerek; Türk kuyumculuk sektörünün gelişmesine öncülük etmek, karşılıklı yarara, birlikte büyümeye imkan veren iş ortaklıkları oluşturarak güvenilir ve sadık ticari ilişkileri sağlamaktır.
 
VİZYON
Geleneksel çizgideki ürün gruplarına modern yorumlar getirerek kuyumculuk sektörünün önde gelen isimlerinden olmaktır.

Name: MUZO Emerald Colombia
Description:
The Muzo Companies extract, cut and market the highest quality emeralds from the legendary Muzo mine in Colombia in a socially responsible manner. 

The Muzo Companies' emerald mining operations at Muzo, Boyacá is known as MTC, cutting and polishing operations in Bogotá is known as CTT, and the market-facing brand for the gemstones is called Muzo Emerald Colombia. The Muzo Companies use safe and modern mining techniques, ethical and fair employment practices, and mine-to-market traceability for consumers around the world. 

Through innovation, ethical business practices and compassionate social programs, the Muzo Companies are working to source the best emeralds in the world, to give peace of mind to the consumers who crave them, and to help bolster the Colombian economy.

Name: ÉCORCE Paris
Description:
LE SAC À MAIN QUI ALLÈGE LE QUOTIDIEN

ÉCORCE propose un sac à main pratique et élégant pour permettre aux femmes d’être organisées et surmonter les emplois du temps les plus surchargés : déplacements, réunions, RDV, afterworks ect.

Ordinateur portable, dossiers, chargeur, affaires personnelles : les créatrices ont cherché comment concevoir un accessoire original qui puisse contenir tout le quotidien d’une femme active. 

Elles ont mis au point un sac à main en cuir ergonomique et léger, en prêtant une attention particulière aux finitions. 

Le sac ÉCORCE devient le partenaire privilégié de la femme urbaine et active.

Name: 晟蔷（上海）贸易有限公司
Description: St. John盛蔷，来自美国加州的高级女装品牌，以独特针织工艺闻名于世。从1962年创立之初就坚持Marie Gray女士追求完美的精神，致力于为成功女性着装。经历半个多世纪发展深受热爱时尚、崇尚品质的女性所青睐，成为时尚界不朽传奇。

Name: Farys Design / farysdesign.pl
Description:
Farys.Design. Biżuteria inspirowana jeździectwem. Nowa odsłona.
Projekt powstał przy udziale dwóch podmiotów – Farys.Design w osobie Małgorzaty Sprengel i Anywhere.pl w osobie Marcina Ranuszkiewicza.
„Cieszymy się, że udało nam się zrealizować kilka ciekawych form biżuterii nawiązujących do pasji jeździeckiej. Oddajemy w Państwa ręce naszą przestrzeń wypełnioną projektami, które z łatwością możecie przejrzeć i zakupić.
Wierzymy, że zakupiona przez Was biżuteria dostarczy wspaniałych emocji i radości z jej użytkowania.
Czekamy na Wasze opinie i korzystając z okazji serdecznie zapraszamy na imprezy jeździeckie, na których  będziecie mogli obejrzeć naszą kolekcję na żywo i sprawdzić która najlepiej do Was pasuje. Wykaz imprez znajdziecie na naszej stronie.
Życzymy Dobrego Dnia”

Name: Gapelii Brand
Description:
Gapelii Brand Is an emerging high-end luxury clothing and shoe company offering the latest in men’s, women’s and children’s fashion. Our apparel and shoes are designed to influence, encourage and make everyone feel comfortable wearing our brand. 10% of all our proceeds are donated back to the communities we serve, providing scholarships, clothing and food to underserved populations and youth.

Our mission is to provide premium quality and service to our customers, inspire growth and success to one another, and give back to support our surrounding communities.

Gapelli Brand was founded in August 2019 by Founder & CEO, Toja Hodge and Co- Founder/Partner, Andrew Akufo in Hobbs, NM. The clothing company grew from a vision by Toja Hodge of creating a fashion brand that would not only provide the best quality in material and comfort for customers but, represent all demographics throughout the world and provide a unique and sustainable means to support our local communities. Gapelii Brand was also created to inspire youth and other young entrepreneurs to pursue their goals, dreams and passions and furthermore, prove that a small-town, Black-owned business can evolve and develop to have a significant impact on our fashion industry and the world if there is a determination to do so.

Name: Arnoway Srl
Description:
Arnoway Srl is manufacturer and distributor of perfume Bois 1920, Profumo di Firenze and Olfattology. Based in Florence.

Bois 1920 is a brand of artisan perfumes from Florence that expresses the Galardi family’s passion for the art of perfume – making which is handed down from one generation to another. Passion that livens up, inspires and carefully enriches our line, of over 30 fragrances today. Moreover, the raw materials research combines tradition and innovation, for a harmony of unique and charming olfactory compositions. 

Our flagship store BOttega Italiana Spigo is in Florence, Borgo Santi Apostoli 27r, 50123

Name: DAISY DION
Description:
Daisy Dion interprets her designs through an architectural lens, resulting in unique and edgy pieces for the confident and sensual individual. The pieces are crafted in select production workshops in Florence, Italy, which are able to capture the intricacies of the unconventional designs.

Bringing together fashion and architecture, Daisy Dion is worn not just as an accessory, but as a medium of self‐expression.

Name: CiRCULA Uhren GmbH
Description:
Rooted in Pforzheim, one of Germany’s oldest horological centers, we are a family-owned brand producing distinctive looking, accurate, and reliable tool watches for more than 60 years.

Our current collection oscillates between new designs of classical tool watches and modern re-interpretations of past Circula references. We create watches that are sturdy and perfectly suited for all your adventures, both on and off-land.

Name: CP Parfums
Description:
CP Parfums comes from an encyclopedic knowledge of the ingredients from Christian Provenzano, a world-renowned Creative Perfumer, with over forty years of experience in the Fragrance industry.

Luxury fragrances, perfumes, and colognes for every sophisticated occasion, immerse your senses in the opulent collection of fragrances by CP Parfums. From its Perfumers Collection fragrances, to its intriguing new scent of Universal collection, discover a fragrance made for you.

Whether you’re looking for cologne for men or a perfume for women, CP Parfums has an essence for every mood. Not sure what kind of fragrance you’re looking for? Shop by each scent and find the best floral, fresh, woody and warm & spicy fragrances.

Make it personal with fragrance engraving on select fragrances for the most personalized choice. Find the best perfume with a complete video guide for each perfume, with our best-selling fragrances like Ultimate Rose, Espirit De Oud, and Nuit De Noces.

For all inquiries, please contact: +971-50-559-4873 or email christian.provenzano@cplaromas.com
Visit CPParfums.com to shop luxury fragrances, perfumes, and colognes.

Name: Michel Herbelin GmbH
Description:
Qualitätsanspruch, Unabhängigkeit, Menschlichkeit und Eleganz lauten die Werte, auf die sich Michel Herbelin beruft. Damit ist das Unternehmen eine Ausnahmeerscheinung auf dem französischen Uhrenmarkt.

Seit nunmehr 70 Jahren ist das Unternehmen in Charquemont in der französischen Bergregion Haut-Doubs, nur wenige Kilometer von der Schweizer Grenze entfernt, niedergelassen. Unser kleines Örtchen im Jura kann auf eine bedeutende Uhrentradition zurückblicken und beheimatete vor 50 Jahren mehr als 30 Uhrenunternehmen. Heute hingegen kann man sie an einer Hand abzählen!

In der Tat wäre es angesichts des immer härter umkämpften Uhrenmarkts verlockend gewesen, unsere Produktion auszulagern. Doch wir haben uns ganz bewusst dafür entschieden, in Frankreich zu bleiben. Dadurch, dass wir unseren Wurzeln treu bleiben, können wir auf langjährige und hochqualifizierte Mitarbeiter bauen, die mit Herzblut ihr Können, ihr Wissen und ihre Leidenschaft an nachfolgende Generationen weitergeben. Sie nehmen auch emotional starken Anteil an unserer Geschichte und sind ein nicht wegzudenkender Bestandteil des Lebens und der Entwicklung unseres Unternehmens.

Hinzu kommt, dass wir durch die Nähe zu unseren wichtigsten Zulieferern im Herzen der Region der Haute Horlogerie die Möglichkeit haben, unsere Produktion zu 100 % zu kontrollieren. Wir verwenden für unsere Uhren ausschließlich Schweizer Uhrwerke, die wir durch den Luxus und die Eleganz der französischen Lebensart zusätzlich aufwerten. Wir montieren und reparieren alle unsere Modelle in unseren Werkstätten in Charquemont – ein immenser Vorteil im Hinblick auf Qualität und Kundenservice.

Seit ihrer Gründung im Jahr 1947 wächst die Geschichte der Marke MICHEL HERBELIN rund um die Menschen und die Familie, stets beseelt von der Leidenschaft für das Uhrmacherhandwerk und dem Wunsch, der traditionellen französischen Uhrmacherkunst die ihr gebührende Ehre zu verleihen. Dieses Jahr feiert die Marke ihr 70-jähriges Bestehen. Diese sieben Jahrzehnte erfolgreicher Unternehmensgeschichte erfüllen unser gesamtes Team mit großem Stolz und wir bedanken uns bei unseren Kunden für ihr Vertrauen.

Mit unserer Geschichte gestalten wir die Zukunft. Die Feier unseres Unternehmensjubiläums verdeutlicht mehr denn je unsere Absicht, die Herausforderungen der Gegenwart und der Zukunft anzunehmen. Bester Beweis hierfür ist unser Einstieg in das Segment der „smarten“ Uhren …

Name: Faerber Collection
Description:
FAERBER—Exceptional gemstones and jewelry since 1968.
 
Founded by Thomas Färber in 1968 in Zurich, today the Faerber Collection is world-renowned for unrivalled expertise in buying and selling rare gemstones, natural pearls, and exceptional antique and historic jewelry, dating from antiquity to the present day.
 
In 1998, Thomas Färber was joined in the business by his children Ida and Max - the fourth generation of this family of expert jewelry merchants. They work closely together, along with co-directors, Alberto Corticelli and Philippe Atamian, to maximize their individual areas of knowledge, taste, skills and contacts, sharing and uniting Thomas’s single-minded mission, vision, and values. With offices in Geneva, New York, Paris, and Hong Kong, the Faerber team is able to conduct highly specialized and confidential transactions with dealers, private institutions, and museums across the globe.
 
For 2021, the team decided to launch the Faerber LAB concept: a creative jewelry laboratory and atelier where innovative contemporary creations and limited-edition capsule collections are designed in-house or co-created with emerging talents and young designers, and manufactured to Faerber’s exacting standards of craftsmanship.

Name: Samar International Gems and Jewels
Description:
Samar International Gems and Jewels is internationally recognized as a manufacturer and dealer of fine quality colored gems stones like Ruby, Emerald, Sapphires, Aquamarine, Morganite, Tanzanite, Labradorites, Amethyst, Garnet, Rhodolite, Color Change Garnet, Chalcedony, Blue Larimar, Gemstones Doublets, Gemstones Triplets, Pink Opal, Blue Opal and every other precious and semi precious gemstones. We also deals into contract manufacturing of Sterling Silver and Gold Jewelry with Gemstones.

With an established office in the Gem city Jaipur, being a global supplier of colored gemstones; we have become a trusted name in the Gemstones and Fine Jewelry industry.

We travel directly to the mines to bring you the finest in quality gemstones. Samar International Gems and Jewels is committed to providing you with the highest quality, selection and integrity.

" Perfect Products, Prompt Services"

Our responsible approach has become synonymous with our name. Samar International Gems and Jewels uses only ethically and quality sourced stones. Weâ€re proud of our gemstone certifications and reputation in the industry.

Our business philosophy is Service above Price, Quality above Sale. Long term and personal relationship is revered. Customer satisfaction is a must.

Name: Christopher Designs
Description: Christopher Designs masterfully combines old-world elegance with cutting-edge technology to create truly distinctive fine jewelry. Founded by Christopher Slowinski, the brand is rooted in innovation—holding multiple U.S. and international patents for proprietary diamond cuts and jewelry designs, including the iconic and widely celebrated Crisscut and L’Amour Crisscut diamond collections.

Name: Manam Lifestyle Private Limited
Description:
Manam Lifestyle is a fashion and lifestyle company. It manufactures and sells a variety of fashion & beauty products using environmentally-conscious materials & fair processes.

The word “Manam” refers to greatness or excellence. That is exactly the value we uphold for every product that is designed and produced by us. It is also a palindrome, which very well reflects the concept of circularity imbibed across the company.

Name: Cesare Pompanon
Description: Cesare Pompanon est le prolongement évident du savoir-faire de 3 générations : la famille Pompanon, joailliers depuis 1936. Lorsque René crée son petit atelier en étage il est loin de s’imaginer que les lyonnaises feraient la queue pour lui acheter ses alliances américaines; son produit phare. Grâce à sa fidèle clientèle, il développe sa bijouterie Bosle et transmets les rênes de son désormais magasin à ses enfants Agnès et Eric rejoint par son épouse Christine. Ces derniers prônent des valeurs d’excellence au service de la joaillerie & haute joaillerie, avec des creations pour les célèbres maisons puis d’autres pour de nombreux joailliers indépendants en France. Aujourd’hui, les petits enfants de René sont tous réunis autour d’une seule et même ambition; Cesare Pompanon. Avec passion & savoir-faire en héritage, ils dessinent puis fabriquent au sein de leurs ateliers à Lyon, des créations intemporelles & modernes autour de pierres d’exception depuis près de 85 ans. La philosophie des Pompanon; les femmes ne doivent plus rêver, elles devraient toutes pouvoir s’offrir une pièce de joaillerie féminine et moderne. Leur force : le soucis permanent du détail et de la qualité. Mais surtout La Famille ! Réunie tous autour d’une même vision, elle inspire chacune des pièces de leurs collections. Ces dernières trouvent échos dans chacune d’entre nous. Chaque pièce, pensée et conçue dans un souci de confort, accompagne les femmes dans leur liberté de mouvement, dans leur dynamisme et dans leur vitalité. Nous voulons faire partie de la vie de chacune d’entre vous... Vous accompagner dans l’expression de votre féminité.

Name: Horage AG
Description:
We are one of the few group-independent companies in the watch industry. During the development of the K1 movement we gained valuable insights in the use of silicon technologies and geometric layouts to optimize the efficiency of escapement and regulating units. We analysed countless material and coating combinations to expand the lifetime of parts and mechanisms and improve their producibility. These activities we continue to push ahead. 

We are an ideal partner for: 
-	Supplier for premium mechanical movements  
-	Supplier for silicon escapements and regulating units 
-	Development of new movements 
-	Optimize existing movements for industrial scale production 
-	Development of single mechanisms e.g. the automatic mechanism, modularity, or regulating systems 
-	Analyzing movements or mechanism on their life cycle performance 
-	Design and setup of manufacturing infrastructure 

what the K1 looks like:
-	Modular platform without changing the dimensions regardless of the configurations
-	Free combination of following functions:
o	Big date
o	Normal date
o	Power reserve indicator
o	Small second 
o	Centre second
-	Modern silicon escapement geometries
-	Power reserve of 65 hours
-	3.5 Hz

For more information about our work and ongoing innovation projects reach out to us.

Your Horage Team

Name: GROUPE SCHMITTGALL
Description:
Schmittgall, which will soon be celebrating its one hundredth anniversary, is the first French company dedicated to cultured pearls. It began trading in Paris in 1926 at the heart of French elegance and refinement, namely in the old Marais quarter where the words "artistic crafts" and "master craftsman" still have relevance today. Schmittgall is the leading wholesaler of cultured pearls to the French jewellery and fine jewellery industries.

Creating their own fine jewellery brand, Pacôma Paris that evoke French elegance and the graceful movement of the art of dance.

Description: Garder un temps d'avance.
