Description:
Vertically Integrated Social Business  
Gemstones  | Jewelry | Mining | Advisory | Technology

Name: Binibini New York
Description:
BINIBINI makes accessories for commuters, gym-goers, moms, business travelers, and everyone who needs to carry their lives in their handbags every day. 

Our first patent-pending handbag – the TOTE-ALL – is durable, useful, and designed to complement your outfit rather than ruin it.

Name: Syndikaat der Belgische Diamantnijverheid
Description: The Syndicate of the Belgian Diamond Industry ('Het Syndikaat der Belgische Diamantnijverheid') aims mainly at promoting the Belgian diamond industry in all its aspects and the international diamond industry in general, the prevention and fighting of abuses, the protection and representation of the common professional interests of its members on social, legal, fiscal, economic and technological fields. SBD is a legally recognized professional association of the Belgian and foreign diamond companies established in Belgium, and represents the manufacturers, the brokers, the traders, the laboratories and the sawyers and clovers of colored stones.

Name: SVS Fine Jewelry
Description:
Welcome to SVS Fine Jewelry - Crafting Dreams into Reality Since 2003!

 Located in the heart of Oceanside, NY 

At SVS Fine Jewelry, we've been on a sparkling journey since our founding in 2003, making dreams come true one exquisite piece at a time. We're more than just a jewelry store – we're the architects of cherished memories and the keepers of love stories. 

 Our World of Precious Gems 

As direct diamond importers, we traverse the globe in search of the most exquisite, rare, and perfectly brilliant stones for our cherished clients. Our quest for perfection is boundless, ensuring each gem tells a unique story.

 Unveiling the Finest Brands 

We proudly showcase a glittering constellation of top-tier brands including Forevermark, Gabriel & Co., Verragio, A. Jaffe, Noam Carver, Sylvie and our very own custom Perfect Love designs. These illustrious names signify uncompromising quality and design excellence. We believe that every piece should not only reflect beauty but also encapsulate the essence of your love and emotions.

 The Art of Bespoke Creations 

Within our showroom, we house a full in-house custom design team, ready to turn your jewelry dreams into dazzling reality. Our Forever Custom department empowers you to "be your favorite designer." Whether it's an engagement ring, wedding band, or a timeless heirloom, our artisans are here to craft the extraordinary just for you.

 Join us on our journey, where passion, expertise, and unparalleled craftsmanship meet to create jewelry that transcends generations. Your story is unique, and so should be your jewelry. Let's create together. 

Connect with us and discover the magic of SVS Fine Jewelry!

#SVSFineJewelry #CraftingDreams #JewelryArtisans #DiamondsAreForever #BespokeCreations #FineJewelryMagic

Name: Ilhaam Group
Description: Ilhaam Group focuses on Fashion, Luxury, & Lifestyle industries via designing and developing high quality brands, establishing ideal platforms to showcase brands, and creating opportunities to support the growth of Fashion, Luxury, & Lifestyle industries.

Name: Kalavarni Jewels
Description:
Kalavarni Jewels is a young and dynamic brand which aims to redefine the jewelry industry. We believe that jewelry is the most intimate accessory one can wear. It is an expression of our unique tastes and preferences. We specialize in designing bespoke jewelry for sophisticated individuals who care about the quality of their products.

We strive to create a lasting effect on customers through our artistic and dazzling pieces. We craft with the finest metals in order to create one-of-a-kind pieces. We handpick gemstones and precious stones to ensure that the pieces we create is as unique as the person who wears it. Our collection is a celebration of your personal style and individuality, and we hope that you enjoy wearing it as much as we enjoy creating it for you.

Name: Maison Valérie Danenberg
Description:
Grâce à un savoir faire et une expérience inégalée dans la joaillerie depuis deux générations, Valérie Danenberg, créatrice en Joaillerie et expert gemmologue, donne vie à des pièces uniques et extraordinaires, en travaillant avec des artisans experts et passionnés, à Paris, au service de vos plus belles histoires.

L'art de la joaillerie en Héritage 

#joaillerie#expert#gemmologue

Name: Sheila Fleet Jewellery
Description:
Sheila Fleet OBE is one of Scotland's leading designers of silver, gold and platinum jewellery. After working for more than twenty years in the jewellery industry, Sheila decided to go it alone and established Sheila Fleet Jewellery in 1993. Originally selling designs from the front porch of her house, Sheila has since built a strong global reputation for her beautiful and distinctive designs. Sheila Fleet Jewellery now has five retail locations across Scotland: two in Orkney, including the award-winning Kirk Gallery & Café, and shops in Edinburgh, Glasgow and St Andrews.

Sheila Fleet Jewellery has grown steadily thanks to Sheila’s vision and ability to create beautiful jewellery treasured by her customers. Sheila received an OBE in the New Year 2013 Honours for services to the jewellery industry. In 2014, she was awarded an honorary degree from Edinburgh College of Art and in 2024 received an honorary doctorate from UHI Orkney. 

From the sea to the land, Sheila is inspired by everything around her. All Sheila's jewellery is designed, made and finished at her Orkney workshop-by-the-sea, just off the north tip of Scotland.

Name: Blackacre
Description:
Blackacre provides a bespoke and private jewellery serivce for clients with a particular focus on rings. We will always strive to deliver the most personal service possible and the name Blackacre originates from the location of where oure first client engagement occured.

We seek to deliver the highest quality luxury rings in the world and strive every day to provide the most personal, transparent and trusted service.

Our client base has been built up largely through word of mouth marketing which is testament to the quality of service and creations that we have provided to clients. We operate by appointment from a variety of core London locations and are also available by appointment in New York and Paris.

Name: Fergus James Diamonds
Description: Bespoke engagement rings & fine diamond jewellery, crafted in Dubai. Private consultations, ethical diamonds & personalised design. Serving clients in the UAE, UK, Ireland & beyond. Your love, your design.

Name: Sofia Kaman Fine Jewels
Description:
Sofia Kaman Fine Jewelry was founded on the belief that jewelry should do more than shine, it should tell a story, hold meaning, and become part of someone’s legacy. Since 2001, Sofia has been creating fine jewelry that blends antique inspiration with a modern perspective, designed to feel both elevated and effortlessly wearable.

Each piece is handcrafted in Los Angeles using ethically sourced materials and traditional techniques. From engagement rings to everyday keepsakes, Sofia’s designs are made to celebrate love, mark life’s milestones, and reflect personal style in the most intentional way.

Today, our Santa Monica showroom offers a warm and welcoming space for clients to explore our signature collections, custom design services, and curated selection of vintage treasures. Whether you’re celebrating a once-in-a-lifetime moment or simply discovering a new favorite piece, we’re here to make the experience just as meaningful as the jewelry itself.

Sofia Kaman jewelry is available online and through select retail partners across the United States, Canada, and Japan. We’re a small, passionate team driven by creativity, care, and a deep respect for the art of jewelry making.

Name: Bell & Brunt
Description: A fifth-generation family-owned custom jeweller, we proudly stand as an unparalleled legacy of handcrafted excellence. For over 103+ years, we have been honouring our unwavering commitment to exquisite jewellery. We enable you to turn your creative ideas into exquisite, one-of-a-kind pieces, weaving your unique story and meaning into every creation.

Name: JR France Group.
Description:
JR France Group is the new name of Rostaing Vietnam. This company is owned at 100% by Jacques Rostaing. Please consult our websites www.rostaingvietnam.com or www.jrfrancegroup.com 
Write for information to dg@rostaingvietnam.com 
Founded in Vietnam in 1994, JR France group is owning 4 companies (600 employees) with different activities :
JR France Group in Bien Hoa (30 kms far from Hochiminh city) is producing bags, all kind of leather goods, gloves etc...from medium range to very high level such as exotic leather bags (crocodile, ostrich, snake....)
Rostaing Tannery is producing cow leather, sheep, goat leather. www.rostaingtannery.com
Kaji is specialized in the production of bag packs www.kaji.vn
Glovintec is producing all kind of sport gloves, fashion gloves...

Name: Deema Oman
Description:
Deema is Oman's foremost luxury design brand. The company was founded with a devoted spirit and a clear focus: to craft exquisite fine jewellery and luxury goods of exceptional quality; whilst offering unique, imaginative designs that make people feel infinitely special.

Drawing inspiration from Oman’s art, history, architecture, and breathtaking landscapes, Deema blends ancient motifs and traditional materials, with ingenious, convertible designs. A marriage of old and new, that has seen Deema awarded many accolades for its dazzling innovation. 

Year by year, Deema Oman has been recognized for its revolutionary impact on the Omani jewellery designing approaches, and has been celebrating the brand’s successes through its presence at prestigious events like Jewellery Arabia (2010), International Jewellery London Exhibition (2011), the celebration of 150 years anniversary of life and legacy of Sir Henry Royce (2012), Knooz for Fine Jewellery and Watch Exhibition (2012), the celebration of 110 years anniversary of Rolls Royce (2013), etc. 

During mid 2011, the house revealed its fine dining tableware collection for the first time to the public. Unique chinaware sets are commissioned by the house’s clients to meet their unique requirements for customised features and represent limited edition issues.

Visit: deema-oman.com to find out more about our stunning ranges of luxury jewellery, linen, chinaware and gifts.

Name: IDEE Brand Platform
Description: IBP is a company based in Milan, which provides dedicated support in all commercial activity for design and fashion brands through the various stages of their growth steps.

Name: Sarah O. Jewelry
Description:
Sarah O. Jewelry connects people nationwide with unique fine jewelry and stunning gemstones. We proudly serve our community through two local showrooms in Denver, Colorado and our online store.

As a Latina-owned business with an all-female team, we’re passionate about making life shine for our clients. We love ALL love and believe everyone deserves something beautiful, so we’re proud of the wonderful, inclusive community we’ve built.

Name: Insider Creations
Description:
Insider Creations extends your brand into the world of jewelry. We are your design + manufacturing partner.

What makes us special? We leverage skilled in-house artisans, hyper-efficient global manufacturing facilities and fanatical customer care to design and then craft quality pieces that excite your customers and stand as a unique testament to your brand.

Name: Cristina Sabatini New York
Description:
Cristina Sabatini is a global entrepreneur best described in the likeness of her eponymous accessories collection: vibrant, elegant and bold. Her brand’s tagline “Timeless. Modern. Luxurious.” also speaks to the similarities between the line and its designer.

Cristina is an innovative artist who has devoted her life to discovering and perfecting her aesthetic as a result of her expanding worldview through her travels. Each of her collections is inspired by a city or art style she has encountered and tied together with a classical, geometric influence.

Name: DFLY - Joaillier depuis le XXIe siècle
Description:
Le nom DFLY s’inspire de la lettre D de diamant et de la libellule - en anglais Dragonfly – qui symbolise l’élégance et la biodiversité.
DFLY est une marque de joaillerie au design contemporain, de fabrication française de haute qualité et à l’engagement éthique afin de répondre aux exigences qualitatives et environnementales de notre époque tout en proposant un design singulier, épuré et confortable.

Name: Efesto Group
Description:
Il gruppo Efesto, grazie alle professionalità che lo compongono e alla loro pluriennale esperienza nel settore, si occupa di fornire supporto sia alle aziende che ai privati nel campo del design, della produzione e della formazione.
L'obbiettivo è fornire una consulenza a trecentosessanta gradi per quanto concerne il settore dei preziosi:
dalla perizia del gioiello d'epoca alla realizzazione di pezzi unici, dal progetto 'ad personam' alla consulenza gemmologica sottesa agli investimenti in diamanti.

Name: H.AZEEM London
Description:
H.AZEEM London is an award-winning gemstone jewellery brand with a passion for timeless design and exceptional craftsmanship. Founded in London and inspired by the world, our jewellery blends heritage elegance with contemporary luxury, creating pieces to be treasured for a lifetime.

We specialise in handcrafted sterling silver and natural gemstones, ethically sourced from around the globe. Every gem is meticulously set by hand, ensuring a unique, high-quality finish that speaks to both history and modern sophistication.

Our founder, Hinna Azeem, left the world of banking to pursue her passion for fine jewellery. Trained at Central St. Martin’s College of Art and Design, she has traveled across Asia, Africa, and South America in search of the finest gemstones, ensuring that every piece tells a story.

Over a decade later, our jewellery is now available worldwide and showcased in UNESCO World Heritage Sites, Museums, and Palaces. We have been commissioned by royal palaces, cultural institutions across the UK and Europe.

At H.AZEEM London, we believe jewellery is more than just an accessory—it's a connection to history, culture, and personal expression.

 ‘Every woman should own a piece of the world’

Name: Sandeep Diamond Corporation
Description: At Sandeep Diamond Corporation, we have developed a reputation as a best-in-class vendor partner to the major jewelry retailers in North America for over 30 years.  Evolving from a loose diamond dealer to an end-to-end solution for our retail partners, we strive to be ahead of the times.

Name: Isabel Sanchis
Description:
Isabel Sanchis es una compañía valenciana especializada en vestidos de fiesta y ceremonia con más de dos décadas de experiencia, asentada sobre tres pilares fundamentales: la obsesión por el detalle en la elegancia de cada mujer, la selección de las mejores telas existentes y un equipo preparado para atender las necesidades tanto de una joven como de una madrina. Nos mueve el gusto por el detalle para poder realzar cada bello matiz de la mujer que viste nuestros diseños.

Nuestra empresa es una empresa española dedicada a la moda desde 1990 con sede en Benaguasil (Valencia), desde donde se lleva a cabo el diseño, fabricación y envío de sus creaciones. Nuestra infraestructura hace posible una atención individualizada, lo que proporciona un producto Made in Spain "ad-hoc" para cada cliente y un servicio inmediato.

En la actualidad, operamos a nivel nacional e internacional con presencia en más de 40 países, entre ellos Italia, Francia, EEUU, Arabia Saudí o China. En el mercado español, Isabel Sanchís tiene presencia en medio centenar de puntos de venta multimarca. 

Entre las famosas que han lucido nuestros vestidos se encuentran Ana Belén, Nuria Gago, Nieves Álvarez, Miren Ibarguren, Paula Echevarría, Mariam Hernández, Silvia Abril, Leonor Watling o Vanesa Romero, quienes han portado con elegancia los impresionantes atuendos creados por Isabel Sanchis tanto en eventos como en las más importantes premiaciones, tales como los Premios Goya, los Premios Feroz, el Festival de Cine de Málaga o el Festival de Cine de San Sebastián.

Name: Navrattan Enterprises
Description: A family run Jewelry manufacturing Company.

Name: Hercules Watches
Description:
Hercules Watches was started by two gentlemen from Pforzheim. Mr. Henzi and Mr. Pfaff created durable and strong mechanical watches. in 1953 an expedition was planned to climb for the first time the Nanga Part mountain (8000 M+). Hercules provided the team with Hercules Watches. Hermann Buhl was one of the members of the team and become the first person to reach the top (after 31 people died trying to do the same). The Hercules watch was around his wrist the entire time and helped the team to accomplish this great mission!

Anno 2021 a young watchmaker Adriaan Trampe is in the process of reviving this brand. Using his watchmaker experience he is working on a manufacture mechanical micro-rotor movement to equip the newest Hercules watches. A new adventure is born: Luxury Alpinism! The first watches will be for sale at the end of 2021.

Name: Leiva Joyas
Description:
Somos una joyería con prestigio ganado a través del tiempo.

Cuando Carlos Leiva fundó su empresa en 1973 quería darle a sus clientes excelencia: en el producto, en atención, y
en asesoramiento. Así nace Leiva Joyas, una de las joyerías más importantes y con mayor prestigio de Argentina, que aún después de 44 años continúa satisfaciendo, con atención personalizada y esmerada, los gustos más exigentes del público local e internacional.

Eso piensan y practican Carlos y su hermano Juan Leiva, que de un negocio familiar hicieron una empresa mundialmente reconocida.
Location: Balvanera, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Petek 1855
Description:
Petek 1855 has been producing fine leather goods for over 160 years. The company’s roots go back to the year 1855 when a family of saddle craftsmen working for the Ottoman Imperial Army opened a workshop in a small town in Macedonia. In later years, the family business moved to the imperial capital Istanbul - a diverse multicultural city full of colour and character.

Upon arrival in Istanbul the company chose the name Petek, which translates as ‘honeycomb’, symbolizing the craft and hard work of the honeybee. Akin to a beehive, the Petek family company runs every part of the business from manufacturing through to retail under a single roof.

The traditional expertise of the imperial leather craftsmen has been passed down the family for 5 generations and continues to be part of every Petek 1855 products.

Name: Strayer Watches
Description:
DESIGN AND ENGINEERING

The Strayer watch was designed and engineered in Sweden in deep collaboration with the most skilled watchmakers and craftsmen in the heart of the high end watchmaking world, close to the Jura mountains, Switzerland. Spending a relentless amount of hours developing the initial idea for a proof of concept eventually lead to the design of the Strayer with the patented STR (System-Turn-Release) mechanism.

Name: STROMWATCHES
Description:
Daniel Strom - watch designer. Daniel Strom implements his many years of experience in his brand regarding craftsmanship and aesthetics. With his company, Strom Prestige Swiss Timepieces AG, in Biel/Bienne Switzerland, he revisits time, rethinks the watch, invents new symbioses and gives form to his convictions. The common denominator? To design a watch that does more than tell time. A watch that also has us think about our very existence: dragons and skulls thus become charged with positive emotions and shed any morbid connotations. This is art for the wrist, each unique and outside the grip of aesthetic convention.

A watch that is art, symbol and belief.

Description: California born fine jewelry & watch brand designing unforgettable collaborations of handcrafted 14kt gold, fine cable and diamonds.

Name: Pampillonia Jewelers
Description: At Pampillonia Jewelers we are passionate about bringing beauty to elevate your everyday style through creating jewelry that you will love and wear.

Name: Dali Diamond Co.
Description:
Dali Diamond calls on the experience of five decades, and three generations of dedicated diamantaires, building a reputation for integrity and reliability that is still as valid today. 
Since its foundation in Antwerp in 1950, Dali Diamond has become one of the world’s most prominent diamantaires, known for their wide assortment, exceptional service and quality level, and flair for new marketing initiatives. Dali Diamond is an international group with products and services across the diamond pipeline. The core business activities are rough diamond sourcing, diamond manufacturing, polished diamond trading and jewellery manufacturing and wholesale. Through offices in Antwerp, Shanghai, Paris, Tel Aviv, New York and Tokyo, Dali supplies some of the world’s most prestigious watch and jewellery houses and high-profile retailers.
As a Diamond Trading Company Sightholder since 1969, and through a close relationship with Russian mining company Alrosa, Dali Diamond is able to offer consistency and reliability in supply, while the authenticity and integrity of their diamonds remain assured. Its diversified sourcing strategy and specialist manufacturing approach are key elements of success in the company’s rapid growth. Dali has an international distribution infrastructure in place to provide local support and market reach in each of its key geographical markets. Dali’s distribution is organized through a centralised structure, with the Group’s Antwerp headquarters as the heart of the group, serving as a central supply resource. It coordinates manufacturing, assorting and subsequent distribution to meet downstream demand from each business unit. In its home market, Dali is recognized as one of the leaders in its field, and a great contributor to the growth of Antwerp as the capital of the diamond industry because of its extensive local manufacturing.

Hoveniersstraat 51, Suite 1302
2018 Antwerp, Belgium

Name: ANCOTE
Description:
ANCOTE was born in 2020 among the walks of the beautiful city of Pavia. Its name comes to life from a funny pun created by enclosing the past with the present, a neologism strategically designed for its exclusivity.

Our vision is to combine research, modernity and avant-garde by mixing the most established brands of the fashion scene with the most emerging ones.

ANCOTE's philosophy is to welcome our customers by making them feel part of an idea and community with the aim of expanding globally.

Name: Vertessi
Description:
VERA PURE is a family-owned design manufactory that offers a single, exclusive line of luxury glassware and silverware.

Founded by an architect and designer Vera Purtscher, VERA PURE creates unique design solutions for and in close collaboration with the World’s greatest chefs. 

In her work, Vera is combining functionality, ergonomics, and aesthetics, ultimately revolutionizing the tabletop.

From the famous Steirereck by Heinz Reitbauer in Vienna, the Red Bull Hangar-7 in Salzburg, Eckart Witzigmann’s former restaurant Tantris and the BMW World in Munich, the Glow by Armin Amrein in Davos, the former Cocoon Club by Mario Lohninger and Sven Väth, as well as Gabriel Kreuther’s restaurant and the World of McIntosh in Manhattan, New York, VERA PURE tableware can be found on the tables of some of the World’s best restaurants.

--
We are looking for creative, curious partners, who would challenge us and our products, to improve and create new highly innovative solutions, especially for the high-class gastronomy.

Name: HONORA Industries Inc.
Description:
A Fresh New Look at Pearls 

HONORA offers exciting and affordable freshwater cultured pearl jewelry in a wide array of shapes, colors and designs.

The HONORA Story

For over 60 years, the name HONORA has represented quality and value in the jewelry industry. HONORA has specialized in supplying the very best Freshwater Cultured Pearls since they arrived on the market over 20 years ago. HONORA has become one of the world’s largest pearl producers since the Freshwater revolution began in the late ‘80s.

HONORA’s focus is creating exciting, yet affordable fashion jewelry using the wide range of shapes and colors of Freshwater Cultured Pearls. In addition to our exciting and affordable Fashion Jewelry, HONORA also offers an exclusive collection of the finest South Sea Pearls available in classic strands as well as our unique Fine Pearl jewelry designs. From incredibly accessible opening price points to one-of-a-kind family heirlooms, HONORA has it all.

HONORA has also proven itself to be a leader in fashion trends. From the original Freshwater Cultured Pearl & Leather to their unique Pearl and Chain concepts, HONORA is always on the forefront of pearl fashion trends. Most recently, HONORA has turned the pearl world upside down with their fantastic array of color combinations from Chocolate to vibrant multi-color strands.

For years, HONORA has strived to change consumer perception of pearls creating an entire new world of pearl fashion. That is why HONORA has managed to create A FRESH NEW LOOK AT PEARLS.

Name: Nativa Gems
Description:
Nativa Gems is a Brazilian exporter of gemstones and other stone products, located in Porto Alegre, southern Brazil. Our team is a group of young, experient and qualified people, who are available to assist our clients with maximum concern, being able to attend in English, Spanish, Portuguese, Hebrew, German and French, hence always focusing on the satisfaction of our clients worldwide.

Located in the biggest city near to the mining camps of the southern region, Nativa works with its own mining camps, from where beautiful stones, like Agate, Citrine, Amethyst and Crystals are extracted in order to produce jewelry and home decoration artefacts. Since 2007, Nativa Gems has been increasing its production and improving the quality of our products, selecting the best stones of our extraction. After almost 10 years of operation, Nativa became one of the most known export companies on the gemstone market in South America!

For more information, visit our website www.nativagems.com or follow us on Instagram www.instagram.com/nativagems.

WELCOME TO NATIVA GEMS!
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Resm Jewelry
Description:
Resm was created in 2012 by designer Rasmina Gurbatova. It is the first author’s jewelry brand in Azerbaijan. 

The brand exhibited at numerous international jewelry exhibitions held in Switzerland, United Kingdom and the UAE. Rasmina Gurbatova, the founder and designer of Resm Jewelry is a jewelry professional accredited by “Gemologist institute of USA”. She won the EY “Entrepreneur of the Year” competition in 2021.

Resm jewelry presents an interpretation of ancient ornamental patterns and symbols. More than a fashion accessory, Resm pieces are a link to the culture, traditions and, above all, spirit of Azerbaijan. With its timeless character and superb craftsmanship, Resm jewelry allows the wearer to transcend mere fashion trends and enter a realm of relived ancestry.

All Resm pieces come with individual descriptions explaining the design’s historical context, the origin of ornaments and traditional patterns. These unique and exclusive artifacts make an ideal gift for anyone with a natural penchant and affinity toward beauty and heritage.

At Resm, we believe in creating timeless jewelry of the highest integrity. Our pieces feature a 14K/18K gold base as well as precious stones to enhance the overall aesthetic as well as intrinsic value of pieces.

Name: Iniskim Ammolite
Description:
The Blackfoot word for the Ammolite fossil is "Iniskim". Fittingly, Iniskim International Inc. is a young Alberta company that wants to share its passion and vision of Ammolite with the world.  Ammolite is a truly unique gemstone for the uninitiated, formed over 71 million years through extreme pressure and mineralization of Ammonite fossils. These Ammonite shells underwent a unique fossilization process which resulted in the famous iridescent rainbow colours. One shell of a gem, an iridescent fossilized Ammonite, is so rare that it can only be found in the Bearpaw Formation of Alberta, Canada. Ammolite is both a fossil and a gemstone (CIBJO, the World Jewellery Confederation). Ammonite fossils are found worldwide, but gemstone-grade Ammolite only exists in Southern Alberta, Canada. The conditions produced the rare iridescent, multi-coloured stones. We are mesmerized by these exquisite beauties from the mine buried over 71 million years ago. 
This is just the start of Iniskim International Inc., with many more chapters and trails to discover.

Name: MKL Polissage Sàrl
Description:
MKL Polissage, entreprise créée en 2019 et établie à la Chaux-de-Fonds, nous sommes une entreprise de sous-traitance spécialisée dans le polissage de produits horlogers, bijouterie de haute gamme.

Name: STUDIO TONDINI
Description:
The history of Studio Tondini, its heritage, starts from Roberta Tondini’s personal history.

Roberta Tondini has always been passionate about luxury and style.

Her career took her from Milan to London and finally to Zurich, cosmopolitan cities.

Her eye for aesthetics, taste for details, and love for beautiful materials - combined with her great attention to functionality - gave life to a unique and very distinctive brand: Studio Tondini.

Studio Tondini’s handbags are designed with a timeless luxury aesthetic and are crafted with the highest quality materials exclusively, resulting from an excellent supply chain rooted in the homeland of luxury craftsmanship: Italy.

They respond to the needs for functionality and comfort, which are linked to the Swiss heritage of the brand.

Made in Italy functional luxury, dedicated to all women who deserve the best.

Name: BEN JANNET & CO
Description:
Founded in 1986 by Mr. Faouzi Ben Jannet, BEN JANNET & CO is considered one of the pioneers of luxury watches and jewelry in Tunisia. Today, the company is operating three points of sales in the Greater Tunis region. 
Thanks to its great reputation and notoriety, BEN JANNET & CO is now the official agent of 13 of the most prestigious brands: Rolex, Blancpain, Boucheron, Chaumet, Chopard, Dinh van, Dior, Hublot, Longines, Messika, Pasquale Bruni, Roberto Coin et Tudor.

Fondée en 1986 par Monsieur Faouzi Ben Jannet, la maison BEN JANNET & CO est aujourd'hui l'un des pionniers de la vente de joaillerie et d'horlogerie de luxe en Tunisie à travers un réseau de vente de 3 boutiques sur le grand Tunis.
De par sa réputation d'entreprise sérieuse et engagée, la maison BEN JANNET & CO est actuellement partenaire officiel de 13 marques internationales de grande renommée telle que Rolex, Blancpain, Boucheron, Chaumet, Chopard, Dinh van, Dior, Hublot, Longines, Messika, Pasquale Bruni, Roberto Coin et Tudor.

Name: IPEKYOLU JEWELLERY CO., LTD.
Description: İpekyolu Jewellery

Name: Guillod Gunther SA
Description:
Basée à La Chaux-de-Fonds, Guillod Gunther est spécialisée depuis 150 ans dans le dévelopement et la fabrication de boîtiers complexes et sophistiqués en petites et moyennes séries, mis au service de marques horlogères prestigieuses avec lesquelles la société entretient des relations basées sur la durée et la fidélité. 
Au fil des décennies, l’entreprise a étendu sa gamme de matériaux pour inclure l’acier, le titane et certains matériaux composites.

Name: Finamore1925
Description:
Finamore is a Neapolitan company specialized in the production and distribution of sartorial shirts.
Founded in 1925 by Carolina Finamore, who set up her first lab in the old centre of Naples, where hand-made shirts were manufactured for a very selected clientele, following the ancient sartorial Neapolitan tradition.
His son Alberto, with a very entrepreneurial spirit, and his wife Stefania, with high-specialization in this specific field, in the Sixties opened their own wide lab in San Giorgio a Cremano, a village very close to Naples.
The combinaton of product culture with new forefront manufacturing processes contributed to place the family company among the most innovative ones in the relevant sector.
In the Nineties, the third family generation joined the company and drove a real change. Simone, Paolo, Andrea and Annamaria developed the international distribution of the company, introducing their products in the most exclusive apparel multibrand boutiques and in the most prestigious department stores, worldwide. 
The Brand is distributed in Europe, Japan, United States, Canada and Saudia Arabia.
Finamore is a point of reference for consumers with passion for shirts, thanks to the very care of details and to the product perfect fit: the comfort of the armhole and the iconic saddle shape of the shoulders are only ones of the elements making Finamore shirts very iconic. 
The Su Misura service, dedicated to customized shirts, represents the ultimate luxury.
Very recently, the company introduced also new different product categories in addition to the shirts (deconstructed jackets, trousers, ties and soft accessories), with the aim to offer collections closer to a total look concept.

Name: Monika Kamińska
Description:
Tysiące naszych klientek potwierdzi, że o tkaninach wiemy wszystko. Wybór materiału na Twoje ubranie jest dla nas priorytetem. Nie uznajemy kompromisów. Korzystamy z tkanin naturalnych: wełny, lnu, jedwabiu, bawełny oraz sztucznych: wiskoza, cupro, lyocell. To właśnie uszyte z nich ubrania służą długo, nie zmieniają koloru, oddychają oraz nie wymagają częstego prania i prasowania. Czy wiedziałaś, że wełniany garnitur możesz prać raz na kilka tygodni oraz że nie wymaga on prasowania? Wystarczy, że odwiesisz go do szafy, a w ciągu nocy wszystkie drobne zagniecenia wyprostują się same. Dodatkowo ten sam garnitur możesz założyć zarówno w grudniu, jak i w lipcu. Wełna posiada bowiem zdolności termoregulacyjne, które sprawiają, że latem dają nam przyjemny chłód, a zimą grzeją!

Magia? Nie, to natura! Za to właśnie kochamy naturalne tkaniny!

Sprzeciwiamy się używaniu tkanin syntetycznych w modzie: poliestru, poliamidu i akrylu. Nasze ciała zasługują na lepsze traktowanie niż owinięcie ich w plastik. Nie ulegamy trendom. Moda ma służyć nam, a nie my jej. Produkujemy ubrania, które nie wyjdą z mody za miesiąc. Kolejne kolekcje projektujemy w taki sposób, żebyś mogła łączyć je z poprzednimi. Wiemy, że masz na głowie ważniejsze rzeczy niż poranne wybieranie stylizacji, dlatego dbamy o to, żebyś dostawała od nas ubrania uniwersalne oraz pasujące do siebie.

Name: Lalique Beauty Distribution
Description:
Société de distribution française qui intervient dans la distribution sélective d’un portefeuille de marques internationales (Lalique, Grès, Brioni, Bentley Fragrances, Jaguar Fragrances, Superdry et Maison Noir) dans le secteur de la parfumerie et des cosmétiques, et est propriété de Lalique Group.

Le développement des marques distribuées par Lalique Beauty Distribution est réalisé par Lalique Beauty Services, unité de production basée en France et propriété de Lalique Group.

Lalique Group est un acteur majeur dans la création, le développement, la commercialisation et la distribution mondiale de produits de luxe. Ses domaines d’activité s’étendent aux parfums, aux cosmétiques, à la cristallerie, aux bijoux, au mobilier exclusif et aux accessoires d’intérieur, ainsi qu’à l’art, à la gastronomie, à l’hôtellerie et au whisky. 

La Maison Lalique, qui a donné son nom au Groupe, fut créée en 1888 à Paris par René Lalique, artiste, maître verrier et créateur de bijoux.

Name: Jewelers Trade Shop

Family owned for three generations, Jewelers Trade Shop has been located in downtown Pensacola for over 55 years.  Jewelers Trade Shop offers it's customers one-of-a-kind custom jewelry, as well as the latest collections from leading international jewelry and timepiece designers.  Jewelers Trade Shop is committed to quality service and is proud to employ five Master Bench Jewelers and four GIA Graduate Gemologists.  Customers, new and old, can expect the same exceptional customer service and quality products that Jewelers Trade Shop was founded on over 55 years ago.  


"Have fun. Enjoy life. Wear jewelry."

Description:
"Dans les métiers d’art, l’excellence ne peut être atteinte sans passion."

Cette constante recherche de la perfection pendant plus de deux décennies, a amené David & Nathalie HANNA à devenir incontournables pour la fabrication des pièces de maroquinerie les plus prestigieuses.
Riches de ce savoir-faire exceptionnel et animés d’un profond désir de créer leurs propres modèles , ils décident de développer leurs premières collections. 
Leur marque était née : PROUÈS.

Depuis ses ateliers de Villedieu-sur-Indre, PROUÈS place le savoir-faire maroquinier au service du design pour vous proposer une approche inédite de la maroquinerie de Luxe.

Name: Isabel Guarch Joyas
Description:
Para Isabel Guarch, el mediterráneo, su cultura y su historia -la de Mallorca en especial- constituyen un campo infinito de inspiración. 

 Con una historia y gestión empresarial eminentemente femenina de dos generaciones, desde su nacimiento en 1982, sus creadoras no han cesado de cuestionar el significado de la joya tradicional renovando sus formas y materiales, desde los más naturales hasta los más innovadores, persiguiendo siempre una plasticidad refinada y audaz con fragancias de contemporaneidad, diseño y vanguardia.

 “Mallorca es una tierra de luz, paisajes, cultura, elementos de los que sustraigo mi inspiración y son estos mismos elementos que intento reflejar en cada una de mis creaciones, como un espejo, un juego de correspondencias, una forma de gratitud hacia lo que me rodea. ” Isabel Guarch

Name: Embassy Kirchhofer Group
Description: Kirchhofer is one of the leading watch and jewellery stores in Switzerland and also offers luxury leather goods, high quality cosmetic and beauty products, gifts and souvenirs. The name Kirchhofer is internationally known and recognized throughout the watch and jewellery industry. It stands for excellent quality and outstanding customer service.

Name: GOLD AMERICA S.A.
Description:
Gold America S.A. is the leading company in Latin America in the wholesale trade of 18kt and 10kt gold jewelry, sterling silver jewelry, gold and silver semi-finished products and jewelry accessories. 

Gold America S.A. works with more than two hundred suppliers, located in the main jewelry districts of Italy, Turkey, Cina, Thailand, Korea and India. Its market covers almost all of Latin America, with customers located in more than twenty countries. 

Gold America S.A. employs approximately fifty people in the Colon Free Zone. Almost seventy years after its founding, Gold America S.A. is still a family-owned anf family-managed business.

Name: Carrs Silver
Description:
Carrs is world renowned for manufacturing the finest silverware. Our vast range of products encompasses picture frames and cutlery, as well as giftware and bespoke items to suit the most discerning collector.

Despite our continued growth, Carrs remains a family-run business with a strong sense of history. We still embrace the skills of the traditional silversmith, combined with modern technology and techniques to secure the future of our business for generations to come.

Name: Aurela 18k Jewelry
Description:

Name: Balbachdamast GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
BALBACHDAMAST produces damascus steels in various compositions, cross sections and dimensions for industrial customers, traders and bulk buyers. If requested, we will gladly submit to you a non-binding quotation and assist you during the development of your project.

CRAFT MANUFACTORY

Unique damascus steels are craft manufactured at the traditional Forge. The unique hand-forged composites undergo an elaborate and time-consuming manufacturing process. As a result, virtually any customer requirement can be fulfilled.

PRECISION AND TRADITION 

The Markus Balbach Forge stands out for its extensive experience and skills in forging techniques. Established in 1963 as an artesan forge by Eduard Balbach, the forge still exists today in the German city of Iserlohn. It is run by master blacksmith Markus Balbach as a second-generation family business. In 1991 Markus Balbach set up a second forge, which is located in Laubuseschbach in the central German region of Hesse. There he started doing research and development on damascus steels and finally managed to produce them on an industrial scale. The forging specialists around Markus have continually developed and perfected this forging technique, which is well over 2,000 years old.   

Today, our market leading enterprise provides industrial customers from various sectors worldwide with damascus steels of the highest quality and in various designs. Moreover, the Balbach team has a profound knowledge of how to manufacture damascus steels using traditional craftsmanship. Thus extraordinary objects are created, either as customised items or for the in-house Balbach Line. These products are developed at the Balbach forge, from their conception and design stages up to and including the craft manufacturing process.

The Markus Balbach Forge is a plant approved by §4 BImSchG (German Federal Immission Protection Law) Nr.3.11 Sp.2 under the Federal Emissions Protection Ordinances (BImSchV).

Name: Calzaturificio Arktè
Description: Il Calzaturificio Arkte opera nella trasformazione dei disegni dei designer in calzature finite. Giuliano Tognati, uno dei due proprietari dell’azienda, con il supporto dell’ufficio di modelleria, acquisisce i disegni ed i desideri dei designer operando nello sviluppo dei prototipi prima, dei campioni successivamente, ed in ultimo del prodotto finito.

Name: Laura Bond Jewellery
Description:
“I couldn’t find the brand selling the delicate solid gold body jewellery I wanted to buy, so I decided to create it.” - Laura

With multiple piercings herself and a background in luxury jewellery, Laura was frustrated that she couldn’t find feminine, dainty solid gold pieces at a price she could afford.

Following months spent sourcing manufacturers with the requisite expertise, quality and ethical standards, Laura Bond launched in 2019.

In the early days there was only Laura and her husband Doug working in their tiny home office.

Laura’s sister Georgie joined us in 2020. In 2021 Chloe and Karina joined to complete the team.

That year we also opened our first office in Edinburgh’s city centre.

To date we have featured in Marie Claire UK, Grazia, Glamour UK and Stylist Magazine as well as gaining a celebrity fanbase.

Name: tête d'orange
Description: TÊTE D'ORANGE est une marque écoresponsable de bijoux upcyclés uniques. Les créations sont réalisées à la main à partir de pièces chinées pour leur donner une seconde vie. Des bijoux délaissés, réincarnés, upcyclés.

Name: Les Néréides
Description:
Les Néréides Paris, high soulful jewellery designer house with a unique savoir-faire since 1980, is a distinguished international family business, which is building its potential by expanding into new markets and refining the existing ones. 
Distributed through 400 independent multibrand retailers, more than 90 shop-in-shops in department stores & monobrand boutiques as well as several websites across 4 continents, the brand invites you to discover something new, something which will inspire you… A fantastic reality where beauty engages all of the senses.

Les Néréides Paris, créateurs de bijoux d’émotion au savoir-faire unique depuis 1980, est une entreprise familiale internationale de renom. Avec une stratégie de distribution multicanal : 400 détaillants indépendants, plus de 90 corners en grands magasins et boutiques à l'enseigne, plusieurs sites de E-commerce, la Maison poursuit son développement à l’international sur 4 continents et renforce ses équipes. 
Depuis sa boutique - showroom - atelier de création de la rue du Bourg l'Abbé au coeur de Paris, Les Néréides Paris vous invite aujourd’hui à découvrir quelque chose de nouveau, quelque chose qui vous inspirera… Une réalité fantastique où la beauté engage tous les sens.

Name: Diamond Headquarters Private Limited
Description:
At Diamond Headquarters Private Limited, we believe the best businesses don’t start with products — they start with people. With listening closely. With getting the small things right before chasing something big.

Our first brand, RINGS & I, was born from a simple truth: every love story — whether between partners, family, or friends — deserves something deeply personal.

A couple once walked in — one loved the mountains, the other the sea. They didn’t want flashy rings. They wanted meaning. So we crafted a pair that carried both their worlds — rugged peaks and gentle waves — different, yet beautifully connected.

Then came a boy in the 8th standard, holding out his savings.
“I want to gift my mom her first diamond ring,” he said.
He had visited other stores, but nothing felt right. At RINGS & I, he found what he was looking for — a delicate ring, designed with him, that stayed within every rupee he had. A quiet thank you, crafted with care.

Over the past year, we’ve listened, learned, and quietly built — staying close to our customers, refining every detail. Now, we’re taking the next step: setting up stores, building in-house capabilities, and growing our team — thoughtfully, patiently.

Priyanka Padhye – Co-founder & CIO
Leads with heart and instinct — building through impact, integrity, and empathy. 

Rohit Hudke – Founder & CEO
Turns passion into profession with relentless optimism and a culture of honest, open communication.

We’re still early in our journey — young, maybe even a little unpolished — but grounded in doing things right. We’re building a culture without titles or hierarchy. Where founders work alongside teammates. Where growth is shared, and purpose is personal.

Where the journey is the destination. And we’re just getting started.

Name: GLOBE-TROTTER
Description:
Synonymous with great British design, Globe-Trotter is a luxury travel lifestyle brand producing handcrafted luggage and leather collections.

Established in 1897 by David Nelken in Saxony Germany, the company moved to the UK in 1932 where it has remained ever since. Today, all Globe-Trotter suitcases and travel accessories are handcrafted in Hertfordshire, England by highly skilled artisans using original manufacturing methods and machinery that date back to the Victorian era. For 120 years the brand philosophy has remained unchanged: an uncompromising integrity of craftsmanship.

globe-trotter.com

Name: STONE AND STRAND
Description:
STONE AND STRAND is a contemporary luxury fine jewelry brand based in New York City. Designed for women by women, our collection is made from solid gold and silver, using ethically-sourced natural gemstones and diamonds. 

Just because we've got expensive taste doesn't mean we have to make expensive jewelry. While we produce our in-house fine jewelry offering at the same places Fifth Avenue brands do, crazy mark-ups aren't really our thing.  So you can always expect the most on-point pieces at prices and a quality you can justify.

Name: Jessica McCormack
Description:
Jessica McCormack designs exceptional diamond jewellery, handcrafted in her dedicated London atelier.

The daughter of an auctioneer, Jessica grew up quite literally surrounded by piles of precious objects in her native New Zealand - from antique Maori carvings and greenstone pendants to Georgian jewels and Victorian objects of curiosity.

She inherited her father’s passion for interesting and unusual antiques, which led her to London to work in the jewellery department of Sotheby’s. Exposed to some of the most important, rare, and exceptional jewels in the world, this would be the catalyst for the next stage in Jessica’s career.

In 2008, with the support of diamantaire Michael Rosenfeld, now a partner in the business, Jessica McCormack Ltd. began in earnest and Jessica quickly established herself as one of the most exciting new jewellers to watch. Eschewing trends and mass production for her own unique, antique-inspired aesthetic and values of hand-craftsmanship, Jessica’s designs have effortlessly melded the traditional and the modern since the beginning.

Constantly inspired by a cornucopia of influences - whether it is contemporary African art, the Bauhaus movement, mid-Century American architecture, feminist photography or centuries of jewellery design - Jessica’s designs are resolutely modern, anchored in centuries-old traditions.

Her distinct style has become sought-after worldwide by a diverse clientele, whether it’s a bespoke client wishing to possess their own original heirloom created by Jessica, or a visitor to the house who can’t resist a pair of diamond drop-earrings in Jessica’s signature style.

Name: Royal Asscher Diamond Company
Description: Royal Asscher Diamond Company has been crafting the world’s ultimate diamonds & fine jewelry since 1854. The Asscher family built their impeccable reputation as the greatest diamond cutters in the world across six generations. For over 150 years, they have been entrusted to handle the most precious gemstones in history, including the largest rough diamond ever found - the Cullinan. They own the first-ever patented diamond-cut, and today, Royal Asscher counts multiple patented diamond-cuts to their name. With a clientele that includes celebrity, royalty, and true diamond lovers, Royal Asscher Diamond Company is a brand unsurpassed in legacy, quality, and reputation in the brilliant realm of diamonds.

Name: Symphony Style LLC
Description:
Powered by Alabbar Enterprises, Symphony Style LLC specializes in the retail of international luxury womenswear fashion brands. The Group proudly owns and operates five leading luxury fashion concepts in the UAE. 

Founded in 2008,  the first of the five concepts launched was the multi-brand concept boutique Symphony; the first store of its kind at The Dubai Mall, located on the prestigious Fashion Avenue. BySymphony.com was launched in 2013 as an extension of the bricks-and-mortar concept boutique, offering an even wider range of designers including world-renowned superbrands Gucci, Saint Laurent, Valentino and more.

With a growing portfolio of international luxury fashion brands, Symphony Style additionally owns and operates a number of monobrand concepts within the region such as Roland Mouret, Temperley London and Oscar de La Renta with independent boutiques located within the Fashion Avenue at the Dubai Mall.
