Description: YEPREM, a global brand, stands as a testament to unparalleled artistry in the world of jewellery. With exclusive creations that defy conventions and push limits, YEPREM inspires individuals to reach their highest potential through unconventional jewels that transcend the norms. Through a commitment to innovation and a keen eye for the avant-garde, the house continually enchants the world with experiential creations, drawing inspiration from diverse art movements alongside meticulous craftsmanship. With a daring approach, YEPREM is ahead of its time, and ensures that individuals possess distinctive and exclusive jewels. Your voice, beauty, and power.

Name: OMA LIVING
Description: Modern minimalism meets timeless elegance. Discover our signature bouquet of décor, art & furniture.

Name: Tanzire
Description:
Our philosophy is rooted in championing sustainability and blurring the borders for jewelry as its best comes across when it flows wildly from one country to another!

Tanzire was a dream born of its Founder and Creative Director, Suhani Batwara's desire to bring different cultures' experiences to people through jewelry. Established in 2019, Tanzire is a platform for women artisans from all around the globe to share their handcrafted art with the world on their terms

Each piece of our designers' wearable art tells the story of their hustles, unrelenting passion, and hard-earned achievements. We aim to be a medium of narrating this story from one country to another, from an artisan to the consumer, from one woman to another

These stories instill a sense of camaraderie and community amongst the women who don these pieces, becoming a part of their individuality and self-expression. Our modern minimalist jewelry not only empowers its artisans but the customers as well.

Along with our artisans, we aim to bring women the highest quality of handmade and sustainable contemporary everyday jewelry designs that they can wear anywhere, anytime.

Name: Gilan
Description:
THE TRANSFORMING PASSION OF AN ARTISAN FAMILY

Gilan’s story began in the 18th century, in a village in Kosovo, with a grandmother who sewed tailor-made dresses for the Ottoman Pashas.
 
True to their artisan heritage, brothers Muharrem and Ferhan Geylan  began  their   quest for luxury in 1980, in a tiny jewelry store, later moving to Istanbul where Gilan flourished as a renowned luxury jewelry house; creating exceptional pieces for strong, independent women of the 21st century.
 
By blending an inherited eye for design with the artistic influences of cultures from around the globe, and with the unique splendor of the city of Istanbul, a new world was born — elevating Gilan to its place among the finest designer/ makers of exquisite jewelry and art pieces in the world.
 
Creating  jewelry that will be preserved for future generations is the enduring passion of two brothers who are involved in each and every phase of the making process; from the patented cutting of carefully selected gemstones, to their transformation into the captivating and magical designs synonymous with the name ‘Gilan’.

Name: Vogue Jewellers (Pvt) Ltd
Description: Vogue Jewellers is a multiple award winning company recognized for its premium quality and unstinted innovation and creativity. Pushing the boundaries of elegance forms a part of our rich tradition, and every piece that we design and create and follows the strict global standards which ensure that we present only the very finest to our valued customers. This process has earned the trust of generations of customers who visit Vogue time and time again to embellish their lives with sophisticated beauty.

Name: ELLERY
Description:
Founded 2007 in Sydney, Australia, ELLERY creates luxury garments and accessories for women. Each seasonal collection transcend trends, presenting modern classics for women who value superior quality, masterful cuts and unexpected details. Silhouettes are architectural and bold, feminine and wearable, yet always anchored in ELLERY’s singular artistic sensibility. The brand’s DNA is now firmly cemented in voluminous shapes, masculine tailoring and innovative fabrications, which are reinterpreted season after season.

Creative Director Kym Ellery remains the third Australian to ever be invited to show at Paris Fashion Week, where ELLERY collections are now shown every season to an ever supporting global audience. Having obtained some of the world’s most prestigious stockists and constantly flourishing in the media, ELLERY is firmly positioned as one of Australia’s most sought after and talked about high end designers. As the company expands to support its growing international presence, the end goal remains the same: to empower women through design and to create garments of excellence.

Name: Youlry : Pure 18K Jewelry
Description:
We create fine 18 Karat jewelry in pure gold, love grown diamonds and precious stones. With dollops of style and modern ideas. Each of our designs are intricately detailed, go through multiple quality checks and are solidly dependable. 
We don’t have a choice. We have to get approved by the most choosy of all people. 
That’s You.

Youlry.com : Born for You

Name: Uhrenfabrik Junghans GmbH & Co.KG
Description:
ABOUT JUNGHANS
 
What began with the founding of the company in Schramberg in 1861 quickly developed into one of the most fascinating success stories of the German watch industry. The demands placed on watches may have changed since then, but the Junghans philosophy has always remained the same.
 
The spirit of innovation and the constant striving for precision down to the smallest detail determine the thoughts and actions of all Junghans employees. With the energy of the Schramberg entrepreneurial family Steim, the company shines in new splendor.
 
The commitment to Schramberg as a production location can be seen and felt in every watch that bears the Junghans name.
 
For as diverse as the Junghans range may be, it follows one claim: to combine traditional craftsmanship with the latest watch technology and exciting design. This makes every watch with the star so unique. 

Imprint: www.junghans.de/en/meta/impressum.html

Name: MADLY Bespoke Jeweller
Description:
MADLY is Singapore’s #1 bespoke jewellery design house. Internationally award-winning, MADLY specialises in the finest 0.1% of coloured gemstones, and one-of-a-kind fine jewellery. Bold colours and innovative shapes make up MADLY’s signature style. If your jewellery was commissioned to mark a joyous occasion, then the gems should be equally vivid to celebrate! MADLY’s goal will always be to create jewellery that accompanies you on all of life’s journeys— a sparkly companion for your brightest and darkest days.

Over the past 10 years, MADLY's creations have captured the attention and praise of jewellery lovers, mavens and media around the world, having been critically acclaimed by Vogue, Vanity Fair, and the International New YorkTimes, recognised as a Singapore Promising SME 500 business luminary, and awarded Jewels & Time Tatler 10 Singapore’s Best Jewellers for 4 consecutive years.

Their proudest achievement yet is their commitment to ethical gem sourcing. MADLY is the only jeweller in Singapore, and the first few in the world to become members of the International Coloured Stone Association’s Ethical Accreditation program, the first of its type in the coloured stone industry. So clients can purchase their gems from MADLY with the comfort and knowledge that any treatments and enhancements of the gemstone are fully disclosed, gems are mined responsibly and traded sustainably, not sourced using child labor, and obtained legally. Their commitment to bringing exceptional ethically sourced gemstones to their clients has even inspired them to start their own sourcing office in Tanzania, East Africa where some of the world’s most astonishing gem material come out of. No two coloured gemstones are alike, and often far more rare than white diamonds. A MADLY Gem is one worth collecting now and for future generations to come because when it comes to our gemstones, only the world’s finest, top 0.1% will do.

Name: Ibrahim & Khalid Abu Shaqra & Partners Co.
Description:
I&K Abu Shaqra has established itself as one of the leading companies in the luxury field for the Jordanian market. I&K Abu Shaqra is considered as one of the leading distributors in the luxury field. Being a home for brands from anchor groups like LVMH, L’Oreal, COTY, Shiseido, .. Etc.

I&K Abu Shaqra owns the leading luxury retail destination, Gifts Center. One that offers a premium assortment across several categories: fragrances, cosmetics, watches, jewelry, fashion, leather goods and accessories.

The Mission
At I&K, we believe desire is for each person to find and ours to define. I&K must continue to be synonymous with neoteric objectives in both retail and distribution. Together, we find passion. Together, we FIND YOUR DESIRE.

The Vision
I&K envisions to perpetuate its leadership in both retail and distribution. We are prone to expansion, and are susceptible to diversification.

Name: Julio Okubo
Description:
A Julio Okubo possui 3 alicerces que são nossa razão de existir: As Pérolas, as Pessoas e o Planeta.

As melhores pérolas do mundo desde 1965.

Name: Bäumer Vendôme
Description:
“It is not the mesure that matters but what lies beyond. Why create, if you reproduce what already exists?”

In 1994 Lorenz Bäumer opens his salons on the 3rd floor at 4, Place Vendôme. Then in 2009 he gets elected to the Comité Colbert that federates the most prestigious French luxury brands. He opens his first freestanding jewelry boutique at 19 Place Vendome, next to the historic Ritz in 2013.
Lorenz Bäumer's jewelry is a subtle blend of architecture and poetry. He doesn't follow the trends or codes of classic jewelry, but prefers to stand out through innovation, passion and creativity. 
He creates among other things the tiara “Ecume de diamants” for the wedding of Prince Albert II of Monaco with Charlene Whittstock in 2011.

Name: Kostis Jewellery
Description:
Kostis Jewellery is counting more than 20 years of presence in jewelry and its creations make your everyday moments even more shiny and elegant.

Necklaces, bracelets, earrings and rings made of silver 925 and gold are waiting for you to discover them!

Name: Private Collection
Description:
Private Collection is a distinctive brand of luxurious Arabic sandals that pays homage to the region’s timeless tradition for footwear, infused with a uniquely contemporary and forward-looking design sensibility.  The brand, which is known to have revolutionized traditional sandals, has come to epitomize the harmonious merging of proud Arabian values with the passion for style.

Founded on the refinement of traditional design, Private Collection has introduced the use of contemporary textures and materials, creating its original language of elegance.
 
Made from the finest exotic leathers and materials and, masterfully handcrafted in Italy by artisans for whom shoemaking is an art handed down through generations, each Private Collection piece carries the hallmark of unrivaled quality.
 
The brand is renowned for its distinction and attention to detail, making Private Collection a truly covetable indulgence.

Name: Isla Oficial
Description:
Conhecida pelas suas bolsas-jóia, a Isla da designer brasileira Sílvia Monteiro cria peças de muita personalidade. 

Formas únicas surgem do garimpo pelas mais nobres e sofisticadas matérias-primas mundo afora, criando objetos de desejo para mulheres de todas as idades. 

Cada detalhe é pensado com bastante cuidado para que as peças possam ser usadas de diversas maneiras e em várias ocasiões. Uma verdadeira expressão do luxo atemporal.

Name: Rigby & Peller
Description:
“At Rigby & Peller we help our clients to look and feel the very best version of themselves at every moment.”

Since 1939, Rigby & Peller has been building the foundation of women’s lingerie wardrobes. Founded in the UK, Rigby & Peller is a British Luxury Retailer. We have nine boutiques across the UK and five in the USA. A luxury Made to Measure service is also available in our Knightsbridge boutique. 

80% of women are wearing the wrong lingerie size and it is our mission to help our clients to find their perfect pieces. We believe lingerie is the first layer of confidence, with the power to flatter, reassure and enhance. 

We do have an extensive selection of carefully curated lingerie; Lingerie Stylists are expertly trained to be able to provide advice and guidance on shape, cut, colour and style from lingerie to swim, sports and nightwear. Our brands are available in every boutique including Prima Donna, Marie Jo, Andres Sarda (UK only), Aubade, Simone Perele, Empreinte, Hanro and more. A unique ‘Fit & Style’ experience is available in all boutiques to all clients, ensuring they find their perfect fit. From every day pieces, to something sensational for evening, sports bras to bridal and bespoke pieces, swimwear to nightwear, maternity to post mastectomy bras…

Our Made to Measure service operates exclusively from our Knightsbridge boutique with a passionate team, including their corsetiere who has been working with us for over 25 years. They are all experienced with working with brands from everywhere across the world and clients are offered private appointments to discuss their bespoke lingerie, swimwear and nightwear.

Name: Jacmel Jewelry
Description:
Founded in 1977, Jacmel is one of the country's largest jewelry manufacturers and distributors, supplying leading companies across all tiers of retail including department stores, specialty stores, mass merchants, television channels and e-commerce. Jacmel's commitment to product development can be seen in its New York City headquarters. Additionally, Jacmel has won numerous awards from key retail partners for its excellence in product development, merchandising and logistics.
Along with company owned proprietary brands, Jacmel holds the distribution rights to several national brands including Disney, Hallmark, Hello Kitty, Nickelodeon, Stephen Dweck and Michael Aram.

Name: MAD LORDS
Description:
Caroline et Serge Muller, co-fondateurs de MAD LORDS, passionnés de bijoux, se revendiquent nouveaux nomades et placent l'authenticité et l'humain au centre de leur univers rock et hippie chic. 

MAD LORDS vous accueille dans ses deux boutiques à quelques pas de la Place Vendôme. 
Cassant les codes de la joaillerie traditionnelle et en constante recherche de nouveautés, le Secret Spot, situé dans une cour, au 316, rue Saint-Honoré, dévoile une sélection exclusive de bijoux de créateurs originaux et audacieux. 

Au 320, rue Saint-Honoré, se trouve le Studio de Piercing MAD LORDS, offrant une sélection de piercings mêlant or et pierres précieuses placés lors de la séance de piercing.

Name: Rocksbox
Description:
Explore a range of high-quality styles—including pre-owned fine and reclaimed materials—to match your look and values. With curated and exclusive collections from notable and cult-favorite designers, Rocksbox is the fashion jewelry destination where self-expression shines.

Rocksbox was founded in 2012 to transform the way customers discover and buy jewelry, and today continues to build the destination retail brand for jewelry and accessories. The Rocksbox team is cross-functional, collaborative, and positive. We’re passionate about using tech and data to  deliver products and experiences our customers love.

Name: Dana Rebecca Designs
Description: Known for its handcrafted, luxurious and sophisticated design, Dana Rebecca Designs namesake collection, launched in 2007, is a reflection of third generation jewelry designer Dana Gordon's personal style, world travels and the special women in her life. Whether seen on a celebrity on the red carpet or an everyday woman, Dana's elegant yet understated designs are adored by tastemakers around the world.

Name: Maria Pascual Jewelry
Description:
Maria Pascual is a Barcelona based jewelry brand with a global vision. We make unique and original jewels that represent us.

Each Maria Pascual collection is beautifully crafted from a brass base with a thick layer of high-quality 18/24k gold-plating for a shiny and durable finishing look. We are driven to make fashion-forward everyday jewelry accessible and affordable. Every piece feels like love at first sight and can be effortlessly worn from day to night.

Our approach to design is based on delivering not only a look, but a feeling of boldness. We want you to feel good about yourself and feel confident in your own skin when you wear our designs. We want you to be you. We want you to love you. We want you to stand out. We are ageless and genderless. We want to make sure that everyone feels included. We are plural, everyone is welcome.

We believe in making a difference in the lives of the community who surround us by creating pieces that are a reflection of your attitude towards life. That allow you to exceed yourself and overcome all your challenges. We want our jewels to be a source of motivation and strength. We want to influence and address issues around sustainability, equality, diversity and solidarity. We want to give back to the people and the planet. We are focused in creating a positive impact in the world. 

At Maria Pascual we are passionate about providing equal opportunities in the workplace and we are committed to creating and maintaining a culture of inclusivity, collaboration and respect. We are constantly changing and growing, and there's lots of exciting things on the horizon for us, so we are always looking for talented people to join our team. If you love our brand and you are as enthusiastic as we are about what you do, apply now for a role!

Name: FENDI Asia Pacific
Description:
Leader in the luxury industry for over 85 years, Fendi began its legendary story in 1925, when Edoardo Fendi and Adele Casagrande opened a leather goods boutique with a small fur workshop in the back. Nearly a century later, the innovative leather and fur craftsmanship that has always distinguished Fendi lives on. 

Constantly inspired by the magic of Rome, the House of Fendi has thrived on its enviable heritage becoming a unique and coveted icon of luxury. Over the years, the Fendi legacy has reached new levels of expansion and success thanks to the bold stylistic vision of the 5 Fendi sisters, followed by the creative genius of Karl Lagerfeld and Silvia Venturini Fendi, who revolutionized and reinterpreted Fendi’s excellence. 

From the iconic Baguette and Peekaboo bags, to the avant-garde ready-to-wear collections and outstanding furs, Fendi’s collections embody a daring creativity that have crowned the Maison as a true and refined symbol of glamour, expertise and experimentation. 

Part of the LVMH Group since 2001, Fendi is now active in all creative worlds and continues its longstanding relationship with the world of cinema and art and design, which have deeply marked its history.	

Fueled by an ambitious retail plan of new openings, Fendi currently boasts 200 stores worldwide with future plans to expand in all markets.

Name: Voutilainen
Description: Design, construction, fabrication, finishing and assembly in our workshops

Name: Blue Diamond
Description:
Blue Diamond, 2004 yılında toptancı bir firma olarak, mücevher sektörüne pırlanta tedarik etmek ve sektörü pırlanta konusunda eğitmek amacıyla kuruldu. 

2014 yılından bu yana ise kendi markasıyla mağazalar açıyor ve doğrudan pırlanta severlerle buluşuyor. 

Blue Diamond, Türkiye'nin en büyük pırlanta toptancısı, en büyük pırlanta üreticisi ve 0.001 - 20 karat arasındaki pırlantaları ile en geniş pırlanta ve değerli taş stoğuna sahip yerli markasıdır. Türkiye'nin en büyük yerli pırlanta ihracatçısıdır. Merkezi İstanbul'dadır. Yurt dışında ise Dubai'de, Newyork'ta ve Amsterdam'da bulunan ofisleri aracılığıyla ve katıldığı uluslararası fuarlar sayesinde önemli miktarda toptan pırlanta taş alım satımı gerçekleştirmektedir. 

Blue Diamond, 2004 yılında Türkiye'nin ilk Pırlanta Test Laboratuvarı'nı ve Pırlanta Akademisi'ni kurdu. 9 Eylül Üniversitesi işbirliğiyle kurulan Blue Diamond Pırlanta Akademisi'nde, uzman gemologlarla bugüne kadar yaklaşık 4000 kuyumcuyu "Pırlanta ve Değerli Taş Uzmanı" olarak yetiştirdi ve sertifika verdi. Bugün sektörde birçok kuyumcuda yer alan "Blue Diamond Sertifikası" bunun simgesidir. 

Blue Diamond Pırlanta Test Laboratuvarı'nda da uluslararası sertifikaya sahip pırlanta uzmanları görev yapmaktadır. 

Ayrıca Blue Diamond, doğrudan üretim maliyetlerini düşürerek müşterilerine fiyat avantajı sağlamaktadır. Çok yüksek miktarda toptan pırlanta alımı yaptığı için fiyatlar müşteri lehinedir. Ürün kalitesi ve uygun fiyat politikası, müşteri memnuniyeti açısından en önemli değeridir.

Name: Mayors Jewelers
Description:
ABOUT MAYORS
Mayors is known for our wide assortment of the world's most iconic brands of jewelry and timepieces, as well as our commitment to client service excellence. With 17 locations across Florida and Georgia, Mayors is recognized as one of the foremost jewelers in the region. With our team of elite professionals, in-house design studio, and full-service repair department, Mayors outshines as a premier retailer of luxury goods and service. For over a century, Mayors has taken pride in our products, rich history, and reputation for maintaining long-lasting relationships with our many clients. Through our products we are able to share in the most memorable of moments. We are in the business of celebrations. 
We aim to deliver an unparalleled total brand experience by consistently exceeding our clients' expectations. This is our competitive edge. Our products, our service, and our team is top of its class. Join us in setting the bar high, one celebration at a time.


OUR GUIDING PRINCIPLES
•	Clients come first!
•	Recruiting, developing and retaining the best talent
•	Treating all employees and partners with respect and trust
•	Conducting business professionally and with the utmost integrity
•	A commitment to a culture that promotes a passion for teamwork, continuous improvement, quality, creativity 
        and social responsibility
•	Striving for excellence in all that we do



Visit www.mayorscareers.com for more information.
See a quick video to see what we are about!
https://vimeo.com/174655754

Name: Chantecler
Description:
Chantecler  is a truly Italian jewelry company with  long lasting tradition of “made in Italy” craftsmanship and creativity. 
It was founded in 1947 in the island of Capri by Pietro Capuano and Salvatore Aprea. Their creations soon became famous for the unique blend of colors, gemstones and joyful spirit.   
Starting from the Dolce Vita period Chantecler jewels became an absolute must-have for the visitors of Capri island. Grace Kelly, Audrey Hepburn, Jackie Onassis, Brigitte Bardot, Ingrid  Bergman highly valued Chantecler jewels inspired by the “Pure Capri Esprit”. 
Since 1947 the family business evolved into a structured company, however, Chantecler still  remains one of the few jewelry companies run by the heirs of its founder, able to transmit the brand values exactly in the same way their father did half a century ago. 
Chantecler collections offer  numerous combinations of  mix & matching.  The jewels adapt easily to any occasion, mood and  personality of their owners.  The iconic piece, the “Campanella” bell, is well known and loved both in Italy and abroad.  
Chantecler operates directly mono brand Boutiques in Capri, Cortina, Milan and Tokyo. The brand is represented in the most important cities like Tokyo, Moscow, Geneva, Lugano, Zurich, Madrid, Vienna, Palm Beach,  Monte Carlo and Beirut. The company counts more than 130 doors globally.

Name: Jewellery World Magazine
Description: Jewellery World is Australia's premier Jewellery Trade magazine offering insights, articles and information about the Australian jewellery industry.

Name: Roberto Bravo
Description:
Roberto Bravo is a global jewelry trade mark. It is an Italy origin Turkish company. 
Our collections are designed in Italy and Turkey and exported 550 points in 50 countries from China to  Moscow. We continue to create brand new trends with our collections, inspired from the nature, our extraordinary stories, unique designs and jewels.

Name: Tanagra
Description:
Tanagra is the ultimate destination for luxury lifestyle and gifting in the Middle East. Since 1980, we have curated a world of refined elegance, offering a carefully selected range of the world’s most prestigious brands in home décor, accessories, and gifts. Our collections include exquisite crystal, porcelain, silverware, and contemporary décor from renowned names such as Baccarat, Daum, Christofle, Lalique, and many more.

At Tanagra, we blend tradition with modernity to provide an unparalleled shopping experience, inviting customers to discover timeless treasures and iconic pieces that bring beauty and sophistication to their homes. With a focus on craftsmanship, heritage, and exceptional design, we help our clientele celebrate life’s most cherished moments, making every gift a memorable experience.

Discover the art of gifting and elevate your lifestyle with Tanagra.

Name: LUXENTER
Description:
Luxenter es una empresa familiar creada por Carmen Lizarriturri. La apertura de su primera tienda en Madrid en 1976, Luxenter se ha convertido en uno de  de distribución europeos de joyería, con una presencia en 30 países y un total de 1.200 puntos de venta distribuidos por todo el planeta. 

Conjugamos todas las fases de la creación de la Alta Joyería: diseño, fabricación, logística, distribución internacional y servicio postventa, Luxenter ha experimentado un vertiginoso crecimiento en el sector joyero en Europa. 

Luxenter presenta dos colecciones anuales, creando más de 1.000 diseños nuevos al año que aúnan moda, tendencias y lujo al alcance de la sociedad.

Ofrecemos toda la experiencia adquirida como diseñadores con piezas únicas y un diseño original, respondiendo a los deseos de una mujer cosmopolita y seguidora de las tendencias.

Luxenter siempre tiene en cuenta la visión y necesidades de los clientes. Por ello, se trabaja constantemente en la investigación y uso de nuevos materiales que hagan accesibles la calidad y el diseño.

Name: Salanitro
Description:
As the "general contractor" of the watch industry, Salanitro SA manufactures and designs your products. Wishing to push the limits of made-to-measure to infinity, our company can bring your ideas to life, from the first sketches to the creation, research to development, manufacture, gem setting and finishing touches.

Salanitro SA, en tant qu’ «entreprise générale» du domaine horloger, réalise et conçoit vos produits. Désireuse de repousser les limites du sur-mesure à l’infini, notre entreprise peut prendre en main la réalisation de vos idées, depuis le dessin jusqu’au conditionnement, en passant par l’étude, le développement, la fabrication, le sertissage et la terminaison.

Name: HALCHIMY - When Time Becomes Memories
Description: Get your watch, Join the club, Build your legacy

Name: Eshed
Description:
Eshed is a worldwide diamond and emerald supplier. 
Our expertise is manufacturing, trading and marketing natural diamonds and emeralds with a special focus on precision and high quality cutting and polishing to maximize the beauty of each and every stone.
As manufacturers of natural diamonds and emeralds we participate in all the major tenders and auctions around the world from Russia to Africa, Belgium and Israel in order to obtain the most desired rough stones in the world. As you know it all starts from the rough.
Eshed was a pioneer in the field of “big size” diamonds when it first entered the field and was one of the first companies to implement advanced technologies for cutting and polishing. Today, we are proud to be among the companies leading the industry, and we aim to keep doing so in the future.
At our factory in Israel, master cutting skills meet state-of-the-art technology. That is how we achieve the highest standards of cutting and polishing. In the world of emeralds and diamonds, it is what makes all the difference.
Contact us at our conveniently located offices in Los Angeles, New York, Hong Kong and Israel. Come see us at any of the major trade shows in Hong Kong, Las Vegas, Genève, or Basel, where we personally meet with our valued customers.
We specialize in diamonds between 3 and 30 carat. We offer single stones, matching pairs and fancy colored diamonds.
Our emeralds come in all shapes and range in size from 0.5 carats to 20 carats. We offer: single stones, rounds (3mm – 6mm and above), matching pairs, complete layouts (in various shapes and qualities), standard sizes (such as 10X8mm, 9X7mm, 7X5mm, 6X4mm, 5X3mm), and customized designs for high volume orders.
You’ll find Eshed’s beautiful diamonds and emeralds at discerning stores and boutiques around the world. Our diamond and gems are chosen by clients within the luxury business including high-end retail brands, dealers and wholesalers, private jewelers and local jewelry stores.

Name: ANIA KRUK JEWELLERY
Description: Firma ANIA KRUK od początku swojego istnienia łamie schematy i odchodzi od klasycznego podejścia do biżuterii. Wprowadziliśmy na polski rynek koncept marki wyspecjalizowanej w biżuterii codziennej — ze srebra i delikatnego złota, której bliżej do słowa lifestyle niż moda, czy jubiler. Stawiamy na ograniczoną, wyselekcjonowaną ofertę, nowoczesny design oraz prostotę i estetykę w komunikacji. Popularyzujemy współczesne trendy takie jak piercing i stylizacja ucha.

Name: Jos Alukkas Group
Description:
Jos Alukkas is a brand that has been in the business of jewellery making for almost five decades. Founded in Kerala, we have close to 46 outlets across India. Jos Alukkas Jewellery takes pride in the fact that we are the first ISO 9001:2000 certified jewellery group in the world showcasing BIS certified 916 hallmarked gold. We are committed to the quality and purity of the jewellery we craft.
Josalukkas group is now headed by Sri.A.V.Jose.His three sons,Sri.Varghese Alukka,Sri.Paul.j.Alukka and Sri.John Alukka are the managing Directors. They revolutionised the market with the innovative concept of the Gold supermarket.

Name: MK JEWELS
Description: India’s leading manufacturer and retailer of Real Diamond, Gold & CZ jewellery. Celebrating 22 years of excellence. Helmed by Ram Raimalani.

Name: Charlotte Olympia
Description:
Charlotte Olympia encompasses a complete luxury lifestyle brand, with women’s shoes remain the core of the product offer. The design direction is overseen by Creative Director, Charlotte Olympia Dellal, who has a vision to create one of the world’s most Innovative luxury brands.

If you are interested in a job in please send your CV to the following address: career@charlotteolympia.com

Name: The SWI Group
Description:
With over thirty years experience, the SWI Group is one of the biggest distributors in North America. Through sheer determination and a strong work ethic, the company has grown exponentially. In what has been a challenging environment for most companies in the watch industry, the SWI Group has expanded and focused its efforts more than ever in delivering excellent quality and value for money in their products.

Among its growing list of achievements, SWI has been named in Inc. Magazine’s prestigious Inc 500 list of America’s 500 fastest growing, privately held companies for three consecutive years. SWI was also named by the South Florida Business Journal as the Business of the Year, and was among 11 finalists for the Greater Miami Chamber of Commerce Cutting Edge Award. 

SWI now operates with more than a 250 diverse group of people in positions ranging from packaging and shipping, data input management to design and upper level management.

The SWI Group currently distributes, manufactures and designs luxury goods in factories throughout the world and either owns or exclusively distributes such watch lines as: Invicta, Lucien Piccard, Swiss Legend, Kenneth Jay Lane Timepieces and Red Line / a_line brands. 

WorldofWatches.com, eWatches.com, TheWatchery.com are company owned sites where our brands are showcased.The SWI Group also has a presence in the fashion industry with SmartBargains.com.

Name: Switch
Description: Switch is a luxury handbag and jewelry rental membership service that's on a mission to change the way we experience luxury. With plans from $55/month, members can access designer pieces from the likes of Chanel, Hermes, and Cartier, and exchange them anytime, as often as they want.

Name: Ivan Joias
Description:
A EMPRESA
A Ivan Joias atua no mercado de joias há 40 anos, ela se diferencia das outras joalherias por trabalhar com uma grande variedade de joias modernas e com gemas brasileiras. Ela busca emocionar seus clientes com as mais belas joias de padrão internacional, em parcerias com indústrias joalheiras com certificação Amagold (Associação Brasileira dos Fabricantes de Joias em Ouro Certificado), e a visita constante dos proprietários da empresa em eventos nos principais pólos de joias que tedenciam o mercado de moda no Brasil. O diferencial que o cliente pode encontrar em adquirir nas joias da Ivan Joias é a segurança, individualidade, variedade e praticidade. São joias com excelente qualidade de acabamento e lapidação além de oferecer peças exclusivas e variadas coleções desde as mais clássicas até as contemporâneas, trabalhadas em ouro amarelo, rosé, branco, negro e em prata.
 
MISSÃO
Comercializar joias, relógios, e acessórios de moda com qualidade e preço.
Estar presente em todos os momentos do cliente.
 
VISÃO
Ser referência em marca de joias, relógios e acessórios de moda, com excelência, preço acessível e líder em vendas no mercado em que atua.
 
VALORES
Compromisso
Atendimento
Credibilidade
Capital Humano
Resultado

Name: Concepto Watch Factory
Description:
Concepto Watch Factory est une Manufacture horlogère suisse indépendante, familiale et entièrement verticalisée, qui réalise des mouvements mécaniques d’exception. Elle offre aux marques de renommée mondiale la possibilité de concrétiser leurs envies en s’appuyant sur un savoir-faire et une qualité d’exécution acquis au fil des décennies.
 

Spécialisée dans la fabrication de tourbillons, elle développe cependant une multitude d’autres complications, comme des chronographes, des répétitions minutes, des réveils ou des mouvements squelette.  


Réunissant l’essentiel des métiers horlogers en son sein, elle délivre des calibres complets et maîtrise ainsi la qualité de l’ensemble du processus de fabrication.   

---

Concepto Watch Factory is an independent, family-owned and fully verticalized Swiss watch manufacturer that produces exceptional mechanical movements. It offers world-renowned brands the possibility of realizing their desires by relying on the know-how and quality of execution acquired over the decades.
 

Specialized in the manufacture of tourbillons, it also develops many other complications, such as chronographs, minute repeaters, alarm clocks and skeleton movements.  


Bringing together most of the watchmaking professions within the company, it delivers complete calibers and masters the quality of the entire manufacturing process.

Name: Grown Brilliance
Description: Grown Brilliance is a female-founded fine jewelry house that brings a modern lens to luxury. The brand was born from founder Akshie Jhaveri’s deep experience in the jewelry world and her desire to reimagine diamonds for a new generation. Moving beyond the traditions of mined stones, she envisioned a brand that celebrates lab-grown diamonds as symbols of sustainability, individuality, and self-expression. With a sharp eye for design and a storyteller’s instinct, Akshie has shaped Grown Brilliance into a distinct and culturally relevant name in fine jewelry. In just a few years, the brand has grown to 15 stores across the U.S., establishing itself as a destination for engagement rings and modern heirlooms alike. This fall, Grown Brilliance enters its next chapter with the opening of its first flagship in New York’s Soho, an embodiment of Akshie’s vision to redefine what luxury can look and feel like today.

Name: Hillberg & Berk
Description:
Jewellery, Amplified. 

We're a Canadian, women-owned, and purpose-driven jewellery brand. Founded by Rachel Mielke in the Canadian prairies, we design jewellery that turns up the volume—on style, on substance, and on causes that matter. 

Since H&B was founded, we've been changing the narrative in our industry. We believe in fashion as a form of agency, and we create pieces with uncompromising quality to inspire the celebration of authentic self-expression. We also live our purpose of uplifting self-identified women through everything we do, and as part of this promise, we commit a minimum of 1% of annual sales to local and national partners dedicated to our mission. 

Our collaborative work environment is focused on employee empowerment, teamwork, and our mission to empower women. We offer comprehensive health coverage, wellness incentives, flexible work arrangements, professional development opportunities, and special jewellery pricing and bonuses. 

"When I started Hillberg & Berk, I knew I wanted to build more than a jewellery company. Every product we create, story we tell, and cause we support comes back to a shared belief that business can and should be a force for good." -Rachel Mielke, Founder & CEO

Name: Picup Media
Description:
At Picup Media, our mission is to create products that jewelers love - innovative tools designed to simplify the digital experience and empower jewelry businesses to thrive online.

We believe in helping people and businesses unlock their full potential, achieving more every day. That’s why we focus on providing easy-to-use, cutting-edge solutions that support jewelers in building their brand, enhancing their online presence, and reaching new heights of success.

Trusted by over 20,000+ jewelers worldwide, Picup Media operates with teams across Sydney, Hong Kong and New York. Our goal is simple: to make digital tools that help your jewelry business flourish.

Name: SMETS
Description:
Beyond a retail space, Smets is a highly curated playground where commercial and artistic expression meet. It’s a platform for culture, fashion, lifestyle, design, beauty, food… Passion and emotion are at the core of the concept.

Smets is a work in progress project, every day we strive to improve the Smets vision and philosophy.

Next to well-known fashion houses the likes of Moncler, Burberry, Diane von Furstenberg, Chloé, Kenzo you’ll find emerging talents with a sharp DNA and a strong identity.

Since 1986 Smets is credited for bringing international brands including Balenciaga, Saint Laurent, Raf Simons and Yeezy into Luxembourg while being an early advocate for young designers including Off White c/o Virgil Abloh, Gosha Rubchinskiy, Simon Porte Jacquemus, Victoria Beckham …

Name: Comete Gioielli
Description: Comete Gioielli offers jewelry. It sells its products through jewelry stores in  Europe,  North America, Canada, Mexico and Asia. The company was founded in 1975 and is based in Vicenza, Italy.

Name: Lenti 1963
Description:
The Italian High Jewelry Factory. 
Since 1963 we translate most precious materials into timeless exclusive style: high jewelry from dream to wearable reality. Worldwide known for our values: experience, quality, service. 

Lenti Villasco was established in Valenza in 1963, through the craftsmanship and entrepreneurial spirit of the two founding partners, Pietro Lenti and Osvaldo Villasco.

Production was entirely hand-made at the outset, later evolving through the use of sophisticated software and precision mechanical instruments. But the eye and the hand remain unchanged.

Focusing on creations of flawless workmanship, the company specialized in producing timeless jewellery, interpreted according to contemporary trends.

Every jewel is conceived and produced in the Piazza Lanza premises. From the design and the selection of stones to the refinement of the finishing. Loving care and attention are invested in each of the phases required to transform raw materials into wonderful high jewellery.

Today, Lenti Villasco has exclusive production agreements with major international companies, and devotes increasing attention to developing its own collections, 90% of which are exported to Europe, the Americas and Asia.

Name: VAKAY.
Description: VAKAY. is a premium designer brand and the only  company to be making handmade eyewear in Tunisia, from luxurious and sustainable wood species, Mazzucchelli acetate, Carl Zeiss lenses and Gold with all manufacturing processes being completed here in Tunisia. VAKAY Eyewear is now becoming the choice of eco-minded consumers and is trending fast all across the world.

Name: Beauty & Glamour
Description: Beauty & Glamour is Europe’s leading distributor of luxurious brands offering fragrances, color cosmetics, skincare, grooming, home scents and bath & body products from world's key beauty capitals.

Name: PLASTORIA
Description:
With over 80 years of expertise, Plastoria is a global leader in the development of high-end fashion and luxury accessories, partnering with the world's most prestigious brands. Our services span the entire product lifecycle—from design and development to manufacturing and distribution—across retail and corporate gift networks. Through close collaboration with iconic brands like HUGO BOSS, CERRUTI 1881, CHRISTIAN LACROIX, CACHAREL, and others, we create innovative products that reflect each partner's unique vision and identity.

Our global network reaches over 130 countries, ensuring premium product availability through wholesale, retail, and corporate channels. With 97% of orders shipped directly from stock, we guarantee industry-leading delivery times, supported by a two-year international guarantee and service points worldwide.

We are committed to supporting our distributors with advanced marketing and e-commerce tools, enabling personalized campaigns that drive sales and strengthen brand presence.

At Plastoria, sustainability is central to our mission. We reduce our carbon footprint by prioritizing sea shipments, producing electricity from renewable sources, and integrating eco-friendly materials into our designs.

Name: Poh Heng Jewellery Pte Ltd
Description: Singapore’s leader in 22k gold, Poh Heng offers an extensive range of premium high karatage gold, curated solitaire diamonds and flawless gemstones.

Name: Mohra India
Description: Mohra India top player in the category Jewellery Designers globally. This well-known establishment acts as a one-stop destination servicing customers US, and from other parts of the world. Over the course of its journey, this business has established a firm foothold in it’s industry. The belief that customer satisfaction is as important as their products and services, have helped this establishment garner a vast base of customers, which continues to grow by the day. This business employs individuals that are dedicated towards their respective roles and put in a lot of effort to achieve the common vision and larger goals of the company. In the near future, this business aims to expand its line of products and services and cater to a larger client base. In Jaipur, this establishment occupies a prominent location in K.G.B. Ka Rasta. It is an effortless task in commuting to this establishment as there are various modes of transport readily available. It is known to provide top service in the following categories: Jewellery Designers.

Name: TimeVallée
Description:
TimeVallée
Heritage and Beyond
TimeVallée is a luxury and innovative multi-brand destination store offering access to prestigious watch and jewelry Maisons.

Name: Thameen London
Description:
Thameen London is an English niche fragrance brand, uniquely combining eastern opulence and western refinement. Thameen means precious and our finest fragrances are inspired by the world’s most precious jewels and the enchanting stories behind them.

As symbols of status, religion, wealth, beauty and love, both jewellery and fragrance have enjoyed a long and close relationship. From ancient tribes to haute couture, they have both been central to civilization.

Thameen marries the two.

Born out of a love for rare fragrance oils, Thameen constructs elegant, contemporary and long-lasting fragrances. Each key ingredient has been specifically sourced for its exquisite quality and is blended to perfection to create Extrait de Parfums of a high concentration.

Name: Asvat
Description:
Asvat Group is the leading retail partner in the Luxury market across Latin America, committed to upholding the tradition and creative values of our brands. The group's dedication to grow the luxury market in the region dates back to 1940, when the Asvat family established its first shop in Panama offering imported goods from Europe and Asia. 

In 2007, a new generation built on the family's vision by expanding into luxury menswear with the introduction of Ermenegildo Zegna. The brand's successful launch in Panama paved the way for further expansion in new markets. 

Today, with nearly 10 years of experience and operations in three countries, Asvat is the preferred partner of several luxury brands, such as Tiffany & Co. The team's passion and commitment for innovative brand development are the driving forces behind Asvat Group's continuous growth in today’s thriving luxury market. 

Our diverse team is made up of movers and shakers excelling in distinct areas, providing the group with the right instruments to succeed in future collaborations and challenges.

Name: BEAUBLEU
Description:
Depuis sa création en 2017 à Paris, Beaubleu prône la culture du temps libre avec singularité et lyrisme.

Par ses emblématiques aiguilles rondes, la marque élève le “moment” au rang d’unité de mesure, créant des montres à la fois esthétiques, étonnantes et symboliques.

Name: Círculo Fortuny
Description:
Círculo Fortuny representa la España de la excelencia, la creatividad y la cultura. Una excelencia sostenible, representativa de nuestra historia y de nuestra pasión por la vida.

Somos la principal asociación española de las marcas culturales y creativas de excelencia y nuestro objetivo es promover el reconocimiento del sector español de la Alta Gama, potenciando la imagen de la marca España y de nuestros miembros.

Los socios de Círculo Fortuny representan distintos sectores de actividad, que configuran la industria de la alta gama española a través de la excelencia en sus procesos productivos y en la prestación de servicios:

Cuero, Gastronomía, Hoteles & Resorts, Joyería y Relojería, Mobiliario & Decoración, Moda, Salud y bienestar, Vinos y Espirituosos, Turismo de Excelencia, Armerías.

                                                                           -----

Circulo Fortuny is the official sector body for Spanish luxury. Founded in 2011 as a non-profit organization with the aim of bringing together the Spanish cultural and creative brands in a common forum to collectively promote and defend their shared values both nationally and internationally. It counts more than 75 Spanish brands in its membership from more than 10 different sectors.

Design & Furniture, Fashion, Gastronomy, Health & Wellness, Hotels & Resorts, Jewellery & Watches, Leather, Wines & Spirits, High-End Tourism, Craftsmanship Gunmakers.

Name: Dubois Dépraz SA
Description:
Dubois Dépraz est une entreprise familiale créée en 1901 par M. Marcel Dépraz au Lieu/Vallée de Joux ; elle est active dans le domaine horloger. En mains des descendants (4ème génération) du fondateur, l’entreprise est implantée sur 4 sites, dont 3 à la Vallée de Joux (Le Lieu et Les Charbonnières) et un à Arch/BE. Sur ce dernier site sont regroupées les activités de décolletage, taillage et roulage.

En 1969, associé à Büren, Heuer et Breitling, marques horlogères de renommée mondiale, Dubois Dépraz dévoile le Chronomatic. Ce mouvement chronographe automatique pour montre bracelet, de conception modulaire, est présenté à la presse quelques semaines après celui de Zénith. Mais son développement est abouti et il sera commercialisé très rapidement, plusieurs mois avant celui de son concurrent. Pour cette raison il est considéré par certains comme étant le 1er mouvement chronographe automatique au monde. Cet événement propulse Dubois Dépraz sur les devants de la scène et assoit sa réputation. 

Au fil des années Dubois Dépraz développe, fabrique et assemble de nombreuses complications pour son propre compte, les mettant à disposition de ses clients. L’entreprise devient alors le leader incontesté dans le domaine des conceptions modulaires. Ce savoir-faire lui permet aussi d’étoffer son offre et proposer aujourd’hui ses services dans 2 autres domaines :

•	développements spécifiques de complications horlogères sur mandats de tiers (qui en deviennent de 
        facto propriétaires exclusifs)
•	manufacture de composants horlogers complexes pour des tiers également
       
A ce jour, l’entreprise compte environ 320 collaborateurs-trices répartis sur ses différents sites.

Name: Joseph Duclos
Description:
Maison Joseph Duclos revives Enlightenment era savoir-faire and pays homage to the visionary entrepreneur Joseph Duclos who founded the Royal Manufacture in 1754 in Lectoure, France. 
Drawing inspiration from the unequalled savoir-faire of the epoch, the House crafts contemporary objects of authentic and intimate luxury. At the heart of the House is the art of fine leather, a material that is as noble as it is exacting. 
Under the impetus of artistic director Ramesh Nair, master craftsmen in France work leathers of rare quality, taking the time needed to craft fine leather goods in line with the principles of excellence, anchored in Enlightenment philosophy.  
Thus, leather goods, jewellery and fragrances are produced in France using traditional artisanal techniques, resulting in objects of pure luxury, made to last.  
Our exceptional pieces are available on our e-commerce site www.josephduclos.com as well as our first store at 54, rue du Faubourg Saint-Honoré, Paris.

Name: Green Rocks Diamonds
Description:
The world’s finest lab created diamond rough crystal is just half the story. What makes every Green Rocks diamond the world's finest lab created diamond is our people. 

As a partnership between High Tech Entrepreneurs and one of Israel’s finest Diamond Cutters, breakthrough technology is married to legendary Old World craftsmanship. 

At our state of the art diamond cutting factory in Israel, our master diamond cutters have been challenged to cut the most beautiful diamonds they have ever created. They put decades of diamond cutting skill and passion into every Green Rocks diamond. With the higher overall color and clarity of Green Rocks Diamonds, the results are nothing short of stunning.

Finally, every Green Rocks Diamond is graded on the exact same criteria as mined diamonds (the Four Cs), by the exact same independent gemological laboratories that grade Earth-extracted diamonds. 

Compared to mined diamonds, Green Rocks Diamonds have fewer impurities and fewer defects in the crystal structure. Our white diamonds are greater than 99.99999% pure carbon. This makes Green Rocks Diamonds whiter, brighter, and stronger than the vast majority of mined diamonds. 

This is why our biggest challenge at Green Rocks is trying to keep up with market demand. At Green Rocks, it's the human element, the genius, the skill and the passion that make us who we are. It's our people who are changing the diamond business and our world.

Name: Maasmechelen Village
Description:
Welcome to the Linkedin company page for Maasmechelen Village, part of The Bicester Collection.

Located at the crossroads where Belgium, Germany and the Netherlands meet, Maasmechelen Village basks in the sunshine of neighbouring Antwerp and Brussels. Here, an irresistible combination of surrealist art (thanks to the country’s famous son, Magritte) and incredible food are blended with cutting-edge fashion from more than 100 boutiques, all offering year-round savings of up to 60% on the recommended retail price. One of 11 iconic fashion destinations in The Bicester Collection, the Village reflects Brussel’s urbane evolution and simultaneously celebrates its heritage with architecture influenced by the Limburg region. 

Discover more at MaasmechelenVillage.com
Maasmechelen Village is a luxury goods & jewelry company based at 100 Zetellaan, Maasmechelen, Belgium.

Name: Tatty Devine
Description:
Tatty Devine is an independent British company designing and making original, playful jewellery, designed in their London studio and laser cut and handmade in their Kent studio. Their standout designs are all about expressing yourself in a fun and distinctive way.

Harriet Vine and Rosie Wolfenden founded Tatty Devine in 1999 and continue to run the company from a studio in London’s East End, where it all started. The brand makes jewellery that blurs the boundaries between art, fashion and culture. 

In 2013 Harriet and Rosie were awarded MBEs for services to the fashion industry and Tatty Devine won UKFT Accessories Business of the Year.

Name: Bevilles
Description:
At Bevilles, we believe in making jewellery accessible to everyone. Since 1934, we’ve been offering real, quality pieces through great bargains, so that anyone—no matter their budget—can express their unique style and personality, every day, in every moment.

Whether you’re searching for the perfect gift or just browsing, we’re here to help you discover something special, something you may have thought was out of reach. With us, you can now access more than ever before. Because at Bevilles, the moment is now—and a good deal is always waiting for you.

We are now part of Michael Hill International and we’re proud to employ +300 passionate individuals across 37 stores in Australia, located in Victoria, New South Wales, South Australia, and Queensland, all committed to bringing you beautiful jewellery and watches at prices that you’ll love.

Bevilles - Get the Look, for Less

Name: Kim Seybert
Description:
We’re #dressingthetable with exquisite dining table decor and you're invited to join the party.

Kim Seybert began her career designing dresses and beaded evening gowns but had always loved dining table decor. She was inspired by trips to China and India to bring the intricate hand-beading and embroidery done by old-world artisans to the dining tabletop.

Kim’s work has genuinely redefined and revolutionized what it means to set the table.  Equally important is her mission to preserve, encourage, and support artisans' talents and techniques from all over the world.

The Kim Seybert brand is carried at luxury retailers throughout the United States and around the world. If you have a store and are interested in carrying our collections, or are a qualified professional interior designer, event or wedding planner, or architect you can apply for a wholesale account at 
https://kimseybert.com/pages/wholesale-trade

#luxurygoods #tablescapes #tabledecor #tablesettings #diningdecor

Name: Gerald Charles SA
Description:
Gerald Charles is an independent, family-owned watch company based in Switzerland. It was founded in 2000 by the great Gérald Charles Genta, the 20th century’s foremost watch designer. 
 
Gerald Charles watches are produced without compromise and marry the finest traditions and most up-to-date technologies of Swiss mechanical watchmaking to deliver superior precision and performance, as well as exceptional water and shock resistance. Every timepiece is an elegant sports watch, the signature of the company's founder and eternal inspiration, Monsieur Genta. 
 
Gerald Charles Atelier Genève, located in Rue du Mont-Blanc 3 in Geneva, is an on-appointment only lounge. The space includes the Museum area, hosting some original drawings from Mr. Genta, some Museum Collection watches and some Limited Editions.

Name: Maurice De Mauriac
Description: Maurice De Mauriac ist die einzige Uhrenmanufaktur in Zürich. Inspiriert von Zürich bauen und designen wir unsere Uhren in unserem Atelier.

Name: CINDY CHAO The Art Jewel
Description:
Claimed by CNN as an Asian jeweler shaping modern jewellery design today, Cindy Chao has revolutionized the art of contemporary high jewellery creation through her singular, organic and sculptural works. Establishing her eponymous brand CINDY CHAO The Art Jewel in 2004, the jewellery artist has ever since broken boundaries and redefined high jewellery.

CINDY CHAO The Art Jewel has opened its showrooms in Hong Kong and Taipei, run exclusively through private appointment. Its collections have highlighted prestigious auctions including Christie’s and Sotheby’s, and they have also been exhibited at museums and invitation-only events in Dubai, Paris and New York. In 2010, the brand’s Royal Butterfly brooch was inducted into the Smithsonian Institution National Museum of Natural History. Cindy Chao is one of the first contemporary jewellery artists to receive such honor. 

In 2020, the brand's “Ruby Butterfly Brooch" was inducted into the Musée des Arts Décoratifs, marking the first time a Taiwanese Jewelry Artist has been inducted into the museum’s acclaimed permanent collection.

Highly sought after by connoisseurs and collectors, the brand offers two collections. The museum-calibre Black Label Masterpieces are the most prestigious and exclusive creations. They are the ultimate expressions of and spiritual devotion to savoir-faire and craftsmanship. Architecture, sculpture, travel and nature are sources of motifs embodied in sculpted organic forms that are as vibrant as real-life. Unveiled once a year through invitation-only exhibitions, only a limited number of these one-of-a-kind masterpieces are created annually.

The White Label Collection is the gateway through which collectors may first explore and experience the brand’s vision and artistry. Sculpted, crafted and set with precious stones, the designed-to-be-worn White Label Collection has made dramatic statements on international red carpets.

Name: Watches World
Description:
Watches World is a leading and sophisticated online retail destination for luxury watches, combining the best and most desirable watch brands with expert advice, unparalleled customer service and competitive prices. The site sells over 60 leading brands, with new products being added five times a week. Watches World offers express worldwide shipping to over 170 countries (with same day service in London and Paris) and a free collection service for returns and exchanges. Brands available include Patek Philippe, Audemars Piquet, Richard Mille, Rolex, Hublot, Cartier, Omega, IWC and innovative and upcoming watchmakers like HYT and MB&F. 
The site is curated, edited and served by a world-class eCommerce team, benefiting from the global infrastructure of the Watches World Group.
Watches World publishes The Watches World newsletter once per week. Watches World provides unrivalled sales advice and customer care service including free collection for returns and exchanges. Watches World currently operates from 11 offices in 4 continents. The headquarter is in Paris and distribution centers are in Hong Kong, Moscow, Paris, London, Miami, Los Angeles, Geneva, Prague, Dubai, Singapore and Sao Paulo. 

Watches World Ltd. is part of the Watches World Group.

Name: LGDTRADE
Description:
We, LGDTRADE, are a well known name in the lab created diamond industry. We connect all best man made diamond merchants and buyers at a single global platform to provide the best buying and selling opportunities. The LGDTRADE is an intelligent marketplace that showcases all different types of lab grown diamonds, including, but not limited to, natural colored diamonds, HPHT diamonds and CVD diamonds. We assure you the best quality diamond that contains all atomic elements of natural diamonds.

This platform is for both lab created diamond merchants and sellers. The lab grown diamond merchants can list their diamonds to sell to the retail and wholesale buyers all across the world. The merchants will get the best price for their diamonds. We sell all different types, sizes and shapes of diamonds and you can get buyers for all different types, sizes and shapes of diamonds. All you need to do is join us and start placing your synthetic diamond. You will receive bids and order requests. Everything will be done at your fingertips. You will also get the complete history of the diamonds sold, which you can use to devise strategies to increase your sales and ROI.

Name: Zillionaire
Description:
Jewellery is usually perceived as something traditional in India. Zillionaire aims to change this paradigm by establishing its own market of millennials. Each Zillionaire piece reflects individualistic expression along with decadent exclusivity. More than a product, Zillionaire sells a story.
Our collection drips in ice and is a way to inspire and offer the best and latest trends in pop culture.

Name: Bacher and Co.
Description:
Bacher and Co., established in 1938, is one of the largest importers and distributors of luxury consumer products in South Africa. From our own home-built brands such as Tomato and Buren to large international fashion brands such as Guess Watches and Montblanc and Dunhill Fragrances, our team strives to deliver the best brand experiences.

OUR MISSION 
Is to be a company where work is fun, inspiring, exciting and surprising. Where people are courageous, self-motivated and fully engaged. Our ambition is to be different, be better and exceed all expectations.

Name: Gregory Jewellers
Description:
Gregory Jewellers is one of Australia’s leading prestige diamond jewellers, renowned for its commitment to quality, craftsmanship, exclusivity, and excellence in service. Established in 1967 by the Gregory family, the company has remained family-owned and operated for over 55 years. Today, the second generation of the Gregory family, Edward Gregory and Helen Gregory, serve as Co-Chief Executive Officers, continuing the legacy built by Lahdo and Christopher Gregory.

Gregory Jewellers has grown to become one of Australia’s premier diamond retailers, designers, and manufacturers of high-end jewellery, setting the standard for quality diamonds. We maintain one of the country’s largest live inventories of diamonds, exclusively available at our 14 boutiques—11 in New South Wales and 3 in Victoria—as well as our online boutique.

In 2024, Gregory Jewellers expanded its offerings with the introduction of Leyla Rose By Gregory - Exquisite Lab Diamonds, showcasing innovative lab-grown diamonds designed and produced to the Gregory Standard. Additionally, the Mr Gregory collection, featuring Mr Gregory Gold and Mr Gregory Silver, offers a distinguished selection of men's jewellery and accessories.

Our portfolio includes being leading agents for luxury watch brands such as Breitling, Garmin, IWC Schaffhausen, Longines, Oris, Panerai, Rado, Raymond Weil, Seiko, TAG Heuer, Tissot, Tudor, and Zenith.

Gregory Jewellers is also proud to operate TAG Heuer boutiques in Bondi Junction and Miranda, the Breitling boutique in Burwood, and 5 Pandora boutiques.

As a company with deep family values, Gregory Jewellers is committed to supporting the community, including ongoing support for the Children’s Cancer Institute of Australia—a cause close to our hearts.

For human resources and career enquires please contact: Humanresources@gregoryjewellers.com.au
For media enquires please contact: marketing@gregoryjewellers.com.au

Name: ZEADES Monte Carlo
Description:
Leather is our inspiration. ZEADES collections come in a spectrum of colours. Bold or romantic, they breathe personality and confidence. The starting point is the finest of Italian leather, selected from Tuscan tanneries for its soft, supple sensuality. 

In legendary Monte Carlo, home of the brand, the premium natural leather is matched by ZEADES technical skills and design genius. ZEADES has made of leather a sought-after gem in the exquisite world of jewellery.

Today the brand is distributed in 65 contries through a qualitative network of Dpt Stores, Chaines and Independent Shops.

Name: 7Cs Group
Description:
7Cs Group is a diversified conglomerate with a strong presence in the field of wholesale and retail jewellery, sustainable construction, real estate investment and hospitality. The Group was founded in 1999 (under the name of Rosy Blue and renamed 7Cs in 2014 ) by Dr. Harshad Mehta as a company that focused on the jewellery industry. Headquartered in Dubai,  7Cs Group employs more than 1,900 personnel belonging to 23 nationalities.  
 
GROW ON US
The philosophy of the 7Cs Group is the empowering message - Grow on us. Herein, 'grow' represent the future and 'on' represent the stability of a strong platform established on firm morals. The 7Cs Group is committed to the idea of enabling growth – both for business as well as the society. The 7Cs Group stands for 7 core values i.e. Credibility, Creativity, Customer Service, Collaboration, Consistency, Commitment, and Corporate Social Responsibility. 

OUR VISION
We aim to facilitate growth for all stakeholders and continue building mutually beneficial, lasting partnerships. Our ambitious and visionary leadership ensures that we keep exploring new frontiers and achieving new victories, thereby facilitating growth for the entire 7Cs family and its partners.

OUR MISSION
We are dedicated to offering a reliable platform that nurtures innovation, rewards excellence and creates value for stakeholders, as well as the community.

Name: GiftBasketsOverseas.com
Description:
Gift Baskets Overseas is an International company that specializes in high quality global gift delivery for companies establishing loyalty programs or holiday gift campaigns. By maintaining its presence in each region it serves, Gift Baskets Overseas has become renowned globally for its ability to provide online ordering convenience, multilingual customer service, and dedication to providing secure payment options. 

Additionally, GiftBasketsOverseas.com serves as a backbone to over dozen Concierge Service providers in US and Internationally.

Learn more about the company at corporate.giftbasketsoverseas.com .

Name: TW Steel
Description:
Dutch by design, big in attitude and peerless in class, we’re the new school for time. Unashamed to be different and taking strength from size, we’ve carved a new timeline in the watch market since our arrival in 2005.

Coming on strong from the outset we sidestepped the traditional path and continue to break new ground in untested territory today. Steel has run through the very architecture of our design from the first timepiece, creating form and function with Swiss quality standard.

We make no apologies for resisting the norm and neither do those who choose to stand tall and wear our time. There’s an art to being bold with style, it takes confidence and character to stand alone…it’s not a watch, it’s a statement.

Make no mistake, our brand is loaded. It takes weight to make an impression so the signature steel elemental construction and expressive designs project strength and presence from the wrist. The uniquely crafted timepieces are the brainchild of Ton Cobelens, a creative force who continues to guide the shaping of every new model.

As Ton Cobelens is our creative force, his son Jordy Cobelens is our driving force, ensuring our impact is global. The combined experience and sharp thinking of the two are reflected in everything we make and do, a determined, double dynamic of creativity and enterprising business sense.

We have a global reach. Wherever you are in the world we’re not far away with a timepiece that matches your attitude without denting your wallet.

Time doesn't rest and neither do we; our innovative design is in perpetual motion, keeping us one step ahead of the pack.

We are TW Steel.

Name: Franz Viegener
Description:
Renowned for its uncompromising quality, Franz Viegener produces a curated selection of sculptural bath fittings that synthesize architecture, geometric forms and fluidity. Drawing from 100 years of experience in the industry, Franz Viegener launched its North American brand in 2013, and has quickly achieved a
best-in-class level of expertise and quality. A dedicated facility within the company’s 700,000 square-foot state-of-the-art complex in Buenos Aires draws upon the brand’s finest European engineering and master South American artisans to create the Premium Collection’s unique and exceptional handcrafted products.

Premium Collection Products
Franz Viegener Premium Collection is a high-end, meticulously crafted and engineered portfolio of bath fittings with products that are contemporary, authentic, and pure. A select group of engineers and designers within the factory were chosen to focus on creating these bold, timeless and stylish designs with the functionality demanded by the discerning North American consumer.

Each distinct collection is a fusion of the cultural and historical South American surroundings in which the brand thrives, together with the discipline and engineering prowess of the Viegener family. These luxury products exceed the standards of designers and architects worldwide.

Every piece that comes out of the factory is painstakingly machined, polished, assembled and tested. The products are then packaged with utmost care to ensure that upon arrival the products reveal themselves immediately.

Name: Jewel Fx | Custom Jewellery & 3D Tech Solutions
Description:
At Jewel Fx, we empower jewelers with bespoke design services powered by cutting-edge digitisation and 3D technology. Our mission is simple: to help jewelry businesses transform ideas into stunning, market-ready creations with speed, precision, and reliability.

We specialize in CAD construction, photorealistic renders, animations, and digital solutions that bring collections to life. From custom design development to advanced visualization tools, we combine artistry with innovation to give jewelers a competitive edge in today’s digital-first marketplace.

Trusted by retailers, wholesalers, and e-commerce brands worldwide, Jewel Fx is more than a service provider — we are your creative design house and technology partner. Whether you need custom jewelry solutions, scalable 3D visualization, or support in digitizing your product line, our team ensures quality, timely delivery, and unmatched attention to detail.

With deep domain expertise in jewelry and a forward-looking approach to technology, we’re building the future of how jewelers design, present, and sell.

Name: Emmanuelle Khanh
Description:
Emmanuelle Khanh is a French avant-gardist fashion label created in 1969. The brand’s timeless approach is internationally daring and has continued to be incorporated by the label’s Creative Director Eva Gaumé. Inspired by 50 years of iconic creations, her love of beautiful objects and contemporary femininity, Eva has been shaping the recent history of Emmanuelle Khanh. 
For 50 years, Emmanuelle Khanh has focused on local and traditional crafts, creating handmade frames in France with a century-old know-how. The frames’ materials are carefully chosen valuing outstanding quality and local production. The manually-carved and polished frames highlight the traditional French savoir-faire to last a life- time and remain timeless.

Name: RODERER
Description:
LUXURY ESSENTIALS. CRAFTED FOR CONFIDENCE.

Tailored essentials that empower the modern man

RODERER is a luxury brand offering essential pieces aimed at today’s discerning gentleman.
Handmade from the finest materials, each RODERER item embodies a perfect blend of contemporary elegance, timeless refinement and minimalist sophistication.
Founded in 2016 by Olivier Birault, RODERER draws inspiration from the "Less is more" philosophy.
Every creation reflects our brand’s guiding principle "Luxury Essentials. Crafted for Confidence."
With RODERER, you carry more than just style - you carry confidence.

Discover the full story at www.roderer.co

Name: Chronométrie Ferdinand Berthoud
Description: Bringing the name of master watchmaker Ferdinand Berthoud back to life through an exhilarating timekeeper for today’s world.

Name: RJ Watches SA
Description:
Many believe time is the ultimate luxury. At RJ, we think a bit differently. We believe that there is no time like the present. For us, the moment is now and it demands to be harnessed. That philosophy has shaped the iconic watches we have produced: timepieces that blend the most elemental of raw materials with creative flair, exceptional originality, contemporary sophistication and Swiss craftsmanship. 

Founded in 2004 as Romain Jerome, the company rebranded in 2018 to become simply RJ, purposefully placing itself at the cutting-edge of Swiss Made creative culture. Our watches, inspired by popular culture, exploration, technology and fashion are designed to excite life’s most curious explorers with their beauty, sophistication, rarity and cultural significance. 

RJ watches have become renowned not simply for their recognizable designs but also for the way in which they literally blend the most rare, unprocessed elements from historical landmarks into their very essence. 

RJ’s “Moon Dust” watches celebrate the extraordinary feat of space travel. RJ “Titanic” watches are hewn from the actual steel that was used to construct the great ocean liner.
RJ is also celebrated for its unique ‘Collaboration’ timepieces that are inspired by popular culture’s most revered characters. Produced through official collaborations in extremely limited numbers, these watches are often released to coincide with landmark anniversaries, such as the 75th anniversary of Batman. Such exclusive timepieces represent the perfect alchemy between a prestigious horological masterpiece and the emblem of a new generation.

In 2018, that intention to excite, provoke and curate great watch stories continues. For the first time RJ has its own signature collection - ARRAW. Our all-new core collection is available for both men and women as a range of cutting-edge chronograph timepieces that are inspired by RJ’s passion and commitment to true originality, sophistication and individuality.

Name: Les Ateliers GEM
Description: Les Ateliers GEM is a luxury goods & jewellery

Name: Anne Sisteron
Description: Anne Sisteron is a jewelry brand based in Beverly Hills, California.

Name: TUUM SRL
Description:
TUUM è stata fondata nel luglio 2009 da due giovani imprenditori che hanno deciso di imprimere su un gioiello parole prese in prestito dal mondo cristiano, rendendo così tangibile la spiritualità del mondo.
Il marchio trae la sua origine dal pronome possessivo latino "tuum", una parola composta da poche lettere ma portatrice di un messaggio potente, assoluto , indelebile, ma allo stesso tempo semplice come il verso di una poesia.
Il progetto TUUM nasce e si sviluppa nel cuore dell'Italia, da sempre culla di grandi personalità, in un crocevia di culture, con influenze toscane e contributi umbri.
I gioielli TUUM contengono il senso di una storia vecchia di 2000 anni eppure sempre nuova, il fascino delle cose fatte a mano con cura. 

TUUM was founded in July 2009 by two young entrepreneurs who decided to imprint words borrowed from the Christian world on a piece of jewellery, thus making the spirituality of the world tangible.
The brand takes its origin from the Latin possessive pronoun "tuum", a word composed of a few letters but carrying a powerful, absolute and indelible planetary message, yet at the same time as simple as the line of a poem.
The TUUM Project was born and developed in the heart of Italy, which has always been the cradle of great personalities, in a crossroads of cultures, with Tuscan influences and Umbrian contributions.
TUUM jewellery contains the sense of a 2,000 year old and yet ever new story, the charm of carefully handmade things. It includes a spiritual message which stimulates reflection and which everyone approaches in a very personal way.

Name: Georgini
Description:
Launched in 2004, GEORGINI is one of Australia's most successful jewellery brands.  GEORGINI continues to fuse modern elegance with fashion-forward design to create collections that includes something for every occassion.  Releasing newness every two months ensures that there is always something innovative and exciting to captivate both retailers and customers.

Crafted from premium materials, GEORGINI offers luxury for every person.  The core GEORGINI range is crafted from the finest rhodium or 18ct Gold or Rose Gold plated sterling silver, and glittering Cubic Zirconia's.  

GEORGINI is distributed worldwide and proud to be Australian owned.

OUR MISSION
Our mission is to create moments and memories.

OUR VISION
To create beautiful, original, accessible, elegant and inspired jewellery.  To establish mutual and enduring value for our customers and retailers.

ORIGINALITY
Creative to our core, we are at the forefront of design and innovation in the jewellery industry.

INTEGRITY
We conduct ourselves honestly and ethically with all people in our GEORGINI world.

QUALITY
We pursue product excellence.

COMMUNITY
We strive for exceptional partnerships and relationships with our employees, retailers, customers and suppliers.

SUSTAINABILITY
We see the big picture and make ethical and sustainable choices.

Name: Visionist
Description:
We set out to create a totally new eyewear shopping experience, delivering precision optics through ecommerce. Our first priority is scouting artistically designed, handcrafted frames and fitting them with advanced lens technology. What truly sets us apart, however, is the human touch. 
  
Eyewear obsessives with deep industry experience, our Visionists are exactly who you want ushering you through your optical journey. One part stylist, one part optical whiz, they oversee every last aspect of the experience. Whether you crave real-time human help (ask us anything over chat or schedule ahead for a video consult) or prefer to guide yourself (tap our Digital Stylist or explore Virtual Try-On), our team helps you navigate to exactly what you need to see. So even when you’re shopping solo, you’re never really on your own.
 
We see you. There was a time when eyewear catered to just one type of face, with a particular set of features. We think we can do better.
