Name: Taneez (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
Taneez began as a small retail outlet in Park Tower Mall in Karachi in 2000.The idea was to contemporize brass crafts in shape and design, making the craft useable and decorative. Brass objects were then dipped into pure silver and plated and given a coating of lacquer to prevent oxidation and tarnishing. Packing was an important feature and so the black and silver box with its distinctive tassel was added, giving the customer the least amount of trouble in its care and presentation.

The silversmithing craft is over 3000 years old and Taneez is an integral part of preserving this tradition in Pakistan. Most of the craftsmen are from india and they and their descendants are continuing the tradition handed down to them.

Eighteen years later, Taneez is a household name and has become a limited company with a staff of 30 persons from the two, originally at its inception.
The founder ZS Ahmad is also the designer and at least ten new designs are produced each month. Over a thousand designs are available at affordable prices starting from Rs.400 to 20,000. Our customers range from housewives, tourists, to corporate, diplomats, multinational company, and government institutions.

We have four retail outlets and are planning significantly expand in Pakistan both in retail and online. Sterling silver gifts as in jewellery with semi precious gems and home or office accessories have also been added. Made to order and engraving are also some of the services provided.

The company was founded by Mrs. Zeenat Saeed Ahmad and is now run by her son Adnan Ahmad.

Despite the fact that our products are handcrafted, we are able to produce a the quantities required to run a nationwide chain of Made in Pakistan products, and manage to maintain our quality and innovative designs. The Pakistan Govt and Security Services are some of the main customers of Taneez.
The finest craftsmanship and the most modern design principles are at the heart of all Taneez products.

Name: RR Auction
Description:
Headquartered in Boston, RR is a globally recognized and trusted source for rare manuscripts, autographs, and historic artifacts. Founded in 1976, RR has achieved countless record-setting prices in more than 560 successful sales, including: astronaut  Dave Scott's Apollo 15 Lunar Surface Chronograph watch , which sold for $1.625 million; President Kennedy's reporter diary from 1945 , for $718,750; author Mario Puzo's extensive archive relating to his novel "The Godfather," for $625,000; an original Apple-1 computer , garnering $325,000; author Truman Capote's hand-notated manuscript for "Breakfast at Tiffany's" , for over $300,000; a rare NWA 11789 Lunar Meteorite for $612,500; and a pair of Bonnie and Clyde's guns for over $500,000.

Internationally known and frequently featured in all media outlets, RR Auction prides itself on selling historic material, thoroughly examined by in-house experts and third-party authenticators, to ensure the highest standards of authenticity. With more than 45 years of industry experience, RR Auction continues to grow and expand into new categories, achieving record prices for clients around the world.

Name: Samuel Gassmann Paris
Description:
Le créateur
Né en 1974 à Paris dans une famille artistique (père travaillant dans le milieu de la photographie et mère peintre), Samuel Gassmann entreprend des études d’histoire de l’art à la Sorbonne. Un temps commissaire d’exposition, il développe également des reportages culturels en format court pour le magazine Metropolis (Arte).
En 2007, il entame une recherche sur l’origine du « plus petit élément » du vestiaire masculin, le bouton de chemise d’homme, afin de proposer ce sujet à Arte. En visitant la dernière usine de production de nacre française, il a l’idée de réinvestir le bouton de manchette. Déjà féru de mode, de propositions textiles et stylistiques, il crée sa marque éponyme en septembre 2009, autour de ce petit objet en nacre, porteur d’un luxe discret. 

La marque d’un luxe discret
C’est ainsi qu’il envisage chaque création qu’il signe. Les boutons de manchette affichent une nacre sans ostentation, ou toute autre surface convoitée pour sa créativité, et réservent l’argent ou le bronze pour les liens invisibles, dissimulés par la chemise. Il en va de même pour ses autres projets : qu’il conçoive une cravate, elle cache sous la couture la richesse et la profusion de sa soie (9 plis). Ses nœuds papillon s’ornent d’un fermoir en argent qui reste à l’abri des regards, sous le col. Et si ses bagues sont riches de diamants, ils se nichent au creux de l’anneau, seulement visibles une fois dédoublé. C’est l’idée d’un luxe discret, volontiers secret, qui n’appartient qu’à celui qui en jouit. Loin du logo et de la démonstration.  

Boutique-atelier:
2, rue Dupin 
75006 Paris

Our artisans put a lot of time and effort to perfect every design and piece, hence what one receives as a result of pure love, care, and hard work.

Vidhi and Nidhi, two business and creative-savvy women started Ethnic Andaz with one maxim, to bring out the most eclectic designs that resonate with diverse personalities and the latest trends. The idea evolved during their post-grad days, which led to the inception of the brand. What was just a digital store back in 2015, became a fully-fledged brand in 2019. Since then, the two have devoted themselves to Ethnic Andaz and helping you ‘Find Your Bling’.

Drawing inspiration from various elements and everyday visuals, all our designs are curated by some of the great artists at our headquarters in Mumbai. Something on paper is then transformed into beautiful pieces in our manufacturing unit based in Jaipur and Kolkata, two of the most creative savvy cities in the country. A beautiful process to witness but an even beautiful piece of jewellery to don.

NAVIFORCE is headquartered in Guangzhou, China, and has its own factory in Foshan city. We are an integration of development, design, self-assembly and sales. We do wholesale trade and retail channels online and offline, facing different overseas markets. You can find us on Alibaba, Aliexpress, eBay, Amazon, Shopee and other major sales platforms.
From material selection, production, assembly and to launch in the market, we strictly control every link to ensure that every watch delivered to the customer's hand is a qualified product; The delicate and detailed inspection is the key to ensure the quality of the product.

In the future, NAVIFORCE will continue to innovate and bring customers a more perfect experience.
The ultimate goal of NAVIFORCE is to build a global consumer watch brand.

Name: YSSO | Jewellery
Description:
YSSO was founded in 2020 after more than 30 years of work in jewellery design, and having developed an extensive archive of thematic designs during that time. YSSO, as a name, is derived from the word gold in Greek, and is meant to be a blank canvas for you to create your own stories for whatever you imagine yourself to be.

YSSO aims to bring the individuality of unique design and Greek craftsmanship abroad. The founders, mother and daughter, both co-design jewellery to this day. Community is very important to YSSO and encouraging a conversation around sustainability, and sourcing is something we champion. 

A shared vision of modern jewellery making characterises YSSO's timeless designs which seamlessly merge history and creativity. 

We believe that one piece of jewellery can make a difference. Therefore we design with that principle in mind - each piece in our collection is created to be a versatile investment that can be worn in a variety of ways. Our jewellery is not meant to be layered or over-purchased. Instead, YSSO pieces are meant to be worn on their own or mixed and matched with other pieces from an existing collection. By investing in one piece, one is investing in a versatile and timeless addition to their jewellery collection that can be worn for years to come.

We aim to become a one-stop destination for anyone seeking an extensive range of jewellery designs, catering to a diverse set of tastes and preferences. At YSSO, we aspire to be more than just a jewellery brand; we aim to be a community where people can find pieces that not only add to their personal lifestyle and taste but also represent meaningful moments and memories. 

YSSO has been featured at British Vogue, Wallpaper* Magazine, Courier, Elle, Country and Townhouse amongst others. Additionally, YSSO has been worn by prominent people in culture and fashion, like Caroline Vreeland, Jourdan Dunn, Ikram Abdi, and Stefania Cristian amongst others.

Name: MAISON BELMONT Joaillerie & Objets
Description:
L’EXPÉRIENCE MAISON BELMONT – FAIRE VIVRE LE BIJOU ET LES MÉTIERS D’ART

Maison Belmont, à la fois marque de joaillerie et concept singulier qui se vit, est née courant 2021 de l’imagination de sa Fondatrice, Sarah Mugnier. Inauguré en décembre 2022 en plein cœur de Genève (Suisse), le showroom de Maison Belmont demeure un lieu de rencontre habillé d’une forte identité où passion de l’artisanat et vif intérêt pour les belles choses ne font qu’un.

Chez Maison Belmont, le bijou émerveille, surprend, se dessine toujours de manière joyeuse, ludique et audacieuse : une multitude de pierres précieuses aux mille reflets, des couleurs flamboyantes, des matières nobles, du mouvement, un savoir-faire unique et haut de gamme, de la créativité et quelques défis techniques joliment relevés. Sarah Mugnier a rêvé, imaginé, puis esquissé ses pièces de joaillerie qui prennent vie dans les ateliers genevois finement sélectionnés par la marque.

Maison Belmont se veut une expérience unique qui se partage : Sarah Mugnier a à cœur d’accueillir sa clientèle dans un monde extraordinaire où le raffinement côtoie l’imaginaire, et le précieux les métiers d’art : une véritable invitation au voyage, fascinante et captivante.

N’hésitez pas à vous inscrire à notre newsletter sur notre site www.maison-belmont.com (lequel sera en ligne dès le printemps 2023), afin de recevoir nos dernières actualités. Nous nous réjouissons de vous accueillir au showroom de Maison Belmont, qui est ouvert uniquement sur rendez-vous : par mail à info@maison-belmont.com ou par téléphone au +41 79 927 77 55.

A très vite,
Sarah Mugnier

Name: Oroplac Srl
Description:
Erano gli inizi del Novecento, quando un giovane fiorentino, Ugo Bianchi, decise di dar vita ad una piccola bottega artigiana di placcatura di metalli in via dei Serragli, in Borgo San Frediano. Qualche fotografia in bianco e nero e la ancor vivida memoria dei nipoti ritraggono il chimico come un distinto signore, sempre in cravatta e camice bianco. Lavorava con grande energia e dedizione nella sua casa-laboratorio che si affacciava su un grande giardino. Era un fratello della Misericordia, attività a cui dedicò tutto il poco tempo libero di cui disponeva. Con la moglie Bianca, una donna piccola e minuta, ma energica e dotata di forte personalità, ebbero tre figli: Aldo, Gustavo, che tutti conoscevano come Buri, e Giovanna.

Erano gli anni della prima guerra mondiale: Ugo andò al fronte e alcune difficili vicende familiari costrinsero la moglie Bianca ad assumere la conduzione della bottega per salvare l’attività, che venne trasferita in un locale più modesto in via del Campuccio, una traversa di via dei Serragli. I figli decisero di lavorare con lei e l’attività di galvanica continuò. Al ritorno di Ugo la bottega poté riprendere a pieno ritmo e sempre in questo periodo la figlia Giovanna si sposò con un Baruffi. Dal matrimonio nacquero tre figli, tra cui Renzo, che a dieci anni (siamo nel 1944 in piena seconda guerra mondiale) lavorava già nella bottega del nonno. Durante il passaggio della guerra la ditta subì alcuni danni, ma riuscì a sopravvivere e nel 1948 assunse il nome di LAGE (Laboratorio Artigianale Galvano Elettrico). Dopo alcuni anni Ugo e i figli cedettero l’attività al giovane, ma ormai esperto nipote Renzo Baruffi, che subentrò alla conduzione dell’Azienda e nel 1957 la iscrisse alla Camera di Commercio e Artigianato di Firenze, denominandola Oroplac.

La Ditta si trasformò in una realtà sempre più strutturata specializzandosi sia nel settore delle montature per occhiali che in quello dell’illuminazione. Nel 1963 anche il fratello minore di Renzo, Ser

Name: THEFUTUREOFJEWELRY (TFOJ.COM)
Description:
Proud recipient of Gold at the 2024 W3 Award in the General Websites – Web Applications & Services category, recognizing our award-winning 3D customization platform.

THEFUTUREOFJEWELRY (TFOJ) is a next-generation jewelry company and digital infrastructure platform powering custom jewelry creation—from design to doorstep.

Our proprietary 3D customization engine lets customers design signet rings and pendants directly in their browser or in-store. Each piece can be personalized with initials, handwriting, GPS coordinates, Roman numerals, monograms, drawings, or symbols—all visualized in real time with transparent, dynamic pricing based on metal market rates and design volume.

We enable on-demand manufacturing, localized supply chains, and inventory-free retail through an intuitive interface and additive manufacturing workflow. Customers can try a 3D-printed resin prototype of their exact design for $25 before committing to solid 14K gold or .925 sterling silver, reducing returns and building confidence.

TFOJ supports more than 100 ring sizes (2.5 to 17.5 in quarter sizes), making it one of the most size-inclusive jewelry platforms in the world. Every precious metal piece is made in America by our network of experienced casting partners, with infrastructure ready to scale globally through regional fulfillment.

Whether you’re a consumer creating your own heirloom or a global retailer seeking to offer personalized, on-demand jewelry without the burden of inventory—TFOJ is the future of jewelry.

 Explore more at thefutureofjewelry.com
 Software-powered customization

As a family the McKInney’s nurture their relationships with the world’s ﬁnest gem cutters and pearl growers, and the master craftsmen and women who bring to life the ﬁnest jewellery for their discerning and sophisticated clients and friends.

Name: John Bead Corporation
Description: John Bead Corporation is a luxury goods & jewelry company based out of 20 Bertrand Ave, Toronto, Ontario, Canada.

Name: AMIDA Watches
Description: AMIDA is an independent watch brand founded in Switzerland in 1925. Today, a passionate watch designer and a team of talented professionals have decided to revive the brand and continue to write its history ..

Name: Calderoni Diamonds
Description:
Calderoni was established in 1840 in Milan’s Via della Lupa, known today as Via Torino. At that time, Milan was a romantic city, dominated by the Habsburg dynasty. 
In 1870, Calderoni opened a prestigious establishment in Piazza Duomo, which soon became a point of reference for the city’s aristocracy. Calderoni became the official supplier of the House of Savoy and its prestigious customers included the nobility and royal houses of Europe.
In 1942, Calderoni moved to Via Montenapoleone, symbol and centre of Italian luxury in the European Capital of fashion, design and the jewelry, remains Calderoni’s flagship store in Italy to this day.
The Maison has always prided itself in providing a first-rate service to its customers in the selection of the diamond.
For Calderoni, offering customers the best, ethical and certified diamonds is not only a guarantee, but a daily challenge; one in the pursuit of excellence and perfection indeed for four times it won the Diamonds International Awards, the World Jewelery Oscar.
The Maison boasts 200 years of history in the production of high-end Italian jewelry and the selection of the very best diamonds, further strengthened by the experience of the Damiani group, of which it forms a part.

Name: STILA
Description: Manufacture des boites de montres

Name: Sarda, Inc.
Description:
Sarda is a Artisan jewelry designer and distributor committed to the highest standards of quality and design. Every piece is sketched at the hand of designer and CEO Janyl Sherman, and handcrafted by master silversmiths and artisans in Bali, Indonesia. Our stones are personally selected for their color and brilliance, hand-cut, and set in silver three-times the industry-standard weight, ensuring that each piece of jewelry tells a captivating story about the woman who wears it. 

We always strive to convey the family-owned nature of our business, and we prioritize the best of customer service. To maintain this standard, Sarda provides retailers with everything they need to make the brand a success in their stores. Customers love Sarda’s high-end, couture quality without the upscale price point.

This is Sarda.

Name: Timeless Swiss Watch
Description:
Swiss Made Mechanical Watches
 Designed to follow you in all your adventures
 Based in Lausanne
#TimelessWatch
 Discover our HMS collection here 
www.timeless-watch.ch/en

Name: Loiseau Aycardi
Description:
Fine jewelry brand based in Paris, France.
We design, create and sell high & fine jewelry. Visit us in our store located in Saint Germain des Prés, in the heart of Paris.
Family owned since more than 180 years, the Maison is dedicated to offer customers the best quality jewels. Our staff has a deep knowledge in the selection of diamonds, color gems and pearls and a long experience in handcraft and the work of noble metals.

Name: CREA - VALORI NEL TEMPO
Description:
CREA - VALORI NEL TEMPO si avvale di consulenti esperti che seguono il Cliente, non solo nella fase di acquisto del diamante in blister, ma anche della custodia e della vendita futura.
CREA vende i migliori diamanti in blister la cui purezza e autenticità sono certificate da GIA, HRD e IGI di Anversa, i più affidabili Istituti gemmologici al mondo.

Il consulente orienta il Cliente nella scelta della pietra più adatta alle Sue esigenze. La scelta di un diamante certificato deve rispettare alcune caratteristiche fondamentali che ne garantiscano il valore nel tempo. 

I fattori che determinano il valore del diamante sono le note quattro "C", dalle iniziali dei termini in inglese, ovvero: colour (colore), clarity (purezza), cut (taglio) e carat (peso in carati).

Inoltre, CREA propone unicamente diamanti “etici”, ovvero conflict-free secondo le definizioni indicate dalle Nazioni Unite. 

CREA è in grado di scegliere le migliori pietre sul mercato.

Ci contatti per saperne di più al numero di telefono 030 220198 o via email a commerciale@creavalori.it

Sito web www.creavalori.it

Name: Wyatt Jewellery
Description:
Wyatt Jewellery is a modern atelier specialising in bespoke fine jewellery, rooted in timeless design and meaningful craftsmanship. With a deep respect for natural beauty, each piece begins with a carefully selected gemstone—rare, ethically sourced and chosen for its unique character. These stones are the heart of every Wyatt creation, becoming modern heirlooms with emotional resonance.

Balancing contemporary sensibilities with classic elegance, Wyatt designs are made to last beyond seasons. From one-of-a-kind engagement rings to transformative remodels and curated capsule collections, the focus is on personal expression, refined materials and thoughtful details. Every commission is a dialogue between inspiration, material and form, underpinned by deep technical expertise.

The process is intentionally collaborative and welcoming. Clients are invited to begin with a complimentary 15-minute consultation, an opportunity to explore ideas, understand the process and view the ever-evolving gems gallery—an online collection of loose stones available for bespoke commissions.

Wyatt’s jewellery is handcrafted in London using gold and platinum, and always responsibly sourced diamonds and coloured gems. The brand’s approach favours quality over quantity, investing time into each piece to ensure it feels both personal and enduring.

As both a destination for collectors and a trusted guide through meaningful moments, Wyatt Jewellery champions individuality, integrity and enduring beauty. The result is jewellery that becomes part of a life story—worn daily, passed on, treasured.

Explore the gems gallery or begin a bespoke journey with a 15-minute consultation.

Name: INEDIT Joaillier Créateur - Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant
Description:
Depuis 1984, nous créons et réalisons des bijoux exclusivement fabriqués à la main dans nos ateliers installé au 70, rue Jeanne d’Arc à Rouen et au 14, rue de l'Abbaye à Paris. Chaque pièce est unique, car réalisée par des Artistes d’exception. Joailliers, sertisseur et polisseur, tous reflètent le savoir-faire de la Joaillerie Artisanale Française.

Grâce au respect de ces traditions nous avons obtenu les deux labels les plus prestigieux de notre profession : Les labels « Joaillerie de France » et « Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant ».

L’histoire d’INEDIT a débuté à Rouen en Normandie. C’est en 2007 qu’INEDIT s’est installé à Paris, à Saint Germain des Prés, au coeur du quartier des Arts et des Lettres.
2019 signera l'agrandissement de ce point de vente Parisien, comprenant un nouvel Atelier de fabrication.

Inédit, c'est avant tout un état d'esprit...

Since 1984, we have been creating and producing exclusively handmade jewellery in our workshops at 70, rue Jeanne d'Arc in Rouen and 14, rue de l'Abbaye in Paris. Each creation is unique, because it is made by exceptional artists. Jewellers, stone setters and polishers, all reflect the know-how of French handcrafted jewellery.

As a result of upholding these traditions, we have been awarded the two most prestigious labels in our profession: "Jewellers of France" and "Living Heritage Company".

The history of INEDIT began in Rouen, Normandy. In 2007, INEDIT moved to Paris, in Saint Germain des Prés, in the heart of the Arts and Letters district.
2019 will see the expansion of the Parisian outlet, including a new manufacturing workshop.

INEDIT is above all a state of mind...

Name: ARESA New York
Description: ARESA New York creates innovative fine jewelry for authentic women who define their own milestones. We rethink how jewelry can be constructed, in order to maximize brilliance through minimalist design.

Name: Neri Romualdo Srl
Description: Neri Romualdo Srl è stata fondata nel 1972 a Caprese Michelangelo in provincia di Arezzo da Romualdo Neri, brillante uomo d'affari. Nel 1992 la sede si sposta in modo definitivo ad Arezzo in via del Gaverdello, all'interno del distretto orafo aretino. I figli Danilo, Luana e Carlo dirigono l'azienda rispettivamente come CEO, responsabile amministrazione, responsabile produzione.

Name: L'ORNEMENTALISTE
Description:
La nature, de par son infinité de formes, est une source d’inspiration inépuisable.
L’ornementaliste crée pour toi des parures sublimant ces forces naturelles, en maîtrisant des techniques de fabrication modernes et un design unique et contemporain.

J’aime créer des pièces uniques et sur-mesure ! Si tu as un projet en tête pour ton mariage, pour un anniversaire ou pour fêter une occasion spéciale, tu peux m’écrire, je te répondrai avec plaisir !

Name: Infinijewel Synergies Pvt .Ltd.
Description:
The last two decades of liberalization has dramatically changed the business and social landscape of India. Retail has evolved. The consumer is spoilt for choice in any industry. Lifestyles have escalated up. Businesses have become technology driven, customer-friendly and volumes and profits have multiplied. Processes across the industries have become lean, mean and efficient. And yet…

There are some sectors in the Indian business landscape where things have remained the same. Age-old processes and slow penetration of technology have led to a general decline in the face of global competition and mega-corporations have swamped the terrain bringing in modern state-of-the-art practices. 

If you are on this page, our guesswork is that you are either a big or small player in the Indian jewelry industry, or you are curious about Indian jewelry designs, or you are a consumer of jewelry or a connoisseur of Indian jewelry designs. 

Characterised, traditionally by small and medium entrepreneurs who have remained the back-bone of the industry for millennia, today the industry is afflicted by the very same processes that had held the industry in good stead when things were not so technology-driven. And today, there is a huge gap in the market which is eager to embrace modernity without sacrificing the robustness of the tradition.

Is it possible to embrace modernity and at the same time remain traditional? Well, this is India. And here, it’s not only possible but also a perquisite for long-term sustainable success. 

Infinijewel is a platform bringing together goldsmiths and retailers, designers and manufacturers, buyers and suppliers, marketers, branding agents and many unseen, unsung heroes from the industry creating jewelry masterpieces for the global stage.

Name: Hope Jewels By House Of Phua
Description:
Hope Jewels — Since 1990
From a humble craft store to a trusted name in fine jewellery, Hope Jewels is a second-generation family brand creating timeless gold, jade, and diamond pieces — now including sustainable lab-grown gems.

Rebranded in 2024, HOPE stands for Happiness, Originality, Positivity, and Elegance. Every piece tells a story — yours.

Name: Đồng Hồ Hải Triều
Description:
Đồng Hồ Hải Triều - Nhà Bán Lẻ Đồng Hồ Hàng Đầu | Since 1991

Đồng Hồ Hải Triều là đơn vị có hơn 30 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực bán lẻ đồng hồ đeo tay chính hãng dành cho nam và nữ. Với khoảng 30 thương hiệu, Hải Triều hứa hẹn sẽ mang đến đa dạng sự lựa chọn uy tín, thời trang và nhiều bảo hành dành cho khách hàng.

Khi mua sắm đồng hồ tại Hải Triều, bạn hoàn toàn yên tâm với chính sách cam kết 100% chính hãng. Mua đồng hồ tại Hải Triều còn đi kèm dịch vụ bảo hành mở rộng đến 5 năm, miễn phí thay pin trọn đời, miễn phí vận chuyển.

Để nhằm thuận tiện, mới đây, Đồng Hồ Hải Triều còn ra mắt dịch vụ mua đồng hồ trả góp với 3 kỳ 0% lãi suất, áp dụng cả mua sắm trực tiếp lẫn trực tuyến. Đến Hải Triều chi nhánh gần nhất để được trải nghiệm không gian mua sắm sang trọng hàng đầu tại Việt Nam.

Name: Harsh Diamonds
Description:
Harsh Diamonds is a manufacturer, aggregator, and online marketer of fine diamonds and diamond studded jewellery. We operate on the premise that everyone deserves a diamond, and hence we have one of the largest collections of diamonds for you to choose from. We call CHOICE as our 5th C, along with Cut, Carat, Clarity and Color. With our strategic presence in Hong Kong and India, we have access to large pool of some of the finest diamond cutters, polishers and talented jewellery makers. All our diamonds are certified by IGI/GIA and come with its globally accepted certification. We also create stunning diamond studded jewellery including rings, earrings and necklaces under our brand Orionz Jewels.
 
 


Making Diamonds “Forever Affordable” :

Shopping for diamonds online is one of the smartest ways to beat High Street prices. While the diamonds you buy will be the same, with online shopping you avoid paying for the retailer’s high rentals and overheads. This alone can make a difference of between 30-40% in terms of the price of diamonds!
What’s more, you also benefit from our business practice of maintaining thin overheads and low margins. The result is a bigger sparkle for your buck, and diamonds that are not as unreachable as the stars in the sky!

Name: Edell Fine Jewelry
Description: Small goldsmithing atelier where besides a continuous changing collection, trying to make elegant, feminine and delicate fine jewelry, personal pieces are made as well. Where possible in our style, but with a touch of you! All facets of goldsmithing, from design till finished product is done by us personally in our shop in Son en Breugel. A time consuming process turning a creative idea into a special gift.

Name: Enny Monaco
Description:
Enny Monaco is an Italian company established in Turin in 1971 specialized in designing, producing and marketing fashion jewelry. With particular attention to the quality of the materials and manufacturing of the models, the firm is characterized by an elegant and refined style.
Privileged contributor in the creation of jewelry collections for the most important Italian designers - including Valentino, Laura Biagiotti, Mila Shön, Krizia and Missoni - the brand has been able to innovate constantly standing out for its creative combination of silver with real stones.
The company has always been able to combine the values of its own culture, sophistication, Italian style and craftsmanship to the modernization of production processes, distribution channels and retail shopping experience.

Name: AL HASHIMI PEARLS
Description: Al Hashimi Pearls has inbuilt the trust not only in Bahrain but also in the Middle East, United States of America and Europe. Our main aim as an establishment is to transform these beautiful wonders of ocean into timeless pieces of designer jewelry. Certified by The Gem and Pearl Testing Laboratory in Bahrain, these beautiful pieces tell a story of their own. Al Hashimi Pearls Signifies an exclusive mix of passion, creativity and constant quest to push beyond the limits of design and production. Each piece is a result of a journey among cultures and multi ethnic influences .Our Designs are crafted by skilled artisans, creating stunning pieces with Bahraini natural Pearls with precious and semi precious stones.

Name: 5 OCTOBRE
Description:
Donner à l’objet tout son sens parce qu’il est rare et précieux, fruit du travail d’hommes et de femmes qui ont œuvré avec passion pour en façonner chaque détail.

Les collections 5 Octobre combinent pierres fines et précieuses serties d’or, d’argent et vermeil, assemblages plein de singularité, jeu d’asymétrie, et nuances de gemmes aux déclinaisons infinies et subtiles, pour révéler l’éclat des pierres. 

Éprise de voyage, d’art, de nature et de cultures lointaines, Sophie envisage le bijou comme un talisman, avec l’envie de crééer des pièces iconiques qui traversent le temps par leur simplicité et restituent l’émotion d’un objet ayant un vécu.

Name: IMAGEM PARIS
Description:
IMAGEM is a French company located in the heart of Paris. 
Focused solely on the trade of natural and non-treated colored gemstones, Imagem focused it's activity on center stones,  calibrated stones (rounds , fancy shapes  and high precision cutting), and Australian black opals. 
Over the years, IMAGEM have build strong partnerships to ensure quality, price and time efficiency for all its high jewelry and high quality watchmaking customers.

Name: DiamondsByMe
Description:
DiamondsByMe is ontstaan uit pure liefde voor het goudsmidsvak, opgericht door Remco Broekhuis. 
“Al jaren ben ik gepassioneerd goudsmid en sieradendesigner. Niets is mooier dan de dag beginnen met het ontwerpen en creëren van de mooiste sieraden. Elke dag maken mijn team en ik bijzondere sieraden die een leven lang gedragen worden. 

Vanuit twee succesvolle juwelierszaken ben ik verder gaan kijken naar nieuwe mogelijkheden in de branche. Door de combinatie van nieuwe technieken met het oude ambacht is DiamondsByMe ontstaan. DiamondsByMe is hét online platform waar de klant zelf eenvoudig een sieraad kan ontwerpen. De klant ontwerpt zijn/haar droomsieraad waar en wanneer het de klant zelf uitkomt; thuis op de bank, onderweg in de trein of samen met ons. “

DiamondsByMe maakt gebruikt van de nieuwste technieken in het goudsmidvak; 3D-printen. Ons team van designers is iedere dag bezig om schitterende sieraden te ontwerpen. Onze designers maken gebruik van een speciaal tekenprogramma, waardoor het mogelijk is om een sieraad visueel te maken.

Wanneer het ontwerp klaar is, wordt deze geprint met onze 3D-printer. Het geprinte sieraad wordt thuisbezorgd, waarna je deze kan vasthouden en bekijken. Zo weet je precies hoe het ontwerp gaat worden. Is het ontwerp niet zoals verwacht? Geen probleem! In de ontwerpfase kunnen alle wensen nog gewerkt worden in het sieraad. Wanneer het ontwerp is goedgekeurd, kunnen wij het sieraad daadwerkelijk produceren. Onze sieraden worden gemaakt in eigen atelier, door goudsmeden die nog ambachtelijk te werk gaan. Door de samensmelting van het oude ambacht met de nieuwste technieken, kunnen wij jou dit unieke  concept aanbieden. Wij hopen dat het samenstellen van een sieraad bij DiamondsByMe hierdoor nóg leuker wordt!

Name: Muratti Silver
Description:
Mücevheri lüks olmaktan çıkarıp gösterişine önem veren her kadının ulaşabileceği günlük bir aksesuar haline getirmeyi amaçlayan Muratti Silver, 1985 yılında bugünkü İzmir Alsancak Merkez şubesinde  hizmet vermeye başlamıştır. El emeği ile tasarlanan geleneksel gümüş takılara modern üretim teknikleri ve tasarım trendleri ile yeni bir kimlik kazandırmıştır. Değerli ve yarı değerli taşları; gümüş, altın ve çelik üstüne işleyerek modern ve günlük hayata renk ve tarz katmaktadır.

Ana moda akımlarını takip eden ve  modern takı alanında modayı belirleyen Muratti Silver; her yıl tasarladığı yüzlerce modeli ve yeni koleksiyonları çağdaş aksesuar tutkunlarının beğenilerine sunmaktadır.

Name: Monoset
Description:
Modern Personalized Stationery perfect for handwritten notes and letters. 

Ever need to send a Thank-You letter? Congratulate someone? RSVP to an event or wedding?

Handwritten notes and letters are the perfect way to make a genuine impression and create, nurture and build relationships with friends, family and colleagues. 

Order Today. Ships in 24 hours.

Name: Beverly Hills Smart Homes
Description: Multiple industry award-winning custom tech integration firm, based in Beverly Hills, CA and serving clients globally.

Name: Courtville - Antique & Vintage Jewellers
Description:
At Courtville, we pursue the rarest and finest antique and vintage jewellery.

We deal in the highest quality gemstones, old cut diamonds and period estate pieces and specialising in one-of-a-kind engagement rings.

Name: Reminiscence Jewels
Description: Reminiscence Jewels is a wholly-owned entity of Shanti Jewel LLP - an associate of  SJ, designed to deliver an enchanting business shopping experience for jewelry entrepreneurs across North America. Over twenty years, the company has developed the resources, expertise, and infrastructure necessary to manufacture and deliver a wide range of premium natural and organic diamond jewelry - rings, earrings, pendants, necklaces, bracelets, and jewelry accessories.

Name: Ahee Jewelers
Description:
Edmund T. Ahee Sr. started his journey into jewelry retail with humble beginnings, in the lobby of his Uncle’s bowling alley. Today, Ahee Jewelers is recognized as an essential institution of the Metro Detroit community and has been the proud recipient of hundreds of distinguished local, national, and international awards.

For over 3 generations, we have always believed that what puts a smile on a face and warms the heart is what’s important in life. Whether it’s a commitment of a lifetime or a simple, charitable act, everyone deserves a special moment. 

The Ahee Family is delighted to have developed close relationships with the best and most respected brands in the world. These relationships ultimately allow Ahee customers to select from a wider range of items and price ranges than ever before. The celebration definitely starts at Ahee.

Name: Lepa Punca
Description:
Lepa Punca (se pronuncia “Lepa Punça”) es una marca de joyería contemporánea creada por Melisa Rodríguez, que surge con la voluntad de trasladar todos los conocimientos, influencias y creatividad de ésta al mundo de la moda.

Melisa nació en Londres, aunque es natural de la isla canaria de La Palma, donde pasó toda su infancia. Con 18 años se traslada a Barcelona para comenzar sus estudios de arquitectura en la Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya, donde adquirió los conocimientos de diseño, composición y estética que ahora aplica a todas sus creaciones.

Durante la realización de sus estudios tiene la oportunidad de realizar infinidad de viajes alrededor del mundo, que son los que han servido en gran medida de inspiración para Lepa Punca. El último curso de sus estudios lo realiza en Eslovenia, concretamente en la Univerza v Ljubljani, donde tiene la oportunidad de seguir conociendo nuevas culturas y nuevas lenguas. No en vano el nombre de Lepa Punca surge de este periodo, en el cual ella y sus amistades utilizaban este término para llamarse cariñosamente. Lepa Punca en esloveno significa “chica bonita”.

En 2012, tras la finalización de sus estudios, su primer trabajo como arquitecta la lleva a India, concretamente a Studio Mumbai para trabajar con el prestigioso arquitecto Bijoy Jain. Es allí donde aprendió a valorar la pureza y el valor de la materia prima y como ésta se puede transformar, ya sea en arquitectura o en joyería contemporánea.

Tras su etapa en India, Melisa decide regresar a Canarias, donde entre otros proyectos, pone en marcha su aventura con Lepa Punca. Si algo distingue a Lepa Punca es el énfasis en el diseño y el trabajo artesanal que se percibe en cada una de sus creaciones, y que pretende que cada una de sus clientas se sienta toda una “Lepa Punca” cuando lleve sus piezas.
Location: Los Llanos de Aridane, Canary Islands

Name: Krysty Designs
Description:
Krysty Designs is an unusual fine jewelry store located in Powell, Ohio. Owners Brad Krysty and Lynette Parker have created a store as unique as their jewelry. Browse their gallery of styles from other designers, choose from Brad's own designs or have a very special piece of jewelry created just for you or a loved one. Jewelry Designer Bradley Krysty, showcases his creative talents exclusively at Krysty Designs. 

This family business emphasizes quality, from their designs, to their merchandise, to their customer service.Sit comfortably at the bar showcase and watch Brad set a prized family diamond, or put the finishing touches on the piece you designed together for that special someone. Discuss designs and see  them come alive with the latest 3D jewelry computer graphics design tools. 

Designed to be warm and comfortable, Krysty Designs is focused on long-term relationships with their customers, bringing them the latest and the best the jewelry industry has to offer. Krysty Designs wants their customers to be educated consumers and provides the knowledge and information to help their customers make informed decisions when shopping for jewelry. Krysty Designs offers a fully equipped jewelry shop that includes a laser. If you have jewelry in need of work, you can count on quality workmanship. Service while you wait is available by appointment. Krysty Designs is here to care for you and your jewelry.

Name: Mouvex 1911
Description:
Mouvex 1911 was founded in Switzerland in 1911. Since 2019, the resurrection of the brand is paving a new trajectory while maintaining its lifetime values of excellence, exclusivity, creativity, and Swiss watchmaking heritage. 

The relaunch collection is inspired by the Art Deco to pay tribute to the microbrand’s heritage. The Avant-garde design used on the watches is a combination of square and round shapes, which illuminates the distinctive Art Deco forms in a versatile daily usage as well as high end-end occasions. The watch has been meticulously engraved on the case back with a unique pattern design and includes the product numbering details.

Name: Van Busch Fine Jewelry Designs
Description:
At Van Busch Fine Jewelry, we have striven to provide a no-pressure environment for over 40 years. Unlike larger jewelry exchanges and shops, our cozy Fifth Avenue boutique offers an intimate shopping experience like no other. We'll help you find the right item that fits your budget or custom design and manufacture one right in our workshop - whatever you can dream of, we can make!

We also provide expert repairs, appraisals and re-sizing in as little as a day or two.

Visit our website to view our collection of fine jewelry! http://www.vanbusch.com

Name: Sunbice Jewels
Description:
Sunbice Jewels is a high-end minimalist jewelry brand that aims to instill confidence in corporate workers and businesspersons through minimalistic adornment.
CAC NO: BN3695987

Name: Adore Adorn
Description: Adore Adorn Jewelry, made with love. Shop statement jewelry such as rings and medallions made with semi-precious stones influenced by family memories.

Name: OK Silver / Gocett Gold
Description: Our company is one of the leading silver and gold jewellery manufacturers based in Istanbul / Turkey. Our main goal is the satisfaction of our clients with perfect service and quality. We cooperate mostly with european markets and produce for big brands in this area. Please do not hesitate to visit us for the newest and most contemporary collections.

Name: True Curated Designs
Description:
A fresh, approachable take on luxury, True Curated Designs offers fine jewelry and custom engagement rings in an online-only format, creating an authentic and memorable experience. 
At True, we believe that jewellery should last for years to come while adding to your lifestyle. This is why our jewellery is made exclusively with solid gold. We believe that fine jewellery is meant to be worn, layered and fit your daily life -- not kept in a box. True's pieces are designed to work together for added impact and special occasions. 
At True, our fine jewellery is for the active, busy person -- strong, beautiful, fine and genuine, just like you.

Name: Ono Pleasure/Lelo, Inc.
Description:
Luxury Lifestyle Brand specializing in Bath and Body products.
The ONO concept entails designing high-quality Bath Body Massagers, Massage Oils, Massage Candles and Lubricants. By keeping prices affordable and quality high, these bathroom accessories appeal to fun-loving individuals and couples the world over. In everything they do, ONO’s three tenets of Relax the Body, Soothe the Mind, and Excite the Senses ring true in every sense.

Name: Diamond Imports Pty Ltd
Description:
Diamond Imports is a 100% Australian owned and operated diamond merchant based in Sydney. We are one of Australia's largest diamond importers and a leading Australian diamond wholesaler. 

As one of Australia's most trusted and reputable diamond wholesalers, with over 40 years’ experience in the diamond and jewellery industry, Diamond Imports offers expert guidance, detailed diamond information and professional advice. Diamond Imports buys directly from the major international diamond bourses and our diamonds are carefully selected for their fine qualities; this translates towards substantial savings and competitive pricing for our customers.

All our diamonds are independently certified by internationally accredited diamond grading laboratories including GIA, HRD, IGI & DCLA. Diamond Imports only sell natural diamonds of the finest quality and we do not deal in conflict diamonds, clarity enhanced or treated diamonds. 

Diamond Imports are Foundation Members of the Diamond Dealers Club of Australia and the trusted source when buying loose diamonds. As a professional diamond wholesaler we specialise in excellent cut diamonds in all shapes and sizes.

Name: Edenn
Description:
La maison Edendiam propose des collections joaillières actuelles et facile à porter, réalisées à la commande dans le respect de l’artisanat par les meilleurs artistes joailliers d’Anvers, capitale mondiale du diamant. Vendues exclusivement en ligne à leur juste valeur, les créations Edendiam marquent brillamment le savoir-faire traditionnel de la Maison avec un choix de plus de 10 000 bijoux, sans cesse étoffé par de nouveaux modèles. Fort d’une expertise de diamantaire à la bourse d’Anvers et passionné d'art contemporain, Davidé Farhi a allié ces deux univers pour fonder Edendiam, Maison de joaillerie entre artisanat et innovation.

Name: LOVE SIGN
Description:
Love, unity, and belonging - are the principles that motivated Alexis Ander Kashar, a deaf civil rights attorney and entrepreneur, to launch RoseBYANDER, a jewelry collection built on community and expressed through love and this is her story.

 

My career as a civil rights attorney advocating for a more accessible society taught me that while advocacy can change the world in many ways, the most compelling form of advocacy comes from the power of human connection. Never did I imagine the power of statement jewelry to foster such powerful connections that transcend languages and cultures until I experienced it firsthand. 

 

My own experience with such power of statement jewelry began with a special diamond pendant that was created for my sister, our mother and myself to symbolize "I Love You" in sign language and our pride as members of the deaf and hard of hearing community. Ever since I began to wear my pendant, I have engaged in so many meaningful conversations with friends and strangers who are intrigued the pendant or want to share their own experiences. Unexpected connections are constantly made as a result of those conversations.



From there, RoseBYANDER was born, created by conversations and rooted in authenticity. The ANDER in RoseBYANDER represents the Ander family for which the pendant was created. The Rose represents love and harmony that is delivered through authentic connections.

 

The debut collection from RoseBYANDER introduces the Love Sign Pendant created from precious metals and stones to represent many different kinds of love including: romance, friendship, familial and community. Our mission is to share a universal symbol of multiple meanings of love.

Description:
http://www.diambay.com

Welcome to Diamonds Bay, a new B2B diamond trade platform.

Diamonds Bay connects diamond manufacturers and dealers among themselves and to the
jewelers worldwide. 

How does it work?
On the one side the seller uploads his diamond inventory to the database.
From the other side the diamond dealer or jeweler looking for a specific diamond performs a search in the database system.
When he locates the diamond in the database, he can view the complete details of the diamond and directly contact the owner of the diamond and purchase it from him.  

At Diamonds Bay you will find amazing tools to reduce your expenses and increase your sales volume and profits.

Using Diamonds Bay Beta is free; there are no subscription fee or commission charges. The system is easy to use, and synchronizes smoothly with various ERP software.

We are constantly working to improve the system and add new amazing tools to help you reduce expenses, and sell more product at higher margins.

Join the Diamonds Bay family now and let us do the work for you.

An antique book, a military medal found in a Palais-Royal store, a swatch of vintage Russian lace – everything can be a source of inspiration.

Since its launch, BAROQ has been telling the story of those Colombian artisans and jewelers who are responsible to materialize each piece of the brand, creating unique pieces whose objective is to elevate the community’s aesthetic.

BAROQ´s influence comes around geometric shapes and patterns of modern architecture and it mainly seeks to promote sobriety and a minimalist lifestyle. The famous phrase “less is more” used by the renowned architect Mies Van der Rohe, alludes to BAROQ´s philosophy at its best.

BAROQ is aware of the impact that the fashion industry causes in the environment. For this reason, one of its main principles is to use recycled materials in the process of creation of its accessories, in this way counteracting and minimizing its footprint.

italiano.
L’azienda a carattere artigianale e familiare, produce calzature da donna di alta qualita’, grazie a: l’attenta selezione dei materiali scelti, la ricerca ed il controllo del confort delle nuove forme, ma soprattutto grazie all’ accuratezza nelle varie fasi produttive, svolte tutte all’interno nel nostro laboratorio, in cui il contributo manuale è ancora prevalente per permettere un prodotto accurato.
Le nostre calzature, contrassegnate da tutte le caratteristiche del 100% Made in Italy, sono il frutto del nostro spirito laborioso, affiancato alla passione e all’esperienza pluriennale nel settore.
L’azienda realizza la propria collezione con il marchio Irene Costa, che si caratterizza per scarpe da donna dallo stile giovane e raffinato. Può inoltre vantare la collaborazione con noti brand e clienti per cui produce calzature con private label. L’azienda offre infatti la produzione di linee di calzature 100% Made in Italy, usando sia articoli del proprio campionario, sia articoli personalizzati.

Founded in 2011, Vamp London sources, designs and manufactures beautiful sterling silver jewellery. Using precious metals and handset gemstones, Vamp London redefines luxury silver jewellery and fills a gap on the British jewellery scene. 

In five years only, Vamp London has established itself as a brand made for women everywhere who seek what is best for themselves. Vamp London is inspiration, statement and boldness. Vamp London is elegant, timeless and edgy all at the same time. 
The brand aims to tell a story. Inspired by masquerade balls paired with glamorous city life, Vamp London brings a touch of sparkle to whoever succumbs to temptation.

Since early 2016, Vamp London has embarked on a new journey, to expand its stockist reach and create brand awareness featuring in luxury publications such as Vogue/Elle/Glamour and GQ magazine to name but a few.

Name: Luxury Sales Distribution France
Description:
In 2004, Frederic Sourisse, an Ecole Boulle graduate, began working in jewelry studios in Lyon, France. He spent 8 years traveling the world, meeting clients and sourcing the best precious stones. 
In 2012, he opens his first store in the Caribbean, out of a felt connection and love for the region. "Sweet Paris" is thus born, surrounded by waves and sun, where both jewelry and surf are paired, both his passions. 
From the Caribbean sun, Frederic takes a position at Place Vendome, his travels and training continue.
In 2013, at a trade show in Kazakhstan, Frederic meets Anastasiia, General Manager of high-end jewelry boutiques in Moscow, one year later from this meeting Juliette Paris is founded. 
Two years later, their daughter Juliette is born. 
These milestones have created a beautiful beginning, different from the traditional historical family institutions; Juliette Paris is modern in both story and design. 
In 2017, Anastasiia and Frederic launch "Piece Unique", their high-end jewelry line. A few months later, they create together Francois Paris, a jewelry line for men.

Today Anastasiia and Frederic reinvent the universal codes of jewelry by offering their Juliette Paris clientele a young and audacious experience, as well, as the ability to be a part of the design process, with joy and ease, their founding values.

Name: Nak Armstrong
Description:
Recognized for his innovative departures from standard metalworking techniques and an experimental aesthetic that is at once modern yet classic, Nak Armstrong’s CFDA award-winning work continues to push the boundaries of design.

Launched in 2011, the eponymous collection was quickly selected by Barneys New York, among other exclusive retailers worldwide.  His work has garnered praise by national press including W, INSTYLE, Harper’s Bazaar, and WWD.

Armstrong’s background in architecture and fashion are evident in the engineering of his designs, in which he developed a proprietary technique to suspend the stones in metal.  Hand-fabricated in Austin, TX, this labor-intensive construction process allows for highly textural and layered designs that are deceptively lightweight.  It remains an iconic feature that is recognizable in its simplest form and in its most elaborate.

Nak Armstrong embraces paradox.  Precise art deco stone cuts of aquamarine surround old-world rose cuts of opaque sapphire.  Ruffled pleats of stone and metal buckle and fold around large geometric baguettes.  Clean saturated colors play with nuanced and subtle neutrals.

The collection is intended for the archetypal, modern woman who exudes strength and unique precision in the way she approaches style.

Name: Carignan Watch Company
Description:
Expert watch repair services for Tag Heuer, Movado, Omega, Rolex, and most other fine watch brands. 20 years of professional "at the bench experience."  The testimonials we receive from our customers attest to the quality of our service. 

Watch repair and restoration is our primary vocation although we do also overhaul clocks and other micro machines as well as repairing jewelry and other related items. We service nearly all modern, vintage and antique, American or European  pocket and  wrist-watches specializing in Fusee pocket watches, and all high grade watches, including Tag Heuer, Patek Philippe, Movado, Omega, Breitling, Longines, Wittnauer, Rado, Certina,  and Rolex.

Genuine materials and replacement parts for most popular watch brands on hand.  Gaskets, pressure testing, crystals, crowns, batteries, cleaning, adjusting, dial hand and case refinishing. We manufacture many parts that are no longer available. We also have a well established network of others in the business so it is very rare that we can't help. 

Denis is a "watchmaker" of considerable skill with nearly 20 years of at the bench professional experience his passion is the restoration of antique and complicated timepieces and he enjoys servicing watches that others have given up on. 

Our store is located in the beautiful "lakes Region" of New Hampshire and we serve thousands of customers worldwide.

We are fast, friendly and professional, our work is guaranteed and we are fully insured.

Name: Adel Chefridi, Inc
Description:
Beauty is a language that we all accept without effort because it is the raw material of our own essence, more intrinsic than intellect and culture.  More subtle than understanding.  Naturally universal.

Adel’s childhood playground in Carthage-Tunis was on the remains of the material cultures of the Phoenicians, Romans, Byzantines, Arabs, Andalusians, Ottomans, and many more. They all left behind a tapestry of knowledge, stories and artifacts. When Adel came to New York in 1998 and witnessed the richness of all the different faces and flavors, he felt right at home. New York felt fresh yet so familiar and the inspiration was immediate and deeply rooted. Soon after he started his jewelry studio and continued on his path using beauty as his language.

In 2010 we started our sister studio in Tunis. Adel had a desire to open a channel to exchange skills and knowledge with his family back in Tunisia; creating an opportunity and outlet for the expression of beauty back home. This direct connection to the past that has shaped Adel’s designs allows the creativity to continue to flow.

We design and make jewelry with the utmost attention to detail and quality using hand selected natural gem stones to create timeless pieces. We select only the finest materials using ethical suppliers, stand behind our workmanship and treat each other and our clients with respect and kindness; striving to be in harmony with what is around us.

Name: INSERT SOLUTIONS
Description:
Insert Solutions is the French company dedicated to the design and manufacturing of solutions to store or display fragile objects in airplanes and yachts such as chinaware or glassware.

Our bespoke products, usually called “inserts”, fit in your cabin compartments and are made of lightweight materials to meet weight constraints. 
They are finished with luxury decorative materials like leather or suede matching your cabin interior.
Our design approach is based on finding aesthetical and functional solutions to optimize the use of available storage space on board.

So far, more than 30 business jets are flying with our inserts (ACJ, BBJ, Bombardier Global, Dassault Falcon, Embarer Legacy, Gulfstream)

Description:
JP WATCH DESIGN is a timepiece company owned and operated in Sydney, Australia.

JP WATCH DESIGN was established in 2015 with the purpose to help preserve the world we live in. Sharing the desire to create a sustainable future, along with a love for fashionable timepieces, the three founders have combined their passions through launching a company with the aim to give back.

With every watch purchase, 15% of the proceeds are donated across three charities that work tirelessly towards:

- conserving the ocean
- protecting the rainforest
- providing clean water to those in need

JP WATCH DESIGN’s first model 'The Bearing’ boasts a timeless style, with a stainless steel casing and locally sourced kangaroo leather strap. Designed in Australia, the watch comes in four colour variations. The company’s signature icons - a tree, a whale and a water drop - are engraved on the back of the timepiece to remind owners they contributed towards a brighter future when they purchased their watch.

Want to stay up to date about JP WATCH DESIGN? Sign up for our newsletter, contact us at info@jpwatchdesign.com, or visit us on social media. We are always happy to assist you with any questions you may have.

Nr2 made from our distinctive bog oak is a sold humidor lined with Spanish Cedar and brass inlaid finger joints.  Finally, collection Nr3, a glass, and bog oak watch box, with soft pillows to house your watch collection. They are all produced as a limited edition of one hundred. 

We source all our materials from within the United Kingdom, and as such, we feel it is essential to also collaborate with local artisans on our design projects. Each project inspired by acts of ritual and ceremony, such as cooking, drinking tea, or writing a letter. Deeply ingrained with tradition, these acts often take time to prepare and complete. In a fast-living, online world, our designs respect the rich history of these tactile traditions and celebrate the time taken to enjoy them.

Name: Astatine

The history of Astatine brand began in the late 2014, when Leo Prozument, President of AV Structures, was extensively involved in exclusive sales and marketing of Tonino Lamborghini mobile products in the North American market.

At that time, Mr. Prozument had understood the attractiveness and opportunity in the mobile luxury space from his involvement in representing Lamborghini, and knowledge of the customer base hungry for innovation, design, and technical superiority. This is when AV Structures made a decision to venture into design and development of its own luxury phone. All of the experiences combined, including manufacturing of mobile products and accessories, extensive connections with leading manufacturers, and a long-standing love of jewelry and watchmaking, contributed to the launch of a revolutionary brand Astatine.

The choice of calling the brand Astatine (At) was not accidental for a number of reasons. First, Mr. Prozument immediately decided to make this phone very limited in its quantity. Second, Astatine is a name of the rare element on Earth. Therefore, our focus was on exclusivity and uniqueness, making the brand available only to a limited number of people in the world.

Name: Kouali By Juliette N'GUESSAN
Description:
Il y a les bijoux que l’on regarde.
Ceux que l’on touche.
Et ceux qui parlent.

Chez Kouali, nous faisons parler vos bijoux.
Nous écrivons ce que leurs formes, leurs textures, leurs silences révèlent à la peau.

Créé par Juliette N’GUESSAN, Kouali est un studio narratif unique, où se croisent art, héritage et joaillerie.
Un espace où les mots deviennent matières précieuses.
Et où chaque création — la vôtre — devient un récit.

Un collier se porte. Et raconte.
Et quand il est bien écrit, ce récit fait toute la différence.

Vous avez une pièce unique ? Un bracelet, une bague ou une collection de bijoux ?
Un savoir-faire transmis ? Une vision du beau enracinée dans la culture ?
Alors les mots pour le dire doivent être à la hauteur.

Kouali, c’est :
• Des textes ciselés comme de l’or, pour que vos créations brillent aussi à l’écrit.
• Des récits ancrés, profonds, sensibles, pour toucher, captiver, émerveiller.
• Un regard éditorial entre Paris, Abidjan et les inspirations du monde.

 Contenus éditoriaux | Storytelling de collection | Poésie | Identité narrative | Création de bijoux

Que vous soyez une marque de joaillerie, un artiste, une maison d’art ou un projet en gestation,
Kouali est là pour faire naître, de vos créations, une voix, une présence, un pouvoir d’évocation.

Mêlant art, mémoire et joaillerie à travers des récits enracinés, façonnés pour révéler ce que susurrent vos créations.

Contact: juliette@kouali.fr

Name: The Raw Stone
Description:
The Raw Stone is a source of natural rough diamonds and ethically mined gemstones from around the world. Our stones are set as is in jewelry, typically by socially conscious jewelers or individuals who want to create a piece of custom jewelry from the ground up. We are passionate about gemstones and jewelry, and believe that consumers and jewelers alike should have access to high quality, ethical, and traceable gemstones and diamonds. In order to source our inventory, we perform thorough research, deep due diligence, and secure strong relationships with industry luminaries. Living wages, humane treatment of workers, safety, education, and the absence of child labor are all key principles of the mines and lapidaries that we work with.

We supply diamonds and gemstones to both independent jewelers and individuals. If you are an individual seeking to create a custom piece, we can help source your stone and would be more than happy to recommend ethical jewelers who may trust to create your design in a responsible manner. If you are a jeweler who is creating a line of jewelry, we can work directly with you to order a custom line of stones that fit your exact needs.

A note about our sourcing philosophy:

Diamonds: We source all our rough diamonds from siteholders and industry luminaries who we trust, and who can trace the stones back to their country of origin. Raw diamonds that are uncut are much easier to trace, as they are not mixed with other parcels in order to be polished. 

Gemstones: Most of our gemstones come from the Tanzania Women's Mining Association, an organization in Tanzania that pools together small scale miners, empowers women to work in mining, and educates miners on safe and ethical mining practices. When we are unable to supply gemstones from Tanzania, we work directly with mines and gem cutters throughout the world who are dedicated to modern and ethical mining and cutting practices.

My Diamond Story begins with the earth’s natural formation of a rough diamond. It continues through a jewelry-making process that combines skilled artistry with modern technology. The Story helps you learn about each step in this process, including:
My Rough Diamond

My Diamond Cutting and Polishing
My Diamond Grading
My Diamond Ring Design

When each bride wears her engagement ring for the first time, My Diamond Story becomes her own – to cherish, tell and re-tell many times.

Name: Thin Wild Mercury
Description:
Thin Wild Mercury is a fine fragrance line encapsulating the iconic spirit of Los Angeles.  In a 1966 interview with Playboy, Bob Dylan described his yet-to-be-released seminal album Blonde on Blonde as having "...that thin, that wild mercury sound." While Dylan found the inspiration for this spirited description of his work through his band's lively, uninhibited performances of it at the time, ours is rooted in the illustrious history of Los Angeles; its renowned neighborhoods and hangouts and the nowadays fabled eras of its vibrant lifespan – told aromatically. 

Our fragrances are made in the famed city's Los Feliz Village neighborhood.  Cathleen Cardinali is a veteran luxury retailer turned perfumer via LA's Institute for Art and Olfaction and an insatiable drive to tastefully create something that did not yet exist but had the feeling of a classic.  Anthony Polcino is a lifelong musician turned designer via many multi-faceted years in the "east-side" scene and the relentless need to see to it that ideas become realities. Together they realized Thin Wild Mercury through a simple, traditional ethos of the masters: do it yourself. TWM's fragrances are like nuanced stories redolent of particular places and times of the past eloquently told by musings from the present. The result is something like a state of mind for the senses – for anywhere, anytime.

Name: House of Pehr
Description:
Eclectic jewellery designs to see you through the different phases of your life.

The Story of House of Pehr is the story of each one of us and how we wish to tell that story.

It is the story of the moments in which we absentmindedly touch our ring thinking of the first time our loved one slipped it on to our finger. It is the story of how we smile to ourselves hearing the jingle of the earring in our ear that our mother passed onto us. It is the story of anticipating the proud moment in which we are presented with a badge of honour.

Pehr recognises that our life is witness to the different phases and experiences of joy, celebration and moments of intimacy. Experiences told through the centuries old art of adorning with ornaments.

That’s where the inspiration for our design lies, inspired from special moments in our everyday across time and distant lands. We design pieces that tell your story. 

We don’t want you to keep waiting for the big milestones in your life. We want to see you through the different phases of your life as you continue to adorn time in your everyday. Pehr is the story of who we are, where we’ve come from and what we aspire to be in our every day.

Name: Bijoux Floelo
Description:
LA PETITE HISTOIRE DE FLOELO :

Floelo est né en 2021 en Touraine d’une belle rencontre de deux jeunes femmes : Florence la française et Lorena la mexicaine.

L’idée est de marier nos deux cultures latines et de créer une marque de bijoux haut de gamme associant deux matériaux nobles, emblématiques de nos pays : le cuir et l’argent

Mais attention, même si une grande joie de vivre nous anime et une envie de rigoler de tout, il n’est pas question de lésiner sur la qualité. Nous aimons tester nos produits : vacances, cuisine, enfants, sport…tout y passe et rien ne bouge.

C’est pas du toc ! 
Nous portons une attention forte au choix des matériaux que nous utilisons pour vous proposer des bijoux qui durent longtemps. Nos matériaux sont haut de gamme et certifiés : Argent 925 et cuir de vachette pleine fleur.

Respect pour nos artisans  
Le travail du cuir comme celui de l’argent  est réalisé par des hommes et des femmes pour qui nous avons beaucoup d’admiration : un vrai savoir-faire artisanal, un temps certain passé sur chaque bijou, de la passion et beaucoup de talent !

#Bon rapport qualité/prix
Nous travaillons en direct avec les artisans.  En supprimant les intermédiaires, nous obtenons de meilleurs prix. C’est pour cela que nous sommes capables de vous proposer des bijoux de qualité à un prix juste toute l’année.

Chez Floelo, on aime les belles choses, bien faites, au prix juste et qui durent longtemps !

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/bijoux_floelo/

Name: EGL Platinum Laboratory
Description:
EGL Platinum, formerly known as GIPS and EGC, is an independent scientific institute, founded in 1975 by Menahem Sevdermish, FGA, and 'European Gemological Laboratories' (EGL).
The institute, located at the heart of the Israeli diamond exchange area, is a gemological complex composed of four sections: EGL diamond grading laboratory, gem Identification laboratory, jewelry and precious stones appraisal department (EGA), and the European Gemological College (EGC) for professional education.

EGL Platinum provides variety of services, including: diamond grading and gem identification certification; professional consultation to jewelers, goldsmiths, insurance appraisers, tax authorities and the public; appraisal services for jewelry and precious stones; laser inscriptions services on diamonds and precious stones; and educational lectures and seminars about a wide range of gemological and gem trade-related subjects.

The EGL PLATINUM team includes leading Israeli gemologists, graduated at the world-renowned gemological institutes – GIA, EGL and GEM-A. The team is directed by Menahem Sevdermish, world-leading gemologist and gem expert, and by Avi Meirom, former President of the Israeli Precious Stones and Diamonds Exchange and Vice President of the International Colored Stone Association (ICA).

Name: DINABORO Genève, High Jewellery free to tell its story
Description:
DINABORO is a family-owned company in line with the purest tradition of High Jewellery. Irina Borodina founded it, with her husband, after an original career path.

Freshly graduated from one of the most prestigious professional schools of dance and choreography in Moscow, she declines proposals from major theaters of the capital. Her desire to open herself up to the rest of the world turns out as strong as her desire to live her lifelong passion. She joins a modern ballet that performs in many countries, until time catches up with her. The director of the dance company dies prematurely, she loses a loved one and her "dream come true" vanishes.

Irina Borodina definitively turns the page after the unexpected encounter with the new passion of her life, the design of high jewelleries. A jeweler's education in Geneva sharpens her natural predispositions toward the branch and she works for several years as an independent designer for major companies in town. Her aspiration to create a "High Jewellery free to tell its story" is so obvious that she launches, supported by her husband, her own label, named in honor of her father, DINABORO.

Each year, a single category is released and presented to its private collectors. A considered body of work shaped by exceptional materials and the most exquisite hands that bring them to life. Founded by Designer and Creative Director Farah Marafie, AOI redefines design on her own terms.

Every piece is made once, in numbered editions, forming part of an evolving archive of collectible works that exist between wearable art, design, fine jewellery, clothing, and objects.

AOI’s practice values originality. Each creation stands as its own chapter. Distinct, enduring, and never revisited.

Through this approach, AOI honors the integrity of its process and the rarity of its objects, things of quality, built to live beyond their time.

Name: Victor Mayer GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Victor Mayer GmbH & Co. KG is one of the very few jewellery manufactures in Europe where rare ornamental techniques have been preserved as living practice rather than historic reference. Founded in 1890 in Pforzheim, the company has accumulated a body of knowledge that can only be built through generations of continuous making.

At the core of this knowledge is the combination of hand-guilloché, vitreous enamelling and hand engraving. These disciplines are not isolated skills but interdependent crafts that demand an exceptional understanding of material, proportion and process. Guilloché is executed on traditional rose-engine and straight-line machines, creating mathematically precise patterns that serve as both structure and optical foundation. Over these patterns, translucent vitreous enamel is applied and fired repeatedly, requiring absolute control of temperature, colour chemistry and timing. Any deviation is irreversible.

Hand engraving adds another layer of complexity. Whether coats of arms, cyphers, animals or ornamental motifs, each engraving is cut freehand, often under magnification, and adjusted line by line. This is not reproducible work. It depends entirely on the engraver’s eye, experience and restraint. The result is depth, tension and clarity that no automated process can achieve.

What makes this knowledge especially rare today is not only the mastery of each technique, but the ability to coordinate them within one object. Enamel reacts to metal preparation. Guilloché influences light and colour. Engraving must respect both structure and surface tension. This holistic understanding is the result of decades of trial, failure and refinement.

Victor Mayer applies this expertise not only to its own creations, but also as a manufacturing partner for other luxury brands and for highly demanding bespoke commissions. From heraldic signet rings to complex objets d’art, each project benefits from the same uncompromising standards.
