Description:
Créateur et fabricant suisse de bagues et alliances pour hommes et femmes. 
Bijoux d'exception scindés en deux avec une découpe unique pour chaque conjoint.


Issue d'un concept de partage, la LoveKey est formée d'un adaptateur à la taille du doigt et d'un anneau séparé par une découpe unique. Découpe déterminée via un algorithme mathématique qui interdit toute réplique. A porter dans l’attente ou à partager avec l’être aimé... Ainsi chaque couple de bagues ne peut alors s’unir qu’avec sa moitié respective. Chacun des anneaux est gravé à l'intérieur avec son propre numéro permettant de régénérer, au besoin, sa forme géométrique. Résolument haut de gamme, les bagues LoveKey sont fabriquées en Suisse et respectueuses des consignes de l’ONU sur les origines des matériaux précieux.

Name: Watches Men Wrist
Description:
* Over 12 years OEM & ODM experience on producing watches.
* Make your own design watch for you.
* Your brand Logo can be customized on dial, watch case, band, caseback etc.
* Package of watch can be customized as your requirements such as gift box.
* Lifetime warranty
* 100% watches with RoHS and CE compliant.
* New design will be posted to you timely.

UNIVERSE WATCH(Shenzhen) LIMITED is a professional watch OEM manufacturer and exporter,  the company owns the first class group of technicians, designers and staff which produces more than 1 million watches per year, including 500 different style samples and thousands of different style design drawings for customers' reference.  

Our products range covers couple watches, ladies watches, gentlemen watches, military watches, jewelry watches, digital watches, automatic watches and so on. We have very good markets in Europe, America, and South-east Asia etc.

The main components of our watches are principally from Switzerland and Japan. The company is equipped with advanced testing facilities for every watch being strictly tested to ensure quality, reliability and excellence before shipment．

In order to maintain superior international quality standards, our products are all manufactured with excellent material under very strict QC supervision.

With our management principle of “quality first , credit as prerequisite, management oriented, Sincere service", we always try our best to meet our clients’ requirements and satisfy them fully.

Name: PPQ
Description:
Young Modern British Luxury

PPQ stands for young classic style with an edge, a quintessential modern British fashion brand. It combines style and content into everyday living. The mix of irreverent Pop Lux with Chic Cool creates a truly original product and offers a level of individualism and a slice of Rock ‘n’ Roll to its many devotees.

Founded in 1992 PPQ began as a cooperative straddling the world of art, music, and fashion. Since then PPQ’s founders Percy Parker and Amy Molyneaux have evolved PPQ from a cult status label into a viable high-end and commercial fashion brand and business much loved by press and public alike.

PPQ began to show it’s collection on schedule at London fashion week in 2004 and now occupies the opening headline slot of the week.

Name: Illuminex Diamond Corp.
Description:
We at Illuminex Diamonds are willing to go the extra mile to get you that perfect stone.

Our trained diamond professionals will ensure that you find exactly what you are looking for in the most convenient way possible. 

Located in the heart of the Diamond District in New York City, Illuminex Diamonds carries a full range of sizes, shapes, colors, and clarities. 

We specialize in over sizes, triple excellent grades, and GIA certified stones.

Let us show you what our critical eye can do for you.

Name: Skywatch (I Brands, Inc.)
Description:
Skywatch is a lifestyle brand and e-commerce company from brand architect Gabriel Ibarra.  Skywatch is a serious watch that doesn't take itself too seriously.  Skywatch is designed in California and made in Switzerland -- where Southern California lifestyle meets Swiss precision.

Skywatch timepieces are available at Tourneau (US), Isetan (Japan), Palacio del Hierro (Mexico) and a growing number of select shops around the globe.

Name: Neelu Los Angeles
Description:
Founder and Creative Director, Neelu, is a California licensed attorney in private practice and a GIA diamond professional based in Los Angeles who designs modern and exotic, fine jewelry using all natural, Kimberley Process Certified conflict-free diamonds. 

Since the launch in 2018, Neelu has showcased at London Fashion Week and has been widely featured in several publications including Harper’s Bazaar, British Vogue, British GQ, Vanity Fair, Sophisticated Living, Brides Magazine and House & Garden Magazine. Neelu was a Silver Partner of the National Film and Television Awards 2019 held in Los Angeles, California; Neelu promoted and sponsored the Best Newcomer category.

The Neelu Halo Bracelet is featured in Billie Eilish's "Bury a Friend" music video, ranking #14 on the Billboard 100 list the week it was released. The line is currently available online, in two retail stores in New York and one retail store in London.

Name: Oriental Express
Description:
“Oriental Express” is one the Russian leading companies in the field of luxury goods, with particular strengths in jewelry and writing instruments.

The comany's luxury interests encompass several of the most prestigious names in the luxury industry including Monegrappa, dunhill, El Casco, CARAN d’ACHE, Tibaldi, Omas and a new Russian accessories and jewelry brand – Gourji. 

Oriental Express is the exclusive distributor of Monegrappa pens in Russia: gold and silver pens, collectors’ pens from the oldest Italian manufacturer of writing accessories.

The Company’s web-sites are:

http://oriental-express.ru/
http://www.i-lux.ru/
http://www.montegrappa-shop.ru/
http://www.gourji.com/

Name: DAKARI
Description:
Elevating African Luxury .Handcrafted, ethical leather goods designed with care 
Dakari combines Kenyan craftsmanship, sustainability, and timeless elegance to empower artisans and redefine global perceptions of African luxury.
 Mass production and white labeling services available to bring your vision to life.
Explore our collection and shop ethical elegance: www.dakari.co.ke

Name: Loren Stewart
Description: Founded in 2009, Loren Stewart designs classic jewelry with an experimental bite.  A Certified Member of the Responsible Jewelry Council, Loren Stewart is committed to making jewelry built on responsible, ethical and transparent processes. Jewelry is produced in Downtown Los Angeles and Arezzo, Italy.

Name: Giorgio Conti Jewelers
Description: Custom Jewelry Design, Watches, Loose Diamonds, Appraisals, Repairs

Name: Starlite Diamonds B.V.
Description:
Established in 1982 - Growing, Expanding & Envisioning the Future

At the heart of Starlite Diamonds, where every customer is treated as a family member, we believe in building & preserving lifetime customer relationships, and maintaining credibility & discretion by providing complete confidentiality and consistency of products to our clients.

Known as the wholesaler & retailer of the Finest Quality Polished Diamonds

Perseverance | Passion | Excellence

Name: Monroe Yorke Diamonds
Description:
Monroe Yorke is one of Australia’s finest purveyors of diamonds and diamond jewellery. At Monroe Yorke, we aim to give our customers an unforgettable, intuitive diamond experience that will truly engage their hearts and minds like never before. We offer you an innovative diamond purchase experience that has unrivalled potential for personalisation and accessibility.

For the longest time, diamonds were considered a purchase that was exclusively offered to the elite. Globally, the trade of diamonds was organised so as to complement this sentiment. Customer centricity is ingrained in our value system, and making diamonds and diamond jewellery as easily and widely accessible, seemed to us, the most customer-centric thing we could do as a business.

Add to this, our pricing policy that is inclined to offer the lowest possible prices that are below store and in some instances, even online prices, and you have a completely revolutionised take on diamonds with Monroe Yorke. A diamond is a celebratory purchase that the wearer cherishes for life. We believe that all those aspiring to buy one, should be presented the best-value offer.

Name: GLT - Gemological Laboratory of Türkiye
Description: Türkiye'nin bağımsız ve tarafsız ilk gemoloji laboratuvarı olarak, 2016 Yılından bu yana mücevher taşları, pırlantalar ve mücevherler için güvenilir sertifikasyon hizmetini vermekteyiz.

Name: Miranda Frye
Description:
Your confidence matters. Miranda Frye’s mission is to bring high fashion; high quality and a high care experience to all of her customers. MF believes every person deserves to feel confident, valued and seen. Her stylish, inspiring, and affordable collections promise to execute on that vision and deliver confidence and care with style unique to you.

Like most people, confidence did not always come easy for Miranda, but over time she learned her love of fashion could translate into confidence not only for herself but also for every person. MF believes fashion gives people an outlet to express themselves and with that expression comes empowerment and confidence. Miranda Frye is passionate about creating beautiful collections that make a positive impact.

Miranda Frye’s distinctive style has already caught the eye of magazine editors, stylists, fashion bloggers and celebrities. Most recently, her pieces have been seen on Bella Hadid, Rita Ora, Whitney Port, Lucy Hale, Jennifer Love Hewitt, Kendall Jenner, Molly Sims, Emma Roberts, Olivia Holt, Ashley Tisdale and Shay Mitchell. Pieces of Miranda Frye’s collections are often found on the covers and in the pages of fashion publications including: The Zoe Report, Who What Wear, InStyle, Glamour, Cosmopolitan, Seventeen, Nylon, PeopleStyleWatch and Teen Vogue. Miranda Frye jewelry is available online and at many fine boutiques across the country.

Name: CVD Gemologos
Description:
CVD Gemólogos S.L. es una empresa registrada en Madrid compuesta por un equipo de gemólogos profesionales especializados en la compra-venta de diamantes.

Todos nuestros miembros están diplomados en gemología por los institutos gemológicos IGE (España), GIA (Estados Unidos) o HRD (Bélgica) y tienen cursadas especializaciones en diamantes y en otras piedras preciosas por los dos institutos gemológicos más prestigiosos del mundo, la GIA y el HRD.

Disponemos de un completo laboratorio gemológico para la tasación de joyas montadas y diamantes en la siguiente dirección:

Calle Preciados, 11, piso 3º puerta B 
28013, Madrid (España)

(Solo atendemos con cita previa)

Name: Erwin Sattler GmbH & Co. KG
Description: We invite you to leaf through and explore the wonderful world of Erwin Sattler timepieces. With the gentle sound of their ticking and rhythmic swing of their pendulums, our clocks have a special ability to infuse any room with an unparalleled feeling of well-being. You can be sure that they will become highly valued companions as well as long-lasting heirlooms that can be passed down with pride from generation to generation.

Name: The Diamond Show
Description:
Join us at the world’s only exhibition dedicated to diamonds and diamond jewelry and the destination for diamond buyers during Basel watch and jewelry week.

Featuring diamond and diamond jewelry manufacturers from around the globe, this unique exhibition offers an innovative platform for diamond sourcing, sales and networking during the watch and jewelry week in Basel.

With 70 diamond companies exhibiting under one roof, diamond buyers can enjoy a selection of the most outstanding diamond inventory that Basel has ever seen.

Markthalle Basel is located only minutes by foot from the Basel SBB train station. The show offers a sleek environment in which to conduct business.

Located only 8-10 driving minutes from Messe Basel, there will be continuous shuttle buses servicing the pick-up and drop-off of the buyers throughout the course of the show.

Name: Albuquerque Jewelry Buyer
Description: Albuquerque Jewelry Buyer is a boutique estate jewelry buyer that specializes in the purchase of large carat diamond rings, important estate jewelry, designer engagement rings, and limited-edition luxury watches. We have helped hundreds of clients throughout Bernalillo County get more money for their luxury assets. Whether you are selling a diamond engagement ring or antique estate jewelry, you can count on Albuquerque Jewelry Buyer to leverage our 30+ years of expertise in your favor. We will make sure that you understand exactly how we arrive at our cash offer, enabling you to make the absolutely best, most informed decision on how to sell your valuable estate jewelry & luxury Swiss timepieces for more money in Albuquerque, New Mexico.

Name: DRASAC - RELOJES GUESS
Description:
Empresa de Negocios, distribuidora oficial de Relojes GUESS y BULOVA, somos una cadena comercial que se enfoca en asesorar la imagen de sus clientes mediante la venta de relojes y accesorios de alta calidad.

DISTRIBUIDORA DE RELOJES Y ACCESORIOS S.A.C., cuenta con más de 20 puntos de venta en Lima Metropolitana ubicados en los principales centros comerciales y tiendas por departamento. Nos encontramos también en provincias como Chiclayo, Huánuco, Piura, Pucallpa, Trujillo, Arequipa y Huancayo; y esperamos seguir expandiéndonos en los próximos años.

Name: Rosetti Firmenich Art Advisory
Description:
Rosetti Firmenich is an international advisory firm providing independent expertise and specialist advisory services on art and art wealth management in all aspects of the collecting process.

Headquartered in London and with offices in Geneva, Rosetti Firmenich delivers bespoke solutions to an international client base, ranging from private individuals and family offices to professional advisors, art investors, museums, institutions and corporate collections.

With a focus on Modern, Post-War and Contemporary Art, we assist in building and refining world-class fine art collections with discretion, transparency, and unconflicted advice.

Name: Danish Concept Stores Limited
Description:
Danish Concept Stores own and operate 5 Pandora Jewellery stores in South East England. In December 2009 we opened the first central London Pandora store on Oxford Circus. This store was sold to Pandora in October 2014. In the period 2009-11 we opened another 4 stores in prominent London shopping locations such as Covent Garden, Westfield London, Westfield Stratford City and Canary Wharf. These stores were acquired by Pandora in July 2016.

Our final 5 Pandora stores were handed over to become Pandora O&O stores in September 2023.

We also own and operate a multibrand jewellery store JULEO Jewellery situated in Sevenoaks.

Name: Prime Retail India Limited
Description: Prime Retail India Limited is a luxury goods & jewelry company based out of  1/1 Camac Street, Kolkata, WB, India.

Name: Woodland Furniture
Description: Woodland Furniture is a family-owned furniture store. They offer quality, American-made finished and unfinished wood furniture. The furniture consultants are trained to help you find the right furniture to suit your individual style at the right price. They can buy from our unfinished furniture selection and create a unique piece by finishing it themselves or opting for the expertise of professional craftsmen. Woodland Furniture knew that they could find a resource that followed these four simple ideals for quality products.

Name: mandana Jewellery
Description: The neo-luxury jewellery brand mandana was founded in 2021 by Christine Marhofer and creates high-quality jewellery collections with Nevermined diamonds grown especially in Germany. The brand represents ‘conscious luxury’: all mandana jewellery is made from recycled 750 gold (18 carat) and is holistically entirely sustainable – from production to packaging. The brand represents strong values and ideals. Sustainability, diversity, fairness, respect, mindfulness, social justice and women’s empowerment shape everything mandana does. The mission: to spark change – and usher in an age where we express our values through jewellery.

Name: H.MARIA Joias Contemporâneas
Description:
A H.MARIA é a empresa de venda direta de joias, criada e capitaneada pelas irmãs Fabiane e Tatiane Hoff, com grande expertise no ramo de joias folheadas por sua longa trajetória como atacadistas.

É também a marca de joias que encanta pelo esmerado acabamento de joalheria e pelo design de suas peças – lisas ou microcravejadas – em banhos de metais preciosos ou em prata 925. 

Além disso, é uma plataforma de negócios para as mulheres obterem renda extra e realizar seus sonhos através da venda direta dos produtos com liberdade para desenvolver outras atividades. Para isso a empresa oferece um kit de joias e relógios consignados, ações de capacitação para empreender individualmente e o suporte necessário para suas vendas e crescimento constante.

Com sede em Novo Hamburgo/RS, possui showroom lindamente estruturado e exclusivo para o atendimento às consultoras, com uma equipe especialmente treinada para atendê-las.

Por tudo isso, pode-se dizer que H.MARIA é uma oportunidade que valoriza as pessoas, tanto pelo negócio formatado para quem deseja empreender como pelos produtos charmosos e requintados que valorizam a beleza e a autoestima das consumidoras.

Com um slogan que revela a valorização do potencial feminino  –  “Mulheres de verdade. Esta é a nossa inspiração” -  a empresa já conta com mais de 580 consultoras atuando em diversas cidades do Rio Grande do Sul e Santa Catarina.

Name: Casa de Oro Jewelers
Description:
Casa de Oro Jewelers was established in 1979 in Corpus Christi, Texas, as a wholesaler of 14k gold jewelry, gold coins, and precious metal bullion.  Today, we are an all you need jewelry depot for the retail or wholesale buyer.

We carry a wide variety of fine jewelry, findings, diamonds, gemstones, and beading supplies.  We stock tools, equipment, and supplies from numerous major manufacturers.

Casa de Oro Jewelers specializes in custom jewelry designs and can cast or fabricate that special jewelry piece you have been dreaming about.  Our manufacturing facility can accommodate the one unique item you have dreamed about or we can do hundreds of identical pieces for clubs, organizations, or resale.

You will learn to recognize CDO, our registered trademark, as a sign of quality.

Repairs and other services are performed in our shop for the consumer or the trade.  We utilize the lastest in technology and equipment, with a highly trained and capable staff.

We take enormous pride in our products and hope that you find something you like.  We look forward to doing business with you.

Name: ALMAZ_LABGROWN
Description:
Welcome to ALMAZ ! 

Almaz as a brand stands united to craft the finest lab-grown diamonds that are a scintillating beauty. The company aims to create diamonds with extreme finesse to perfection. Our diamonds are harder on being exquisite but extremely light on your pockets.
From inception, we set out to be different and more than just another diamond manufacturing company. Our purpose is to encourage sustainable fashion by providing lab-created diamonds that are environmentally kind, ethical, and easily attainable.
For us, our customers come first. Our constant endeavor lies in building customers’ trust by providing world-class diamonds and exceptional customer service solutions.  

We are largest and leading diamond manufacturer in lab grown diamond industry. 

We provide continuous supply of fast moving goods to our customers in all shapes and various sizes from 0.01 Ct to 10.00 Ct Polished diamonds, Resulting in lean inventory at both hands . 

Visit us : www.almaz.one 
Facebook : ALMAZLAbgrown 
Instagram : Almaz_labgrown

Name: TFP srl SB
Description: The TFP project was born from a simple and original idea: to propose a watch that satisfies the desire to own a luxury object, with the awareness that it is made with the utmost respect for the Biosphere. For this reason, all phases, design, production, distribution have been designed to guarantee the least environmental impact on our planet.

Name: AuctionArt
Description:
AuctionArt, sous le marteau de Rémy Le Fur, organise chaque mois une vente aux enchères non cataloguée de mobilier et objets d’art.

Dans ces ventes se retrouvent différentes provenances : l’entier mobilier provenant de la succession de monsieur X, les objets déposés dans la semaine par nos voisins de l’arrondissement, ceux de nos fidèles clients améliorant périodiquement leur décor…

L’ensemble, remis en scène par nos équipes pour seulement quelques heures, retrouve une « virginité » dans une atmosphère de « bonne maison », en attendant, après plus de 6000 visiteurs,  de partir avec leurs nouveaux maitres.

Toute l’équipe d’AuctionArt vous accueille au 9, rue de Duras pour vous guider, vous renseigner et estimer gratuitement vos biens afin de les présenter en vente aux enchères.

RDV sur notre site www.auctionartparis.com

Name: Pera Pırlanta
Description:
Pera; aşkların, nostaljinin, tutkunun, modanın, coşkunun ve hareketliliğin semti... PERA PIRLANTA adını İstanbul’un eski ve en gösterişli bu semtinden almaktadır. 
PERA PIRLANTA bir Altınbaş kuruluşudur. 2003 yılında kurulan PERA PIRLANTA sektörde hızlı büyüme hedefi ile alt yapısını tamamlamış, 2008 yılında sadece pırlanta pazarına odaklanmıştır. Modern ve ulaşılabilir pırlantalı takılardan koleksiyonlar yaratan PERA markası, iş birliği yaptığı satış noktaları aracılığı ile tüketicisi ile buluşmaktadır. PERA, güçlü üretim kapasitesi, kaliteli ürün grubu ve güvenilir marka imajı ile kısa zamanda Türkiye geneline yayılmıştır.

Koleksiyonlar hakkında detaylı bilgi için; www.perapirlanta.com

Name: BEAUSOLEIL MAROQUINERIE
Description:
Spécialiste dans la vente de maroquinerie depuis près de 30 ans nous avons acquis une maîtrise en matière de conseils et de services. 

Nous avons des contrats de distribution avec de nombreuses grandes marques tels que Lonchamp, Lacoste, Samsonite, Lancaster ou encore Texier depuis plusieurs années preuve de notre engagement qualité.

Nous avons aussi le soucis de travailler avec le plus de fabricants français possible et nous nous efforçons d'être très réactifs afin de vous proposer les produits tendances de demain. Enfin en achetant chez nous vous faites confiance à une entreprise régionale et vous êtes assurés d'avoir un service après vente de qualité et dans les meilleurs délais.

Name: SIAN DESIGN
Description:
We are Simon & Antonia, 

the faces behind SIAN DESIGN - a brand for fine algorithmic jewellery based in Munich. After two years of work we launched our online store presenting our First Collection.

We founded SIAN DESIGN in 2016 after returning home from Sydney where we had worked as architects for a few years. Having always been fascinated by intricate mathematical structures and minimal design, we draw from our background in computational design and architectural projects with highly complex geometry to apply this in a different context and scale. What began as an experiment soon became an journey of learning about the traditional craft of jewellery making as well as new additive manufacturing technologies. Drawing inspiration from nature we strive to create timeless and unique pieces that cannot be fabricated in any traditional way.

Our First Collection, primarily made of 18kt gold, is characterized by a homogeneous use of this precious material. It fuses simplicity with complex geometry. Basic forms and smooth surfaces seamlessly merge into double curved surfaces and delicate grid structures.

All pieces are designed and manufactured in Germany and sold via our online store: 
www.sian-design.com.

Simon & Antonia

Name: Mystic Pearls
Description:
Based in Welling, London, Mystic Pearls is it's creator Laxmi Khanal's brainchild. 

Infusing concept from the east, the jewelry is bespoke, handcrafted, and one of a kind.

Name: Rochambeau
Description:
Beginning in 2011, longtime friends Laurence Chandler and Joshua Cooper saw an opportunity to fill a void in the menswear market and conceived Rochambeau.
Merging their professional experience along with the shared passions of art and design, Chandler and Cooper launched the label as an outlet for creative expression and artistic collaboration.
Within just a few seasons, Rochambeau was recognized by the industry and has developed a passionate consumer following since its launch.
After being named an Ecco Domani finalist in 2013 and taking part in W Hotels Fashion Next program, Rochambeau was invited to show seasonally at Milk studios in NYC under the MADE Fashion initiative. For their Spring and Fall 2016 collection Rochambeau was part of the launch CFDA’s Men’s Fashion Week. Currently Rochambeau is a Woolmark work Finalist and participating in the second round of the CFDA/Vogue Fashion Fund.
From their of studios in TriBeCa, the designers have positioned Rochambeau as a brand rooted in the grit and mystery of New York City, while also offering a modern vision for today’s man. With global distribution Rochambeau is carried at high-end retailers, and has grown to over 35 doors globally.
Five years on, the label has developed a passionate press & consumer following worldwide

Name: Orygen Experiences
Description:
Orygen Experiences S.L is a pioneer company in creating jewels with DNA in Spain. We have developed a new business model as well as a unique and different concept in the world that bets on offering a different experience when it comes to buying top quality jewelry that contains visible human, animal or plant DNA.

The differential point revolves around the research and development of DNA encapsulation, transforming it into something visible and its incorporation into innovative jewelry designs.

The natural resins when fossilized produce one of the few known organic gems, the AMBER, which is traditionally used in jewelry and has been shown to be the most effective way of preserving, as it blocks DNA degradation. The DNA of fossilized species has even been recovered from the amber dated 135 million years ago.

In Orygen we imitate that natural technique of encapsulation using chemical resins, so we simulate this natural process to create jewels in which the people’s essence lasts in time.

Name: Zorka Jewelry Manufacture
Description:
Zorka is of the biggest production jewelry companies in Eastern Europe. 

We specialize in production of silver and gold jewelry. Using the latest technologies and Italian equipment we can produce not only our designs but also yours and sell our products under your brand. 

We produce silver jewelry, 9ct and 14ct gold jewelry with Swarovski cubic zirconia, precious and semiprecious stones, as well as jewelry without stones. According to individual preferences we suggest stylish and youth novelties (e.g. trendy ZORKA omni), as well as engagement and wedding rings, kids’ jewelry, classic men’s and women’s jewelry

Right now we’re looking for a perspective partnership to share our experience and help your company to reach goals. Our partners are the leads of jewelry market in Western Europe and Asia who values European service and perfect quality.

Please, check us on our website www.zorkagold.com

Name: RetroSpecs & Co.
Description:
Since 1994, RetroSpecs has been providing exclusive one-of-a-kind spectacles to eyewear aficionados around the world and has accumulated the world's largest collection and archive of historic eyeglasses.
RetroSpecs’ flagship store in West Hollywood, where the brand was founded, is the current home for its registered eyewear; all of which comes with a certificate of authenticity and a lifetime guarantee for parts and services.

Name: Emmadi Silver Jewellery
Description: Emmadi Silver Jewellery, located in Pakala Plaza, Krishna Nagar, Chaitanyapuri, Hyderabad, offers a range of stunning silver jewellery to elevate your elegance. Our artisans work meticulously to carve out the best impressions as designs to produce impressive and incredible jewellery. We cover a range of charming collections with necklaces, chokers, earrings, bangles, pendants, forehead jewellery- maangtikka, anklets, bracelets, toe rings and more! To take your jewellery collection a notch above, we also offer pure 92.5 silver gold plated jewellery. To get your hands on our spectacular and sparkly pieces of jewellery that radiate rays of the moon, find us online with "silver shops near me", "silver shop near me" or "silver stores near me

Name: Gloria Bass Design
Description: For over forty-five years, Gloria Bass has channeled her passion for design, and her skills as a goldsmith, to steadily build the reputation of Gloria Bass Design. As the soul of the company, her sensibility can be found in every Gloria Bass Design creation. Based in Montreal, Gloria and her team of highly skilled assistants and craftsmen continue to serve an international clientele. The pieces of jewelry produced in her workshop are the outcome of her curiosity, creative talent and thought. They evoke sensuality and elegance.

Name: Marke
Description:
Marke was started by three siblings—kids raised in New York by one of the most respected jewelry-makers in the city. Red carpets. Royalty. They’ve done it all. As the siblings joined the family line of work, they noticed that wedding rings are often just an afterthought amid all the other big day decisions. And for men, good options are rare—that’s why they founded Marke.

After the siblings met Andrew, Co-Founder and CEO of The Black Tux, it wasn’t long before Marke officially joined The Black Tux family. As Marke expands with new jewelry options designed with men in mind, they’re doing it all with the same lasting quality and elevated style the family built their name on.

Name: AS JOIAS DA RAINHA
Description:
AS JOIAS DA RAINHA (The Jewels of the Queen) is an original, contemporary brand of jewelery created by Thania Regina Gomide Lino. Created in 2010, it is the realization of the owner’s childhood dream: to become a jeweler.
“I enjoy bringing life and movement to the pieces, creating vibrant colors and different effects in copper; carving silver and gold on several dimensions as they were rough stones; texturizing metals as if they were wood. It’s the way I found to bring the materials to life, imprinting natural elements, fabricating and sculpting each piece by hand, in an alchemy of beauty and joy.
My inspiration comes from the uniqueness of raw nature. I believe that each element brings with it what it wants to be, my duty is simply to reveal its mystery, bringing up to the surface the inner beauty of each one of them.
In the jewelry world, I discovered the pleasure of creating, drawing and making my own pieces. However  I wanted more. I wanted to go beyond the design. I wanted to transform, materialize. Making every stone and every little grain of metal become a beautiful jewel full of meaning and love so that they could fulfill their mission and tell their own stories. 
This is how I give form to dreams, by creating and producing remarkable pieces with great character, personality and beauty. After all, through them I’m sharing pieces of my dreams around the world.”

Name: SYC MONTRES SA
Description:
SYC MONTRES SA is your ideal partner for the design and production of watches, jewelry and watch displays. Our mission is to conceive and meet your price and quality targets in “record time” compared to our best competitors. We are fast in designing, quick in prototyping and delivering even complicated products: our record for the complicated products is 120 days from brief to delivery.

SYC MONTRES SA is a dynamic Swiss company offering design, technical development, and supplying complete watches or watch components and accessories. The technical office is in Mendrisio (CH), the operating warehouse in Stabio (CH), and the administrative office in Lugano (CH).

Our customers are the Swiss watch brands, with whom we collaborate for the technical development according to their objectives.
We have all the skills and technical tools necessary to develop the design of every kind of watch: from the simplest to the most complicated, and we can provide a complete service from designing to manufacturing always respecting your goals, thanks to our high-level Swiss and Asian partners, who are also among the best in the watch industry.
We can develop and supply all kind of watch accessories, such as: exhibitors, watch cases, straps, providing a complete sales concept to clients.

We have more than twenty years of experience in the development and manufacturing of complete watches and watch components made in: titanium, steel, ceramics, carbon fiber.
In collaboration with our technical partners, we are constantly developing new technical solutions and new materials, and thanks to the partnership with the ANKIA group we can also offer the technical development of smartwatches.

Name: Jeanne Bessis
Description:
Le bijou, une histoire de famille…
Fondée par la créatrice Julie Smadja, Jeanne Bessis est une marque française de bijoux précieux imaginés et dessinés à Paris et fabriqués dans un atelier spécialisé.

Pour Julie, la joaillerie est avant tout une histoire de famille. Son grand-père, Philippe Bessis est le co-fondateur des Must de Cartier, tandis que sa mère, Brigitte Bessis, figure de la Place Vendôme, lui a transmis son savoir et sa passion pour la joaillerie. Après plus de vingt ans passés au service de grandes maisons de joaillerie en France et à l’étranger, Julie décide de se saisir de cet héritage unique en lançant sa propre marque de bijoux.

Inlassablement curieuse et passionnée de voyages, la créatrice mêle ses souvenirs d’enfance, ses inspirations cosmopolites et son goût pour l’art dans des collections authentiques, joyeuses et solaires qui s’adressent à toutes les générations de femmes, dans un esprit de transmission et de partage.

Maman de deux jeunes enfants, la famille est encore une fois au cœur de son projet entrepreneurial – en témoigne le nom qu’elle a choisi de lui donner : Bessis, comme le nom de ce grand-père inoubliable, et Jeanne, le prénom sa fille. Avec sa première collection Lamarsa, Julie s’inspire de ses origines méditerranéennes et imagine une collection en hommage au poisson, animal à la portée hautement symbolique dans la culture tunisienne.

Sourcing from AGI is crucial when it comes to buying jewlery. With our specialized team members in designning and diamond cutting, we use our own diamonds and gems to create exceptional masterpiece jewlery. If you are looking for unique diamonds, gem or jewelry pieces, your search stops here because AGI is the right source that offers you the best value.

Name: Dueaerre 1938 Italy
Description:
Fondata nel 1938, Dueaerre 1938 è un’azienda di Arezzo rinomata che incarna l'artigianalità Made in Italy nel settore della gioielleria. Con una tradizione che si estende per oltre ottant'anni, Dueaerre 1938 ha guadagnato una reputazione di eccellenza nella produzione di gioielli di alta qualità.
L'azienda si distingue per la sua dedizione alla lavorazione artigianale, combinando tecniche tradizionali con la precisione delle moderne tecnologie. Ogni gioiello viene creato con cura, passione e maestria, garantendo un risultato unico e di pregio.
La filosofia di Dueaerre 1938 è incentrata sulla qualità dei materiali utilizzati. Ogni pezzo viene realizzato con metalli pregiati, come l’argento e l'oro, arricchito da pietre preziose selezionate con cura. La combinazione di materiali di alta qualità e l'abilità degli artigiani di Dueaerre conferiscono ai loro gioielli un'aura di raffinatezza e bellezza senza tempo.
L'attenzione ai dettagli è un altro aspetto fondamentale che caratterizza l'azienda. Ogni fase del processo produttivo viene eseguita con meticolosità, dal design iniziale alla finitura finale. Questo impegno per l'eccellenza si riflette nei gioielli di Dueaerre 1938, che sono ammirati in tutto il mondo per la loro qualità superiore e il loro stile elegante.
Grazie alla sua artigianalità Made in Italy, Dueaerre 1938 rappresenta un simbolo di lusso e raffinatezza nel panorama della gioielleria. La sua eredità di tradizione e maestria continua a ispirare la creazione di gioielli unici, che raccontano storie di eleganza senza tempo e bellezza intramontabile.

Name: PT. Kapit Mas
Description:
Kapit Mas is a foreign owned specialist silver jewelry manufacturing company based in Bali Indonesia, established in 1996. Bali was chosen as a home base for the company due to the wide range of traditional skills to be found on the island and the inherent creativity of the local artisans. These are skills which are not easily taught or acquired and which gives Bali a unique advantage in jewelry manufacturing.

At Kapit Mas these skills have been complemented by a well equipped and managed factory, incorporating international best practice standards for jewelry manufacture, and a systems based approach to production, quality control and customer services. We are fully integrated, we do not sub contract work out or use vendors, and this gives us a very strong competitive advantage and allows us to better support our customers. All works from design and development through to packing and shipping are carried out under one roof and under the full control of our management team.

We have a policy of continually questioning, researching, developing, and striving to be the best we possibly can be.

We welcome visits to our factory and encourage our customers to come and see for themselves the way we work.

Name: Samuel Gordon Jewelers
Description:
Samuel Gordon Jewelers —106 Years Young!
Over a century ago, Samuel Gordon emigrated from Europe and settled in Oklahoma City, then a bustling town grown prosperous on cattle and agricultural business. Samuel opened a small jewelry store downtown and began to thrive. Later, son Norman showed a passion for his dad’s work and wound up devoting his entire career to Samuel Gordon Jewelers. When the elder Gordon passed away in 1956, Norman and his wife Betty ran the business, which continued to grow and flourish.
The third generation
When Norman died in 1980, it was his oldest son Gary who took the reins at Samuel Gordon Jewelers. Since his father had contributed to expanding and growing the business that grandfather Samuel had left him, Gary wanted to do the same for his own father. New brand names were added, and new talent was hired for sales, the support staff, and the jewelry shop. Gary Gordon also instituted a broad scale remodeling program for the firm’s three locations.
Converting three stores into one HUGE one
As Oklahoma City grew, so did Samuel Gordon Jewelers. By the end of the 1980’s, the business was ready for a big change. The decision was made to consolidate all three locations, and Gary Gordon began looking at sites. He wanted a neighborhood that was upscale and yet convenient. He finally selected a 12,000-square-foot building, a former Goodyear Tire store, situated directly across from the city’s premier shopping location, Penn Square Mall. The facility would be completely remodeled from the ground up.

Name: Talla Jewellers Private Limited
Description:
As a medical student and profoundly determined to become a doctor our founder Mr. Ajay Talla could not make it to the medical entrance just by a small fractional difference. The remarkable resilience in this young boy made him start a small business with his father’s help  and thereon relentlessly worked with a sole intention of earning the goodwill of the people and earning a reputation. The small shop he started years back in 1986 is today one of the best known jewellery stores in the market. Indeed his journey is a testimony to the fact that sometimes what we choose for us is not what is best for us. Trust the god and do the right has always been his guiding principle. His love for innovation and intricate craftsmanship  has made the brand Talla Jewellers as people’s top of the mind choice. 

Carrying on the legacy of his dear father, Mr. Aman Talla, who also aspired to be an IITian and pursue engineering was insisted by family to pursue his family business instead. And today, it is his committed dedication that the brand has grown exponentially and has become a powerful valuable name in the J&K’s jewellery market. He has contributed a lot towards making the business organized and giving an unforgettable experience to every customer visiting us. The brand works towards not just delivering a quintessential service, but also towards building a family of ecstatic and convinced customers. Happy customers make us happy and satisfied customers make us even happier.  

Committed to the  priority of customer requirements and their satisfaction, we have a happy satisfied family of more than 2lakh 15 thousand customers.

Over these 3 decades of customer service, we claim with pride that what we have won truly is our customers’ trust and we are committed to winning it over and over again  for a lifetime.

We currently employ more than 500 skilled workers, with expatriates in the key senior positions. Furthermore, we have made considerable effort and investment in the latest production technology and machineries to keep up with the latest trends and time frames demands.
All items sold by Body Steel and Silver are manufactured in our own factory,
and we are guaranteeing superior quality and outstanding value for money to our customers

Name: Cristy Cali Jewelry
Description:
Our mission is to generate happiness through the design & production of stunning jewelry designs with meaningful purpose, inspired by positive & empowering people, things and places - especially our hometown of New Orleans. We also strive to give back, whenever the opportunity arises, through charitable donations that benefits our local community.

Our vision is to witness the empowerment of human-kind through a new appreciation for the respect of free will, and the fearless expression of individuality. Be who you are unapologetically and allow people to love you for the most authentic representation of you. 

Born in Guatemala and raised in New Orleans, Cristy grew up traveling back and forth during her early years. She's traveled the world, thanks to her family's multiple exporting businesses, from jewelry to handcrafted goods and decor. 

At the time when Katrina hit, Cristy was a sophomore at Ursuline Academy High School. The devastation nearly cost her family's enterprise. As an only child, Cristy felt a call of duty to become more involved in her family's French Quarter jewelry business and became hooked. She learned how to design and produce jewelry over the years through internships and apprenticeships in different countries, such as Thailand and Mexico. By the age of 21, Cristy had developed her own jewelry line. 

After 7 years of working for her family's business, Cristy decided to venture out on her own and launched Cristy's Collection in 2012, only 5 months after graduating from Loyola University of New Orleans where she majored in international business. Cristy works with talented artisans from all over the globe including, but not limited to, India, Mexico, Thailand, France, Italy, and Hong Kong to bring you Cristy's Collection - an international business founded and operated in New Orleans. She continued her professional jewelry design education by becoming a certified CAD/CAM tech from the Gemological Institute of America in California.

Name: Allure Gems LLC
Description:
Allure Gems LLC is a limited liability company based out of New York , NY. The company originally known as A.G.Weindling, is in the business of wholesaling diamond studded jewelry to major retailers in the USA.

Operations
Allure Gems is engaged in the business of wholesaling diamond studded gold, silver and platinaire jewelry to some of the biggest retailers in the USA such as Walmart, Zales and J.C.Penney. The forteit of the company lies in Bridals and it plans to focus and expand further in that direction. The company manufactures its jewelry from vendors based out of Mumbai, India.

Brands and Co-Branded Programs with various retailers
•	Platinaire : Platinaire is a patented premium luxury metal alloy of silver and platinum that consists of 97.5% pure precious metal. It offers the durability and look of 14K white gold at a fraction of the price. The company sells Platinaire jewelry to some of the biggest retailers in the USA such as Walmart, Zales and J.C.Penney. Platinaire is a highly environmentally responsible patented alloy that is fabricated using exclusively recycled silver and platinum. This is all part of our commitment to continually improve the production processes in order to lessen the impact upon our planet and provide a better world for future generations.
•	Always & Forever : is a collection of platinaire jewelry sold at Walmart.
•	I Said Yes : is a collection of platinaire bridal jewelry sold at J C Penney.

Transformation at Allure Gems
The company has a solid vision of becoming one of the largest jewelry companies in the world. It is focussing on building brands and running co-branded programs with the biggest retailers. Currently it caters mainly to the American market, with future plans of expanding into Europe, Australia and Asia.

Name: Outsiders Watches
Description: We don’t believe that randomly adding thousands of dollars to the cost of something makes it more valuable or more exclusive. We don’t believe in golf. We don’t believe only stupidly wealthy people deserve to wear a high-quality Swiss watch. We believe in price transparency. We believe in quality. We believe in fair luxury that everyone can afford. But that’s not the kind of thinking that’s very popular in the Swiss watch industry. These views make us … you guessed it, Outsiders. Our watches are Made in Switzerland: designed in our office in Zurich and hand assembled in the Watch Valley of Jura.

Name: Fleur Parfumerie
Description:
Fleur Parfumerie is a new motivated, fragrance house business introduced in 2013, based in Athens Greece. Our logo ’s a French name for a flower. The strength of Fleur lies in its ability to build products, to shape the image of a dream or personality, more specific an attitude in the personal world and to translate that same image into the world of fragrance through storytelling and product excellence. The company’s strong performance has resulted in substantial growth year on year. Fleur products are sold worldwide.
We Are Passionate about the Creativity and Quality of our Products
The development of a signature scent is a long way trip, generally lasting between 6 and 18 months. Each fragrance starts with a dream, inspiration from a real history or moments, an “orchestra theme” which can either take the form of a material base – the mix of two or three raw materials, like an initial note at the whole music project – or of an initial feeling, the desire to translate or convey a specific emotion. From there, the perfumers gradually build a full-scale composition, tinkering and problem-solving until a perfect balance is achieved.
The challenge is to polish and perfect without losing the impact and personality of the original idea.
Our Values. We are inspired by the values expressed in the Fleur motto:
Passion, People, Performance.

Altius Fortius Citius as the motto of the Olympic Game.

Name: Hestia Jewels
Description:
Hestia Jewels is an everyday modern fine jewelry brand.

We embody artisanal craftsmanship and everyday timeless essentials. The name of the brand – Hestia – is named after the ancient Greek goddess of the hearth, architecture, home and family. We are committed to producing beautifully crafted, affordable fine jewelry for women and men to cherish and pass down for generations to come.

Proudly Canadian, we design and conceptualize each piece at our Toronto studio and work with leading suppliers to ensure that our unique fine jewelry is accessible without compromising on quality. Staying true to the integrity of our product, we only use graded conflict-free diamonds and precious stones and thrive on representing the ethically responsible fine jewelry industry.

Our core value is to capture the happiness and joy that comes with owning a piece of jewelry. We believe that when you wear a Hestia piece, you are representing the feelings, celebrations, and milestones within your life. Empower yourself or surprise a loved one; it is important to us to help capture these treasured moments with a special piece of luxury from our collection.

We invite you to explore our collection online or to book a private appointment for a private shopping experience or custom creations.

Shop with us online, we ship worldwide:
http://www.hestiajewels.com

Or contact us directly to book a private shopping appointment at our Toronto showroom: info@hestiajewels.com

Name: JIA JIA
Description:
JiaJia is a fine jewelry & crystal specimen brand created for all the lovers of our planet. A brand rooted from our earth that believes in the collective power of union, beauty, love, and truth.  The brand is an expression of the collective spirit that is present each second and all around us.

Our jewelry is created with natural minerals from our earth. The design process begins with hand-selected crystals, which are uncut and untreated, and each piece is custom set with gold, diamonds, and semiprecious hand carved stones.  All creations are one-of-a-kind and handmade in New York City. 

Our crystal specimens are sourced globally with intention, care, and education of where they come from.  The mineral curation process begins intuitively where we make an energetic connection with a crystal.  The selection is tuned in further as we study each specimen for their own unique beauty and characteristics.  Each crystal goes through an ancient purification process to reset and detox unwanted energies that may have been picked up over time.  

We believe crystals serve as a vessel of energy ready to come through to support the intentions of the beholder.   Our crystals and precious stones are in their purest form with natural clarity, shapes, and terminations. With these unique properties, each crystal has its own scientific and metaphysical meaning.

Name: Woven Gold
Description:
In October 2016, Woven Gold was born as a tribute to unwavering dedication to quality jewels and passionate approach of goldsmithing and creativity.  A woman’s love affair, as we know begins with jewelry, when it talks to her, when it tells her about the high attention given to detailing and its impeccable quality. It is only then, when a women falls dedicatedly for that one piece for years and more. Woven Gold stands this test of time, making women of all ages fall in love with these jewels.
Whispering different styles varying from bright and vibrant jewelry to monochrome diamond pieces, the key to Woven Gold’s trinket is constant search for jewelry making techniques & designing ideas that define the modern era to which every women is dedicated to.

UNIQUE – The New Art of Tailored Luxury!

UNIQUE is creating luxury products and perfumes that are made-to-measure. The company is combining the traditional art of perfumery and technology to provide an innovative service: Creating bespoke fragrances! The unique fragrance tool allows customers to create their own individual perfume in a custom bottle online. More than 150 billion combinations are possible. The startup-company has been awarded the Global Innovation Award, the Service Innovation Award and the Think Different Innovation Award. Name: House of Sól
Description:
The House of Sól (HoS) found its roots in the stories and precious stones of Asia Minor. Each piece is made by hand with traditional methods as a “wearable contemporary art” in the hidden tunnels of Grand Bazaar.

HoS means the dynasty of Sun, representing the brand's dedication to the Sun and its independent women being unapologetic as who they are.

HoS pieces are meant to serve as a suit of armor for women. Instead of becoming just another piece for a small clientele, we are aiming to be one of the most precious pieces of a modern women; which you wear as a shield for a steer-co, dinner, or court where you divorce a boring husband.

Name: Beheyt Jewels
Description:
Three unique values define the history of the Beheyt family jewellery business: quality, craftsmanship and passion. The company was founded two centuries ago.

Beheyt and 200 years of experience
Beheyt's history dates back to 1810. That year Jean-Baptiste Beheyt sets up a silversmithing workshop in Poperinge (West Flanders). The growth of Beheyt is impressive, above all in the 20th century.

Beheyt Jewels has now become the number one supplier of gold and silver jewellery in Belgium and Luxembourg and is also a major player in the French market. For Beheyt, craftsmanship and outstanding quality are key to success.

Name: DOT manifattura
Description:
DOT nasce dall'idea di Damiano Vescovo, imprenditore con oltre 20 anni di esperienza nel settore delle tecnologie di stampa 3D per la produzione orafa.

Abbiamo deciso di credere nell'eccellenza Italiana che crediamo sia sinonimo di eccellenza artigianale: per questo nasciamo a Valenza, la città dei gioielli, dove l’artigianato orafo è una tradizione che si tramanda da decenni.

Oltre ai migliori mastri orafi, disponiamo delle più innovative ed efficienti tecnologie per la lavorazione del Titanio e non solo.
Utilizziamo 3 differenti tecnologie di produzione per garantire ai vostri prodotti la maggior qualità possibile al minor costo.

Utilizziamo la tecnologia additiva di stampa 3D per stampare direttamente in metallo partendo da un file CAD 3D, utilizziamo la tecnica della micro–fusione a cera persa ed utilizziamo le lavorazioni meccaniche sottrattive a controllo numerico per l’esportazione di truciolo.

Name: Sky Lab Diamond

Name: MIKOL
Description:
Marble has long been a material that exemplifies class, respect, and luxury. However, given its immense weight and the complex, fragile process of cutting the material, marble has primarily been a premium material used exclusively in the furniture and construction industries.

We here at MIKOL have refined an efficient method to utilize marble and finally be able to accessorize our most practical essentials in daily life. With this technology, we have decided to begin our journey into the accessory and fashion world.

As natural stone connoisseurs in the construction industry, we realized early on that consumers were getting the short end of the stick: not only were they paying exorbitant prices for inferior products, but they were also unknowingly feeding into the unsustainable cycle of environmental waste. In an effort to right this injustice and provide higher quality, eco-friendly products, we consolidated our creative energies behind developing our thin-stone technology. By cutting our natural stones to just 1 mm in thickness, we essentially reduce the amount of material used for the same job by up to 80%. Besides reducing waste by utilizing so much less material, we also significantly reduce emissions since we can now carry more products per transport and cut our average installation time. The result is what we were initially inspired to aspire to a superior product that is both reasonably affordable and environmentally friendly.

 Unfortunately, there were too many barriers to overcome with "middlemen" in a business to business situation.  That is why we created MIKOL, a brand of lifestyle products that can be used daily showing the ability of natural stones.  It was our way to raise awareness of a method to help out the environment without sacrificing quality.

Name: Moscow Jewelry Factory
Description: MJF history starts after Russian revolution where all jewelry firm, including FABERGE was nationalized and control was passed to the State. In November 1920, three ex-Faberge jewelers Voronin A. V., Efremov  I. K. and Firisov M. V. created Jewelry Artel in Moscow, which developed and transformed into the Moscow Jewelry Factory. Today MJF is a full cycle jewelry company (from the mine to the shelf), with two local factories and 14 International suppliers (all suppliers use only MJF Diamonds) and its own retail chain, which operates in 104 cities of Russia with 332 stores under the same brand – the “Moscow Jewelry Factory”.

Name: Gifterria
Description:
Gifterria
Gifterria ailesi olarak hediyenin sadece bir paketten ibaret olmadığını çok iyi biliyoruz. Hediye vermek sevdiğiniz insanların yüzünde tatlı bir tebessüm bırakmak için en iyi yollardan biridir. Uzun yıllardır sürdürdüğümüz ambalaj işimizi hediyelik ürünlerimizle birleştirmek ve özel tasarımlarla farklılık yaratmayı hedefledik, tecrübemiz ve uzmanlığımızı sonuna kadar kullanarak bu hedefimiz için sürekli olarak çalışıyor, güncel, göz alıcı, duygu yüklü ve en önemlisi akılda kalıcı hediyeleri sizlerin beğenisine sunuyoruz. Bu nedenle tüm hediyelik ürünlerimiz için özenle çalışıyoruz. Kalbinizden geçen muhteşem hediyeyi siz ve sevdiklerinize sunarken eşsiz, benzersiz farklı konseptleri bir araya getiriyor ve tam aradığınız hediyeyi bulmanızı sağlıyoruz. Tüm hediyelerimizi sizin için büyük bir dikkatle tasarlıyor, şık ve etkileyici kutu tasarımlarımızla sevdiklerinize ulaştırıyoruz. Sadece bireysel müşterilerimiz için değil, kurumsal müşterilerimize de konsept ve tasarım ürünlerimizle destek veriyoruz. Kurumsal kimlik ve mesajların hediyelerle en iyi şekilde anlatılması, hediye verilen çalışan ya da paydaşınıza kurum kültürünüzün en iyi şekilde yansımasını hedefliyoruz Siz de sevdiklerinize unutulmaz hediyeler vermek ve onları mutlu etmek istiyorsanız Gifterria’nın mutlu müşterileri arasına katılabilirsiniz.

Description:
Since 2015, Mybudapester.com has offered an unparalleled online shopping experience, built on a 30-year legacy of success in brick-and-mortar retail. Mybudapester.com - where style, quality, and service find a home. Discover the world of luxury with us.

Name: Revue Thommen Watches
Description:
REVUE THOMMEN Swiss Watches: Changing the face of time.

Waldenburg, the historic town in Switzerland (30km northwest from Basel), is located in a valley strongly affiliated with the art of crafting timepieces. REVUE THOMMEN Swiss Watches, established in 1853, shares this heritage with one of the owners of the company descending directly from the founding family, and at the helm, a third generation watchmaker from the same valley.  

Ready to launch after two years of re-development, the brand will gradually introduce its four new collections CLASSIC, LIFESTYLE, AVIATION and SPORT.

Knowing ‘the true value of time’, the company has repositioned itself in the ‘affordable luxury’ segment of the market with its new collections — the designs, a marriage between modern simplicity and the mechanical precision the company has prided itself on for over 162 years. The new collections have been improved in all aspects with a crest engraved on the crown, the case back with a see-through sapphire crystal and the face of each watch having a strong and unique character, for which it received positive market feedback.
	
Since the coveted BASELWORLD 2015, REVUE THOMMEN Swiss Watches launched with critical acclaim it's new motto ARTISANS OF TIME. REINSPIRED.

For more information on the brand and it's developments, please visit: www.revuethommenwatches.com.

ALEXANDRA PLATA is a Spanish company which was built by Alejandra Yagüe in 1998 and offers fashionable, trendy and ideal jewelry to wear on any occasion. All the creations show great personality, sophistication and harmonious sensuality that capture the attention of those staunch jewelers of stop quality and unique design. You can find our collections in jewelry shops, department stores of fashion, luxury hotels & resorts, Duty Free Shops of international airports, cruises, on board sales in airlines, museums and exclusive boutiques of multi-brand fashion. Alexandra Plata was awarded on two occasions with the prize Etoile de Mode which was given by the international specialized fashion press of Paris in 2004 and 2006. The Alexandra Plata designs have captivated numerous celebrities including actresses Nina Dobrev, Jessica Szohr, Felicity Huffman, actor Ian Somerhalder and personalities like Queen Letizia.

Name: Watch Repair & Co.
Description:
At Watch Repair & Co, our first priority is to provide every customer with speedy and outstanding service. We’ve taken notice that oftentimes customers get taken advantage of during watch repair processes, and we strive to provide transparent and price-conscious services. 

Maybe you have a sentimental timepiece that you would only entrust with someone you formed a relationship with. Or maybe you’re looking for a first-time fix for a small wristwatch break. At Watch Repair & Co, we place an emphasis on forming trusting and fulfilling client relationships. We also pride ourselves on being true craftsmen and a family-operated business, comprised of experts in the industry. 

All of our expert jewelers and watchmakers have years of previous expertise, and we can repair and service almost anything: watches, jewelry, cutlery, engraving, polishing, etc. Service is our main business model, and premium service delivered to the client is how we manage to maintain such long-lasting relationships. 

Contact us now to find out more!

Name: Carrera Casting Corp
Description:
Carrera Casting in New York City offers expert jewelry casting backed by over four decades of experience in the jewelry industry. 

Since 1975 Carrera Casting has been one of the most accomplished jewelry casters in the world. If we were to have a mission statement it would be that we are "100% exclusive". We have been, and always will be a "contract  jewelry caster".  That means, the styles that we cast are the exclusive property of our customers, and that we have no line of our own.

Whether it is your jewelry CAD file, wax model or rubber mold we certify that those are your property. We feel so strongly about this that we have put it in writing. You can simply download our confidentiality agreement and we will sign it.

Name: Diana Rafael - Jewelry Modeling and Rendering
Description:
Diana Rafael is a technology-oriented company that offers a wide verity of services to the jewelry industry. In recent years, we have noticed the growing demand for professional modeling and rendering services. Clients have become more demanding when they order a jewelry. They want designers to make them a real, live simulation of the piece. If one can illustrate the jewelry on the body, even better. And so, companies and designers have been offering their customers the chance to observe the jewelry before it is manufactured in reality, thus making small adjustments a viable option along with a sense of perfection and professionalism.

Diana Rafael, a diamond jewelry hut based in TLV and NYC, has developed a unique method that allows ultra-fast production of 3d modeling, 100% ready for manufacturing and high-resolution, sharp and colorful jewelry renderings. 

Now, you can show your customers how their jewelry will look like, in just 48 hours and minimize error margin, by saving a great deal of money.

If you have your online website and up until now, to exhibit a new item on the online store you had to design it, print it, cast it, clean the gold cast, set the stones, cleaning, and polishing, picturing and photoshop each photo, imagine how much money you could invest in growing your business. All that cost can be saved and instead, you can get 3-4 items, all with photos and videos to offer on your website!

PimpsandPearls is inmiddels uitgegroeid tot een volwaardig accessoire merk. Naast de uitgebreide sieraden collecties ontwerp ik ook sjaals en tassen. Mijn persoonlijke touch zie je in alle collecties terug: mijn passie voor mooie, natuurlijke materialen. 
Bij PimpsandPearls vinden wij eerlijk en met zorg gemaakte accessoires en duurzaamheid belangrijk. Since its inception, Parishi has had a very clear mission; to provide the best diamonds. Our success is due to the integrity of our approach and the exceptional quality of our diamonds. We just do not aim to succeed for ourselves, but also try to pass on the success and the benefits to our suppliers, customers, employees, and the community in which we work and live.

Name: Mauron Musy IOM
Description:
Founded in 2013 in the Broye Valley, in the heart of the Three Lakes region at the foot of the Swiss Jura, the MAURON MUSY brand was born from the passion of two men: Eric Mauron and Christophe Musy. Driven by the same determination, the two experts in precision mechanics took many months to develop and ensure the reliability of the patented nO-Ring technology, a real breakthrough innovation that guarantees a perfect gasket-free seal.
These pioneers of the watchmaking industry thus set their own course, outside the traditional circuits, driven by constant concern to offer «Swiss Crafted» products. An appellation certifying that 100% of the watch was designed and pro- duced and in Switzerland. Much more than a label, “Swiss Crafted” corresponds to an industrial manifesto defended by MAURON MUSY.

The entirely in-house made case represents an authentic watch exterior complication in its own right and a world-exclusive feature. MAURON MUSY is the only watch brand in the world to have developed a mechanical gasket- free water-tightness system completely free of the costly maintenance associated with polymer ageing. This patented nO-Ring method of mechanical gasket-free water-resistance, featuring a design whose very essence is intrinsically linked to the technology involved, requires 36 highly technical elements and ensures a waterproof seal guaranteed to 300 metres.

Mauron Musy watches are not stamped with the inscription ‘Swiss Made’, but instead proudly bear the ‘Swiss Crafted’ label certifying the 100% of the watch has been developed, manufactured and crafted in Switzerland.
With ‘Swiss Crafted’, Mauron Musy is defending far more than a label, but indeed a full-fledged industrial code of ethics.

Name: Tangarart Gemstone Jewelry
Description:
O que foi marcante em sua vida? Quais são os momentos inesquecíveis que, ao deitar a cabeça no travesseiro, te vem à mente, instantaneamente?
A formatura.
O pedido de casamento.
O nascimento de um filho.
O primeiro milhão.
As bodas de prata.
São estes momentos, rápidos, muitas vezes oblíquos, de emoção difusa, que fazem o cotidiano mais leve. São a magia da vida, o encantamento dos encontros, a festa da existência.
Celebrá-los é, enfim, o que nos faz viver.
E é isto que a Tangarart Gemstone Jewelry produz: os símbolos dos momentos inesquecíveis. A reminiscência que se materializa, e presenteia quem se ama.
Se produzimos aquilo que é inesquecível, não temos o direito de fazermos algo comum.
Por isso, cada joia Tangarart é única, assim como a memória marcante. Sua força impactante está no esplendor natural de uma gema singular. Como um sentimento que se busca o todo tempo, mas que está guardado na recordação.
Por fim, se o segredo da vida está nos momentos únicos, nos encontros, nos desencontros, no choro, no abraço e no amor, nós produzimos a celebração de uma vida bem vivida, com a exclusividade que apenas a natureza e sua singularidade é capaz de proporcionar.

Description:
The fine watch and jewellery boutique is located in Umhlanga's Oceans Mall. Inside it embodies a Parisian apartment, evoking the 1920s' elegance French art de vivre and French savoir faire. Name: Christopher Spitzmiller, Inc.
Description:
Christopher Spitzmiller graduated from St. Lawrence University in 1994. He continued his fine arts study at the Rhode Island School of Design and at Central St. Martins College of Art in London. He draws inspiration from classical form and traditional glazing techniques. He began his career in Georgetown in Washington, D.C. where he worked out of an old school house near Dumbarton Oaks. In 1995 he had his first one man show of Pottery at Kinsey Marable & Co. The show and his works received critical acclaim and his reputation as a noteworthy ceramicist began to emerge. In the summers he worked from Mecox Gardens in Southampton, as an artist in residence and such designers as Albert Hadley, Richard Keith Langham and Suzanne Rheinstein began to commission his work.

Over the last decade, Christopher Spitzmiller’s hand-made ceramic lamps have become essential accessories for many interior designers and their clients and can now be found in homes from Washington, D.C. to Vietnam. Christopher Spitzmiller lamps are hand-made to your specifications in our New York studio. Careful, limited production ensures the high quality of every lamp before it leaves the workshop. Our 50 shapes can be glazed in any of 47 bold, rich colors.

Name: Maggie Semple Limited
Description:
Born out of a passion for women, fashion and their stories Maggie Semple Limited is a luxury fashion brand with an atelier in the heart of Covent Garden London, that has tapped into the imagination of thousands of women globally. 

We deliver intelligent stories through the bespoke Semple Dress Collection, within the pages of fashion and lifestyle publication Semple Magazine, on our daily blog and at our in-house events. 

Our History 

In 2010 Maggie Semple OBE founded Maggie Semple Limited, a business inspired by women, fashion and their stories. MSL has a number of strands of activity but what unites them all is that we know that every female, no matter what her age, has at least one favourite item that she cherishes and cannot throw away. Maggie herself had quite a few items in her wardrobe, but one dress which she has owned for 30 years now, is still worn by her today and will never be forgotten. A classic shift sleeveless cotton dress that is simple yet elegant. 

"Before I set up the business I tested my idea and found that women have amazing stories attached to their clothes. It doesn’t matter if the clothing is new, not so new, bought, a gift, or inherited – there will always be a fascinating story attached to it." Maggie Semple OBE

Name: X NIHILO
Description:
Established in 2016, X Nihilo is the brainchild of two best friends who share the same passion for restrained luxury. X Nihilo - short for ex nihilo - is a Latin phrase that means creation out of nothing. The notion identifies X Nihilo’s aesthetics and vision to craft a sophisticated and honest range of leather bags for the modern women.

Designed for women with strong identity and driven by the desire to express individuality, X Nihilo consciously distances itself from conspicuous branding. Blending reserved aesthetics with practicalities and timelessness, our bags are inspired by and designed for women of substance.

Retaining a consistent and unique signature, our bags build the idea of strength, beauty, and independence through exquisite material and astounding craftsmanship. Embracing the slow fashion movement, X Nihilo’s concept of luxury is embedded in its meticulously curated material, well considered design, and the highest level of dedication and attention to detail in construction.

Description:
Neri Romualdo Srl designs, produces and sells gold and silver jewelry completely created in Italy. 

We use recycled and traced metal and our supply chain is located in the goldsmith district of Arezzo, the heart of Tuscany. We are careful to produce positive value, we are certified Responsible Jewellery Council COP and COC. 

Our production ranges from empty chains to jewelry with stones and diamonds. We work on behalf of third parties for important luxury fashion brands and with the largest distribution groups of the market.

Name: Cipriano Joaillier Créateur
Description:
Founded in 2002 by designer Cipriano Martins, the “Maison Cipriano Joaillier” aims to make creativity and fine jewellery accessible to all. The showroom, located at 31 rue de France in Fontainebleau, is a testament to this commitment, offering each client a unique and personalised experience.
An Artisanal and Bespoke Approach
The Cipriano team creates bespoke pieces, transforms jewellery, and undertakes restoration and maintenance of precious items in its workshops. Each piece is crafted by hand by experienced artisans, upholding the art and traditions of jewellery-making. This approach ensures unique pieces that reflect the expertise and passion at the heart of the “Maison Cipriano Joaillier”.
Inspired and Authentic Collections
Cipriano’s collections mirror the personality of its creator, drawing inspiration from his emotions and a wide array of artistic influences, such as architecture, sculpture, design, and travel. This diversity is evident in every creation, lending each piece a personal and artistic dimension.
Key Moments and Commitments
•	2002: Opening of the Maison Cipriano Joaillier” showroom, bespoke designer and manufacturer
•	2004: Exhibitor at Baselworld and Bijorhca
•	2008: Participation in the Carat fair (Jewellers and Designers’ Fair at the Carrousel du Louvre)
•	2008: Initiator of "Gourmet Jewellery", in collaboration with Frédéric Cassel (master pastry chef) and Nathalie Muller, with presentations in Fontainebleau and Paris (Carrousel du Louvre)
•	2015: Launch of a collection in homage to Lisbon

Name: Anne Sportun Fine Jewellery
Description: Driven by her belief in a universal language of shape and form, Toronto jewellery designer Anne Sportun looks to nature for inspiration. Anne translates the subtle beauty of organic asymmetry into her work. The combination of traditional gold-smithing techniques with Anne’s design sensibility brings a sophisticated dichotomy to her pieces. In her work and in her life, she strives to combine the precious with the everyday. Awarded for her excellence in craftsmanship and contemporary design, her work is collected by those who share Anne’s vision.

Name: Shoe Week
Description:
Shoe Week was created to finally recognize, feature, and celebrate the luxury shoe market in fashion week form. Only a Shoe Fashion Week can truly focus on and honor the top designers and fashion houses in the space. It also sets up the proper scope for traditional and new media interviews, press coverage, industry B2B, and finally attaches the much needed celebrity element to round out the exhilaration that the major international fashion weeks offer today.

We are launching Shoe Week during NYFW SS 2013, with signature events including a luxury Shoe Fashion Show, Handbag and Shoe Lounge, Style Media House, and designer Sneaker Concert. We are taking a substantive role in FNO and hosting kick-off and closing parties, dinners, and brunches to begin bringing the industry together and highlight key houses and designers. In addition to trends, we understand that brand heritage, cultural adoration, and creative enlightenment must be explored, highlighted and awarded in the luxury footwear space and accompanying accessories market.

We are producing our Runway Shows and Exhibitions featuring luxury shoes at its core, from our careful designer curation, and accompanying narrative media. Rather than looking at shoes, handbags, and luxury accessories solely to compliment looks as a secondary aspect, our mantra boasts being 'Accessories Forward.' In this way, we've set up our shows to feature shoes as a primary, then pair accessorized looks in style sommelier manner.

Shoe Week has been very well-received from the industry leaders, brands, and celebrities that we have reached out to. We have an excellent mix of footwear and accessories brands included in our shows and are in active discussions with many of the top global houses at Chairman/CEO, CMO, and PR/Fashion Director levels. There are a lot of opportunities for many stakeholders, especially with many leading global heritage fashion houses traditionally not showing during MBFW.

Name: MLS-MarieLaurenceStevigny
Description:
As bag's origins are in the "pockets": it is the starting point of MLS-MARIELAURENCESTEVIGNY new Belgian accessories brand's concept.

MLS, Move Light & Safe, a simple light, genderless, contemporary and safe pocket accessory. 

MLS-MARIELAURENCESTEVIGNY Pocket accessories worn under or on top of your coat or vest are the perfect companions for daily moves, commutes or travels.
Treasure your essentials, free your mind hands in your pockets.                    Simplify your life.

Designed in Belgium by belgian accessories designer Marie-Laurence Stévigny.
Established in 2018.

Made in Spain.

Made with premium quality hides: Spanish & Italian cowhide and lambskin other materials made in France.

Made by leathergoods experts workshop and factory since more than 30 years.
Styled by you: simply enjoy organizing it and wearing it your way.

Share it: you are the brand ambassador simply share it #mlsmarielaurencestevigny.

Why the Pocket ?

Because Pockets are the origin of the first bags in the history of Fashion.
Because it's a concept that sticks to the skin of women and men in the era of mobility. 
Because one always needs to have a pocket of reach. 
Because as a designer  it is a bearer of meaning to create a multiple single-user product in the dematerialization: it is bearer of meaning. 
Because only the essentials are carried away; you move more lightly. 
Because with your hands free: you move more freely. 
Because the pockets free the hands.
Because Pockets are new vision of genderless leather accessories. 
Because the Pocket replaces the bag.
Because as Yves Saint-Laurent simply said:
"You put your hands in your pockets and you have the look".

Description:
Breeze House handcraft a collection of exclusive, luxury, timber and thatched garden gazebos. 

We are the original designer of the authentic 'Breeze House' garden building, celebrating 30 years of enhancing owners’ health and happiness.

The Breeze House range includes traditional wooden gazebos, our Oval Leisure Range and an array of bespoke options to suit all tastes, gardens and lifestyles.
