Enjoy luxury outdoor living at its best

Name: Ranch Road Boots
Description: RANCH ROAD was born out of love for freedom and the great American West. Their mission is to create leather goods with style and quality that can last forever.  Having launched in January of 2012, the brand has quickly evolved from its modest custom boot-making roots in Texas to a Ready-to-Wear collection sold direct-to-consumer through the company’s website.  Future plans for growth include premium wholesale distribution (Fall 2019). Ranch Road Boots are handcrafted in Spain and are undeniably luxurious. Each boot is crafted from start to finish by expert boot-makers who use traditional boot lasts, Goodyear welt construction, cork foot beds, and the highest quality leathers from small tanneries in the mountains of Spain. In addition to being extremely durable, these leathers are prized for their unique character that develops with daily use and abuse, creating a distinct patina specific to each pair. There are over 250 steps to make each pair of Ranch Road boots—most of these are done by hand. Founded by Sarah Ford, a San Angelo native, a former Marine, and a Harvard Business School Grad, the brand is deeply rooted in her unique path.  From spurs to combat boots, Sarah served in Iraq, Afghanistan and 29 Palms. Paying homage to her years of Marine Corps service, Sarah donates proceeds from every purchase to the Injured Marines Semper Fi Fund and has a program making boots for amputees.

Il marchio Gianni Carità è sinonimo di alta gioielleria made in Italy e di esclusività delle collezioni prodotte
Il design raffinato, che coniuga il gusto contemporaneo con la raffinata tradizione dell’archivio storico dell’azienda, il rispetto di standard di qualità di altissimo livello nonché l’utilizzo di pregiati materiali usati nei processi di lavorazione, rendono i gioielli prodotti dei pezzi unici.

Description:
TALISMAN is the brainchild of the team behind the award-winning jewelry group GEM India Exports, which has over 30 years of experience in designing and manufacturing high-end jewelry pieces and semi-precious stones. Acknowledged for its innovation in production and process efficiency, GEM India Exports has an ever-growing global presence and currently services luxury retail outlets worldwide.

Brand TALISMAN includes collections of charm bracelets, rings, pendants, earrings and bangles; all made in 925 Sterling Silver. The target demographic is women between the ages of 18-35 years and focuses on personalized, affordable jewelry. Our jewelry is colorful, vibrant, confident and has something to say. 

We have conceptualized pieces that can unfold memories and help our audience express themselves in a fun and distinctive way. In fact, we have an in-house storytelling team that has crafted a unique meaning for each piece.

All our collections are made in Silver (versus brass which is usually the case), featuring high-end precious gemstones (versus crystals), and are comfortably priced. 

Luxury is often associated with a heavy price tag or a high-end brand. TALISMAN is our attempt to change that.

Exhibitions & Trade Shows:
Over the years, we have participated in various exhibitions and shows across USA, Europe, Hong Kong, Bangkok and India.
* HONGKONG GEM & JEWELRY SHOW
* BANGKOK JEWELRY SHOW 
* GJX SHOW, TUCSON

Name: E.H. Ashley & Company, Inc.
Description:
E.H. Ashley is a wholesale distributor of Swarovski crystals (since 1934) and has one of the largest inventories of Swarovski crystal in the world. 
We are also:
- Wholesale importers of hand-crafted German Glass and Lucite jewelry components.
- We supply Custom Coatings on Swarovski crystals and on hand-crafted glass from Germany.
- We carry Metal Settings - Brass and Filigree, Filigree Beads, and jewelry components.
Est. 1899.

E.H. Ashley proudly supplies Swarovski as the premium brand for the finest crystal embellishments since 1895. It is recognized for its innovation excellence and its collaborations with top designers and brands in the fashion, jewelry, accessories, interior design, and lighting industries across the globe. Available in a myriad of colors, effects, shapes, and sizes, crystals from Swarovski offer a fabulous palette of inspiration and are produced according to the innovative, lead-free* Advanced Crystal standard.

Visit our extensive SHOWROOM:

Our showroom houses over a 100 years of stones. Many stones are from families that came to Bavaria after WWII, and with the knowledge from hundreds of years of the Bohemian glass industry and their skill, rebuilt a vibrant industry in a new region. Through our relationship with these families, we have become close friends and continue to buy a brilliant assortment of classic and unique glass, plastic, and metal components.

One of the most important services offered by E.H. Ashley is the development of new and unique stones based on our customers' designs. Our association with independent manufacturers in Europe allows us to develop new designs quickly at comparatively low cost and, with access to thousands of tools, special order stones can be developed easily with less lead times than custom designs requiring the production of new tooling. 

Make an appointment to visit our showroom and visit www.ehashley.com to discover what makes us different!

Name: The British Pearl Association
Description:
The British Pearl Association (BPA) is a national trade interest group which promotes the growth of UK pearl gems and pearl jewellery suppliers. With a growing membership of companies, BPA represents pearl designer jewellers, craftsmen and women, pearl jewellery wholesalers and suppliers, galleries, internet retailers and traders.

Founded by President Louise Tippey, the BPA provides strong leadership for the UK pearl industry, specially offering support, promotion opportunities and advice for budding pearl jewellery designers.

Our mission is to promote awareness, interest and demand for Pearls on behalf of the retail community and at a consumer level. This includes a special commitment to support young British jewellery designers.  And a special commitment to support fair trade and sustainable pearls. Through 2 key pillars of Promotion and Education, we aim to inspire a genuine passion for all Pearl varieties and style of jewellery design.

We are committed to:
•Helping members to improve their prosperity
•Educating consumers about Pearls and the UK Pearl Industry
•Increasing the UK market share for BPA members

Through BPA membership, individuals and businesses benefit from savings, recognition, knowledge and exposure required to help their businesses grow in the UK and abroad.

The BPA has its own permanent Secretariat, which is based in Henley on Thames, managed by President Louise Tippey. Members are kept closely informed of all decisions taken by the association and are encouraged to participate in the running of their association. We believe communicative, open and honest relationships is the best way to manage the BPA for the benefit of the current and future generation.

There are 3 classifications of BPA membership:
•Full member – annual subscriptions are based on number of employees.
•Designer/Craftsperson – annual subscription with discounted rates available
•International Associate (on application)

Name: Banco Villa
Description:
Banco Villa nasce oltre 60 anni fa come banco metalli preziosi a gestione familiare per opera di Mario Villa ed è giunta oggi alla sua terza generazione.

Negli anni Cinquanta, in pieno periodo dopoguerra, Mario Villa, milanese doc, decise di avviare il suo banco di metalli preziosi con il nome di “Mario Villa”, con lo scopo di contribuire attivamente alla rinascita commerciale milanese. Il banco di metalli Mario Villa nasce per l’acquisto e la vendita di metalli preziosi, nonché per il recupero degli stessi, dalla rigenerazione degli scarti di lavorazione o dai prodotti usati. Questo aspetto ha portato alla velocizzazione del processo, risultando utile a tutta la filiera del comparto orafo al quale è in grado di fornire materia prima purissima pronta per essere nuovamente lavorata in colate e forgiata in gioielli di eccellenza.
Il nostro target di riferimento include tutti coloro che hanno esigenza di recuperare velocemente la materia prima contenuta all’interno di prodotti esausti, usati o rottami e scarti riportando la materia prima preziosa contenuta allo stato originale con alta purezza e pronta per essere nuovamente utilizzata, oppure sotto forma di semilavorati.

Siamo inoltre il partner di fiducia per tutte quelle realtà che necessitano di vendere eccedenze di magazzino, scarti o prodotti usati contenenti oro, argento, platino, palladio e rodio, per creare immediato realizzo a quotazioni trasparenti e ritornare a disponibilità di cash-flow

Name: POSH Mommy
Description:
POSH Mommy has always been a labor of love, built by mommies for mommies to recognize their strength and heart. Over 10 years ago, the first POSH Mommy started crafting beautiful, unique jewelry at home - hammering each piece by hand at the kitchen counter with a baby on each hip! These mommy pendants quickly caught others' eyes and orders grew from hundreds to thousands. It's heartwarming to see friends and family still wearing these original pieces after so many years! Eventually, the demand made hand-embedding every birthstone an impossible feat. We entered our toddler phase in 2009 and stepped up our quality and production capacity by partnering with a skilled jewelry studio. From there, POSH became the first line of "mommy necklaces" licensed and sold in major jewelry stores!

Though POSH started a little over a decade ago, we have roots that extend much deeper. Our Chicago-based studio has been creating fine jewelry and watches for more than three generations, and in perfect step with POSH's core values, is still a family-owned business. This spirit can be found at every level of our production process, as everyone here at POSH is a parent who is inspired by the mommies and littles in their own lives.

We specialize in customizable, stylish jewelry that fits the way you live and celebrates the ones you love. POSH quickly became a wardrobe staple for trendy moms, mixing fashionable styles with heartfelt personalization which garnered a loyal following of mommies and celebrities. Though we may have started by creating remembrances for Mommies wanting to keep a hold of their babies as they returned to work or as the littles went off to school, we have expanded our lines to include gifts for grads, dads, brides, and all manner of strong women! We are proud to make all your POSH Mommy jewelry in Chicago's West Loop.

So make a statement!
Show your love! 
And most importantly...have some fun!

xoxo, POSH

Name: GHAUM
Description:
La Maison Ghaum trouve ses origines dans l’Inde du début du siècle dernier, à l’apogée des arts impériaux et de la splendeur des Maharajahs. Après un long périple fait de voyages et d’apprentissage Ghaum va renaître en 2004. A l’instar des Maîtres Joaillier un siècle plus tôt, La Maison Ghaum renoue ainsi avec la symbolique que recèle le nom de « Ghaum » : la possibilité de personnaliser et de créer son propre bijou qui constitue l’essence de « Ghaum ».

La société Ghaum Joaillerie est reconnue auprès des professionnels de la bijouterie depuis de nombreuses années. Elle partage à travers ses fournisseurs en diamants le savoir-faire des plus grandes marques et acteurs de la profession sur les marchés de Paris, Londres et New York . Créée en 2004, la société a acquis le savoir-faire de la fabrication de joaillerie grâce à l'expertise des Maîtres Joailliers et Artisants de la Place de Paris, dont nous sommes fiers de vous proposer les créations, qui toutes portent le label "Made in France".
Qualité irréprochable, excellence du service client, savoir faire joaillier et diamants certifiés font partis des objectifs que tous les experts, auxquels nous faisons appel, s'emploient à réaliser au quotidien auprès de notre aimable clientèle. GHAUM - Vos Rêves, Nos Créations.

Name: Emocia Wines / ვინის ემოცია
Description:
Creating your emotions!

Emocia Wines is Georgian brand, which was founded in 2020. We create different types of wine themed accessories. We have quite large choice for people of all tastes.
Our trademark is grape brooches and souvenirs, which are analogues of well-known and endangered Georgian grape varieties. Each brooch comes with a passport, which is translated in 7 languages and tells us about the specific grape variety it represents.
We are proud of our wine themed bronze and marble sculptures. They are indeed luxurious and memorable gifts for ladies and gentlemen.
We also produce exclusive scarves (silk with polyester) on which the world famous wines are transferred. More precisely, it is a drop of frozen wine seen under a polarized light under a microscope. Even one type of wine has a completely different image and is absolutely unique. Isn't it a miracle?
We have wine tasting bags for men and women, which comes with its own wine glasses. EGO is designed for one wine glass and DUET for two. The bag is made with wood and eco – leather. It is quite light in weight and comfortable to carry. The straps are easily removed and the bag also carries the function of a painting. The most interesting part of our bag is a hand - painted picture on the frontal side. Pictures are created with oil paints, author of which is a young, talented, Georgian artist.
The products of Wine Diamond and Emocia Wines are successfully sold in the largest hotels in Georgia, as well as in Duty Free. Our products are also very popular in Europe and America. Our customers are celebrities and representatives of the diplomatic corps.
The main goal of Wine Diamond and Emocia Wines is to expand the area of the brand awareness, to introduce Georgia to the world as the homeland of wine and our unique Kvevri as symbol of identity, which is protected by UNESCO.

#GiveYourEmotion
#WineEmotion
#MoreThanBusiness

Created in Georgia – Motherland of wine!

Since our launch in 2018, we’ve curated some of the most sought-after luxury fashion accessories. The Luxury Helsinki headquarters are based in the heart of Helsinki, but we ship worldwide.

We’re committed to providing fellow luxury fashion-overs with a vast selection of pre-loved rare, limited-edition, and vintage luxury accessories from the world’s most coveted designers.

Our showroom is a hub for second-hand designer items. Our renowned team of stylists is continually updating our in-store and online showroom. With new arrivals daily, Luxury Helsinki is your go-to spot for a unique, personalized shopping experience.

Reclaim a forgotten treasure, find that “it” bag you’ve always wanted, refresh your wardrobe, and do your part to foster more sustainable change in the fashion community.
Why waste when you can recycle? At Luxury Helsinki, we’re making luxury fashion more ecological and accessible. We only offer 100% authentic, pre-loved designer accessories at competitive retail prices.

Reduce, reuse & recycle. No more throwing away previously worn designer items. Let someone else enjoy them while you do your part to help the environment.

Whether selling your pre-loved items or purchasing that luxury handbag you’ve had your eye on, Luxury Helsinki, is a safe and secure shopping destination to reclaim a hidden designer gem, or to find a new home for your pre-loved luxury items.
The luxury fashion industry isn’t exactly synonymous with sustainability. We’re committed to change. By extending the lifespan of each item we offer, we’re collectively helping reduce pollution, waste less, and do our small part to minimize our carbon footprint. We help find high-quality, luxury goods new homes, so they don’t end up in a landfill.

 After all, second-hand and vintage are the ‘new’ luxury. We collect, authenticate, and deliver a certificate for each item w

Name: Friedemodin Perfume Story
Description:
The Brand Friedemodin
Friedemodin is a niche perfumery in London and a brand by Scent Curator Ltd.
Every collection tells a story, each fragrance within the collections is a chapter. 
Inspired by a time and place, and with a deference to quality and tradition, the story grows, the story harmonises, the story is Nina’s.  
Friedemodin are ‘distillers of experience’

The company Scent Curator Ltd
Nina founded SCL to provide scented experiences, such as scented gifting for weddings, events and corporates as well scented services such as consultations, creating your own perfume and white labelling.

About Nina

Nina Friede is the founder of London-based luxury perfume brand, Friedemodin.  Dedicated to creating unique and signature fragrances to be worn alone or overlayered, she is passionate about the sublties of ingredients and treats them as elements in her search for...sensual alchemy.  Born in Worpswede, a remote artist village in Northern Germany, art and literature inform her working process.

Classic perfumery and Friedemodin
Friedemodin is a unique concept in the perfume world.  Reliant on the expertise of the past as one might expect, the company is nothing if not timeless with a view to appealing to all ages and tastes.  Working with the best fragrance creators is one important element but addressing the contemporary spirit of knowledgeable clients is vital too.  These qualities emphasise the character of the company - sensual not remote, specialized not ubiquitous.

Name: Henry Archer
Description:
Vi er en dansk virksomhed baseret i Aarhus, som designer og producerer ure, hvor kvalitet, godt håndværk og design går op i en højere enhed.

Vores ure er til dem, der sætter pris på dansk minimalisme, høj kvalitet og de små – men vigtige detaljer.

Vi er af den overbevisning, at et fedt outfit aldrig er komplet uden et lækkert, klassisk ur.

Samtlige af vores ure er designet fra bunden i vores designstudie i Aarhus, og alle designs er 100% originale.

Vi er stolte af vores danske designarv, som er er kilden til inspirationen bag vores designs.

Dansk design er kendetegnet af en klar sammenhæng mellem funktion, design og brug af kvalitetsmaterialer, og det er de 3 nøgleord som er definerer vores virksomheds DNA.

Inspirationen til vores designs kommer fra 1920ernes “Bauhaus” designstil, som vi kombinerer med moderne minimalisme og produktionsmetoder. Dette resulterer i et tidsløst design, som har sin berettigelse både nu og i fremtiden.

Et godt design kan ikke stå alene. Det er mindst lige så vigtigt, at urets komponenter og materialer er af en lige så høj kvalitet.

Derfor benytter vi for eksempelvis udelukkende ridsefrit safirkrystal på samtlige af vores ure, ægte narvlæder på samtlige læderremme og meget mere.

Urværkerne i vores ure kommer fra førende producenter, såsom Schweiziske Ronda, Japanske Seiko og Miyota.

A. Versace tarafından 2001 yılında Milano’da kurulan Versace 19.69 Abbigliamento Sportivo Srl, markanın tüm alanlardaki faaliyetlerinde kalitesini korumaya odaklanmıştır. Tasarımlarında geleneği ve zarafeti devamlı canlı tutmak için çalışmaktadır. Aynı zamanda, tasarımlarında yenilikçi yaklaşımını sürdürerek ulaşılabilir lüksü tüketicilerine sunmaktadır.

Taş Elmas olarak 2013 yılında Versace 19.69 Abbigliamento Sportivo Srl ile gerçekleştirdiğimiz anlaşmayla markanın mücevher, bijuteri, çelik ve gümüş takı sektörlerinde lisansörü konuma gelmiş bulunuyoruz. Mücevher sektöründeki uzun yıllara dayanan tecrübemiz, marka bilincimiz ve vizyonumuz ile dünyadaki birçok firma arasından tercih edilmenin mutluluğunu ve gururunu yaşıyoruz.

Türk ve İtalyan tasarımcıların ortak çalışmasıyla hazırladığımız ilk koleksiyonumuzda kısa sürede moda dünyasının öncü isimlerinden tam not alarak sağladığımız motivasyonla yeni koleksiyon hazırlıklarımıza başlamış bulunuyoruz.

---------------------------------------------------------

Versace 19.69 Abbigliamento Sportivo Srl brand created by A. Versace in 2001 in Milano, is focused on protecting the quality conception in all of its activities. It keeps the tradition and elegance in its designs alive. It also provides its customers with the accessible luxury by sustaining an innovative approach.

We, as Taş Elmas have become the licencee of Versace 19.69 Abbigliamento Sportivo Srl with the contract made in 2013 for the jewelry, bijouterie and steel and silver ornament products of the brand. We are experiencing the pride and joy of being preferred among many companies all over the world regarding our expertise, brand conception and vision.

We are getting prepared to the design our new collection with the motivation of receiving great appraisal from the leading figures of fashion world for our first collection designed by Turkish and Italian designers.

Name: MKM Jewelry Inc.
Description:
MKM Jewelry is a jewelry manufacturer based in Los Angeles. We work with independent jewelry designers and business owners who wish to turn their creative vision into a physical work of art. We have over 15 years of experience in jewelry design and manufacturing and we work with state-of-the-art equipment to ensure jewelry quality and durability.

MKM Jewelry works with jewelers who wish to create single, unique pieces, as well as businesses who want to manufacture 1,000 piece batches. Our fast turnaround speeds, no matter the intricacy of the project, ensures happy customers time after time.

At MKM Jewelry, we provide a suite of services that will take your idea from paper to finishing. Our services include:

Computer-Aided Design (CAD)
Computer-Aided Manufacturing (CAM)
Mold Making
Lost Wax Casting
Laser Welding
Setting
Engraving
Finishing

To work with MKM Jewelry simply submit a project request, approve the designs we create, get a quote that reflects your needs, and review the prototype before manufacturing begins. 

We have experience working both precious and non-precious metals, and we generally use recycled and eco-friendly materials to minimize our impact on the environment. Our technicians are experts with brass, bronze, and copper, as well as gold, rose gold/silver combination, and rhodium.

With over 60 years of industry experience, our commitment to providing a different type of brokering service has enabled us to grow our business to an ever-expanding exclusive international clientele. Our objective has always been to bring one of the oldest trades in the world into the 21st century.

We’re proud to say that over the last five years, New Bond Street Pawnbrokers have supplied over £25 million in asset loans. Our advice, expertise and premier service keep our clients coming back (over 80% of our clients come back to use our services).

Our experience and understanding of luxury products such as jewellery, diamonds, fine watches, fine art, fine antiques, luxury cars, private plates and vintage wine enable our clients to achieve the maximum loan against their items, based on current market values.

We offer an immediate, secure, private and no-fuss pawn broking service for instant loans against luxury items.

Name: Kettel.
Description:
On vous raconte la petite histoire ?

L'idée du bijou du sport, Estelle l'a trouvé lors de sa première séance de Crossfit. Elle qui croyait être une sportive de haut vol (on l'avait pourtant prévenu), la voilà vite dépassée par le W.O.D du jour (une séance complète d'exercices pour les fous...passionnés pardon ! ^^). Pour corser la séance (c'était déjà pas assez dur ho !), le coach lui tend alors une Kettlebell (une quoi pardon ?) : un poids avec une hanse (ça ressemble un peu à une bouilloire) et la voilà conquise ! 



"J'aime tout dans cet objet : sa forme, sa singularité, son esthétique et son super pouvoir symbolique : véritable emblème du Crossfit ! Je l'imagine sur mon poignet (je le trouve canon évidemment) et je le visualise au poignet de tous ces sportifs impressionnants autour de moi qui se donnent à fond et y prennent du plaisir"



Qu'il y a t'il de plus beau alors que d'offrir un magnifique bijou avec un symbole qui a du sens. Le Kettel, bijou du sport, pour tous les sportifs (et même ceux du dimanche !) est né !

Bon ok on vous voit venir, "sport" ne rime pas forcément avec "bijou"... et bien chez Kettel notre ambition c'est de vous prouver le contraire ! 


Pour que ce soit aussi chic que sport et que toute la famille puisse en profiter, Estelle a dessiné des pendentifs sobres et modernes. Curieuse des tendances, elle s'est même inspirée des collections intemporelles des grandes marques et la nouvelle façon de porter les bracelets : montés sur des cordons de toutes les couleurs !  Moderne, nomade, mixte, interchangeable à souhait, le bracelet sur cordon s'adaptera au poignet de tous les grands et petits sportifs. 



Créé dans son atelier en Provence, les Kettel sont assemblés au moment où vous passez votre commande ! A vous de choisir votre sport, votre symbole, et votre cordon !

Alcarum’s consolidated portfolio currently includes six brands embodying in excess of 1000 years of history, with a further eight in the process of curation.

CURATION (NOUN): The action or process of selecting, organizing, and looking after the items in a collection or exhibition. Such actions are typically undertaken using professional knowledge of a specific practice or period. Origin is from the Latin term cura, meaning to care for.

Alcarum's ambition is to curate a portfolio of leading heritage brands across geographies and categories; recontextualising evocative brands for introduction to contemporary markets.

Name: UNTITLED 19
Description:
Untitled 19 is a french label created in 2019 by Pascal Humbert & François Joos after 3 years of creative collaboration. It was born from a shared passion for craftsmanship and the will to create a singular and
 instinctive wardrobe, alongside furniture and objects. 

After Graduating from the Beaux-Arts, Pascal Humbert came to light in 1998 with his first show “20 costumes pour 20 personnalités” that gave him the opportunity to be shown in some international press publications. This was then followed by several awards: “Grand prix de la création de la ville de Paris”, “Andam Fashion Award”, and “Trophée de la mode”. He then launched his brand which was sold in Paris by Maria Luisa, in New York by Barney’s and in Hong Kong by Joyce… 

After a Bachelor of Arts in object design at Ecole Boulle, François Joos joined the menswear course at the London College of Fashion in 2014. He began 
working in fashion design with the brand BLESS, which then lead him working with Pascal Humbert on various projects including uniforms, scenography, 
set design and styling.

The presentation of each new collection comes in a different form: fashion show, film, specific set up or performance; with one common goal: the will to express freedom,  to experiment, to share and to create a convivial atmosphere. 

The Untitled 19 venue opened in January 2022 in Paris. Designed as an evolving installation between a theatre set and an art gallery, it presents the brand’s collections but can also be transformed into an exhibition or event space.

Name: Vittorio Martini 1866
Description:
THE IMPORTANCE OF BEING MARTINI
 

Back in 1866, Cavalier Vittorio Martini founded Vittorio Martini in Bologna, Italy. Today, as then, the company is supported by professionalism and knowledge, characterized by deep passion for the production of a high-precision product.
In its 147 years of activity, Vittorio Martini has developed, specializing in the production of artisan tools for measurement, calculation and design, elegantly shaping a valuable material such as wood and turning it into refined tools for writing, design and precision: essential work instruments for all expressions of manual skills and creativity, where instinct retains its freedom.
 

 
GIFT ITEMS
 
Here lies the luxury of Vittorio Martini: a high quality product where attention is placed on the choice of materials, on the design of every new collection and on research at the forefront of stylish and technical solutions. Instruments which were once considered to be strictly functional are transformed into elegant and researched accessories, a sign of its own personality.
Intuitively, the aim was to marry two basic Made in Italy elements: the top quality of materials and its’ design characteristics.  Merging quality with modern, minimal packaging, brought life to a contemporary life style product in which an elegant and essential image may be embedded.

Name: LAVS Atelier
Description:
L’Atelier LAVS di Sorcinelli Filippo e Bissoni Marcello si occupa dello studio, della progettazione e della realizzazione di Vesti sacre, suppellettili ed accessori di pregio per la sacra liturgia.

Nel novero della produzione sono considerati non solo quindi abiti ecclesiastici ma anche oggetti come croci pettorali, croci astili, anelli, vasi sacri, bacoli pastorale, arredi e suppellettili e quant’altro impiegato nella sacra liturgia.

La produzione è ispirata principalmente alle forme e alla tradizione antica della Chiesa, rivisitate alla luce del Concilio Ecumenico Vaticano II e delle Riforma Liturgica da quest’ultimo scaturita.

La produzione LAVS è rivolta a tutti gli uomini di chiesa che abbiano una particolare sensibilità ed uno spiccato amore per la liturgia e l’arte del bello nel contesto celebrativo: dalle più alte cariche ecclesiastiche, come vescovi e cardinali, a coloro che occupano i primi gradi dell’ordine sacerdotale, quali presbiteri e diaconi. Utilizza esclusivamente materiali di pregio, progettati interamente in Italia; l’impiego della manodopera è assolutamente italiana.

E’ in stretta collaborazione con l’Ufficio delle Celebrazioni Liturgiche del Sommo Pontefice. Grazie a tale concerto, numerose sono le opere già realizzate per il Santo Padre Francesco, impiegate in svariate Celebrazioni presso la Patriarcale Basilica Vaticana e in varie Visite Apostoliche.
In Vaticano è considerato come l’atelier di riferimento per consulenza e progetti importanti.
La nostra azienda, ha un contatto diretto con la committenza: visita direttamente i singoli clienti con cui progetta insieme i lavori da eseguire. La nostra politica è quella di offrire sempre più maggiori servizi. 
Attraverso l'intesa tra la prestigiosa clientela e il nostro laboratorio, il prodotto finale acquista sempre un carattere esclusivo. Ciascun articolo è interamente realizzato a mano impiegando esclusivamente tessuti pregiati, italiani ed esteri, passamanerie di pregio e pietre preziose.

Name: Sedwick & Associates, LLC
Description:
Daniel Frank Sedwick, LLC stands out as the world's leading specialist in colonial coinage from Spanish America, Latin American Republic coins, and shipwreck coins from various nations. The company caters to a global clientele of registered bidders through its cutting-edge online platform at auction.sedwickcoins.com, which features live bidding complete with a video feed, real-time lot-closing alerts, and mobile bidding via the exclusive Sedwick Auction app. Their auctions are supported by both digital and printed high-quality catalogs, ensuring a rich and accessible bidding experience.

The hallmark of Sedwick's floor auction events includes pre-auction presentations by experts in Latin American numismatics and shipwreck history. This educational approach enriches the auction experience, offering attendees insights into the historical and cultural significance of the items on offer.

Lot viewing before each auction is offered at the auction venue and at various coin shows. We are also book publishers with several active titles on the market, and we are respected appraisers of coins and artifacts, in addition to offering items for sale both online at sedwickcoins.com and at major coin shows. We have sold some of the most important shipwreck treasures ever recovered, and we have sold many millions of dollars’ worth of Latin American, world and treasure coins.

We are members in good standing with most major numismatic organizations, including the world’s most prestigious numismatic dealer guild IAPN (International Association of Professional Numismatists) as well as the ANS (American Numismatic Society) and ANA (American Numismatic Association), and we are fully insured and licensed Florida auctioneers (AU3635, AB2592, since 2007).

Name: J-UP
Description:
J-UP è un’azienda che si occupa della produzione e della distribuzione di prodotti e servizi all’interno del mercato della gioielleria e dell'orologeria. L’azienda nasce con lo scopo di imporsi nel mercato di riferimento grazie alla pluriennale esperienza delle persone che la compongono, a partire dai suoi soci.

L’unione di questi background ha dato origine alla creazione di J-UP che, subito dopo la sua nascita, ha ottenuto la prestigiosa distribuzione esclusiva per tutto il territorio italiano del brand internazionale UNOde50. I risultati ottenuti fino ad ora, con il posizionamento del brand UNOde50 all’interno di oltre 550 gioiellerie selezionate, rafforzano l’idea e la mission di J-UP che si possono ricondurre nella volontà di migliorare la qualità distributiva per aumentare le reciproche soddisfazioni del consumatore, rivenditore, distributore e del brand.

Nel marzo 2016, J-UP ha ottenuto la distribuzione esclusiva sul territorio italiano di Wenger, in aggiunta a UNOde50, marchio di orologi svizzeri Swiss Made di proprietà di Victorinox.

La Maison vous accompagne dans vos projets tout en respectant votre budget. Toutes les étapes se font en confiance :

- le choix d'une pierre, en tant qu'expert en gemmologie, les pierres sélectionnées sont naturelles et non traitées. Nous pouvons vous présenter un grand nombre de gemmes (diamant, saphir, émeraude, rubis, tourmaline, spinelle, aigue marine, améthyste, opale,...),

- le choix de la monture, nous vous présenterons une bibliothèque d'images de toutes les créations permettant de vous projeter et de choisir le bijou de vos rêves,

- la maquette, avant de vous lancer dans la réalisation finale en or, nous vous proposons une maquette pour voir le volume, l'agencement des pierres et pour connaître le détail du devis, c'est l'étape qui vous permet de finaliser la commande,

- la création dans l'atelier, ainsi depuis 128 ans, 5 générations se relaient pour être les gardiens d'un savoir-faire et pour donner vie à vos projets. Le travail de l'or se fait de la même façon que notre arrière-arrière grand père.


N'hésitez pas à nous contacter afin de réaliser votre projet sur mesure ou de venir nous rencontrer dans notre boutique, au 29 cours de l'Intendance à Bordeaux

Pierre-Frédéric, Nathalie, Sophie, Morgane et Alexandre Tournis

Tras el paso del tiempo en el año 2001, con la apertura de su segunda tienda, donde se plasma su inquietud en la búsqueda constante de diseño y tendencias, nos permite hablar de un estilo propio, “Pedro Rodríguez”, donde se incorporan grandes marcas relojeras, como Cartier, Audemars Piguet, Bovet, Zenith, Omega, Chaumet, Baume & Mercier, Bulgari, entre otras, motivo por el cual nuestros clientes reconocen y agradecen la exclusividad que les ofrecemos a cambio de su fidelidad.

Name: Leon Emanuel Blanck
Description:
Leon Emanuel Blanck‘s design process engages in a dynamic dialogue between material, form, movement and the intricate inner-workings of his mind. Each component within the formative chain represents a logical consequence in a continuous journey of creation.

Since 2011 his approach has involved the nuances of anatomy, functionality and movement into tangible mediums of garments, footwear, jewellery and furniture. The results have been a synthesis of conceptual design and purposeful craftsmanship.

Drawing inspiration from nature, Leon‘s work incorporates natural lines that give rise to organic shapes, evoking his own universe of creations. An essential facet of Leon‘s creative identity lies in his original approach to pattern-making. Titled ‚ANFRACTUOUS DISTORTION‘, Leon‘s ongoing body of work encapsulates this distinctive methodology, reflecting a complex yet harmonious interplay of elements that define his artistic signature.

Over the span of more than a decade, his works have found a home in the most recognized avant-garde stores worldwide. This longevity in the industry speaks to the enduring appeal and innovative spirit embedded in his creations, making a lasting impact on the forefront of design.

Leon‘s work also forms part of the permanent exhibition in the Hamburg Museum of Art and Crafts, alongside designers Thom Browne and Rei
Kawakubo among others. Popular subculture publications like StyleZeitgeist have written about and celebrated his work, as well as mainstream media outlets such as Welt am Sonntag in Germany.

Today, Leon Emanuel Blanck is an integral part of the avant-garde scene of Paris Fashion Week and the niche culture of non-conformist fashion. All garments and accessories are exclusively handcrafted in our atelier in Berlin, Germany. Footwear is handmade in Italy.

Name: LAT_56 (Latitude 56 Degrees Ltd)
Description:
Edgy & exclusive luggage and bags. Focusing on streamlined functionality and bold styling. Discover more on lat56.com.

LAT_56 was launched at an exclusive Champagne event in Selfridges, London, autumn of 2010. It was here where the first Red-Eye, indeed the first ever bag was purchased. Since then LAT_56 has carved a name for itself as one of the most premium, exclusive performance travel product brands available. LAT_56 have built up an international following of loyal customers who travel thousands of road, rail and air miles every day with their trusted companion.
Kevin Fox, an award-winning Scottish designer, founded the brand after training as a product designer. As the designer for the international brand, with a global outlook, he & his team create designs that have no borders. There is one goal and that is to create the best possible travel bag.
What started with some sketches, prototypes and eventually one or two products, LAT_56 now offers a comprehensive collection of bags and accessories with a focus towards demanding business travel. Periodically, each design goes through new version iterations and is constantly evolving on a journey to achieve total excellence. Each product must be the best in its class. It is in LAT_56 DNA to design the best suitcase, backpack, briefcase, and messenger. Nothing else is acceptable.
Every type of travel has its own challenges, be it the downtown urban commute, short haul overnighters, or long-haul flight to the other side of the world for 48 hours of intensive meetings and back again. We offer a solution which can handle any of these demanding situations.

The new carry-on luggage has received extremely positive reviews. It was named “Coolest Product in the World” by GQ magazine and Business Traveller Magazine stated it was “A superb bag. Well made, with lots of thought absorbed into the design, good materials and a five-year guarantee”.

Read more about the company on lat56.com

Name: Paparazzi Accessories by Deborah Rickard
Description:
When sisters Misty and Chani began selling jewelry, their original intent wasn't to begin a national phenomenon. "We just enjoyed showing people how to accessorize," explains Misty. But what began as a whim was clearly filling a need.

Women flocked to buy accessories that were trendy, but not too intimidating. Classic, but never boring. And best of all, incredibly affordable. At just $5 per piece, Paparazzi Accessories became an invitation to experiment with color, try a more daring style, and do it without risk of buyer's regret. Paparazzi made fashionable finds accessible for every outfit, for every age group, and for every sense of style. The company grew 900% in just six months.

Today, the concept of "accessibility" extends to the very mission of Paparazzi. Accessories are sold exclusively through Paparazzi Consultants, and anyone who wishes to sell the line can do it for themselves. The result is a flourishing business that empowers women and builds self-assurance with a fun financial future.

Paparazzi founders Misty and Trent Kirby, and Chani and Ryan Reeve, continue to expand the company with hands-on leadership and clear purpose. They individually design and source materials for Paparazzi products while working directly with manufacturing partners to create the fashion-forward results. Read more about our founders and the Paparazzi executive team.

You might think we're all about accessories, but Paparazzi is really about change! Changing the way people look. Changing the way people feel. Changing people's futures and their lives. Though our fashion-forward jewelry and product parties are centered on fun, Paparazzi fulfills a serious mission. We believe that trendy accessories can be available, and affordable, to women everywhere. We know that wearing a new look, and feeling confident in your appearance, builds amazing self-worth. Our passion is inspiring dreams, empowering talents, and reaching goals by sharing our products and the excitement of Paparazzi. We see it happen every day.

If that's not enough, you'll also be glad to know Paparazzi products are:
•Lead-free and nickel-free
•One-of-a-kind featuring original design, style, and feel
•Always changing—buy it when you see it!
•Designed in the U.S., made in China
•Produced in facilities with elite standards and regulations for quality and labor
•Available only through our Consultants

Name: Heyerdahl Jewellery Design AS
Description:
Thomas Heyerdahl is a Goldsmith, Diamond specialist and Jewellery designer. After making the worlds most expensive iPod called "iDiamond iPod" in 2007, he got a lot of publicity in the media all over the world. The iPod is just made in one limited piece, which was donated to charity as part of a Quintessentially event in London in March 2008 and rised approx 40,000 USD for the cause. 

Heyerdahl has also crafted another sought-after haute electronic item - the world’s most exclusive earphones. This new creation is named ”iDiamond ear”, and is encrusted by 204 diamonds. 

In 2008 Heyerdahl designed a Nokia diamond telephone in collaboration with Nokia. This was called "Nokia 8800 Diamond", and was made in tree different models, and launched in 2008 for the Norwegian, Chinese, and Hong Kong / Taiwan market. 

The recant project "Zulu by Heyerdahl" is a fantastic diamond ring that will also help give back something to the continent from where the diamonds originate. Zulu by Heyerdahl is a specially designed and exclusive diamond ring, and all proceeds from its sale will go towards the building of houses with the help of Zulufadder (“Zulu sponsor”). For every ring that is sold, a house will be built.

Name: CRYSTALS
Description:
Founded in 2019 by certified crystal healer, Hamda Al-Suwaidi, deriving from her passion for spiritism and design.

CRYSTALS aims to build a bridge between physical beautifications and the metaphysical realm we have yet to fully understand.

Encouraging esoteric thinking, expanding the subconscious mind and healing through frequencies. 

Crystals and gemstones have been used for millennia for decoration, healing and tools. They have been adored through many cultures and traditions and believed to symbolize different aspects and characteristics. 

Unlike other atomic structures, crystals' atomic structure is arranged in a symmetrical pattern called crystalline, believed to absorb, focus, conserve and emit energy.  

With over 100 products to choose from, there is a special mineral for anyone’s journey.

However if in doubt of what to pick, our experienced team are available to answer your questions.

Our jewels allow you to embellish your look, day or evening, from the ballroom to the boardroom. Shine with the timeless glamour of a bygone era or dazzle with pieces destined for the pages of the latest fashion editorials. At, PrettyCarat we focus firmly on craftsmanship, quality and user experience. Our each piece of jewellery is crafted with an extra effort to make sure that our customers get a piece of timeless edition.We also provide a flexibility to customize the product's gold purity and colour or diamond clarity to suit the needs of our customers.PrettyCarat also boasts a unique collection of 3000 product designs assembled from the most innovative designers around the world and our in house design team. Each piece is created using fine jewellery making techniques and is evaluated to similar artisanal standards. Our goal is to imagine and create the most exquisite jewellery possible.

Name: IceLink
Description:
Since ICELINK was founded in 2003, we have strived to be an approachable yet unique luxury jewelry brand. With strong family values at our core, our father-daughter enterprise creates high-end, on-trend, and expertly crafted pieces to be loved and adorned every day.
     In the mid ‘70s, my then teenage father, Andy Sogoyan, took a job working at his beloved uncle’s jewelry shop in Hollywood. This would spark his creative passion and forge his career path in the industry he would grow to love. After years in manufacturing and wholesale, my father solidified his mark when he created ICELINK in 2003. His exquisitely designed fine jewelry and standout watches exemplified his popularity amongst celebrity and elite circles.
     “Just like my father, I began taking responsibilities within the company at the young age of 16. I too, immediately discovered my passion for the business and a zest for luxury accessories. Today, we work side by side to continue to grow the business he started 30 years prior.” -Suzy Sogoyan, Director of Brand Development.
     By creating new and innovative designs, we at ICELINK prioritize giving our clients the absolute best and something to be proud of. By connecting and giving back to our communities, both locally and internationally, our company's purpose goes beyond designing fine jewelry and watches.

Name: AP8
Description:
AP8 has reimagined art collecting by producing limited edition artworks from the world's most outstanding artists, making them accessible to a whole new audience of collectors.

Working directly with artists and their estates, each collection is curated and produced as a unique series of certified limited editions. AP8 artworks are delivered ready to display in your home just as the artist intended it, white gloves and all. All AP8 collections are available until sold out and never reproduced again.

While most online art platforms dilute the tradition of collecting by hosting hundreds of artists with their works available in many sizes and frame options, AP8 has taken the guesswork out of buying art with museum-quality artworks now accompanied with the provenance you need to authenticate and value an artwork as you build your collection.
 
AP8 was born to bring you the ultimate curation of artworks coupled with a seamless shopping experience. Collecting art, like collecting anything, is about what you desire, what you love, and what you consider valuable. AP8 brings you art to love, covet and collect.

Name: Triboulet - Escola de Joalharia
Description:
Triboulet é o nome de uma ferramenta de joalharia que serve para dar forma a peças como anéis, pulseiras escravas e argolas. Existem vários tipos de triboulet que diferem em tamanho, espessura e geometria, resultando desta multiplicidade o enriquecimento das criações.

Nascemos em 2011 como uma oficina de joalharia dedicada ao segmento B2B e evoluímos a nossa atividade, ao longo dos anos, ao segmento B2C com a produção e comercialização das nossas próprias joias. 

Com um conhecimento alargado do mercado, acumulado ao longo de 11 anos de atividade, a criação de uma escola de joalharia foi um passo natural. 

Depois de uma longa estagnação, o setor da joalharia português está a sentir profundas alterações na sua dinâmica, muito impulsionadas pelo caminho crescente da sua internacionalização e pelo desenvolvimento acelerado do e-commerce, nos últimos 2 anos. 

A retoma do setor e a existência de novos canais de distribuição online proporcionam novas oportunidades para os criadores de joias que veem assim a possibilidade de iniciarem os seus negócios de joalharia. 

A nossa Missão é formar criadores de joias profissionais e empreendedores.
Na Triboulet acreditamos que qualquer pessoa, orientada por profissionais, pode dar forma à sua criatividade e tornar-se num joalheiro.
Desenhámos um programa pedagógico de ensino individualizado num curso profissional e em formações de curta duração que te vão dar as ferramentas necessárias para a tua viagem no mundo da joalharia.
A nossa equipa vai estar sempre disponível para te acompanhar, mesmo após a conclusão da formação.

Nous travaillons différentes matières, principalement l’acier inoxydable ou encore le laiton, différentes perles naturelles comme le jade, le quartz, l’amazonite, la tourmaline et bien d’autres merveilles de la nature.

Nos créations sont à la fois uniques et qualitatives, faites main, tout en restant volontairement à un prix modéré. Par amour pour les bijoux, nous prenons soin de les imaginer et les monter avec minutie et passion, et surtout avec patience.

Notre atelier se situe non loin de Paris, à Sèvres, sur une péniche où l’inspiration vient au fil de l’eau. Notre réseau de petites mains franciliennes s’occupe ensuite du montage des bijoux.

Colliers, boucles d’oreilles, bracelets ou encore sautoirs, nos bijoux s’inspirent des nombreux voyages d’Aurore, sa créatrice, et se veulent comme des petits bonheurs à porter. Toujours à la recherche des nouvelles tendances d’ici ou d’ailleurs, Litchi se veut comme une vision légère et amusante des inspirations du moment. 

La collaboration durable avec des partenaires prestigieux tels que la Tour Eiffel ou le musée du Prado à Madrid, parmi d’autres, nous permet aussi de réaliser des productions entièrement montées et gérées par des personnes en situation de handicap, encadrées par un Esat. Cette dimension de partage et d’inclusion est une valeur chère à la marque.

Nous souhaitons à Litchi encore une longue vie pleines d'aventures et de belles rencontres. Une jolie salade de fruits au final !

Name: Arabian Pearl Holdings
Description:
Arabian Pearl Holdings Ltd is situated in Ras Al Khaimah, at the northern peninsular of the United Arab Emirates. The company was established in 2006, and has been harvesting Arabian pearls for many seasons, exclusively producing high-grade quality pearls certified by the Swiss Gemological Institute (SSEF). It is the only successful Arabian pearl cultivation farm in the Middle East.

Drawing on the Arabian pearling history since 1968, it began its inception through the cultivation of Akoya pearls and the use of advanced Japanese pearling technology that was transferred to locally found mollusks in Al Rams, Ras Al Khaimah. 

By 2005 the Emirate of Ral Al Khaimah and the Japan Pearl Cultivation and Trading Company were successfully producing Arabian pearls that were most distinctive in terms of the size, quality and unique luster. The following year Arabian Pearl Holdings Ltd in partnership with RAK Pearls LLC began the campaign to revive the Arabian pearling industry. 

The central idea underlying the Arabian Pearl concentrates on the three important themes of Nature, Culture and Treasure that are all interrelated, and that collectively define pearling. It is as an outcome of nature, and the surrounding environment that pearls are created, culture is a celebration of the Arabian pearl legacy merged with the introduction of Japanese expertise and technology, and the treasure is defined by the pearl itself. 

Historically, the Arab Gulf Region was known for the most valued natural pearls in the world, with a legacy that dates back thousands of years. Arabian Pearl Holdings Ltd recognizes the historical importance of pearling in the Middle East, and is striving to bring the pearling industry back to the region, in celebration of its rich heritage and historical links.

Name: Ferkos Fine Jewelry
Description:
It could be said that there’s gold in my veins. I was born into a family of jewelers; my father, his brothers, and their fathers were all jewelers. I even married a jeweler myself! Armed with ambition, family jeweling tradition, and a love of aesthetics I went off to college where I graduated with a degree in fashion design, with a minor in painting and drawing, but still found myself in the family studio working in the jewelry industry for the past 8 years, solely manufacturing jewelry being supplied to retailers across the country.

Ultimately, it was my son’s birth gave me that extra push to carry the family custom made jewelry business online and start my own business. – he’s the main inspiration for everything I do. I combined my passion and training in fashion with my knowledge of jewelry and began sketching new styles. Shortly after, I decided to open FerkosFineJewelry.com to bring my designs to life.

Ferko is a family nickname that my father gave me. He passed away when I was ten, but every day he serves as a constant source of inspiration and love. I named my gold jewelry shop after his loving nickname for me as a tribute to him.

From creation to final polishing, I’m very hands on within the business. I design every piece with 3D CAD software and I handpick every diamond that is set into the jewelry to ensure that everyone fits our standards. I’m also responsible for all the photography you see. I’m proud to say that my photography skills are steadily improving and I may just have a new hobby.

Family and art are my passion. In my spare time, you can find me spending time with my husband, son, and other friends and family. My main hobby is doing portraits in paint and pencil. I’m a maker by nature so I’m not happy unless I’m creating something; I really feel that art feeds my soul.

Thank you for taking the time go get to know me. I hope you enjoy wearing my designs as much as I enjoy creating them for you!

Description:
Notre entreprise, spécialisée en moulage et surmoulage caoutchouc par vulcanisation est implantée à La Chaux-de-Fonds, véritable bassin de compétences techniques horlogères.
Dotée d'une équipe jeune et d'un parc machine très moderne, Valiance SA se démarque par sa capacité à innover.

Notre culture est avant tout orientée vers l'écoute des besoins clients et pour ce faire, notre bureau technique est impliqué dès la conception 3D des produits jusqu'à leur finition complète. Nous concevons l'ensemble de nos outillages gage de maîtrise de nos procédés.

Le moulage de bracelets caoutchouc haut de gamme, le surmoulage de couronnes, de lunettes et de fonds représentent à ce jour la majorité de notre activité dans le domaine horloger.

Bien que la qualité de nos produits exigent l'emploi de technologies de pointes, il demeure une part non négligeable de valeur ajoutée apportée par des procédés manufacturés élevant le niveau de qualité de finition et d'esthétisme de nos produits.
En conséquence, notre savoir-faire est attractif en général sur des marchés de luxe tels que la téléphonie, les stylos, la lunetterie ou encore la  joaillerie. 

Chaque composant d'habillage d'une montre nécessite un savoir-faire et une minutie quant à leur finition. Le bracelet caoutchouc n'échappent pas à cette règle. Plusieurs étapes successives sont utiles pour garantir la qualité de nos produits, toutes plus importantes les unes que les autres mais tellement révélatrice du « swiss made » reconnu dans le monde entier.

Cette assurance de la qualité est bien entendue valorisée par des contrôles systématiques à chaque opération.
Notre centre de production est basé en suisse.

Ashleyʼs poetic designs articulate the sensuality of precious, natural stones by the way they catch they light and glisten on an individual, refracting beauty and confidence while ornamenting the body. Ashley’s unique designs communicate the sensuality of rare and unusual stones. She highlights the beauty of natural diamond slices to create a poetic collection, a collection that is inspired by world cultures. The diamond slices tell a story through their simple, yet elegant, beautiful and untouched look. Each tourmaline is rose-cut and serves as the centerpiece of Ashley’s designs, symbolic of the natural world being at the center of all things and all cultures.

Ashley is an artist in the truest sense of the word and her designs are intended for individuals immersed in the art of living who yearn to capture and express their exceptional spirit and beauty. Her ability to capture passion in jewelry stems from her unique gift of translating very real experiences into wearable objects d’art. Each piece is an irreplaceable, one-of-a-kind gem.

The world's biggest jeweller, Pandora, says it will no longer sell mined diamonds and will switch to exclusively laboratory-made diamonds.
