A global fashion destination bringing you a curated selection of stand-out designer brands whose niche products are of the highest quality.

Hiphunters offers an unique and personalised online shopping experience bursting with tips and inspiration and the latest trends fresh from fashion week.

Name: Sorellina
Description: Sorellina is fine jewelry that brings opposing forces together. The result is a dynamic energy achieved through uniting new perspectives. Sorellina is where masculine meets feminine. Where accessible lives next to aspirational. And where vintage design inspires modern design.

Name: TruStyle
Description:
Do you want to have your own jewelry line? Then TruStyle is the right partner for you or your business. Contact us now www.tru-style.com.hk

Over the decades, we have supported many customers to grow their brands by creating jewelry that showcases who they are in a unique way . 

From affordable to luxury jewelry, we designed classic and elegant pieces with eclectic chic vibes that speak directly to a wide array of different audiences. 


All of our designs are customizable to our customer’s needs so they can have a collection that represents entirely their vision and the way they want to be seen by their own customers. 

Each piece is handcrafted by skilled artisans, making every item truly one-of-a-kind.

Name: Cornell's Jewelers
Description:
Ranked by the New York State Jewelers Association as New York State’s Favorite Jewelry Retail Store, Cornell’s Jewelers is Rochester’s fine jewelry destination. Started by Harry Cornell in 1923 and now owned by his son, David, Cornell’s Jewelers features exclusive designs by Hearts on Fire, John Hardy, Chopard, Judith Ripka and more. 
A recipient of various industry awards, Cornell’s Jewelers is a couture store; an honor shared with only 125 stores in the country.

Name: Marbelli S.r.l.
Description: Una ditta a conduzione familiare, composta da tanti giovani, pronti ad affrontare nuove esperienze.

Name: Mark Solomon Jewellers
Description:
Mark Solomon Jewellers is renowned as one of Cape Town’s most distinguished Jewellery Design and Manufacturers of exquisite diamond jewellery using expertly sourced diamonds.

As specialist stockists of investment diamonds and gemstones, Mark Solomon Jewellers offers a wide variety of fairly priced and GIA (Gemological Institute of America) and EGL (European Gemological Laboratory) certified diamonds and other rare gems to suit any occasion and every style.

Mark Solomon Jewellers has over 3 decades of knowledge and expertise and the reflection of this rich history is echoed in our illustrious jewellery. We have a dynamic team of passionate members who maintain our reputable name and consider it an absolute honour to assist and educate our clients in any way we can.

Mark Solomon Jewellers not only has a lavish collection of both exquisitely handcrafted and prêt-à-porter diamond jewellery but also offers you the distinctive opportunity to design your very own.

Our master goldsmiths and jewellery designers are always readily available to custom create an eternally perfect and truly bespoke jewellery piece or engagement ring which is then set with your choice of one or more of our exceptional diamonds. Your beautiful piece is complete within days and is sure to reflect the brilliancy of your love.

Our discerning clients can rest assured that each and every jewellery piece in our showroom is crafted with the greatest care and most refined skill to ensure that it is truly a joy to wear.

Name: Rummele's Jewelers
Description: Family-owned jewelry business focusing on quality and luxury since 1950.  Rummele's of Green Bay & Appleton exclusively represent Swiss watch brands such as Rolex, Cartier, Patek Philippe and Panerai in Northeast Wisconsin as well as high-fashion jewelry lines including David Yurman, Roberto Coin, Mikimoto, Simon G. and Tacori.

Name: Compagnie Financiere Richemont SA
Description: Compagnie Financiere Richemont SA (Richemont) is a Switzerland-based jewelry company. The Company's segments include Jewellery Maisons and Specialist Watchmakers. The Jewellery Maisons segment includes businesses, which are engaged in the design, manufacture and distribution of jewelry products. The businesses include Cartier, Van Cleef & Arpels and Giampiero Bodino. Its Specialist Watchmakers segment includes businesses whose primary activity includes the design, manufacture and distribution of precision timepieces. The businesses in the Watchmakers segment include Piaget, A. Lange & Sohne, Jaeger-LeCoultre, Vacheron Constantin, Officine Panerai, IWC Schaffhausen, Baume & Mercier and Roger Dubuis. The Company's other operating segments include Montblanc, Alfred Dunhill, Chloe, Purdey, Shanghai Tang, Peter Millar, investment property companies and other manufacturing entities.

Name: NASHGEMS
Description:
We are passionate natural gem dealers with direct access to mines in Sri Lanka. We have been in the sapphire industry for over 40 years in Srilanka, with access to mines in Srilanka and Madagascar. Its a family run business currently in 3rd generation. We work around the clock to help you find the gemstone that you're looking for your special occasion.

At Nash Gems we want to provide sapphire and gemstones at affordable prices for a wider market. We are dedicated to providing buyers with that ultimate win-win. Gem trade being the family business for the past 40 years we have access to all kinds of Sapphires. We work directly with gem miners and local gem dealers. We work together to bring you the fairest market value for your valuable items while providing excellent service. 


ABOUT OUR SAPPHIRE AND GEMSTONES
We sell natural earth-mined sapphires. Our stones are either completely untreated in or simply heat-treated using traditional methods. We do not work with beryllium diffused or synthetic stones in any way. 

GEM AND JEWELLERY GUARANTEE
We provide our buyers with full information of our products every step of the way. Our entire process conducted with honesty and transparency, providing detailed updates. All sapphire sold by Nash Gems are issued with a Certificate from an authorized gemologist. We provide well-lit photos, photos from all angles and zoomed video showing all inclusions for the convenience of the buyer too.

We can search sapphires by Colour (hue, tone, and saturation), Cut (Brilliance, Proportions, Polish), Clarity, and last but not least, Carat Weight to help you find exactly what you want.

We do undertake custom jewellery orders for customer preferences. We can set your chosen stone(or stones) in any jewelry design. We work with platinum, palladium, white gold, yellow gold, rose gold, and silver and diamonds too. With attention to detail we manufacture highest quality hand-made jewellery for a fraction of the price.

Name: Romye Paris
Description:
Romye Paris, une marque de bijouterie éthique fabriquée en France. 

Notre mission : porter un regard différent sur le beau en le célébrant loin des standards

Bercés d’audace, et d’authenticité, nous avons pour ambition de créer des pièces à la symbolique forte, des pièces uniques dans leurs irrégularités et leurs symétries imparfaites. Des bijoux à notre image.

Forte de ses valeurs et de sa sensibilité, Romye Paris s’inscrit dans une approche responsable en créant une bijouterie durable utilisant l'or Fairmined. Nos créations sont ainsi désignées et fabriquées de manière artisanale en France, voyant le jour sans saisonnalité, et en nombre limité pour éviter la surproduction.

Name: DiDi Collection
Description:
DiDi collection  is a market-leading designer, manufacturer and retailer of luxury home products. It is Made in Italy and synonymous with a distinctive savior-faire that has embodied excellence in both classic and modern craftsmanship for over 25 years. 

A symbol of the Florentine renaissance, each collection draws from the heritage and values of the Maison, celebrating a modern vision that is constantly reinvented.

Name: Maria Eulália Joias
Description: Joalheira autoral que teve sua história iniciada em 2015 com a ideia de explorar diversas vertentes da arte para criar joias que realçam a beleza de cada mulher. Com design exclusivo, as peças são inspiradas no contraste entre o novo e o velho mundo, fazendo uma releitura moderna do clássico.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: New Line
Description: New Line is a company based out of Greece.

Name: Simon Ardem
Description:
ABOUT US
Simon Ardem is a boutique jeweler house specializing in white and colored diamond jewelry. Our unique collection is the result of the combined talents of our New York based team of designers and highly skilled artisans. With over two generations of experience we’ve established relationships with suppliers around the world, acquiring the finest diamonds for our finished pieces. Our focus is in achieving the finest jewelry through our belief in excellence in design and craftsmanship. Our designs incorporate vibrant natural fancy colored diamonds such as yellow, pink, orange, champagne and green colors.

Name: Airoldi Diamonds
Description:
Presentare le creazioni, uniche e irripetibili, i minerali, le gemme , i gioielli, le pietre preziose è come presentare sé stessi.
Questo avviene quando una società con esperienza trentennale come Airoldi e Facchetti ripone nell’arte orafa, la grande passione per i minerali e le pietre preziose.

Name: The Perfect Impressions Factory
Description:
The Perfect Impressions Factory is a one-of-a-kind luxury gifting experience with a diverse range of exquisite premium products catering to all your lifestyle and gifting needs. A meaningful gift wrapped impeccably is the best way to express your love and build lasting relationships. We offer a wide variety of curated gift items and pre-made hampers that are thoughtfully created, ranging from grooming to wellness, from home décor to pet accessories, from scented candles to office stationaries, from mobile accessories to fashion jewelries and many more to choose from. 
The luxury range of products are curated from across the world with an understanding of the global trends and hence our products have a universal appeal. You can choose from our exclusive range of products or get something unique customized or personalized by us. Be it corporate gifting or personal, we have it all covered – birthdays, baby showers, weddings, anniversaries, official events, festivals or any other social events. 
We have covered every aspect of gifting so that all you need to do is choose a product and leave the presentation and beautification of the gift to us. We have an exclusive collection of gift wrappers, boxes and cases to choose from and our gift-wrapping experts will make your gifts look exquisite. Our motto is to ensure that your buying journey is seamless and you have the ultimate luxury shopping and gifting experience.

Name: Surana Brothers
Description:
Surana Brothers has been an established Diamond Jewellery Manufacturer for over 16 years, while our founders have had over 50 years of accumulated experience in the Diamond and Jewellery industries. With valuable hands-on experience, each member of our corporate family brings us confidence, experience, and a fresh perspective.

Our Headquarters and Distribution Facility is located in Hong Kong and State-of-the-Art Manufacturing Facility in ShenZhen, China. The Manufacturing Facility is spread over 25,000 square feet, and is dedicated to cultivating iconic creations and craftsmanship. With in-house CAD/CAM Facilities, CNC Manufacturing, and dedicated teams, we are able to successfully deliver new samples to clients within 4 weeks.

Name: Long Beach Pearl
Description:
LONG BEACH PEARL
Elegant and luxurious Phu Quoc pearls

Long Beach Group opened the biggest pearl farm in Phu Quoc island with the total area of 30,000 m2. It consists of a museum of 2000 sq.m. of sea species and a center educating about pearl oyster cultivation process instructed by our experts and showroom with more than 1.500 uniquely designed fine jewelries with pearls.
Long Beach Pearl is in co-operation with Kuramoto Pearl Co Ltd in Kobe Japan and Tahiti Pearl Company Ltd in French Polynesia and has brought in research and technology to raise Akoya oysters in Phu Quoc at the same time providing high quality beautiful pearls from our business partners in Japan and Tahiti. 

Long Beach Pearl showroom proudly introduces 5 types of pearls such as Akoya, Tahiti, Mabe, South Sea and freshwater pearls are made into beautifully designed necklaces, bracelets, pendants, rings and earrings as well as a range of ladies watches. All created by Long Beach’s skilled Vietnamese artisans following international design standard in creating beautiful elegant and luxurious pearl jewelries.

Address: 124 Tran Hung Dao, Duong Dong, Phu Quoc, Vietnam
Email: info@longbeachpearl.com
Web: http://longbeachpearl.com

Hotline: 0913 122 090
Please, call to get a free transportation from your hotel to Long Beach Pearl

Name: Busatti Milano
Description:
Busatti Milano was born in the late 1940s, when Antonio Busatti's entrepreneurial spirit encountered the artistic vision of his wife Maria. 
Since then the Maison's passion for the goldsmith's art merges with the magnificence of the most precious gems; while the pairing of heritage and innovation imbues every piece with the Family’s history, an example of the most authentically Italian High-Jewelry. 
Today, Busatti Milano brings its artistic legacy back to life at its private showroom in Palazzo Andreani where one-off High-Jewelry creations are displayed alongside collections that embody the best of Italian artisanship.

Name: Oro Moda Imported Designer Italian Jewelry
Description:
After having worked in Italy for 7 years in the jewelry business for prominent Italian Designer - Roberto Coin I'm now able to bring you quality service, extensive experience/knowledge and greatly discounted prices on all your fine jewelry needs.
Provinding a full extensive jewelry service , including loose diamonds, engagement rings, repairs, custom work and finished designer jewelry at highly discounted prices. For more information see my website at: www.oromodajewelry.com

Name: Kate & Kole
Description:
Kate & Kole was founded in 2015 by two friends, Sara and Madalynne, with the goal of creating sustainable, quality, design-led fine jewellery. What started as a side-project from a home studio in Newcastle, has evolved into a fully-fledged Australian-born ring concierge and jewellery brand, with signature collections, engagement and wedding suites and a custom jewellery design service.

We take pride in using traditional jewellery practices combined with modern technologies, while prioritising customer relationships, offering guidance and education throughout the process. Our mission is to make every customer feel valued, allow them to purchase with confidence, and introduce them to a modern practice of jewellery marking.

From the first consultation to the final product, we strive to provide an enjoyable and memorable experience.

Encapsulating classic style reimagined, Kate & Kole offers timeless fine jewellery centred around quality metals, diamonds and stones.

Name: Charles Arteon Joaillerie
Description:
Fondée en 2022 par Charles Arteon, passionné de pierres précieuses et fines depuis l'enfance, notre maison perpétue un savoir-faire joaillier transmis de père en fils depuis 1848.

Notre engagement : une joaillerie française, éthique et colorée

Dans notre atelier lyonnais, nous créons intégralement vos bijoux sur-mesure et nos collections. 
Ainsi, en maîtrisant chaque étape de la production, nous réduisons le nombre d'intermédiaires pour vous garantir qualité, traçabilité et prix justes.

 Une grande diversité de pierres précieuses et fines : toutes nos pierres sont sélectionnées directement dans les pays producteurs par notre gemmologue pour vous garantir des pierres naturelles et de qualité gemme.
 Or 750 millièmes (18 karats) et platine 950 millièmes recyclé : tous nos bijoux sont confectionnés exclusivement en métal précieux recyclé, issu de vos anciens bijoux ou de notre fondeur certifié.
 Une fabrication 100% française : de la conception à la réalisation, vos bijoux sont façonnés dans nos ateliers lyonnais.

Nos services
 Création sur-mesure : bagues de fiançailles, alliances personnalisées, chevalières, pendentifs, bracelets, ...
 Transformation de bijoux anciens
 Collections Charles Arteon aux lignes délicates et intemporelles
 Réparation et restauration de bijoux
 Expertise gemmologique

Découvrez nos créations précieuses sur notre site ou sur nos réseaux sociaux !

Name: Mahabir Danwar Jewellers
Description:
Mahabir Danwar Jewellers (P) Ltd (MDJ), Kolkata was founded by Late Shri Mahabir Prasad Soni in 1970 and is currently being managed by his son, Shri Binod Kumar Soni and grandsons Shri Vijay, Arvind, Amit, and Sandeep.
MDJ is in manufacturing, wholesale and retail of exquisite handcrafted gold, diamond, Kundan and fusion designer jewellery. MDJ speciality is its fabulous Bridal jewellery Design. MDJ has won more than 15 national jewellery award for quality and design and have been nominated more than 30 times. MDJ has developed the strong bond with its customer based on consistence performance, impeccable quality, transparency, timely and prompt service.
We have also introduced MDJ, MAHIRA- The Bridal Jewellery couture which is an Bridal Jewellery Boutique at City Centre 1 . The Beauty of MAHIRA collection lies in the uniqueness of its design and natural sparkle set in distinctive creations.
MDJ has presence in 3 places first Flagship store & Head Office at City Centre 1 Mall, Salt Lake, Kolkata’s most preferred shopping destination and second branch in Kolkata’s commercial center, Burrabazar & third one Mahabir Danwar Jewellers in the Capital city - Delhi.

Name: CronotempVs Collectors
Description:
CronotempVs Collectors are collectors/enthusiast/amateurs dedicated to the pursuit to inform and share the passion of horology. CronotempVs Collectors works hand in hand with some of the most important historic brands and independents that uphold the highest traditional horological values. Our international quorum includes; Holland, Germany, United States, Mexico, China, Philippines, Hong Kong, Singapore, Russia, Belgium, Portugal, Switzerland, Canada, Australia, Spain…

Amongst others, those brands have already collaborated with us are; A. Lange & Söhne, Audemars Piguet, Breguet, Cartier “Haute Horlogerie”, Chopard, D.Dornbüth & Sohn, , Frank Muller, Habring², IWC, Jaeger LeCoultre, L.U.Chopard, Montblanc “Nicolas Rieussec”, Piaget, RESSENCE, Speake-Marin, Ulysse Nardin, URWERK, WEMPE “Chronometerwerke”…

Name: Sami Watches and Jewellery
Description:
It was in 1991 that Sami Watches and Jewellery was founded at Galleria Ataköy, the first modern shopping mall in Turkey. It has been providing its customers with a combination of price, fine selection and impeccable service for over 20 years. After being ten years in business, the launch of its second and third location in Nisantasi, helped many brands establish in Istanbul. Adding the best and the most prestigious watch brands to its scope of supply, such as Rado or Sevenfriday, our latest additions to our stores, has expanded the collection gradually. 

Today, more than twenty years later, we are proud that Sami is one of the leading companies of the watch and jewellery retail sector in Turkey. It is known well beyond the borders of Turkey as it stands for the highest level of quality and service. We have ensured that every encounter with our customers is memorable and robust, with our service concept.  

All this success is all thanks to our diverse staff that strives to provide consistent quality service and astute expertise. Their love of precious materials and company loyalty are exemplary. But also due to our superlative-quality choices, comprising almost 5.000 different items, with a stunning collection of the finest diamonds, gems, fine jewellery, timepieces, and gifts & accessories.

Name: Parque Joyero Jeweler Park Cordoba (PJJPC)
Description:
Parque Joyero Jeweller Park Cordoba is by far the largest Jewellery design & manufacturing site in Europe. With more than 300 brands/companies working together from Cordoba, this is by far a hub for retailers wishing to seek for brands. 
We also have Exhibitions centre's, 300 brand showrooms to demonstrate our design and manufacturing capabilities. Parque Joyero consists of over 200,000 Sq Metres of manufacturing and design facilities.

Name: OGI Systems LTD
Description:
OGI Systems Group is the leading global company for diamond technology tools, providing smart solutions for every stage of the diamond’s manufacturing, grading and marketing since 1990.

Our mission is to supply the most advanced technological tools to the diamonds industry by a strong emphasis on innovation as well as continuous improvement of existing technology in order to suit customer needs.

Our brand products are designed to provide solutions in 6 main areas: 
•	Rough planning for the optimal yield
•	Rough marking for sawing and polishing
•	Portable rough analyzing for evaluation of rough diamonds
•	Rough sawing and shaping of regular and Polaris diamonds
•	Polished grading for measuring, cut- grading and re- cutting
•	Inscribing on polished diamonds for any conceivable purpose

Our internationally marketed systems and solutions are user-friendly and harmonized with our professional support teams. Contact your local representative today for your diamond tools needs.

Name: DANNY WISE
Description:
DANNY WISE is a private Italian house of High Fashion and Extra Luxury, founded in Milan in 1992 is named by the founder N.H. Danny Wise. 
Specializing in High Fashion and Extra Luxury World leader, the Luxury Cultured that Danny Wise has invented. Brand Danny Wise has become one of the most recognizable names in fashion in only 31 years, favorite by international and very sophisticated clientele, loving the Best.
DANNY WISE  offers a broad range of high-end creations, including Extra Luxury, Haute Fourrure, Haute Couture,  Couture, Boutique line, Free time, Leather Accessory, Texile Accessory, Home,  that creating, developing, manufacturing and distributing products oll over the World.
BRAND PHILOSOPHY
The mission of Maison DANNY WISE is to play a leading role in the world of Extra Luxury and Haute Couture through the high quality and refinement of its world-class base products, used for our creations, and through our hospitality, as well as the care and selection of our staff based on great talent, fairness, integrity, loyalty, and professional rigor. Our Suppliers and Manufacturers, too, are committed to providing added passion and motivation to serve the high global profile of our Maison.
PRESIDENT and DESIGNER
Living Legend of World Extra Luxury and High Fashion  N.H. DANNY WISE 
for Vogue Among the 5 Top Models in the World until 1992, the only man in the world to have been in Vogue first as a Model and then as a Designer.
for FORBES among the 50 hot MAN on the PLANET, Sex Simbol, Enfant Prodige of the Exclusive and enchanted World of Luxury,
Danny Wise "The Man Who Created and Defined the Concept of the Extraordinary in the World of Extra Luxury." N.H. Danny Wise Stylist, Designer, and also Director. 360 Degree Artist, Cultured Man, highly refined, cosmopolitan and polyglot, acute observer and builder of both very important forms and contents, where no detail is ever left to chance, He Himself is a genius for many, for some already a Myth.

Name: Roman and Jules by Inc.
Description: Naturally colored yellow diamonds serve as the centerpieces of Roman + Jules Inc., delivering jewelry that is beautiful, bold, and dare we say, nontraditional. From pendants to rings, and everything in between, this collection is all you need to make a statement at any occasion.

Name: CAPOLAVORO GmbH
Description:
JEWELLED PASSION - DIE PHILOSOPHIE VON CAPOLAVORO
Kreationen von CAPOLAVORO sind ein unvergleichliches Kompliment an die Schönheit der Frau. 
Geschaffen aus reiner Leidenschaft. Ohne die es kein Meisterwerk geben kann. 

CAPOLAVORO ist eine der führenden deutschen Schmuckmanufakturen mit Sitz nahe München 
und seit der Gründung 1991 ein familiengeführtes Unternehmen.

JEWELLED PASSION - THE PHILOSOPHY OF CAPOLAVORO
Creations by CAPOLAVORO are an incomparable compliment to a woman’s beauty. 
Forged from pure passion, the life force behind any masterpiece. 

CAPOLAVORO is one of the leading German jewellery manufacturer based near Munich. 
Since the foundation 1991 Capolavoro remains a family-run company.

Name: Tohum Design
Description:
Tohum is born out of a deep passion for the simplest forms of beauty. ‘Tohum’, means seed in Turkish. It symbolizes the idea of a seed brimming with life and ready to flourish in nature. Tohum celebrates every seed’s unique natural beauty with expressive design, and creates entirely personal pieces of expression. Tohum’s aesthetic is free and fluid; revealing the original beauty of natural stones and materials creating pure organic shapes and structures. Verda Alaton has created Tohum out of her lifelong passion for natural beauty and her fascination with exotic and ethnic cultures. In 2009, she launched Tohum Design: bringing to life her unique perspective on simplicity and expressiveness with a passionate belief. Tohum Design is the contemporary interpretation of that eternal and coherent beauty. Each creation is singular in both beauty and uniqueness. To remain close to nature as possible is the ultimate goal of Tohum Design. 

Every piece in Tohum collection is unique and has been thoughtfully categorized by materials, inspiration and vision. Every Tohum is a bespoke handcrafted design using traditional techniques; adorning humanity in a way nature had always intended. Tohum uses all natural materials including, crystals, wood, shells, meteorites and seeds. 

Tohum Design is available at respectable online and physical Boutiques around the world. Net-A-Porter, Browns Fashion, MyTheresa.com, ModaOperandi, Barneys NY, Modist, Harvey Nichols Doha, is some of them. 

Also available in boutiques in Australia, Lebanon, Israel, Germany, Luxembourg, South Korea, Japan, Belgium, Denmark and Switzerland.

The latest collections can be seen at www.tohumdesign.com and on instagram.

Name: Lang Antique and Estate Jewelry
Description: Since 1969, Lang Antiques and Estate Jewelry has been a landmark in San Francisco's Union Square shopping district.  The company is recognized internationally as having the largest collection of fine antique and vintage jewelry in the United States, all curated by our staff of credentialed jewelry historians and gemological experts.

Name: Meister 1881 AG
Description:
Zu «Meister 1881» gehören zwei Geschäfte in Zürich:
«Meister 1881 Juwelier & Uhren» – das exklusive Haus für Juwelen, Uhren und Schmuck sowie
«Meister 1881 Silber & Tafelkultur» – das bezaubernde Fachgeschäft für Silber und die gehobene Lebensart.
Ebenso sind drei Ateliers Teil von «Meister 1881»: das Goldschmiede-, das Silberschmiede- und das Uhrenatelier, wo die hohe
Kunst des Handwerks inmitten der Stadt Zürich gepflegt wird und einzigartige Schmuckkollektionen sowie hochwertige Silberwaren der «Meister 1881 Collection» von Hand gefertigt werden. Ein wichtiges Standbein ist die Gemmologie mit kostbaren und raren Farbedelsteinen.
«Meister 1881» gehört seit 2025 zum Modeunternehmen Akris in St. Gallen.

Name: W&W Jewellery
Description:
W&W Jewellery is a bespoke jewellery boutique based in Battersea. With a penchant for the extraordinary, W&W combine exceptional design and impeccable craftsmanship to deliver an unforgettable bespoke jewellery experience.

By appointment only, W&W welcome customers to their Battersea studio or at location to suit them. 

For more information visit www.wandwjewellery.com.

Name: Laatukoru Oy
Description:
Laatukoru - Suomalaista kultasepäntyötä parhaimmillaan

Laatukoru on vuonna 1976 perustettu koru- ja kelloalan perheyritys. Laatukorulle myönnettiin Valtakunnallinen yrittäjäpalkinto vuonna 2009.

Vahvuuksiamme on mm. oma valmistus: Silván-timanttikorut on suunniteltu suomalaisille naisille ja miehille. Ne ovat kauniita, korkealuokkaisia ja tyyliltään joko moderneja ta klassisia kotimaisia koruja. Valmistuksessa käytetään ainoastaan parhaita materiaaleja: 14 tai 18 karaatin kelta-, valko- tai rosekultaa tai platinaa sekä huippuluokkaisia timantteja. Mallisto on laaja ja koostuu pääosin sormuksista, korvakoruja ja riipuksia kuitenkaan unohtamatta. Silván-timanttikoruilla on suomalainen Avainlippu-tunnus.

Tuotevalikoimaamme kuuluu omien timanttikorujemme lisäksi mm. kotimaiset Kalevala Koru, Lapponia ja Lumoava tuotemerkit sekä kansainvälisistä brändeistä mm. Zenith, Omega, Tag Heuer, Corum, Raymond Weil, Rado, Longines, Tissot, Gucci, Swarovski sekä monet muut tunnetut koru- ja kellobrändit!

Yritysmyynnistämme saat ostettua joko tunnettujen valmistajien tuotteita tai toteuttaa omalla verstaallamme uniikkeja lahjoja. Olemme valmistaneet asiakasyrityksillemme esimerkiksi yksilöllisiä sormuksia, kalvosinnappeja, riipuksia, pinssejä ja solmionpitimiä kullasta tai hopeasta. Yhtenä erikoisuutena teemme myös urheiluseuroille mestaruussormuksia tai muita koruja sekä fanituotteita.

Name: L'Opticienne Verte
Description:
L’Opticienne Verte est une marque engagée de lunettes fabriquées à la main en France, avec des formes intemporelles, de qualité, et surtout qui durent longtemps.

Fabriquées à Oyonnax, au cœur des montagnes du Jura, avec des  matériaux durables, nos lunettes sont confortables, esthétiques, locales et accessibles à tous.

Biosourcées - Biodégradables - Recyclées - Recyclables.

Name: World Gold Junction Private Limited
Description:
In India, jewellery has many uses. 

It is an investment. Stridhan is the gold and jewellery that a Hindu woman takes with her to her parents’ home. 

It is an announcement. It signals to the community that the wearer has now arrived, that he has achieved something and would like the world to know it.

It is a witness. Gold dances in the fire that is the sakshi, the witness, to every celebration, every festival, and every rite of passage. Gold seals the deal, gold anneals families.

It is a cultural symbol. How you wear your jewellery, when you wear it and where, is often a signifier of your status and your community. 

It is adornment, it is ornament…

It is not a luxury. It is what we do. It is who we are. It is what we do. Our art and our sculpture pay careful attention to the details of the human body and the jewellery that covers it. 

We are the nation that consumes the most gold in the world.   

India is the World Gold Junction.

World Gold Junction is India.

Name: Nigel O'Reilly Goldsmith
Description:
Nigel O'Reilly is an established high-jewellery designer and goldsmith based in the West of Ireland. Each item of O’Reilly’s high jewellery is designed and created in-house sourcing only the highest quality certified gemstones and fair-mined gold. The company has trained its own staff in areas of goldsmithing and diamond setting making this studio one of the best in Europe for its level of in-house expertise. Nigel’s background originally started in the world of precision-engineering, creating vascular surgical devices and that career developed into a love for shaping metals and creating unusual pieces of ‘wearable-art’.

O’Reilly’s work is defined by the blending of ancient and modern techniques in his own inimitable style, complete with vibrant and voracious quantities of coloured gemstones. His recognizable gold latticework is a signature of the brand, as are generous volumes and undulating shapes. Clients who enjoy these calling cards are those who return time and time again for bespoke pieces. O’Reilly works only to technical perfection, using both innovative technology and ancient tradition to ensure that every angle of every piece is open to microscopic scrutiny.

O’Reilly’s reputation for its artistic masterpieces has gleaned numerous accolades in previous years; from international features in publications such as FORBES US, The New York Times, The Financial Times, ELLE USA and Town and Country Magazine; Nigel O'Reilly’s High Jewellery collection has been worn by celebrities such as Hailee Steinfeld, Maya Hawke, Julianne Moore, Saoirse Ronan and more. Working with international bodies, his collections have been showcased at The Dubai Expo, The Florida Palm Beach Show, along with sales and exhibitions through Sotheby’s New York, Sotheby’s Los Angeles, and within the exclusive Jewellery Rooms of Bergdorf Goodman, Manhattan, New York, the pinnacle of US luxury.

Name: Полюс, ЗАО
Description:
Красноярская бизнес-единица ОАО «Полюс Золото», в лице ЗАО «Полюс», является ведущим добывающим подразделением компании и крупнейшим золотодобывающим предприятием в России.
Основную деятельность Красноярской бизнес-единицы составляет разработка Олимпиадинского месторождения. Руда с месторождения поступает для переработки на Олимпиадинский ГОК, где впервые в России в промышленных масштабах была внедрена технология биоокисления.

В настоящий момент Красноярская бизнес-единица обеспечивает до 75% от суммарного объема производства золота Группы.
Помимо добывающих карьеров и Олимпиадинского ГОКа в состав Красноярской бизнес-единицы ОАО "Полюс Золото" входит геологоразведочная партия. Она ведет разведочные работы, направленные на уточнение запасов, на месторождениях Благодатное, Титимухта, Оленье, Кварцевая Гора, а также на Панимбинском рудном узле, Зыряновской и Раздолинской площадях.
С 2004 г. в рамках Красноярской бизнес-единицы был создан и развивается исследовательский центр в составе 6 лабораторий для научного и технологического обеспечения проектов ОАО «Полюс Золото» на всей территории России.

Name: Proudstone Jewelry DK

Vores smykker repræsenterer et øjeblik, et minde, en situation eller andet, som er noget helt særligt, i netop dit liv.

De er et symbol noget, som du er stolt af, og som du dermed kan bære med dig som et synligt symbol i form af vores fantastiske smykker.

Description:

We still use time-honoured tools and pay particular attention to our heritage so that we are always in a position to consider our clients' requests.

We can do anything from simple repairs on-site to complicated custom designs and delicate restorations.  We also have a full service gem lab that does while-you-wait appraisals, estate valuations and brokering of gem stones and diamonds.  We have two on-site Rolex watchmakers that will do simple battery replacements or full service watch restorations.  Whether it is a jewellery or watch-related service you require or are wanting to purchase a new piece of jewellery we are certainly worth the visit. 


 If it's different it's from HOWARD.

Our full service facility of highly trained staff includes Bench Jewelers on the premises, Diamond Setters, and GIA certified Graduate Gemologists. We offer the latest in technological advancements including laser repair, engraving, and Computer Aided Design enhancement, as we pride ourselves in customized design services and reputable service repairs.

Try us just once...you'll be a customer for life!

Name: Dietlin Swiss Showcases
Description:
Xavier Dietlin couldn’t be more natural. From his origins in the Swiss Jura, he has retained a straightforward character, a warm spontaneity and a rebellious streak. Born into a family that had long specialized in the metal construction industry, this former footballer with unrivaled energy who adores challenges and innovation, worked with his brother and sister. For Xavier, who seems favored by the gods, the dream became reality. In just a decade, he developed a cutting-edge segment of the metal construction industry: showcases. 
The company made its key breakthrough in 2005 on behalf of Hublot, with the Raptor display case with no glass that is nevertheless secure: through the use of sensors, the object on show is retracted into the base of the case in only a few tenths of a second as soon as a foreign body comes near.

While the major watch brands quickly acknowledged his talent, globally renowned designers and architects, such as Peter Marino, also began calling on his expertise on a regular basis.
Major multinationals such as Mercedes Benz, Philip Morris, Huawei and such famous museums as the MoMa in New York followed suit, tasking him with creating increasingly avant-garde solutions. 

Loathing hierarchies, he creates direct and personal relationships with his customers. For this creator of surprises, every means is good for attracting attention: intriguing, challenging, amusing… even annoying. As long as the potential buyer stops and is drawn to the object lying there in its case. 

Today, the company, with a staff of ten, is renowned worldwide for inventing and producing the most innovative, cutting-edge display cases.

Xavier Dietlin has a gift for transforming the conventional into the exceptional. Every day, he is amazed by the unsuspected possibilities offered by technology. 
At the end of the day, the main thing is to retain his inner child, for whom play is the watchword of life. 

By Bernadette Richard (Le Temps magazine)

Strumenti preziosi che ci hanno permesso di “conquistare“ la fiducia dei clienti e di soddisfare con efficacia le richieste del mercato ed i gusti dei consumatori.

Name: Abby Sparks Jewelry
Description:
Founded in 2013, Denver-based fine jewelry design studio, Abby Sparks Jewelry, sets the standard for the custom fine jewelry experience. Specializing in handmade, one-of-a-kind custom engagement rings, unique wedding rings and heirloom diamond upcycling, Abby Sparks Jewelry strives to create jewelry that honors individuality and defines personal expression. All Abby Sparks jewelry is handmade and custom designed in Denver, Colorado using 100% recycled metals, appealing to those in search ofperfect, unique jewelry  and in need of assistance and undivided attention throughout the jewelry design process. Every piece of fully custom jewelry that Abby Sparks Jewelry designs offers the highest degree of unsurpassed quality and craftsmanship. 
 
Raised amongst the vast farmlands of Oklahoma, Abby’s fascination with jewelry began at a young age, playing with endless shelves of beads and artifacts at her Native American grandmother’s home. Her education and years in career consultancy took Abby around the world, from Dubai and Spain to Chile and Bolivia, Throughout her travels, Abby spent years gathering inspiration from various cultures and styles, all the while designing jewelry in her spare time.
 
After deciding that a career change was in order, Abby moved to Colorado and received her MBA from the University of Denver,finally taking the leap to turn her dream of becoming a fine jewelry designer into a viable business. A true jewelry architect, Abby is not only a creative force but also a strong-minded businesswoman, qualities that her countless clients love and appreciate.

A Few Words About
ALVEARE CHIN
Jadeite is the rarest descendant of Jade, the treasure of the Celestial Empire of ancient China- it is this rare treasure, with the culture, rituals and traditions around it that Alveare Chin strives to revive and bring together spirituality, alchemy and unity.

Jadeite has carried with it a power to resonate with souls and served as a catalyst to achieve unity with the universe. This virtue of connection that Jadeite possesses, finds itself consolidating not only individuals, but also empires, cultures, and traditions. When we look into history, there was a Jade Road 6 six thousand years ago that set the foundation for the birth of the famous Silk Road.
Our vision as a brand is established upon this global phenomena of connection, and Alveare Chin strives to open the cultural gates, connecting the east and the west, to foster a spiritual Renaissance.

Description:
Diamond Corporation, South Africa, a member of Louie Daniele Diamond Group International, is a specialist diamond and jewellery enterprise which offers trend setting design, quality craftsmanship and certified conflict-free diamonds direct to the public from the factory. 

DCSA dates back to 1998 when it was founded as a diamond cutting company. As outflow, two brothers, Louis and Daniel Paulus united and established Diamond Corporation, South Africa.

Recognising its passion for diamonds in jewellery, DCSA initiated its jewellery manufacturing division in 2004 and soon became a leading re-seller and manufacturer of high quality exclusive jewellery.

In 2004, the Louie Daniele brothers opened their first wholesale showroom and in 2012 they established a public outlet, The Diamond Store, at Lynnwood Bridge in Pretoria East, which gave their clients access to rare high value commodity at reduced prices directly from their factory division. 

Family owned, the brothers have a hands-on approach and they employ a corporate culture which holds a high regard for its family-like customers. They aim to make every encounter a personal experience.

DCSA offers loose certified diamonds, graded by independent grading laboratories GIA, EGL and the like. All diamonds offered are certified "Conflict Free".

DCSA also offers a specialised diamond cutting service to its clients, as well as a custom design jewellery service on request. Please contact sales@diamondcorporation.co.za or dial 086-110-6186 for more information. 

Receive free shipping and a 7-Day returns guarantee to make sure you are satisfied with your purchase. All DCSA manufactured metal products & natural diamonds are warranted for life.

Name: Opalia Fine Jewelry
Description: Opalia creations can be defined as intense and flamboyant, not only because we continuously jet set around the world in search for refinement, also due to the fact that during the course of our trips we experiment many forms of expression: cinema, theatre, music, sculpture and last but not least, Sculptural Jewelry. We study carefully one medium at a time, discovering all of its secrets and features. Experimentation and research of different materials during our career are valid of exposure; rosewood, ebony, silicon, ivory, silver, coral and many variations of precious metals and gems. The resulting objets d'art are jewels that give the impression of a miniature universe; an “alloy” that is home to original artifacts inspired from various backgrounds and from different parts of the world, as showcased by “The Rhyton”. A blend of different techniques where our admiration for art design of the past, all that is ancient or even primordial reflected through our creations. Then the revelation: Black opal. The most precious type of this gemstone, so rare and so spectacular, is found in Australia in the famous deposits of Lightning Ridge in northern New South Wales. It is here we select the most beautiful pieces and it is no coincidence that in 2001 Paolo Labianco owner of Opalia won the second prize in the Opal Jewelry Design Awards Association, the world's most important competition of jewelry designers reserved to opals; with his sculptural jewel titled “miner’s spirit”.

Name: PRJKT8
Description:
Welcome to PRJKT8 - where timepieces meet originality in Bahrain!   Why 'PRJKT8', you ask?  Well, it's a nod to our beginnings and the watch brand from Zurich that inspired us. And the '8'?  That’s the magic number of years it took to turn our dream into ticking reality.

At PRJKT8, we're not your run-of-the-mill watch store.  Far from it!  We're the proud curators of independent watchmakers, showcasing their genius in our unique space.  Our team?  Oh, a mighty crew of timepiece enthusiasts, dedicated to guiding you to your perfect wrist companion.

Whether you're taking your first steps into the world of watches or you're a seasoned collector hunting for that rare find, we've got you covered.  Our collection ranges from the accessible chic to the top of independent haute horology.  It's all about the experience here, not the price tag.

Join us on this horological journey at PRJKT8, where every tick and tock tells a story, and every watch is a conversation starter.  Let's find the timepiece that doesn't just tell time, but also tells your story.

Name: Polly's Fine Jewelry
Description: We are Charleston’s largest local jeweler, with three convenient locations across the Lowcountry, in North Charleston, Summerville, and Mount Pleasant. Since we opened over 30 years ago, Polly and Richard and the entire Polly’s Fine Jewelry family have set out to offer the finest jewelry for every occasion, every celebration, and every budget. We are where Charleston gets engaged, and today we specialize in certified, hand-selected loose diamonds and the finest designer bridal lines like Tacori and Gabriel & Co. so that we can help you choose and customize the perfect engagement ring. We also carry a full selection of classic and contemporary fine jewelry for every event or occasion, from essentials like diamond stud earrings and diamond tennis bracelets, to an array of colorful gemstones like sapphires, emeralds, rubies, pearls, amethysts, opals, and more! We feature luxury Swiss timepieces by TAG Heuer, along with classic watches by Citizen and Luminox. We also love fashion and continually bring in the latest trends and hottest designs from fashion leaders like Gabriel&Co and Michele Watches. And since Charleston is so close to our heart, we always feature a large selection of Charleston Gate jewelry, celebrating the city we love. At Polly’s, we know finding the perfect piece of jewelry is just the beginning. We have experienced jewelers in house, providing expert jewelry service and repair, so you know your treasure will be cared for long after it’s purchased. We offer in-house watch repair, appraisal services by GIA-trained staff, and custom jewelry design. When you’re cleaning out your jewelry box or need some extra cash, we gladly buy old, used or broken gold, sterling, platinum and diamonds in a safe and professional environment you know you can trust. Above all, we’re here to help, with a gift, a treat, a repair, or just a question. The most important thing to us is you. Thank you for making our family a part of your celebrations for more than 35 years.

Name: Myka Designs Inc
Description:
Since our inception in 1987 'Myka' has become one of the most prominent fashion jewellery collections in Canada, known for our innovative design and impeccable quality our collection features Swarovski Crystals, beads, pearls and semi precious stones. 

Drawn together during their Bachelor of Applied Arts Degree studies at
Toronto’s Ryerson Polytechnical Institute, Maja Ilic and Michael Bremer
recognized their common appreciation for innovative design and natural
business talents as a recipe for success. Combining Michael’s passion
for quality workmanship and Maja’s love of design, the couple’s dream
became a reality with the debut of the Myka Designs collection in 1987,
 when they turned their hobby into a part time business. 

 Upon graduation in 1991, Maja and Michael pursued their vision
to develop Myka into a full time business. The years to follow saw
Myka Designs sold at notable retailers such as Holt Renfrew and
Nordstrom’s and distribution in the UK, Germany and Russia.

In 1996 Maja and Michael moved their business ‘home’ to the west coast
of Canada. Today, ‘Myka’ is proudly designed and produced at the Myka
Designs Inc. head o¬ffice and production studio in beautiful Vancouver,
Canada.

Innovative design, clever engineering and impeccable quality have been
the cornerstone of Myka. Each piece of jewellery is hand made to ensure the
 quality synonymous with the Myka Designs label.
Collection after collection, Maja and Michael faithfully envision, draft and
sculpt each piece of jewellery from concept to finished product.
‘Swarovski’ crystals, semi-precious stones, combined with a breathtaking
variety of glass and crystal beads, enhance each signature piece.

 Living their ‘dream’ and energized by the success of Myka, Maja and Michael
 celebrate their journey and look forward to the future.

www.mykadesigns.com

Name: CICCARELLI STUDIO
Description:
CICCARELLI French Fashion Brand / French artiste / Jewels & Accessoires / Art / Upcycling / Handmade/ Limited series
Issue d'une famille de pêcheurs, VALERIE CICCARELLI est née à Marseille le 8 mars 1969 dans l'un des plus vieux quartiers de la ville « Le Panier ». 
Valérie Ciccarelli, scénographe, plasticienne, designer au parcours transversal est une artiste rebelle dont le travail de la matière ne se conçoit que dans son rapport avec l'espace.
 Elle joue de ses talents en abordant le théâtre de rue, la décoration, le cinéma et la Publicité, mais aussi une dizaine d’années dans de grandes maisons de mode, comme GIANFRANCO FERRE à Paris, Marseille et à l’international.
 En 2009, elle crée sa marque de bijoux, CICCARELLI JEWELS,
« Made in Marseille », des bijoux d’Art destinés à sublimer le corps 
: des bijoux volubiles qui s’expriment avec la gestuelle, jouant et épousant la silhouette au fil des heures et selon l’imagination. Des créations qui peuvent devenir XXL et métamorphoser un espace intérieur comme extérieur.
En 2015 Valérie Ciccarelli élargit sa ligne de Bijoux et Parures Ciccarelli jewels avec une ligne de Maroquinerie et de Sac Bijoux : Sa création phare / Le SMILE BAG, un sac en Agneau plongé souple avec chaine bijoux amovible et cottes de maille Inox. 
Une pochette fonctionnelle multi-position et personnalisable,    5 formats, plusieurs coloris ou customisé par l’Artiste. Tout en poursuivant ses collaborations, partenariats et expositions durant les Fashions Week
Parisienne, elle ne lâche pas ses premières amours, la décoration et la mise en scène d’expositions, dans son Showroom-Atelier de 120 m2 situé dans l’immeuble de Mr Le Corbusier, à MARSEILLE, non loin du MAMO d’Orai
Ito . 
Dans son parcours éclectique affleurent comme une obsession les mêmes axes de travail : la couleur et la non couleur, le recyclage ou le détournement d'objets et de matériaux et plus généralement les matières brutes et rock, l’art «SANS BARRIERE» dans la mode et le design.

Name: Authentical Semijoias
Description:
Há 23 anos, a nossa fundadora Nara Cristina Palma da Silva, com muita coragem se desligou do emprego que estava fazia 20 anos, e resolveu empreender. No ano de 2000, a primeira loja foi inaugurada no interior do supermercado Nacional, na zona norte de Pelotas, o espaço físico era pequeno mas havia um grande potencial e vontade de crescer. Assim, com muito amor ao trabalho e dedicação iniciou a história da empresa.

Os anos passaram, a empresa se reestruturou, aperfeiçoou e renovou a dinâmica de trabalho com a sucessão da empresa, a gestão comercial pertence à Priscila Palma da Silva e a gestão de marketing fica a cargo de Bruna Palma da Silva, filhas de Nara Cristina. Durante todos esses anos o trabalho sempre foi feito com respeito e amor, estes talvez sejam motivos do sucesso da marca. Atualmente o nosso quadro de funcionários é composto por 23 pessoas que juntas lutam pelo mesmo objetivo: fortalecer a confiança dos clientes através de acessórios!

Quem somos?

Somos a maior loja de SemiJoias multicanais do sul do brasil.

O que vendemos?

Confiança e autoestima através de acessórios.

O nome: Authentical vem de autenticidade, nossa marca busca sempre ser autêntica, seja nas tomadas de decisões, produtos ou abordagens de vendas.


SEDE - Rua Barão de Azevedo, 454 - Centro, Pelotas, Brazil.

Name: Boyarde Art House
Description:
Boyarde art house is redefining luxury and wearable art. Our Creative Director, Boyarde Messenger, and her team of highly skilled artisans create unique hand-painted pieces across a variety of canvasses including the female body, murals, and luxury fashion accessories. We stand out for our creativity, craftsmanship and rarity.

Founder Boyarde Messenger is a world-renowned British artist whose creative origins lie in her fascination with the power of the female form and the pleasure of looking: Scopophilia. She was the first to pioneer the fashion art movement and create art for people to wear or collect. 

Every commission is crafted with individual attention from start to finish in the Boyarde workshop in London using our proprietary techniques. Your experience is discreet and personal. We work with you to make a statement, to reinterpret your imagination and personal journey into Boyarde's signature blend of wit, playfulness, reality and dreams.

If you consider one of our acclaimed bag commissions, our craftsmen spend at least 36 hours working on a single piece and more than 100 hours for select commissions. This compares to an average of 18 hours the most prestigious luxury brands spend to produce one handbag. 

Boyarde collectors are found in all corners of the globe. Previous gallery exhibitions include The Saatchi Gallery London, Cork Street, Miami Wynwood and The Hamptons. Our work has featured in The Financial Times and FT How to Spend It, American Vogue, Elle USA, Elle China, Sunday Times Style, Evening Standard, Harpers Bazaar Singapore, L’Officiel Indonesia and The Independent. Boyarde has also appeared on BBC World News, BBC Radio and BBC 3’s Russell Howard’s Good News.

Name: B. Virani & Co.
Description:
For over 50 years, B. Virani & Co. has been consistently improving and perfecting the art of diamond cutting and polishing with deep passion and integrity. Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility cuts and polishes over 22,000 carats of rough diamonds every month resulting in an overall monthly production of over 200,000 diamonds. 

At B. Virani & Co., we follow a unique "3P: People, Product and Price"  model to strive for excellence every day, practicing persistent innovation and unflinching dedication. 

Always keeping our "People", our employees, business partners and customers our main priority, we aim for meeting and exceeding their expectations by operating ethically and reliably. Leading with ingenious innovation and state-of-the-art technology, we efficiently manufacture our "Product", diamonds that primarily range from 0.01 to 1.5 carats. Tracing each diamond and managing all resources economically using our ERP System, we make sure the competitive "Price" of our product always offers the maximum value to both our business partners and end customers.

Our Mission 

To our valued suppliers of rough diamonds: our mission is to efficiently and ethically maximize production of polished diamonds every year by providing competitive labour prices, maintaining on-schedule deliveries of polished diamonds and following principles of corporate social responsibility and the Kimberly Process.

To our valued customers: our mission is to guarantee maximum satisfaction with the purchase of each stone and to provide the best quality diamond in terms of cut, carat, clarity and colour for its price. 

Our Vision

B. Virani & Co.'s vision is to become the world's leading diamond cutting and polishing company by implementing innovative management ideas as well as manufacturing technologies, and by expanding its global operations through diversification and strategic alliances with leading companies in the industry from rough diamonds to retail.

Name: Sheridan Kennedy Jewellery
Description:
Sheridan Kennedy's jewellery is founded on 30 years of designing artistic jewellery for clients in Australia and around the world. She now specialises in custom design pieces that capture the energetic beauty and personal vision of the wearer.

Her creative approach to design incorporates both PhD research into the body intelligence, and 20 years of astrological practice.  
This enables her to synthesize knowledge from diverse sources to catalyse her clients access their own innate wisdom and presence.

A BRIEF HISTORY:
After an Australia Council residency in Barcelona she co-founded the design collaboration Princess Produce with Tom Burless and Bridie Lander in 1995. Their Lunge lamp won the inaugural Sydney Morning Herald Young Designer of the Year award in 1996. 

In 1997 she began to study astrology with a particular focus on Psychology Astrology & Evolutionary Astrology.

With a passion for costume, it was a natural progression for Sheridan to produce jewellery for fashion designers. These have included collaborations with Akira, Michelle Jank and Justine Taylor where she created jewellery with Autore South Sea Pearls for their parades at Australian Fashion Week. 

Design commissions have varied from large-scale public artwork to personal tokens such as engagement rings, and her work has been exhibited around Australia and in China, Japan, the UK and USA. 
Her artwork is in the permanent collections of the National Gallery of Australia, the Art Galleries of Western Australia, South Australia and Queensland, and Sydney's Powerhouse Museum.

In 2003 Sheridan participated in the UK/Australia HAT exchange project and received the Australia Council New York studio residency. 

In 2009 she completed her PhD in creative art which focuses on theories of the new materialism and leading edge research into consciousness.

Name: Weltzeituhr Berlin
Description:
Die WELTZEITUHR am Alexanderplatz

Designikone und zeitgeschichtliches Denkmal.
1969 zum 20 Jährigen Jubiläum der DDR am Alex errichtet.
Designed by Prof. E. John.

Sie steht für Weltoffenheit und ist bis heute Treffpunkt für Menschen aus der ganzen Welt.

Die WELTZEITUHR Vertriebs-Gesellschaft wurde als innovatives Start-up vom Urheber/Designer/Formgestalter persönlich und exklusiv beauftragt bzw. ermächtigt erstmals in der 49jährigen Geschichte dieses Design/Kunstobjekt weltweit zu vermarkten und im Andenken mit entsprechender Wertschätzung an dieses hochwertige Erinnerungsstücke,  anspruchsvolle Souvenirs, Sammlerstücke und Kunstobjekte zu produzieren, zu lizenzieren und zu vertreiben.

Die Weltzeituhr am Alex ist das Alleinstellungsmerkmal der Stadt Berlin. Türme, Tore und Säulen gibt es wohl in jeder Metropole, aber eine Weltzeituhr, die nicht nur zur gleichen Zeit die Zeit in allen Zeitzonen anzeigt, sondern auch die Entstehung der Zeit über die Bewegung der Planeten im Weltall näher bringt, ist einzigartig.

Wie für die Produktion von Weltzeituhr-Produkten gilt es in gleicher Weise für den Vertrieb, der nur über ausgewählte lizenzierte Handelspartner erfolgen wird. 

Designed and made in Berlin/Germany.
Wie beim Original auf dem Alex sollen die Produkte nach Möglichkeit in Berlin bzw. alternativ in Deutschland und Ausnahmefällen in Europa hergestellt werden. Das soll auch die ökologische Nachhaltigkeit und den Fair Trade sicherstellen.

Wer Interesse hat, Lizenzpartner für die Produktion einzelner Produkte zu werden oder sich als Händler registrieren möchte , kann sich jederzeit gerne bewerben. 

info@worldtimeclock-berlin.com | www.worldtimeclock-berlin.com I http://www.weltzeituhr-berlin.de/

Weltzeituhr Vertriebs UG (haftungsbeschränkt)

Investing in a diamond or buying custom diamond jewellery can be an exciting but intimidating experience. Our process ensures that you leave feeling educated, confident with your purchase, and sure that you paid the best price and got the best value possible.

- unbeatable wholesale pricing in a non-pressure environment.
- access to some of the largest inventory of ethically mined, cut and polished Canadian diamonds.
- a long-term relationship for all your custom jewellery gifts for all of life's important events... weddings, births, anniversaries, graduations, promotions and more. 

A diamond is a symbol of beauty and love. This is why we feel it is so important to not only guarantee that our diamonds are conflict free, but ethically mined cut and polished as well. A promise that less than 1% of the world's diamonds can make.


We have been in the jewellery business in Vancouver for over four decades and have forged many successful, long term relationships with suppliers and clients in Canada and beyond.

Passion Diamonds Inc. has developed its success and reputation by consistently offering loyal clients the best prices and customer service while maintaining positive relations with all our clients.

Description:
Nadia Morgenthaler is a Swiss High Jewellery brand, founded in Geneva in 2013, on the strength of more than 25 years of knowhow.  
The universe of Nadia Morgenthaler is poetic and refined, combining the mood of the Belle Époque and the Maharajahs with noble and royal touches.
The extreme refinement of details and finishings highlight a unique and distinctive character. It infuses the legacy of the past with a contemporary spirit in a collection of unconditional, rich and delicate jewels.

Name: Romano Diamonds
Description:
Nata dall’idea di Marco Romano e l’esperta gemmologa Nicoletta Bonzano, importatori di diamanti a stretto contatto con la borsa di Tel Aviv e gli intagliatori di Anversa, iniziano a pensare che i diamanti più puri e più rari possano divenire i protagonisti assoluti di gioielli concepiti per valorizzarne al massimo luce e taglio.

Romano Diamonds offre una nuova proposta di gioielli che vede protagonista il diamante, selezionato perché abbia caratteristiche qualitative superiori rispetto alle pietre normalmente utilizzate per la gioielleria.

Lo stile della collezione si rivolge ad una donna contemporanea e sicura di sé che desidera esprimersi con determinazione, vitalità ed energia nell’autoaffermazione della sua indipendenza, anche economica. 
Romano Diamonds diviene così il gioiello ideale per corrispondere ad un’esigenza di autogratificazione personale e, allo stesso tempo, rappresenta la scelta emozionale di una donna che ha piena coscienza di sé.

Description:
A visionary design brand centred around excellence in the construction of leather since 2003.
   
Fleet Ilya came into being with the objective of establishing a label that both informed about the erotic possibilities of leather and restriction as well as bridging a high fashion aesthetic and subversive fantasy. Culminating in expertly crafted, lifestyle objects, ready to wear accessories and functional restraint pieces, received to acclaim.
 
Operating as an atelier, quality of both materials and design is intrinsic to every piece, using traditional saddle making methods while experimenting with progressive techniques. Fleet Ilya’s coveted pieces can be found in prominent boutiques and concept stores around the world and online at www.fleetilya.com

Name: Adamas capital jewellery factory
Description:
"Adamas capital jewellery factory " is the indisputable leader of Russian jewellery market. In terms of production of gold, silver and platinum jewellery we pass ahead of any other Russian manufacturer of jewels more than 2 times.
Quality indicator of production is a consumer demand and the wide client network of more than 3000 wholesale and retail trade companies of Russia.

Technological possibilities of the factory allow to manufacture jewels from gold of 14K and 18K up to 22K and 23K of various colors. The patented gold alloy of original structure is used.

Name: Maleta Gems & Jewels
Description:
The business was founded in 2009 with the objective to trading gemstones, mineral specimens,
jewellery and handcraft to both local and international markets.

Working closely with small scale traders and miners, small scale mining cooperatives,
mining associations for properly sourced gemstones and mineral specimens’ supplies.

Each stone tells a story from the history of the mine, production and to the finished product.

Name: 64Facets
Description:
64Facets is a fast growing fine jewelry company based in New York, London, Los Angeles and Jaipur. 

64Facets stands for chic, subtle, and luxurious. 
Our mission is to create unique & light rose cut fine jewelry for the modern woman that empower her to celebrate every facet of her true self. Our signature rose-cut diamonds and gemstones sit close to the skin and glow delicately from within, revealing the versatile aesthetic that defines 64Facets jewelry. Much like the diamonds themselves, each piece is subtle, light and delicate.

All our jewelry is ethically sourced and hand-made. Our pieces begin with conflict-free rough diamonds carefully sourced from ethical partners, then artistically cut in-house to maintain the original beauty of each gemstone. 

Our craftsmanship combines multi-generational expertise in diamonds with cutting-edge technology. The result is exquisite-- new looks resulting from innovative designs, materials and techniques. 

Since our initial launch in 2016, we’ve grown quickly. 64Facets is now stocked by top luxury retailers including Neiman Marcus and Saks 5th Avenue as well as operates on a direct to consumer basis with clients worldwide --offering private viewings, curated events and bespoke luxury shopping experiences. 

Visit our online store to discover our collection of sustainably sourced diamond and gemstone earrings, rings, necklaces and bracelets. 

Discover the jewelry. Reveal your facets.

Name: TWI WATCHES LLC.
Description:
TWI Watches, LLC is a worldwide enterprise dedicated solely to timepieces and all aspects of the timepiece business. With a focus on manufacturing, sourcing, distributing and wholesaling, TWI Watches, headquartered in New York, delivers timepieces of distinction through the use of state-of-the-art technology combined with traditional standards of craftsmanship and artisanship. TWI’s commitment to quality and value is the backbone to its mission of “providing discriminating watch buyers with innovative design, exceptional quality, and extraordinary value”! 

Manufacturing, sourcing and development are overseen at its overseas TWI Manufacturing and Sourcing Office as the “control center”, for smoother and more efficient production capabilities. TWI, LTD is not only vital to TWI’s commitment to quality and value, but allows TWI to be in a leadership position within the industry! With its worldwide network of state-of-the art manufactures, TWI is also an industry leader of “private labeling” capabilities! 

Sourcing watch brands is yet another arm of TWI’s extensive reach throughout the world. Warehousing capabilities, distribution, fulfillment, and customer service, makes TWI a leading importer and exporter of watches in the U.S. and abroad. 

TWI’s commitment to its customers and partners extends beyond the “final sale” to include professional and courteous customer service as an integral aspect of its overall formula of ensuring long lasting business relationships… and a happy customer. TWI has developed an impressive stable of its own in-house brands offering fashion, sophistication, technical, and sport watches covering a wide range of price points:

• Akribos XXIV
• Burgi
• August Steiner
• Joshua & Sons

TWI Watches is.... Timepieces With Integrity!

Name: Unützer
Description:
Unützer is a luxury shoe house founded in 1947. A family business in its third generation that is known for its high quality and timeless designs. Unützer's creations are timeless with clarity in design, refined with details, characterized by their unerring sense for the successful interplay of inimitable elegance, perfect comfort and fashionable zeitgeist.

Unützer's headquarters is located in Munich, Germany. To guarantee and control the highest quality standards and longevity, the brand acquired its own production facility right in the heart of Riviera del Brenta near Venice, Italy - a place where leather goods have been produced for centuries in small manufactories, with excellent expertise and elaborated craftmanship for highest demands, in the late 1980’s. The respective models are made of highest quality materials in up to 160 individual steps by Italian artisans.

Description:
AR-RAHEEM JEWELLERS

Crafting the Declaration of Love

The Ar-Raheem saga begins with a vision, an aspiration fueled by the entrepreneurial spirit to regenerate the age-old art of ornamentation and take it beyond the borders...

Name: Nebü
Description:
24K Pure Gold and Platinum jewelry, worth its weight. Nebü merges beauty, intrinsic value and sustainable craftsmanship to bring you uniquely designed jewellery that is crafted carefully from pure 99.99% fine gold and 99.95% fine platinum. 

Our timeless design pieces are sold by gram weight to give you novel pricing transparency into the inherent value of your jewellery investment. 

We understand the discerning desires of the modern conscious connoisseur – those who crave both exquisite adornments and astute investments. In a world saturated with options, we recognize the shortcomings: diluted purity, opaqueness in pricing transparency, and jewelry that loses its allure and worth over time.

We stand as the sole wearable investment with an upward weight variance, ensuring that the weight you see is the minimum you'll receive – making Nebü the most competitively priced and guaranteed investment jewelry available.

Nebü's jewelry enhances your lifestyle, seamlessly harmonizing with your unique style. We believe investments should be embraced, not locked away, empowering you to wear and enjoy them.

Dive into our two distinctive product lines, each offering a tailored approach to elegance and investment:

Nebü Luxury: Artisanal Opulence
Crafted from 22kt and 24kt gold and platinum, it's the epitome of ethical opulence. Elevate your elegance and invest in your values with timeless beauty, transparency, and quality.

Nebü Bullion: Investment Refined
A gateway to lasting capital appreciation. Enduring designs for those who value tangible assets. Embrace jewelry and legacy, with a unique emphasis on the lasting investment value.

Name: CALABRUNE
Description:
Il était une fois, dans un petit atelier provençal baigné de lumière, une grand-mère et sa petite-fille. 
C’est au calabrun* - lorsque le temps s’arrête, que l’on danse, se déguise et joue aux cartes - qu’elles laissaient libre cours à leur créativité. Bercées par le chant des cigales, elles imaginaient des bijoux, ornés de pierres rapportées de voyages en Afrique. Minutieusement et avec passion, les colliers prenaient vie sous leurs doigts, pour sublimer leurs tenues de fête, et choyer leurs invités.


20 ans plus tard, Calabrune naît de cet héritage familial, de notre amour des beaux bijoux et de notre envie de célébrer les beaux moments de la vie. Inspirées par ces douces soirées d’été, Thaïs imagine les collections, et Charlotte les dessine. Ensemble, nous affinons chacune de nos créations pour atteindre l’équilibre idéal : finesse, élégance et simplicité. Notre souhait le plus cher : accompagner tous les moments qui comptent.

Pour vous proposer des bijoux durables, notre choix s’est tourné vers le Vermeil, l'Or 18 carats et les pierres précieuses. 
Le Vermeil est un métal précieux composé d'une base d’argent massif 925, recouverte d’or 18 carats. Plus robuste que le plaqué or, et plus accessible que l'Or, il est parfait pour les bijoux du quotidien !
L'Or 18 carats reste quant à lui un incontournable pour célébrer les grandes occasions : fiançailles, mariage, naissance, pacs... Nous vous accompagnons aussi dans les grandes étapes de votre vie !

* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * 

Des bijoux précieux pour célébrer des moments magiques : une naissance, un anniversaire, un diplôme, un engagement, ou tout simplement un jour normal... parce que chaque jour est une fête !  



*calabrun = crépuscule, en Provençal

Name: BONVION.COM
Description:
Bonvion “The designers you know, and the ones, you don’t.”
Bonvion is a concept online store specialized to deliver both trendy and timeless pieces from small new indie brands up to the well-known big brands. We provide an amazing selection from premium and luxury brands to men and women all around the European Union. 

Bonvion has been opened to create a destination for the modern cosmopolitan men and women who are open for something new - like indie brands and industry changes like sustainable and ethical fashion. Also, who cares about the quality of the products which they are ordering. We would like to be a unique platform, which focuses on style and quality more than a one season trend. Where you can be sure that we work super hard to create a sustainable and as eco-friendly store as possible. But what we do to be sustainable and eco-friendly? We use only recycled paper boxes, our tapes are also made of recycled plastic. We deliver with companies, who are focusing on to reduce their carbon footprints. In this case we are only delivering within the EU at this point. Fashion in the 2020s have to change, and we would like to be one of the first adapters since it was super important to us way before.

Bonvion also offers the opportunity to small indie brands to have their spotlight, and join not just a store, but a lovely and supportive family. The Bonvion family.

Description: Sunita Nahata Fine Design founder, Sunita Nahata is an empowering female that perfectly reflects the brand’s bold spirit and forward thinking. Her jewelry resonates what she embodies, and she strives to empower women similarly with her designs. Sunita’s artistic skills combined with her vast knowledge and experience with gemstones, allows her to play with color in jewelry like no other. She creates pieces that draw inspiration from her Indian heritage, but bringing a contemporary twist to classical style. Perfectly designed for a woman who wants to be classic yet an unconventional trend setter.  Sunita Nahata Fine Design speaks sophistication, finesse and uniqueness.

Name: Delance
Description:
Created in 1996 by Giselle Rufer, Delance produces prestige Swiss watches designed and made exclusively for women, by women.
A refined symbol of femininity, the Delance watch is distinguished by its diamond-shaped case, with each watch a wholly unique creation modeled to suit the personality, dreams, needs, and the unique life path of the woman wearing it.

Name: GoS Watches
Description:
The partnership between the bladesmith Johan Gustafsson and watchmaker Patrik Sjögren aims to provide truly unique watches with inspiration from the cold north of Scandinavia.

Master bladesmith Johan Gustafsson and watchmaker Patrik Sjรถgren have Scandinavian nature and history as a key source of inspiration when designing the GoS watches. Their love for the Scandinavian ethos makes their teamwork come naturally even though their respective crafts are very different in character.

Metal working is always in focus in high end watchmaking but even more so in the watches from Gustafsson & Sjรถgren. The reason for this is the handforged patternwelded steel made by Johan Gustafsson. The history of patternwelded steel, also known as damascus steel, is very long and the Vikings were among the first cultures to develop this welding technique that made their swords superior to others. Johan Gustafsson has reinvented the ancient techniques and use modern Swedish tools steels to create his own unimitable damascus steel. Patrik Sjรถgren then manufactures watch parts of the steel. Patrik is able to combine a raw steel finish with highgloss polished surfaces by applying both classic Swiss watchmaking techniques and etching.

Description: Łukasz Jemioł is a polish fashion designer, who launched his homonymous brand over 10 years ago after graduating from Academy of Fine Arts in Łódź (most prestigious fashion school in Poland). Since 2005 he managed to gain the respect of both the fashion community and the public at large being one of the most influential designers in the Polish market. Łukasz started his label using drapery and fluid lines as his point of reference in creating pieces that sway about the body, whether it's a silk shift or a heavy knit sweater dress. His casual, more affordable Basic line was launched in 2011 - collections of slogan garments that ever since refer to greater matters and function as manifests. Furthermore, Łukasz Jemioł has won many important fashion awards in Poland, such as: Competition for Fashion Designers Golden Thread, Fashion Oscars de Lux pret-à-porter, and Fashion Folk. He has twice received scholarship from the Ministry of Culture and National Heritage for achievements in the field of fashion and art. Two times a year fashion shows are held to present his Premium line, while the Basic line is presented in a form of vernissage - often together with selected artist, as a form of creative collaboration. Łukasz Jemioł brand was also part of Lisboa Fashion Week in 2010 and 2014. By the materialization of his ideas and creative vision, the designer wishes to express his aesthetics through clean and modern cuts, meaningful statements, great manufacturing and overall nonchalant elegance.

Description:

Named after the Roman Goddess, Bona Dea - The Good Goddess - Bonadea brings a curated selection of unique pieces through both its boutique in Belgravia, and online store. With an ethos rooted in sourcing and working with brands that represent true luxury and hand craftsmanship, Bonadea’s collection is varied and rich in unique finds. Hand-painted porcelain plates, jewel-like accessories such as napkin rings and butter knives, fine embroidered linens and one-off objet come together under one roof, making Bonadea a one-stop shop for everything beautiful within the home.

Founder and Creative Director Gemma Martinez de Ana utilises her true passion for design and the l’art de la table to create a brand that functions seamlessly whilst providing the very best products from around the world. Alongside the heritage brands Bonadea also creates and designs its own range of tableware, each designed by Gemma, and produced in collaboration with the finest ateliers and craftspeople.
