Thanks to the innovative SilvanSputteringAg technology, we create objects made of glass, crystal, ceramic, porcelain and other materials enhanced by permanent molecular plating with 999 pure silver. We offer products ranging from party favours to wedding gifts, from company awards to home furnishings: exclusive and absolutely original creations to make your most important moments even more special.

VALUES
We believe in ethics and excellence.
Thanks to the exclusive SilvanSputteringAg technology, we design and make our products with complete respect for the environment. This process, besides being “cleaner” than every other plating technique, in that it generates no waste at any time during the procedure, which is therefore defined as “zero emission”, allows the creation of new and innovative products, characterised by the unmistakable style “Made in Italy“.

MISSION
Profound respect for tradition, meticulous attention to the quality of products and materials and a watchful eye on new trends are the “ingredients” that allow us to be always in the front line in efficiently satisfying the needs and desires of our customers.
We try to innovate constantly and give space to youthful new ideas, creating functional objects characterised by fine design.

VISION
Our aim is to offer a high quality product, the main characteristics of which are exclusive design, shiny surfaces unaltered by time and the perfect alchemy in the combination of materials used.
Thanks to the valuable know-how acquired over the years in the use of SilvanSputteringAg technology, applied for the first time in the silverware sector in 2007 by Argenesi, we see ourselves as a reference brand, capable of interpreting and anticipating the evolution of trends and lifestyles.

Name: WONOMOR
Description:
WONOMOR; ulaşılabilir, özgün altın takıları insanların beğenisine sunuyor. Marka sahibi Yasemin Kıralı, 32 yıllık takı modası tecrübelerini herkesin ulaşabileceği özgün ama çok beğenilen takıları üretmek ve sunmak üzere kullandıklarını belirtiyor. “Trendleri takip ederek kendi takı modamızı oluşturuyoruz. Özgün ve göz alıcı hediyeler için en ideal takıları ve sunumlarını hazırlıyoruz.” diye markasını özetleyen Yasemin Hanım, kendi öngörüleri haricinde çok derin bir pazar araştırması da yaparak tasarlanacak modellere karar verdiklerini söylüyor. 
Yasemin Hanım markasının genel piyasa vaadini ise şöyle açıklıyor; “WONOMOR tüm marka vaadini "sizleri mutlu etmek" üzerine kurdu. Siz mutlu oldukça mutlu olan WONOMOR, sizi ve sevdiklerinizi mutlu edecek altın takıları heyecanla üretiyor. Herkesin taktığını takmak sizi ne kadar mutlu edebilir ki? Ancak özgün olan trend artık. Hem benzersiz hem de ulaşılabilir takılar tasarladık. Sanatla modayı harmanladık ve içine tutkumuzu da katarak size bu markayı sunduk. Özel tasarım takılar herkesin hakkı ve WONOMOR bunun için var.”
WONOMOR koleksiyonları 14 ayar altından üretiliyor ve tüm takıların tasarımların patent hakkı WONOMOR’a ait. Dolayısıyla taklit ve kopyalarından sakınmanızı tavsiye ederiz. Ayrıca gelecekte ki WONOMOR deneyiminizi sosyal medya hesaplarınızdan #wonomorlamutluyum etiketiyle paylaşmanızdan mutluluk duyarız.

Name: KFarah
Description:
Français :

KFarah est une maison d’accessoires parisienne créée en 2017 où toutes les réalisations sont fabriquées à la main, pour la gente féminine et masculine non seulement, mais aussi pour les chats et pour les chiens.

L’idée première est de créer un produit unique qui se démarque par son style, ses matières et son procédé de fabrication. Un objet à la fois simple et singulier, fabriqué à la main par opposition au produit de masse, né des machines et sans âme. Sa démarche s’oriente résolument vers l’artisanat pour replacer l’humain au centre de la création. Toutes les lignes subliment la signature humaine. 

Nous pouvons trouver les produits KFarah en ligne, dans plusieurs magasins multimarques en France ou en stands lors d’événements en région Île-de-France. 

Une communication spéciale sera organisée pour l’ouverture de la première boutique KFarah à Paris.

English :

KFarah, etablished in 2017, is a Parisian creator of exclusive handmade women’s and men’s fashion accessories, as well as for our canine and feline companions.

The basic idea is to create a product that, in and of itself, is of a unique style. A style made unique by not only the raw products used, but by the very process of creation. Handmade, singularly simple, and created as an equal and opposite reaction to the action of the  industrial processes that churn out soulless objects.

Sales will be done mainly online, as well as through a small number of multibrand brick-and-mortar outlets in France, as well as during future event pop-ups in the Paris area.

You’ll be informed in due time when the first b&m shop has opened.

Name: Eliza Page
Description:
Eliza Page showcases curated collections, by select, independent artists based in Austin, Texas and around the world. Eliza Page is dedicated to featuring jewelry that is designed and finished by artisan hands, with an emphasis on beauty and quality. Founded in 2004, the store's mission is to bring fashion-forward, high-quality, handcrafted jewelry to the discerning customer. 

Eliza Page features a namesake Signature Collection and creates exclusive, one-of-a-kind and custom designs for our clients. Committed to preserving and respecting precious natural resources, Eliza Page jewelry is warrantied, made by designers who use recycled or responsibly mined metals, and features diamonds and gemstones exclusively sourced from accredited, conflict-free dealers. 

Eliza Page is proud and delighted to work directly with so many kind and talented designers, metalsmiths, and goldsmiths, many of which reside and work locally in Austin, Texas and make our designs by hand. Our close relationship with our artists ensure that jewelry we sell is handcrafted with care and designed and made to last a lifetime. If you'd like a custom design from one of our artists, contact us online or call us. We'd love to design something together with you and them. 

Eliza Page's team of friendly, GIA trained Jewelry Design Consultants can assist you in finding the perfect wedding or engagement ring, or select a special jewelry gift for yourself or a loved one. Have you been dreaming of designs you've seen on instagram or saved to a pinterest board? Bring us your heirloom gems and jewelry box treasures. We'd love to work with you to remake something old, new and bright again. In store or online, Eliza Page promises a beautiful yet relaxed and modern jewelry experience.

We are honored to be a part of our client's most special memories, life moments, and gift giving occasions. We hope to assist you in selecting jewelry for yourself or giving a gift that will last a lifetime.

Fondata nel luglio 1992 da Alberto Osimo, gemmologo diplomato presso l’Istituto Gemmologico Italiano.

Dall’esperienza di Osigem nasce nel 2014 Forever Unique, brand di gioielleria dallo stile e dall’eleganza atemporale che disegna collezioni in grado di esaltare la perfezione del diamante naturale. 

Nel 2019 nasce il nuovo brand firmato Lisa O: lo spirito più giovane di Osigem. Rivoluzione, ironia, spensieratezza rompono le regole classiche della gioielleria e reinterpretano l’antica tecnica dello smalto in un linguaggio stilistico e un design contemporaneo. L’expertise orafa di Forever Unique ha una nuova forma espressiva nel segno dell’innovazione.

Name: ROURE JOAILLIER CREATEUR
Description:
L’aventure de cette entreprise familiale commence en 1961, lorsqu’un couple de passionnés s’installe dans une bijouterie rue de Bordeaux à Tours.Monsieur René ROURE diplômé de l’école d’horlogerie de CLUSES est un fervent partisan du travail bien fait, de la précision, et de la perfection, son épouse Thérèse ROURE toujours en quête des tendances est à l'avant-garde.
Leur devise : sérieux et professionnalisme !
À partir de 1972, l’établissement devient une véritable institution en Touraine, précurseur d’un nouveau concept avec une boutique de plus de 100m², la plus grande de France où les produits sont exposés en vitrine et non plus dans des tiroirs.
Début des années 80, acquisition du savoir-faire de l’atelier de bijouterie-joaillerie de Jean-Louis Abadie. Celui-ci, artisan dans l’âme forme la future génération de ROURE à la tradition et aux gestes de la joaillerie.
La relève est donc assurée avec Bruno diplômé d’horlogerie et de gemmologie qui intègre la société en 1984, suivi par Olivier en 1988.

Nouvelle génération, nouvelle énergie, fort de la réputation de leur nom et de leur savoir-faire, les deux frères élargissent le potentiel de la boutique. C'est ainsi que partageant les mêmes valeurs, les plus grandes marques de Luxe prennent place à côté des créations de la maison dans les vitrines. Un espace de 300m² dédié au luxe et à la fabrication toujours dans la pure tradition, toujours avec les outils d’hier, par de petites mains passionnées et expérimentées.
Aujourd'hui la maison ROURE, dont la 3ème génération assure la relève. Celle-ci maîtrise autant la réalisation de ses propres bijoux comme la création d'une nouvelle ligne de bijoux masculins, que la mise en valeur des grandes pièces joaillières et horlogères.

Actuellement, la boutique a pris un virage dans les marques qu'elle représente, préférant des niches horlogères comme B.R.M, Pequignet, Z.R.C, Hanhart, Reservoir, permettant de mettre le savoir-faire et l'artisanat français à l'honneur !

Name: Marc Johnson - Jeweller
Description:
Marc Johnson trained and qualified as a jeweller at Plymouth College of Art, & Birmingham University School of Jewellery.

He followed these achievements by gaining positions as a goldsmith with bespoke jewellers Leif Design, then as a skilled jeweller at Prism Design ( Ti2 ), eventually he gathered the knowledge and bench skills to create his own bespoke jewellery company in 2007, Cove Jewellery.

After several successful years designing and making bespoke jewellery, Marc turned his attention to the engineering sector whilst the jewellery trade went through turbulent times, again gaining valuable skills, turning his hand to various welding techniques, automotive restoration and manufacturing processes.

Creativity always prevails and during 2021, Marc reignited his passion for Artistic Jewellery Design, creating bold, contemporary jewellery pieces for the discerning collector, and undertaking private commissions for that personal touch !

Name: Oushaba
Description:
Artistic and avant-garde, Oushaba exists at the apex of art and design, luxury and sustainability. With circularity at our heart, we're breathing new life into forgotten materials.

Launched in 2023 in London by a trio of art lovers and collectors, our name OUSHABA is derived from the Classical Arabic word for "alloy", used symbolically to represent a mixing of ideas, influences and collaborations.

Our collections elevate recycled materials while championing and sustaining global artisanal crafts. Beautifully crafted, ethically sourced and socially valuable. Each collection is designed to do good. The pieces we create will touch your life and benefit many others.

Created to bring joy to the world, we're repurposing, redesigning and reshaping a beautiful, more meaningful tomorrow. Seeing opportunity where others see waste. Seeing the extraordinary where others do not. Together we push boundaries and follow our passions - sharing the joy of new life and renewed purpose for the benefit of us all.

Name: Shridaksh Designer jewels Pvt. Ltd.
Description:

Shri Daksh Designer Jewels focuses on superior craftsmanship and high quality raw material to ensure that every piece of jewelry is both eye catching and wearable.
The Design team is lead by Mr. Priyanshu Gupta himself. The team is composed of  extremely talented and well trained designers. We have our own training sessions for our designers and craftsmen.

With a Bachelor's in Commerce, Jewelry Engineering and Designing Mr. Priyanshu Gupta has a perfect mix of creativity, design sense and Business Sense. He made his company a research oriented Studio, which helps it remain ahead of the curves.

Name: RED EXIM
Description:
A company dedicated to supplying the highest grade polished diamonds
Since its inception, RED EXIM has expanded to become a globally trusted partner for supplying well-made round brilliant and fancy shape diamonds from 0.003 to 3 carats and in 14 different cuts. 

Offering both non-certified and certified Diamonds

Non-certified diamonds offered by RED EXIM include round and fancy shapes, ranging from IF to Pique and D-M Color, sizes 0.003 to 3 carats.

Certified round brilliant diamonds range from IF to SI2 clarities, and D-M Color, 0.18 to 3 carats 3vg up (Cut, Polish and Symmetry) including a significant number of 3Ex cut stones. Fancy shaped diamonds are offered in clarities ranging from IF to SI2 and in sizes 0.50 to 3 carats. 

VISION
To offer a complex mix of mass luxury diamonds at a reasonable price and a suite of services, resulting in customer satisfaction and enriching our relationship with them.

MISSION
Earn the customer’s trust through continuous improvement in service, driven by integrity and innovation.

RED EXIM is active across the entire diamond value chain. A Responsible Jewellery Council (RJC)- certified company, RED EXIM sources rough only from sustainable and reputable mining companies such as Dominion Diamonds, De Beers Group Auction, Brauna etc .

We are here for you
RED EXIM has extensive experience in creating bespoked assortments for various clients and geographies. Our skill allows us to present you with consistent assortments in sizes varying from 0.003 to 3 carats including specific colour programmes and calibrated parcels.

Name: Merit Diamond Corporation
Description:
Merit Diamond Corporation was established in the United States in 1981, as a privately held diamond jewelry manufacturing corporation. 

Merit is comprised of an international network of corporations, factories, and sales offices, with headquarters in downtown Hollywood, Florida. 

We are a prime source manufacturer of polished diamonds and precious metal jewelry. Merit purchases raw materials in their purest form, then processes, designs, assembles and markets the finished goods completely in-house. 

Merit Diamond is a leader in innovative and unique products that continuously succeed within our retail network.  Our branded collections undergo a meticulous research & development process; allowing us to consistently evolve our creative marketing campaigns. Exclusive brand identities and compelling stories help draw customers in and boost sales for our authorized retailers.

In the United States, our assortment of long-established customers include: National Chains, Department Stores, Regional Chains, and independent jewelry stores. 
All designs and brands that Merit sells are proprietary and protected by national and internally intellectual property law.  This assures our retailers genuine products from the original innovators.

Daughter of a shoes manager in the Riviera del Brenta, she has the possibility of practise on the family activity and to get in touch with the international fashion brand that works on the territory.
As soon as she finished the school of the Shoes Design, she opened her first Design Studio developing collections for famous Italian brands.
Drive by her natural inclination to the research and to the steady passion for her job, she decides to  propose her style autonomously and on 2010 she launch the CINZIA ARAIA line that debut on the spring/summer season of the same year with an immediatly positive commercial reply.
2011 Cinzia Aria split her line in two different ones: Cinzia Araia which is her fashion line and CA by Cinzia Araia which is the sport line.

Name: Distinct Fashion Jewellery
Description:
Distinct Fashion Jewellery retails unique fashion jewellery designs.

At Distinct Fashion Jewellery we are fully committed to our customers and product. We take pride in maintaining the highest standards in customer service and supplying the highest quality product at the lowest price.

With the largest collection of made to stock fashion jewellery ready to ship we are able to assist our customers to source the unique jewellery they are looking for. 

Our Products

Our core business is mid-market fashion jewellery. Most of our goods retail from $20 to $200.00. Certainly there are cheaper alternatives to our jewellery products. However, the retail consumer is a quality conscious one. The products we carry are mainly the “look of real” jewellery, simply faux jewellery that looks like the high-end diamond and precious gold piece. Our strength is in the quality of our jewellery and the outstanding level of our customer service.

We have over 2,000 styles in stock and ready to ship. We cycle through new styles regularly. Again, our jewellery is high quality fashion jewellery. We use Cubic Zirconia (CZ) and crystal stones, 3-5mils of genuine Rhodium (a cousin of platinum that is much more durable and shinier) and 50mils of gold plating on our jewellery, making the product durable and lasting. We are committed to rigid quality assurance (QA) standards that exceed market expectations because we stand behind the quality of our products.

Name: LuxoRoyal
Description:
Welcome to LuxoRoyal's LinkedIn page! We are a leading company in the bulk jewelry segment, specializing in the procurement, manufacturing, and distribution of exquisite loose diamonds, custom chains, and a wide range of premium jewelry products. At LuxoRoyal, we believe that luxury is an art, and we are dedicated to creating exceptional pieces that embody elegance, sophistication, and everlasting beauty.

With years of experience and a global presence, LuxoRoyal has established itself as a trusted partner for retailers, wholesalers, and jewelry enthusiasts worldwide. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in every aspect of our business, from sourcing the finest gemstones to employing skilled artisans who meticulously craft each piece with unparalleled precision and attention to detail.

Our Product Range:

Loose Diamonds: We offer an extensive selection of high-quality loose diamonds, meticulously graded for cut, clarity, color, and carat weight. Whether you are looking for a stunning solitaire or need diamonds for custom jewelry designs, LuxoRoyal provides an exquisite range to suit every preference and budget.
Custom Chains: Our custom chain collection showcases exceptional craftsmanship and offers endless possibilities for personalization. From classic designs to modern styles, we can create bespoke chains that truly reflect your unique taste and individuality.
Fine Jewelry: LuxoRoyal presents a curated assortment of fine jewelry pieces, including necklaces, bracelets, earrings, and rings. Each design is a testament to our commitment to timeless elegance and exceptional quality. Our collection encompasses a variety of styles, from traditional to contemporary, ensuring there is something for everyone.
Why Choose LuxoRoyal?

Unparalleled Quality: We are dedicated to sourcing the highest quality gemstones and materials to create jewelry that exceeds expectations. Each piece undergoes rigorous quality checks to ensure its authenticity, brilliance, and durability

Name: Milk and Rose
Description:
Milk and Rose is passionate about responsibility — to our customers, to our community and to Mother Earth.  Our goal is to provide our customers with the highest quality jewelry with the smallest possible footprint.

Our products do not contain harmful chemicals and all of our pieces are sustainably-sourced from Italy and Turkey with care.  The workers at our manufacturers are long-time artisans that are paid fairly and treated ethically.  All of our shipments are sent in 100% biodegradable materials and free from plastic or plastic bi-products.  Our impact is not limited to just our products or our supply chain; we are just as committed treating our staff with the same ethics and fairness.  We support the LIVING wage and are a woman owned-and-operated business.

Name: Five Carbon
Description:
Five Carbon is a London based loose diamond specialist dedicated to low-margin transparent pricing. We were founded on the principle of transforming the murky world of high-margin diamond sales to a more exacting purchasing process. 

Now representing one of the world’s largest certified loose diamond inventories, we endeavor to enable our customers to make an educated decision and take control of the purchase process. Whether it is for an investment, or to mount on a ring, Five Carbon specialists stand ready to assist from idea to post-purchase planning, and advise based on the customers’ specific criteria. 

And all of this comes backed with a breathe-easy, ironclad 100% LOWEST PRICE GUARANTEE.

Name: BOLOU Fine Jewellery
Description:
At Bolou we have a passion for unique jewellery design and eminent craftsmanship. Aesthetics and diligence are central in everything we do.
Through ambition and passion we seek to create high-end jewellery, that stands out from the crowd, both in quality and expression. A piece of jewellery accentuates its owner's personality and tells a story that we are honored to be a part of.
We believe that the best results are achieved in unity with the customer, and by working closely together as a team. Our creative sphere at Bolou always has room for us to be honest and sincere, space for the crooked ideas and grand visions -  but most importantly, we have the support and the skillset to accomplish them.

Name: Saachi Parakh Solid Cologne
Description:
Saachi Parakh: An Epitome of Opulence, Reviving the Timeless Art of Perfumery
Welcome to Saachi Parakh, where opulence and grandeur converge, breathing new life into the ancient art of perfumery. Founded in January 2021, we meticulously craft Solid Colognes that redefine luxury.
Indulge in a world of olfactory decadence, where each fragrance is a masterpiece, meticulously composed with rare natural ingredients. Our Solid Colognes caress your skin, free from burning sensations, imparting a soothing embrace.
Through the sands of time, the genesis of Saachi Parakh was obscured, overshadowed by modernization and cost-cutting measures. But fear not, for we stand as the vanguard, preserving its legacy for the discerning elite.
"Saachi Parakh," a translation of "True Insight" in Gujarati, embodies our brand's essence. With 'Sigma' symbolizing wisdom's summation and 'Pi' representing life's eternal cycle, we invite you on a journey of self-discovery.
At Saachi Parakh, fragrances transcend mere scents, embodying culture and unrivaled luxury. Each fragrance harmonizes timeless traditions with contemporary sophistication, elevating your senses to unparalleled heights.
Our commitment to sustainability is woven into our very being. Ethical sourcing empowers communities, preserving artistry, singularity, and intrinsic values.
Embark on an extraordinary olfactory odyssey with Saachi Parakh, where our handcrafted Solid Colognes revive an ancient art, exuding lavishness and authenticity. Discover the pinnacle of olfactory excellence, where opulence meets refinement.
Explore our exclusive collection, meticulously crafted to captivate your senses and unveil your true essence. Elevate your fragrance experience with Saachi Parakh's unrivaled opulence.

Name: LeS Creations Gioielli
Description:
LeS Creations è un laboratorio orafo di alta gamma che progetta e realizza gioielli unici. 
L’artigianalità e l’elevata personalizzazione rendono ogni nostra creazione assolutamente unica.
Nel nostro laboratorio utilizziamo solo metalli preziosi e pietre naturali, per creazioni pregiate e interamente su misura. 
Il nostro più grande impegno è creare gioielli secondo i desideri dei nostri clienti.
Ci avvaliamo di avanzate tecnologie, valorizzando sempre la bellezza e l’unicità della tradizionale arte orafa. 
L’elevata personalizzazione prende forma, prima attraverso il modello in CAD, poi per mezzo delle sapienti mani dell’artigiano, infine grazie anche ad incisioni completamente personalizzabili per dimensioni, font e posizionamento. 
Così il gioiello diventa assolutamente unico, così diamo forma alle emozioni. 
Tutti i progetti vengono realizzati in team tra designer e artigiano orafo, perché il gioiello sia esteticamente bello ma anche tecnicamente valido. 
Dedichiamo particolare attenzione alla selezione delle pietre preziose, proponendo anche diamanti certificati da enti certificatori internazionali, con eccezionale qualità, per colore, purezza e taglio. 
Teniamo molto alla valorizzazione del nostro territorio, specificando anche nel certificato di garanzia la lavorazione sempre e rigorosamente al 100% Made in Italy.

Name: Roumet
Description:
L’histoire de la Maison Roumet est avant tout une histoire de famille. Fondée en 1896, la Maison Roumet est née de la passion pour les timbres. 

Depuis 126 ans, nous accompagnons les collectionneurs pour acquérir et vendre des belles pièces et/ou collections entières. 

Nous travaillons de manière discrète et transparente avec les acheteurs et les vendeurs de timbres tout au long de l'année, indépendamment du calendrier des ventes. 
Notre équipe apporte des décennies d'expertise et de passion à chaque interaction, soutenue par une connaissance inégalée de la philatélie et du marché. 

Que vous recherchiez un timbre spécifique pour votre collection grandissante ou que vous souhaitiez vendre, nous sommes à votre écoute pour trouver, vendre, conseiller et expertiser les timbres.

Name: SecondTime Watches
Description:
Founded by OJ Whatley, founder of WatchuWant (now WatchBox).  SecondTime is your 1-stop resource to buy - sell - trade - service your Swiss Luxury Watches.

Total Transparency is our #1 Brand Value. We guarantee:
1.  All advertised watches are in our hands and available for immediate overnight delivery. The pictured watch is the watch you will receive; We ONLY have 1 and this is it! When its gone, its gone for good!
2.  All pictures are of actual watch and contents taken date of auction posting. We never use stock photos for our watch listings. What You See Is (EXACTLY) What You Will Receive.
3.  Call OJ by 4pm TODAY and have this watch on your wrist in time for lunch TOMORROW (no exaggeration, no BS, try us!)

Name: Sian Official
Description:
Sian originated with aspirations of thousands of girls just like us,
expressive, fluid and desire of statement luxury pieces. This sparked the undeniable urge to create a brand that delivers your personality through our carefully handcrafted designs.

Name: Veltracon Lifestyle AG
Description:
Veltracon Lifestyle began in Montreux, Switzerland. Clients originally came to us for advice regarding the private medical specialists that Switzerland is renowned for. At that time, we also assisted them with navigating Swiss private schools, ensuring the best for their children. As our reputation for the discrete management of high-net worth clients grew, so did our clients’ need and desires. Our ability to respond to challenges surpassed expectations and we grew into a full-service lifestyle advisory consultancy.

Today we work on behalf of the world’s most demanding and wealthy clients, ensuring that every single desire and seemingly impossible dream is realized. Our global expertise and reach mean we can provide a seamless lifestyle service. This might include sourcing off-radar luxury goods, fine art advisory, obtaining tickets to the unobtainable, planning the ultimate travel itinerary – every aspect of a client’s lifestyle is attended to with unrivalled detail.

Veltracon Lifestyle works closely with family offices, wealth managers, executive and personal assistants, as well as private banks to create the ultimate, holistic experience where financial management, social requirements, cultural needs and emotional well-being are all part of the package.

No request is too difficult or impossible. As Walt Disney said, “If you can dream it, you can do it.” From classic sports cars to collectible watches and the elusive Hermes Bag, we source it. Our travel service includes the charter of superyachts and private jets as well as gaining exclusive private access to dream destinations. We can provide access to major sporting and cultural events that are technically sold-out. Veltracon Lifestyle also offers a complete art consultancy, that includes everything from sourcing fine art to commissioning private pieces.

We are efficient, organized, and discreet. Ultimately, we deal in that most exclusive of needs – trust.

Feel free to connect:
   td@veltraconlifestyle.

Name: Inner Circle Clothing
Description:
At Inner Circle we understand that creating a wardrobe that serves both business and pleasure is difficult for a lot of people and achieving this is something that takes time. We take the stress and inconvenience away by offering a service that makes it easy to do just that.

For a lot of our clients, time is of the essence so by offering the convenience of home or office tailoring at a time convenient to them we make getting a fully personalised and custom wardrobe as convenient and pleasurable as possible.

We believe dressing well shouldn’t be a chore. Whether you’re planning a trip abroad, revamping your personal style or even starting a new job, we plan on making this experience as enjoyable, accessible and convenient as possible.

Name: SNJ Creations LLC
Description:
SNJ Creations was formed in the spring of 2013 by two recognized companies each contributing its own strength. This union brings a valuable supply opportunity for select customers in the US and Canadian market.

The Modani Family is a major color gemstone supplier based in Jaipur for three generations. Beginning in 1974, they focused on distribution through prime manufactures and wholesalers. Now reaching worldwide, they have facilities located in Mumbai, Hong Kong, Bangkok and New York City.
Gem sorting and cutting facilities are located in Jaipur and its China partnership locations. Direct mine sourcing is located in India, Sri Lanka, Nepal, Ethiopia, Tanzania, Nigeria and Brazil. The Company supplies all categories of precious and semi precious gemstones. They particularly specialize in exotic stones such as Tanzanite, Morganite, Alexandrite, Chrome Diopside, Tsvarorite and Aquamarine. 
Sumit Modani heads the North American division based in NYC and supplies rare to commercial gemstones to the wholesale and manufacturing trade. 
The DiGangi Family is a 2nd generation American jewelry manufacturer based first in Manhattan and now in Long Island City. In 1984 Albert DiGangi started one of the first manufacturing facilities in New York City to support prime manufacturers and wholesalers with needed subcontracting services. 
 John Joseph, now President, introduced a new direction starting his own Company in 1991 successfully marketing finished product to retail chains, department stores, wholesalers and the emerging TV market. 
Today the Company focuses primarily on subcontracting for many of the Tri-states top wholesales both in the US facility and internationally. They also specialize in volume “setting and finishing” work for retail chains across the United States. 
SNJ Creations can be a valuable new supplier to all retailers.

Name: Carolyn Tyler Precious Jewels
Description: Hand-crafted 22k one of a kind and limited addition "art to wear" jewelry, formerly in the fine jewelry departments of Neiman Marcus and Saks 5th Avenue, now exclusively offered through private sales

Name: JELLYMOON BAGS
Description:
All great things start from a simple thought or dream. 

After searching half her life for the perfect bag, Ana Hernando, Jellymoon´s Founder and Creative Director, decides to pursue the dream of creating a brand with a very personal DNA. 

Her obsession: designing utterly flattering accessories, capable of instantly upgrading any look.

Her inspiration: the enigmatic beauty of the ocean; the variety and intensity of its colours, its never-ending movement.

Each of these limited edition pieces are lovingly handcrafted through a process that combine of more than 100 different steps carefully executed by expert leather masters in Ubrique, Spain. Due to their artisan nature each of them is unique and has its own personal charm.

For this Spring-Summer season Jellymoon presents four mini-collections that mix exquisite leather and sumptuous suede in exuberant hues and classy neutrals creating an irresistibly alluring vibe. OCEAN, EGO, SWING and SWITCH bring you retro glam with a luxury twist.

Welcome to Jellymoon!

Name: By Leahy, Fine Jewellery
Description:
By Leahy is a handmade fine jewellery brand based in Galway, on Ireland's West Coast.

Inspired by a special family necklace, handed down through three generations of Laoise's family, By Leahy creates jewellery that is made to be enjoyed today and every day and, in time, passed down through generations to come. 

Each piece of By Leahy jewellery centres on personalisation. Either in the By Leahy brand font or the handwriting of a loved one, Laoise engraves each message, creating a truly personal and one-off piece of jewellery designed to create connections and capture memories.

Name: KC Chic Designs
Description:
Ever since Klarisa was a little girl she can remember being excited and inspired by fashion. 

She was born in Kiev, Ukraine and her parents moved her to the United States when she was eight years old. Klarisa didn’t know English, but all of a sudden she was living in New York City, surrounded by the latest fashion trends. 

After graduating from NYU she began her career in education. For 12 years she taught students with disabilities, helping them to overcome the obstacles life throws at them. 

During that same time, Klarisa's personal life was also growing. She married her high school love, Tony, and soon after we began our family. Her parents moved to Florida and Klarisa and Tony decided to make the move as well.

Fast forward to April 30, 2016, Klarisa was getting ready to attend a friend’s 30th birthday party and she was out shopping for the perfect accessories to make her outfit. But she found no such accessory. 

That fashion Spark inside of Klarisa was reignited. She decided that night, if she couldn’t find the perfect statement piece, She would just have to make my own.

So with zero jewelry making experience, she began making her own jewelry. Klarisa and Tony started at their kitchen table with the help of our two boys! 

Tony knew we had discovered something really special, long before Klarisa did. After continuing to teach and grow KC in 2019 she took a leave from teaching and fully dedicated herself to KC and she haven’t looked back yet!

KC Chic Designs was running out of their house and Tony and Klarisa oversaw every detail. Tony, being the visionary he is, saw the potential to make genuine connections with people and truly inspire woman through fashion. 

We continued to build our company by learning to connect with our supporters through Facebook, Instagram, Tiktok and Social Media Influencers.

Now, KC Chic Designs is growing with two office spaces and 12 employees.

Name: Etern Millennium Olive Oil
Description:
Etern, extra virgin olive oil from millenary olive trees Farga variety A fruity oil with a greenish golden colour of medium-high intensity presents a good balance between spicy and sweet, while the bitter is light and the astringency low. Its light secondary aromas remind us of freshly cut grass, with hints of almonds and green walnuts.

About a two-hour drive south of Barcelona, on both sides of the Sénia River and around the Tossal del Rei mountain, junction between Aragon, Catalonia and the Valencian Community there are 27 municipalities which in addition to sharing history, language and culture also shares a unique natural heritage: the largest concentration of millenary olive trees in the world. 

There are almost 5,800 trees, of which 96% is of the Farga variety ,Olea Europaea L, and about 1,700 are registered as productive. However only 800 of these olive trees produce oil. The small number of producing trees make this oil a unique and very scarce product.

Etern, true luxury is found in simplicity

A unique product in the world.
The "Aceite Farga Milenaria" Guarantee Mark, the only one in the world that certifies supreme origin and quality.


Fruit of an environment shaped by humans for millennia.
The “Territori Sénia” is a landscape where Phoenicians, Greeks, Romans, Arabs and Christians have left their mark.


One of the most authentic treasures of the Mediterranean.
The land of the eternal olive trees is a place that exudes an intense but austere beauty, without stridency, and which requires conservation efforts.

The healthiest millennial tradition.
From Greek mythology to the Mediterranean diet, the olive tree and by extension its oil, has always been a symbol of life, fertility and immortality.

Name: Meylor Global LLP
Description:
British company Meylor Global is an international supplier of lab grown diamonds. Our warehouse contains over 15,000 lab grown product units of varying quality, color, shape and size (from 1 mm up to exclusive gems).
 
The main range we offer is jewelry-quality polished diamonds represented by sizes from 0.01 to 20.00 ct. Our saturated Fancy Blue, Yellow and Pink colors 100% coincide with the natural color thanks to our own developed technology.
 
Our Colorless and Fancy Color lab grown diamonds are graded to the same specifications as natural diamonds and accompanied by Diamond Grading Reports from leading independent laboratories such as IGI and GIA.
 
We offer only diamonds grown by HPHT (High Pressure High Temperature) technology, which accelerates the natural process, improves it and makes it absolutely environmental friendly.
 
Natural diamond crystals formed millions — sometimes billions — years ago as deep as 100-200 km under the earth, where temperature reaches 1100-1300 degrees Celsius and pressure is 50-60 kilobars. Such conditions facilitate the transition of carbon from graphite to another modification — a diamond having a cubic structure densely packed with atoms. Subsequently the crystals are carried to the earth's surface through volcanic activity that creates 'kimberlite pipes'.
 
Our technology is based on the latest development of HPHT method — a harmonious symbiosis of the nature creation, science and human technologies.
 
Since 2014, Meylor Global has been working with one of the largest and oldest rough diamond cutting plants in Ukraine — the Izumrud Diamond Industry Complex. It was founded in 1969 and has managed to bring together the best experts, years of experience and innovative technologies in its decades of growth and development.
 
Today, Meylor Global also actively works on expanding its partner and customer base and invites cooperation with lab grown diamond buyers.

Name: MICHELETTO S.r.l.
Description:
Micheletto is a historic Italian goldsmith firm and producer of prestigious handmade jewellery, where innovative equipment and the latest technologies are combined with the spirit of artisan's shop.

Founded in Milan in 1925, in a few years the company was granted the “10 MI” mark identifying the tenth goldsmith company registered with the Measurement Office of the Milan Chamber of Commerce. Starting from the Fifties, Olivo Micheletto transformed the firm into a limited company and introduced the extruding tube technique, which soon became Micheletto's specialty.

Starting in 1995 Direction of the company was passed on to Olivo's daughter Roberta. The handover to the 5th generation of the family brought about a real wave of innovation. This handover carries along a real innovation and the belief that the best choice for handmade jewellery must be a choice of excellence: our philosophy calls for the utmost care in every creation made for each individual Micheletto customer.

Name: Sweetlena
Description:
Unlike other brands, we emphasize our styles to not only showcase various African designs but also provide our customers with a rich history within the black community. Inspired by the founder’s love of cooking and connection to traditional styles, Sweetlena embodies the symbols of creativity, status, and allegiance to African roots. Since launching 2018, we’ve taken artistry to the next level, educating customers through our beautiful Black Titanium collections. 

At Sweetlena, we believe the preservation of African history extends beyond borders. When we think about our ancestors, it opens the door to mellennials of accomplishments, philosophy, and wisdom that have allowed us to be who we are today. This acknowledgment ignited the motivation to honor those that paved the way and the culture of our people. Each intricately patterned set sheds awareness on the contribution of African civilization to humanity and the power derived from our ancestors. As more than just a tableware brand, Sweetlena offers spiritual nourishment and the connection many desire to have with our wonderful motherland. The excitement of self-knowledge combined with exquisite place settings elevates the significance of African décor. By incorporating intentional designs in each collection, it opens the dialogue for discussions of identity, experience, and hope. 

We take pride in our commitment to closing the gaps in African representation in overlooked categories. From a cultural-historical perspective, Sweetlena is dedicated to creating elements of harmony, personality, and warmth to grace tables seated with loved ones and friends.
We encourage everyone to take a bite of curiosity and indulge in meals at a table set with meaning and inspired by African excellence.

Sweetlena accompanies individuals and professionnals (restaurants, caterers, tearooms, wedding planners) from the conception to the realization of their personalized ustensils.

Name: FEU DU CIEL
Description:
FEU DU CIEL markasının kurucusu İrem ŞİMŞEK, Saint Michel Fransız Lisesi’nden mezun olduktan sonra, İstanbul Teknik Üniversitesi Kimya Mühendisliği bölümünde lisans eğitimi aldı. Hemen akabinde işletme yüksek lisansını Amerika’da California State University’de tamamladı. Mezun olduktan sonra İngiliz bir hammadde üreticisi firmanın Türkiye operasyonunun Satış Koordinatörlüğünü yaptı. Yaklaşık 2.5 sene sonra aile şirketine transfer oldu.

Sahip olduğu tüm bu eğitim ve deneyimlerle birlikte, girişimcilik ruhuyla, vizyoner bakış açısıyla, hızlı aksiyon alan ve karar veren yaklaşımıyla girişimcilik projeleri üretiyor ve aynı zamanda aile şirketinde satış ve pazarlama departmanına liderlik ediyor.

Hayatında her zaman sanat ve estetik bakış açısı olmazsa olmazlardandır. 5 yaşından itibaren piyano çalması ve konservatuara yarı zamanlı olarak devam etmesi, hayat amaçları arasında müzik ve sanatın da olduğunu göstermiştir. Bu da, sanat ve estetik anlayışını kimya bilgisiyle birleştirerek ortaya çıkardığı mum ve oda kokuları markası FEU DU CIEL’i yaratmasına vesile olmuştur. Hayatı boyunca kendisini en heyecanlandıran şey, ülkesini en güçlü ülkeler arasında görmek. Estetik tasarımıyla ve kokularının kalıcılığıyla fark yaratan bu yerli markasının tüm dünyada bilinirliğe erişmesi, bir girişimci olarak en büyük hedeflerindendir. Ve bunun için ortaya koyabildiği her türlü katkıyı hayatının sonuna kadar sürdürmeye kendini adamıştır.

Northam Diamonds has over 30 years of international experience in the diamond industry. We have established strong global relationships in order to guarantee that the finest goods are stocked in our inventory.

All of our suppliers strictly adhere to the Kimberley Process. Additionally, we are founding members of the Diamond Bourse of Canada, members of the Canadian Jewellers Association, the World Federation of Diamond Bourses and The Canadian Diamond Code of Conduct.

Our company specializes in fine make and ideal cuts ranging from .005 CT to 5.00 CTS+. As well, we carry fancy colours and Canadian Diamonds.

Description:
DML was founded in 1973, and over forty years have passed since Luigino Dal Maso turned a small goldsmith’s workshop in Vicenza, Italy, into one of the region’s most renowned jewellery suppliers. 


In its decades of experience, DML has gained unique skills and knowledge which only the most elite of jewelers could acquire. The company works with some of the world’s leading jewellery brands to design and create distinctive high-end pieces which are underpinned with unmistakable quality. 


DML specialises in gold, silver and precious stones including diamonds, sapphires and pearls. All items are exclusively handmade in Italy by our skilled artisans.

Name: Gems International Vietnam Co., Ltd.
Description:
The Creators
GIV has been in the diamond and jewelry business for three generations and have established numerous
operations all over the world. At the very heart of our family and our business is the Obsession with Perfection: we are always striving to bring absolute value to our customers. GIV’s burning passion has won the hearts and loyalty of jewelry lovers around the world.

Our Belief - A perfect diamond shine
The more precise the polish of a diamond, the more preciously it shines.
At GIV, all diamonds undergo a meticulous cutting process to optimize their light reflection and ability to shine. Our pursuit of perfection enables us to produce diamonds of breathtaking beauty.

The creation of a GIV piece

The art of jewelry manufacturing involves many different stages. The design is just the beginning, but we believe this starting point, the genesis of every piece, is the most important part of the process.
Jewelry of the highest quality can only be produced by marrying a well-planned design concept with the highest standards of craftsmanship; and using the finest materials while taking the time to perfect each piece. A superior design is not only aesthetically pleasing, but also results in a finished piece that is both comfortable to wear and holds the gems securely.

More information on www.giv.com.vn

Description:
Panch Kesari Badera a household name, when it comes to buying jewellery of heritage and royalty. But, do you know about their history of existence? Keep reading…
Panch Kesari Badera came into existence in the year 1950. This business is started by 5 Pandava’s (as we would like to tell), coming together with the desire to uplift the beauty of every woman by the jewellery they wear. 
We have over the years (70 years to be precise) with our hard work built a trust by providing jewellery of the best quality and design. PKB has a major specialization of handmade jewellery that is one of a kind, our service also includes bespoke jewellery which is made on demand for customers during their special occasions. 
PKB also works on tailor made jewellery as per the designs and features required by our client/ customers when asked for. At PKB jewellers we understand that jewellery is not only a purchase but a timeless buy of beauty and elegance. 
Our craftsmanship work towards providing you with the best timeless jewellery. PKB Jewellers has always provided its custom jewellery that is time-honoured, fresh and one-of-a-kind creation. 
As India is known for its jewellery worldwide, they are not only seen as an ornament but are also considered an investment, gold to be more specific, therefore buying a piece of jewellery plays an important role in India. At PKB Jewellers we believe in proving jewellery that is unique, classy, fresh, and matches your style for any occasion, and an investment that you wouldn’t regret.

Name: Stephen Hughes Fine Diamonds
Description:
Established in 1996, Stephen Hughes Fine Diamonds is an Independent Family run business, located in Swansea City Centre.

A first generation jeweller, Stephen has worked in the jewellery industry since leaving school, providing him with a strong understanding of the industry, and has a great amount of experience from working in the trade. 

Stephen Hughes is also the longest-serving Chairman of the biggest buying group for independent retail jewellers in the UK and Ireland, The CMJ (Company of Master Jewellers) supports their members by providing help and advice to maximize their business potential.

We are specialist jewellers that stock a wide selection of truly individual items; we believe that we have something for every style, from classic traditional & timeless jewellery for special occasions, to contemporary everyday stylish pieces that can be worn for everyday. With a range of Pre owned items too, offering even more of an individual selection of pieces, from Art Deco, Edwardian, Victorian and true vintage pieces.

We are the only fine Jewellers in Swansea to support talented award-winning British Designer Jewellers such as Shaun Leane & Fei Liu, which are exclusive to our store and cannot be found elsewhere in Swansea. Also proudly stocking brands such as Links of London, Pandora, AnnaMaria Cammilli, Deakin & Francis, Clogau and many more.

We only stock fine diamonds of high quality, as we believe in the best when it comes to gemstones and jewellery. Why should you have to compromise when it comes to choosing the perfect Diamond?

Name: ImaGem Inc.
Description:
ImaGem Inc. is a gem information company based on patented technology for grading and identifying gems. ImaGem is the culmination of 20 years of research done on human perception and ImageStatistics, a powerful statistical tool developed by Dr. Aggarwal. ImaGem’s Systems employ advanced optics, imaging technology and proprietary software programs to automate and integrate diamond grading.

Beyond providing the 4C’s, ImaGem also supplies Light Behavior information based on precise and repeatable measures three complimentary dimensions of brilliance, intensity and sparkle. Another breakthrough by ImaGem is the capability to uniquely identify and register a stone without any need for inscription. By offering all this information, ImaGem will improve decision-making and efficiency in the gem industry supply chain. 

ImageStatistics was incorporated in the state of Pennsylvania, USA in 1998. The vision of the company is to be a leader in cutting edge technology in the field of data analysis and statistical modeling. ImageStatistics offers applications in imaging and image processing for the medical, pharmaceutical, manufacturing, chemicals and quality assurance industries.

Name: Feld & Volk
Description:
The story of Feld & Volk started with a concept which developed with time into the brand's core philosophy. The idea was to give mass-produced and simple in design personal gadgets a personalized upgrade, create a  custom version for every individual. Feld & Volk is a team of perfectionists united by the passion to create unique and personalized pieces of technology.

Inspired by the genius of the first iPhone, in 2008 we designed our own interpretation of the iconic device. The redesigned iPhone, named SimaPhone, with the modern take on the traditional khokhloma was instantly noticed by fashion and lifestyle media for its bright bold design. Created by engineering and design enthusiasts, The SimaPhone got a worldwide recognition. Private and corporate customers ordered the SimaPhone with their logos and initials. 

Feld & Volk today is a world-famous brand with annual retail collections carried by premium retailers and an Atelier which creates made-to-order single pieces for private and corporate clientele. Feld & Volk Atelier designers attend to specific requests of our clients, who can be easily named co-creators, inventors of their own luxury tech accessory.

Our designers and engineers have the knowledge to bring an idea of any complexity to life. The brand invests in building new in-house developed equipment, invention of new production methods and materials.

THE ARMANS DIFFERENCE

“From our hands to yours”

Every Diamond Engagement Ring relies upon impeccable craftsmanship, sought to create by hand to uplift a diamonds magnificence. Each Diamond is a precious gift from Mother Nature and it here at Armans where we respect and honour the subtle delicacy that makes a diamond unique- This is the Armans Difference

Name: Rare By Oulton
Description:
Showcasing a collection of truly unique pieces, Rare by Oulton features a collection procured and curated by Tim Oulton, Founder and Creative Director of Timothy Oulton, the high quality furniture, interiors and lifestyle company. The Timothy Oulton interiors collections find deep roots in Tim’s background, which involved him in his father’s antiques business at an early age. Tim has been actively collecting antiques ever since, and Rare by Oulton showcases many pieces which have inspired his furniture designs over the years.

The first Rare boutique in Hong Kong covers two storeys, and features reclaimed English mahogany parquet floors, and an imposing brass door that has been fitted to what was once the entrance to a printing shop at 19 Gough Street in the heart of the city. Tim associated himself once again with Mr. Lucas Vitale, who has known and worked with many years when Tim decided to open his first Timothy Oulton Gallery in Hong Kong on Gough Street.

The Rare collection includes distinctive, unusual and, of course, rare pieces. A continually rotating stock currently includes a pair of 1890s barber’s chairs, a 1940s double life-size training model of a Browning M1919 A4 .30 calibre machine gun, as well as a selection of antique custom Louis Vuitton and Goyard trunks. The store’s carefully curated collection of rarities portrays Tim’s passionate interest in timeless design, unique creativity and truly authentic heritage craftsmanship.

Name: Ювелирные салоны "Абрикос"
Description:
Ювелирные салоны "Абрикос" представляют уникальные украшения ручной работы от более 20 ювелирных домов Италии, Греции, Америки, Германии. Почти все украшения - в единичном экземпляре или в лимитированной серии.

Ювелирные салоны "Абрикос" – это волшебный мир сокровищ и драгоценностей. Здесь, в уникальных коллекциях итальянских ювелиров, воплощаются мечты женщин о неповторимых, особенных украшениях.

Красота и магнетизм благородных металлов, мягкое сияние  драгоценных камней, неожиданные формы – все это лишь отображение внутреннего мира женщины, той самой загадки, отблеск которой хранят в себе настоящие украшения.

Настоящие украшения – это очень древняя и абсолютно женская магия, которая способна изменять и преображать. Как только женщина надевает такое украшение, она меняется – становится сильной или нежной, грациозной или страстной, безрассудной или сдержанной.

Порою сложно предугадать, какие черты характера проявит то или иное украшение. Но можно совершенно точно утверждать, что надевая свое украшение, женщина обязательно становится счастливой.

Name: DIANA KAMI
Description:
Je crée pour vous des bijoux sur mesure où la gravure et l'histoire se fondent dans chaque joyau héritage que je conçois.

Description:

We work with the largest diamond suppliers in the world which are De Beers Sightholders and we purchase our diamonds directly from the source which is why we are able to offer wholesale prices to the public for the best diamonds cut for light performance. We have a GIA Graduate Gemologist on the premises and have a state of the art facility that includes a colorimeter which grades the color of a diamond and ultraviolet light to determine the fluorescence as well as microscopes and a refractometer, which determines the kind of stone by using the refractive index, and a Sarin machine which determines the cut grade of diamonds. All of our work is done in house which means we don’t have to send anything out and we can do the work while the customer watches so that they can see their jewelry creation in the process. Our facility has a laser welding machine and a Solidscape 3D printer that allows us to create custom jewelry to the customer’s specifications. By using the latest technology we can provide the highest quality or service at the best price available.

We are firmly committed to our customer satisfaction because our reputation is our most valued commodity. We continually strive to exceed our customers’ expectations by focusing on the quality of the service we provide

Name: Munnu The Gem Palace
Description:
The Gem Palace was founded in 1852 by the Kasliwal family, long-time jewelers to the Mughal emperors of India. In 1727, Maharajah Jai Singh invited the Kasliwals to live and work in his new city, Jaipur. Jaipur was to be one of the first planned cities and a model of excellence with the best thinkers and craftspeople from all of India settled there. The family operated as the Maharajah’s crown jewelers within the palace walls until establishing their own shop in 1852.

The Gem Palace is one of the rare organizations that has been vertically integrated for generations, controlling each stage of the production process: the mining of rough, cutting and polishing of stones, design and creation of the piece of jewelry, and then the final retail through one of their own boutiques across India, private appointments on MI Road or their salon in New York City, or at one of the select retail partners across the world. Munnu Gem Palace craftsmen still handcraft the pieces using centuries-old techniques such as the nearly extinct Indian practice of kundun gold inlay work or painstaking hand-enameling. And often the reverse of Munnu Gem Palace jewelry is ornately decorated, as Indian beliefs hold that, just as the eyes can see, the body also is able to see and feel. Therefore, the beauty of the underside that touches the wearer’s skin is just as important as that which faces out to be seen by the world.

Today, ninth-generation owner Siddharth Kasliwal runs The Gem Palace in partnership with his family and continues to celebrate and develop the ideas of his late father, Munnu, in his collection Munnu Gem Palace. Inspired by influences as varying as the architecture of buildings and the veins in leaves, or the jewels of Imperial Russia and the vessels of Ancient Greece, Munnu fused his family’s tradition of the highest quality and Indian craft with a new, modern creativity.

Our business supports causes we're passionate about, including freeFall Theatre, St. Vincent de Paul CARES, Gulf Coast Jewish Family Services, the Florida Sheriff's Association, and many more throughout the year. Owner Shane Socash also advocates for secondhand dealers statewide, helping shape fair legislation as the founder of the Florida Association of Secondhand Dealers (FLASH) to ensure consistent and ethical practices for businesses like ours.  

Our Services Include:
Jewelry & Watches

Name: Seren London
Description:
Seren is a modern label with a nostalgia for simpler times. A quiet homage to the laid back glamour and disco decadence of the 1970’s. 

Unconcerned by passing trends but meticulous about timeless, effortless style, Seren pairs classic silhouettes with luxe fabrics and bold, hand painted prints; fusing functionality and individuality to create unique, high quality pieces that make a statement.

Also ingrained within Seren’s DNA is the use of print. Designed and hand painted in house, each print bears its own story, taking reference from the cultural world around us, from traditional textile designs to architecture, art and travel. The magic happens however, when the designs are combined with the natural qualities of the brand’s 100% silk fabrics, bringing them to life with rich saturated colour, texture and a gentle shine.

Seren debuted in 2016 with a capsule collection of six signature jumpsuit styles, each decorated in one of three original hand painted prints that took inspiration from varied corners of the globe.

A product of founder Lucia Dailey’s appreciation for the ‘one piece’, she believes ‘the jumpsuit is one of the easiest wardrobe items to wear, yet can look the most polished when both dressed up or down. For me, it defines the idea of ‘understated elegance’; the aesthetic upon which Seren was formed’.

Each season represents a new chapter for Seren; as collections evolve, different cultures and designs align to create garments of authenticity and beauty. Or perhaps more aptly, works of ’Seren’- dimity.

Contact: studio@seren-london.com

Name: Marco Polo Designs
Description: Marco Polo Designs is the premiere designer and producer of fine art-glass jewelry.  Our exclusive designs are based on custom Marco Polo Designs lampwork beads, which owners Claude and Penny Cruz design and prototype in Venice and Murano, Italy, during two trips per year.  We work with a handful of the leading Italian glassworking artisan families, who hand-make our production-volume beads one by one, exclusively for Marco Polo Designs.  Our talented jewelry-maker staff use these beads to handcraft our spectacular jewelry designs, in our airy studio in Portland, Oregon.  We use only the finest jewelry ingredients, such as sterling silver and custom-plated 24k gold vermeil "liquid metal" stringing and sterling findings.  We wholesale our jewelry through about 150 of the top glass and fine American handcrafts galleries in the US, as well as through a growing number of fine jewelers.  We also sell retail through our extensive website at www.marcopolodesigns.com.  Visit our site for a real visual treat!

Name: Diamond Marketplace
Description:
Diamond Marketplace is a trading platform where buyers and sellers can quickly and conveniently establish the best reference price available for the sale and purchase of diamonds.

DMP is a challenger brand. We seek to disrupt the opaque and inefficient market for trading diamonds by introducing clarity, transparency, and unmatched efficiency to what is presently a confusing and unclear process for sellers and buyers alike.

We bring transparency, value, and simplicity to anyone selling or buying diamonds, guaranteed at the best available price.

We do this by cutting out the middle-man margins to return value to our customers. We earn a standard and transparent fee to manage the transaction. 

If you have a GIA certificate, you can expect an immediate quotation/valuation. Those without a GIA certificate are assisted by our concierge service to get a valuation. It only takes minutes to receive a guaranteed quote, with no commitment or effort on your side, at the minimum, that gives you the best market reference price to compare with others.

Name: BlingLots
Description:
We love jewelry and the Owner of our company has been in the business for decades.  We are a marriage of old meets new.  
 
The Owner of the company is a third generation jewelry manufacturer, distributor, and wholesaler of jewelry.  The Director of the company has been a jewelry industry analyst for more than five years, and prior to that, has worked on the editorial teams of Golf Magazine and other Time, Inc. publications in New York, including Real Simple and Sports Illustrated for Kids.  
 
Our Staff is comprised of a diverse group of people of all ages, some veterans, some recent grads, some current students, all of which work in either fulfillment, customer service, administration, operations, design, and/or web development.  If you’re interested in joining our team, please send your resume to info@blinglots.com.  
 
We are based in Providence, Rhode Island, which was once the fashion jewelry capital of the world back in its heyday.  Our offices and plant are inside an historic manufacturing building, over 100 years old.  We love its big, sunny windows and charm (but can get chilly in the winter!).
 
We’re so glad you’ve visited our site.  If you’d like to contact us, please email us at service@blinglots.com.  
 
So, what’s YOUR story?  If you’re one of our customers, let us know who you are!  You can send us your story by email, or share with us on Facebook, Twitter, or Pinterest.  Every month we’ll pick one of our followers to win free jewelry.

Name: FARAH M LONDON
Description:
Farah graduated from Central Saint Martins in 2016 with a BA (Hons) in Jewellery, at the end of her degree she decided to talk about her Alopecia for the first time in her life. She made a jewellery collection that represented the stages of her hair loss, both physical and emotional. And that is when Farah M London was born.

Farah was diagnosed with Alopecia when she was only 8 years old, and lost all her hair at 15. It broke her self confidence and she hid it from the world never taking her wig off.
Now, aged 28, she uses her creativity to share her story and experiences to support others in similar situations. 

Farah creates art and jewellery that covers a wide range of topics including mental health awareness and challenging modern beauty standards. Her work is expressive and thought provoking, Farah wants them to be conversation starters.  

Farah organises exhibitions and events, creating a safe space for people to come and meet others each other and fundraising for Alopecia and mental health charities.

Follow the journey @FarahMLondon on all socials

'Wear your differences' - Farah

Name: Pertinger GmbH
Description:
Innovative ideas leading the way

Our stoves have been known throughout Europe for many years for their high quality, extreme functionality, avant-garde design and care for the environment. All this is possible thanks to ongoing investment in research and development which has allowed us to continue to create innovative products with excellent performance and low consumption that comply with the most stringent European emissions regulations in force.

Rooted in South Tyrol

Prestige, professionalism, precision and punctuality historically distinguish and are the hallmark of companies from South Tyrol. Values that have been handed down from one generation to the next. It was back in 1937 when Franz Pertinger, in the village of Rio Pusteria, built his first wood-burning kitchen stove and since then, the company’s philosophy has not changed. Our ongoing commitment has allowed us to grow and the high standard of our products has given us the opportunity to build a reputation, not just in Italy, but across Europe. In 2015, we put the finishing touch to our new headquarter in Varna (Bolzano) where we now manufacture every single one of our stoves, which as always, are made in South Tyrol.

Name: Mobiado
Description:
Since the company's foundation in 2004 in Vancouver, Canada, Mobiado has achieved a legacy of design innovation. Mobiado has taken pride in being a distinctively different and innovative manufacturer, producing the finest, and most technologically advanced mobile phones.

Mobiado is the hallmark of some of the most famous mobile phones ever created: 

- 2004: The Professional was the first CNC machined phone to be created from aircraft aluminum.

- 2005: The Professional EM was the first exotic wood phone to be produced.

- 2007: The Luminoso was the first phone to use sapphire crystal buttons and the first 3G luxury phone.

- 2008 the Professional 105ZAF was the first phone to have its entire front and back created from sapphire crystal.

- 2008: The 105GMT was the first mechanical watch phone.

- 2009: The Grand 350PRL was the first 3.5G and full keyboard luxury phone, and the first phone to use mother of pearl.

- 2009: The Grand 350 Pioneer was the first phone to use meteorite.

- 2010: The Classic 712MG was the first phone to be created from Mokume Gane.

- 2010: The Classic 712MG Angular Momentum Edition was the first phone to incorporate Verre Èglomisé, as well as the first phone to be sold with matching wristwatch.

- 2012: The Grand Touch Executive was the first phone to be created from a stone hybrid material.

- 2012: The Grand Touch Executive was the first phone to use a SIM card movement mechanism.

- 2015: The PRO3 ML was the first luminous phone to use Super-LumiNova.

- 2021: The FORMA SPORT was the first phone to use thin sheets of carbon compressed with polymer at a controlled temperature and under high pressure. A thin ply carbon composite called m|Carbon.

Name: WORTH PARIS
Description:
Although the art of Haute Couture has long been dominated by the French, it owes its inception to an Englishman, Charles Frederick Worth. He has been called the “Father of Haute Couture”.

Born in 1825 in Lincolnshire, England Worth’s fascination with beautiful silks led him to move to Paris in 1845 with a desire to create ladies’ fashions. Within 10 years Worth had become a highly influential and respected couturier dressing royalty, nobility, celebrity and the notorious.

In combining the classic with innovation Worth created the first luxury brand synonymous with fashion and style.

Today, Worth returns and is taken to prestigious new heights with designs by Giovanni Bedin.

The polished diamonds are exported to wholesalers and retailers across the USA, Europe, and Asia, primarily to Hong Kong, Taiwan. Name: NOMADISSEM
Description:
We create clothes that lift our souls and move our hearts, that are made to live and to last. A wardrobe that works the world without damaging the planet. It’s a myth that fast fashion suits a fast paced lifestyle. In reality the opposite is true: high flyers need hero pieces. Clothes that adapt to the situation, whatever, whenever, wherever. Nomadissem redefines womenswear by pulling the focus from fast fixes to sustainability and provenance. Style, and substance.

A Nomadissem piece is built to last a lifetime, because it’s made with lifestyle in mind. Founded on the belief that clothes should not only stay beautiful but get better over time, our capsule collections are made to be expanded – slowly, seasonally – not replaced. Looking firmly towards the future in their design while drawing on the skills and knowledge of master craftsmen in their construction, Nomadissem believes in elegance and quality above trends and wear-it-once disposability. Clothing shouldn’t be complicated but versatile. Beautiful clothes, beautifully made, modular à la mode. 

Nomadissem is as unique as the woman who wears it. Balancing contemporary European design with versatility, we know that good things take time. More than that, we’re questioning a throwaway global fashion cycle that has spun out of control. Every stage of making a Nomadissem piece is transparent. From sourcing the finest natural fabrics to working with local Italian artisans, Nomadissem stands for quality – of life, time, and garment.

Led by a female entrepreneur, and empowering women in each aspect of our offering, Nomadissem’s cosmopolite clientele charts new routes. Globe-crossing and curious, international and hyper-local, the Nomadissem woman takes her name from the Romansh word for "nomadism". We walk the talk with your path in mind - from business to leisure, across continents and timezones. Slow grown elegance, with a message to match.

Description:

Our location in Tuscany, in an area worlwide known for the production of high quality footwear and leathergoods and our in-depth sector knowledge and long experience with local suppliers and manufacturers allow us to provide a full package service also considering that, unlike conventional buying office, our company rely on an actual modelling dept where in line's with the client's requirements, collections can be developped and followed through all the stages. Basic strategy of ISA is a daily basis comunication with suppliers and customers in order to supply an efficient customer care service and a good support for problem solving in all the steps from development to production.

Name: Sunrise Pawnbrokers, Inc.
Description:
Having learned the pawnbroking trade in New York, our father and grandfather, Hal Sabra,  moved our family to South Florida in the early 1960s, to help establish Sunrise Pawnbrokers. He eventually brought us in to the business, where we continue to maintain the high standards set by him, treating our customers with dignity and respect. 

We believe that the pawnbroker provides a much needed service to the community and we offer terms and rates that are unequaled in South Florida! 

 Being the oldest established pawnbroker in Fort Lauderdale, we have always believed in treating people the way we would like to be treated and maintain an atmosphere where people feel very comfortable and secure whether they are getting a loan, selling their items, or making a purchase from us.

In an industry that has not always enjoyed an ideal public perception, we have insisted on operating our business with a high emphasis placed on integrity.

 We are licensed and fully insured. 

We offer confidential, secure loans, with rates and terms that are unequaled in the State of Florida.

Name: Kodner Galleries
Description:
Kodner, established in 1906 is a fifth-generation auction gallery located in Dania Beach, Florida. Starting in Chicago in 1906 the business moved to south Florida in 1974. At our current city block-long location since mid 1980s, the gallery is a well-known fixture in Dania Beach. Conveniently located 5 minutes south of the Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport on US-1 (Federal Hwy), Kodner Galleries is within easy access from I-95 and Florida's Turnpike between Miami and Palm Beach and serves the Miami-Dade, Broward and Palm Beach tri-county area and beyond.
Kodner is the oldest auction gallery in Florida and is the leading south Florida auction gallery with over 100 years of experience buying, selling, appraising and consigning for auction or private sale estate jewelry, gold, watches, art, sculpture, silver and more. We are a customer oriented full-service gallery serving private individuals, estates, attorneys, trust departments, banks, insurance companies, families of seniors, dealers and interior designers.
Russ Kodner, President of Kodner Galleries, Inc. is a certified gemologist and a member of the Gemological Institute of America (G.I.A.). Russ will professionally appraise your fine estate jewelry and provide expert advice as to current value. Our appraisal staff will evaluate a single item or entire estate and will professionally handle every aspect to accommodate your individual requirements.
Kodner conducts auctions every two weeks throughout the year featuring estate jewelry, luxury timepieces, fine art, paintings, sculpture, Asian arts, silver, furniture, rugs and more. Our yearly auction schedule is posted at our home page. The catalog for each is posted approximately ten days prior to the auction date. To receive email notices of up-coming auctions please sign up to the Kodner mailing list.
As a consignor, buyer or seller you can be assured you have wisely placed your trust in Kodner. For more information, please inquire to info@kodner.c

Bonnie Jennifer is a New York based social worker turned jewelry designer that fuses uptown chic fashion with downtown funk and sparkle.

Her jewelry line prides itself on original handcrafted designs and a selection of curated styles that are multifunctional, sophisticated and meaningful. Bonnie’s eclectic collection features semi-precious stones, 14K gold and charms that reflect both the spirit and individual beauty of her customers.

Growing up in a vibrant home, Bonnie was surrounded by cubistic sculptures and fine art. She took jewelry classes as a young teen and eventually sold her first designed piece right off of her neck. Whether wandering the streets of New York or musing over her mother’s antique book collection, she draws inspiration from the world around her.

After overcoming challenges throughout her own life, she was inspired to launch her jewelry line in 2010 with the hopes of channeling her own independence and inspiring others along the way.

Description:
The 5th C is a bespoke diamond jewellery company based in Hong Kong. 

Synonymous with high quality certified diamonds and engagement rings, The 5th C is involved in every stage of the jewelry making process – from the sourcing of each loose stone, right through to the final setting of each exquisite jewel.

The GIA's (Gemological Institute of America) grading is undeniably recognised throughout the jewelry industry as the most accurate and unbiased opinion when it comes to grading diamonds.

Name: Laavanya Luxury Ayurveda
Description:
Laavanya's aim is to create a skin care line that is holistic, purely natural, and takes care of both mind and body. Our products help to restore the balance of all three doshas in the body. All ingredients are from Himalayan region of Nepal and each product has been formulated with the help of renowned Vaidyas (Ayurvedic doctors). Microbiologists and botanists provided additional research and development in a state-of-the-art laboratory facility at NPL, Nepal.
In addition to bringing the freshest, healthiest skincare products to a global clientele, we also strive to bring the best of ancient Ayurvedic teachings to the modern world of skin care. Name: LLR Studios
Description:
Since founding the jewelry label LLR Studios in their native city of Hamburg in 2018, sisters Lena and Luisa Rotetzki’s unique sense of style has manifested itself in luxurious, soulful handcrafted designs that all follow a single set of goals: to become timeless contemporary favorites, to spotlight the uniqueness of their wearers and to possess the capacity to shine with understated grandeur.

It is not surprising that the fashion and design management and business administration graduates now run their own jewelry label; after all, their passion for design was virtually written in the stars. Even as children, nothing delighted them more than to surround themselves with their grandmother's collection of precious jewels. Today, this is still the inspiration behind many of their own designs. It is, however, in no way limited to the artistic design of the particular pieces, with which the sisters connect the past and the present. It is far more a celebration of the role, the perception and the inner value of a piece jewelry, which they envision and create not as a short-lived accessory, but rather as a gesture of love and appreciation.

The sisters find inspiration and materials for all their collections on their travels. These materials must adhere to high standards in sustainability and quality. All designs for earrings, necklaces and pendants are elaborately handcrafted, "Made in Germany" and suppliers are never randomly picked vendors, but selected family enterprises that must meet the highest requirements. Far more than just a jewelry label, the LLR Studios brand embraces a philosophy that brings contemporary design into harmony with family values.
