Name: Lockdales Auctioneers & Valuers
Description:
Lockdales Auctioneers & Valuers 

Founded in 1996, Lockdale Coins Ltd started out as a specialist coin dealers with a retail shop in Ipswich. 

In 1997, and with militaria and collectables expert James Sadler on board, they decided to start their own auction house in Suffolk. 

By 1998, they went on to open a second shop in Lowestoft and, in 2003, a third in Cambridge. In 2005, Lockdale Coins began holding Valuation Day Roadshows, with a team of experts travelling all over the country acquiring consignments for their expanding calendar of auctions. 

By the end of 2006, a decision was made to concentrate entirely on auctions and they expanded into three neighbouring units on Upper Orwell Street in Ipswich, while conducting auctions in Suffolk at local hotels.

In 2011, due to the increasing success of the auctions, Lockdale Coins made their most significant move to their current premises at Martlesham Heath, just outside Ipswich, part of the historic former Martlesham airfield, nearby BT’s Adastral Park. The premises is a fine building, large enough to house their own sales plus run the day-to-day business of a busy auction house. The ongoing success of the Valuation Days created an unexpected opportunity, with increasing numbers of visitors wishing to consign everything from unwanted jewellery and watches, to vintage toys and antiques. 

In June 2011, Lockdales' Fine Sale Auction was introduced and has been expanding ever since.

Today Lockdales is one of the country’s leading auctioneers of coins and militaria with a track record of achieving record-breaking auction prices, dealing with many distinguished collections by virtue of our reputation, photography, presentation and expert research. Lockdales boasts a world-wide database of customers, built up over the last 23 years.

All our mokume gane is created in Japan, where the original technique comes from using traditional methods and all the gold used to create our mokume gane is 18K (K18).

All our pieces are individually handcrafted and one-of-a-kind.

At Jaume Labro we focus on quality and sustainable jewelry.

Don't hesitate to contact us at info@jaumelabro.com for any question.

These diamonds are created through advanced technology, capturing the same brilliance found in mined diamonds but without the need for extensive mining operations that penetrate deep into the Earth's core. The primary distinction between Lab-Grown and Mined diamonds lies in their origin. Lab-Grown diamonds are conflict-free, imparting a higher emotional quotient associated with "LOVE."

By embracing Lab-Grown diamonds, Ayanika not only provides exquisite jewelry but also contributes to ethical practices in the industry. This choice aligns with the commitment to environmental responsibility and the promotion of conflict-free diamonds, emphasizing the emotional value of love associated with these responsibly sourced gems.

“WHERE JEWELRY IS PRECIOUS, BUT RELATIONSHIPS…. ARE PRICELESS”

Descrizione della società

Description:
Spectore Corporation is the culmination of decades of exhaustive research in titanium through the late 70’s and early 80’s. It was the 1st and only facility in the World singularly focused on the design, development, and manufacture of   artistically inspired products crafted in contemporary materials. 

Spectore Corporation incorporated in 1983, eager to introduce contemporary metals as an integral innovation to an industry that has not seen a new element brought into the consumer market in over 3,000 years.

Built on a foundation of 4 generations of jewelers, merging old school craftsmanship, ideals and design with a heightened level of innovation and the latest in technological applications.  The company's unique core competencies combined with its commitment to leadership through innovation has enabled the company to continually bring new and exciting elements and collections into the market.  

As Spectore Corporation matured, the time had come to introduce its own designer label to the jewelry market exclusive to this prime manufacturer of contemporary metals.  In spring of 2000, Edward Mirell was introduced to the men’s market.  It is the only designer brand solely dedicated to conception, development and delivery of fashion forward contemporary jewelry and accessories for the discriminating customer.  Edward Mirell products are proudly made in the U.S.A. in the company’s 40,000 square foot facility in beautiful Deerfield Beach, Florida.

Matt Arend & Team

Pearls have been part of the family business for over 50 years. Our inspiration now, as it has always been, is in the stunning diversity of colours and shapes that are unique to pearls from all over the world.

Description:
Art To Mine was founded by a jeweler with many decades of developing designs, procuring gems and constructing beautiful and unique pieces. Leading a team of like minded, experienced individuals, our goal is to purchase gemstones and objects d' art  that represent the best in their respective class and offer them at unusually low cost.

In addition we combine our expertise in gems, jewelry design and fabrication to offer a unique service: creation of bespoke items of jewelry around the client's choice of gems and desire.

Art To Mine has teamed with one of the finest jewelry fabrication workshops in New York to offer this unique service. A verbal description, image from a magazine, a simple or detailed sketch, any of these along with the gem requested can start the bespoke process.

The gem can be from the Art To Mine extensive inventory of rare gems or a favorite previously owned by the client to be featured in a new piece. From this an initial custom design will be imagined and a rendering sent at no charge.

Options on different metals and any additional gems will accompany the rendering and a model created and mailed for approval. The last phase is turning the custom made model into a finished, one of a kind piece.

Art to Mine is associated with one of the finest craftsmen in New York; our gems and their work result in world class jewelry that will be a delight forever.

The company also features jewelry from a small number of award winning New York designers whose creations we think are among the very best. Many we have discovered and may be only available through us.

Description:
ENTRELAS is one of France's premier "Made in France" luxury sneaker brands, aiming to transport you and redefine the standards of the classic sneaker. Whether it's through unique shapes, diverse upper designs, exclusive patinas, or especially its numerous NUMs (ENTRELAS accessories), ENTRELAS offers a world of possibilities. These accessories allow for unparalleled personalization and customization, making each pair truly one-of-a-kind. Crafted with exceptional animal leather and featuring a 3D-designed sole, every pair reflects our creative vision combined with your personal style.

NUMs (ENTRELAS accessories) play a pivotal role in customization, allowing you to transform your sneakers into a second, third, or even more pairs. This level of personalization ensures that you make the brand your own. Combined, these elements make ENTRELAS a landmark brand that embodies an effortlessly chic, modern, and distinctive look.

A plant-based leather option, such as cactus leather or "nopal leather," is available for those seeking a natural and eco-friendly alternative to traditional leather. Both materials contribute to the creativity, comfort, flexibility, and freedom of ENTRELAS footwear. The rose motifs adorning the uppers not only enhance breathability but also reinforce the brand's strong identity.

Infused with a touch of history, your story becomes the guiding thread, the DNA of ENTRELAS. Each pair you purchase, the places you've worn them, and the people you've been with create a unique narrative. These cherished moments, spanning your lifetime, will be accompanied by a pair of ENTRELAS sneakers, allowing you to write your own story alongside ours.

With ENTRELAS, create a difference that's uniquely you.

Name: Good Night Bamboo
Description:
Good Night Bamboo is your #1 source for all Bamboo bedding and accessories.

A few things to think about...

Bamboo is considered to be one of the world's most renewable plants. When our Bamboo is harvested, none of the roots are harmed; therefore it regenerates itself extremely fast. Bamboo is seldom targeted by insects or pathogen, which is why no herbicides or pesticides are used in the harvesting of Bamboo. In fact, Bamboo is know to have it's own natural antibacterial agent called "Bamboo Kun." This protects the bamboo from mold and fungus.

Bamboo fabric absorbs more moisture than cotton, naturally wicking the moisture to the surface of the fabric to evaporate away. Most other fabrics need to be chemically treated to wick properly.

A few more facts about Bamboo:

Naturally hypo-allergenic
Organic material
Made of natural cellulose fiber, it is 100% bio-degradable
Blocks 94% of UVA rays and 97% of UVB rays
Micro gaps make Bamboo ultra-breathable
Bamboo is extremely soft and luxurious

Bamboo linens are eco-friendly, hypo-allergenic, chemical free, and most importantly, luxuriously soft! You'll never want to get out of bed!

Visit our website to learn more about Bamboo bedding and accessories. Browse our site and learn about this new eco-friendly product.

Name: Ceylon Blue Sapphires
Description:
Family owned 3rd generation wholesale exporters of extra fine rare one of a kind Sri Lankan Gemstones straight from the source. No middle man. We are miners, cutters, manufacturers, Padparadscha Sapphire specialist and wholesale exporters for brand names since 1980.

We produce gemstones & jewelry that have vibrant, saturated color. Most importantly, they should be translucent and should likewise be manufactured to maximize the beauty of the gemstone. The holding company Rainbow Gems was established in 1980 as a family owned partnership company based in Colombo. 

The founder of Rainbow Gems, late "Volly Dangedara” founded the company in 1980, after his retirement as the chairman of the National Textile Cooperation, by using his savings. He purchased loose cut and polished sapphires directly from Ratnapura miners to cater for the local market. The company is now dealing in fine to extra fine rare gems for international wholesale dealers, jewelry manufactures, branded jewelers and one of a kind masterpieces for investment buyers.

Our managing partner and CEO Anil Dangedara (FGA) joined the company in 1982 after finishing his studies in Germany and remains the CEO to date. He has worked hard to expand Rainbow Gems by making contact with a number of long-term international buyers. His two sons, Akila Dangedara (GIA D.G) and Dinuka Dangedara (GIA G.G) are continuing the family business onto the third generation as senior partners of the company.

GIA double scholarship holder Dinuka Dangedara (GIA G.G) who was an outstanding senior sales consultant with more than 5 years of successful sales in wholesale, custom manufacturing and the online retail sector of the diamond industry in Dubai. His knowledge in the diamond & colored stone industry is fairly comprehensive and could largely be attributed to completing the GIA Graduate Gemologist program.

In all of our boutiques, we offer a variety of gold, silver and GIA ceritified diamond jewellery.

Name: Della Vecchia Jewelry
Description:
Somos una tienda online de joyería para mujer, enfocada en venta de artículos de calidad y ofreciendo lo último en tendencia. Trabajamos de la mano con artesanos, talleres y proveedores mexicanos.
Envíos a todo México. 
Venta al por menor.

Name: Bienen Davis
Description:
Founded in New York City in 1931 by Herbert Bienen and Edwin Davis, Bienen Davis merged American design with Italian craftsmanship and soon found their bags on the sets of movies and televisions shows, worn by some of Hollywood’s most iconic stars, and included in the permanent collection of the Metropolitan Museum of Art.

The revived Bienen Davis is the creation of Richard K. Bienen, the fourth generation scion of the Bienen family. Having been raised in the bag-making business with his father, Richard H. Bienen, and influenced by the design spirit of his mother, Pat Mori, a former model who worked alongside famed designer Roy Halston, Bienen was inspired to re-establish the renowned brand. Today, Bienen Davis continues to work with the same Italian artisans credited for creating their celebrated past collections.

Name: EXCELSIS 21
Description: BIJOUTERIE

Name: Spey
Description: Spey is a purveyor of fine jewelry and the quintessential statement in pearls. As bubbles crown Champagne, so do pearls crown a woman, and we infuse our collection with fluidity, effervescent spirit and timeless style. We long to festoon the world in pearls. We collaborate with avant-garde designers, celebrated individuals and haute couture fashion to create spectacular pieces of jewelry. Spey is above all a celebration of pearls.

Name: alstey
Description:
Productos de piel personalizables hechos a mano en España.

Clásicos rediseñados con estilo confeccionados con los mejores materiales.
Diseño y máxima calidad en cada detalle.

Un lujo para el día a día.

Name: Flin Lee & Co.
Description:
BOLD . LUXURIOUS . REBELLIOUS.

Flin Lee is a designer label that has redefined streetwear jewelry with rebellious creativity. Adornments forged in unorthodox designs with streetwear edge.  Each creation is a cultural artifact - diamonds set with defiance, gold forged with attitude and designs that pledge allegiance.

STREETWEAR . HIP HOP . ART

Our designs redefine pop culture - transforming designs into wearable art for those who dare. From custom creations to limited collections that capture cultural movements, each piece is a testament to technical mastery and unorthodox vision.

‘Jewellery with Attitude’  because true luxury shouldn't follow rules.
- Flin Lee

Name: Gioielleria Il Tuo Gioiello
Description:
La gioielleria Il Tuo Gioiello è situata a Montecchio Emilia, tra Reggio Emilia e Parma, nella piazza principale a pochi passi dal Castello. Inizia la propria attività nel 1990 e da sempre coniuga la passione per l'orologeria d'alta gamma all'amore per la gioielleria, alla costante ricerca dell'originale e di quanto fa tendenza, come il classico senza tempo. 

Collezioni e Creazioni sono ispirate al gusto del bello, dell'eleganza, del tradizionale presentando nella giusta cornice tutte le ultime novità del momento. Verrete accolti da personale specializzato per una consulenza appropriata, troverete una professionalità sempre in linea con le vostre aspettative nel servizio post vendita, sarete gratificati da un ambiente intimo ed elegante. 

Oggi attraverso il web la Gioielleria Il Tuo Gioiello riesce ad armonizzare la tradizione orafa ed orologiera con le nuove regole delle moderne boutique online. Per questo è nato www.iltuogioiello.it che consente a chi naviga sul web di conoscere i molti volti del lusso: Gioielli ed Orologi, ma soprattutto emozioni...

Name: Infinito Ourivesaria
Description: Infinito Ourivesaria, desde 2019 em Caxinas - Vila do Conde, dispõe um leque variado de novidades em anéis, alianças, colares, brincos, pulseiras e relógios.

Name: Ovale
Description:
PERPETUATE THE ORIGINAL EMOTION

Launched in 2003, Ovale is a pioneer brand in birth gifting and the emotion accompanying it. Due to the timelessness and savoir-faire (know how) of the brand, each product purchased or offered is an exceptional piece. Today Ovale is growing by providing collections available up to 14 years old and expanding on an international dimension.

The team’s will? To revive the traditions and past savoir-faire to today’s taste, as to propose to customers elegant items and exceptional creations. This product offer ﬁeld with emotions that in turn customers can transmit.

Ovale propose ready to wear collection from newborn to 14 years old. The brand also presents a couture offer with its ceremonial gowns inspired by yesteryear designs and refined occasion outfits for older children. Sobriety, minimalism, noble materials and soft delicate tones characterise the whole collections.

Wool or cashmere blankets knitted with the child’s name, embroidered muslins, personalised leather photo album and hangers: all the more unique gifts that will touch and become keepsakes.

Very attached to celebrating precious moments in life, the brand propose a selection of silverware in sterling silver. Cups, cutlery, rattles, dummy clip and tooth box: beautiful yesteryear objects with updated shapes and details. All these items can be engraved with a personal message, a date, initials and/or a name.

Ovale’s iconic products, the polar bears enthral children and adults. From 18 cm to 3 metres long, there is a cuddly bear from this family for everyone’s taste. 

Ovale propose a selection of jewellery in white or yellow gold 18K. For all ceremonies, unique medallions and delicate chains are available. And for all occasions, a personalised bracelet composed of its small gold cubes. 

Ovale offers an exclusive bespoke couture service in its boutiques. The brand also creates ceremonial gowns, baby cribs and bouncers.

Name: Electrum Gallery
Description: Electrum Gallery is one of the most renowned contemporary jewellery galleries in the world.  Positioned in South Molton Street for over 40 years and showcasing over 100 international makers - this is where you will discover the very best in handmade jewellery.

Name: New Goi Gems
Description: As a leading supplier of wholesale diamonds and precious gemstones, including emeralds, rubies, sapphires, aquamarine, and tanzanites, we serve the European market from our headquarters in Milan. With over 35 years of experience, we actively participate in prestigious industry events such as the Vicenza Fair, Basel Fair, Istanbul Fair, Arezzo Fair, Munich Fair, and London Fair. Our primary clientele consists of manufacturers and fellow wholesalers.

Name: Diamsty Diamonds
Description:
Diamsty is a loose solitaire brand that offers its diverse clientele the finest and most exquisitely crafted solitaire diamonds in the world in an organised and transparent manner. Each of our diamonds adheres to the highest standards of artisanship and stringent quality parameters, which go beyond any certifications from labs.

We are the pioneer brand to offer the best price for a solitaire along with a worldwide Standard Transparent Pricing, which guarantees complete peace of mind, total transparency, and an assurance to you that you will obtain the best value for your money. We have a healthy network of 147 partner jewellers.

Name: Gordon Max
Description:
Gordon Max & Co. Pte. Ltd. was established in 2001 with a vision to bring the world’s finest eco-diamond to satisfy the needs of the “Millennium Woman” by giving them the affordable elegance with everlasting brilliance, lustre, fire, and the highest grade of cut, clarity and
colour. Since then, we have established ourselves as a credible alternative, not even a substitute, differentiating ourselves from the “pack”.

Name: Ladies Night Homeparties
Description:
Ladies Night Homeparties - erotiek met een knipoog - meer dan 150 consulentes door heel Nederland!

Al 6 jaar de grootste en gezelligste Nederlandse thuisparty organisatie met erotische artikelen.
Vaak geïmiteerd, nooit geëvenaard. Ruim 180.000 tevreden klanten. 
Bekend van o.a. Hoe word ik gelukkig, Dennis vs. Valerio, Editie NL, Panorama, Cosmopolitan en Viva.

Name: Boysterous Couture
Description: An heirloom collection of one-of-a-kind + handmade men's and women's accessories.

Name: Casa Gi
Description:
Casa Gi International is a Belgian company, founded in 2003, that designs and makes hand crafted luxury Jewellery. It is not surprising that the Casa Gi workshop is located in Antwerp, the heart of the diamond sector in Belgium. The enterprise is closely connected to Gemmata NV a renowned diamond company in Antwerp since 1982. Gemmata is a Select Diamantair of Rio Tinto Diamonds. Gemmata and Casa Gi International are conscious of the strict requirement for trading and therefore only work with non conflict diamonds and suppliers who obtain their diamonds through ethical methods.

Casa Gi International stands for luxury and quality. It manufactures 18 carat golden deluxe jewellery in white, yellow and pink gold, set with diamonds of the highest quality. Every piece of jewellery created by Casa Gi International is the result of a profound and meticulous manufacturing process. Each and every one of them is hand made in Casa Gi’s own workshop. The finishing is superb. Each jewel comes with a certificate of genuineness

Name: Maison Banraf
Description:
We are Maison Banraf, a Beneficent Luxury startup forcing lasting change by creating a new category with radical new rules of engagement. Currently in pre-seed fundraising.

Our comprehensive strategy involves:
-A high-end luxury apparel brand to lead the conversation and shape the agenda
-A new business model to obsolete the unethical status quo
-A new category major players can't compete in
-A cooperative growth strategy for the category and ecosystem
-Authentic ethics and committed activism on pressing social issues

We are at an inflection point, witnessing decades of built-up social tensions exploding into the largest social movement in US history and triggering similar movements throughout the world. Young generations rightfully demand real accountability and committed action on social issues. The old values are not coming back, and we're leading the charge to transform the industry.

We invite you to visit our website for more information.

Name: Carl K. Gumpert
Description:
With over 60 years in the jewelry industry, CARL K. GUMPERT, INC. is a major fine jewelry manufacturer and diamond supplier, providing its customers with indvidualized manufacturing services and outstanding quality and value.

We work to create a wide variety of fine finished jewelry including rings, wedding sets, bands, fashion pendants, earrings, necklaces and more. The styling is ‘Forever Classic‘ -- a beautiful mix of traditional, unique, and contemporary designs.

Varied and extensive resources allow us to cater to the needs of our customers on an individualized basis.

Name: Morton Kuehnert Auctioneers and Appraisers
Description: Morton Kuehnert Auctioneers and Appraisers is a full service auction house in Houston, Texas, specializing in auctioning family estates and European treasures, including antiques, fine art, decorative art, designer jewelry, Oriental rugs, coins, collectibles, porcelain, sterling, etc. Our hours are 10 am until 6 pm, Monday through Friday and 10 am until 2 pm on Saturdays.  We invite you to consign YOUR treasures. Go to http://www.mortonkuehnert.com/valuation.html. to load images, descriptions and provenance.

Name: The Dina Collection
Description:
The Dina Collection is famous for lending fabulously large sums of money in exchange for pricey collateral to wealthy patrons in need of quick cash, but it’s also one of the best places in Los Angeles to get a great bargain on Estate jewelry, watches and fine, original art.

THE DINA COLLECTION is also famous for its vast selection of the best designer timepieces and vintage watches in the world at the most competitive prices.   Dina  boasts one of the largest collections of watches by Patek Philipe, Rolex , Audemars Piquet and Cartier.  And, says Dina, “If you don’t see it, I’ll get it for you, at the best price available.”

THE DINA COLLECTION also offers an incomparable selection of original art by such renowned artists as Picasso, Chagall, Dali, Kandinksy, Warhol and works by 19th century old masters. Dina is one of only a few pawnbrokers in the country who gives loans on art...up to a million dollars.

Name: Marlborough of England
Description:
For those wanting total luxury our leather thermos flasks which also double as decanter sets are to be recommended, whilst for those wanting something extra special for the home or office there is our selection of leather goods and jewellery boxes.

Since its inception in 1972 Marlborough has developed to become the largest manufacturer of Stainless Steel Hip Flasks in the UK.

With the introduction in the 1980’s of a range of top end luxury leather goods Marlborough has achieved an unrivalled reputation for producing products of timeless design and quality.

Every single product is hand crafted in the UK to ensure that our industry leading standards are maintained.

No two pieces of leather are the same, and it is the exemplary skills of our craftsman that creates that unique marriage between material and product that produces personal items of exceptional quality.

Marlborough is justifiably proud of its ability to deliver truly exceptional products with a truly timeless quality and appeal.

Name: Plata Paris
Description:
Plata Paris est une jeune Maison de joaillerie masculine fondée en octobre 2018. 
Nos bijoux sont en argent massif, métal précieux façonné à la main par nos artisans au Mexique.

Name: d'Avossa
Description:
Founded in 1975, d'Avossa, with its registered seat in Rome, a few steps from Piazza di Spagna, and an historical boutique on the Piazza di Porto Cervo, is very appreciated in Italy and all over the world; an history made by Arab Princesses and First Ladies.

d’Avossa Universe is a Precious Dimension where Fine Jewellery meets Art. A fairytale world of exclusive handcrafted creations, made of soft and enveloping movements of gold, and explosion of colors of rare stones mixed together in an harmonious and unique way. And then the natural, warm and sunny colors of the fancy diamonds set everywhere using the outstanding “star dust” technique A style made of timeless grace and elegance. The exceptional Collections of Unique Pieces, as well as the limited editions and customized creations, will always astound and enchant you. 

Here luxury finds its most intrinsic value and true meaning, made of light and excellence, harmony and distinctiveness.

Name: Lazaro Soho - Men's Jewelry - New York
Description:
Drawing on architectural elements of ancient Greece and Roman history, tempered with the influences of Moroccan and Indian design, every collection Lazaro designs has a fresh and modern edge for present day while preserving all that is classic. From the delicate to the bold, from the sculptural to the chaotic, there exists something in the collection for everyone. Custom designs and collaborations make Lazaro a sought after commodity in today's world where there is little left to the consumer's own influence on a piece they desire to wear. Lazaro's jewelry has been photographed by hundreds of publications since the 1980s. Featured often in Ponytail, Vogue, Harper's Bazaar, Town & Country, Elle, Rolling Stone, Guitar Aficionado and W Magazine (to name a few) and on such stars as Jay-Z, Cindy Crawford, Jimmy Page, Santigold and Jennifer Aniston. Additionally, the jewelry has been used in numerous television shows and movies.

Since 1981, jewelry designer Lazaro Diaz has been creating what can best be described in the jewelry and fashion world as "wearable art". Born in Cuba and arriving in the United States at age 4 would seem a most insurmountable challenge to anyone. However, Lazaro faced that obstacle as he has faced any in his challenging career and craft: with unwavering confidence and conviction in his abilities and a dedication to quality and the creation of unique art. His effort and diligence have certainly paid off as Lazaro is one of the most enduring designers alive.

Lazaro's creations reflect a connection to history and craftsmanship which is a rarity today. Working in platinum, gold and silver and utilizing precious and semi-precious stones, each creation exudes volumes of detail and emotion. The wearer not only knows they have a one-of-a-kind handcrafted piece, but a piece that will endure stylistically.

Name: Lake Worth Gold Mine
Description:
We buy gold, silver and platinum jewelry. Bring your scrap gold and unworn jewelry into the Lake Worth Gold Mine for a free evaluation. A little or a lot, Broken or not!

We weigh and test all your items in front of you. No mail-in envelopes! Get paid CASH on the SPOT!

We buy diamonds and fine watches, such as Rolex and Patek Phillipe.

Cash in those coins! We buy gold and silver coins - Us Coins and Foreign Coins. Buying paper money too.

Name: Dinar Wakala
Description: Dinar Wakala is the pioneer of introducing replica gold and silver coins of the historical Dinar and Dirhams from the middle east.

Name: Diamond Exchange Australia
Description: Diamond Exchange offers world-class diamond rings handcrafted by highly qualified jewellers in workshops equipped with the latest technology. Inspired by the most famous jewellery brands and design houses in the world, our Collection is the first to be designed specifically to suit the Australian market. The proportions and dimensions of each piece has been calibrated to the most exacting standards creating perfect balance and symmetry.

Name: Soi Ombré
Description:
Our motto is to make beautifully handcrafted pieces attainable, affordable and durable.

Our products are made from scratch to finish, making their manufacturing journey shorter and improved, so as to attain our mission to deliver the highest quality jewellery within a tailored price and stipulated time frame arrive at your doorstep.

We believe that since everyone is unique in their own ways our jewellery aims to be unique to you.

At Soi Ombré selected pieces are customizable to help you create your own curated jewel. We exist to craft distinct and appealing jewellery, all you have to do is place your order, and the rest is on us.

Beyond these words, there is something deeper and meaningful: Let Your Bling Sing!

Name: Tanagro Jewelry Corp
Description:
Tanagro is an integral part of the international jewelry industry, highly reputed for its unique combination of “Artistry” and “Engineering” as well as for its service orientated and competence. Tanagro atelier is one of the most valuable supplier of the “Haute Couture” jewelers, official vendor for many companies and provider of professional service to all of their historically valuable customers.
The 2,200sf atelier is centrally and conveniently located in New York City, where master jewelry artisans, including expert stone setters, work on model making, product development and production, providing also in-house design services: from classic 3 stone rings to elaborate multi-stone necklaces in all types of precious metals, to high-quality series production.

Name: Will Bees Bespoke
Description: Welcome to Will Bees Bespoke, specialist in luxury accessories - handmade in England and personalised at our workshop in Island Street, Salcombe, UK.

Name: Van Willegen Rotterdam Luxury Jewelry Concept Store
Description: A one of a kind Luxury Jewelry Concept Store located just 800 m outside the city center of Holland's most booming city, Rotterdam. We specialise in top brands like IWC, Cartier, Omega, Bvlgari, Chopard, Breitling, Piaget, Gucci, Pomellato, Ole Lynggaard, Ulysse Nardin, Tagheuer and many others. Our multilingual, professionally trained staff will assist you at any day of the week, Sundays included. To make your experience even more unique, we have a full license for food & beverages, so you can enjoy a selection of fine wines in our bar/kitchen on the top level of the store, while looking at our extensive watch & jewel collection. For coffee lovers; our barista will make you a well balanced espresso, a cappuccino, or a soya latte macchiato with a freshly baked cookie which you can enjoy in our cosy IWC lounge with fireplace. We have a private parking garage for our clients and if desired, we can arrange a pick up service from your hotel.

Name: House Of Phua
Description:
Are you looking to buy enticing, and lovely jewellery, jade and precious gemstones?

If so, House Of Phua — the top-rated retail seller is at your services. A perfect creation by Mr. & Mrs. Phua, House Of Phua is an effort to serve the community with the ultimate quality jewellery made from precious metals, and stones. All the jewellery that is offered at House Of Phua is handcrafted made to be presented as collectibles, and gifts. Started back in 1990, House Of Phua has worked hard to achieve the level of success where it is today. They have been operating in Park’s Complex since 2011 and helping the people find the best piece of jewellery at the best rate.

House Of Phua is not an overnight dream, but years of hard work of Mr. & Mrs. Phua, who dreamt of success and spent tireless nights to make the dream comes true. Mrs. Phua started working in the jewellery industry when she was only 21 years old, with a dream in eyes to have her own jewellery business. Her passion and love for jewellery is natural, and being as a woman, she wanted to help other beautiful women to look decent, elegant, and out-class by wearing classic jewellery. So she decided to start her jewellery business in 1990.  It has now been more than 20 years, and people still love to have jewellery from Mr. & Mrs. Phua. She has not been selling the fine-looking jewellery pieces, but memories that last forever.

Name: AzuelosDiamonds
Description:
The Azuelos Diamonds and Jewelry Company stands among the leading companies that specialize in manufacturing Hearts & Arrows Excellent Ideal Cut and Tolkowsky Ideal Cut, from sizes of 0.10 point Up to 2 Ct clearly VVS1 to SI2, Colors D to I. Our clientele ranges from jewelry-store owners to large wholesalers. We specially accommodate diamond vendors by educating them in company branding and selling the diamonds. The Azuelos Company perfects unique diamonds with the finest jewelry production.

We Provide Only the Finest Quality Diamonds

We are a company that does not compromise on the quality of manufacturing our precious gems. Rest assured we employ the most advanced technology to ensure the finest quality jewelry. We also invest in an important quality assurance department, to inspect every single piece of jewelry before deeming it worthy of our clients. We place high expectations on ourselves to meet or exceed our clients’ high expectations. 

Exceptional Assistance and Support

We proudly make sure our clients have personalized experiences with attentive assistance during their experience with one of our representatives. What makes us stand out is that we also educate our clients about our brand and the unique ways in which we operate so that they can enhance their business. We excel in matching our various retail abilities to suit each vendor personally. We proudly provide a unique experience to each of our clients to suit every individual vendor's need.

Name: de Horlogebandenspecialist
Description:
De horlogebandenspecialist is opgestart in 2006. In de loop der jaren is ons assortiment uitgebreid met grote merken zoals Rios 1931, Hirsch en uiteraard met onze eigen handgemaakte HS horlogebanden.
 
In ons assortiment heeft u een ruime keuze aan horlogebanden. Voor bijna elk merk vindt u bij ons een passend horlogebandje, 
ook voor de merkhorloges zoals IWC, Breitling, Rolex, Panerai, Tag-Heuer, Omega, Maurice la Croix. enz.

Name: CAD On Demand
Description:
Intriguity Cad-on-Demand is a subsidiary company of Intriguity – a CAD/CAM company headquartered in Mumbai – the jewelry hub of India. Having an extensive experience of more than 8 years in the implementation of CAD/CAM technologies for the diamond jewelry industry, the company boasts of a state-of-the-art infrastructure both in terms of hardware and software for jewelry design & manufacturing.

The company now offers CAD modeling, rendering & animation services for jewelry manufacturers across the world in a unique format that is extremely affordable, convenient & flexible for the customer. This unique concept allows jewelry designers, retailers & manufacturers to take advantages of digital manufacturing without having to go through a cumbersome learning curve of 3D modeling

At CAD On Demand (www.cadondemand.in) we offer following services for Jewelry Industry

1. CAD Modelling and Mold Making 
2. Still Rendered Images
3. Animation Videos of the Jewelry
4. Artistic Banners for Website

Name: House of Matriarch
Description: We believe in the transcendent power of fragrance to connect us to the past, captivate our being to excite the present moment and help us to write the future.  Our Founder, Scent Strategist and Perfume Mage, Christi Meshell created House of Matriarch as a high perfumery rooted in the rich history of storytelling, magical and mystical ingredients and the transmutative character of alchemical principles — the rarest elements recombined to a new golden visage. Meshell herself speaks that language – a ancient tongue that is luxuriously mysterious, powerfully rendered and recalling the craft of the apothecary.

Name: Alora Ambiance
Description: America’s first and best reed diffuser, Alora Ambiance invented the category and for over 20 years has been the one all the knockoffs just can’t catch. Born from founding sisters Therese and Annie Gibbons time living in Lake Como, Italy, Alora Ambiance offers a full range of home fragrance products, from hand wash to room sprays, in 17 signature, lust-worthy scents.

Name: Avyaktaa
Description: Premium silver jewellery (925) inspired by the mythologies and cultures from all around the globe!

Name: Jewelery M.Jopek
Description: Nasze wieloletnie doświadczenie w pracy z klientami z całego świata oraz zamiłowanie do biżuterii, zapoczątkowało stworzenie unikatowego nurtu w jubilerstwie. Aby sprostać najnowszym trendom inspirujemy się wzorami z największych okręgów mody: Włochy, Tajlandia, Chiny, Turcja. W ofercie spotkacie się Państwo z nowoczesnymi wzorami, jak i tymi inspirowanymi klasyką. Pragniemy dotrzeć do każdego z naszych Klientów poprzez sprzedaż internetową aby zapewnić Państwu indywidualne podejście oraz profesjonalną obsługę na najwyższym poziomie.

Name: Diamonds In Style
Description:
I am a designer and manufacturer of fine jewellery & my company is called DiamondsInStyle. I make engagement & dress rings, earrings, pendants, necklaces and bracelets.

I create fine quality jewellery that I supply to the independent quality shops in the UK and I also design special items for private clients.

I am very proud of the fact that everything is made in our workshops in London, working with skills that have been passed down through the generations and not imported. All our jewellery carries the London assay mark.

Whilst we take pride in making pieces by hand, we are also excited by the latest techniques and we have the ability to design items on the computer using the latest CadCam methods.

Name: Vanessa Saroni
Description: Luxury Handcrafted Bags. Designed in Amsterdam. Made in Italy. Handwoven by Women, for Women. Where Craftsmanship and Sustainability meet luxury.

Name: A. Adler Jewelry Brokers
Description:
We are a family business dedicated to providing our clients with fair prices for their valuables. We want our clients to feel comfortable with any transaction. We treat customers with dignity and respect, and we hope that we are rewarded with returning clients and referrals. If you have values that you would like appraised or purchased, we encourage you to give us a call.

Many of you may already know the good Adler name from our Gold Buying business www.sellgoldformore.com where you can sell gold for cash.

It doesn't cost anything to be helpful!

If we cannot help you, we will try to suggest options that may be useful. We can’t buy everything, nor are we experts in everything. If this turns out to be the case, we can try to point you in the right direction.

Name: Diamond Advisory
Description:
Diamond Advisory has been acquired to build awareness about diamond quality among diamond lovers. We educate and support investors in building their alternative financial portfolio when investing in rough and polished diamonds. 
Diamond Advisory offers the best quality jewelry, from bespoke to classic designs. Made to measure and to treasure, to celebrate the unique moments of your life....

Name: Classic Jewellers
Description:
At Classic we pride ourselves in being one of the leading traditional jewellers in Malta. We are not about status but emotions, and connect with our customers through unique moments and special occasions. 
We understand the significance of meaningful purchases, the art of styling and we are honored to be part of the special events in customers lives. 
Our retail employees are responsible for creating the Classic Culture of special customer service with warmth, graciousness and efficiency

Name: FB JEWELLERY
Description:
Years 2008 and 2009 was the toughest years for Jewellery wholesalers and manufacturers in last decades. Many factories have closed during that period.
Therefore,there was  a lack of reliable producers who can provide quality merchandise and who has an international market knowledge and who can constantly develop new designs. It was then 3 partners have decided  to establish FMB Jewellery as a production and export company in 2009.
During this succesfull 7 years under FMB Jewellery brand has been listed one of the top exporters of Turkey. By 2015 the partners have split up to serve their customers better and to develop better solutions for different market needs. 
Fahri and Bahri YILDIRIM carried on under their new brands F&B Jewellery Inc and  FABOR Jewellery Limited with 3 production unit and 2 marketing company. 
Those 3 production units produce 
 •  Casting
 •  Stamping
 •  Tube 
 •  Hollow items.
We also develop 100 new designs every month with our 4  skillfull designers. The group is also ,one of the major importers and distrubuters of Italian findings in Turkey. 
Besides regular customer visits and market researches throughout 4 continets, F&B Jewellery  and Fabor Jewellery exhibit in following international shoes. 
 •  Vicenza January 
 •  Vicenza September 
 •  Hong Kong March
 •  Hong Kong June
 •  Hong Kong September
 •  Istanbul March
 •  Istanbul October
 •  Vicenza Oro Dubai   
•  JCK las vegas shows 
With 75 skillfull workers in production and also 25 professionals in marketing team F&B Jewellery Inc. and Fabor Jewellery Limited constantly producing new models for different market needs and also developping solutions based on each customer and exporting to over 40 different countries.

Name: DERBRE HORLOGERIE Horlogerie
Description: DERBRE HORLOGERIE  is a luxury goods & jewelry company based out of Lyon, France.

Mr. Deepak K. Chokshi has persued the Polish Diamond Grading (PDG), the Jewellry Designing (JD) course from Indian Diamond Institute (IDI), Mumbai and the Gemology Course from Gemological Institute of India (GII).

Mr. Viren K. Chokshi has persued the Polish Diamond Grading (PDG), the Jewellry Designing (JD) course from Indian Diamond Institute (IDI), Surat as well as from International Gemological Institute (IGI), New York.

D. Name: Duke & Dutch Jewellery
Description:
Duke and Dutch is the newest generation in a family legacy of jewellers and watchmakers that extends to the 1600s. Rolf Werndle is its driving force. His passion combines time-honoured, quality craftsmanship with cutting-edge design.

Having worked with his parents in jewellery from an early age, Rolf is at home in the world of design and adornment. The blend of a creative education as a jewellery designer and experience working with some of South Africa's top jewellers has led Rolf to create Duke & Dutch, a showcase of his unique style.

The designs capture the African soul, marrying clean, modern lines with naturally inspired shapes. His collections include flowing and feminine pieces for women; and distinctive, bold styles for men. Quality and attention to detail is paramount. Each piece destined to become a cherished treasure.

Rolf's award-winning design skills combined with his goldsmithing talents give each hand-crafted piece a personal and unique feel. All jewllery pieces are conceived and made entirely in the Mother City, proudly carrying the label "born in Cape Town".

East Tennessee Diamond Co. is committed to make every customer "feel at home" with our personalized service and our classic to cutting edge jewelry designs.  At East Tennessee Diamond Co. our mission has always been a tradition of trust, high ethical standards, knowledge of our jewelry products and services, fair pricing and value to our customers.

Name: Heights Jewelers
Description:
Heights Jewelers has been in the jewelry business for almost a century. We started in 1938 as Heights Jewelers, a neighborhood jewelry store in New York City.

Our family lived in the neighborhood.  Our friends were our customers, and our customers became our new friends.

Times were different back then. The jewelry was not bought from a mass production factory and resold. The jewelry sold was of our hand-crafted creation.
Our exclusive jewelry was crafted in a workshop in our store. 
Diamond jewelry was created and produced in our store. 
Our customer’s broken jewelry was mended and restored in our workshop in our store.
Watches were overhauled and repaired in our store.
Our work was first rate and we took pride in it, for it reflected on us.  All our work was guaranteed with an absolute and irrevocable guarantee. It was certified with something more secure than a federal pledge. We gave each piece a quality assurance, backed by something irrevocable and irrefutable: 
It was guaranteed by our reputation and our word!

In those days a man’s word meant something and a handshake was a contract!
 Today we continue the tradition of quality and integrity in the jewelry marketplace.  We are that same family business, with a modern variation. We still take pride in our craftsmanship and honor that pledge.
We at Heights Jewelers continue the tradition of bringing the finest value for the purchasing dollar. We take pride in offering our customer the best quality available at the price.
 When we offer a special incentive, the discount is in the price only, not the quality.
We offer a fine collection of personalized jewelry, diamond jewelry and vintage jewelry including rose gold.
From our very beginning in 1938, the customer was number one.  At Heights Jewelers,  the customer is still number one 

Always!

Name: LeoBella Holdings
Description:
LeoBella Is an American luxury good conglomerate company which designs, manufactures, distributes, and sells jewelry, and most notably known for its crystal encrusted clutch purses.

Founded in Beverly Hills, California, in 2007 by Sarian (Sara) Kazimi, the company has remained under family control. The company maintains its headquarters in Beverly Hills. LeoBella also has a luxury real estate & hospitality brand as well.

LeoBella is well known for its jewelry and crystal encrusted clutch purse lineup, often worn by dignitaries and elite worldwide; including the American First Lady, Michelle Obama, in 2014.

LeoBella was awarded an exclusive design contract for the NFL 50th year anniversary collector's edition, for their jewelry and clutch purses for all 32 teams.



History
Family Ownership

Sara Kazimi founded LeoBella in Beverly Hills in 2007, Sara maintains her role as creative director and has been responsible for establishing the brand name worldwide. Sara has been appointed Chairperson of the Board. Ms. Kazimi, as LeoBella's Chairperson, has emphasized & instituted the mandate of social responsibility within the organization, and now this has became a core component to the mantra to the jewelry design house. Of all revenues, there is an unwavering contribution to the World Orphanage Foundation.

In 2011, Sara revitalized & propounded the company to represent the cornerstone of expression, and as a creator of art she's encapsulated this thought on every piece that has been produced with nuance to detail. Every item of jewelry or clutch purse produced is numbered with only a limited quantity made available; and proceeds go towards empowering underprivileged children to express themselves, to speak on their circumstances and foster change for themselves and their keeper.

Name: Gems Fine Co., Ltd.
Description:
Gemsfine Co., Ltd is a private family-owned company with expertise in dealing with precious gemstones such as Rubies, Emeralds, and Sapphires for over 35 years. With the knowledge of two generations, the company operates in various countries such as Thailand, India, Hong Kong, and the United States. In addition, it partakes in Gems and Jewelry exhibitions Internationally. The company has also taken a step forward in dealing with Ruby and Emerald roughs and is an official authorized auction partner of Gemsfield and Fura Gems. 

With strong gemstone expertise, the company has expanded into manufacturing high-end fine Jewelry, where you can only expect high-quality craftsmanship and the best selection of certified precious stones. 

Gemsfine provides a full-comprehensive service as it is completely involved in purchasing the rough, cutting, and polishing gems. Name: Recover with Grace
Description:
THE STORY and THE REASON: 

On a mission to change the world for the better by creating beauty and giving. 

I’m Audrey. I am a mother, daughter and friend. I am also a recovering alcoholic. I suffered with alcohol addiction from the age of 15 until I was almost 31. I’ve created Recover with Grace to not only help support my family, but so that I can do my part to give what I can to help those still suffering. It is the cherry on top that I am able to express my creative side in doing this. Addiction has been such a huge part of my life and to have the gift of recovery today is something I wouldn’t give for the world. This topic was and still is so stigmatized by some. Luckily in this day and age, people are significantly more informed on this crisis and it’s being talked about daily. The resources available are growing exponentially and I personally thank God for that. Roughly 11.8 million people die from substance abuse every year. We have to start extending our hand to those who believe no one ever will. Give hope to the hopeless and healing to the broken. If I can make beautiful things and do that too then why not?

50% of profits will be donated monthly to various organizations to support addiction recovery.

Name: Vessel Scents of Style
Description:
Vessel revolutionizes the way women shop for jewelry and essential oils or fragrance. Merging essential oils and/or fragrance and jewelry into custom accessory pieces, Vessel creates the fusion of scent and style.   

Vessel offers high-quality jewelry items such as chains, lockets, charms, ribbon and cord necklaces and accessories. Our one-of-a-kind, patent-pending scent system combines beautiful lockets with unique ScentSpheres. Essential oils OR perfume is infused into the ScentSpheres, which are then placed into the lockets. The fragrance will last for several days, after which new scent vessels can be used with the essential oil or perfume of your choice.

Vessel’s range of chains, lockets and scented inserts are interchangeable for truly customized pieces. Name: Fossati Studio
Description:
Fossati is a boutique luxury brand specializing in exquisite limited edition handbags. As a US-based handbag company, our focus is on the detail and our bags are functional as well as beautiful. We go beyond all the little extra details that everyone appreciates: Classic design, meticulous quality and luxurious materials like genuine alligator, ostrich and lizard, soft Italian leather linings. Each handbag is discretely branded and comes with a card of authenticity. Our limited editions are marked with the production number. We consider our handbags functional, wearable art.

Classic styling with an edge

Fossati handbags are functional as well as beautiful. We take design cues from classic designs that have passed the test of time. Fossati bags tend to be simple shapes to show off the exotic leathers.

Limited editions

Fossati handbag limited editions are limited to 100 of each style color and material combination. These exquisite handbags are made available for a limited time and exclusive by scarcity. Our global reach and limited quantities ensure you won’t see anyone wearing your handbag.

Exquisite Quality

Fossati handbags are meticulously made by craftsmen in the US of the finest materials from around the world.

Classic styling with an edge, numbered limited editions and exquisite quality; those are the cornerstones of Fossati.

Name: HEFANG JEWELRY
Description:
Founded in 2012 by designer Sun Hefang, HEFANG Jewelry is a designer jewelry brand positioned within the modern affordable luxury space. Blending refined craftsmanship with a contemporary design language, the brand creates expressive yet wearable pieces that reflect individuality, confidence, and a modern attitude toward life. Guided by the philosophy “SHINE MY LIFE,” HEFANG views jewelry as a form of self-expression that carries emotion and meaning.

Sun Hefang, founder and creative director, is a graduate of the Jewelry Design Department at Central Saint Martins, University of the Arts London. Her design approach is informed by close observation of daily life, translating form, movement, and emotion into jewelry that balances elegance with a modern sensibility.

HEFANG has gained recognition from celebrities, stylists, and fashion professionals, and has been featured by leading international fashion media including VOGUE, ELLE, and Harper’s Bazaar. The brand operates official online flagship stores and maintains a strong offline retail presence, with boutiques located in 70+ premium shopping malls across China’s top-tier cities, as it continues to expand its global reach.

Name: Melissa Pedersen Jewellery
Description:
Melissa Pedersen is a Canadian jewellery artist who designs, creates, and lives in Calgary Alberta. The anticipation of spring after the long winters in her home town has motivated her to annually fill her sketchbooks with designs about growth and the celebration of life. One of the most important influences on her work is the garden. Memories of her mother’s garden as a child and Melissa’s own garden today provide her with a continual source of inspiration.

Melissa started her own jewellery business after graduating from the Alberta College of Art and Design (ACAD) in 2009. She has won numerous awards including “Best of Show” in Influx Jewellery Gallery’s annual juried competition, as well as second place in the Necklace/Pendant category of Jewellery Artists Magazine’s 2009 Art Jewellery competition. Her artwork has been exhibited both nationally and internationally.

Working in a variety of materials, Melissa’s favorites include silver, gold, gemstones and pearls. Her jewellery includes one of a kind wearable art pieces, limited production jewellery, and special commission works. More information about Melissa’s jewellery can be found on her website: www.melissapedersen.com.

Name: Linda & Co Designer Jewellers
Description:
Established in 1980, Linda & Co is a family-owned jewellry house built on four generations of craftsmanship and tradition. From our first store in Sydney’s western suburbs, we have grown into one of the city’s most trusted jewellry designers, proudly serving families across Australia and beyond.

Our story began in the 1920s with master goldsmith Bendar, whose legacy expanded through the Middle East, New York’s Diamond District, and finally to Sydney, where the family established award-winning showrooms.

Today, with boutiques in Rhodes Waterside, Broadway, and Macquarie Centre, Linda & Co continues to blend heritage with innovation. Recognized with multiple Northern Districts and Inner West Business Awards, our reputation is built on quality, trust, and lasting relationships.

For us, it’s more than jewellry it’s about crafting pieces that celebrate life’s most meaningful moments.

Name: CRASH Jewelry
Description:
CRASH Jewelry makes sustainable uni-sex jewelry from the metal of luxury automobiles like Ferrari, Porsche, Maserati, Mercedes-Benz, Lamborghini, Audi, Bentley, and more. Christi Schimpke, the founder of CRASH Jewelry, came up with the idea to create fashion jewelry from cars when she moved her studio into her husband’s Los Angeles body shop, Beverly Coachcraft , that specializes in collision repairs for late-model European cars. Schimpke, who has a background in art history, began working with metal when she discovered her passion for jewelry fabrication after taking metalsmith courses a few years ago. 
The vision for CRASH materialized when Schimpke was working in her garage studio. During breaks from work, she observed the gorgeous cars that arrived at the shop for repair and wondered what happened to the cast-off metal. After many months of experimentation, Schimpke discovered her own unique process of cutting, bending, and sanding the scrap metal, and CRASH Jewelry started to take shape.

Each piece of CRASH jewelry is made by hand from cars with their original factory paint. Every item comes with a Certificate of Authenticity that states the type of car it came from and the date it was made. We take pride in ensuring that your CRASH cuff or necklace is of the highest quality, craftsmanship, and design. We also take pride in knowing that we are repurposing materials to create beautiful, luxury, eco-friendly jewelry.

Description:
BAUDOT 1927 es una firma de alta zapatería enraizada en el corazón de la isla de Mallorca que nace de la tradición y el buen hacer en la elaboración del calzado. Respetamos los procesos artesanales adquiridos en las últimas generaciones, siendo de los únicos que a día de hoy trabajamos la construcción “Trisquite elit”, un cosido Goodyear propio, más laborioso, artesanal y flexible. Con este sistema se consigue el equilibrio perfecto entre carácter y comodidad. Dicho proceso de fabricación se engloba en más de 300 etapas de trabajo que llevan a cabo nuestros experimentados zapateros.
Ofrecemos un producto diferenciador, de diseño único e irrepetible en el que cada par está elaborado uno a uno por manos artesanas, las cuales, gracias a sus más de 40 años de experiencia, son las responsables de dar vida y personalidad exclusiva a cada zapato creado.
Nuestra marca es sinónimo de calidad y distinción, por ello trabajamos con las mejores tenerias del mundo, y realizamos una línea bespoke  para los clientes que sólo se conforman con lo mejor.

Description:
Olá, que bom ter você por aqui!

Aqui é a Isadora e sou fundadora da Taipo.

A Taipo nasceu da paixão que sempre tive por joias em Prata e da dificuldade em encontrar modelos modernos e diversos que me representassem mais. Assim, fui em busca de um diferencial, peças para que todas as mulheres se sentissem bem, empoderadas e que  pudessem arrasar por aí com joias de qualidade! Comecei vendendo na faculdade em 2018 pra fazer uma grana extra mas tudo mudou quando me formei e decidi seguir com o que estava fazendo e amando e fui então construindo minha marca, a Taipo!

Foi em Abril de 2020 que percebi que a Taipo era inteiramente online e que precisava melhorar, virar de fato uma loja. Criei o site para otimizar todos os processos de venda e cá estou! 

Não estou sozinha nessa, a Taipo tem uma equipe de mulheres que estão comigo garantindo que nosso posicionamento digital esteja de acordo com o que queremos passar e superando a expectativa de nossos clientes ao receber sua compra.

Name: Bling Art
Description:
Bling Art False Nails is a global British false nail brand available worldwide with retail outlets on all major online marketplaces and in talks with international retail companies. 

Founded by Sophia Aziz as a sole trader on eBay in 2012, her passion for nail art and her eye for quality and design inevitably led to her developing her own collections and the bling art brand was born. Bling Art is now sold in almost all countries including the UK, Germany, France, Italy, Spain, USA, Canada, UAE and Japan.

The brand stands for creative originality and uncompromising quality; perfect for fashion forward women of today. Over the years Bling Art brand has established a reputation for producing fashionable, stylish and elegant false nail products.

Sophia attributes the success of the Bling art brand to the time, dedication and effort the company invests in making each and every nail. “We take not only the design but also the manufacturing process very seriously and ensure we do not use any low grade raw materials”.

Each part of the process is tested and certified, we have SDS certification, we are SEDEX approved and all nails are hazmat tested including our glue. Our false nails are internationally certified and EU compliant, they are manufactured from high quality virgin ABS plastic, this includes the top (UV) coating for that perfect finish.

Bling art is the perfect choice for nail novices, girls and women who love beautiful salon ready nails they can apply at home in seconds. The range has been thoughtfully designed to offer women a touch of elegance with a high impact look that they can proudly wear on their fingers.

Name: 1915 the Watch
Description:
1915 is the first mechanical wristwatch collection that was ever designed and made in Turkey. Movement apart, each and every part of the watch, from screw to crown, has been designed and engineered by Tarık Hatiboğlu. The 30 cm. wide porthole-shaped wooden box housing the wrist watch is also designed by Tarık, and turns into a wall clock after the insertion of an additional part that comes with the box.

Tarık’s further execution of an asymmetrical design on the case, a complex move in terms of production technology, imparts the watch a contemporary look. In engineering the state-of-the-art case, Tarık took the harder path of layered construction. The case was tirelessly engineered layer by layer, and through clever design manoeuvres, triumphantly emerged water resistant up to 30 meters.
1915 watch collection is strictly limited to only 1915 numbered pieces globally. It is available in three versions; including a limited edition of 19 pieces in 18K white gold, 982 pieces in bronze, and 914 pieces in stainless steel.
At the heart of the bronze from which the bronze versions’ layers were cast, Tarık threw a piece of the bronze porthole from the Gallipoli Sea. Rarely used in conventional watchmaking, bronze is a challenging material to work with. However, the outcome is well worth the laborious pursuit. The metal feels almost alive and will grow a unique patina over time.

Name: Urmaker Lian
Description:
Urmaker Håkon Lian er en familieeid urmakerforretning med tilhold i Nordre gate 9 i Trondheim – midt i byens travleste handlegate. 

Her har butikken holdt til siden den ble grunnlagt av urmaker Fredrik Falch den 20. februar 1866. Fredrik drev butikken i 31 år inntil Julius Johansen kjøpte opp butikken og overtok driften i 1897. 

I 1927 overtok Lian-familien bedriften og i dag drives den av 4. generasjons urmakermester og daglig leder Wenche Lian og hennes far Hans Kristian Lian.

Siden oppstarten i 1866 lever kjærligheten til urmakerfaget enda i beste velgående. Våre verdier har alltid vært de samme: fagkunnskap, håndverk og personlig service.

Name: GemOro Products
Description:
The GEMORO PRODUCTS division of Sy Kessler Sales, Inc. is a world renown manufacturer of innovative, feature rich products, with ergonomic and modern designs, and technological enhancements.  Many of its products have been awarded US Patents.  

Known as "The Sparkle Experts", GEMORO specializes in unparalleled commercial and consumer jewelry cleaning appliances, products and cleaning solutions.  This line includes the dominant brand of ultrasonics and steam cleaners, polishing cloths, solution jars, on-the-go cleaners, and pre-measured ultrasonic cleaning solution packets.  

GEMORO has a global reputation for producing the foremost diamond and gold testing equipment, as well as digital scales for weighing precious metals, diamonds and gems.  

GEMORO produces daylight task lighting, watch tools, digital measuring gauges, and ring finger sizers.  The company's gemological products feature CZ master diamond color grading sets, gem microscopes, magnifiers and loupes.  GEMORO is also an OEM manufacturer, producing products for many famous brands.

GEMORO PRODUCTS are available through an international network of authorized GEMORO dealers, distributors, chain stores, consumer catalog retailers, TV resellers and direct marketers located throughout the world. 

The late Sylvia and Sy Kessler established the company in 1968, and the tradition of servicing its customers has proudly continued for 50 years and three generations.  Headquartered in Dallas, Texas, the owners of Sy Kessler Sales are brothers Henry and Daniel Kessler.

Name: Sturmanskie Watches
Description:
The legendary Soviet Sturmanskie brand was launched in Moscow in 1949 when the First Moscow Watch Factory began the watch production for Soviet Air Force.

Those timepieces were made under a special order and were awarded to combat aviation pilots upon their graduation from a flight school. One of those graduates was Yuri Alekseyevich Gagarin, the first man to fly into space. He was also wearing the Sturmanskie watch on his wrist for that first space flight. That is how Sturmanskie watch became the first watch in space.

Sturmanskie watches were not available to the public until 1984. When reformation also known as "Perestroika" and The Collapse of the USSR happened - a huge watch factory located in the heart of Moscow, just 4 kilometers from The Kremlin suddenly became useless. 

Only in 2000s it was possible to restore and restart the Sturmanskie watch production within a very limited manufacture area.

There is a small watchmaking team which operates the production right now, and assembles a number of watch collections: Gagarin (historical watches, the replica of the watch that Gagarin was wearing for the first space flight), Open Space, Arktika, Sputnik, Luna, Mars and Ocean. Most of the watches are produced in a limited edition.

GAGARIN 60 YEARS is the latest collection and has three options: 2609/3771470, 2416/3815146 and 2609/3787200 – manufactured to honor the 60th anniversary of the first human spaceflight, which took place on April 12, 2021.

A unique gift featuring a special engraving to honor this event is an opportunity to touch the history.

Description:
We have had the privilege of supplying the USA with fine writing instruments and accessories for over 20 years.  We have the distinction of partnering with iconic fine writing brand, Visconti from Florence, Italy as well as the global luxury brand, S.T. Dupont from Paris, France. 

A little about our brands: 

ST Dupont - With a rich heritage dating back to 1872, S.T. Dupont is a luxury brand world renowned for producing the finest writing, smoking, and travel accessories. From exquisite fountain pens and sophisticated leather briefcases to elegant lighters and stylish cufflinks, every design is testament to the brand’s passion for creating ‘objects of desire coveted by the elite’. Focusing on exceptional quality and meticulous attention to detail, S.T. Dupont is the perfect marriage between tradition and innovation. Each item is skillfully crafted and hand-finished in France to the highest standards, resulting in a fantastic gift destined to be passed down from generation to generation. ST Dupont is the story of a 144 year-old visionary company with the savoir faire to craft objects of desire, coveted by the elite.

Visconti - For over twenty five years the name ‘Visconti’ has been synonymous with extraordinarily elegant writing instruments coming from very intense historical and technological research. Visconti offers a broad assortment of high quality rollerball, ballpoint, and fountain pens all showing strong characters and features. Visconti’s history began in Florence, Italy, an ancient city dating back to the 1st century BC and is often considered to be the birthplace of the Renaissance. The city’s past is immersed in rich history and numerous cultural, religious and political revolutions. Visconti fine writing instruments are designed and hand-crafted in a 15th century Florentine villa. Each pen reflects Visconti’s passion for Florentine history, art, science, literature, and human culture.

Missão, Visão e Valores

Missão
Fornecer produtos para o setor joalheiro, no mercado nacional e internacional, com qualidade e preços competitivos, através de um atendimento personalizado, que contemple os objetivos dos nossos clientes, colaboradores e investidores. Desenvolvendo as pessoas, a comunidade e preservando o meio ambiente.
Visão
Ser reconhecida pela qualidade dos seus produtos gerando confiabilidade e competindo de forma rentável no mercado joalheiro.

Valores
- Ética;
- Responsabilidade;
- Comprometimento;
- Flexibilidade na tomada de decisão;
- Eficiência: agilidade e precisão;
- Qualidade.

Name: Assay Office Vicenza
Description:
PRESENTAZIONE
Siamo il primo laboratorio in Italia ad occuparsi in forma specialistica di analisi e test di metalli e leghe preziose. 
Nato nel 1966 per volontà della Camera di Commercio, abbiamo una storia di innovazione, indipendenza e cura del cliente, che ci spinge ad anticipare le evoluzioni e le necessità dei mercati. 
Nel 1997 siamo stati, tra i laboratori dei metalli preziosi, i primi ad ottenere l’accreditamento secondo norma UNI CEI EN ISO/IEC 17025 e siamo tutt’oggi il punto di riferimento per il settore. Qualità, precisione e affidabilità del dato sono i nostri punti cardinali.

ANALISI
•	Analisi accreditate per la determinazione del titolo di oro e argento nelle leghe di metalli preziosi secondo le norme ISO EN UNI 11426 e 11427. Analizziamo e certifichiamo il contenuto di oro e argento in prodotti finiti, semilavorati, materie prime e scarti di lavorazione.
•	Analisi per la determinazione del contenuto di metalli preziosi nelle ceneri di oreficeria.
•	Analisi per la determinazione del contenuto di Platino, Palladio e di altri metalli nelle leghe preziose, anche tramite Spettrometria da Fluorescenza a Raggi X (ED-XRF) .
•	Analisi ICP per la determinazione di elementi chimici presenti nelle leghe preziose e analisi di cessione e rilascio Nichel secondo norme EN1811-EN12472.

SERVIZI
•	Certificazione di Garanzia del Lotto, emessa successivamente all’analisi di alcuni campioni prelevati statisticamente.
•	Certificazione aggiuntiva del titolo prevista per le imprese del settore orafo e argentiero (art. 19 D.Lgs. 251/1999) allo scopo di garantire la conformità dei prodotti (marchi e titoli legali) alla legislazione vigente.
•	Certificazione e punzonatura legale (Marchio del saggio facoltativo ITALIA TURRITA) per i prodotti destinati al mercato francese. 
•	La marcatura, meccanica o laser può essere effettuata presso il nostro Laboratorio ad Altavilla Vicentina (VI) oppure presso ALL MARKS Srl a Valenza (AL).
•	Consulenza tecnica e normativa per il settore.

Name: Meridian Diamond
Description:
As a specialist diamond buyer, our focus at Meridian Diamond is to maximize the value of each diamond or piece of jewelry that our clients present to us. We find it to be our duty to pay the most for any diamond watch or estate jewelry item, and focus on every aspect of added value that an item may hold such as a signature from famous design houses, from the likes of Tiffany & Company, Van Cleef and Arpels, Harry Winston, Graff, Bulgari and more.

Our expert staff of GIA Graduate Gemologists evaluate each piece of jewelry while educating and informing clients about each of their items. At Meridian, we present no obligation offers to clients for immediate payment based on high market values. Our ability to offer insight and information about each individual item, allows clients to make informed decisions when deciding to sell diamonds, jewelry and watches.

At Meridian Diamond Buyers, our reach into global retail markets, affords us the ability to pay more to our clients, where our international buyers can be in a region where certain items are in higher demand, and therefore demand higher premiums. This fact, in addition to our client focused foundation, has in-turn motivated countless individuals to place their jewelry items back onto the open market through our services offered at Meridian Diamond.

Name: Umutoni
Description:
Umutoni, formally known as Kaleidoscope Beauty is a luxury jewellery brand where every piece is handmade with love by the best artisans from the heart of Kenya. Celebrating empowerment, we champion intrinsic worth by committing to add value within the community.

With a 360 ethical and sustainable promise, we’re elevating the narrative that jewellery is an agent for social change when we celebrate home craftsmanship. Looking at luxury through the lens of culture, skill and community.

Given the right tools, and an opportunity for a career, our artisans are trained to create; through beadwork and brass-work, which in turn creates job opportunities for them, and provides a sustainable source of income.

With experience spanning over 15 years, our pieces are original, and where possible, avoiding the excessive use of plastic, in line with our goal of sustainability.

Our mission is and always will be:

To empower the disenfranchised
Promote a spirit of reciprocity
Cultivate a culture of equitable exchange
Our handmade, gold plated jewellery are forged with love by the very best artisans from the heart of Kenya.

The artisans making our pieces are youth from disadvantaged backgrounds, hoping to turn their lives around, developing new skills that will keep them away from the biggest threats to young men and women in slum areas - the prospects of a life of crime. Currently, we work with artisans in two slums; Kibera, the largest urban slum on the African continent and forth largest in the world as well as Baba Dogo, located on the fringes of Nairobi.
Through their skill and care we are able to ensure quality and also meet the personal desires and requirements of our customers. 

By purchasing our jewellery, you are not just buying an aesthetically pleasing piece, you are supporting the dreams of those artisans that dare to change the cards life has dealt them and in turn their family's future.

Description:

Dedicada al diseño y fabricación de Alta Joyería, Lafont se convirtió en sinónimo de calidad y prestigio en los ámbitos profesionales en los que desarrolló su actividad. Durante más de cinco décadas fue proveedor de las tiendas de joyería más exclusivas.

La innovación en el diseño, el cuidado exquisito de las materias primas y la calidad en la elaboración de sus piezas consolidaron la marca Lafont.

En 2007, Lafont Joyeros da un giro a su actividad y se orienta al servicio personalizado al cliente final con una oferta que abarca todos los estilos de joyería, desde los diseños más clásicos y solemnes hasta las propuestas más modernas y desenfadadas.

En esta nueva etapa, la calidad y la atención más cuidada siguen siendo las señas de identidad de Lafont Joyeros, ofreciendo piezas de la más alta calidad, una joyería elaborada y cuidada hasta el mínimo detalle.

La diversidad de modelos y propuestas, desde los estilos más clásicos hasta las últimas tendencias, nos permite ofrecer piezas para todos los presupuestos.

También asesoramos en la transformación o puesta al día de piezas que nuestros clientes nos confían, e igualmente realizamos los diseños propuestos por ellos mismos.

Prestamos una atención personalizada y privada.

Name: Antica Orologeria Candido Operti
Description:
"Tradizione, passione, cultura".

L’Antica Orologeria Candido Operti di Cagliari vanta una tradizione più che centenaria nel mondo del gioiello e dell’alta orologeria, deve la sua affermazione a precise scelte di qualità e classe.

Nasce a Cagliari nel 1903 come piccola impresa artigiana, il suo fondatore, Candido Operti, maestro orologiaio dalle spiccate capacità professionali, un vero esperto nella riparazione di orologi che sapeva costruire a mano e al tornio i pezzi dei movimenti. L’attività si amplia dopo qualche anno dalla sua fondazione, quando il maestro orologiaio decide di affiancare al suo lavoro, già consolidato e apprezzato, la vendita di orologi. Gradualmente si assiste ad una crescente affermazione dell’azienda in campo commerciale: la “bottega” diventa un punto vendita di prestigio, cresce grazie alle competenze e all'esperienza delle quattro generazioni della famiglia Operti, che si avvicendano una dopo l'altra.

Il Nostro è un mondo fatto d’immaginazione, creatività, estetica, ma anche di ricerca, di precisione, di competenza tecnica e di genialità. È un mondo che consente all’arte, alla maestria e all’ingegno di esprimersi a livelli molto elevati e nel quale, fin dai tempi più antichi, l’uomo ha impegnato molte delle sue energie e del suo estro creativo.

Nel 2019 l'Antica Orologeria Candido Operti festeggia i suoi 75 anni nello storico negozio sotto i portici di via Roma, nel cuore della città, diventato un punto di riferimento per tutti gli appassionati di gioielli e orologi di alta gamma.

Name: Maison Kris.K
Description:
Autodidacte, je suis passionnée par l’art depuis toute petite.
Le dessin, la danse, la photographie, j’aime apprendre et découvrir de nouvelles choses. J’ai toujours voulu travailler à mon compte, mais je n’ai jamais osé me lancer. (Je préfère rester cachée dans mon atelier et créer ! )
Après une longue hésitation, J’ai décidé de lancer Kris.K.

Mariée et maman de 5 enfants. J’ai pu trouver un compromis entre mon activité professionnelle et ma vie familiale.
Je confectionne des bijoux et des accessoires de mode originaux, faits-main.
J’aime le mélange de matière et de couleur mais j’aime aussi ce qui est épuré et simple… oui je sais, c’est complexe !

Bienvenue dans mon univers et découvrez les pièces uniques et séries limitées de mes collections.

Name: Eriness, Inc.
Description: Born and raised in booming Los Angeles, designer Erin Sachse was constantly surrounded by creative minds. Her mother served as her primary source of creative inspiration, always challenging her to look inward in order to develop her own artistic visions.  As Erin’s style evolved, she scoured the market for playful accessories she could wear everyday until she realized that the aesthetic she sought did not exist. She then decided to make the unique jewelry she had dreamed up herself. With humble beginnings as a side-project during her formative high school years, she went on to launch the first iteration of Eriness Jewelry out of her college dorm room. After continuously being stopped on the street by admiring passersby who were curious about her adornments, she decided to pursue this creative endeavor full-time. In 2015 she transitioned into fine jewelry and re-launched Eriness, combining diamonds and colorful gemstones to create an elegant and playful balance inspired by the everyday, modern, and empowered woman. Her jewelry can be found in stores like Elyse Walker and GOOP, and has been spotted on sophisticated tastemakers such as Reese Witherspoon and Michelle Obama.
