Name: Eva Gems & Jewels
Description:
Book Your “Jewelry & Gem Styling Session” https://www.evagemsandjewels.com/contact/ or info@evagemsandjewels.com

Looking for an alternative to diamonds but where to start on your journey of finding the perfect gemstone? 

•	What fine quality color gemstones are even out there? 
•	How do you know what stone is better than others?
•	Have the gems been treated or can they be synthetic? 
•	How are they priced compared to diamonds?
•	What color and jewelry design suits her (or you)?...

The right gem on the right woman reveals her spirited, magnetic character.
It’s not just fashion. It’s not just style. It’s being bold, a little rebellious, and willing to let the world see you.

As seen styling stars at GBK Productions lounges at New York Fashion Week and the Emmy's, Eva Gems & Jewels has a stone for every woman. From fashionistas & on screen beauties to the #GirlBoss creating waves every day. 

Rare pink spinels, mint green tourmalines or fabulous blue sapphires, these are just a few of the fine quality gems I source from the world’s best gem dealers in Bangkok for passionate women who demand unique jewelry. 

A diamond is 'nice' but a color stone is a bold expression of who you are. 

During your private consultation, I show you how to spot a high quality stone and what matters when buying gems and jewelry. Combining gemological recommendations and fashion insights, I’ll assist you during the selection process and will answer any questions regarding color stones (or diamonds). 

If you're looking for something special, or have a special person in mind...

•	Take a peek into my collection of unique ready-to-wear jewelry.

•	Choose for yourself or for that special day - a rare gem from my collection and create your own custom jewelry piece.

•	Want to celebrate a special occasion with an original gemstone experience? Enjoy an intimate trunk show and (fun) learning experience on colored gems in the comfort of your home or another chic location of your choosing.

Name: Pedro Luis Olivares Joyero
Description:
La empresa se fundó en 1956 de la mano de José Olivares y Manolita Cano con un taller artesanal de joyería que poco a poco fue creciendo para posteriormente dar el paso a un establecimiento de venta de joyería, platería y artículos de regalo.

Con el tiempo y el buen hacer, la empresa fue creciendo y sus cuatro hijos entre ellos Pedro Luis aprendieron el oficio familiar, para en el año 1984 hacerse cargo del negocio, que junto Teresa, su mujer, dan un giro al negocio, modernizándolo y ofreciendo las firmas de joyería y relojería más vanguardistas de la época, donde la calidad y el servicio es lo prioritario.

Actualmente, dos de sus hijos, Isabel y Alejandro son los herederos de esta tradición familiar, y lo hacen con entusiasmo, totalmente identificados con los principios de excelencia que han recibido de sus padres.

Actualmente Pedro Luis Olivares comercializa las mejores marcas mundiales de Joyería y Relojería: Rolex, TUDOR Watch, OMEGA, Breitling, TAG Heuer, Longines, Hamilton, y otras… casi todas ellas son distribuidas en exclusiva para la Región de Murcia.

Contamos con dos establecimientos en Murcia ubicados en las calles más comerciales de la ciudad, una situada en la Avenida Constitución, 4; y otra en Gran vía Escultor Salzillo, 15. El ambiente que se respira en cualquiera de sus dos tiendas, con personal que lleva con ellos toda la vida, es familiar y cercano.

Name: Colour Diam
Description:
Colour Diam Limited is an internationally recognized specialist and online retailer of high-end Fancy Coloured diamonds since 1994. Today, Colour Diam Limited is a leading supplier to renowned jewelers, designers, and manufacturers throughout the world. It is among the largest online selections of colour diamonds with both fancy and ideal cuts in various hues like pink, blue, green & yellow diamonds, clarities and sizes set for any budget, with a focus on Argyle Pink Diamonds. Its stones are mined in Australia, Africa, India, Canada and Russia. All diamonds come certified with a GIA or an argyle certificate. In fact, in 2015, the company celebrated the milestone of 10,000 online monthly visits all while maintaining a fantastic 64% returning customer rate. We also provide worldwide shipping absolutely free. With associate offices in India and Japan, the supply chain links our diamonds from mine to retailer, in all corners of the world

Colour Diam also provides live access to the inventory of GIA Diamonds on our live website and mobile app on the go!

We have just launched an Android & IOS app, will help you to purchase GIA certified diamonds with ease & on the go.

Features include:
· Multiple diamond comparison,
· Quick search,
· Watchlist with notifications,
· Multiple certificate, photo and video viewing and sharing options,
· Enquiries about one or multiple diamonds,
· Placing orders and receive confirmations,
· Account dashboard,
· Online Auctions,…and many more amazing features to save your time, get the right information at your fingertips, and increase your business with us.

We keep updating the app, time and again for best customer experience and to make it more user-friendly.

Name: Nabucco Parfum Fin
Description:

by a team of artisans to revive the fine art of perfumery 
that prevailed in the history. It is a contemporary version 
of a long-lost, introspective perfumery.

The appellation Parfum Fin, the alcohol-free label, 
created exclusively by the brand Nabucco assures 
the highest concentration of perfume oils.

Our Pafum Fin is a realization of something that existed 
and has forgotten; a time when fragrances elevated the senses
 and applying perfume was a ritual. 

Nabucco is an expression of an irreverent and eclectic style; 
not meant to impose but to be shared; 
silently speaking to the discerning nonconformist.

Name: SURITT

Name: Paola Pacheco Jewelry
Description:
Paola pacheco Jewelry is one of the fastest growing Jewelry Brands in in US and Latam.

ABOUT PAOLA PACHECO

Born in Colombia, a land synonymous with magic, history, art and fantasy, Paola grew up surrounded by the spectrum of colors, textures and inspirations that are unique to her homeland.

Ever since she was a little girl, she never missed an opportunity to sneak into her mother’s jewelry studio. Like mother, like daughter, and the fascination with precious stones and delicate metals passed on to Paola. In no time, she was letting her own imagination run wild, and soon she was developing her own designs inspired by her own vision and aesthetic.

A style that can only be described as effortlessly chic, each of Paola’s creations are custom-designed by hand, and are as unique and versatile as each and every one of her clients. But there is a common thread that brings all of her pieces together – the energy and passion crafted into each, which has come to personalize and characterize her work. For Paola, it is about going beyond the jewelry and making the person wearing her exclusive designs look and feel beautiful both inside and out.

Name: Curtis Australia
Description:
Curtis Australia is a story of a dream that became a reality.
The vision of one man combined with a philosophy of fine craftsmanship, absolute dedication and a commitment to the traditions of his craft has evolved into the global luxury brand we see today.
When Glenn Curtis inherited his grandfather's jewellery tools it sparked a love of creating precious things that has endured and grown into a story of imaginative design and beautifully crafted luxury items made in Australia.

 The history goes back even further, over five generations of craftsmanship in Australia underpin the brand, when early Curtis settlers in Australia became known for high quality leather goods. Since then, founder Glenn Curtis has worked tirelessly to create products that blend tradition, creative design and innovation. Today, it offers a wide selection of luxury pens, jewellery and accessories and can also create one off and bespoke pieces. 

Curtis corporate gifts are hand crafted and beautifully presented to satisfy the demands of high profile clients  around the world from special events, MOU's,l Royal visits, to heads of state.

Winning several international awards for design and craftsmanship, including a 'Best of the Best' Award from the prestigious Robb Report Magazine, Curtis Australia creates its products using a mix of traditional and leading edge techniques to ensure the highest standards of craftmanship.

Name: SLANE (formerly known as Slane & Slane)
Description:
A love of nature, architecture, history and the arts inspired sisters Heath and Landon Slane to begin designing jewelry in 1997. The early pieces in the SLANE collection were forged of silver, mirroring the designers’ love for sterling and their belief that sterling silver jewelry should be passed from generation to generation, just as family heirlooms are handed down from mother to daughter.

With impeccable attention to detail and quality craftsmanship, SLANE designs are inspired by historical references, architecture and the beauty found in everyday objects.  SLANE designs are hand-cast, hand-assembled and hand-finished.  Each piece features varied and unusual textures.  Pearls, earthstones, precious gems and diamonds compliment the rich foundation of the metal designs.  With a commitment to sustainability, recycled sterling silver and recycled 18kt gold are used in all SLANE production.

15 years after founding SLANE fine jewelry, Heath and Landon continue to design a palette of shapes and textures that can be built upon year after year, allowing each SLANE collector to create her own look and story.  Each piece, each collection, is designed with this in mind, knowing that today’s designs will become tomorrow’s heirlooms.

Name: LOLO Ballerina
Description:
LOLO The Ballerina  is a creation of Belgian-Italian designer Barbara Giaclina. 

LOLO, subtle but distinctive, synonymous with definitive femininity. A solar name reminiscent of Italy,  Barbara’s roots, where the shoes are handcrafted.

LOLO reflects the charm and elegance of it’s designer, a collection created from the heart. Barbara strives to capture the essence of a shoe and the purity of each style.
Contrasts and harmony: with meticulously selected leathers in a delicate rainbow of colours, extraordinary textures & prints and detailed embellishments, LOLO creates a subtle play of contrasts which adds the subdued elegance of the collection.
A combination of dream and reality continues to drive the brand.

Name: UGJIS
Description:
The huge success of the 11th edition of UGJIS was reiterated by the fact that the blue-chip show witnessed a huge turnout of trade visitors in three days. With traders looking to explore avenue to expand business pre-season, the footfalls were encouraging to note. Exquisite designs, state-of-the-art machinery and allied sections coupled with latest in digital platforms for the gem and jewellery explorer were some of the highlights of the 11th edition of UGJIS 2024
The 12th edition of the UGJIS will be held on 21st, 22nd, and 23rd February 2025.

Name: London Engraver
Description:
Ray Hood FIPG is a world renowned Master Hand Engraver. Originally from London, Ray now resides in Adelaide, Australia and runs his own successful business, London Engraver. Ray is the only hand engraver in Australia to have completed an intense 6 year apprenticeship at Garrard & Co, the former Queen’s Crown Jewellers in London. He is a member of the venerated Goldsmith’s of London and was made a Freeman of the City of London for his services to the trade.  Ray is the first person in Australia to be admitted as a Fellow to the Institute of Professional Goldsmiths. Hand engraving at this level is highly exclusive and very rarely found.

Hand engraving is an age old art-form providing bespoke and personalised engraving onto precious metals. All engraving is done entirely by hand using high speed steel gravers and is amongst the very finest offered in Australia.

Specialties include pet portraits, family crests and heraldry, antique restoration, seal engraving, deep carving, wax carving....to name but a few!

Ray has also hand engraved many prestigious sporting awards including Wimbledon, Formula 1, the FA Premier League Cup, ICC Cricket World Cup, ICC Champions trophy, the Augusta US Masters trophy, Royal Ascot and the Heineken Cup. 

Please contact London Engraver to discuss your bespoke engraving requirements. Create a family heirloom today that will last for generations - Limited only by your imagination!

Name: FILIP & Co Watches
Description:
FILIP & Co is a watch company based in Westlake, Ohio a suburb of Cleveland. We specialize in production of exclusively mechanical timepieces for ladies and men. 
Design process, hand drawings, CAD renditions and prototyping takes place in our studio here in Westlake.
Or watches are assembled, meticulously timed in five positions, individually numbered and packaged in a custom wooden box also in our Westlake studio.

Our watches are driven with ETA movements specifically customized and decorated for us by ETA Grenchen SA. These beautiful movements can be observed through the exhibition back on every one of our lines.
316L stainless steel chosen for its durability  and anti-magnetic properties is the main material for our cases.
Preference of leather, exotic or other, over stainless steel bracelet also available, is entirely our own. Endless choices of colors and patterns are certainly a welcome option.

Name: DESIGNS BY FMC, INC.
Description:
Designs By FMC was founded in 1976. Through hard work and focus on customer care Designs By FMC flourished and is now renowned for our experience, quality and style.

Designs by FMC line of business includes the manufacturing & wholesale distribution of jewelry, precious stones and costume jewelry.

FMC’s collections are designed for the woman who appreciates variety and enjoys changing things up. Who buys jewelry on impulse as often as she makes planned purchases, yet desires impeccable style, craftsmanship and “wow factor” in every jewel she wears.

Each of our custom developed jewelry collections are conceived, designed, manufactured and delivered to our top retail partners with full ownership of the design and production process every step of the way.

Name: Givori
Description:
Givori is the creator of exquisite phone pieces. Beyond this, Givori is a consummate designer dedicated to craft. It takes many hundreds of hours of skilled and meticulous finesse and attention to detail to produce only one piece. Like a fine watch, bag or item of jewellery, Givori is a fashion essential for the individual who lives life on the catwalk of their own lives. This is the story of Givori. This dedication. This craft. This insistence on embellishing their lives through experiences and possessions. 

Every phone is prepared and covered by hand. Each item requires hours of work, from the design idea to the meticulous positioning of each embellishment. The skilled design team draws on expertise from such varied fields as fine art, architecture, graphic design, jewelry and model making.

Givori is committed to offering customers the best post-purchase assistance, made possible through its service guarantees. It is the only brand of adorned phones that offers one-year guarantee on the hardware as well as the cosmetic materials, with free unlimited door-to-door repair service.

Name: Алтайский ювелирный завод им. Демидова А.Н.
Description:
Алтайский ювелирный завод им. Демидова А.Н. – современный производитель ювелирных украшений. В наших изделиях сочетается классика и современные направления ювелирной моды.
При создании ювелирных украшений мы используем только якутские бриллианты.
Мы стремимся к воплощению красоты и гармонии в наших изделиях.
Алтайский ювелирный завод им. Демидова А.Н. – воплощение вечных ценностей.
Филигранный подход к производству ювелирных украшений возможен только при использовании современного оборудования, которым оснащено наше производство. Производственный цикл завода был разработан по специальному заказу инженерами фирмы GALONI. На каждом этапе используется высокоточное итальянское и немецкое оборудование.
Каждое изделие на производстве проходит три стадии технического контроля. Все изделия изготавливаются в соответствии с ГОСТ, действующими на территории РФ.
При разработке моделей «Алтайский ювелирный завод им. Демидова А.Н.» тесно сотрудничает с канадской дизайнерской компанией, представленной на рынке с 1973г. Продумывая идею, мы отталкиваемся от модных тенденций и предпочтений целевой аудитории.
Наше предприятие также занимается изготовлением эксклюзивных ювелирных изделий, геральдической и корпоративной символики по индивидуальному дизайну.
Современные технологии, высокая квалификация и многолетний опыт ювелиров позволяют гарантировать высокое качество наших изделий. Специалисты завода постоянно осваивают новые технологии, проходят обучение и перенимают передовой опыт российских и зарубежных компаний.

Name: JB Diamonds & Fine Jewelry Inc.
Description:
The best kept secret in Orange County!  JB Diamonds is a family owned and operated business, a fine jewelry manufacturer and wholesaler that has been serving the Newport Beach and Orange County area since 1983.  The reason why we can keep our prices competitive it is because we do all our work in-house and buy our loose diamonds directly from the cutters. The team of seven master jewelers, two 3D CAD designer, two watchmakers of brand name watches and a graduate gemologist makes us a full service store.  

We specialize in custom jewelry designing, from concept to finish. If you can think of it, we can make it. 3D computer modeling, wax making, and casting, stone setting and finishing, laser soldering, engraving, any repair, all done right here on the premises. If you have jewelry that needs to be repaired, or if you are looking to redesign your old jewelry or ring into something new, we can help you!  Our store is one of the most technologically advanced full service jewelry store in the area.  As a member of an international diamond trade network, we also have access to loose diamonds and gemstones from 0.01ct to 50 Carats.  We can get any stone for you and match any price.

Years of business has earned us a reputation for quality craftsmanship, friendly personal service, and trust.  If you are in the market for an engagement ring, we will be happy to answer any questions you have and walk you through the process of finding the perfect ring to fit your style and budget. We have an extensive inventory of settings for any stone, fine jewelry, estate pieces, and settings to suit your taste. Come visit our showroom or call us at (949) 644-7366 for an appointment.

Name: Nayestones
Description:
Nayestones is a Belgian contemporary jewelry brand founded by designer Natalie Schayes. Crafted in Antwerp, the heart of European jewelry craftsmanship. Nayestones creates timeless pieces that merge modern innovative design with traditional handmade high-quality savoir-faire. 

The brand is defined by a bold and minimalist aesthetic. Stones appear to float, subtly suspended within architectural forms that embrace space and asymmetry. It reveals the natural beauty of the stones while offering a new vision of refined luxury. 

From sophisticated rings to delicate necklaces, each piece is designed to be worn as a quiet expression of strength, individuality, and modern femininity. 

Nayestones is about wearing something that resonates with who you are.

Name: MementoDream.com  Semi-Precious Gemstone Jewelry in Bali
Description:
Fine Handcrafted STERLING SILVER Semi-Precious Gemstone JEWELRY. Memento: more than only stones

 “Memento” means “remember.But what should we remember? 

The ancient memory of the stones turns them into something alive, they have a soul. In many cultures, like here, in Bali, stones have been used to stimulate clairvoyant abilities, or have been utilized for healing purposes. For me stones are connectors to our ancient origin. This is the mystery I want to let shine in my pieces with simplicity: remember our origin, remember who we are. 

 I work together with traditional Balinease Masters and select carefully my stones and silver in the ancient town of Celuk, known of being in the past the place where the jewelry suppliers for the royal families were. 

  Every piece is packaged with a description card, in a decorative gift box.

  e-Kikus.com Ayuda a Emprendedores (worldwide) en sus ideas y pasiones,hacerlas realidad y vivir de ello. 

Mi apuesta: llegar al mundo Online de forma "sensata",eficaz y poderosa.Aprovechar lo Online para "atrapar" al público Objetivo del Emprendedor.

"Memento Dream" de Estibaliz es simplemente GENIAL.Lo que crea esta Artista tenía que ver la luz y llegar a mas gente.

Medios:

Objetivo :Captar "fans"(mail)+flexibles en distribución de Contenido+Engagement+Promoción Exclusiva

Name: Raquelle Bianco
Description:
Raquelle Bianco wear your emotions:
             jewelry brand Raquelle Bianco gaining momentum in the USA

Since its commercial launch at the 2010 JCK show in Las Vegas, the Raquelle Bianco brand has developed into one of the fastest rising brands in the jewelry world.
In just a few months, over 200 USA retail stores have bought into the vivacious colors, excellent price points, and versatile collections of Raquelle Bianco.

“Raquelle is an ancestral inspiration” says Eddie Weiss “She was a designer in 1910 when there were not many women designers. We were also inspired by what we thought was a lack of fascinating colors and styles at affordable prices in the market”.

Raquelle Bianco jewelry is made for the modern and dynamic woman who loves to accessorize on a daily basis.
The designer’s research is based on new materials. The first collection, in fact, is enjoying great success thanks to innovative techniques combining enamel and silver as well as the incorporation of genuine gem stones.

Strongly influenced by Italian classic jewelry, Raquelle Bianco combines love for vivid materials crafted into modern shapes with a nod to family history.Traditional icons, classic ornaments and modern symbols are ‘translated’ into contemporary and fun jewelry with imaginative details.

The collection is currently sold at some of the most renowned boutiques and jewelry stores. Please view our website for store locations.
www.raquellebianco.com

Name: Madì Argento S.r.l
Description:
La nostra storia:
L’ Azienda nasce a Lucca nel 2004 come produttore e distributore di gioielli in Argento. Negli anni acquisisce posizioni di mercato e concessionari su tutto il territorio nazionale.
Nel 2015 nasce Laguna, collezione esclusiva di gioielli in Argento 925 e pietre ecologiche, che si afferma negli anni evolvendo in nuove forme e collezioni.

La cura dei dettagli:
Realizziamo gioielli in Argento 925 con finiture in Oro rosé e meccanismi di chiusura di altissima qualità e durata. 
Selezioniamo con cura pietre e materiali per le nostre creazioni, dedicando un’ attenzione particolare alla placcatura e alla galvanica. 

L’ attenzione dedicata all’ universo femminile:
Il nostro motore trainante, esaltare la bellezza della donna, creando gioielli che accompagnano nei momenti della giornata, a lavoro, nel tempo libero e in una cena tra amici.

Name: Marei New York
Description:
Marei New York is a woman-founded, Black- and Latina-owned fine jewelry brand by New York-born Egyptian-Dominican designer Angie Marei. Rooted in heritage, elevated by design, and driven by purpose, Marei celebrates individuality and empowers people to express their most confident, authentic selves.

With a background in art, design, and advertising, Angie creates fearless and seductive fine jewelry that blends the opulence of ancient civilizations with the edge of modern architecture and fashion. Every piece is handcrafted to evoke power, elegance, and magnetism—made for those who dare to stand out.

Marei’s collections are not only beautiful, but meaningful—infused with symbolism, ancestral legacy, and a spiritual undercurrent. Whether worn for everyday empowerment or life's most significant moments, her jewelry becomes an extension of identity and intention.

Available in limited collections and bespoke offerings, Marei New York is committed to ethical craftsmanship, storytelling through design, and uplifting others.

This is fine jewelry made with soul.
Designed to empower.
Crafted to captivate.

Name: Mel Boteri
Description:
Mel Boteri creates bold yet refined leather handbags and accessories designed exclusively for each client. An Atlanta-based designer, Mel personally sources the finest European leathers, fabrics and hardware for her collections, all of which are handcrafted in the Mediterranean region of Alicante, Spain.

A marketplace saturated with “one-size-fits-all,” flashy merchandise ultimately inspired Mel to change the way that shopping is perceived, and to create an experience that is driven by personal attention and relationships. She laid the groundwork for her business during her last semester at Emory University, and officially launched the brand with the first collection of handbags in the fall of 2009. 

Mel Boteri delivers on the values of craftsmanship and personalized service through small production with higher quality, versus mass manufacturing and less attention to detail. We are pleased to offer our corporate clients the opportunity to customize a distinct collection of Mel Boteri items for your corporate incentives, gifts and events.

Name: GoldPrice
Description: GoldPrice - это ювелирный сервис, позволяющий клиентам выгодно, удобно и безопасно реализовать самые различные запросы, связанные с ювелирными украшениями (обмен, продажа, покупка ювелирных изделий, проведение аукционов). Главное - мы освобождаем клиентов от всех неудобств и трудностей (которые автоматически "включены" во все эти процессы), берем их на себя, и гарантируем качество и безопасность каждой сделки.

Name: Tariq Riaz
Description:
The jewelry of Tariq Riaz sits at the meeting place of art and mechanics

Movement is captured in a single moment. Culture and science dance together to tell stories inspired by nature, by culture, and by the people who wear his work. 

Using the earth’s finest materials, and supported by a team of skilled craftsmen using state-of-the-art technology, Tariq designs and creates unique pieces to be collected, worn and loved for generations. His Abu Dhabi workshop is a place for experimentation and play, a place to celebrate the possibilities of beauty and science. 

The result is work that is both beautiful and uncommonly wearable. Tariq’s background in robotics and design has helped him solve familiar problems. How to ensure rings fit when your fingers change with age, temperature or arthritis? How to stop a ring from rotating on your finger? We know, and our growing list of awards shows our success.

Ingeniously designed mechanisms are at the heart of Tariq’s AbrazoFIT philosophy: design that ensures jewelry fits perfectly, moves with your body, now and forever.

Name: Manifest.Design
Description:
Welcome to Manifest Design on Linked In! Check out our showcase pages (on the right) for our Jewelry range, Private Label offering and creative Business Gifting line! 

Now...who and what is Manifest Design?

We are a Design company striving to create 'Everyday Wearable Art. Gorgeous handmade ornaments whose inspirations are varied and eccentric - Gnarled corals, sensuous vines, bold rock sculptures, urban art, opera, street food all somehow influence a unique visual vocabulary that is at once familiar and also unexpected. The indelible touch of the Sculptor and the metal-smith add an additional layer of intrigue and warmth that truly make the Manifest Design (www.manifestdesign.in) pieces unique.

The founders.....

Established in the summer of 2013, Manifest Design a dream project of siblings Manreet & Samraat Deol that has been many years in the making. They set out to create a company that would create authentic meaningful Design while perfectly utilizing their life experiences in the diverse worlds of Luxury design and cutting edge e-commerce businesses.

Name: Neha Creation
Description:
Neha Creation is a family-owned business specializing in crafting and trading a wide range of diamond jewelry. Our collection seamlessly blends traditional and contemporary designs, featuring timeless pieces like earrings, rings, bracelets, necklaces, and pendant sets. With the largest selection of earrings available, you’ll find endless choices to suit every style.

Our Services:
Customized Bridal Jewelry – Every bride deserves perfection on her special day, and we’re here to make that happen.
Personalized Jewelry – Share your ideas, and our expert designers and artisans will transform them into beautiful creations.
Engraved Jewelry – Understanding the sentimental value of jewelry, we offer custom engravings to add a personal touch to your gifts.
We are dedicated to offering premium, certified, and hallmarked jewelry for all ages, ensuring top quality with every piece.

Our commitment to excellence is, quite literally, engraved in gold.

Our Story:
Our journey started in 1984, when Suresh Jhunjhunwala, our founder, moved to the United States to master the art of diamond trading and jewelry making. Over the years, his expertise grew, spanning from diamond procurement and wholesale to creating finely crafted diamond jewelry for all occasions. His sharp eye for detail and passion for quality are what make our pieces exceptional.

After returning to Mumbai, Suresh founded Neha Creation, serving a market where jewelry is not only a symbol of beauty but also a treasured heirloom passed from one generation to the next. What one generation invests in, the next proudly wears and cherishes.

Name: Global Gemological Laboratory Malaysia
Description:
OUR STORY

Diamonds and coloured stones take years to form, weaving a rich tapestry of untold stories found deep within. And that is why they are precious in our eyes. Our group of certified gemologists are professionally trained to provide an objective and balanced assessment of these gems – diamonds, diamond jewellery, coloured stones and pearls – to reveal their true character. 

Our professional qualifications equip us with the technical gemology knowledge; yet our advantage lies in how we combine our human analytical skills with technological expertise in utilising advanced state-of-the-art equipment. We have invested in an array of the latest up-to-date technology to deliver accurate testing reports that you – be it a gemstone trading specialist, corporate buyer or simply just a hobbyist with a passion in gems – can truly rely on.
Location: Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur

Name: Karni Jewellers (Hyderabad)
Description:
Karni Jewellers has a wide range of most exquisite designs in the finest style. The company has created a reputation for quality, service, versatility and expertise in its field.

Leading Wholesaler – Evoking trust for five decades now, Karni Jewellers is known for its handmade jewellery with unique designs and flawless craftsmanship. It has become the ultimate destination for the choicest jewellery.

Luxurious Retailer – Industrialist Pinky Reddy and Actress Amala Nagarjuna inaugurated thier Hyderabad store on November 11, 2012. It is an encyclopedia of ethnic designs and a must-visit for connoisseurs of signature jewellery.

Name: Carroll's Jewelers
Description: Carroll’s Jewelers is a family-owned and operated jewelry store, offering fine gifts and timeless craftsmanship. Founded by Carroll Seghers in Cincinnati, Ohio, in 1928, Carroll’s relocated to Fort Lauderdale in 1961. We are proud to celebrate four generations of dedicated service. At Carroll’s, exceptional customer service and consumer protection are cornerstones of our business. We hold ourselves to the highest ethical and professional standards, ensuring only the best for our customers.

Name: Joalharia Miguel Vaz d'Almada
Description:
Conscientes do ténue equilíbrio entre tradição e visão do futuro, procuramos cristalizar a nossa inspiração em peças de joalharia destinadas a desafiar o tempo. Nascidas em sonhos, idealizadas em ecos do nosso mundo, geradas com afeto e criadas pelas nossas mãos, as nossas peças conquistam o sorriso de todos os que nos procuram e asseguram um tesouro original. A harmonia entre técnica e sonho permite-nos gravar no tempo a magia da joalharia portuguesa. Desde 1989, até ao limite do futuro.

Aware of the fine balance between tradition and the vision of the future, we cast our inspiration into jewellery designed to defy time itself. Born from dreams, envisioned in the echoes of our world, conceived with affection, and created by our own hands, our jewellery brings a smile to the faces of those who seek a unique treasure. The harmony between technology and dreams allows us to carve in time the magic of Portuguese jewellery. Since 1989, to the edge of the future.

Name: AlKhudairi Jewelry
Description:
Founded in Kuwait in the early 1990s, Alkhudairi Jewellery has since carved a niche in the market. Offering high quality unique pieces of handcrafted jewellery. With the meticulous eye of the head designer, Alkhudairi Jewellery captures a love of pairing unusual materials harmoniously incorporating gold with gemstones to create pieces that are truly one of a kind.

The founder Mr. AbdulAziz M. AlKhudairi, is a member of a merchant family renowned for specializing in the gold trade since 1967.It was at the tender age of 17, precisely in 1980, that he had his first experience in jewellery design when he designed his diamond and black onyx watch handcrafted by the Greek jeweller Mikhaillis and considered to be a unique piece of art.

In 1988, Mr. AbdulAziz started designing jewellery as a sideline to his work in his family’s gold trade business. After the successful promotion and increased demand or his designs in the region, in late 80′s he decided to refurbish his father’s gold trade business into a jewellery design emporium.

Description:
4N, montres de haute horlogerie à affichage numérique 
La marque 4N est née de la volonté de revenir à une évidence dans l‘affichage numérique, en proposant une alternative mécanique aux montres indiquant l’heure au moyen d’aiguilles rampantes.
Le modèle 4N se distingue par un affichage vraiment efficace et spectaculaire. L’heure s’affiche clairement au centre du cadran, dans une démesure du caractère (5,5 mm), qui font de 4N une innovation exclusive dans le domaine de la haute horlogerie.

Montres de haute horlogerie à affichage numérique.
4N was born from the desire to create a simple digital display and propose a mechanical alternative to analogue timepieces with moving hands.
The 4N model is characterized by a effective and spectacular display. The time is clearly displayed on a horizontal plane in the centre of the dial, in strong lettering (5.5mm). The formal vocabulary and character of the lettering used make 4N an exclusive innovation in the fine watchmaking world.

Name: Haywards of Hong Kong
Description:
Haywards of Hong Kong specialize in designing and producing high end jewellery, with a particular focus on bespoke made diamond pieces. Every diamond and gemstone is sourced specifically for each piece of jewellery, which is then designed in house and handcrafted by our master jewellers in Hong Kong. 

With a focus on a high level of service, at Haywards we provide a comprehensive explanation on how diamond quality is appreciated and how the pricing system works. This ensures that all of our clients make an informed choice when buying their jewellery piece. For those making their first jewellery purchase we offer advice on style and design options making the entire process pleasant and personal. 

From simple solitaires to complex clusters, pendants earrings and bracelets, each and every piece of Haywards jewellery is unique.

Name: The Bella Hair Company
Description: The Bella Hair Company (BHC) is a premier provider of 100% Brazilian human hair. Over the last two years, BHC has thoroughly researched and developed its product line to include only 100% authentic human hair. We have one philosophy: Beautiful Hair for Beautiful Women. We believe women deserve the highest quality human hair to enhance their natural look.

Name: BrendaNewDesigns.Etsy.com
Description: A lifelong crafter and designer, Brenda New has been designing and making unique handmade beaded designer jewelry since 2002.  Brenda has sold her jewelry on several websites, at boutiques and gift shops including the Omni Hotel gift shop, Hallmark stores, an art gallery, at Bloomingdales/Trunk Shows, and at art shows such as the Lake Eola Art Show in Orlando, FL.  Her jewelry ranges from higher end pearl, silver, gold, Swarovski crystal, and gemstone jewelry, to more affordable fashion jewelry items.  Her designs range from practical everyday items to evening and bridal designs, to interesting Bohemian designs.  Brenda's jewelry will take you from casual day, to a day at work, to an evening on the town.  Many of her items come in matching sets so you won't have to search elsewhere for earrings to match a necklace you just purchased.  Brenda is known for her unique and fashionable "Wrap and 1/2" beaded bracelets where one size fits all and they are stackable. Visit our jewelry store on Etsy where we are always adding new items.  Please private message Brenda for special inquiries.  We hope you enjoy shopping Brenda's unique and personal jewelry designs.

Description: Our mission at HauteCarat is to provide our customers with attainable bling they can feel good about. That’s why we’ve harnessed the power of science to create chemically-identical gems in labs instead of dangerous mines. Our unique process allows us to provide an unparalleled selection of styles at prices that work for our customers — while still offering the highest quality and customer service in the industry. It is fashionable, and fashion-forward. Our jewelry is well designed and well made. Our brand appeals to an upscale, lifestyle-driven consumer, who enjoys luxurious jewelry and appreciates quality. 

The Gottlieb & Sons' designs are unequaled and sought after for their quality of materials and workmanship. We use only the highest grade diamonds and gem stones along with 14kt gold, 18kt gold and platinum. Our craftsman are highly skilled model makers, setters, and jewelers who take great pride in their work. 

Integrity, attention to detail, quality and craftsmanship go into every piece of fine jewelry from Gottlieb & Sons. Ask your retailer for Gottlieb & Sons by name. America's premier jewelry manufacturer. Please email, call or fax Gottlieb & Sons at our home office.

Our cabinet knobs and handles are hand-cast primarily of solid fine pewter and bronze with a variety of finishes. Our collections offer decorative knobs, pulls, bin pulls, hinge plates, cabinet backplates, and appliance pulls. Hand-cast and finished at our fine arts foundry using old-world methods. Name: MENNICE Polskie | Mennica Rosenberg | Produkty Mennica Polska | VALCAMBI | Złote sztabki | Monety
Description:
Mennica Rosenberg to platforma i sklepy stacjonarne dla inwestorów prywatnych oraz instytucjonalnych | Jesteśmy jednym z największych dystrybutorów metali szlachetnych w Europie. | MENNICE POLSKIE to złoto i Srebro pochodzi bezpośrednio z kopani metali szlachetnych . Oferujemy możliwość zakupu, sprzedaży czy też inwestycji pod postacią monet oraz sztabek czy też wyrobów okolicznościowych. Produkty są wykonane z najwyższej jakości srebra, złota, platyny i palladu. Podlegamy pod Narodowy Bank Polski.

Od roku 1956 wznowiona działalność a pod obecną nazwą w Polsce Mennica Rosenberg jest firmą zrzeszoną w LBMA * London Bullion Market Association. Jest to organizacja która nadzoruje hurtowy rynek złota i srebra na świecie. Członkostwo w LBMA jest gwarantem najwyższych standardów oraz dobrych praktyk handlowych gwarantując klientom bezpieczeństwo. Niezależnie, czy chcą Państwo zainwestować w złoto / srebro na przyszłość, czy też szukają Państwo specjalnej monety do ukoronowania swojej kolekcji, wszystko można znaleść na stronie https://mennica-rosenberg.pl

Name: "Meridian" Jewelry Free Economic Zone
Description:
Armenia is an old country in the South Caucasus region at the center of the crossroads of Western Asia and Eastern Europe with thousand-year-old traditions and culture. Armenians have created a very rich history in the art of jewelry, the best traditions of which continue to these days. Masterpieces created by gifted and skilled Armenian craftsmen have always been of great demand all over the world. 
Armenian Jewellers Association (AJA) initiated and currently implements a large-scale project in Armenia -the establishment of a Jewelry Free Economic Zone (FEZ). 
“Meridian” Jewelry Free Economic Zone is a unique platform with cluster infrastructures organized for jewelry, diamond cutting and watchmaking manufacturing companies in the center of Yerevan.

Name: Schoeffel Pearl Ltd

For over a century, Schoeffel has combined German craftsmanship with a passion for natural elegance, creating iconic designs that redefine the timeless allure of pearls.

The brand is celebrated for its commitment to authenticity, exclusivity, and innovation, offering unique pearl creations that blend tradition with contemporary aesthetics. Each piece is a work of art — from classic strands to modern statement jewelry — crafted to inspire confidence, individuality, and refined sophistication.

Schoeffel continues to be a symbol of elegance and creativity, bringing pearls into the spotlight of modern luxury.

Specialties: Fine Jewelry, Pearls, Luxury Goods, German Craftsmanship, Jewelry Design, Timeless Elegance

Name: Hermle India
Description:
Hermle Clocks was founded in 1922 in the Gosheim, Swabian Alb region of Southern Germany by Franz Hermle & Sons. By 1930, Hermle was leading in manufacturing and cutting-edge operations.

Even after the war, Hermle was still producing high standard clocks, along with producing clocks for other companies. The overall focus at the beginning of Hermle's life was precision, multiple times in their product line they touch on the idea of precision. In the 1970 they expanded to engineering and quartz movement clocks. Hermle Clocks is a German family owned and operated company in its third generation, Rolf Hermle joined the board in 1978. Hermle manufactures mechanical mechanisms, battery operated mechanisms, accessories such as dial, pendulums, weight shells, and do-it-yourself clock kits as well as finished clocks. Hermle is a manufacturer that sells to the wholesale industry and operates in over 80 countries with offices in Germany and the United States, since 1977, as Hermle North America (changed from Hermle Black Forest clocks in January 2011).[2]

Hermle clocks India is brought to you by Skylarkk Trading Company. The clocks will soon be available at very few retailers across India and the company’s main focus would be to work with architects, interior designers and the luxury goods industry. Hermle Clocks are now available at www.hermleclocks.in

Name: Eilat Diamonds
Description:
Eilat Diamonds nasce a Roma con l'idea di imporsi sul mercato attraverso l’originalità e l'alta qualità che rendono i nostri prodotti unici nel loro genere.
La missione di Eilat Diamonds è quella di creare un regalo per rendere indimenticabile un momento speciale. Che sia per amore, amicizia, ricorrenza, vogliamo che il regalo associato a questo ricordo sia emozionante e unico. Questa è l’idea che ci spinge, ci dà gioia e soddisfazione.
La peculiarità di Eilat Diamonds è quella di proporre solo diamanti di qualità, all’interno di sigilli esclusivi e completamente personalizzabili. Il tutto presentato all’interno di astucci di diversi tipi, dai contenuti originali per esaltare le caratteristiche, l’impatto visivo del vostro dono e renderlo un’emozione unica.
La vera innovazione di Eilat sta nei Sigilli i quali, oltre a contenere e preservare il diamante, diventano un modo unico ed esclusivo per presentare il prezioso regalo.
Le card contenute in ognuno di essi posso essere personalizzate in base al momento o all’occasione che si vuole rendere speciale.

With sheer confidence in the industry worldwide and for the love of  jewellery, we incorporated KUNAL JAIN JEWELLERY on June 1st, 2018.

Van Ree Watches presents world’s first watch ever to store the DNA of its owner or his beloved ones: the Van Ree Personal DNA watch. 

In a time where uniqueness is merely treated as an empty marketing term and ‘rare’ seldom exists, time was ready to create something that would make one stand out from the crowd. Since one’s DNA is what makes one truly unique from another, each Van Ree watch is the only watch of its kind. The Van Ree Personal watch is truly priceless; it preserves the blueprint of a loved one, forever across time itself. 

Time has never been so personal…

Name: P. C. LUNIA HERITAGE LUXURY BRAND
Description:
P. C. LUNIA, A HERITAGE LUXURY BRAND DEDICATED TO REVIVING THE DYING ART OF BEAUTIFULLY HAND CRAFTED BEJEWELLED TEXTILES AND MONUMENTAL GEMSTUDDED FINE SILVER SCULPTURES THAT WERE ONCE CYNOSURES IN ROYAL COURTS. 
WE ARE PASSIONATE ABOUT BRINGING THE GLAMOUR AND GRANDEUR OF  ROYAL CULTURE AND HERITAGE TO DISCERNING CONNOISSEURS  WORLDWIDE.
THE STORY OF THE LUNIA FAMILY DATES BACK TO THE 10TH CENTURY DURING WHICH TIME THEY HELD THE PROMINENT POSITION OF PRIME MINISTER IN THE STATE OF MULTAN. 
IN THE LATE 1700s THE LUNIAS WERE INVITED BY THE MAHARAJA SAWAI JAI SINGH II OF JAIPUR TO SETUP AN ESTABLISHMENT PURVEYING LUXURY GOODS AND JEWELRY.
THE HISTORIAN D. K. TAKNET'S BOOK, ‘JAIPUR: GEM OF INDIA’ TESTIFIES THAT  SETH GULAB CHAND LUNIA WAS INSTRUMENTAL IN PUTTING JAIPUR ON THE JEWELRY MAP OF THE WORLD. 
IN THE 20TH CENTURY OUR FOUNDER, PUKHRAJ CHAND LUNIA WAS ONE OF THE 1ST JEWELERS FROM INDIA TO BE INVITED TO SHOWCASE PRECIOUS OBJECTS D'ART TO HIGH SOCIETY IN USA. SUCH WAS THE ALLURE OF ‘JEWELS OF INDIA EXHIBITION’ THAT IT WAS SHOWCASED AS PROMINENT NEWS ITEMS IN NEW YORK TIMES AND NEW YORK POST. 
HAVING FIRMLY ESTABLISHED HIS COMPANY IN HI-NETWORTH BUSINESS CIRCLES IN NEW YORK AND ROOTED WITH A STRONG BASE IN INDIA, HIS LOVE FOR INNOVATION TOOK WINGS AND FLEW HIM TO SOUTH EAST ASIA, WHERE HE AMASSED COPIOUS AMOUNTS OF ROUGH EMERALD, RUBY AND SAPPHIRE IN EVERY SHADE POSSIBLE WHICH HE TRANSFORMED INTO RAINBOW COLORED PRECIOUS STONE NECKLACES OF SUCH BEAUTY THAT HOLLYWOOD CELEBRITIES INCORPORATED THEM IN THEIR JEWELRY COLLECTIONS!
AS THE BEARER OF THIS LEGACY, WE TAKE GREAT PRIDE IN SHOWCASING HIS BRAND OF CREATIVITY, REFINED TASTE AND LOVE FOR PERFECTION THAT IS SYNONYMOUS WITH CRAFTING DISTINCTIVE P. C. LUNIA STYLE MASTERPIECES FOR ART CONNOISSEURS GLOBALLY. LIKE OUR FOUNDER, WE ARE COMMITTED TO SUPPORT OUR  CRAFTSMEN TO KEEP THE ROYAL LEGACY OF BEJEWELLED TEXTILES, FINE SILVER SCULPTURES AND CHANDELIERS ALIVE.

Name: Apples of Gold
Description:
Every company has a story and many of Their customers are curious to know how Apples of Gold came to be a main contender in the online jewelry market. Since shopping with us and getting to know us isnt quite as simple as wandering into the jewelry shop and chatting over the glass cases, They strive to give that personal, relational feel by telling a little of Their companys story and background. 


Apples of Gold launched its online presence on the premise that traditional jewelers are overpriced. Markups can range anywhere from 100-300%.  Seeing the jewelry prices in high-end retail jewelry stores as exorbitant and plainly unfair, Apples of Gold dared to believe there was a better way.


Branching off of a Los Angeles jewelry wholesaler with over 25 years of experience in the jewelry industry, Apples of Gold launched in the year 2000 with the resolute promise of providing the same, high-end jewelry as any successful jewelry retailer, but at a dramatically lower price.

Name: Zou Bisou - Acessórios
Description:
A primeira dúvida que paira no ar, provavelmente, é: o significado de Zou Bisou. Retirada da música francesa interpretada por Gillian Hill, a expressão caracteriza-se pelo ruído provocado quando dois lábios se tocam, configurando um beijo. O som de beijos. Romântico, não?

Envolto dessa aura parisiense, construímos algo que definimos como um empreendimento que busca solucionar necessidades e satisfazer as vaidades da mulher atual. Construímos a loja online de semijoias Zou Bisou.

Afinal, desde os anos 20, a moda influencia diretamente no comportamento, vestimentas e sentimentos das pessoas. Desde o aparecimento de Coco Chanel, Jean Patou, entre outros grandes nomes, estilo e beleza tem se reinventado. E nossa maior função é compartilhar essa transformação contínua de bom gosto e vaidade. É realizar desejos e sonhos de nossas damas da era moderna.

Com a comunicação virtual em alta, tornamos online o nosso negócio, o que proporcionou um elo maior com o consumidor. Dessa maneira, estaremos conectados com todo o país (e, possivelmente, com o mundo!)

Name: Mody Diamonds
Description:
Mody Diamonds is family-owned relationship-driven American diamond and jewelry importer and wholesaler in Houston, TX (USA). With over 4 generations of luxury goods and wholesaling experience, our team has been dedicated to offering ethically sourced, competitively priced diamonds and jewelry for dealers and retailers worldwide since 1978.

 Our Core Value 
We value trust and invest in enduring, confident long-term relationships with our customers and supply chain by actively upholding accountability, ethical sourcing practices, integrity, and reliability.

 Our Mission
We are committed to providing a friendly, reliable service and delivering competitively priced diamonds, gemstones and jewelry to dealers and retailers worldwide. Whatever the size of the transaction, our mission remains the same. 

 Our Inventory
We procure a fast-moving collection of certified and non-certified imported, newly mined, and re-introduced earth-mined (natural) diamonds, ranging from 0.01 carats (cts) up to 5 cts, and certified and non-certified lab-grown (man-made) diamonds up to 15 cts. You can also find your client’s perfect jewelry item from our wide selection of pre-owned, manufactured, and antique fine jewelry and from our unique collection of natural colored gemstones. Our merchandise is available to qualified resellers on online diamond trading networks, our website and through user-friendly mobile applications.

Description:
Form Bespoke Jewellers are a multi award winning fine jewellers, specialising in bespoke engagement rings and wedding rings. With a combined experience of over 60 years in the jewellery industry, our Yorkshire team are experts in working with platinum, 18 carat gold, diamonds and precious gems. We are highly recommended for our friendly customer service, high quality products and expert British craftsmanship.

Name: JU*MA Jewel-Smile bvba
Description:
Specially for Women
A new Jewel is born, the DenWell. 

One day, Juliaan Matheuwezen's wife came home with a shiny stone on one of her teeth. She was thrilled. Unfortunately the little gem, which was only glued to the tooth, disappeared after only a few weeks. It was either lost or more probably swallowed by accident.
Being a skilled teeth-technician Matheuwezen started to think about more "solid" alternatives. On the other hand, it also had to be something that was removable whenever the wearer was ready for something new.
Grills: everything that shines isn’t gold
A little research quickly leads him to grills, already quite common amongst rappers and hiphoppers. These "grillz" or fronts are decorative covers that snap over one or more of their teeth.
More on the track of body adornments like tattoos and piercings, he discovered a new means for young people to express their uniqueness in a unique way:             the mouthjewel. He found also a new name for it; the “Denwell or DenWell”,       den(tal)well(ness).
A thing of beauty is a joy that can be removed
The mouthjewels of JU-MA (JUliaan MAtheuwezen) are attached on teeth and can be removed without damaging it whatsoever. He recommends working with a licensed dentist (to have a perfect mould) and jewelry stores (for the diamonds you like).
It’s as simple as a partial prothesis, made of white or yellow gold, or chrome cobalt. For those allergic to these metals it can be coated with titan-nitride. They are placed in front of the teeth which greatly reduces the risk for plaque.
"I discovered that different models were available for men, but almost none for women, Matheuwezen say, there was definitely a need for elegance and feminity”. EVEolution! 
Matheuwezen adds filosofically: "People will tend to smile more with a jewel (DenWell) in their mouth. Smiling is relaxing, so our mouth-jewels are good against stress, too".

www.ju-ma.com 
www.jewel-smile.com 
info@ju-ma.com

Name: Sandra Cadavid
Description:
Established in 2011, Sandra Cadavid is a socially-responsible luxury handbag and jewelry company.  Acclaimed by celebrities, media outlets, and globally-conscious consumers alike, Sandra Cadavid designs and produces high-quality goods using only the best materials locally sourced in Sandra’s home country, Colombia.  Our products are handmade by expert artisans.  We use high-quality, alta gamma leather and vegetable-based dyes so that we protect both our environment and our artisans.  The hardware featured is 24k gold, 24k rose gold, sterling silver, or vintage plated.  

One of the things we think makes Sandra Cadavid special is our dedication to women.  We actively hire women who have faced tragic, senseless violence in Cali, one of the most dangerous cities in the world.  Many of these women are single mothers unable to find work due to their circumstances.  These amazing women are now among our team members and serve as the assistants to our artisans. 

Also, Sandra Cadavid partners with organizations that help to further causes in which we believe.  For example, our Together Cuff was designed to raise awareness about the traumas of cancer, and a portion of net proceeds are given to support cancer research.  Our United for Women Necklace was designed to support social needs for women and launched in partnership with United Way of Allegheny County in Pittsburgh.  And, recently, we co-designed a necklace for the Pittsburgh Ballet Theater to support their programs for youth.  With each such campaign, we donate a portion of our net proceeds to charitable causes.

Our achievements to date include: being featured at the famed flagship store of Henri Bendel; a successful Kickstarter campaign that raised start-up capital of $37,861; our first corporate order from the NFL’s Pittsburgh Steelers; and widespread media coverage, including InStyle, LA Fashion, Good Housekeeping, The Today Show, Glamour, and Vogue.

Name: TitaniumWish.com
Description:
Titanium Wish offers titanium rings crafted locally by highly experienced artists using aircraft grade titanium. Titanium Wish only uses aircraft grade titanium: 6AL-4V (90% titanium, 6% aluminum and 4% vanadium). This grade of titanium is both very strong and very light. There are other titanium composites available, but we ensure that each of our titanium rod shipments have been tested and certified to be true 6AL-4V titanium. Our creations include classic titanium rings along with titanium rings with gold, platinum and silver inlays, and titanium rings with gemstones and diamonds.

Quality is of the utmost importance to us and therefore only top-notch professionals craft our rings. After an order has been placed, rings are milled by our titanium artists, then crafted by our jewelers. Our rings are only made to order and not stocked in bulk. Also, all Titanium Wish rings come with true comfort fit. This means the ring's interior is an even curve for greatest comfort. A straight fit ring has a flat interior and is likely rounded at its edges so that it doesn't cut the skin. But because of its flatness, the wider the ring is, the less comfortable it will be. A comfort fit is one constant curve for maximum comfort.

We take pride in our rings, therefore each ring is inspected very closely to ensure that the ring is of the highest quality before it is shipped to its final destination to be enjoyed and admired by all. 

Please do not hestitate to contact us if there is any furthur information you would like or if you have any questions we can help you with.

Name: America's Best Auctioneer (ABA)
Description:
America's Best Auctioneer (ABA), is among the Northeast’s premier auction houses. Specializing in antiques, fine art, and business and estate liquidations, ABA's full-service business model provides everything from quick and easy consignment to hassle-free on-site liquidation to competitive outright purchase. We handle the liquidation of estate and businesses of all sizes, and meticulously choose additional lots from private collections, banks, attorneys, dealers and corporations to augment the offering and widen the audience of each and every auction event.

All of our estate dispositions and consignments are handled professionally and confidentially. ABA personnel have auctioned more than $100 million in merchandise for more than 500 estates, 100 businesses and 2,000 consignors. We are proud of this track record and strive to maintain this level of success and service for years to come.

Headquartered in Orange, Connecticut; ABA is licensed to conduct auctions in Connecticut, New York, New Jersey, Massachusetts, Delaware and Pennsylvania. We pride ourselves on putting together impressive collections of select art, antiques, furnishings, jewelry and decorative pieces for our clients, we’ve stood out by going the extra mile and bringing those collections to our clients. From Boston, MA to Buffalo, NY to Philadelphia, PA - with regular monthly auctions in Fairfield/New Haven County, Westchester County, and Long Island – ABA is dedicated to serving the needs of our valued clients.

Name: Your Diamond Source

My unique business model with close family ties and personal relationships with overseas De Beers Sightholders combined with low store overhead, I can pass along big savings to my customers while still providing the highest quality diamonds and fine jewelry at the lowest price guaranteed.You can now buy direct from the diamond source and save. We offer the most competitive prices and provide you the opportunity to personally select the diamond and custom setting of your dreams. 

Call for an appointment today and I will show you how we do it.”                    
                                  -      Mike Sabo

Stay on trend with our accessories, including bags, pouches, keyrings and jewellery boxes. Made from high quality faux leather and can be personalised with our foiling machine.

OUR VALUES

COMMITMENT TO CUSTOMERS 
We will always go above and beyond here at Orli Jewellery for our customers. With made to measure pieces, special requests and customisations, we want you to be completely satisfied with your experience.

THOUGHTFUL DESIGNS
Each piece is carefully designed with you in mind. Making timeless pieces for everyone with added seasonal touches.

THAT PERSONAL TOUCH
We know how important it is to have jewellery that represents you. Add your own touches to your jewellery and accessories to make it unique to you with our personalised collection.

THE PERFECT GIFT
It's true what they say that all good things come in pink packages. Here at Orli we encourage you to share love and compassion with the people most important to you.

Name: Castello & Rossi
Description:
Castello & Rossi is a collection of fine collectible antique and 20th century jewels curated by a specialist lens. Offering a modern edit of coveted historical and vintage treasures, each jewel is scholarly chosen for its design and origins, as well as its ability to speak with relevance to the modern jewelry collector, regardless of antiquity or age.

Built upon founder, Anellie Manolas’, longstanding affinity for antique and 20th century jewelry, the collection is driven by her engagement in the dialogue which she feels exists around old jewels, “When I pick up an old jewel, I feel awe, curiosity and deep sentimental arousal. For me, the true value of a jewel is, at its core, in the story that it tells.” 

As co-collectors, Anellie Manolas, and Senior Consultant Susan Abeles, together offer 40 years’ experience valuing jewels for the world’s most prestigious auction houses, handling some of history’s most storied jewels. Between them, they have curated important jewelry auctions in the UK, Middle East, Australia, Hong Kong and North America, travelling globally to source the jewels they sold. Each possessing a deep passion for jewels, they bring a considered eye to jewelry collecting, and an instinct for unearthing special pieces in far-flung places. 

The jewels offered by Castello & Rossi represent Anellie and Susans’ formidable understanding of period jewelry, as well as their access to important private collections and estates around the world.

Name: Infinity Diamond
Description:
Typically, diamonds are harvested, mined from the depths of the earth. These diamonds are cut and polished in a standardized fashion and sold en masse at your local retail establishment. While no one can deny the beauty of these gems, it’s inaccurate to say they’re personal.

Quite literally, an Infinity Diamond is made of you, your family members, or your beloved. From a simple lock of hair or ashes we gather the carbon required to create a diamond that’s unlike any other: a diamond that encapsulates your memories and your life. A real, permanent symbol of the people you love and the relationships dear to your heart.

The most personal and precious gem in the world isn’t found in the ground: it’s the Infinity Diamond you create with the people closest to you.

Name: S'OUVRE NEDERLAND
Description:
TRUE ME - OPENHEID DIVERSITEIT EERLIJKHEID

Sinds 6-11-2021 is deze hoogwaardige Beauty/Healthcare lijn in Nederland & 25 andere landen in EU te koop. 

De Collageen gel van S’OUVRE (levend gehydrateerd collageen) dringt 5 lagen diep de huid in. Grote collageen moleculen worden afgebroken door het aanbrengen van de collageen gel op de huid i.c.m. water en de warmte van de huid. 
 
De uitgebreide productlijn is niet alleen gericht op Anti- Aging maar ook op huidproblemen:
-        Eczeem
-        Psoriasis
-        Couperose
-        Ouderdomsvlekken
-        Littekens
-        Uitslag
-        Kloven
-        Striae
-        Cellulitis
-        Acné
-        Jeugdpuistjes
-        Brandwonden
-        Vitiligo
-        Schaafwonden etc.
 
De meeste merken (werelwijd) maken gebruik van  gehydroliseerd collageen (dood) van een Varken of Rund en dringt vanwege de grote collageenmoleculen 1 laag diep de opperhuid in. 

S’OUVRE maakt gebruik van levend (gehydrateerd) collageen gel wat dankzij het opbrengen op de natte huid i.c.m. de temperatuur van de huid afbreekt in kleinere collageen moleculen waardoor de peptiden en aminozuren 5 lagen diep de opperhuid indringen en belanden op de basale laag van de huid. 

Niets kan verder doordringen in deze basale laag en vanaf deze laag sturen de peptiden signalen naar de fibroblasten en deze cellen worden geactiveerd en de natuurlijke aanmaak van collageen door het lichaam zelf stijgt aanzienlijk.

S'OUVRE maakt gebruik van Vis Collageen. De levende bio actieve gel  is verkrijgbaar in een pompflacon in een Platinum (gezicht, hals décolleté) , Silver (lichaam) en Graphite (haar, hoofdhuid, nagels en voeten) versie

Working in Arts and Business for the last years laid out a foundation for our long desired project. Finally, in 2019, we established MOSUO, a jewellery label created by women for women.

Our jewellery pieces are delicate, yet expressive, and intended to be worn with your every day outfit as well as a cocktail dress. The everlasting value of gold and precious stones combined with hand craftsmanship result in an heirloom for life.

The purpose of our collection is not only to accentuate women’s natural beauty, but also to encourage them to express themselves freely – a privilege that is not yet granted to all of us. For this reason we support the Terre des Femmes project “Self – determination through education”, which provides girls in Northern Cameroon with the possibility to visit a school.

In business for nearly 20 years, Stuart Benjamin and Company Jewelry Designs. is made up of a small, but distinguished and knowledgeable staff that closely caters to people looking for uniquely designed and crafted jewelry. As one of San Diego’s most trusted jewelers, Stuart Benjamin is a 3rd generation jeweler and past President of the California Jewelers Association.  Business partner Barbara Wasserstrom, has over 30 years working retail and designing jewelry.  Barbara is also a founding member, as well as past president, of the San Diego Chapter of Women’s Jewelry Association.

Known as one of San Diego’s premier jewelry design studios, they craft custom designed jewelry to their client’s specifications and taste.  We also have an AGS certified appraiser, who is one of only 400 in the country with this certification.

This exceptional level of service and integrity rewarded them by becoming an American Gem Society (AGS) member, for which only 5% of jewelry stores in the nation qualify. Feel confident with your purchase and know they stand behind their jewelry and reputation of quality.

Katra sevis cienoša vīrieša skapī ir jābūt uzvalkam, kurš der tikai Jums. Katrs mēs esam neatkārtojama personība un tāds ir arī mūsu ķermenis, tādēļ mūsu uzvalkam nepieciešama individuāla pieeja. Mūsu misija ir palīdzēt katram vīrietim neatkarīgi no ķermeņa uzbūves izskatīties lieliski. Katrs uzvalks, kurš tiek šūts pie mūsu drēbniekiem spēs izcelt Jūsu personību.

Mūsu uzvalku šūšanā tiek izmantoti tikai ļoti augstas kvalitātes uzvalku audumi, kuru sastāvs ir vilna, kašmirs un zīds. Kā galveno uzsvaru liekam uz audumu daudzveidīgumu, jo spējam piedāvāt vairāk nekā 60 audumu veidus klasiskā un modernā izpildījumā.

Oderējumā tiek izmantoti tikai zīda audumi. Tāpat kā uzvalka audums arī oderējuma audums spēj lieliski izcelt Jūsu uzvalka izskatu. Mēs piedāvājam klasiskus audumus, kā arī ar elegantiem rakstiem.

Lai izceltu Jūsu individuālo uzvalku mēs palīdzēsim izvēlēties katru detaļu tā dizainā, sākot ar auduma izvēli un beidzot ar iniciāļiem, kuri tiks iešūti uzvalkā. Mūsu pieredze spēs nodrošināt katru Jūsu vēlmi. Jums atliek vien izvēlēties kādos gadījumos Jūs vēlaties nesāt savu uzvalku!

Wir, das sind Ilka und Eve, zwei Powermamas aus Stuttgart. 
In liebevoller Handarbeit fertigen wir für dich Schmuck aus hochwertigen Materialien. 

Schmuck ist etwas sehr persönliches - oft verbinden wir mit unseren Lieblingsschmuck wundervolle Erinnerungen - einen wundervollen Urlaub, eine wertvolle Freundschaft, einen besonderen Geburtstag und viele weitere dieser Momente. 
Unsere Mission ist es Schmuck für dich herzustellen, der besondere Erinnerungen schafft - egal ob du ihn dir selber schenkst um dich zu feiern oder ihn einer lieben Person schenkst. 

Dabei achten wir darauf nur hochwertige Materialien zu verwenden, damit du lange Freude an deinem Schmuck hast. Wir sind ständig auf der Suche nach besonderen Perlen und Steinen und kombinieren diese ausschließlich mit vergoldeten Elementen und 925er Silber.

Exquisite and luxuriously beautiful, items carried at Lotus On Water are 100% natural and free from artificial dye and bleach. Its series of stringent checks ensure only the best jadeite leaves the gallery.

In line with Lotus On Water’s business morals and ethics, we follow the 3 Guarantees and 5 Don’ts Principles:

3 Guarantees:
1. All our jadeite is 100% natural.
2. All our jadeite is effective for its purposes.
3. All our jadeite is absolutely first hand goods, and we do not accept and sell return goods.

5 Don’ts:
1. We don’t sell jadeite made of glass.
2. We don’t sell jadeite made of man-made crystals.
3. We don’t sell jadeite that is chemically or dye treated.

Una parte del proprio portafoglio investito in pietre preziose stabilizza il rendimento dei propri asset ed abbassa il rischio complessivo del portafoglio. 
Tutelare i propri risparmi per il medio e lungo termine con un investimento reale e acquistare pietre certificate, che potranno essere vendute  almeno dopo 5 – 7 anni, con la garanzia di poter riottenere il capitale investito e sicuramente anche una parte di interessi.

Description: With Benguela Diamonds you have the chance to experience the first sea diamond safari in the world and to find your own rough diamond. Join us on an exclusive day trip with only a total of six guests from Cape Town to Port Nolloth at the Southafrican West Coast. You’ll travel with a privately charted, comfortable jet and stay in our beach villa, being indulged in local cuisine prepared by our private chef. In possession of a Padi Open Water 1 diving licence, you are allowed to follow our experienced diamond diver under the sea and look for precious gemstones. Back on deck, we classify them and if you like, you can choose your own diamond, which we afterwards transform into a sparkling piece of jewelry in our Atelier in Stellenbosch.

Name: Jéy Jewels By Divya
Description:
Jéy Jewels by Divya was founded in London by Divya Bhargava, a designer with over a decade of experience in the fine jewellery industry. Born from her lifelong passion for craftsmanship and culture, the brand reimagines luxury through an artistic lens — blending architectural influences, global heritage, and modern elegance.

Each piece by Jéy Jewels by Divya is designed to tell a story — inspired by the cities, symbols, and moments that connect us. Handcrafted by skilled artisans in Jaipur and finished with 18k–22k gold or silver plating, our collections celebrate slow fashion, sustainability, and individuality. All pieces are nickel-free, lightweight, and made to last.

As a London-based brand with Indian roots, Jéy Jewels by Divya bridges tradition with contemporary sophistication — creating jewellery that feels timeless yet current, refined yet expressive.

Featured across publications including Marie Claire UK, House of CoCo, Fashion Trendsetter, Women Talking, Wealden Times, Surrey Homes, and Attire Accessories, the brand continues to make waves in the fashion and lifestyle space for its distinctive aesthetic and storytelling-driven design.

At Jéy Jewels by Divya, jewellery isn’t just an accessory — it’s an emotion, an experience, and a connection to culture and creativity.

Description:
Mumbaistockholm was founded in a hotel room in India in 2014. 

With SEK 2,000 left from her pocket money, then-student Cecilia Kores created a small silver anklet. That was the start of the company, which is popular today for its minimalist natural gemstone rings, where all jewelry is made in Sweden from recycled gold and with natural gemstones.

A large part of the sales today are engagement and wedding rings, but Mumbaistockholm has always had a strong backbone in encouraging women to dare to buy jewelry for themselves. The goal is to inspire women and men to create a personal jewelry wardrobe that will last a lifetime!

Name: The Watch Lounge
Description:
Founded in 2009 by Tom Mulraney, The Watch Lounge started life as a simple luxury watch blog. The big idea was to immerse ourselves in this fascinating world and learn as much as possible. Today we are proud to say it has grown into a reliable resource for watch lovers everywhere, with tens of thousands of visitors reading our content each month. Over the years a number of contributors have done their bit to help make that possible and we are eternally grateful to all of them.

Today, our mission is for the site to serve as a key resource for watch lovers everywhere. Regardless of whether you’ve just fallen down the rabbit hole or are getting ready to fill your second watch box. What you will find on this site is straight talk. No puffery or press release regurgitation. We’re not in the habit of bagging on watches (or brands for that matter) but we will always give our honest opinion. And do our best to demystify quirks of the industry, such as why do most watch collectors love to hate Hublot?

To be clear though, this is not a news site. If you want to read about the latest new releases from ‘x’ brand, you’re probably better off looking elsewhere. The focus instead is on in-depth articles on a wide range of models, most of which have been on the market for a while now. We will of course cover newer models every now and then, but most likely not in sync with the news cycle.

If you have any questions or suggestions along the way, feel free to drop us an email.

Thanks for reading!

Name: GOLDMASTER JEWELLERY
Description:
Goldmaster, South Africa’s premier  source of diamond rings and jewellery. Enter and experience an exciting collection of designer rings ready to order, or design your own style with our help.
It is our mission to provide our customers with the most up-to-date jewellery styling. Our delivery network extends throughout South Africa and beyond.
Established in 1975, we are one of the major jewellery manufacturers in South Africa, with our factory situated in the historical heart of Cape Town. Goldmaster manufacture an extensive range of jewellery set with diamonds and other precious and semi-precious gemstones in 9ct, 14ct and 18ct gold and platinum.
Our large range of designs are created by our in-house designers on an on-going basis to keep pace with market trends and to create new and innovative styling for our discerning clientele.
Gold and diamonds are sourced from refineries and diamond cutters in South Africa, thereby eliminating the middleman and supplying “from the ground to the finger”.
Our modern factory houses all the latest machinery and systems enabling us to combine the rich history and spirit of Africa with the modern world of today and to produce a fine quality product at a competitive price.
Diamonds supplied by Goldmaster are of natural origin and do not originate from any conflict area in the world and we strictly adhere to the Kimberley process. These diamonds have not undergone any irradiation, laser drilling, colour enhancement, fracture treatment or fissure filling.
CONFLICT DIAMONDS:
Goldmaster is against Conflict Diamonds and supports the Kimberley Process.
For more information on any items on our site, or to inquire about any items not found on our site, please contact us by any of the methods shown below.

Name: FineWatchesBerlin
Description:
Uhrenmarke aus Berlin - Familienunternehmen - Automatikuhren.

Mit FineWatchesBerlin, haben Vater und Tochter ihre eigene Uhrenmarke nach Seinen Entwürfen vorgestellt.
Die erste Modellreihe „TEUFELSBERG“, besticht durch eine klare Formensprache, angelehnt an die Bauhaus Design Schule. 
Neben ihrer formalen Strenge haben die Uhren von FineWatchesBerlin, vielfältige, gezielt eingesetzte Details.
Die grundsätzliche Idee bei der Gestaltung dieser neuen Uhrenmarke ist, die Idee des Bauhaus, -Funktionalität - Sachlichkeit- formale Strenge -, durch individuelle Design Merkmale zu ergänzen, ohne die Grundidee zu verwässern.

Es ging bei der kreativen Entwicklung darum, eine Eigenständigkeit herauszuarbeiten, die das Wiedererkennen des Produktes erlaubt. Und gleichzeitig seine Zugehörigkeit zur 100jährigen Bauhaus Idee bewahrt.

TEUFELSBERG ist erst der Beginn, auch mit den noch folgenden Produktlinien wird dieser Gedanke fortgesetzt. 


FineWatchesBerlin is a company based out of Berlin, Germany.

Name: LindseyMarie
Description:
LindseyMarie is a fast-growing fashion jewellery brand based in Geneva, Switzerland. Its flagship store is in the heart of Geneva and it is currently being sold throughout Switzerland and Singapore in physical stores. 

In Switzerland the company is growing through a concession agreement with Grands Magasins Globus and in Singapore with two fixed locations (the second one as of August 2014) with Tangs. 

The company website is a virtual shop where customers can personnalise one of the best selling pieces and buy the already available hand-made pieces. The choice is being constantly updated as production is taking place in the intimate atelier of the brand in Geneva. 

The jewellery world of LindseyMarie is made of bold colored gemstones, combined with sterling silver or gold plated silver. The butterfly is used not only as decoration but serves as the symbol of the brand, along with its unique keshi pearls and subtle reminder of lilac, the brand color.

Description:

Ambacht en vakmanschap

Een gepassioneerd koppel
Griet en Johan, de bezielers van POOLS, zijn een complementair paar met heel wat ervaring en expertise in handen. Beiden behaalden ze als eerste Belgische koppel het diploma beheerder-raadgever juwelen en horloges in het CFH-instituut in Lausanne. Griet behaalde bovendien het diploma diamond grading en gemmologie aan de Hoge Raad van diamant in Antwerpen.

Creativiteit
Van bestaande collectie tot ontwerpen op maat
Niet alleen voor bestaande collecties kunt u bij POOLS terecht. Wij ontwierpen ook een eigen POOLS juwelencollectie. Voor onze klanten gaan we ook graag zelf aan de slag met eigen edelstenen en ontwerpen we creaties op maat.

Persoonlijke service
Op ieders maat
Discretie en tijd maken voor de klant staan centraal. Samen gaan we op zoek naar het perfecte juweel of horloge, het straalt namelijk uit wie u bent. Ook voor de service na verkoop werkt POOLS samen met nationale en internationale ateliers, erkend door de merken.

Name: GemOro Products
Description:
The GEMORO PRODUCTS division of Sy Kessler Sales, Inc. is a world renown manufacturer of innovative, feature rich products, with ergonomic and modern designs, and technological enhancements.  Many of its products have been awarded US Patents.  

Known as "The Sparkle Experts", GEMORO specializes in unparalleled commercial and consumer jewelry cleaning appliances, products and cleaning solutions.  This line includes the dominant brand of ultrasonics and steam cleaners, polishing cloths, solution jars, on-the-go cleaners, and pre-measured ultrasonic cleaning solution packets.  

GEMORO has a global reputation for producing the foremost diamond and gold testing equipment, as well as digital scales for weighing precious metals, diamonds and gems.  

GEMORO produces daylight task lighting, watch tools, digital measuring gauges, and ring finger sizers.  The company's gemological products feature CZ master diamond color grading sets, gem microscopes, magnifiers and loupes.  GEMORO is also an OEM manufacturer, producing products for many famous brands.

GEMORO PRODUCTS are available through an international network of authorized GEMORO dealers, distributors, chain stores, consumer catalog retailers, TV resellers and direct marketers located throughout the world. 

The late Sylvia and Sy Kessler established the company in 1968, and the tradition of servicing its customers has proudly continued for over 50 years and three generations.  Headquartered in Dallas, Texas, the owners of Sy Kessler Sales are brothers Henry and Daniel Kessler.
