Name: Quaglia & C.
Description:
Negli anni '50 in Via Montenapoleone, cuore della creatività milanese, Luigi Quaglia (1927-2014) fonda l'Azienda che ancora oggi porta il suo nome.

Genio e innovatore, a lui è dovuto il 'mito dell'Oro Etrusco', icona di esclusività ed eleganza nel panorama della gioielleria italiana ed internazionale. Una lavorazione che oggi, a più di Sessant'anni dalla sua ideazione, è presente nelle collezioni e viene riconosciuta come segno distintivo. Un oro diverso, elegante, graffiato, con schizzi e punti di luce assolutamente non omogenei e particolari.

Sempre attenta alle esigenze di quel pubblico che ricerca nel gioiello l'espressione del proprio stile, l'arte orafa di questa azienda è quella che, più di ogni altra, non permette a chi la ama di dimenticarla.

Name: ARAN JEWELS
Description:
Serendipity. ARAN was born by chance. In 2013 we couldn’t imagine the path our lifes were about to follow. A group of dreamers, enthusiastic professionals with a desire to do the things well, decided to join forces and create this brand of soft jewelery. Designed to wear from dawn to sunset.

And like all casualities, ARAN arrived by surprise, as Jessica’s belly kept growing, also the ilusion for this young brand kept growing, with the goal to offer highest quality standards afordable for every woman.

Modernity and simplicity. Designs who stand the test of time. ARAN offers basic and soft jewels for woman of several generations, where the most important is a good design with best quality.

What we would wear. In ARAN we have what we would search to give to our sister or to our best friend… or to ourselves!

We like minimalism, take care of the smallest details, the slow pace of time, savouring every unique second. We believe in the value of the smallest things, in the power of a warm “good morning” in the elevator, a hug from hour daughter when she arrives back home from school or an SMS which makes you smile.

We like everyday life and the beauty in small things, because this is what makes us great.

Over the years, their designs have featured on Celia Holman Lee, Lisa Cannon, Mary Kennedy, Retro Flame, Sinead Desmond and  many more.

Azure offers a full custom-made service, allowing you to design bespoke accessories to suit the wearer's tastes and needs. Each Azure product says something about whoever is wearing it. All you need is an idea and passion for quality at an affordable price and their expert assistants will do the rest. Whether you’re looking for something elegant, sophisticated or daringly different, Azure will provide you with a beautiful, masterful design that never goes out of fashion, and all at a price you can afford. 

Azure also offers wholesale jewellery and hair accessory to retailers around Ireland and the world. Azure is stocked in over 70 outlets around Ireland, the UK and Canada.

Description:
Young, unapologetic and with a rather strong sense of heritage, Indiano Pelletteria is a luxury fashion brand primarily for premium leather goods. It is the first ever effort in this direction to bring together Italian style and craftsmanship together with Indian homegrown values in order to deliver exquisitely crafted luxury goods with a thoroughly modern sensibility.

 

There was a time when our country was known to be largely a source of creativity…artisanal accomplishment…the birthplace of ideas (if you will). We at Indiano Pelletteria intend to do honour to and propagate that legacy.

To bring back the appreciation for fine quality and workmanship that seems to be lost in a haze. 

 

The brand’s tagline, “Creating Identity”,  expresses a philosophy of individuality, uniqueness and exclusivity attained by combining innovative designs inspired by different facets of lifestyle, contemporary functionality, outstanding craftsmanship and the highest quality materials.

 

The house’s sensibility is refined, sensuous, and intensely personal, designed for a customer who is sophisticated, self-assured and, uncompromisingly, stylish.

Together with the whole family support, we make this brand possible and finally the dream comes true, that leads us to the bliss of happiness.
More than the 80% of our products are made from high quality leathers, we are also introduced to new types of materials frequently, that gives my designs much more colors and fun which you might see it from our very alive collections.
We are a functional brand combines a classic, casual-vintage and trend-setting styles. The vibe and elements in our Made-in-Spain products are designed carefully with deep thoughts and tons of choosing after comparison between accessories, parts, functions, styles and all the other details. Every design is special and unique as our individual customers.
There are two regular collections will be presented to our beloved customers during each season of a Carmen Tessa year. In the mean time, I do love to approach to my customers with new special collections in between the regular seasons. I believe in the fast-fashion concept, that makes people awake and more sensitive to what they see and need from the markets. 
Stay with us and start enjoying.

Nuestros diseños, cortes modernos, materiales de primera calidad y la combinación de colores perfecta, distinguen a Sunny Patoche. Contamos con una línea de calzado, lentes de sol y de vista, trajes de baño, carteras y bolsos de playa, con una propuesta única en el mercado.

Sunny Patoche was born in 2013, inspired by the most emblematic “sunny” beaches of our planet. A fusion of the warmth of the Caribbean & the style of the Mediterranean, they translate into a unique concept that our clients will enjoy.

Our designs, modern styles, high quality materials & the perfect color mix distinguish Sunny Patoche. Our alpargatas, sunglasses, eyewear, swimwear, wallets & beach bags have an outstanding & innovative concept.

Everything is brought to you with one main goal: to have your “sunny experience” become a celebration of colors & style. Feel free to look around & make your sunny days even brighter with our products!

Name: EUGENIE VIELLARD JOAILLERIE
Description:
Eugenie Viellard is a French jewelry designer. She lives and works in Paris. Since 2006, Eugenie has been designing tailor - made jewelry pieces, inspired by her many travels, her passion for art and her family history.

CHILDHOOD
Coming from a family of industrialists and artists, Eugenie grew up between Paris and the family property of Epernay. The Maison Belle-Epoque, jewel of the modern art, is today the museum of the house Perrier-Jouët, an exceptional place where the Majorelle furniture and Leleu stand alongside of the works of Gallé, Mucha, Daum, Guimard, Toulouse-Lautrec, Rodin ...
It is in Clairefontaine, near the Chevreuse valley, another singular universe where Eugenie initiated herself to painting and sculpture making by developing a sensitivity for colors and lively materials.

INSPIRATION
Her passion for jewelry was sealed at the age of 9 by a gift from her grandmother carioca, raised in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil: a box containing cut and rough gems. Emeralds, aquamarines, tourmalines, amethysts, fire topazes and carnelians remind Eugenie of the light and the special nature of South America that enabled her to find the inspirations for her very first creations.

THE JEWELRY
Eugenie's passion for precious stones led her to study gemmology. She discovers the secrets of the manufacturing process of jewelry in an emblematic house in the Place Vendôme. Keeping from this period strong artistic friendships and a taste for special orders.
Her creative sensitivity, her taste for qualitative design and craftsmanship do the rest: Eugenie founded her jewelery brand at the end of 2006.

Eugenie imagines luminous and timeless jewelery, placing precious stones at the heart of her creations. 'I create fine jewelery pieces for active and sophisticated women who want to wear them every day'.

Description:
DeLux envisions to contribute largely to social entrepreneurship through global partnership and creating supply chain-networks.
A rising global economic power such as India has numerous untapped endemic resources such as pashmeena, silk, textiles, gems and jewelries, luxury home decors, etc.
However many of these resources are endangered/ on the verge of extinction.
Even if they are available to a certain group of individuals, most of the multitude can't afford to enjoy them due to geologic and economic constraints.
Our efforts focus to link these resources and make them accessible globally  and financially so that more and more people are exposed to these resources.
We are determined to create a sustainable global network spanning across continents by taking advantage of the e-commerce revolution.
Our previous experience with development of knowledge sharing platform, Genius, empowers us to empower others who want to collaborate/partner with us.

Name: Le Boudoir Roux
Description:
Notre histoire a commencé en août 2020, à l'époque en Suisse, à Genève, nous la continuons à présent en France près de Lyon, avec la même envie de partager avec vous et le même amour pour l'artisanat et la beauté des pierres que Mère Nature nous offre.

Dans notre boutique en ligne spécialisée en Lithothérapie, vous trouverez des pierres roulées à glisser dans votre sac ou avoir près de vous, des bijoux en pierres naturelles pour la plus part, travaillées avec différentes techniques aussi bien d'assemblage que plus complexe comme le travail du cuivre, des illustrations, de la décoration le tout pensé et fabriqué par nos soins dans notre atelier en région lyonnaise.

Nous avons une proposition de découverte du monde des Pierres et leurs énergies chaque mois. Nous vous proposons une box avec en base une pierre roulée, le bracelet assorti que nous vous présentons dans un livret au format papier, dans lequel vous retrouverez aussi d'autres thèmes mensuellement que nous choisissons en lien avec la pierre du mois ou selon les saisons et les idées qui nous viennent pour rendre cela ludique et agréable. Vous trouverez dans cette box en plus de la pierre et du bracelet un ou plusieurs autres items qui peuvent être aussi bien un autre bijou (boucles d'oreilles, collier, accessoires ) que des plantes  (séchées, hydrolat, huile essentielle, ...) de la décoration, des livres, ... qui viennent à chaque fois matérialisée le thème traité en plus de la pierre. Nous utilisons aussi l'art thérapie pour vous proposer des exercices pour apprendre à vous connaitre ou des exercices de méditation pour vous détendre ou vous ouvrir les portes de la spiritualité.

Nous sommes aussi à votre disposition  pour réaliser des commandes bijoux ou lithothérapie pure sur mesure.

Name: TT GEMS Mumbai
Description:
T T GEMS is an established gemstone trading company, serving the Gem and Jewelry industry, gem enthusiasts, and collectors in India and worldwide for over 55 years.

We have been an integral part of the gemstone industry for generations. Our founder, Mr. Gobindram Punjabi, established the gem trading business shortly after independence in 1947.

Under the leadership of his son, Mr. Deepak Punjabi, the company began to grow notably. We have made a name for ourselves in the Indian market and are expanding overseas, exporting to markets in USA and Europe. 

The next generation – Mr Deepak Punjabi’s sons, Kamal Punjabi and Amit Punjabi, certified gemologists and experts, joined the business and have helped continue the legacy. With their masters in business degree, they bring fresh ideas and a younger perspective, taking the company to greater heights. With their experience and passion for gemstones, Kamal and Amit have actively carried out R&D of gemstones, participated in seminars and expanded their knowledge by traveling around Asia. Their awareness of new practices and methods has benefitted India’s gemstone community.

We aim to give back to the industry from which we have gained so much. Over the years we have generously contributed to associations like GII and GJF for the research and development of gemstones and jewelry. Our company has grown significantly in the past few years and aim to keep doing so. We are a part of IIJS Gem and Jewelry show which is held in Mumbai every year, and we will soon also exhibit at other renowned Gem shows in India and worldwide. We are also scaling up and soon will launch two more stores in Mumbai.

Description:
Dhahab Jewellery draws from a special muse, my grandmother Raja Hamka, who wouldn’t be seen without her layers of gold jewellery. On dit que la pensée interconnectée est quelque chose de typiquement féminin et que cela nous permet de penser et de voir la réalité dans son ensemble, avec une perspective plus large, multiple, qui nous permet de faire plusieurs choses à la fois. Raconté comme ça, les femmes apparaissent comme un casse-tête complexe, fait de détails. Et, en toute honnêteté, je ne vais pas oser le nier.

Voilà pourquoi est née Miss Complications. Parce que s’il est vrai que les grandes complications horlogères sont le fruit du génie masculin, nul doute qu’elles ont une âme féminine. Miss Complications est ma façon « geek girly » de partager la passion pour l’horlogerie dans un style simple, sur un ton léger mais technique et avec un peu d’humour.

Name: Scott Jacobs Gallery
Description:
Three years after receiving a set of paints from his wife, Sharon, for Christmas, Scott became the first officially licensed Harley-Davidson artist in 1993 after Harley representatives saw his work at an art expo in New York City.  He still proudly holds his license as well as many others he's acquired along the way. Licenses including Chevrolet, Ford, Mattel, Marilyn Monroe Estates and Elvis Presley Enterprises.

Although Jacobs drew pen and ink illustrations for his school newspaper, Scott began his career in the art industry not with his painting, but by purchasing a failing gallery at nineteen with money he saved from working odd jobs. At twenty-one, Scott had the cash and customer base to open the doors of Reflections On Canvas in Westfield, NJ; a gallery that was met with much success.

In 2004, Scott and Sharon decided to open Scott Jacobs Studio, their own publishing company.

"The decision to become self-published was the best decision we ever made for our family and our future as a company", said Scott.

In 2016, they moved their operations from CA and opened Jacobs Gallery in Deadwood, SD.  You can see original paintings and a large collection of vintage Harley-Davidson's on display in this historic, western town.

Scott’s images can also be seen on many objects from limited editions graphics to Franklin Mint Collector Plates, coffee mugs, beach towels, clocks, and many others. In 2010, he released his second coffee table book, The Art of Scott Jacobs — The Complete Works which showcases works as early as the late 80s.

Description:
Hello, my name's Kassandra. Nice to meet you.

I love helping people create pieces of jewellery that is exactly what they want and that they will treasure. I really enjoy that end-to-end process of idea in your mind to a dream on your hand.

As an example, Bugatti named one a version of its most prestigious model the "Bugatti Tecla". The WWII made all boutiques to close and in 1945, Tecla only re-opened in Paris.
Today, Tecla is on the way to be re-established as a premium, yet original, luxury brand.

The Great American Coin Company is also a large supplier of precious and semi-precious gemstones, including mixed gems, rubies, sapphires & emeralds. We also currently have our extensive collection of genuine ancient Roman coins and artifacts available. The Great American Coin Company also manufactures toy pirate treasure doubloons which have the look and feel of real gold and silver. We also provides custom manufacturing services. Name: Albert Coll
Description:
Albert Coll is a 90-year-old self-taught Spanish designer handcrafting jewellery since 1947. Winner of 12 national jewellery awards, Albert was a visionary ahead of his time, a jeweller breaking boundaries.

He launched his eponymous label in 1956 with a groundbreaking collection featuring unique pieces meticulously handcrafted in Barcelona using noble materials. Albert’s love of experimentation with textures, materials, colours and shapes, resulted in jewellery with a sophisticated and strong identity.

His eclectic inspirations and beautiful designs didn’t go unnoticed, so
it was no surprise when he got offered to open a shop on the 5th Avenue in New York City. Albert declined because it wouldn’t feel like home.

Despite closing down his company due to his age, he never stopped making jewellery and with his granddaughter’s help, Albert Coll has relaunched with a collection that features conceptual jewellery made 50 years ago. Pieces that were kept in his wardrobe and were only recently discovered by his granddaughter.

Albert Coll is now relaunching with jewels made from titanium and gold that were considered too revolutionary for his time. Timeless pieces that will last forever.

Vi har håndplukket en række af de mest anerkendte og eksklusive danske smykkebrands, heriblandt Georg Jensen, Ole Lynggaard og Dulong Fine Jewelry. 

Udover de mange fine brands vi repræsenterer, er vi også stolte over at kunne tilbyde vores eget smykkedesign. Design, hvor vi sætter kreativ- og nyskabende smykkekunst i højsædet.

Uanset om du er på udkig efter en ny smart halskæde, et eksklusivt ur eller ønsker en reparation eller ændring af dit smykke, står vi til din rådighed i vores store, lyse forretning i Hørsholm. Nøgleordene her er: Unik kundeservice, stort og bredt sortiment og faglig viden.

Name: Nash Pearls Pty Ltd
Description:
Welcome to Nash Pearls, your premium South Sea pearl and pearl findings supplier. We offer a combination of quality product and professional service to our customers worldwide.

From a background of work in the pearling industry; getting to know the oysters as living creatures, seeding and grading pearls and living among pearling families in an island environment, a great love of the pearl developed and with it a wish to share in the marketing of this beautiful gem.

Jill therefore established Nash Pearls in 1996, to serve as a wholesale supplier of pearls to the retail and manufacturing sectors of the jewellery industry.

From a variety of sources, a wide variety of pearl stocks, loose and strands, are obtained to serve this market. They include South Sea white pearls, black pearls, Akoya and Mabe.

In 1998, Nash Pearls extended the stock carried to include a beautiful range of quality clasps, jewellery fittings and enhancers.

With an expanding business, a company, Ashcove Enterprises Pty Ltd, trading as Nash Pearls, was formed in 1999.

Personal service is a paramount aim of Nash Pearls to ensure clients receive the best attention and the product most suited to their requirements.

With a passion for rare and unusual gemstones, our Managing Director Aaron Wilson travels the world in search of the rarest and most precious coloured diamonds and gems. Aaron's passion for design and beauty can be seen in every piece that is lovingly handcrafted by our small team of jewellers in Eltham, Victoria. 

At Michael Wilson Diamond Jewellers we believe in building life-long relationships with our clients. For over 40 years, Michael Wilson Diamond Jewellers has created timeless symbols of love, offering joy for a life-time and heirlooms for generations to come.

Name: deTrois
Description:
deTrois is a visionary luxury fashion  house, led by the creative direction of Rafiel Render. Our expertise lies in crafting exquisite garments that redefine sustainable fashion through the use of unconventional, yet environmentally conscious recycled fabrics. 

At deTrois, the concept of a circular model extended beyond product design. It was ingrained in every aspect of the brand's operations, from the sourcing of materials to the manufacturing process and beyond. With an unwavering dedication to recycling and reducing waste, deTrois sought to give their products a second life through their innovative Forever service, allowing customers to repair, resell, or recycle their garments.

Name: Studio Piattellina
Description:
In 2022, Neva Cirkveni founded Studio Piattellina with her refreshingly directional, sustainable and deeply personal approach to creating fine jewelry. The name of the brand comes from the name of the street in Florence where she first learned and fell in love with the art of silversmithing and goldsmithing. 

Studio Piattellina features modern jewelry with an elemental touch, featuring hand-carved textures, clean lines and use of precious stones. Each of the collections is unique and produced either as a one-off piece or in small series. Due to the specific sand-casting technique each piece remains unique and no two are ever the same. 

In an effort to offer intimacy and a distinct design for the wearer, Studio Piattellina also offers customizations and fully bespoke items.

With a commitment to sustainability, all pieces are locally made from responsibly sourced and recycled 9k, 18k, 24k Gold and recycled 925, and 999 Sterling Silver, as well as certified precious stones and other recyclable materials. Our relationship with our manufacturers, suppliers, team members and clients are sacred to us: the community is at the heart of everything we do.

To learn more about Studio Piattellina, please visit www.studiopiattellina.com.

Name: Zandidoust

Name: Vittorio Cenzi Gioielli
Description:
La nostra storia inizia nel 1960: l’anno della dolce vita consacrata dal famoso film di Federico Fellini, l’anno che dà l’avvio ad un decennio brillante di crescita economica, modernizzazione delle attività produttive, grandi fermenti culturali e sociali. In quell’anno, Vittorio Cenzi fonda la sua azienda, la nostra azienda: in essa impegna ogni capacità e tutto l’entusiasmo possibile, tanto da volerla “firmare” con il proprio nome.
Abbiamo affinato negli anni il nostro lavoro di ricerca e produzione, con l’obiettivo di sdoganare l’idea classica di gioiello per renderlo più moderno. Il dinamismo creativo è diventato il nostro parametro distintivo: viaggiamo nel mondo, ci documentiamo sulle tendenze, ascoltiamo il mercato; e poi generiamo e rigeneriamo idee e forme, trasformando i tratti della matita in gioielli di carattere.
Rispetto e trasparenza ci contraddistinguono nei rapporti con i nostri dipendenti così come con i nostri clienti. Siamo consapevoli della responsabilità sociale della nostra impresa, come organizzazione che opera sul territorio, offrendo alle persone opportunità di lavoro, crescita e benessere economico. E siamo altresì consapevoli del valore che rispetto e chiarezza assumono nelle relazioni commerciali: per costruire collaborazioni fruttuose e, soprattutto, destinate a durare nel tempo.

Our name has been synonymous with the production of such fine china and we are particularly noted for our hand painted items that are richly embellished with hand raised gilding in Silver, Gold and Platinum.
All of our beautifully decorated items are made to order for our discerning clients. We do not mass produce. Royal families, heads of states and corporate clients world-wide commission our unique and sumptuously decorated china, not only as heirlooms and investments but for the personal satisfaction and enjoyment that comes from owning something of timeless elegance and beauty.
We are continually adding new and exciting decorating techniques. The current portfolio offers a choice of pattern, colour and subject matter on over 150 pieces. In addition to this, our in-house design and craft capabilities mean that we can also work to our clients own ambitious project designs in shape and finish. If you can picture it, we can create it.

BERIA, özünde güzellik olgunluk ve zeka bakımından benzerlerinden üstün olan bir kadını tanımlayan Arapça kökenli özel bir kelime olan “beria” dan ilham alır. 
Biz BERIA Olarak bu kelimenin içerdiği anlamı, her bir mücevheremize ve hizmetimize yansıtıyoruz. Takı dünyasında BERIA adı ile işaretlenmiş her ürün bu üstünlüğün ve zerafetin somut bir göstergesi olarak tasarlanır ve üretilir. 

Tasarım aşamasından üretim sürecine kadar, BERIA ‘nın anlamını takip ediyoruz. Emsallerinden güzel ve üstün olan özveri ve işçilikle, en yüksek kalitede mücevherler ve hizmet sunuyoruz. Her bir tasarımı seçerken, güzellik ve zerafeti vurgulayan özel ayrıntılar ekliyoruz. Üretimde, ustalarımız bu özveriyi her adımda yansıtıyorlar, böylece BERIA’nın anlamını her parçamıza dahil ediyoruz.

Name: Greene's Jewelers
Description:
OUR HISTORY
Greene’s Jewelers, Inc. is a family owned and operated retail jewelry store, located in downtown Rome since November 1948. Our reputation depends on the service we perform, the quality of our merchandise and our integrity. We stand out because of our family values and our personal approach to the jewelry business. To us, quality jewelry and the many intricacies associated with our business is not a mystery and we are always happy to share our experience and knowledge with our customers. We have two full-time Graduate Gemologists, trained by the Gemological Institute of America and two Registered Jewelers, trained by the American Gem Society. We have been members of the AGS since 1970 and uphold the strict qualifications of honesty and integrity that AGS membership demands.

OUR SERVICES
Greene’s Jewelers performs a variety of services ranging from simply changing watch batteries to executing complex jewelry designs. We have designers on staff and we can design and custom-make a variety of jewelry. Our customers are always assured a collection of the unusual and exclusive. We also have a watchmaker on staff that can repair most makes of watches from antique styles to the newer models.

OUR STAFF
The staff of Greene’s Jewelers adheres to the old-fashioned philosophy of serving the customer that is characteristic of a family-owned business. We extend many services to our customers before and after their purchase. We strive to give each purchase our personal touch and we want our customers to experience our personal service that insures return visits. Greene’s Jewelers founder, P. H. Greene, Sr., set the stage for his son George and his wife Thelma Tate Greene to open this store and they owned it together until they turned it over to their daughters, Joyce Greene Manning and Sarah Greene Brock in 1990. Joyce’s daughter, Elaine Manning Abercrombie joined the staff in 1984 and made Greene’s Jewelers four generations old.

Description:
AWEN reprezintă muza inspirațională pentru artiști, termenul fiind de multe ori asociat cu poeți și muzicieni. Astfel, aromele din colecții, sunt inspirate din genurile de poezii: balada, lirica, sonetul, etc. 

“O aromă fină schimbă starea de spirit, creează amintiri de neuitat și îmbrățișează oamenii cu un sentiment de confort și o atmosferă primitoare.”

AROMA-MARKETING

Mirosul este cel mai important simț când vorbim de emoție si memorie. Astfel aromatizarea este un instrument puternic pentru ca un brand să comunice cu clientul. Ea transmite filosofia de brand, creează conexiunea profundă cu clientul la nivel emoțional, si face experiența memorabiliă- acestea sunt valorile aroma-marketing-ului. Aroma devine identitatea de brand la nivel olfactiv si aduce beneficii asupra brandului, dovedite stințific:

- O identitate de brand mai puternică prin aromă, comunicând principiile și filosofia către publicul țintă.

- Creează o experiență memorabilă inspirând loialitate clienților, care își vor aminti mult timp după vizită.

- Crește vânzarea și productivitatea, prin prelungirea timpului petrecut al clienților in spațiile aromatizate.

- Promovează o stare de spirit îmbunătățită, crește focusul și concentrarea celor care lucrează în acel spațiu.

AROME ȘI PRODUSE PERSONALIZATE

În timp ce creăm o aromă “signature”, colaborăm strâns cu clienții noștrii pentru a clădi o identitate de brand puternică prin aromă, care comunică principiile și filosofia acestuia către publicul țintă. Împreună compunem arome de neuitat, combinând note individuale, clădite unele peste altele, care spun povestea brandului.

Odată ce aroma personalizată a fost aleasă, aceasta va fi însoțită de un certificat de exclusivitate, devenind astfel proprietatea intelectuală a brandului, integrându-se în manualul de brand.

Fie că doriți o aromă personalizată pentru hotel, companie aeriană, spațiu comercial, brand de mașini, eveniment, fie pentru o proprietate privată, vă oferim o experiență completă.

Name: Exton Italia Shoes
Description:
In the wake of an ancient tradition of the shoe, Exton remains one of the protagonists excellence of Made in Campania and made in Italy. Settling in the center of Aversa, in 1950 the Diana brothers initiate the production of handmade shoes. In '97 there is the turning point. With the entry in the shoes Pole and with branding Exton, stage of production are concentrated to give greater impetus to the company.

Shapes, lines and materials are a staple of production. Collections embrace the needs of those who put in foreground comfort and impeccable craftsmanship, the result of a careful search on the leather exclusively coming from Italian tanneries, precisely Tuscan and Venetian.

Strength lies in the high craftsmanship and creativity, combined with the cultural tradition linked to the territory. Attentive to the product quality and its protection, Exton founded tradition and technology to enhance their brand, while maintaining the hand-made soul in many production processes. The hemming, seams, the solaggio, the cut still rely on the expert hands of artisans who have contributed to the growth of the brand since its foundation.

The Exton is a tribute to the Italian footwear, where the Made in Italy, the forms of innovation and creative force able to defend the most of the business from a variety of competitive pressures. The product fully meets the latest fashion trends. Participation in major international exhibitions shows the great effort that the company deep to see the new trends, discuss usage and characteristics of products, organize your work, renew trust and discover new opportunities. The aim is to ensure a balanced quality / price and meet the needs of young customers through a line and traditional sneakers and trendy look.

Description:
Mindham Fine Jewellery, established in 1991 by Founder and Creative Director Myles Mindham, designs and manufactures award-winning jewellery inspired by the sounds, shapes and forms of nature and features exquisite coloured gemstones, diamonds and precious metals. 

Mindham Fine Jewellery began as a private jeweller in Toronto and has since grown to an elegantly expanded Hazelton Avenue townhouse which serves as the brand’s headquarter location, complete with a workshop where creations are designed and manufactured in-house.

Myles’ creations are realized at the hands of his artisans and have resulted in industry recognition over the years. From Diamonds Today and Diamonds International recognitions, to the five Excellence in Design awards in 2004 and most recently to the Excellence in Design for Canadian Diamonds, it is no surprise that the Mindham Fine Jewellery creations are a truly coveted purchase. 

Mindham Fine Jewellery, proudly Canadian, has built their business one customer at a time; coupling meticulous craftsmanship with unparalleled service which has resulted in a loyal clientele that have become the brand’s best advocates.

Name: INNAN Jewellery
Description:
INNA
Muse, artist and designer – Ukranian-born, Berlin-based Inna draws on her life, the people she meets, the places she visits and the world around her, to create simple, striking jewellery and accessories, in bold, timeless metal, precious and semi-precious stones. Blended together, these shape the vision of INNAN.
From the Brutalism of the Soviet-style architecture Inna remembers from childhood to the rhythms of modern-day Berlin, blended with a timeless elegance and refinement, INNAN’s unique designs emanate serenity and harmony.

MAKES
In her subterranean Berlin workshop, Inna designs and hand crafts her pieces, using a combination of traditional skills and cutting-edge tech. From conception to creation, designing to finishing, Inna focuses on simplicity, luxury and realizing the hidden potential of form, immortalizing memories and moments in metal. From one-off bespoke pieces, including engagement and wedding rings to aesthetically-innovative collections, INNAN is available online, selected outlets worldwide and has been exhibited at Paris Fashion Week for four consecutive years.

ART
Having learnt her art from goldsmiths from around the world, Inna synthesizes her Ukrainian heritage with a kaleidoscope of people, ideas and inspirations. Living in Berlin has given Inna access to some of the world’s finest artisans and craftsmen, Germany being home to a fine tradition of jewellery making. This experimentalism and focus on fine detail makes series such as INNAN’s ‘Chaotic’, ‘Cenote’ and ‘Stardust’ renowned for their brutal, beautiful elegance.

Name: KOUZOUPIS JEWELLERY S.A.
Description:
It all started in 1947 when Antonios Kouzoupis established a small goldsmith’s workshop in Istanbul. In 1963 the workshop was transferred to Athens, and in 1972 it was relocated to a private facility in the centre of Athens. Today the small workshop has become the famous company “Kouzoupis SA” creators of unique jewellery, while still maintaining the family tradition. 

An important landmark for the company was the entrance to the business of the family’s new generation, Constantinos and Euphrosyne, which led to further development and modernization. Having a dynamic production, high quality standards and fashion design, our company has managed to establish its
products both in Greece and abroad. For the best promotion of its products, the company participates in Greek exhibitions in Athens and Thessalonica,
as well as in world-class exhibitions such as New York, Las Vegas, Munich, Frankfurt, Madrid, Basel and Istanbul. 

The Athens Gold & Silversmith’s Association award to the firms founder Antonios Kouzoupis, for the continuous and dedicated contribution of the company in maintaining the Greek jewellery tradition, is a confirmation and recognition
of our success. The company has also received award for the best participation in the international Jewellery exhibition “Kosmima” in Thessalonica.

Name: Görlach Besatzschmuck GmbH
Description:
About Görlach Besatzschmuck GmbH
The company Görlach Besatzschmuck GmbH, headquartered in Kaufbeuren, was established in 1947 by Olga Görlach and has firmly established itself on the gemstone and semi-manufactured textile market. After it was acquired by Horst Schöler Export and Großhandel in 1989, the distribution of rhinestones made of polished crystal was further expanded under the direction of the managing director Markus Schöler. As an alternative to high-priced and rare genuine gems, rhinestone serves as the basis for the wide palette of the widely diverse semi-finished products that are offered. 

International distribution
As an official sales partner to the renown brands Blue Nil, Preciosa and Swarovski, we currently distribute up to 60,000 products including glass gemstones, rhinestone trimmings and buttons, clasped glass stones as well as stitch-on stones, rhinestone hot-fix stones and glass, synthetic and wax pearls. The successful marketing throughout the German-speaking and European regions was achieved through the establishment of the company Jogi Trading Ltd., Kowloon Bay Hong Kong, just six years later (1995). This marked a further mile stone in internationalising the company and positioning it on a rapidly growing Asian market.

Quality and customer satisfaction
We place particular focus on the quality of our products. All products unfailingly combine technical precision and modern timeliness and are always oriented on the needs of our customers and our partners’ requirements. The constantly adapted product line and the various possibilities to apply the gemstones and semi-finished products leave little to be desired. 

Vision and future
We join our customers and partners in looking forward to further successful cooperation in the future. We are facing new and exciting challenges which are caused by the constant changes in the textile and fashion industry and are influenced by seasonal and international trends.

Name: OBAKU.sa
Description:
Obaku.sa is an exclusive distributer for Obaku Denmark which has a collection of watches with a focus of simple, serene design. 

The collection is backed by a philosophy of blending the two different traditions of simplicity found in the European and Asian culture.

Merging two things in an artful way means getting rid of everything not really needed. Paring something right down to the bare essentials of simplicity and then giving it life, shape and texture. An oasis of calm, balance and harmony in the midst of a world in constant movement. 

Regardless of where on the planet we may be we all need our own personal paradise where we find pleasure in the small details. A soft curve, the spray from a wave or the sound of rustling leaves.

The idea that there should be a sense of calm and balance in the items we use to adorn ourselves is what gave birth to the Obaku Denmark collection.

In Asia, Zen philosophies have given rise to a natural simplicity – in both thought and act. Obaku Denmark takes its name from a branch of Zen philosophy and has created a universe characterised by a sense of calm – free from all superfluous details.

The Northern European countries have a long design tradition featuring functionality and simplicity of composition.

Obaku Denmark has inherited the best from both these cultures, and has blended the simplicity found in both.

HAND CRAFTED

Name: Bijouterie Pala | Joaillier Créateur
Description:
Au cœur de Montpellier, l'art de la joaillerie se transmet depuis 1975.

Plus qu'une simple bijouterie, la Bijouterie Pala est avant tout une histoire de famille et de passion. Depuis trois générations, nous perpétuons un savoir-faire artisanal rare, loin des standards de la production industrielle.

Notre conviction est simple : un bijou n'est pas un accessoire, c'est une mémoire. C'est pourquoi notre atelier sur place est le cœur battant de notre maison.

Nos domaines d'excellence :

 La Création Sur-Mesure : Vous avez une idée, un croquis ou simplement un rêve ? Nous façonnons l'or et les pierres précieuses pour créer une pièce unique qui ne ressemble qu'à vous.

 La Transformation de Bijoux : Ne laissez pas dormir vos bijoux anciens dans un coffret. Nous fondons et remodelons l'or de famille pour créer des bijoux modernes tout en conservant la valeur sentimentale de l'héritage.

 Réparation & Restauration : De la simple mise à taille à la restauration complexe de pièces anciennes, nous prenons soin de vos biens les plus précieux avec la minutie de l'artisan.

Chez Bijouterie Pala, nous ne vendons pas seulement des objets ; nous créons vos futurs héritages.

 Venez nous rencontrer à Montpellier pour discuter de votre projet.

Name: Noon Art Decoration
Description:
Vision
Can a minimalist perspective combine with the simplicity of modern minimalism & the grace of oriental Arabic art.
We use the finest materials, best quality wood & the most authentic craftsmanship to arrive at the vision we aspire.
Noon Art has launched its new line of home accessories.
Philosophy
Noon Art is a product of years of deliberation on modern minimalist architecture and its connection with arabic ornamental art.
Even though minimalism was a movement born to reject the social and cultural constraints of baroque and Renaissance, it has also lost sight of the fact that even the wildest imagination must be guided by an absolute and a normative principle inspired from its own culture. In our designs, the elaborate Arabic calligraphic ornament is perfectly contrasted with the fresh crudeness of material texture, thus releasing minimalism from its original trap and injecting it with a cultural element that takes it a step further..

Name: Diriliş Takı Mağazacılık Sanayi Ticaret Ltd. Şti.
Description:
Diriliş Takı, temeli 1998 yılında atılmış, 20 yılı aşkın bir süredir İstanbul’da faaliyet gösteren gümüş takı markasıdır. 

Diriliş Takı markamız Türkiye'de gümüş takı üretiminde önde gelen şirketlerden birisi olmayı hedeflemiş ve bunu Türkiye'nin en çok tercih edilen Gümüş Takı markası olarak kanıtlamıştır. 1998 yılında faaliyete başladığımız bu sektörde, kısa süre içerisinde toptan birimimizi kurarak faaliyetlerimize devam ettik. 2005 yılı itibariyle kendi üretimimiz olan gümüş erkek takılarını koleksiyonlarımıza ekledik. Üretim portföyümüzde ağırlıklı olarak gümüş erkek yüzük ve takı ağırlıklı olsa da ilerleyen süreçte ürün yelpazemize kadın gümüş takıları ve çocuk gümüş takılarını da eklemiş bulunduk. 2014 yılı itibariyle dirilistaki.com online mağazamızı kurarak online perakende takı satışlarımızı tüm Türkiye’ye ve dünyaya sunduk.

Müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı üretim stratejimiz ile ilk günden itibaren tüketici trendlerine uyum sağlayan bir marka olduk. Kişiye Özel Üretim Seçeneklerimiz ile rakiplerimizden ayrılarak müşterilerimizin en fazla tercih ettiği marka olmayı başardık. Geniş model seçeneği sunduğumuz online mağazamızda farklı tasarımlarımızla rakiplerimizden bir adım öne çıkmayı başardık.

23 yıldır faaliyette olduğumuz süreçte müşterilerimiz bize hep güvendi. Biz de bu süreç içinde müşterilerimize daha iyi takı seçenekleri sunmak için elimizden geleni yaptık ve yapıyoruz. Faaliyete başladığımız günden bugüne kadar ve bundan sonra da Diriliş Takı olarak, siz müşterilerimizin istek ve arzuları doğrultusunda ürün çeşitliliğini artırmak başlıca amaçlarımızdan birisi oldu. Bu yolda hep kendimizi geliştiren bir marka olduk. Koleksiyonlarımıza yeni eklediğimiz Hakiki Deri Cüzdan koleksiyonumuzda siz müşterilerimizin sağlığını gözeterek seçtiğimiz kanserojen madde içermeyen deriler ile farklı tasarım ve çoklu renk seçenekleri sunduğumuz Deri Cüzdanlarımızla da kanıtladık.

Name: Brass Cat Design
Description:
Unique, contemporary handmade jewellery designed and created by Denise Gibson.

Brass Cat Design is my creative exploration in jewellery. With help from my feline 'assistant', Nero, it is my aim to create beautiful and unique, nature inspired handmade jewellery for you and your loved ones. 

Starting in my teens, I loved to make jewellery using beads and wire wrapping techniques. Many years later I took it up again and decided to start my own jewellery business. I then discovered silver clay and, together with skills I learnt at art college, I began exploring this new medium and became inspired by its creative possibilities. 

The name, Brass Cat Design, was inspired by a pair of vintage brass bookends I bought during a month long stay in Germany when I left school. To me, it represents my independence and, of course, my love of cats!

Since early 2015, my love and passion for jewellery has become my life and my career, as I work on it full-time from my small home studio. 

My biggest inspiration comes from nature as seen in my Scottish wildlife pendants, leaves, and fossils. I also enjoy working with sterling silver wire which is shaped, soldered and hammered to create geometric or natural forms.

My jewellery is made mostly with silver and copper clay, which is a wonderfully creative medium. Malleable when wet, it can be cut, shaped and textured like clay. When fired, it creates a piece of solid pure silver (99.9%) or copper (99.5%).

Rather than using generic bought texture mats or shape cutters, all shapes (excluding circles) are cut and shaped by hand. Textures are created from moulds that I make, or leaves, fabrics, and other found items. I also use tools to draw directly on the clay by hand. These techniques ensure that my jewellery is completely unique and imbued with its own personality.

Name: Coconut USA Corporation
Description:
Coconut USA Corporation is a company of fashion that starts its way in with vocation to conquist American women likes for the elegance. 

Its main mark, Maria Oliver, exhibits the most luxury handmade exotic leather bags. Crocodile, alligator, python, karug or lizard are their materials used to sculpt its creations. Elegance rebirth is its sign. 

María Oliver was an entrepreneurial woman. A visionary designer. A mother of two. Maria Oliver was born in 1917 in Valencia, next to the Mediterranean Sea, in one of the most turbulent moments in the history of the country. She began her artistic career at her father’s smithy company where she discovered and refined her innate talent for drawing and architecture travelling across Europe. 

In a moment where women were socially limited, and that includes running a business, she became a leader and a creator driven by her sense of elegance and excellence.

Courage and determination carried her through the harsh economic period following the Spanish Civil War. Her two children discovered the secrets of leather as well as the intricacies of the luxury market and her artistry was again instrumental in creating designs in the leather atelier established by her children. They traveled the world to find the finest materials to push the boundaries and conquer the heart of the best luxury houses. Embarking on the next stage in its epic story, in 2021, the family atelier moves in a new direction. Blending both the mastery in smithy and the mastery in leather to unveil timeless luxury pieces under the brand which holds the name and the determined spirit of Maria Oliver with the aim to reinvent the rules of romantic conquest. The modern architectural aesthetic signature of Maria Oliver permeates the brand’s design ethos today and joins the leather expertise of her descendants. Its story celebrates the dynamic power of women, excellence in craftsmanship, innovation, and daring design.

Name: Gemprint Corp.
Description:
Gemprint is an identification system for diamonds that records the unique and subtle distinctions in diamonds, just as fingerprinting does for people. Completely noninvasive, Gemprint technology works by shining a low-powered laser light at a diamond, which is refracted within the diamond and reflected from every facet and internal characteristic. The light coming back from the diamond is a distinct ‘optical fingerprint’ – a Gemprint – that is recorded and saved in a database shared instantly among a global network of jewelers, law-enforcement and government officials. Gemprints can be matched and retrieved in seconds. As forensic evidence, Gemprint has been used by the FBI and the Canadian Government since its invention in 1976. The online registry allows consumers to manage their registration, update their contact info, report a diamond lost/stolen, or transfer ownership.

Some of the many benefits are: consumer insurance discounts up to 10% from leading insurance companies, positive identification of your diamond, inventory control for jewelers, faster internal and external auditing, loan collateral identification, forensic evidence, increased chance of recovery if lost/stolen, country of origin support for diamonds, high tech revenue stream for jewelers, and true independent auditing of insured merchandise.

COLLABORATION
Each and every one of our leather goods are handcrafted with a  generous measure of passion, attention to detail, and needless to  say, love.

OUR PROMISE
There’s not just history in Kenya, there is a future. Here at Eden,  we are reclaiming the making of things that are made well and  redefining leather luxury through unmatched quality.Thriving  through culture, excellence of craft, pride of work and investing  in local skill.

Name: Delicate Raymond Jewelry & Vintage
Description:
delicate raymond is named after designer michelle zimmerman's grandfather, raymond. raymond was a noted lapidary artist and gemologist based in the pacific northwest. raymond's designs centered around large chunky pieces like bolo ties and belt buckles encrusted with turquoise and agates. raymond also dabbled in furniture design, pieces created with mosaic stone slabs that he hand carved. michelle's designs and sensibilities reflect her grandfather's techniques but with a soft, fragile, feminine twist, therefore its called delicate raymond.

delicate raymond jewelry debuted in early 2005 with michelle's first collection quickly being picked up by los angeles retailers, including Fred Segal and Boulmiche. soon after fashion stylists, celebrities and editors alike fell in love with the tiny delicate layered jewelry michelle has become known for, featuring her jewelry in leading fashion publications.  michelle was then inspired to bring her tiny handmade creations to a larger clientele base by developing a truly unique e-commerce website. delicateraymond.com offers clients the opportunity to mesh michelle's delicate designs with their unique personal style by allowing detailed customizations of each piece of jewelry.

Name: William Hannah Limited
Description:
William Hannah Limited was founded on the principle that Writing Helps - putting pen to paper helps us to organise our thoughts, remember our notes, and brings our dreams and ideas a step closer to reality.

A notebook can be a place for practicality and creativity - a place to store meeting notes, shopping lists and phone numbers, or a place to write a story, draw a picture or empty the mind. But our ideas never flow in a logical way, so today’s new insight into last week’s big idea doesn’t quite fit on the same page, and becomes lost to the next blank spot, too many turns from the original idea.

At William Hannah Limited, we believe so passionately that writing helps that we set out to create the perfect writing experience – a notebook that could accompany you on your journey through life, providing a mix of inspiration and practicality that is as individual as you are. 

Our bespoke leather notebooks are hand-made in England and the clever binding mechanism, engineered from stainless steel, means that you can add, move and remove pages in whatever combination suits you. 

So whether you need to organise and share your Client notes, plan the next big project, or want somewhere to record the personal light-bulb moment you had at work before safely moving it to your private notebook at home, a William Hannah notebook is the perfect solution.

Name: Federico & Co. Investment International
Description:
In 1955, Paolo Federico began his journey in the diamond industry which led to the opening of his prestigious diamond company Paolo Federico Gioielli in Valenza, Italy.  The quality of his haute joaillerie, diamonds and good name became well known among royalty, nobility, and high society throughout Europe, America, and the Middle East.  In 2008, his daughter Giovanna with diamond expert John Lee continued his legacy by forming Federico & Co. in New York City and Milan.

Mr. Federico, passed away in 2006, left a tradition of providing high-net worth private and corporate clients around the world with the best quality diamonds and haute jewelry.  He had gained the respect and esteem of his colleagues, the media, and his refined clientele.

The new generation continues to trade and facilitate international investment in top-grade diamonds.  Clients of Federico & Co. continue to be established individuals and firms with an eye for quality investment and the finer things in life.  Our firm is deeply opposed to the trade of blood diamonds and all diamonds offered are conflict-free, in strict regulation with the international Kimberley Process and World Diamond Council. Federico & Co. provides clientele with three qualities to develop great portfolios and sound investments.  Heritage.  Experience.  Integrity.

Name: GILARDY
Description:
In 1964 M.Y. Gilardy starts his business in the gemstone trade. He lives in the Italian fashion metropolis Milano, and travels from there to gemstone mines in Brazil, South Africa, Madagascar, Asia, and many more, buying stones of exceptional quality and importing them to Europe. In 1968 he begins trade in Germany, regularly visiting the German gemstone capital Idar-Oberstein, where one can find the German diamond and gemstone stock market as well as one of the largest agate and amethyst mines in Europe, in which gemstones have been sources for over several hundred years. 

Business is flourishing and in 1970 M.Y Gilardy decided to open his own local branch in Idar-Oberstein, including an in-house gemstone grindery. Thus, from the mid 70s onwards, buying and manufacturing gemstones is coordinated from there, and the contact to Italian manufacturers is handled at the Milano office. Furthermore, important markets, such as France, Spain, Portugal, Belgium and Greece are being served by the German branch. Today, the company portfolio offers a wide variety of gemstones in all their glory. The business now concentrates on the trade and refinement of colored gemstones, such as aquamarine, tourmaline, blue topaz, and many others.

In 2006, David Gilardy, son of M.Y. Gilardy, founded GILARDY Jewels and presented the first own Jewelry line. From this point onward, David Gilardy has been creating the finest diamond and gemstone jewelry, regularly presenting new designs as well as custom-made items line engangement and wedding rings. The Online-Shop www.gilardy-shop.eu was set up in 2007, and only two years later the first jewelry shop opened in Bogenhausen, Munich. In 2012 a second GILARDY store followed, in the fashionable quarter of Haidhausen. Since June 2018 David Gilardy hosts an exclusive Diamond Jewelry Show as TV-Expert on the German Homeshopping TV-Channel HSE24.

Name: RedBar Calgary
Description:
RedBar YYC is a group of watch collectors and enthusiasts that meets regularly in Calgary, Alberta, Canada.

We meet to discuss developments in the global watch / horological industry, participate in brand events, and distribute news about watches and the people who wear them. 

RedBar was originally started by Adam Craniotes and Dr. Jeffrey Jacques after a chance encounter in New York City. It quickly grew from a monthly drink and chat between the two of them to a weekly gathering of dozens of collectors. RedBar has now expanded to other cities and the #redbarcrew hashtag on Instagram is avidly followed by horology enthusiasts around the globe.

RedBar groups are located in Los Angeles, Chicago, New York, London, Brussels, Hong Kong, Toronto, and Vancouver.

RedBar Group is the official organization for our international collective of watch collectors. Name: The Watch Now
Description:
Watch Now Story
For a couple of years we’ve been working together as business partners. Young and ambitious, but also always working and rushing through life. One more last-minute project, another very social network gathering, a not-so-quick coffee with an old acquaintance and all other things we do because of mayor #fomo. With full booked calendars we’ve tried to rescue our sanity with collecting an unnameable amount of books, activities and events to try and live in the now. However, through all this soul-searching we forgot to look around us and actually live in the now. We found ourselves forgetting to enjoy the moments as they were happening, because we were too busy planning how to live our lives.

A little reminder
So, in a quest to start appreciating this journey called life, we needed a little daily reminder. That is why we created this new Watch Now collection. A meaningful awareness accessory to provide us with the memo to not be so aware of time, but just be thankful for the moment that we are in.

Be appreciative of what is really important
Our goal is to inspire people to be more appreciative of the things that are happening around them, both big and small. Be aware of what is truly important. Slow down and bring yourself back into the now. We hope you enjoy your Watch Now as much as we do.

Name: Cosi Tabellini
Description:
Realizzare oggetti di uso quotidiano, semplici nell'utilizzo ed originali nelle forme, è l'impegno della nostra azienda, che con questa collezione intende raccogliere e presentare la migliore produzione di articoli in peltro. Ogni articolo in peltro fuso viene lavorato manualmente con una lega composta da stagno (95%), antimonio e rame. Tre elementi che donano agli oggetti una naturale brillantezza e resistenza nel tempo. La collezione comprende: articoli per la tavola, accessori da bagno, vasi, fioriere, articoli da regalo ed altro.

Gli articoli in peltro dedicati alla tavola, mantengono le forme dettate dalla tradizione degli oggetti da pranzo italiani che per secoli hanno ornato le tavole di nobili famiglie di tutta Europa. Articoli brillanti come l'argento o caldi nei riflessi, che rispondono all'esigenza di un ritorno al passato, a ricordi lontani di tavole imbandite. I nostri articoli sono ottenuti mediante fusione di peltro e sono esclusivamente realizzati in Italia. Il peltro della Cosi Tabellini, come tutto il peltro italiano, risponde a tutti i requisiti CEE e USA per l'uso alimentare.

Fabbricanti di peltro dal 1954, La Cosi Tabellini svolge la propria attivita in un fabbricato di recente costruzione di 2.000 mq coperti e da occupazione a 17 Operai e 2 Impiegati oltre ai 2 Titolari che lavorano attivamente nell'azienda. La produzione è effettuata artigianalmente in piccole serie e nella totalità degli articoli da nostri dipendenti; in questo modo possiamo offrire la gamma completa della collezione di oltre 400 articoli con lo stesso grado accurato di finitura. Non acquistiamo articoli da altri fabbricanti di peltro e, salvo le purtroppo inevitabili copiature, dalle quali cerchiamo di difenderci con alcuni brevetti, possiamo offrire una collezione completamente riservata alla nostra clientela.

1. Unique designs: We only sell our unique designs. EVERY single piece of jewellery is hand-made by us in Shrewsbury.

How Did We Start?

We started as a regional jewelry and watch repair business serving retailers in the Southern California area. Since then, we’ve grown to become the Nation’s leading jewelry and watch repair service, setting the standard for uncompromising quality and service. We’re proud to say national department store chains, major jewelry retailers and brand-name watch manufacturers trust us with their customers. Our single goal is to provide exceptional service that goes beyond great repairs and we work hard to make it happen.

Name: blievf
Description:
比利时当地时间2016年9月7日下午，位于比利时安特卫普奢侈品集聚的中心地——布拉剧院，迎来了高端钻石品牌BLIEVF创新研发的“十心一花 ”致美101钻石全球首发会。世界钻石行业协会副会长、AWDC(安特卫普世界钻石中心)董事 Jacques Korn先生，HRD Antwerp(比利时高阶层钻石议会) CEO Peter Macken先生，出席发布会并上台致辞，BLIEVF钻石新任董事会主席Ken先生、AWDC董事副主席Diarough集团主席Nishit Parikh先生、AWDC董事Diarough 集团Marianne Georges女士、LUC Vets公司CEO Wim Ruythooren先生，以及比利时的钻石供应商、银行业代表、奢侈品行业的同仁们，以无与伦比的奢华与品位共同开启BLIEVF“十心一花 ”致美101钻石的璀璨之旅。

不同于传统钻石57个切面的切割工艺，BLIEVF研发出的“十心一花 ”致美101钻石，它拥用101个钻石切面，通过更加合理地运用光学原理，将钻石角度比例和棱边对称性提升到新的高度，饶富经验的比利时切割大师们倾心将巧思注入每一个细节，使钻石能够更完美释放各角度射入的光线，还原了钻石本身的璀璨光芒，达至极致闪耀。
从钻石正上方切面俯视，可以看到50个亭部刻面，呈现大小一致、光芒璀璨且对称的10颗心；51个皇冠刻面改变了普通的光线离开钻石的路径，完美呈现极致璀璨的花型图案，赋予了钻石更高的投资、收藏价值。

发布会现场，由An Vandevorst和Filip Arickx两位设计师特别设计的，镶嵌了38,883粒钻石，使用了4,753克黄金，从设计、生产、挑选、分类、钻石运送到最后依设计镶嵌靴工序，合共花上30,000工作小时完成，全世界最昂贵的、价值高达240万欧元的钻石靴惊艳展出，为现场嘉宾呈现了一场星光璀璨的钻石盛宴。

为追求极致完美，BLIEVF悉心挑选每一颗钻石，优选净度均在VS及以上级别、G色及以上色泽、3EX切工的比利时顶级钻石，同时每颗钻石出售前，都必须经过HRD Antwerp 鉴定并出具HRD国际权威证书，保证钻石的色泽、净度、重量、切工，即钻石4C达到甚至超越国际公认标准，致力于为客户提供匠心独具、品质卓越的顶级钻石产品，以源于自然的晶莹透亮与光影幻境完美融合的璀璨光芒，全新演绎纯正的比利时钻石艺术。

据悉，BLIEVF将从比利时安特卫普陆续辐射到英国伦敦、捷克布拉格、中国大陆等多个国家及城市。尤其是中国，BLIEVF计划在中国一线和新一线城市：北京、上海、深圳、成都、杭州、南京、武汉、天津、长沙、大连、厦门等地开设多家专卖店。

Name: Courpré
Description:
Courpré est une marque de joaillerie éthique au concept innovant et pourtant si simple. Courpré regroupe en un seul coffret de joaillerie un voyage à faire depuis chez vous à travers : un bijou dans son écrin en cuir, un carnet de voyage et une céramique parfumée, le tout présenté dans une pochette en cuir.

Porter un bijou Courpré, c'est s'offrir un véritable départ en voyage à travers un luxe responsable et fier de ses valeurs. Pour rester en adéquation avec celles-ci, Courpré a souhaité que chaque élément soit fait à la main en France dans des matériaux responsables : bijoux en or certifié Fairmined et artisans fournisseurs véhiculant les mêmes valeurs socio-environnementales.
_______

Courpré is an ethical jewelry brand with an innovative yet simple concept. Courpré brings together in a single jewelry box a journey to be made from home through: a jewel in its leather case, a travel notebook and a perfumed ceramic, all presented in a leather clutch bag.

Wearing Courpré jewelry means taking a real start on a luxury journey that is responsible and proud of its values. To remain in line with these, Courpré wanted each element to be handmade in France using responsible materials: Fairmined certified gold jewelry and artisan suppliers conveying the same socio-environmental values.

Name: Kaali Designs
Description:
ABOUT KAALI DESIGNS, PRESIDENT AND DESIGNER, ANIT DODHIA

Kaali Designs, President and Designer, Anit Dodhia lives in San Diego with his wife Rebecca and two year old daughter Mia. He is a GIA Graduate Gemologist with over 18 years of experience working in the gemstone and jewelry business.

Originally from mineral rich East Africa, Anit grew up in the colored gemstone and jewelry trade. At a young age, Anit began spending time with his father at the family’s jewelry shop and quickly learned that he had an eye and a passion for colored stones, and tanzanite in particular.

Through his new venture, Kaali Designs, Anit is extremely proud to share his collection, which at its core is a fusion of family tradition and personal passion.

INSPIRATION BEHIND THE KAALI DESIGNS COLLECTION 

Anit grew up in a tight knit Hindu Indian community in Mombasa, a coastal town in Kenya. Kaali Designs is named in honor of the Hindu Goddess Kali, who is a manifestation of the Devine Mother, while at the same time, a fierce and powerful warrior. 
In Kaali Designs’ inaugural collection, Anit’s inspiration comes from the Indian Ocean, its movement and reflection of natural light, as well as the bold colors found in Indian and East African traditional dress.  His daughter has also inspired many of the designs as he envisions the powerful and confident woman, much like Kali, he wants her to grow to be. 
The collection includes a range of handmade necklaces, earrings, rings, bracelets, bangles, cuffs and pendants and features sterling silver, with rhodium and oxidized plating and quality tanzanite, spinel, tsavorite and other color gems sourced in East Africa.

Selsela, over the past years, has spread its wings and has reached many countries around the GCC. It has been recognized by many celebrities, bloggers, media and TV live shows to present its designs and products line latest inceptions.

Selsela aim is to become a leading regional retail brand for fashion accessories in the region by strengthening its presence in the UAE and become a destination of choice for modest women shoppers who seek reflection of Arab heritage identity. Women are the world’s most powerful influencers and we recognize fashion as a strong point of commonality, as such we create and design items for the highest impact.

PROFILE OF THE CHAIRMAN/MANAGING DIRECTOR

The chairman and the managing director, Mr. Ajith Boralessa has industry experience since 1979, his expertise in identifying and sourcing natural gem stones has helped the company provide the highest quality products to our customers.

Mr. Ajith Boralessa graduated as a gemologist (D. GEM G) on 1979 from university in Germany and has established himself as an entrepreneur in Sri Lanka. He has managed to be the Sri Lankan and Malaysia entrepreneur of the year for two consecutive years (2008/2009). Mr.Ajith Boralessa was an executive committee member for Sri Lankan gem and jewelry association from 2009 to 2010

He currently serves as the president for gem and jewelry dealers’ association world trade center in Sri Lanka from 2016 to 2017 due to his expertise in the industry.

He is a life member of Lanka gem and Jewelry exchange and Gemologists Association of Sri Lanka.

He is a member of Sri Lanka gem & jewelry association and former president of the Gem and Jewelry Dealer association of Gem and Jewelry exchange.

The newspapers said, "What are you doing in bed?"

John Lennon

Architectural wisdom says that a good design must be well built and useful- and offer a large measure of delight. Home is a place of sanctuary, and no room gives us a more profound sense of shelter than the bedroom. Whether in a cave, communal sleeping hall of a medieval castle, boudoir, or four-poster bed, humans have always sought out comfort and warmth, and created sleeping spaces to protect our tired, defenseless bodies from the outside world & its elements. We spend at least a third of our lives in bed.. Why not spend it in comfort and style?

Enveloping you, greeting you every day and sending you off to sleep every night- your choice bed linen should feel personal and special. Fabric provides the greatest opportunity for self-expression, fulfilling an aesthetic need and reflecting a lifestyle. For bedrooms, where the sense of touch reigns supreme, texture is truly essential- chosen to indulge the senses. Whether your desired effect is warm & plush or cool & airy- softness is paramount in a bedroom, so treat yourself well with textiles. This is the place to splurge...

Name: Diamond Karma
Description:
Diamond Karma offers a diamond value calculator that helps buyers and sellers understand the value of a diamond. Using our pricing tools, you can help find the best diamond for your money and get a fair price if you're selling a second-hand diamond.

Diamond Karma helps you negotiate a better purchase price for your diamond to save you money by avoiding retail prices.

We show you the five prices for a diamond which most consumers don't even realize exist. Would you ask a used car salesmen how to buy a car? Why would you ask a "Used Diamond salesmen" how to buy a diamond? Most "How To Buy A Diamond" sites were created by jewelers. Just like the car industry has different prices for the dealer, a trade-in, or a private party sale, the diamond industry has many prices depending on who you are, where you make the purchase, and how you buy your diamond. We calculate the prices by applying our proprietary algorithm to the real world diamond market in real time as well as using averages over the past seven years.

We aim to help normal people buy diamonds. We want to give people the tools they need to make smart decisions about buying a diamond. For most of us, this is a one time life event and we must trust online research, friends, family, and retail jewelers. It's a scary thought to buy from an online merchant, but with the right information you can and will make a smart, safe decision. All of our researches and calculations have been done independently.

We also make wood decorations with a scroll saw which includes shelf-sitters and wall plaques.  Soon we'll be adding plaster and ceramic figurines. 
 
We purchase our supplies from all over the world to make our jewelry, and when we can, we purchase items that are also handcrafted to incorporate into our own designs.  Most of the material though is purchased from right here in the United States because we do feel that it is important to support the working people here in our own country, especially the small businesses!

Our handcrafted jewelry is very unique compared to what you will find in the major department stores!

Description:
Handgefertigte Ringe aus Münzen.

EINZIGARTIGER SCHMUCK 

Kein Ringe gleicht dem Anderen. unsere Münzringe sind echte Unikate. Sie werden aus einer einzelnen Münze von Hand gefertigt. Hochwertige Verarbeitung und Liebe zum Detail machen aus jedem Ring ein einzigartiges Schmuckstück. 

-HANDARBEIT
-MADE IN GERMANY
-UNIKATE
-PERSONALISIERBAR

Die Vielfalt unseres Schmuckes entdecken. 

dieringmacher bieten Ihnen echte Handarbeit. Aus einer Münze entstehen kleine Kunstwerke. Münzen aus aller Welt und sämtlichen Epochen werden bei uns zu individuellen Ringen, Kettenanhängern, Armbänder oder auch Ohrringe gearbeitet.

Ein besonderes Geschenk. Wie wäre es mit einem handgefertigten und personalisierten Schmuckstück aus einer Münze? Oder haben Sie eine Münze an der ihr herz liegt? Wir fertigen nach Ihren Wünschen einen individuellen ring, einen Anhänger, Ohrringe oder Partnerringe- ohne oder mit Personalisierung. Senden Sie und einfach eine NACHRICHT und wir melden uns umgehend bei Ihnen. Oder schauen Sie in unseren Shop nach personalisierten Produkten.

Jede Münze hat Geschichte. Da Münzen alltägliches Zahlungsmittel sind, wandern diese meist über Jahre von Hand zur nächsten und dadurch können schon einmal diverse Gebrauchsspuren entstehen. So haben manche Münzen Kratzer oder auch Dellen. Immerhin hat die Münze ihre eigene Geschichte-und genau das macht sie so besonders.

L’oro, i diamanti e le pietre dai colori morbidi e armoniosi creano un meraviglioso equilibrio tra la materia e lo spirito di “Segreti di Mu”.

____________________________________________________________________________________

Segreti di Mu takes his origins in merging and manufacturing noble materials, combined to tradition and goldsmith art. From a man’s dream, a man with over 50 years’ experience, born the new brand “Segreti di Mu”. A myth legend that fascinate, strikes, inspire…
The land Mu, situated in the Pacific Ocean, was a large wavy territory that had Hawaii Island as northern limit and an imaginary line between Easter Island and Fiji as southern limit. Mu, very rich in tropical vegetation, rivers, lakes and animals was a kind of big Garden of Eden…

Name: Red Royalty Gallery
Description:
Red Royalty Gallery is a commercial contemporary art gallery in the Lower East Side. We officially represent Princeton-based multi-media artist Kremena Lefterova. Her ceramic and porcelain sculpture, video installations, and digital drawings are influenced by the beauty and complexity of Cirque du Soleil's performances and Maxfield Parrish's dream-like illustrations in the early 20th century.

In the midst of tens of art galleries in the Lower East Side, Red Royalty Gallery, situated at Delancey and Allen Street, is something very different. It is a salon-type contemporary art gallery, rooted back in the Art nouveau's eclectic philosophy and the tradition of totality and theatricality: wooden floors, decorated storefront windows, and high chandeliered ceilings, We are pushing for the timely transcension of the widely accepted white cube model for galleries, as we believe that this format has played its role in the history of art, and is slowly becoming dysfunctional as, paradoxically, even temporary art fair booths often get a lot more people traffic in a day than some galleries do in a year. Our philosophy is targeted at the young collectors - those who will be shaping the future of contemporary art when O'Doherty's ideology becomes extinct.

Name: Giulietta Bossi
Description:
Marque de maroquinerie haut de gamme au prix juste.

100% Digital, nous avons choisi de nous développer uniquement sur internet. Ce choix moderne, innovant, et dans l’air du temps nous permet de réussir notre mission : 
Vous proposer des articles de maroquinerie haut de gamme, au prix juste.
Sans intermédiaire, cela est maintenant possible.

UNE CONFECTION ARTISANALE
Tous nos produits sont fabriqués à la main par des artisans renommés. Nos cuirs viennent tous d’Italie et sont choisis avec la plus grande attention. Ce sont des cuirs pleine fleur. C’est la partie la plus noble de la peau, à la fois souple et résistante.
En dessinant, fabriquant et vendant directement nos propres produits, nous supprimons tous les intermédiaires et restons indépendants.
Et cela donne de jolies pièces haut de gamme, à un prix accessible.

LA QUALITÉ A UN PRIX : LE BON
Nous rêvions d’articles de maroquinerie solides, haut de gamme mais sans payer une fortune.
La solution ? Elle est simple.
Nous avons supprimé tous les intermédiaires. En évitant le circuit traditionnel faisant intervenir les distributeurs (qui captent près de 70% du prix final), nous supprimons les marges abusives, et nous vous vendons, des produits de qualité, au prix juste. Sans intermédiaire, tout cela devient possible !

Name: Chroma Gems & Co
Description:
Chroma Gems & Co is a gemstone trading company based in Australia created by Ross Sedawie. Ross comes from a family of opal miners, cutters and dealers with over 30 years experience in the industry.
Chroma Gems & Co was created to bring beautiful gemstones to the online world at a competitive price and to help educate people on all of the amazing gemstones out there. In a previous life, Ross was an electrical engineering but turned to his true passion, being a gemologist in recent years. He personally ensures that every stone is tested and verified. Chroma Gems & Co is able to offer unique and precious gemstones from every corner of the globe at very competitive prices.
Ross is also a skilled gemstone cutter and a member of the Australian Facetors' Guild. Many of the stones you will see on this website have been hand picked and cut by Ross himself with the most critical eye.
Our philosophy is simple. We want our customers to feel connected to the origin of their gemstones. To achieve this, we work under the principle of Mine To Market. We are your direct link to the gemstone fields of Sri Lanka, Africa and Australia. We constantly write about our adventures to these remote places in our blog, so be sure to check back often.

Name: Dahlia Razzook
Description:
Dahlia Razzook studied at London College of Fashion and completed her BA degree in Fashion Design Technology: Surface Textiles.  Shortly after, she opened her fashion label.  

Luxury womenswear brand, Dahlia Razzook offers stylish and fashion-forward pieces for the day until night.  Dahlia Razzook focuses on a mix of work wear until the end of the night of the cocktail hour. Her collection, The Epic of Gilgamesh, consists of trousers, tops, dresses, cocktail & evening dresses, scarves, and accessories. 

Each piece is either digitally printed and/or exquisitely hand embroidered from silk including the lining. The collection is also manufactured in England. It is finished exquisitely and beautifully lined to the highest standard. There are rich colour hues that define opulence and wealth for the Epic of Gilgamesh. 

She is featured in many publications such as Vogue, Drapers, FashionUnited, etc.  Dahlia Razzook is carried at dahliarazzook.com and in stores globally.

Name: JOSH HAYES
Description:
Joshua Louis Hayes is a British Born Designer with British and French heritage. Born in 1989, he spent his education studying Fine Art and Design, before working professionally as a Graphic Designer, Art Worker and Photographer from the age of 19. Based in London and operating across locations including New York, Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Monaco; Josh's work made covers and features of National and International magazines, creating an ever-growing list of clientele from business, music, Formula 1 and motorsport. Prior to working professionally, Hayes had produced artwork for the likes of American singer-songwriter Kesha.

Following requests in 2011 to create artwork for merchandise/accessory collections by a variety of established British and European brands and personalities, Josh launched his own self-titled label in 2012. 'JOSH HAYES' released his debut collection in December of that year; Initially producing limited small leather goods and smartphone protection that integrated his own graphic-based art with his love for fashion. His collections of protective smart phone cases were retailed across London and surrounding counties, as well as online through the brand's website. Throughout 2014 and 2015, the brand's client base grew worldwide, across Europe, Australia, America and Asia, including International music artists Pia Mia and Angel Haze, who have both sported pieces from JOSH HAYES collections.

In 2017 JOSH HAYES began work on the LOUIS CAPSULE SERIES, pursuing his ambition to elevate and create some of the most exceptionally constructed luxury goods in the world. Taking his time to discover the finest artisans in Italy to create his new collections, the LOUIS CAPSULE SERIES in Spring 2020 were the first pieces to be released in over 4 years.
