Name: The Case Club
Description:
The Case Club is a luxury bespoke leather goods brand.

Our cases exist of the highest quality materials available. The process of creating your phone case is done with the greatest eye for detail as we start with cutting our leather skins into the shape of the phone case. After that, we visually inspect the finished phone case again and once it meets all our requirements, we make it ready for purchase to our customers. 
Once our cases get picked out and personalized by our customers, we hot stamp their initials into the case with the selected color of foil. Once the case is finished, we wrap them into our signature black boxes, making it ready to become exclusively yours.

With the beautiful designs the newest phones have, there should only be a case applied to it that compliments the device even further. This is where we step in. The Case Club takes the ‘must’ out of applying a phone case and transforms it to a ‘want’. Protecting your phone was never this elegant. We offer our customers the freedom to personalize their phone case because we truly believe that everybody should be able to put their name out to the world. What better way to do this than through a case for the device we use the most during our day?

Name: INNANGELO
Description:
INNANGELO is a French fashion house known for creating luxury scarves, dresses, tunics and accessories, the brainchild of designer Inna Zobova and artist Bruno Aveillan. 
The launch of INNANGELO took place at the iconic Parisian concept store Colette, during the FIAC week, bridging the specific positioning of the brand between Fashion and Contemporary Art. 
All INNANGELO’s creations are designed in Paris and hand-crafted in the workshops of the legendary House of Ratti, located on the shores of Lake Como. Over the last 70 years, Ratti has worked to magnify silk and other natural fibers by applying its extraordinary savoir-faire and high standards to every step involved in the creation of fabrics. Today, Ratti works with major designers and only the most distinguished international fashion labels.
INNANGELO was met with critical acclaim in more than 60 editorials, articles and covers such as: VOGUE, CITIZEN K, ELLE, Marie Claire, AIR FRANCE Magazine, Le Monde Magazine, Harpers Bazaar, ZINK, The New York Times Magazine, Glamcult, AMICA, The Guardian. INNANGELO was immediately distributed in selected concept stores such as Colette (Paris), Bernard Orcel (Courchevel), GUM Section (Red Square Moscow), Edgar (Saint Barthélémy), and Bloomingbirds (Aspen).
This coming season, with the success of the scarf line, INNANGELO will launch a signature collection of tunics and kaftans, inspired by the ethic of INNANGELO’s colors and design aesthetic.
As a testament to its success, in its inaugural year, INNANGELO has been embraced and worn by such high-profile personalities such as: actors Leonardo DiCaprio, Monica Bellucci, Guan Xiaotong, singers Alicia Keys, Mylène Farmer, Sting, Beth Ditto, Swiss Beatz, and supermodels Karlie Kloss, Soo-Joo Park, Lara Stone, Natasha Poly, Doutzen Kroes and the newly talented named star dancer of the Paris Opera, Germain Louvet.

Description:

Carlyle & Co. was a high-end jewelry retailer with nearly 35 stores operating under the names Carlyle & Co., JE Caldwell & Co., and Park Promenade Jewelers in 10 states, mostly in the Southeast and Florida. Founded in 1922, the chain is run by brothers and co-CEOs, John and Russell Cohen. Carlyle & Co. was acquired in 2005 by Finlay Enterprises, the largest operator of licensed fine jewelry departments in department stores across the US now a subsidiary of Grand Metropolitan.

Finlay Fine Jewelers, America’s Finest Jewelers and it’s brands have conducted almost $50 billion in jewelry sales with some of the leading retail partners in the world since 1832. Finlay Enterprises Incorporated’s principal activities are the retailing of fine jewelry products and operating leased fine jewelry department stores throughout the United States and France.

The Group operates under many brands in addition to Finlay Fine Jewelers (1832) including Shifrin-Willens (1926), Merksamers (1979), and Jay B. Rudolph (1967).

Description:
BABBI was founded in 1992 by Barbara Giaclina. The founder had the desire to see her children wear home shoes that were both elegant and comfortable. She combined her passion with the “savoir-faire" of European craftsmen - working with the finest double face sheepskin wool - and thus created home shoes for the whole family.

Family feeling and home serenity are the essence of BABBI shoes. Home is where loved ones from every generation come together and share precious moments.

BABBI shoes are made in Europe using double face sheepskin from England’s finest ethically farmed hypoallergenic wool. Each pair is handcrafted by artisans, who  use a unique overlocking technique. All products are natural. BABBI only works with certified tanners respecting noble materials and resources. 

BABBI works with carefully selected artisans with respect for the environment in order to deliver high quality products. Each pair reflects nature’s serenity and inspires a similar feeling of daily equanimity and comfort at home.

Name: KUSH Diamonds
Description:
www.kushdiamonds.com.au- Coming Soon

KUSH Diamonds is an Australian owned, Melbourne based family business with over 35 years experience as diamond wholesalers, gemmologists, valuers and jewellery manufacturers.

At KUSH Diamonds we work with customers on selecting a GIA certified diamond then designing and handcrafting a unique setting for their special occassion. Each customers experience is guaranteed to be personal and safe. 

Authenticity and certification are critical when buying diamonds, thus all our diamonds have accompanying GIA (Gemmological Institute of America) certificates. GIA certificates are globally renowned, respected and recognised as they are the universal standard by which gems are judged. Only diamonds with accompanying GIA certificates can offer complete peace of mind with proof of quality.

For in depth information about  diamonds and GIA certificates, our current stock or any further information please check out www.kushdiamonds.com.au (coming soon).

Metal transport is performed by Petterson Airline ltd London via private aircraft.
The petterson Diamonds uk ltd is now participating in a Sierra Leone project of opening a Gold Refinery.

This will give Sierra Leone the control of the mining sources and be able to give official data and destroy the black market in the country both the huge frauds for Europeans and illegal exports of gold in the neighboring country of Guinea, which does not export taxes if not document fees.

Name: JAG Jewelry by Andreas Gmur
Description:
𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗹𝗱’𝘀 𝗱𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗿𝗲𝘀 𝗺𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗵𝗿𝗼𝘂𝗴𝗵 𝗮𝗱𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗵𝗼𝗼𝗱

My family heritage and my passion for art naturally led me to choose a field of art with which I could express myself fully: jewelry.

𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗹𝗼𝘃𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗽𝗮𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗮𝘀 𝗮𝗻 𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗼𝗳 𝗷𝗲𝘄𝗲𝗹𝗿𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻
I would like to give back to jewelry, its place in the world to which it belongs: Art. In order to bring these two worlds even closer together, my passion for jewelry and my pleasure in painting, I developed a creative approach where the jewel is designed through successive sketches and finally symbolized by a painting with charcoal, watercolors and India ink.

𝗥𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗲𝗺𝗼𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹 𝘃𝗮𝗹𝘂𝗲
When I work on a creation with my client, I look for ways to integrate specific emotions into jewelry. Emotional value is unique and different for each of us.

𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗵𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘆𝗺𝗯𝗼𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗺 𝗼𝗳 𝗷𝗲𝘄𝗲𝗹𝗿𝘆
It is my goal to restore the importance and symbolism once held to jewelry. JAG jewelry is defined by the person who wears it, becoming their symbol.

𝗝𝗲𝘄𝗲𝗹𝗿𝘆 𝗮𝘀 𝗮 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘀𝘂𝗺𝗲𝗿’𝘀 𝗶𝘁𝗲𝗺
I want people to wear jewelry for a personal reason and not just because it goes well with their eye color. I want people to associate emotional value to it.

𝗔 𝗷𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗻𝗲𝘆 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝘁𝗮𝗸𝗲𝘀 𝘂𝘀
𝗳𝗿𝗼𝗺 𝗮𝗻 𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗮 𝘁𝗼 𝗶𝘁𝘀 𝗱𝗿𝗮𝘄𝗶𝗻𝗴,
𝗳𝗿𝗼𝗺 𝗶𝘁𝘀 𝗽𝗮𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘁𝗼 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗷𝗲𝘄𝗲𝗹𝗿𝘆.

My approach is to create, with you and for you, a piece of jewelry in which you find yourself, a piece that symbolizes you or that symbolizes an important moment in your life.

Name: BROX DESIGN
Description:
BROX philosophy of creative leadership is to surround ourselves with good people who have ability, judgment and knowledge, but above all, a passion for excellent services. It's a philosophy of life. A practice. If you do this, something will change. What will change is that you will change, your life will change, and if you can change yourself, you can perhaps change the world.

We design and manufacture our own products using an exacting construction process and only the finest materials.

Like most of you, we’ve long had to choose between over-priced, over-marketed leather accessories that disrespect your intelligence and your wallet. We knew there had to be a better way, so we created BROX as a return to the essential: a great and unique leather products at fair price.

We hope that you will enjoy your BROX!

TAMAR KATE, is a design & manufacturing company which offers a luxurious line of environmentally conscious organic modal (fabric) basics, ~ “T by T COLLECTION.”

The collection merges the relaxed West Coast lifestyle with a chic, upscale edge. The result is a line of sophisticated T-shirts for the fashion conscious woman. 

T by T Collection is made in Vancouver, Canada and sourced from Montréal. Each T-Shirt is made of Modal fabric, and is designed so that the fit is both relaxed and effortlessly stylish. The line can transition from day to evening, and is an essential addition to any wardrobe.

Tamar Kate is about things that last, and the company maintains an uncompromising commitment to the highest standards both in fabric quality and craftsmanship!

Fabric & Quality ~ Advantages of Modal over Cotton

Originally marketed as "artificial silk," Modal is soft, smooth and breathes well. Its texture is similar to that of cotton or silk. It is cool to the touch and very absorbent. Like cotton, modal dyes easily and becomes colour-fast after submersion in warm water. Modal drapes well and keeps its shape, even when wet. 

One of the advantages of Modal over cotton is its resistance to shrinkage, a notorious problem with cotton. Modal is also less likely to fade or to form pills as a result of friction. Its smoothness also makes hard water deposits less likely to adhere to the surface, so the fabric stays soft through repeated washings. Modal Washing Instructions ~ Use cold water and lay flat to dry.

www.TAMARKATE.com

Description:
I’m Alexis Jae, but most people call me Lexi. My family’s been manufacturing fine jewelry for generations. 

One of my favorite things to do with friends is invite them to design their own jewelry with me and help them get it for around 50% less than it would be if they bought it from a store. And I realized: I can do this for everyone.

You see, when fine jewelry is made, it typically goes from a manufacturer (me), to a store, to you. By skipping the middleman (or middlemen, we should say), we’re helping you get the jewelry you want, at a price that’s hard to find.

Through Alexis Jae, you can save around 50% off traditional retail prices. And you can feel good while doing it because all of our gems are ethically sourced, all our gold is recycled, and a portion of our profits go towards breast cancer research. 

And the best part is, you can make it exactly how you want it.

Name: Mestergull Sandberg
Description:
Gullsmed Anthony Sandberg AS ble etablert 5.mars 1962 av Anthony Sandberg og hans kone Rigmor Sandberg. Anthony hadde allerede 16 års erfaring fra Th. Marthinsens sølvvarefabrikk, og ønsket å etablere egen gullsmedforretning. Rigmor og Anthony flyttet dermed fra Tønsberg til Lillestrøm for å realisere drømmen  - noe som var helt tilfeldig ettersom de ikke hadde noen relasjoner til byen. Første butikken ble på noen få kvadratmeter i Brogaten 10 v/ Kulturhuset, der de måtte bo midlertidig på bakrommet. I 1969 ble butikken bygd ut til en flott gullsmedbutikk. I 1975 ble deres sønn Dag Anthony Sandberg utdannet som gullsmed, og samme året ble han uteksaminert med Diplom i Gemmologi, som landest yngste.  

I dag finnes det to Mestergull Sandberg butikker i Lillestrøm. I 1979 etablerte familien Sandberg seg med filial i Brøthergata. 2, som senere ble flyttet til Torvet 5 - der den er i dag. Butikken som idag er i Storgata 16 ble flyttet fra Brogata i 1980. Datter til Rigmor og Anthony, Anne Lene Sandberg ble utdannet gullsmed i 1988. Deres barnebarn og datter til Dag Sandberg, Helene Sandberg fikk sitt svennebrev i 2004. De andre barnebarna, Caroline, Henrik og Ane Sandberg har også jobbet i butikken i flere år. 

Gullsmed Anthony Sandberg har i over 50 år hatt som mål å yte best service og er meget opptatt av kvalitet på sine smykker, samt et bredt utvalg av smykkemerker; alt fra luksusbrands til rimelige alternativer. Derfor ble Gullsmed Sandberg medeier av Mestergull kjeden i 1977, slik at de i fellesskap, med 40-50 andre gullsmeder, kan få tilgjengelighet til det beste faget har å by på. 

Velkommen til oss for en hyggelig handel!

Name: RUGMOGUL
Description:
RUGMOGUL.com is an online rug store that import handmade traditional oriental rugs. We focus on rugs traditionally made in Asia with a love for Persian, Indian, Turkish and Tibetan designs. 

Our founder was born in the Rocky Mountains of western Colorado. He grew up with an appreciation for rugs inspired by the Native-American tradition. He met his wife online and three years later they got married and they traveled to India to meet her family. While in Jaipur, James enjoyed a cycling food tour throughout the city's early morning, feeding  elephants in the afternoon and  a tour of the marvelous Pink City, the City Palace, and the Amber Fort, the palace was the residence of the Rajput Maharajas the decedents of the Mughal Empire.

In Jaipur he discovered the beautiful art of oriental rug weaving, which reminded him of the southwestern rugs of his childhood. It ignited a passion to introduce more Americans to the unparalleled artistry of rugs made by hand. James believed that just as his love for his wife was able to be nurtured and grow online, he believed that the allure of 100% silk and wool rugs could motivate the sophisticated buyer who has an eye for exquisite design by skilled rug makers, who's art can only be described as a delicacy for the eyes, and as soft as buttery mango when touched by the hand, this brilliance could never by replicated by a machine-made rug.

Join us on our journey to bring elegant refined design and style to homes across America with oriental rugs crafted by the generational knowledge of experienced rug weavers. Our vintage styles are traditionally found in Persia, India, Turkey, Tibet, Afghanistan, Pakistan and Morocco. We have made it our mission to bring these eternally good-looking rugs to the USA, all with the modern conveniences of free-shipping, customer support and an easy to use website.

Rugs are an essential part of what makes a house a home. Visit www.RUGMOGUL.com to see our collection of best rug artistry found globally.

Name: WATCHe Sàrl
Description:
WATCHe- The Mobile Watch

www.watche.ch

WATCHe , the Mobile Watch


The We1 was devised and designed by Luc Pellaton, native to Chaux-de-Fonds and grandson of Eugène Pellaton, watchmaker. He devised this watch from his mechanics and computing engineering experience, and his infinite passion of clocks and watches.

Combination, gathering, fusion, union of different current styles. For that purpose, he chose a special team made up of a designer (Gilles Antoniazzo), a graphic designer (Anou2), a firm specialized in competence and expertise (Centagora Sàrl) and subcontractors (Buri S.A. - Créchard Mécanique) who all believed in his concept and allowed him to complete his project successfully.

Designed for a large audience, included design and technology lovers, the We1 belongs to the totally new and technical field.

Today, its creator is proud to offer a 100% Swiss Made product: devised, designed, made and combined in Switzerland.

A link between mechanics, watchmake and Smartphone.


Its mobility is one of its precious advantages: with a little integrated key, its owner will be able to unscrew as he/she likes the watch from its base support in order to put it on another support predicted for that purpose (desk, table support, watchstrap...)

Name: Janvier Jewelers
Description:
Brothers Ed and Lee Janvier founded Janvier Jewelers in 1975 on the principle of providing superior customer service. An independent, family-owned business, Janvier Jewelers’ success is a direct result of over 37 years of building and maintaining customer loyalty. We are proud to say that many of the relationships we have with our customers span several generations. We have the distinct pleasure of continuing to provide service to our loyal patrons because of the importance we place on treating our customers like family.

Providing customers with the absolute best jewelry buying experience means that the products we offer also need to be the absolute best. Unlike most jewelry stores, we hand select our diamonds direct from cutters from around the world in order to ensure that our showroom is complete with the highest quality selection available.

Our dedication to outstanding customer service shows in the experience of our staff. At Janvier Jewelers, our associates have an average of 25 years of extensive fine jewelry expertise, including gemological education. With certifications from the Gemological Institute of America in Diamond Grading, Advanced Fine Jewelry Sales, Fine Jewelry Consultants, Detecting Synthetic Diamonds, Identifying Challenging Synthetics, Gem Identification, and Color Stone Grading, our team is committed to upholding high standards of excellence.

At Janvier Jewelers, we aren’t just looking to make another sale; we’re looking to make another lifetime customer. Visit our Christiana Mall location today to see for yourself why so many rely on our quality, service and trust for the ultimate jewelry buying experience.

Name: PIERRE
Description: PIERRE, jewellery company, produces gold and platinum jewellery adorned with diamonds. We do not cater to the mass market and refrain from imitating other brands' designs. Our customers are not interested in paying excessive prices for a brand name and are unwilling to compromise on their standards. The quality of PIERRE's jewellery is upheld to the same standards as international brands. We do not keep a large stock of expensive jewellery and adhere to the principles of lean consumption. We have our own manufacturing facility, a modern office, and a showroom. Our overhead costs are lower compared to traditional jewellery stores as we do not advertise our products, spam customers with mailings, or create unnecessary packaging. Instead, we invest in our jewellery and employ the finest craftsmen, passing on the savings to our customers. The cost of PIERRE's jewellery is three to five times lower than that of well-known brands and chain jewellery stores. With our own manufacturing facility, our customers can expect to receive their jewellery either the next day or within two weeks of placing their orders, which is twice as fast as the average turnaround time in the jewellery market. If additional time is required due to the complexity of the work, we inform our customers in advance. We take responsibility for delivering our products to other cities. Regardless of their budget or the size of their order, we treat all our customers with equal respect. We would be delighted to have you as one of our loyal customers.

Name: TACT Watches & Accessories
Description:
Вашиот Онлајн Дестинација за Часовници и Паричници!!

Во светот на стилот и елеганцијата, TACT е вашиот верен партнер онлајн. Ние сме пионери во Македонија кога станува збор за онлајн продажба на часовници и паричници. Нашата мисија е да ви обезбедиме удобност, ексклузивност и сигурност при шопингот од вашето сопствено удобство.

Што Нудиме?

 Часовници за Секој Вкус:

Со неверојатни дизајни и модерни бои, нашите TACT часовници се претставуваат како вашата лична изјава за стил. Откријте ги различните модели што ги нудиме и пронајдете го вашиот совршен часовник.

 Паричници со Стил:

Освен нашите часовници, ние такаѓе нудиме и елегантни паричници. Нашиот избор на паричници во различни стилови и бои е идеален додаток за вашите секојдневни потреби.

 Локална Ексклузивност:

TACT е тука за вас, во вашата родна Македонија. Нашата цел е да ви понудиме нешто што не само ќе го задоволи вашиот стил, туку и ќе ви обезбеди уникатно искуство на шопинг.

Има многу продавници, но само TACT ги нуди сите овие причини за да бидете дел од нашата стилска заедница. Веруваме дека секој клиент е особен и затоа нудиме особен стил. Зошто нас? Затоа што вашата стилска приказна заслужува најдоброто.

Name: Reut
Description:

Our core values—luxury, relaxation, self-care, inclusivity, and generosity—guide everything we do, ensuring that each product we create brings you the utmost in quality and care.

Name: Roberto&Victoria - unique jewels
Description:
During many years, nights ended telling a story to our sons. They were improvised tales that we made up in that moment. Once in a while, one character achieved a fortune and gained special prominence during some time, but spontaneity was always more applauded. On the table, some jewel, half done, waited for being the subject of discussion.
Roberto&Victoria is a firm that explains an artistic way and a personal vision of jewellery, based on the experience, the knowledge, the concerns and the sensibility for a work that is showed in works with soul. 
Arrogant and submissive at the same time, jewels take part in this broad and eclectic, reflexive and intuitive vision that appears in unique pieces, the collections development and objects of design. Each one of the proposals obeys to a story; a long way of research in concepts, forms, materials and each one of them has its origin in the manual work that looks for excellence.
We know that, once they are out of the shipyard, the pieces have their own life. 

Like the characters of the tales, to hope them a good trip is the only thing we have left.

Name: LABEKA
Description:
Drei Frauen - eine Idee, so entstand LABEKA! "Alles begann damit, dass wir vergeblich nach einem schönen und modischen Schlüsselband suchten,
um - beladen mit Einkäufen und Kindern - nicht ständig nach unseren Schlüsseln suchen zu müssen.
Was wir suchten, konnten wir nicht finden" - und so war die Idee geboren.
 
Seit 2010 begeistert begeistert LABEKA seine Kundinnen, die Kombination aus praktischem Nutzen und hochwertiger Qualität überzeugt!
 
Kathrin Rößner, Designerin und Mitbegründerin von LABEKA, führt das Unternehmen seit 2016 alleine. Sie lebt und arbeitet in Bamberg. Das Label wird ständig weiterentwickelt und die Kollektion um neue Accessoires erweitert. Die Schlüsselbänder werden neuerdings - dem Cross-Body Trend entsprechend - in vier unterschiedlichen Längen gefertigt. 
 
"Qualität ist (m)eine Verpflichtung!"  Den Gründungsprinzipien ist Kathrin Rößner treu geblieben und legt großen Wert auf die Auswahl der Materialien. Besonders stolz ist sie darauf, dass alle LABEKA Produkte in einem Sattler- und Feintäschnerbetrieb in Deutschland gefertigt werden. Daran soll sich auch in Zukunft nichts ändern. Bei der Auswahl des Leders, das zusammen mit den Metallteilen aus Italien stammt, achtet die Designerin vor allem auf die Haptik.

Name: Sarah Kosta
Description:
Sarah Kosta is a fine jewelry designer and goldsmith from Uruguay, South America. After twelve years working in finance and having since a young age a strong passion for natural stones, she finally decided to fulfill her longtime dream of opening her own fine jewelry namesake brand. With the years, what started as a personal achievement became a successful business that has grown worldwide.     
 
Every Sarah Kosta creation is entirely handcrafted in her home town, Montevideo, by her and her skilled team of artisans. Honouring traditional fine jewelry artisanship, all her pieces are crafted using only high-end metals such as 950 silver and 18K gold. Her collections include classic jewels as well as avant-garde designs with one-of-a-kind stones that she sources from different countries around the globe. Every gem is natural, no synthetics are used.

Sarah Kosta's work is an organic mix of luxe metals and precious gemstones that combine to create covetable and everlasting jewels to share for generations. "Genuine jewels possess a unique meaning. I like to think my creations will pass down from generation to generation, and that idea transcends tangible experiences", says the designer. All Sarah Kosta pieces are exclusive and timeless with a contemporary edge. 

Apart from her regular collections, she specializes in custom-made jewelry: creating a unique piece to fulfill her customers dreams is one of her greatest accomplishments. She also has a Wedding line of romantic jewelry that includes engagement rings, wedding bands, rings, earrings, necklaces, pendants and headpieces. 

Sarah Kosta's collections are available for purchase on her website (sarahkosta.com) and in Manhattan's Soho at Wolf & Badger flagship store. You can also buy her pieces at wolfandbadger.com, jewelstreet.com and myluxboutique.co.uk. Worldwide shipping.

At Sarah Kosta a unique jewel chooses you.

Inspired by ancient wisdom, the collection of 10k Gold Jewelry is crafted by hand in Tel Aviv as modern heirlooms, to be passed on from woman to woman, along with our Brass Ritual Objects. Each piece is designed with the intention of elevating your celebrations -- a coming of age moment, a dinner together, or just a moment in time.

By infusing objects with meaning, we hope to inspire you to adorn in ideas from the past, connection to the present, and the individual dreams that shape your future.

Name: Jada Jo Jewelry
Description:
Artisan crafted jewelry inspired by travel, curated with beads and healing gemstones from around the world.

Several things led to the inception of my jewelry line. In life, sometimes what seems like just a moment can became monumental down the road.  That is how my story evolved. A passion for travel, jewelry, and giving back intersected and inspired me to create jewelry with a purpose and meaning.

At a very young age, my parents started a tradition of traveling to a new country each year. That tradition gave me the travel bug and a fascination with all cultures. My mother collected beautiful jewelry during our travels.  To this day, all the jewelry I have is from somewhere around the world. It is a wonderful way to carry a memory and celebrate a culture.

As we all face the ebbs and flows of life, one of my ebbs led me down the path to learning about the power of crystals. Gemstones' healing powers can be very powerful, so I decided all of my jewelry would be comprised of healing gemstones. I believe it gives purpose to the jewelry.

To infuse even more meaning into jewelry, I wanted each piece sold to have an impact on someone. A percentage of each jewelry item will be donated to Love 146, which is an organization working to end child trafficking and exploitation.

In 2018, I left a 20-year career in the hospitality industry to pursue a passion for providing meaningful jewelry that gives back. The jewelry celebrates cultures from around the world. Each piece is inspired by travel and global cultures. Every piece is handmade in the US and curated with healing gemstones and symbols.  

Thank you for taking the time to read my story. I hope you will become part of the Jada Jo Journey.

Name: Van Velze and Smith
Description:
Graham Smith and Gerrit-Jan van Velze met for the first time in a local pub in the village of Harlestone, Northamptonshire.

Graham comes from a long line of British artisans. Originally making their name as coach builders, the Smith family were renowned for their master craftsmanship. Mr Smith’s eye for meticulous detailing ensures that the finest quality is laced through every pair of boots made at Van Velze & Smith.

Gerrit-Jan is of dutch heritage but South African born and makes a living as a professional rugby player. Einstein believed that the only source of knowledge is experience and with that in mind GJ made the decision to move to Northamptonshire, England, in order to pursue his dream.

On 12 October 2012 Mr Smith and Mr van Velze stumbled across each other in the professed shoe capital of the world, Northamptonshire. Graham was unconvinced by GJ's choice of clothing; he was more impressed with his choice of footwear and thus a budding conversation ensued.

The rest, as they say, is history.

Mr Smith, a master craftsman and Mr van Velze, a person who believes life is about making memories.

The only thing left to do was to start making the boots

Il se trouve également que mon atelier se situe dans un paradis bucolique situé dans la campagne à Paris.
Toute une ambiance qui vient nourrir ma créativité !
Mon inspiration ?
Ancienne directrice artistique dans la publicité, passionnée par la mode,
J’ai une grande sensibilité à la création, l’esthétique et à l’émotion que produit un bijou.
« Un bijou a le pouvoir d’être cette petite chose qui vous fait sentir unique »
Pour qui sont mes créations ?
Les amoureuses, les rebelles, les passionnées, les coquettes, les timides, les audacieuses, les rigolotes…
Toutes les femmes qui décident d’être elles même et de se faire plaisir.

Description:

From rough procurement and processing to jewelry manufacturing..we do it all!

Diastar Inc. is vertically integrated, making it proficient, efficient, and affordable. We seek long term relationships with all of our clients, thus values, ethics, and customer service are most important to us.

FAMILY OWNED – Our extensive background of the precious jewel design trade has allowed us to meet nearly every demand/requirement and allows us to adapt to ever changing trends in the industry.

NO MIDDLE MAN – Most of our diamonds come directly from the mine in raw material form. From there, we manufacture the diamonds and then they go straight to your hands. You receive conflict-free, certified and non certified diamonds straight from the source.

LOWEST PRICES – We boast some of the lowest prices for loose diamonds and jewelry on the market. Usually, there is no middle man so the products go straight to you from manufacturing, and you don’t have to have to pay the difference. We provide high-quality goods at a fraction of the price.

BEST QUALITY – Our quality is evident in the rings and jewelry we design. The timeless pieces speak for themselves. Our diamonds are known for their exceptional brilliance, fire, and cut.

EXPERT SERVICE – At Diastar Inc, the customer is FAMILY! Our commitment to ethics, transparency, consistency, and excellent customer satisfaction is what keeps us going.

 „Man ist nur so gut, wie sein Team!“

Freundliche und kompetente Beratung sind hier genauso selbstverständlich, wie das Annehmen von Reparaturen. Denn diese werden im Familienbetrieb mit Liebe und Präzision bearbeitet. Name: Jewel Tree London
Description:
Established by designer & creative director Deborah Vani Zama in 2016, Jewel Tree London is a Notting Hill based premium jewellery brand that creates strikingly beautiful contemporary pieces in a range of semi-precious stones and refined metals.

Inspired by architectural designs, materials and forms, Jewel Tree London’s creations are timeless, elegant and highly directional. The designs call to those who love bold, sculptural pieces that play with traditional notions of gender conformity, allowing for a light-hearted duality.
Designed for the self-aware, elegant, independent person who is passionate about embracing the future. Jewel Tree London is a luxurious extension and reflection of their lifestyle – pioneering creations that are destined to be modern classics.

Our Design Ethos
Inspired by architectural designs, materials and forms, Jewel Tree London’s creations are timeless, elegant and highly directional. The designs call to those who love bold, sculptural pieces that play with traditional notions of gender conformity, allowing for a light-hearted duality.

Jewel Tree London bridges traditional design practises with modern technology to drive forward innovation in jewellery design. Working with semi-precious stones and precious metals - every piece is individually hand crafted with emphasis on the highest quality whilst being at the forefront of modern design.

Our Philosophy
Deeply committed to an artisan’s indigenous knowledge and traditional production techniques, ethicality lies at the heart of Jewel Tree London. A strict code of conduct is followed to ensure social and environmental responsibility, from the responsible sourcing of raw materials to ethical mining practices and zero tolerance of child labour. The company pledges ten percent of its profits to both supporting the local environment and to creating educational opportunities for the children of the communities it partners with.

Description:
A história do designer de joias Celso Caldo começou na década de 1970 quando se despertaram sua aptidão para a arte da ourivesaria e seu interesse comercial nesse ramo. Em 1980, abriu uma oficina com sua esposa dando início à comercialização de suas primeiras peças.

“Antes de abrir minha própria oficina, 
aprendi muito com ourives experientes, joalheiros fantásticos...”

A venda de joias sob encomenda se intensificou na década de 1990, quando decidiu abrir sua primeira loja.

“Se não fosse a parceria com minha esposa, 
não chegaria tão longe...”

A procura de matérias-primas diferenciadas, o rigoroso critério de avaliação de pedras, a criatividade e a ética, princípios norteadores do trabalho artesanal de Celso Caldo, vêm conquistando clientes há mais de 32 anos, que se tornaram verdadeiros amigos, e consolidando a marca no mercado.

No fim da década de 1990, a empresa se fortaleceu com a chegada da nova geração. Felipe Caldo passou a cuidar da oficina do pai, aperfeiçoando e inovando as técnicas de fabricação e design.

Hoje, Celso Caldo é referência em qualidade, bom gosto, confiança e exclusividade no ramo de joalheria na região de Ribeirão Preto.

Name: Zlaté Mince Numismatika
Description:
Tradiční český importér a prodejce investičního zlata. Již od roku 2003 se specializujeme na prodej investičního zlata a drahých kovů vysoké ryzosti. Naše prodejny naleznete v Praze, ve Vsetíně a v Bratislavě.

Prodáváme i zlaté investiční mince a švýcarské zlaté slitky. Zboží odebíráme přímo od Vídeňské mincovny, Mincovny USA, Pražské mincovny i České mincovny, Slovenské mincovny, České a Slovenské národní banky a rafinérů zlatých slitků. Mince z nových emisí a švýcarské zlaté slitky jsou doplněny certifikátem udávajícím jejich parametry. Ryzost prodávaných mincí je zaručena emitujícím státem.

Významnou je i naše vlastní emisní činnost. Razíme medaile především z drahých kovů jako je zlato, stříbro a platina. Každá medaile je ražena pouze v omezeném počtu kusů, které jsou úředně puncovány a dodávají se s certifikátem. Nejvzácnější ražby jsou navíc číslovány na hraně. Mimořádný důraz klademe na výtvarné zpracování našich medailí, umělecké provedení a precizní práci rytců při přípravě razidel. Spolupracujeme s nejvýznamnějšími sochaři a malíři. Patří mezi ně zejména akademický sochař pan Vladimír Oppl, akademický sochař Zbyněk Fojtů, a mnoho dalších.

Internetový katalog zlatých a stříbrných mincí české státnosti od roku 1918, který provozujeme na jednoduché adrese www.Zlate-Mince.cz patří svým rozsahem k naprosto ojedinělým stránkám i v evropském měřítku. Představuje ucelený a úplný přehled mincí ražených na našem území Československým státem a po rozdělení Českou a Slovenskou republikou.

Stránky www.Zlate-Mince.cz byly vybrány Národní knihovnou ČR jako kvalitní zdroj, který by měl být uchován do budoucna a stát se součástí českého kulturního dědictví. Stránky jsou archivovány několikrát ročně a jejich záznam je součástí České národní bibliografie a katalogu NK ČR.

V naších prodejních expozicích v Praze v Obecním domě a ve Vsetíně v budově Komerční banky si můžete vybrat ze široké nabídky více než 8000 mincí.

Těšíme se na vaši návštěvu.

Name: ROBERT & FILS 1630
Description: Robert & Fils 1630 enjoy what is probably the longest watchmaking tradition in the world. Abram Robert was one of the first watchmakers in Swiss history. In 1630 he was appointed by the municipal authorities in Le Locle to assess the reliability of the town clock. Nearly a century later, in 1725, Josué Robert was named "Watchmaker to the King" by Friedrich Wilhelm I of Prussia. Over a period of nearly 400 years, the Robert family, from generation to generation, has designed timepieces under their own name and hundreds of mechanical movements for the watch industry. Now Gilles Robert, the heir of this amazing heritage, has revived a unique watchmaking tradition by creating exclusive timepieces in classic contemporary style. Each watch made by Robert & Fils 1630 uses fully restored “Robert” movements, and is designed with the help of ancestral know-how and a variety of enamelling and other techniques.

Name: Zahia
Description:
Liefde voor schoonheid en authenticiteit, met een persoonlijke aanpak, dat is de rode draad door het hele Zahiaverhaal.
Dat was al zo in 2001, toen Zahia begon met de verkoop van oude kelims en tapijten en van oud etnisch aardewerk. Dat Zahia vandaag glaskralen en halfedelstenen verkoopt, is eigenlijk een speling van het lot: het begon allemaal toen een halssnoer brak en we besloten om de kralen van het snoer los te verkopen. In een mum van tijd waren alle kralen de deur uit  en kregen we veel enthousiaste reacties van onze klanten.

De focus werd definitief verlegd naar juwelen. Bij Zahia vind je nu een bijzonder uitgebreide collectie halfedelstenen en glaskralen en een groot aanbod eigen ontworpen juwelen.

Je kunt bij Zahia een sieraad op maat laten maken. Op maat betekent dan: een sieraad dat past bij je kleurtype, bij je kleding, bij de vorm van je gezicht. Of je kunt ervoor kiezen zelf aan de slag te gaan en je eigen sieraad te ontwerpen en te maken. In dat geval kun je rekenen op competente hulp en advies van de staf. Zahia heeft ook een uitgebreid aanbod workshops “Juwelen maken”, zowel voor beginners als voor gevorderden.
Dé troef van Zahia is gepersonaliseerd advies en maatwerk: al onze medewerksters hebben een opleiding kleuranalyse gekregen en zijn getraind om je te helpen bij de keuze van het sieraad dat perfect bij je past.
We zoeken steeds nieuwe originele kralen. We gaan naar Venetië om er in de ateliers van Murano zelf de kleuren en vormen van de collectie te bepalen. We gingen ook naar Tsjechië  en recent naar India om een volledig nieuwe collectie te laten maken.
En de trein raast maar door: na een winkel in Antwerpen en Gent, opende Zahia winkels in Leuven en Mechelen.

Het succesverhaal van Zahia toont aan dat het concept een gevoelige snaar raakt bij het publiek: het gaat om de combinatie van de juiste mensen, een warme aanpak en een sfeervolle omgeving. Wie binnenstapt bij Zahia, deelt dezelfde liefde voor schoonheid en authenticiteit.

Name: Melee Parcel Diamonds
Description:
Melee Parcels is a diamond distributor and manufacture uniquely focused on driving the melee diamond industry forward by upholding the highest authenticity standards to ensure members in the retail and jewelry manufacturing confidence. All our melee diamond parcels are analyzed by GIA to guarantee 100% natural, calibrated and quality-sorted diamonds always shipped in sealed GIA secure packaging.
Utilizing the latest technologies and thoroughly tested methodologies, we identify and screen out synthetic and treated diamonds that may be mixed in melee parcels – assuring fair trade while to safeguarding our clients hard-earned reputation in the diamond industry.
Melee Parcel was borne out of a diamond legacy that began in the early 1970s – a legacy bequeathed by grandfather to grandson. With roots in a small reputable diamond polishing factory, Melee Parcel today proudly supplies premium melee diamond parcels to manufacturers and distributors of diamond jewelry, diamond jewelry retailers, and all members of the diamond industry.
Melee Parcel was established as a response to the needs of the constantly evolving diamond industry by delivering a highly secure platform for members to purchase competitively priced, 100% natural untreated melee diamonds direct from a diamond distributor.

Name: Jewel Affair Ltd
Description:
I am a small home based business in West London specialising in luxury handmade candles, wax melts, & reed diffusers.

I started my business in 2020 after going through a few tough years being a full time carer for my mum.

In Feb 2020 my mum passed away and having a 2 year old I wanted to spend as much time as possible with her. I decided to start turning my hobby into a business.

Candles and Reed Diffusers are a big passion of mine. My house if full of them and I enjoy them for some great quality relaxing time and to make the house smell good.

I wanted to bring my passion to my customers, friends and family and also wanted to do something in my mums name for charity.

With every Candle sold, a percentage of profits is given to the British Heart Foundation to help support research into heart disease.

The wax used in these luxury candles, combines the unbeatable scent throw of a paraffin wax with the creamy appearance and benefits of clean, natural rapeseed. It’s is one of the best on the market - cocosoy

These luxury handmade candles burn from 10 to over 40 hours depending on care taken and size of the candle. The candles are loaded with the maximum percentage of Fragrance oil for a strong long lasting Scent. It also burns evenly and cleanly.

The Reed Diffusers are loaded with the maximum percentage of fragrance oil to create a long lasting, beautiful and delicate scent from the minuite you open the bottle, right up until the last drop.

Relax with these beautiful candles and reed diffusers in your Living Room, Bathroom, or Study. You wont be disappointed!

Each and every candle and reed diffusers is hand poured to create the perfect finish each time.

Each ribbon, and lable is also hand crafted to perfection, however this also means that no one product is exactly the same.

If you would like a particular fragrance not on our list, please contact us to see if we can provide this for you.

We also personalise candles for wedding, gifts, favours etc

Name: Hourhand Watch Co.
Description:
Hourhand Watch Co. is a Ghanaian owned business in the watch industry in Ghana, growing rapidly. The business commenced in early 2020, and has since served significant number of individuals, institutions and other organisations in different parts of Africa and other European countries.

Our expertise are centred on;

Watch and clock repairs

With a team of professionals who have been well-trained in horology (watchmaking), we provide a wide range of activities. These include but not limited to; watch part replacements, inspection and cleaning, movement servicing, sizing and overhauling.

We ensure that the defective timepiece is carefully inspected, then followed by series of tests using our available state-of-art devices to evaluate the condition. This allows us to recommend appropriate solutions that would revert the timepiece to its aesthetic perfections. Recommendations for both short and long term are shared with clients to make decisions on the type of services needed. 

We repair all types of watches and brands, be it  Automatic, mechanical or quartz. 

Retailing of Watches 

Hourhand Watch Co. retails quality watches and clocks of all brands and provide our clients with competitive prices. 

Personalisation

At HourHand Watch Co., clients are the focus of business operations. Therefore, we offer customised products and services to clients as per their needs and desires. Such services include engraving, personalised clock designs and watch straps.

We strive to offer the very exceptional services in a friendly atmosphere while prioritising the customer’s experience.

You may contact us today via phone at +233556547064 to discuss your watch needs or locate us at Greda Estate, Accra (https://goo.gl/maps/n5aosDTPVJxndfkt9).  Also, visit our Facebook and Instagram pages for more details.

Name: GOLD & SCHATZ
Description:
GOLD & SCHATZ bietet Ihnen eine handverlesene Auswahl an hochwertigem Echtschmuck von internationalen Schmuckdesignern. 

Der Schwerpunkt der Kollektion liegt auf in den USA bereits bekannten Marken wie Jeanine Payer, Me & Ro, Chan Luu, Jennifer Zeuner, Robindira Unsworth, Page Sargisson oder Baroni, die trotz ihres Erfolges in den USA in Europa nur schwer oder gar nicht zu beziehen sind. 

Talentierte US-Goldschmiede mit wunderschönen Kollektionen wie Rebekka Brooks, Ariel Gordon, Jane Hollinger und Sonya Renée vervollständigen gemeinsam mit europäischen Ausnahme-Designern wie dem trendigen dänischen Schmuck-Label Bugs & Ants, dem Londoner Geheimtipp Comfort Station, der britischen Schmuck-Künstlerin Kate Wood oder der kreativen Kollektion WATCH! der Deutschen Maike Gericke das GOLD & SCHATZ Angebot. 

Dabei achten wir neben der ausgefallenen Optik besonders auf die hochwertige Verarbeitung – alle von GOLD & SCHATZ angebotenen Schmuckstücke werden in Handarbeit gefertigt. Und die von uns ausgewählten Designer legen zusätzlich großen Wert auf Nachhaltigkeit und verarbeiten überwiegend Recycling-Gold und konfliktfreie Edelsteine. 

Sie finden bei GOLD & SCHATZ in erster Linie Echtschmuck aus hochwertigem Gold, echtem Sterling Silber oder vergoldetem Sterling Silber. Ergänzt werden diese Edelmetalle durch echte Schmucksteine sowie durch Materialien wie unter anderem edles Leder oder irisches Leinen, die dem Schmuck eine moderne und teilweise gewünscht lässige Note geben.

Name: Allegory Handcrafted Goods
Description:
Allegory was founded in Spring of 2012 on the principal of creating deeper value in the objects we use everyday. Through smart-sourcing of materials, handcrafted small-batch manufacturing, and a unique combination of luxury and mass-market accessibility, Allegory has created a social media groundswell, rapid growth, and national media coverage remarkably quickly.

Innovating the Old Way

Allegory’s first product line was a collection of handcrafted writing instruments made from reclaimed and historical woods. The compelling stories of the woods make Allegory’s writing instruments the perfect choice for a meaningful gift, as the stories often connect to the owner in a very personal way.

In Summer of 2013, Allegory began introducing handcrafted leather products. First was The Etch, a pocket journal cover to compliment Allegory’s writing instruments. Next up Allegory introduced a new concept in wallets, The KIT is a customizable, handcrafted wallet that lets the owner choose what pockets they would like, and where. 

Social Purpose & Crowdfunding

Allegory has introduced each of its new products on Kickstarter, a crowdfunding site for creative endeavors and entrepreneurship. Kickstarter has redefined the way projects are funded in a few short years, allowing tens of thousands of project creators to raise over 800 million in total funds. Allegory has raised $120,000 in four successful projects, placing its projects firmly above the 97th percentile in terms of performance.

Name: milleperle
Description:
Years ago on a trip to Micronesia I discovered the magic and purity of pearls in their natural habitat, a true treasure in no man’s land and I have never lost that image. 

I needed adventure, to explore, to travel and expand my horizons. In 1991 I dedicated my life to pearls. I left for French Polynesia to be surrounded by beautiful shells, amazing treasures were there to be discovered though in pretty rough waters!

Without a precise destination, I explored differents atolls, travelling on the merchant ships that connect the innumerable Archipelago Islands.

I was closing in to my treasure, my future had started.    After two years in French Polynesia I went to Indonesia, Malaysia, Australia, Philippines, China and Japan in search on new contacts, new pearls and new emotions. It was no longer a strange world but my exciting new one.

My life had changed. From Sharks Bay to Pirates Coast, from the enchanting Polynesian lagoons to Ago Bay, I keep covering long and fantastic distances, looking for my treasures with the same enthusiasm and excitement.

Our jewels are created by Italian master goldsmiths exclusively using 18 K gold, diamonds, natural and cultivated pearls. Furthermore it is possible to order custom jewels to your own design.

Description: Terrazz is the wholesale connection between jewelry designers and original manufacturers of luxury jewelry using gold with diamonds, emeralds and other precious stones, as well as the creative use of semi-precious stones.  The designers and manufacturers are located in Istanbul, Turkey, the historical location of some of the highest quality jewelry designers in the world.  Each can be as unique as the buyer wishes, as Terrazz allows the buyer to contribute to the design of any piece desired.  Many of the pieces created by the designers are the only item made with that design, giving a buyer the rare luxury of knowing that they are the only person with that design.

Name: Kienzle Italia
Description:
Kienzle Italia nasce nel 1933 a Milano per rappresentare la manifattura tedesca Kienzle in Italia, con un laboratorio destinato alla produzione di casse e all’assemblaggio di movimenti, S.I.O.K. (Società Italiana Orologi Kienzle).
Gli eventi legati alla guerra costrinsero la Orologi Kienzle a chiudere la filiale italiana ma gestori decisero di rilevare l`azienda, dimostrando coraggio in un periodo non favorevole alle iniziative commerciali. L`operazione diede risultati positivi e nel 1954 subentrò la seconda generazione.
Da settembre 2002 la Società Italiana Orologi Kienzle è diventata Kienzle Italia.
Oggi Kienzle Orologi può vantare un`ampia collezione di orologi da polso che hanno come punti di forza la qualità legata alla forte tradizione dell`orologeria tedesca e la modernità del design di stile prettamente italiano.
La mission è da sempre realizzare una produzione che rispecchi l`equilibrio tra alta qualità, estetica attuale e di successo e prezzi competitivi.
Questo le ha permesso di creare collezioni dal design in linea con le tendenze di gusto e di stile del nostro Paese. Attualmente, i punti vendita attivi sono circa 1.500.
Esprimere la centralità della vita del cliente nelle sue mille sfaccettature di cultura, modi usi e costumi, creando un prodotto che ne sublimi al meglio la personalità è da sempre e sempre sarà, la nostra visione.

Name: Everstone DiaJewels FZE
Description: Manufacturers and wholesalers of certified and non certified cut and polished loose diamonds and diamond jewellery.

Name: Gem Connection Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 1981 on a foundation of Excellent service and Superb products, Gem Connection has grown to be one of the largest wholesale loose Gemstone, Diamond and Jewellery suppliers on the Canadian west coast.

The values with which the company was established are still applied in all our dealings as we strive to provide our customers with the excellence and perfection they seek in terms of our product, services and pricing.

Name: CASVET
Description: A romantic rebellion against mediocrity. CASVET crafts intricate wearable art jewelry, sculptures, and decorative objects. Explore our fusion of digital sculpting, parametric design, dedicated craftsmanship, and unique designs inspired by nature's beauty. Embrace complexity and emotion in every piece.

Name: Zurich Watch 蘇麗鐘錶
Description:
我們的故事始於1949年，天成表行由對鐘錶充滿熱情、工作積極的李棟先生創立。
天成錶行於1963年遷至尖沙咀凱悅酒店，及改名為蘇麗鐘錶。在 70 年代，李先生為該業務引入了多種名貴手錶品牌，包括勞力士、帝舵表及百達翡麗。1988 年，公司再次遷至彌敦道，從一家小型企業發展成為其中香港歷史悠久的品牌授權手錶零售商之一。2010 年，蘇麗鐘錶的百達翡麗授權零售店於彌敦道開業。半個多世紀以來，蘇麗鐘錶一直為客戶提供專業服務。我們繼續體現李先生的創始承諾，並致力於為所有客戶提供卓越的客戶體驗。2021年，蘇麗鐘錶的百達翡麗授權零售店在香港半島酒店正式開業。2022年第一季帝陀店將會在尖沙咀彌敦道開幕。

Our story begins in 1949 when 天成錶行 was founded by the disciplined, passionate, and motivated Mr. Lee Dong. 天成錶行 was later renamed to Zurich Watch Company and relocated to the Hyatt Regency in Tsim Sha Tsui in 1963. In the 70s, Mr. Lee introduced a wide range of luxury watch brands to the business, including Rolex, Tudor and Patek Philippe. In 1988, the company moved again to the Nathan Street and grew from a small business to one of the time-honored brands’ authorized watch retailer in Hong Kong. In 2010, Zurich Watch’s Patek Philippe shop has opened on Nathan Street. More than half century, Zurich Watch Company has been providing professional service to our customers and spotlighting on a wide variety of timeless pieces.  We continue to embody Mr. Lee Dong's founding commitments and are dedicated to provide excellent customer experience for all our customers. In 2021, Zurich Watch’s Authorized Patek Philippe shop opened at The Peninsula Hong Kong. In the first quarter of 2022, Zurich Watch’s  Tudor shop opens on Nathan Road in Tsim Sha Tsui.

Name: Wild Metal Joias
Description:
Sempre muito apaixonada por criar joias, Marina, realizou seu sonho de começar sua própia marca, suas peças remetem a sua paixão pelas musicas e tendências presentes nos anos 60, 70, 80 e 90. Todas as peças são feitas por ela com muito carinho e dedicação.

A Wild Metal vem com a intenção de trazer peças originais, para todos, sem exeções em questão de tamanho, fazendo o possivel para sempre trazer igualdade e respeito para seus clientes. 

Pensando sempre em fazer nossos clientes felizes, aceitamos encomendas personalizadas, podendo criar uma Joia totalmente idealizada por você! 

Trabalho com prata e ouro!

Name: Klenotnictví Dušák
Description:
V rodinném Klenotnictví Dušák se zaměřujeme na prodej i servis luxusních hodinek, vedle kterých dále nabízíme originální šperky, hodiny a doplňky světoznámých prestižních značek. Do České republiky jsme přivedli kult jménem Omega. Dnes tuto vlajkovou loď doplňuje dvacet tři dalších brandů jako např. IWC Schaffhausen, Jaeger-LeCoultre, Jaquet Droz, Ulysse Nardin, Zenith, Chopard, Tag Heuer, Erwin Sattler a mnoho dalších. 

Historie společnosti se datuje k otevření hodinářství Dušák r. 1992 v pražské ulici Na Příkopě, kde víceznačková prodejna s radostí vítá milovníky hodinek a šperků dodnes. Klienti, jež s námi pojí vášeň pro mechanickou hodinařinu, u nás najdou vitríny plné nejzajímavějších hodinářských a klenotnických počinů. Jsme si vědomi toho, že nákup hodinek je vždy emocionální záležitost, proto je Klenotnictví Dušák místem setkávání hodinářské komunity, kde se Vám dostane dlouhodobé péče a kam se budete chtít vracet.

V další naší prodejně – butiku Omega sídlícím na Staroměstském náměstí si můžete prohlédnout, vyzkoušet a pořídit výhradně produkty této značky. Obdivovatelé hodinek, ale také šperků a doplňků, či samotní sběratelé nepochybně ocení, že se zde setkají s širokou nabídkou kolekcí včetně unikátních kusů. Některé speciální edice, které u nás najdete, jsou nabízeny výhradně v buticích Omega. 

Klenotnictví Dušák se specializuje nejen na prodej, ale také na hodinářský servis. Ten je vybaven nejmodernější technikou a řadí se na přední místo v žebříčku nejlepších servisních míst v Evropě. Odborně certifikovaný personál je toho zárukou.

Navštivte Klenotnictví Dušák a poznejte místo, které zastává a kde se tvoří trvalé hodnoty.

Name: Rare and Unique Limited
Description:
Rare and Unique provides a secure buying and selling service for exclusive and hard to find items. Commanding over 70 years of combined experience in the luxury, lifestyle and corporate markets, the Rare & Unique team is called upon when corporations, concierge firms and ultra high-net-worth individuals require truly specialist assistance.

Rare and Unique are proud to offer unprecedented access to a global network of trusted partners. A privileged address book of industry contacts who value and embody our service promise; integrity, flexibility and authenticity.  Sensitive to the nuances of different cultures, the Rare & Unique team speaks multiple languages and pride themselves on delivering a service built on trust and integrity.

Our connections represent some of the finest names in the luxury market, as well as emerging global players. We believe that building strong relationships with trusted partners is essential when providing the highest level of service to our clients. Designed to mitigate risk and exceed expectations, the Rare & Unique service saves you time and money, with clients benefiting from face to face meetings, speedy service times and fully insured delivery.

Boasting a large and ever growing network of local and international connections, Rare & Unique is the optimum choice for those seeking to acquire and sell exclusive and hard to find items.

Name: M J GILLAN LTD
Description:
MJ Gillan Ltd specialises in the supply of fine quality and collectors’ watches. Timepieces sourced include pre-owned models by the important Swiss manufacturers, including Patek Philippe, Rolex,Cartier, Jaeger leCoultre, Omega, Audemars Piguet, Panerai, Franck Muller, Breguet and Vacheron Constantin. This is aided by close links with the leading auction houses, as well as contact with many private collectors. 

Expert advice is provided on all aspects of buying a timepiece, whether it is new or second-hand or as a special one-off purchase, or as part of building a collection of watches for investment purposes. The purchases of second-hand and any unwanted Swiss watches are always considered

Name: Goblina
Description:
Goblina is a brand created by jewelry designer Rosy Arrasco who lives and works in Mexico.  

Most pieces are hand made with different metals, gemstones, crystals, and anything that can be transformed as art.

Goblina´s jewelry is influenced by different cultures.  


The company has presence in México, United States, Japan, and Canada

For more info visit:
www.goblina.com

Name: INK GIOIELLI PERSONALIZZATI
Description: Nato nell’ottobre del 2008 da un’idea di Valerio Tagliacarne di Orizzonti Srl, INK è un progetto di gioielleria artigianale che abbraccia il concetto di unicità delle persone e del PEZZO UNICO che ciascuno di noi può realizzare per sé o per gli altri, unendo il potere dell'inchiostro e delle parole a quello del metallo, producendo gioielli in argento 925 totalmente personalizzabili.

Name: RED8WORLD S.A
Description:
Launched in 2009, the world of Red8 is the brainchild of luxury watchmaker, Christian BEDAT, the man with an illustrious watch making history hallmarked by internationally known brands like Raymond Weil and BEDAT & C°. 

Inspired by the environment, Christian, with his extensive watch making experience, created Red8world with the dream to bring luxury to a new audience with a new world perspective. 

The Red8 watches are Red8world's interpretation of the new era we belong in which luxury is no longer about monetary value but the drive of embracing individuality and dare to make a statement. 

“Design on Earth, Made in Asia” Red8world believes that luxury should have no boundary and so as the world.  

In order to make a statement, all Red8 watches are exclusively available online at its virtual boutique at which luxury has become approachable, accessible and infinite.  

Each Red8 watch expresses an inter-racial philosophy combining values and colors that results in a contemporary timepiece with its iconic words on the bezel. 

After its first success in launching the 42 mm I-Matic series last year, Christian BEDAT introduces two series this year, namely 45 mm Automatic series and the full pave version of 42 mm I-Matic series.

Name: Rosa de Barcelona
Description: En nuestra ROSA DE BARCELONA unimos dos panots, el de la tradición con el de la elegancia, dejándola impresa en artículos diseñados y elaborados por artistas que nos sentimos orgullosos de vivir en una ciudad de lujo. Somos un equipo apasionado con la misión de compartir la elegancia y tradición de Barcelona con todos sus amantes para que regalen y generen ilusión a sus familiares y amigos con nuestras joyas, vinos y cavas.

Name: ANIKI
Description:
ANIKI is a luxury, bespoke jewellery design service founded by Anna Hartley and Nikki Blowers, two businesswoman and more importantly friends that have come together to create something truly unique. 

ANIKI is unlike other jewellery companies. We don’t set the prices, you do – we can guide and help you to create the perfect piece to suit your budget. 

Customise or create your bespoke design built around your ideas, aspirations and most importantly how much you want to spend.

Name: Teng Huat Jewellery
Description: Teng Huat Jewellery is an international jewellery company based in Singapore. We specialised in crafting modern and unique masterpieces at remarkable prices. Our company is backed by a team of highly skilled designers and craftsmen whom have many years of experience in the jewelry industry. We offer a wide range of jewelry products ranging from casual wear, classics, extravagant pieces, bridal jewelry and all to way to customised jewelry sets. Visit us at www.tenghuat.com.sg to find out more about us.

Name: Beaumont & Charlesworth
Description:
The names Beaumont & Charlesworth date back further than the 1900's and was the catalyst in which we created our brand.  

The story begins with the Charlesworth family, an affluent group of farmers based in North Yorkshire, England. There were also the Beaumont family, a working class family based in West Yorkshire, England. The bond between these two families was made on the 5th September 1953 when Mr Charlesworth and Miss Beaumont married. Both families had very different values, yet at the same time, both had strong similarities. Such as being hard working, versatile and finally, having an entrepreneurial spirit. 

We wanted to ensure that our products and brand encapsulated these three values:

We wanted to develop products which are durable enough to cope with our busy/often unpredictable and hard working lives. 
It must be versatile enough to look fantastic everyday, be it a morning out in the fields or at a black tie dinner.
Both families maintained their own enterprises which were built from the ground up. We understand that your entrepreneurial goals are important to you. This is why we wanted to make our products available to you, at a price that will not hinder these aspirations (But still keep you looking fantastic!)
We are a small team of British designers who came together with these three goals in mind. No elaborate stories of the conception of the brand, just hard working, versatile products, which may appeal to those of you out there with an entrepreneurial spirit. 

We would be delighted to hear from you, so please feel free to get in touch with us through our social media pages or via email.

Name: T. Foster & Co., Fine Jewelers
Description: For over 35 years, T. Foster & Co. has been giving people a better way to find the jewelry they love. Jewelry is our passion. We flawlessly design and manufacture all of our jewelry in our Pennsylvania and New York workshops. Beautiful, distinctive, and of the highest quality, your T. Foster & Co. jewelry is sure to become a treasured heirloom for generations to come.

Name: SHaira
Description:
Als sieraden liefhebber ben je bij SHaira aan het juiste adres!

Hier vind je de mooiste sieraden volgens de laatste modetrends. Unieke, handgemaakte en musthave sieraden voor een sterke en modebewuste man & vrouw! 

Handmade by SHaira zijn sieraden die ik zelf maak. Denk hierbij aan kralenarmbanden, oorringen met hangers, ringen en kettingen. 

Naast de ‘handmade by SHaira’ collectie koop ik ook een musthave sieraden collectie in. Hierin zie je zilver- en goudkleurige armbanden en oorbellen die je echt moet hebben!

SHaira is ontstaan omdat ik het leuk vind om sieraden te ontwerpen en omdat ik kinderen wil helpen die onder de armoedegrens leven. Met SHaira kan ik dit combineren! Elke avond een lekkere warme maaltijd, je verjaardag vieren, nieuwe kleding en speelgoed krijgen, is niet vanzelfsprekend voor vele kinderen in Nederland!

Per bestelling doneer ik 10% aan het goede doel Kinderenvandevoedselbank.

Name: EnA Fine Jewelry
Description:
EnA designs combine European sophistication with American ingenuity.  Classically tailored with a contemporary allure, our fine jewelry embodies an understated aesthetic that is as refined as the women who wear it.  Precious metals and gemstone fine jewelry worn by self-confident, driven and accomplished women. We celebrate these women through our Cover Girl campaign.  EnA Fine Jewelry is available at exclusive luxury retailers nationwide and the Caribbean.

In Greek, EnA means "one."  Discover what makes you unique.

Born in Philadelphia.  Made in the US.  Designing Individuality.

Name: Watch Hub ltd
Description: Watch Hub is a specialist watch repairer. We were created to offer customers an alternative to long wait times and excessive pricing. We offer specialist watch repairs at affordable prices.

Name: Pattni Bros
Description:
Pattni Bros are specialists in 22Kt Gold Jewellery, Diamond Jewellery, Watches and Investment Gold Bars.

We are a family run business based in Leicestershire. Situated on the famous Golden Mile, we pride ourselves on stocking the finest Jewellery produced to the highest standards.

Established since 1972 we have continued serving our customers with a tradition of trust and integrity. Your satisfaction is at the heart of our business ethos.

Please call us for more details or visit us in store!

Name: SOLYVERBAF
Description:
SOLYVERBAF est un acronyme des sociétés Solyfonte, Vernet Dray & Bronze d’Art Français qui composent le groupe.

Découvrez nos offres d'emploi ! Si aucune offre ne vous correspond, faites nous parvenir votre CV en nous expliquant votre projet. Nous serons ravi d'échanger avec vous ! Nous étudions toute les candidatures avec attention, réponse assurée. 

De nombreux postes sont à pourvoir :
- Bijoutière / Bijoutier
- Joaillère / Joaillier
- Orfèvre
- Polisseuse / Polisseur
- Fondeuse / Fondeur
- Monteuse / Monteur en Bronze
etc.. !

Le groupe SOLYVERBAF a vu le jour pour pouvoir répondre aux besoins de nos clients en alliant nos savoir-faire artisanaux afin de maîtriser au mieux notre chaîne de production. Les expertises de chacune des 3 sociétés permettent d’offrir une satisfaction client et une qualité de production toujours plus élevée.

Name: Katerji
Description:
Every brand of art, every brand of craftsmanship, every work of artistry, mastery, imagination, expertise, passion, ingenuity, every skill of shear hard work is driven by something greater than us, something more meaningful than day to day living, something that runs deep within our roots, fueled with a burning desire, a fire from within your heart that longs for expression. What's our story?

When creativity and passion meet talent, you get an uncompromised commitment to excellence and mastery of art. Katerji's fine display of craftsmanship exemplifies just that.

Katerji is a Canadian jewellery company founded in 2016 in Mississauga, ON, Canada. Coming from a generation of gold merchants and jewellers, your experience with Katerji from start to finish, is filled with emotions nothing short of bliss, warmth, and contentment. Katerji's pride comes from the hard work to continue to innovate and bring stunning, premium-grade jewellery that are uniquely expressive, eloquent, and are honestly priced.

Name: Hilos de Plata LA CALA
Description:
La Cala's first collection was introduced in 2006 and since then has gained international success. Its work has been recognized every year at the prestigious contemporary design competition Enjoia't, winning prizes in 2007 and 2008.
This success in designing avant-garde silver jewelry as well as a multitude of custom work, leads the Studio to venture into the bridal market, presenting its first collection especially designed for brides.
Each piece is elaborated for expert artisan hands; by the designer herself or by the team of craftswomen that La Cala has in Peru, supporting fair trade in Paola's birthplace.

La Cala lanzó su primera colección de joyas al mercado en el año 2006 y desde entonces ha ganado un espacio importante internacionalmente.
Su trabajo ha sido reconocido con dos premios de diseño en joyería contemporánea por el FAD (Enjoia’t 07 y Enjoia’t 08).

Tras el éxito de sus diseños en joyería, y múltiples encargos personalizados, en 2009 La Cala incursiona en el mundo de las novias, presentando su primera colección creada especialmente para ellas. 
Las piezas son elaboradas en su totalidad por manos artesanas, ya sea por la diseñadora o por el equipo de tejedoras en su país de origen, Perú, para apoyar así el comercio justo.

Name: Saiidii
Description: Saiidii is a jewelry brand that was founded in 2019 with the idea to provide affordable luxury.

Name: LEVA Solutions GmbH
Description: With our many years of experience, we have specialized in providing you with high quality sapphire and mineral glass products.  We use precision machines to form our crystals that are then able to fit your various watches, phones and medical devices.   Our high production capabilities are able to provide clients with quick delivery times and meet their quantity demands.  We are able offer reliability and high quality products at competitive prices due to our extensive experience and infrastructure that has been placed.

Name: Vera Forma a.k.a Vera Designs Ltd.
Description:
Vera Forma means “True Form” or “True Design” in Italian, and at its' core is a Geometrical Concept used in Mathematics. But, you might be wondering what this has to do with leather products. Well, time and time again we were and still are disappointed by the quality of the items in our daily lives, that we simply could not ignore this feeling any more. We had to act. A desire emerged for stunning, yet  functional products. Time-enduring products, made by hand, made right here in North America, by people like you and me and not in large production factories, halfway across the globe. The nostalgic desire to make the products we grew up with admiring is still driving us today. It drives us to strive to make items that will last and be handed down to our children. Products they would be happy and honored to receive. 

This is how Vera Forma Leatherworks came to be. The meaning of the name in itself outlines our Vision & our Mission Statement as well as guides our everyday decisions.  “True Design”  -  “True Form & Shape” and the “True Quality” of each of our products are rooted deep in our brand’s and our own DNA. So, Take a Look, Enjoy, Stay a While, and JOIN us for the "Journey". Become part of our Growth and Identity, because without YOU, we would not be where we are today.

Name: District Leather, LLC
Description: Unique, innovative, and high-quality handcrafted leather goods.  Made by hand one at a time in the USA.

Name: EON Bullion
Description: EON Bullion is seeking to make the bullion markets accessible to all, with beautiful, affordable bullion testing technology, we are taking on the barriers to entry, and ownership one by one. In a post Covid world, with inflation creeping into economies globally, after 5000 years of utilization, bullion is looking more relevant than ever.

Name: Luxury Circular
Description:
Circula Luxo is an online thrift store responsible for intermediating the purchase and sale of authentic luxury items, evaluated by a specialized team, which rigorously analyzes each piece.

We encourage circular fashion and conscious consumption. Our customers have the opportunity to buy classic luxury items at a much more affordable price. And we make it possible for our suppliers to turn items they no longer use into cash.

Name: ASANA MINERALS MARKETING COMPANY
Description: Dealers, Traders & Suppliers. Our company is into mining of Gold & Rough Diamonds. We Mine, Trade And Supply our commodities to various parts of the world. Feel free to contact us if you are interested and ready to buy Gold or Rough Diamonds. Our prices are negotiable.

Name: Diamond.ie
Description: Diamond.ie is a thriving Diamond and Jewellery business with over 500 customers.  Fraser Brown opened Diamond.ie in 2005 and it has evolved into a private client service that flourishes due to referrals and repeat business from its client base.  That is why we have decided to move our presence resolutely to LinkedIn and Facebook so that our fans and happy customers can easily show others where we are and what we do!

Name: Alma Amazona
Description: We are Melissa and Carmen Teresa, and we love natural and high-quality jewelry. We are sustainability pioneers, empower women in Colombia and created the first delicate gold jewelry with raw crystals. Alma Amazona means "the soul of the Amazon" and that’s who we are: committed to protect the environment and create fair working conditions in each stage of design, production and shipping.

Name: Battaglia Beverly Hills
Description:
Battaglia’s founder, Giuseppe Battaglia, was the first person to bring the Made in Italy concept to America, followed by Aldo Gucci. He began his fashion career as a tie salesman, slowly building his client roster before becoming a full-fledged brand. A proud believer in quality luxury goods, Giuseppe Battaglia went on to expand his repertoire and provide his customers the finest quality jackets, suits, knitwear, leather goods, and the like for many years. He strove to not only provide his customers with the best in menswear, but the most elegant and beautifully composed pieces one can find.

Today the boutique, now over a half a century in service, continues its tradition of being the most distinguished shop for well-dressed men. Battaglia Beverly Hills, located in the Frank Llyod Wright Building, is the longest standing boutique on the famous Rodeo Drive. Battaglia has stood for quality, elegance, and impeccable customer service for over a half century and continues to be the exclusive destination for exquisite garments.

Name: DRG, Group Of Companies
Description: DRG, Dragon's Gems, Solar Gems, Go Silver, Medio Oriente, Yulong Gems. Main industry is Gemstone and jewelry. Head Office Istanbul Turkey.

Providing fine jewelry at affordable prices. 
Award winning original designs.
Fine diamonds and collector gems.
Estate jewelry and estate jewelry brokerage.
Restorations and repair.
Buyers of diamonds and precious metals.
Fine timepiece brokerage.

Name: Leather Concern
Description:
Raw leather in Bangladesh is way more cheap that you can't imagine as well as labor cost. That's why I can supply finest leather products at a very cheap cost.

We have a leather goods manufacturing factory. Our dream is to make this factory one of the largest leather goods manufacturing companies with state-of-the-art facilities.

Our main product categories are leather bags, leather shoes, sandals, boots, leather cases, covers, wallets, leather apparels and accessories.

Anyone is welcome to visit our little factory and if you are interested to work with us, please don't hesitate to contact me to my email: leatherconcernbd@gmail.com

Name: Infusion Jewels
Description: We're wholesalers of Fine Diamond Jewellery. We supply Diamond Sets and Diamond Bangles/Bracelets. Based out of New Delhi, India.

Name: Lancettedilusso.it - The Luxury Watch Magazine

Name: Amourrina Venezia
Description:
Amourrina is love at first sight for Venetian craftsmanship. Founded by Elisa Evangelisti, who ten years ago adopted Venice as her home, Amourrina breathes new life into the Venetian heritage in the applied arts, focusing on jewellery and the renovation of glassbeads-making. Twisting the murrine tradition with an exclusive, brand-new standard, our signature AMOURRINE are pierced beads handmade in Murano by exceptional glass masters. To enhance the beauty of our beads, we have chosen to frame them in gold finishings.
 
At Amourrina, environmental and cultural sustainability is at the heart of our reasoning. Amourrina jewellery suppliers use certified raw materials produced exclusively from recycled resources. Our beads are made to order in family-run workshops in Murano, home to the talented artisans who handcraft each and every element of our pieces. Our beads are un-seasonal and carry-over from year to year.

VENICE | ART | WOMEN | VIVA!

Name: Masato Pearls, LLC
Description:
Masato Wants to Work with your Jewelry Business

Customers can tell when they are being offered an exceptional value. Imagine being able to sell some of the finest pearls in the world in your jewelry store or business. With Masato Pearls' wholesale program, you can. Masato Pearls wants to work with jewelry retailers just like you, to sell our cultured akoya white and gray pearls, Tahitian black pearls and South Sea gold and white pearls. Our quality standards assure that our pearls have no visible blemishes, but if you are unsatisfied with your order, our 60 day money-back guarantee protects your investment. Contact us at orders@masatopearl.com for more details about our products and opportunities for retailers. Shop Our Collections for a look at the beautiful designs Masato offers.

Become a World-Class Pearl Distributor

Masato delivers the highest quality pearls at affordable prices to American buyers. By reducing the steps between the pearl farmers and retailers, we enable you to offer the best pearls to your customers at prices they can afford, elevating both the appeal of your inventory and your profits. Rather than passing through various processors and wholesalers, we work with pearl farmers and craftsmen ourselves. Our pearls are in the top 3-5% of akoya pearls cultured in Japan, and never treated with dyes or luster-enhancing chemicals, and they are independently tested ensuring they exceed the accepted standards for nacre thickness and quality. 

Bulk Jewelry Sales that Give Back

Your customers will love to know that their jewelry purchase helps give back. A portion of all Masato Pearls' profits goes back to protecting the environment of Ago Bay, through clean-up efforts, education, and mobilizing the local community. This effort for ecological conservation also helps protect the local economy, allowing the natural pearl farming that is traditional in the area to continue to be passed on.
