Name: Bullets4Peace
Description:
Bullets4Peace was launched as a jewellery line made of recycled bullet casings taken from reload centres, streets, and war zones. When a bullet is fired the tip flies towards the target and the casing falls to the ground. Manufacturers reload these casings with live ammunition. Bullets 4 Peace intercepts this vicious cycle by transforming the casings into unique and stylish pendants insuring that these bullets will never find their way back to war zones thus, promoting harmony and peace. Bullets 4 Peace is transforming war bullets into beautiful and unique jewellery as a way of spreading consciousness of peace.
Proceeds support various charity organisations through the company’s “Every Bullet Has a Target” program. The jewellery line has drawn the attention of many influential people from around the world including A-list athletes, actors, musicians, politicians and more. Pop Stars like Rhianna, Justin Bieber, Justin Timberlake and many more have been photographed wearing the popular necklaces made from real bullet casings. The Bullets 4 Peace pendant, which was initially created to promote peace, has quickly become a celebrity favourite.
Bullets 4 Peace a one-of-a-kind jewellery collection founded in 2009 by Rafi Anteby, the owner of luxury fashion line Shadang. Rafi developed Bullets 4 Peace, a jewellery brand with a mission to spread positive change internationally through the world of fashion.

Last but not least, we always like to help all our associates and business partners to add value to their core business activities by unconditionally sharing my knowledge, experience, specially selected services, and bespoke products. 

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you have ANY hard-to-get inquiries from the luxury business niche.

Supra Infinitus Holding - Whatever, Whenever, and Wherever you need it, we got you covered.

The company BOM is an online, retail and wholesale of luxury fashion accessories handmade in Madagascar.
Customer satisfaction is our paramount.  We value fair trade policies, and supports women artisan in Madagascar in this venture.  
We are committed to minimizing our environmental footprint and inspiring others to do the same, to being a good neighbor and being a catalyst for a change by bringing together our partners, customers and the community.

Name: JIWON CHOI
Description:
JIWONCHOI is a jewelry and fashion accessories brand from Seoul, South Korea. 

Made in the heart of Seoul, JIWON CHOI emphasizes high-quality materials, transparent processes, as well as a fair trade to retain artisanal craftsmanship in the historical metalsmithing jewelry district of Jong-no, Seoul.

Inspired by the love for multi-artistic mediums and fuelled by pop culture and contemporary art and languages, JIWON CHOI emerges as a creative jewelry label.

Name: Blackpine | Leather Goods
Description: Australian designed and made premium quality leather goods. Hand-crafted from the finest and toughest materials available, our mission is to create beautiful, functional, durable and minimal goods that will serve you for years to come. Designed for the everyday, the commuter, the photographer, the cyclist. Keep it simple, make it last.

Name: Laura Gibson Jewelry
Description: Laura Gibson Jewelry is inspired by color.  It is the language used to create her vibrant, joyful color juxtapositions. LG Jewelry offers a unique elegance; texture and subtleties of design are combined together in true artistry. Laura Gibson is the 2006 winner of the Retailers Award for Color; and a 2007 winner of the "Designers of the 21st Century" award, by JQ magazine. Laura Gibson Jewelry is carried by galleries and fine jewelers across the country.

Name: Marika Gioielli
Description:
"Dietro ogni gioiello un’emozione diventa simbolo"
Quali parole più adatte per trasmettere ai nostri clienti l'importanza del nostro passato e delle nostre solide fondamenta, sulle quali Marika Gioielli ha costruito un'azienda integra nei suoi principi e valori, che guarda al domani con una consapevolezza sempre maggiore, forte del legame che ha con il suo passato.

Un'azienda, grazie alle persone da cui è formata raggiunge un'entità, fatta di emozioni, di passione, di sacrifici e traguardi, grazie alla dedizione con cui da oltre 30 anni opera il brand Marika Gioielli è divenuto negli anni sinonimo di fiducia ed esclusività.

Dopo la severissima selezione e l'acquisto delle pietre preziose, inizia il lungo processo di lavorazione che porterà il gioiello finito a risplendere in vetrina.
Diamanti di ogni forma, zaffiri, rubini, smeraldi, perle australiane, di Tahiti o giapponesi , rappresentano l'anima dei gioielli Marika che partendo dal disegno vengono realizzati artigianalmente per 'vestire' perfettamente la donna attuale, una donna dinamica, indipendente e passionale.

Name: Erica’s Jewelry
Description: Erica’s is a family and woman operated jewelry business established in 1979 with the vision of being the preferred choice for custom and semi-custom fine jewelry in our community. Now in our 3rd generation, the family staff, having grown up and studied in the fine jewelry business, have unequaled experience in providing jewelry customization, fast turnarounds and most importantly – exceptional quality. We not only have this history, but in addition our staff holds jewelry design degrees and are certified gemologists in diamonds, diamond grading and colored stones by the Gemological Institute of America.

Name: Baressential Ltd
Description:
Welcome to Baressential where we put love, art, nature and you at the heart of what we do. Creators and purveyors of natural handmade body care products and soap. Where imagination, art, ethics and plant power are mixed to make perfect pampering gifts.

Lovingly crafted using the traditional cold process method.

We pour, cut, bevel and polish every piece by hand without the use of machinery.

Our products are all natural, made using the finest raw ingredients, sourced ethically and with respect for the environment.

Our complex, evocative scents are created from a blend of high-quality essential oils.

Each sumptuous soap recipe forms a creamy lather that hydrates and conditions even the most sensitive of skins.

Our BE Kind Nourishing Body Oils are carefully crafted blends of organic cold pressed plant oils designed to nourish the skin.

We put a lot of thought into our designs using active botanicals, clays and mineral pigments to create layers of natural colour.

Name: Noktamodel
Description: Noktamodel provides services to jewelry manufacturers, workshops, and studios such as traditional injection, wax models, and fusion design.

Name: Erik Stewart Jewelry
Description:
Organic inspiration...  Remarkable detail in design and workmanship... Erik Stewart Jewelry presents a uniquely personal synthesis of architectural form and sophisticated style transformed into Art for the Body.

Erik Stewart's jewelry creations display strong geometrical lines, soft flowing surfaces, and the ethereal beauty of fine gemstones. Erik's passion for sculptural art creates perspectives that generate surprising innovations and intriguing reflections in every piece.

Name: Parmar Jewellers - India
Description: Parmar Jewellers - India is a luxury goods & jewelry company based out of 500/501-b Rasta Peth, Sugandha Complex, Near Apollo Theater,, Pune, Maharashtra, India.

Name: MADELEINE paris
Description:
Atrani is a line of semi-fine jewelry inspired by the beauty of the Amalfi Coast in the south of Italy. The name Atrani, comes from a small town in the province of Salerno, is one of the most wonderful secrets of Italy, a jewel to discover.

The Atrani pieces represent the authentic Italian style, which represents each woman and her unique beauty, with a minimalist style that transport you to a paradise full of lemon trees, blue sea, the beauty of its villages and the summer vibes.

Atrani Jewelry incorporates dainty contemporary style with a mediterrean feminine touch where each pice will take you to a different town.

Name: Adara Rituals
Description:
Our mission is to renew and cultivate Jewish spirituality
by expanding beyond the bounds of Judaica, creating
new rituals and material culture. Our one-of-a-kind

products embrace the Jewish spirit from an earth-
based, contemporary perspective, affirming our belief

that tradition doesn’t have to be traditional. We honor
the past while weaving new rituals into the home—our
temples—to create moments of beauty, connection,
and significance.

With an elevated aesthetic, our heirloom-quality pieces
are all designed with deep intention. Sourced from
earth-based materials—natural stones, crystals, glass,
metal, and textiles—our hand-crafted products are
an invitation to enliven and illuminate Jewish rituals
throughout the year.

Name: Dein-Juwelier.de
Description:
Wir bieten bestehenden Juwelieren und Fachgeschäften einen einfachen Zugang zum Online-Verkauf. So erhalten Sie ein zweites Standbein - ganz ohne monatliche Gebühren oder Investitionen. 
Unser wichtigstes Ziel : Die Händler unterstützen und ihnen eine Chance zu geben, ohne Investition im Online-Handel mitzumachen. 

Ziel von Dein-Juwelier ist es, dass lokale Fachgeschäfte, Juweliere und Goldschmiedeanbieter ihre Produkte mittels Schnittstellen auf der Plattform listen und verkaufen. Der Verkauf erfolgt dabei zusätzlich über weitere Kanäle und Shops.

Kurzum: Als Händler hat man keinen Aufwand mit dem Online-Verkauf, erhält aber die Umsätze und Erträge daraus. So erhält man als Einzelhändler ein zweites Standbein zum normalen Geschäft.

A mixture of antique, vintage, and new pieces, we seek out European and American products that exude sophistication, charm, and whimsy while maintaining high quality and high standards: eco-friendliness and social consciousness being chief among them.

Description:
COCOA is a lifestyle proposal, full of elegance, glamor and personality. 
Our brand wants to inspire in a fun and original way to live la dolce vita; a beautiful life, carefree, enjoying all the good things that the world has to offer us. We are fashion literature, music, art and culture. 
We are here to inspire our readers and our voracious curiosity leads us to look for fascinating stories, magical places and the best and latest national and international trends to share with our most valuable asset, the reader.

Our main goal is to expand the brand and get through it a greater number of followers. A magazine with content that is rich and varied, and at the same time harmonious and consistent with the style of COCOA. 
We want COCOA to be a meeting place, a place of inspiration, a must for all lovers of fashion and culture. 

In COCOA believe in a better world, a society of morals and opportunity for all; is why we want to develop a plan to generate social impact, which contribute to the rescue of mankind, its sensitivity to social and cultural problems. We want to be the bridge between fashion, culture and social responsibility. 

Because for us dreaming of a better world, it’s also a lifestyle.

Name: Kristjan Eyjolfsson
Description:
Kristjan Eyjolfsson is a Goldsmith and Silversmith, who specialises in crafting bespoke fine jewellery pieces for clients worldwide. Originally from Iceland, Kristjan now resides in Copenhagen Denmark 

His successful business offers a range of services including custom one-of-a-kind jewellery design and craftsmanship, jewellery repairs, engraving, restorations and remodelling.

Traditionally trained through a 7 year apprenticeship, Kristjan possesses an artisanal dedication to his profession that is increasingly rare today.

All work is meticulously created in ethically-sourced precious metals, diamonds and gemstones.

Consultations by appointment.

Name: Bulu Designs
Description:
Bulu Designs specializes in handcrafted jewelry using unique semi-precious stones and beads.  

Color, shape & texture are important elements of the designs taking the "traditional" and adding a modern edge.

These chic & unique designs are meant to make you feel comfortable wearing them everyday.

At bulu, we make what we love and love what we make!

Name: Filtro Eyewear
Description:
Un viaje por las tres regiones del Perú nos mostró la maravilla de nuestra historia, tradiciones, costumbres y conocimientos de personas que nos inspiraron a crear Filtro. 

Nuestro compromiso es traducir esas experiencias en colecciones de lentes bellos, honestos y contemporáneos. 

Estamos convencidos de que cuando las relaciones forjadas en nuestros procesos, están basadas en el respeto y valoración de los demás; el empoderamiento de las personas involucradas es inevitable. Transformando de esta manera sus mundos por uno mejor.

Name: KMJ Jewelry Design LLC
Description: I have been creating jewelry since 2009. I love creating and making jewelry. Creating one of a kind original pieces is my passion. I do this by acquiring my gems from gem shows, and bead stores in Scottsdale, Arizona & Santa Fe, New Mexico and other bead stores in my local area. When creating my pieces I look for unique pieces to create my jewelry. For necklaces I use the gem as the focal point and create the piece around the gem. When my jewelry has been created it is a unique piece that can not be duplicated. The pieces I choose at the gem show are vibrant in color, unique in style, and stylish. Some of my favorite gems are Turquoise, Amazonite, Opalite, Pink Quartz, Black Onyx. All pieces are original and handcraft by me. My ideas come straight from me. I do not follow patterns or pictures to achieve my pieces. When you buy a handmade piece from KMJ Jewerly Design you will have a one of a kind master piece.

Name: Sparsh Jewels
Description:
Sparsh Jewels envisions to create timeless jewellery masterpieces that
are crafted with love and suitable for many generations to come. We strongly believe in family values as we are traditional businessmen from Rajasthan and therefore we wish to deliver every jewellery piece so perfect as if it was for our own family members. Since its inception, Sparsh Jewels has designed and delivered exquisite 22CT gold jewellery. Our founder learned his craft in
the city of innovators in Jewellery, Kolkata. Today, Sparsh jewels is one of India's best-known jewellery designer having core developing units in Kolkata and Mumbai. We firmly believe that the quality of a product is its true strength.

Name: Stardust Monte-Carlo
Description:
Stardust is an established family business located in the heart of Montecarlo which, for over three generations, has been taking care of some of the wealthiest families in Europe and their jewellery collections.
Everyday, more and more international clients recognise the uniqueness of the pieces created by this Italian family.

Among the rarities of Stardust, certainly stands out its fabulous collection of natural pearls. The family, indeed, jealously treasures one of the largest collections in the world of Conch and Melo pearls, believed to have once been part of the Vietnamese Imperial collection.
Rare gems of exceptional quality are the other passion of the family which is constantly travelling the world in their search.

Today, thanks to a close collaboration among the members of the family, old and new clients visit the Boutique from all over the world to admire the unique pieces that the brand realises under the attentive direction of Susanna, founder and creative director.

Name: SHUBH JEWELLERY PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Shubh Jewellery A culmination of 35 years of expertise in jewellery crafting, diamond cutting and with our very own diamond office in Bombay, Shubh Jewellery was created to offer jewellery Retailers worldwide stunning hand crafted Art Deco style pieces. We work mostly in platinum, using high quality diamonds, colored stones, specializing in fabulous cuts such based French Cuts, old cuts, baguettes, carre etc. We have an extensive design catalog inspired from the art deco jewellery, while being more then happy to produce to your own designs.

All our diamonds are either cut in our own factory or sourced from sightholders guaranteeing KP compliance, Fair trade and Ethical trading practices.

Description:
Die Handwerke Schmuckmanufaktur in der Bonner Südstadt kreiert und fertigt Schmuckunikate, Kleinserien und Auftragsarbeiten. In der Goldschmiede werden alle Schmuckstücke in kunstvoller und leidenschaftlicher Handarbeit hergestellt.

- Schmuckdesign
- Unikatschmuck

Name: Newtown Jewelry
Description:
We want to offer our clientele a new way to see and purchase jewelry. We offer first quality brilliant stones based on precious materials, such as 925 Sterling silver and solid gold. 

We believe that everyone should have access to affordable quality jewelry and we want our clientele to be proud to be part of the big Newtown family. At the end, our desire is to be part of all important events in your life, whether it’s an engagement, a graduation, a gift for your soul mate or making an ordinary day feel special and treat yourself! 

The company had its beginnings in Montreal in 2020. Everything has started when the two founders of the company where looking for their engagement rings and developed a true passion for jewelry. In fact, jewelry can be very complicated and confusing with all the technical terms. After months of searching for the right ring, they got to know and master the different aspects and terms of jewelry. As a result, they are able to use their expertise to offer you the best quality jewelry.

Name: Club Creations
Description:
Ten years ago, Club Creations was founded to offer the highest quality custom products to the finest private clubs, schools and institutions in the country. Products include jewelry, glassware, belts, bags, silk ties and scarves, formal wear and yacht club items along with a wide range of custom accessories. Club Creations specializes in everything from custom cufflinks, blazer buttons, shirt studs and velvet slippers to cocktail, wine and beer glasses along with canvas bags, umbrellas and ribbon belts.   

The company provides one-stop shopping for personalized, monogrammed, engraved, enameled and etched products of the highest quality, never compromising and always exceeding the level of our competitors. Since the beginning, Club Creations has maintained this quality and that is why you will find our products in the most exclusive clubs in America. Club Creations can create custom designs and unique patterns for clubs, schools, institutions and discerning individuals. Most of our items are manufactured in the USA and we stand steadfastly behind our reputation. 

Being club members ourselves, we appreciate club requirements and tailor our products to suit. In the process we pay very close attention to detail and accommodate our clients. Please review our catalogue for a sense of we have to offer in finely crafted items.

Name: HEX EYEWEAR Taiwan
Description:
HEX Eyewear源自於精品眼鏡的代工大廠，有著多年來提供給精品品牌的設計與生產工藝，發展出義大利傳統細節的時尚單品。

HEX六角源於化學式的六角鍵結，也是大自然中最穩固的結構。期許不同領域專才，能夠如分子般分裂、重組，產生化學反應，讓創新的精神延續，體現、提煉來自義大利的生活哲學，展現品牌 ”I’m the HEXER. I refine.” 的精神。

每副眼鏡皆以職業作為發想，將各職業的特質、帶給人的感受，結合代表性的人物，以義大利細膩的作工、佐以豐富的色彩變化，融合六角元素於各細節。而將「戴著眼鏡去旅行」作為品牌宗旨的HEX，也推出眼鏡、墨鏡二合一的款式，透過簡單的步驟，就能將眼鏡化身墨鏡，讓時尚與生活更加更加融合。

除了推出可拆卸的前掛墨鏡外，HEX Eyewear也領先業界，採用創新材質HEXETATE製作板料眼鏡，HEXETATE不僅擁有不吸水、不縮水的特性，重量也比傳統醋酸纖維板材重量輕11%，鏡框的厚度更能達到醋酸纖維無法做到的3mm薄度，更為輕薄，提高配戴的舒適度。全系列眼鏡採用國際鼻墊，適合東西方各族群，符合亞洲人的臉型，於正式場合的配戴，展現獨到品味。

HEX Eyewear也將新的眼鏡板用於製作更多的紳士延伸單品，如各色的梳子、戒指，讓紳士們在整理頭髮的同時也能顯現自己的風格，成為穿搭中的小亮點。

Name: HRX WORKS
Description:
En tant qu'ancien de l'ERM, je propose avec la société autrichienne Jacques LEMANS de développer une montre personnalisée à l'intention des ALUMNI de l'Ecole Royale Militaire Belge (Royal Military Academy of BELGIUM). 
Plus qu'un souvenir, une fierté de l'avoir fait, d'avoir servi et appris en ses murs et selon ses codes. Un sentiment d'appartenance à ce réseau professionnel mondial et une façon discrète et élégante de le revendiquer. Une envie légitime de se démarquer tant pour les dames que pour les hommes que cette institution a formés. Une montre AUTOMATIQUE déclinée pour les deux genres, qui avance grâce à votre énergie en se rechargeant aux mouvements de votre poignet. Côté FACE, une montre qui présente l'emblème de l'ERM sur un fond vert ROLEX et côté pile, la GRAVURE de votre nom et de votre promotion. Un modèle UNIQUE que vous pouvez acquérir en le commandant sur le site HRX-Works.be où vous trouverez toutes les informations utiles. Ne tardez pas à nous rendre visite, Vous avez jusqu'au 12 juin pour précommander VOTRE montre.

Name: Triantafyllakis Jewelry
Description:
Triantafyllakis.gr is the expansion of a family business that has been operating in the field of jewelry and watchmaking since 1958.

Dimitrios Triantafyllakis started in 1958 with a suitcase in hand, selling door-to- door through the neighborhoods of Athens and slowly managed to create a dynamic clientele despite all the economic – and not only – difficulties of that period. He kept up his efforts doing his best for all subsequent years until 1990. Then it was the turn of the next generation to take the reins and the family continued with the same enthusiasm and zest until today. 

Today, obeying the dictates of our time, we created - alongside the existing physical shop – an online store: Triantafyllakis.gr hoping to keep the tradition worthy of our family and alive for the years to come.

Name: Sartoria Massimiliano Capobianco
Description:
Massimiliano Capobianco nasce a Roma il 16 febbraio del 1983. La vicinanza di uno zio, sarto per professione e scelta, alimenta sin dall’infanzia la sua curiosità verso un affascinante mondo fatto di forme e tessuti. A tredici anni una visione già chiara del suo futuro lo induce a varcare le porte dell’istituto Armando Diaz, dal quale esce con una qualifica professionale di operatore dell’abbigliamento, indirizzo sarto-modellista, e con il desiderio di fare d’una passione tutta una vita.

Dopo vari apprendistati volti ad affinare le sue conoscenze, nel 2010 Massimiliano Capobianco apre la sua sartoria in via Collina 34 a Roma, nel cuore dello storico rione Sallustiano.
Il riferimento stilistico della Sartoria Capobianco è l’antica scuola napoletana, puro manifesto di libertà espressiva. Un'eleganza che si adatta con disinvoltura alle forme naturali del corpo.

Massimiliano Capobianco pone al centro della sua arte una visione intima del rapporto con il cliente, il quale si fa guida della sapiente mano dell’artigiano: ogni capo è frutto di un concertato cammino di bellezza portato a compimento con una studiata cura dei dettagli e materiali di prima qualità. Dalle giacche ai pantaloni, sin ad arrivare ai cappotti, ogni indumento viene realizzato con i migliori tessuti italiani ed inglesi, grazie ad innumerevoli passaggi a mano. Il risultato è un'ode all'individuo. Un prodotto unico che rispecchia il gusto e la personalità dell'uomo che lo indossa.

L’Alchimiste Parfums is a boutique creative atelier, crafting immersive 5D multi-sensory experiences for the world’s most discerning Luxury, Niche Fragrance, Beauty, Wellness, and Hospitality brands.

We merge visionary creative direction, refined design, and experiential storytelling to awaken all senses transforming spaces, places, products, and moments into unforgettable journeys of elegance, emotion, and discovery.


About Us | Our Philosophy:
At L’Alchimiste Parfums, creativity is an art form, and every experience is a carefully composed symphony of sight, scent, sound, touch, and emotion.

We partner with visionary brands to design and build multi-sensory experiences that captivate and linger turning launch activations, boutique interiors, pop-ups, and luxury events into immersive narratives that speak directly to the heart of your audience.

Our approach is meticulous, intimate, and highly bespoke. Every detail is a deliberate note in the sensory orchestra crafted to elevate perception, spark desire, and leave an indelible mark.

Services | What We Do:
Creative Direction & Concept Development
From initial vision to final execution, we shape concepts that are as imaginative as they are exquisite.

Design & Build of Immersive Experiences
We engineer 5D sensory environments that blend scent, sound, texture, and visual artistry curated to immerse, delight, and inspire.

Luxury Brand Activations
Exclusive, high-touch experiences for niche fragrance, beauty, wellness, and hospitality brands designed to engage audiences, evoke emotion, and define moments that matter.

Consulting & Sensory Storytelling
We advise and collaborate with brands seeking to expand their narrative through multi-sensory innovation and bespoke experiential design.

Name: Ptak Brothers Jewelry, Inc.
Description:
Ptak Bros. first opened for business in 1946, and quickly began printing catalogs of fine jewelry and distributing them throughout the diamond district.  Ptak developed a reputation for selling quality jewelry at fair prices.  The jewelry trade would anxiously anticipate the release of newest catalogs, which would always feature the best styles from yesterday, as well as trendy new designs.  The demand for the Ptak books spread throughout the country, and Ptak Bros. soon became one of the most recognizable manufactures in the country.

Present day, Ptak Brothers Jewelry, Inc. continues to offer fine, high quality jewelry to retailers across the country.  With increased demand for custom pieces, Ptak has responded with it’s own CAD/CAM department to meet the demand.  Ptak continues to expand its extensive line of rings, pendants, bracelets, and necklaces utilizing expert designers and CAD operators.  We design our new styles, with the end product in mind, and you will find they are often lighter, and require very little time at the bench to finish.

When you call Ptak brothers, you will be greeted by a knowledgeable professional who will go above and beyond to assist you in finding exactly what you are looking for.  The goal of our phone operators is to make your job easier, and allow you to focus on closing the sale with your client.  We will ensure that your order is correct, and completed in a timely manner.   You are not speaking with an order taker; in most cases your representative will be overseeing the manufacturing of your order.

Ptak Brothers knows its customer, and has designed several programs to assist with converting the sale.  Our programs range, from sample replica sets, all the way to our latest program, which includes our patented loving embrace contour tool.   We are always looking for ways to offer our customers something different, and of value.

Name: CDEX
Description:
CDEX - ChinaDiamondEXchange.com is China's EXclusive diamond trading network. It's a unique professional trading platform for diamond industry players around the world interested to buy and sell diamonds in China - the industry's largest market.

Members in CDEX can Interact with other members by sharing industry information, or finding answers and solutions through discussions with other major industry players from around the world. Information on diamonds available and at what prices are readily accessible, helping wholesalers, retailers, and dealers drive their businesses to a higher level efficiently. Understanding how important it is to deal only with people we can trust, CDEX is a members-only service where members are invited by people we know in the industry.

CDEX is managed by a team of industry experts based in Shanghai and Hong Kong who saw a need for an interactive platform for diamond dealers in China, for both the English and Chinese speaking worlds.

Name: Paola Sleiman Fine Jewelry
Description:
PSFJ is a young spirited fine jewelry brand born out of the unique story of its founder, which lies in her multicultural and multidisciplinary nature.
This mix of cultures, along with her interest in various branches of art, such as literature, painting and dancing, which she has been practicing since her childhood, are a major drive in her work. Her academic background in architecture and design gives her a solid base in her work and approach.

It is in this complexity that we dig our inspiration to create timeless pieces and collections for those who value a simple yet singular sophistication, emphasizing on the story behind every piece.

We produce in limited quantities as we believe that luxury pieces should have a certain exclusivity. We also work on commissions for those who wish to translate their own personal stories into timeless and unique jewels.

Follow the brand on Instagram: @paolasleimanjewelry

Name: The Irish Saddler
Description:
After a lifetime of working with horses (and being accompanied by dogs) in 2016 Lucy travelled to Enfield, London, to study for two years at Capel Manor College, one of the last places to study saddlery full time.

Since returning to Co. Down, Lucy has continued to develop her skills in saddlery and leatherwork, regularly traveling to Britain to undertake further qualifications and training from Masters. Their mentorship, alongside support from a number of societies and trusts, has meant that she is able to continue to supply her customers with bespoke, luxury items of leatherwork and saddlery. For well-loved or damaged items, Lucy provides a repair/refurbishment service to give items a renewed lease of life.

It is these traditional skills, and high-quality materials which let your bespoke commissions come to life. From bridles, bags, collars to home furnishings, working on new, exciting designs, we are always excited to bring your ideas to life.

Description:
Valore creates hand-made leather goods and accessories of exceptional quality, blending the romanticism of centuries old Italian workmanship with the innovation of contemporary British design.

Nadav Art, established in 1922, is a boutique studio and hand manufacturer of innovative Sterling Silver and Anodized Aluminum Judaica, Tabletop and Home Décor, and Jewelry based in Jerusalem. Our focus is on maintaining a high level of great design and quality. Above all, we believe that beauty is a result of the perfect balance of shapes, colors, textures, and reflections. We use colorful anodized aluminum, Sterling silver, Semi-precious stones, and Enamel through traditional and advanced manufacturing techniques to bring this goal to life. Each piece is designed and handmade with care so that the final product works in perfect simple harmony for many years to come. 

We draw our inspiration landscapes, Architecture, art, historical events, and Jerusalem itself.
The completed products are exhibited all over the world while our exclusive specialty products find their home in our two boutique stores and workshop in the heart of downtown Jerusalem.
Customers are invited to visit, see the production, and take part in the design process through custom commissions.

Name: wollet magnetic jewelry
Description:
Our core business is in titanium magnetic jewelry and we have a wide variety of high-quality titanium magnetic products. 

All of our titanium magnetic therapy bracelets and necklaces are made of CP Grade 2 Titanium, which is the most bio-compatible titanium grade due to its hypoallergenic and high corrosion resistance. 

Each of our titanium magnetic jewelry is beautifully designed and finely crafted with 2,500 – 3,000 gauss Neodymium magnet (ND magnet), which is the most ideal magnet strength for therapy and treatment. 

Besides, our products are also furnished with germanium and/or far infrared/negative ion therapies, all of which complement and optimize the magnetic therapy itself and thus, distinguish them from similar products. 

Any ietms needed, please clik our website:  http://wollet.en.alibaba.com

Name: SOUTH MIAMI JEWELERS & WATCHMAKERS, INC.
Description:
Welcome to South Miami Jewelers, a cherished second-generation family business established in 1983. Hailing from Belgium in 1975, our family patriarch, a skilled diamond cutter and dealer, brought his expertise to the vibrant community of South Miami. Our commitment to personalized customer service is at the core of our values, ensuring that each interaction reflects the warmth and attention to detail characteristic of a family-owned enterprise.

In addition to our bespoke offerings, we take pride in curating a selection of high-quality jewelry from around the world. Our collection spans diverse styles and influences, providing you with a glimpse into the global tapestry of exquisite craftsmanship. Whether you're drawn to the timeless elegance of classic designs or the contemporary allure of avant-garde pieces, South Miami Jewelers offers a curated selection to cater to every taste.

At South Miami Jewelers, tradition meets innovation and each piece tells a story that transcends time. Whether it's a custom creation or a curated treasure from across the globe, our family is honored to be part of your journey in selecting jewelry that commemorates the moments that matter most. Join us as we continue to provide exquisite jewelry, unmatched service, and a tradition of trust that has been our hallmark since 1983.

Name: Vivienne van Amelsfoort goud & zilver reparatie atelier
Description:
Sinds 1919 – een begrip in de markt!

Ik, Vivienne van Amelsfoort, kan volledig achter mijn producten staan. Door de vele reizen die ik over de hele wereld heb mogen maken, ben ik sieraden tegengekomen die in vele werelddelen ontworpen en gefabriceerd zijn. Een breed en kleurrijk assortiment, van traditionele tot modieuze en zelf ontworpen sieraden uit eigen atelier worden aan u gepresenteerd. Kortom een zorgvuldige eigentijdse samengestelde collectie wordt tentoongesteld in een prachtige van oudsher ambachtelijke locatie, de Vughterstraat.

Voor mij en mijn team van vakmensen is het een juwelierszaak en reparatie atelier geworden zoals die moet zijn en bovenal een plaats waar ontwerp, vakmanschap en klant samenkomen met een gemeenschappelijk doel: een sieradenwens omgetoverd te zien worden in tijdloze klasse. Naast professioneel ambacht die zorgdraagt voor unieke creaties of degelijke reparaties en een uitgebreide collectie ook een professionele bedrijfsvoering. Dit is waar ook ik als vierde generatie voor sta met mijn ”full service” zaak.

Name: Silver Pet Prints
Description:
Silver Pet Prints works with veterinarians and pet retailers in providing pet owners and lovers with unique silver keepsakes, bearing pets' actual paw prints.  We provide a range of products and options to the pet industry, most notably where organisations are looking to add value, or appeal to discerning clients and customers.

Silver Pet Prints provides the wherewithal for an individual to obtain a paw print using its simple, mess-free inkless wipe print kit system. Using this print, we can create a range of sterling silver jewellery bearing the print on one side and the pet's name on the reverse. We have also enhanced app-based technology to achieve the same goal, enabling veterinarian professionals to obtain prints on behalf of their clients at no cost but its the same, unique results.

Name: Gioielleria Cameli
Description:
La Gioielleria Cameli nasce dall’esperienza trentennale di Walter Cameli, e soprattutto dal suo amore per l’antico mestiere dell’arte orafa.
Partendo dai gradini della formazione scolastica, Walter ha saputo crescere e allargare le proprie esperienze attraverso un continuo aggiornamento professionale, come i corsi di orologeria in Svizzera, di arte orafa a Valenza e degli ultimi attestati gemmologici per una attenta e competente valutazione professionale.Grazie al rapporto di fiducia instauratosi con la clientela, la Gioielleria Cameli è divenuta punto di riferimento importante per una scelta ragionata e consapevole di regali e oggetti che lascino SEGNI NEL TEMPO.
Dopo un periodo di crescita intenso, l’attività ha ampliato i propri spazi espositivi, consolidandosi con il nuovo negozio inaugurato il 3 dicembre 2000 nella piazza di Monte Urano; E’ situato in un antico palazzo ristrutturato ed offre oggi un’ideale e completa esposizione per gioielli, argenti ed orologi. Ma non esistono solo i gioielli… L’attenzione verso i giovani e la passione per lo sport hanno portato Walter a a far partecipare la propria azienda quale sponsor per società sportive ed iniziative locali.

Oggi, con la moglie Katia, che da anni lo accompagna sapientemente in questa avventura, vi presenta anche on-line la sua gioielleria e vi aspetta per consigliare e scegliere con voi i migliori prodotti.

Name: Paro Paro
Description:
Striking. Luxurious.  Individual.  Experience the Paro Paro effect.  
Paro Paro means “butterfly” in the Philippines.  We transform and evolve raw materials from the earth into unique and beautiful accessories and decoratives of unparalleled quality and vitality.  

Australian design house Paro Paro is a fresh new presence in the Australian fashion industry.  Our signature look is vibrant, organic and contemporary, blending cutting edge design with sensuous tribal materials.
Paro Paro decoratives and accessories are hand-crafted from the finest natural raw materials.  Our striking creations are hewn from wood, shell, bone, horn and resin, all sourced from the Philippines. 
Principle designer and owner Faye Maramara draws on ancient and contemporary cultures of art and expression. Her exquisite pieces are inspired by the beauty, rawness and contrasts in the natural environments and urban spaces we inhabit.   Faye's Paro Paro designs are truly unique and powerful.
Paro Paro designs are available from selected srockists and online http://store.paroparo.com.au/
We also offer wholesale and bespoke decoratives such as buttons, buckles and clothing ornamentation.  
Paro Paro partners with fashion designers in product development.  Our previous collaborators include such prestigious Australian fashion designers as Veronika Maine, Collette Dinnigan, Lisa Ho, Gorman, Sally Smith, Peter Lang and Kirrily Johnston.
 Paro Paro accessories and decoratives have featured in the 2009 L’Oreal Melbourne Fashion Festival presented by Grazia, Madison, Shop till you Drop, In Style, The Good Weekend, Woman’s Day and the Financial Review.

Name: RE-DO JEWELLERY by Sapna Khandelwal
Description:
Amrit group of companies, Mumbai, established in 1985, by Mr J.P. Khandelwal specialises in the entire spectrum of the world of jewellery from trading, cutting and polishing diamonds to the design and manufacture of fine jewellery collections and bespoke pieces.

J.P. Khandelwal’s only daughter, Sapna Khandelwal, started whole sale of diamonds and diamond jewellery to jewellers across New Delhi in 1998. Along with her father, she co-founded Bond Street Jeweller, an eminent jewellery firm at Khan Market in 2008.

In 2015 Sapna decided to use her wealth of knowledge and expertise in the jewellery industry and started her own RE-DO JEWELLERY studio to refurbish her client’s old gold/polka/diamond jewellery without melting the same. The studio now offers Jewellery Consultations, Supervised Solitaire Setting, all kinds of repairs and patua services

Le choix se fait trop souvent par défaut.

- Vous avez envie particulière, mais vous ne trouvez pas la monture en magasin ?
- Vous trouvez que choisir ses lunettes est souvent compliqué ?

Inventons ensemble les lunettes qui vous subliment

1 / IMAGINEZ des lunettes parfaitement adaptées
2 / CRÉEZ votre modèle dans le style qui vous ressemble
3 / PERSONNALISEZ votre monture selon vos goûts & vos envies

Nous proposons de simplifier et de rendre ludique le choix de vos lunettes.

À partir de nos collections, personnalisez votre monture selon vos goûts et vos envies.

VOUS CHOISISSEZ & NOUS RÉALISONS :

1 / LA FORME que vous préférez

3 / LA TAILLE qu'il vous faut

Vous souhaitez créer vos lunettes selon vos gouts & vos envies et porter une monture parfaitement adaptée à votre visage ?

Soyez unique et réalisez la monture de vos rêves.

Name: hope & humility
Description:
Hope & Humility is the designer and creator of HER SWAG BAG (overnight bag) & HER BAUBLE BAG (travel jewellery pouch). Exquisite satin like pouch with 8 individual compartments to keep her organized.  Makes a perfect gift for all ages!

Our Inspirational Jewelry for her or him was created as a tribute to those individuals & families struggling with addiction, mental illness, depression and any of life's challenges.  It is our goal TO ELIMINATE SHAME.  TO SHOW SUPPORT.  TO BUILD CONFIDENCE.  We ALL have a story...wear yours proudly.

Our products are great for:  Jewelry Stores, Boutiques, Department Stores, Souvenir Shops & so much more!

Our Core Values:

We are a "family first" Company.  We are mothers & wives first and do not apologize for that.  
Privately owned & operated (by a woman), our staff that looks after all aspects of the Co. from shipping & receiving, creative design, labels, sales, marketing, customer service....from inception to launch & everything in between is done by our team of hardworking & talented women (many moms of young school-aged children). We schedule around dentist appointments, summer holidays, Christmas break, field trips & school hours.....although inconvenient during the peak seasons we believe in creating jobs & our philosophy & flexibility has never compromised our ability to get orders out to the stores immediately.

Name: Legacy Findings
Description:
Legacy Findings is a company run by master jewelers specializing in manufacturing high-end, handmade platinum and 18k gold jewelry findings. 

Kendall Steven founder, began his 30-year career in the high-end jewelry trade at Boston University where he obtained a degree in geology and took classes at the Program in Artisanry. After graduation, he moved to New York and began a three-year tenure working at the Gemological Institute of America (GIA) as a graduate gemologist in the colored stone and diamond departments. He continued to follow his passion by apprenticing with an old world European jeweler as well as a five year apprenticeship with William Klein.

During the course of his 30 year career, Kendall began to engineer findings to complement the extraordinary jewelry he created and from that innovation, Legacy Findings was born. Legacy Findings was developed to service the jewelry trade which demands quality and recognizes the value of time. Look for the LF trademark and you can be sure that your jewelry will be secure by fasteners of the highest quality .
